column2:
{{tts en_US:a/an}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】一個（用於單數可數名詞前）
【搭配詞】a book / an apple / a good idea
【例句】I saw a bird in the park.
{{tts en_US:I saw a bird in the park.}}
【用法說明】a/an + 單數可數名詞
【翻譯】我在公園看到一隻鳥。

{{tts en_US:abandon}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】放棄；拋棄
【搭配詞】abandon the plan / abandon hope / abandon a project
【例句】He decided to abandon the plan.
{{tts en_US:He decided to abandon the plan.}}
【用法說明】abandon + 名詞（plan / idea / project）
【翻譯】他決定放棄這個計畫。

{{tts en_US:abbreviate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】縮寫；簡化
【搭配詞】abbreviate a word / abbreviate a name / be abbreviated as
【例句】We usually abbreviate this word in text messages.
{{tts en_US:We usually abbreviate this word in text messages.}}
【用法說明】abbreviate + 名詞
【翻譯】我們在簡訊裡通常會縮寫這個字。

{{tts en_US:abide}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】遵守；忍受
【搭配詞】abide by the rules / abide by the decision / cannot abide
【例句】You must abide by the rules.
{{tts en_US:You must abide by the rules.}}
【用法說明】abide by + 規則／決定
【翻譯】你必須遵守這些規定。

{{tts en_US:ability}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】能力；本事
【搭配詞】have the ability to / show ability / natural ability
【例句】She has the ability to solve problems fast.
{{tts en_US:She has the ability to solve problems fast.}}
【用法說明】ability to + 原形動詞
【翻譯】她有快速解決問題的能力。

{{tts en_US:able}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】能夠的；有能力的
【搭配詞】be able to / able to help / able to finish
【例句】I'm able to finish the job today.
{{tts en_US:I'm able to finish the job today.}}
【用法說明】be able to + 原形動詞
【翻譯】我今天能完成這份工作。

{{tts en_US:abnormal}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】不正常的；反常的
【搭配詞】abnormal result / abnormal behavior / abnormal growth
【例句】The test results were abnormal.
{{tts en_US:The test results were abnormal.}}
【用法說明】abnormal 常用來描述結果、狀況、行為
【翻譯】檢查結果不正常。

{{tts en_US:aboard}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】在船上；在車上；上（交通工具）
【搭配詞】go aboard / come aboard / aboard the train
【例句】All passengers are now aboard the train.
{{tts en_US:All passengers are now aboard the train.}}
【用法說明】aboard 常用於交通工具上
【翻譯】所有乘客現在都已上車。

{{tts en_US:abolish}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】廢除；取消
【搭配詞】abolish a law / abolish slavery / abolish the system
【例句】The government plans to abolish the old law.
{{tts en_US:The government plans to abolish the old law.}}
【用法說明】abolish + 法律／制度
【翻譯】政府計畫廢除這條舊法律。

{{tts en_US:aboriginal}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】原住民的；原住民族的
【搭配詞】Aboriginal culture / Aboriginal art / Aboriginal people
【例句】The museum has a collection of Aboriginal art.
{{tts en_US:The museum has a collection of Aboriginal art.}}
【用法說明】Aboriginal 常描述原住民族相關事物
【翻譯】這家博物館收藏了原住民族藝術。

{{tts en_US:abortion}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】墮胎；中止妊娠
【搭配詞】have an abortion / abortion rights / abortion law
【例句】The debate over abortion continues in many countries.
{{tts en_US:The debate over abortion continues in many countries.}}
【用法說明】abortion 常用於社會／法律議題
【翻譯】許多國家仍持續討論墮胎議題。

{{tts en_US:abound}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】大量存在；充滿
【搭配詞】abound in fish / abound with life / opportunities abound
【例句】Wild flowers abound in this area in spring.
{{tts en_US:Wild flowers abound in this area in spring.}}
【用法說明】abound in + 地方／事物
【翻譯】春天時這一帶野花很多。

{{tts en_US:about}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】關於；大約
【搭配詞】talk about / think about / about ten minutes
【例句】We talked about the movie after dinner.
{{tts en_US:We talked about the movie after dinner.}}
【用法說明】talk about + 主題
【翻譯】晚餐後我們聊了那部電影。

{{tts en_US:above}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】在上方；高於
【搭配詞】above the door / rise above / above average
【例句】The picture hangs above the sofa.
{{tts en_US:The picture hangs above the sofa.}}
【用法說明】above + 名詞，表示在上方
【翻譯】那幅畫掛在沙發上方。

{{tts en_US:abroad}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】在國外；到國外
【搭配詞】study abroad / live abroad / travel abroad
【例句】She studied abroad for a year.
{{tts en_US:She studied abroad for a year.}}
【用法說明】study / live / work abroad
【翻譯】她曾在國外留學一年。

{{tts en_US:abrupt}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】突然的；唐突的
【搭配詞】abrupt end / abrupt change / abrupt stop
【例句】The meeting came to an abrupt end.
{{tts en_US:The meeting came to an abrupt end.}}
【用法說明】abrupt 常用於 end / change / stop
【翻譯】會議突然結束了。

{{tts en_US:absence}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】缺席；不在
【搭配詞】in the absence of / absence from school / long absence
【例句】Her absence was noticed right away.
{{tts en_US:Her absence was noticed right away.}}
【用法說明】absence 常表示缺席／不在場
【翻譯】大家立刻注意到她缺席了。

{{tts en_US:absent}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】缺席的；不在的
【搭配詞】be absent from / absent-minded / absent student
【例句】He was absent from school yesterday.
{{tts en_US:He was absent from school yesterday.}}
【用法說明】be absent from + 地點／活動
【翻譯】他昨天沒有到學校。

{{tts en_US:absolute}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】絕對的；完全的
【搭配詞】absolute silence / absolute power / absolute truth
【例句】I need absolute silence to work.
{{tts en_US:I need absolute silence to work.}}
【用法說明】absolute + 名詞，表示完全的
【翻譯】我工作時需要絕對安靜。

{{tts en_US:absorb}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】吸收；吸引；承受
【搭配詞】absorb water / absorb information / absorb the cost
【例句】Plants absorb water through their roots.
{{tts en_US:Plants absorb water through their roots.}}
【用法說明】absorb + 液體／資訊／衝擊
【翻譯】植物透過根部吸收水分。

{{tts en_US:abstract}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】抽象的；摘要
【搭配詞】abstract idea / abstract art / write an abstract
【例句】The idea is too abstract for young children.
{{tts en_US:The idea is too abstract for young children.}}
【用法說明】abstract 常描述概念、想法
【翻譯】這個概念對小孩來說太抽象了。

{{tts en_US:abstraction}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】抽象概念；抽象化
【搭配詞】level of abstraction / pure abstraction / abstraction in art
【例句】Freedom is an abstraction for some people.
{{tts en_US:Freedom is an abstraction for some people.}}
【用法說明】abstraction 常指抽象概念
【翻譯】對某些人來說，自由是一種抽象概念。

{{tts en_US:absurd}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】荒謬的；可笑的
【搭配詞】absurd idea / absurd claim / sound absurd
【例句】It would be absurd to ignore the warning.
{{tts en_US:It would be absurd to ignore the warning.}}
【用法說明】It is absurd to + 原形動詞
【翻譯】忽視這個警告太荒謬了。

{{tts en_US:abundance}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】大量；豐富
【搭配詞】an abundance of food / abundance of choice / in abundance
【例句】The garden has an abundance of roses.
{{tts en_US:The garden has an abundance of roses.}}
【用法說明】an abundance of + 名詞
【翻譯】這座花園裡有大量玫瑰。

{{tts en_US:abundant}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】大量的；豐富的
【搭配詞】abundant resources / abundant evidence / abundant in
【例句】Fresh fruit is abundant in summer.
{{tts en_US:Fresh fruit is abundant in summer.}}
【用法說明】be abundant in / during
【翻譯】夏天新鮮水果很多。

{{tts en_US:abuse}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】濫用；虐待
【搭配詞】abuse power / child abuse / drug abuse
【例句】He was arrested for abusing his power.
{{tts en_US:He was arrested for abusing his power.}}
【用法說明】abuse + 名詞（power / drugs / children）
【翻譯】他因濫用權力而被逮捕。

{{tts en_US:academic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】學術的；學業的
【搭配詞】academic success / academic career / academic paper
【例句】She hopes to build an academic career.
{{tts en_US:She hopes to build an academic career.}}
【用法說明】academic 常描述學術相關事物
【翻譯】她希望建立學術生涯。

{{tts en_US:academy}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】學院；研究院
【搭配詞】military academy / academy award / academy student
【例句】He trained at a military academy.
{{tts en_US:He trained at a military academy.}}
【用法說明】academy 常指學院／訓練機構
【翻譯】他曾在軍校受訓。

{{tts en_US:accelerate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】加速；促進
【搭配詞】accelerate growth / accelerate the process / accelerate quickly
【例句】The car began to accelerate on the highway.
{{tts en_US:The car began to accelerate on the highway.}}
【用法說明】accelerate 常用於車速、變化、進展
【翻譯】那輛車在高速公路上開始加速。

{{tts en_US:accent}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】口音；重音
【搭配詞】British accent / strong accent / local accent
【例句】She speaks English with a British accent.
{{tts en_US:She speaks English with a British accent.}}
【用法說明】with a ... accent
【翻譯】她說英文時帶有英國口音。

{{tts en_US:accept}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】接受；同意
【搭配詞】accept an offer / accept responsibility / accept defeat
【例句】I decided to accept the offer.
{{tts en_US:I decided to accept the offer.}}
【用法說明】accept + 提議／邀請／結果
【翻譯】我決定接受這份提議。

{{tts en_US:acceptable}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】可接受的；合格的
【搭配詞】acceptable quality / acceptable result / socially acceptable
【例句】Your explanation sounds acceptable to me.
{{tts en_US:Your explanation sounds acceptable to me.}}
【用法說明】be acceptable to + 人
【翻譯】你的解釋對我來說可以接受。

{{tts en_US:acceptance}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】接受；接納；錄取
【搭配詞】gain acceptance / acceptance letter / social acceptance
【例句】It took time for him to gain acceptance.
{{tts en_US:It took time for him to gain acceptance.}}
【用法說明】gain / find acceptance
【翻譯】他花了一些時間才被接納。

{{tts en_US:access}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】使用權；進入；存取
【搭配詞】access the website / have access to / easy access
【例句】Students can access the website for free.
{{tts en_US:Students can access the website for free.}}
【用法說明】access + 網站／資料／服務
【翻譯】學生可以免費使用這個網站。

{{tts en_US:accessible}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】可到達的；易使用的
【搭配詞】accessible building / easily accessible / accessible to everyone
【例句】The building is accessible to wheelchair users.
{{tts en_US:The building is accessible to wheelchair users.}}
【用法說明】be accessible to + 人
【翻譯】這棟建築對輪椅使用者也很方便進出。

{{tts en_US:accessory}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】配件；飾品
【搭配詞】fashion accessory / hair accessory / phone accessory
【例句】A scarf can be a simple fashion accessory.
{{tts en_US:A scarf can be a simple fashion accessory.}}
【用法說明】fashion / car / phone accessory
【翻譯】圍巾可以是簡單的時尚配件。

{{tts en_US:accident}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】意外；事故
【搭配詞】car accident / by accident / traffic accident
【例句】She broke the vase by accident.
{{tts en_US:She broke the vase by accident.}}
【用法說明】by accident = 不小心地
【翻譯】她不小心打破了花瓶。

{{tts en_US:acute}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】嚴重的；敏銳的；急性的
【搭配詞】acute pain / acute problem / acute shortage
【例句】The patient felt acute pain in his chest.
{{tts en_US:The patient felt acute pain in his chest.}}
【用法說明】acute 常描述 pain / problem / shortage
【翻譯】病人胸口感到劇烈疼痛。

{{tts en_US:adapt}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】適應；改編
【搭配詞】adapt to change / adapt quickly / adapt a story
【例句】It took her time to adapt to city life.
{{tts en_US:It took her time to adapt to city life.}}
【用法說明】adapt to + 新環境／改變
【翻譯】她花了一些時間才適應都市生活。

{{tts en_US:adaptation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】改編；適應
【搭配詞】film adaptation / adaptation of a novel / cultural adaptation
【例句】The film is an adaptation of a novel.
{{tts en_US:The film is an adaptation of a novel.}}
【用法說明】an adaptation of + 作品
【翻譯】這部電影改編自一部小說。

{{tts en_US:add}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】加入；增加
【搭配詞】add sugar / add value / add up
【例句】Don't add too much sugar.
{{tts en_US:Don't add too much sugar.}}
【用法說明】add + 東西
【翻譯】不要加太多糖。

{{tts en_US:addict}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】上癮的人；沉迷者
【搭配詞】game addict / shopping addict / social media addict
【例句】He's a video game addict.
{{tts en_US:He's a video game addict.}}
【用法說明】addict 常指對某事上癮的人
【翻譯】他是個電玩迷。

{{tts en_US:addiction}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】成癮；沉迷
【搭配詞】phone addiction / addiction to games / addiction problem
【例句】Phone addiction is a common problem now.
{{tts en_US:Phone addiction is a common problem now.}}
【用法說明】addiction to + 事物
【翻譯】現在手機成癮是常見問題。

{{tts en_US:addition}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】增加；加法；附加物
【搭配詞】in addition to / recent addition / room addition
【例句】In addition to English, she speaks French.
{{tts en_US:In addition to English, she speaks French.}}
【用法說明】in addition to + 名詞
【翻譯】除了英文之外，她也會說法文。

{{tts en_US:additional}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】額外的；附加的
【搭配詞】additional time / additional information / additional cost
【例句】We need additional time to finish this.
{{tts en_US:We need additional time to finish this.}}
【用法說明】additional + 名詞
【翻譯】我們需要更多時間完成這件事。

{{tts en_US:address}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】地址；處理；向…發言
【搭配詞】home address / address a problem / address the audience
【例句】The president will address the nation tonight.
{{tts en_US:The president will address the nation tonight.}}
【用法說明】address + 問題／群眾；也可作地址
【翻譯】總統今晚將向全國發表談話。

{{tts en_US:adequate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】足夠的；適當的
【搭配詞】adequate time / adequate food / adequate for the job
【例句】The room is adequate for a short stay.
{{tts en_US:The room is adequate for a short stay.}}
【用法說明】be adequate for + 用途
【翻譯】這個房間短住是夠用的。

{{tts en_US:adjust}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】調整；適應
【搭配詞】adjust to a new life / adjust the seat / adjust quickly
【例句】You'll need time to adjust to the new schedule.
{{tts en_US:You'll need time to adjust to the new schedule.}}
【用法說明】adjust to + 新情況
【翻譯】你需要一些時間適應新的時間表。

{{tts en_US:adjustment}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】調整；適應
【搭配詞】make an adjustment / price adjustment / minor adjustment
【例句】The company made a small price adjustment.
{{tts en_US:The company made a small price adjustment.}}
【用法說明】make an adjustment / adjustment to
【翻譯】公司做了小幅價格調整。

{{tts en_US:administration}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】管理；行政部門
【搭配詞】school administration / public administration / the administration
【例句】The school administration announced the new policy.
{{tts en_US:The school administration announced the new policy.}}
【用法說明】administration 常指管理單位／行政部門
【翻譯】校方宣布了新政策。

{{tts en_US:administrative}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】行政的；管理的
【搭配詞】administrative work / administrative staff / administrative task
【例句】She handles administrative work in the office.
{{tts en_US:She handles administrative work in the office.}}
【用法說明】administrative work / task / staff
【翻譯】她在辦公室負責行政工作。

{{tts en_US:administrator}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】管理員；行政人員
【搭配詞】system administrator / school administrator / database administrator
【例句】The system administrator fixed the problem.
{{tts en_US:The system administrator fixed the problem.}}
【用法說明】administrator 常指管理者／系統管理員
【翻譯】系統管理員解決了這個問題。

{{tts en_US:admirable}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】令人佩服的；值得讚賞的
【搭配詞】admirable effort / admirable quality / admirable courage
【例句】Her patience is admirable.
{{tts en_US:Her patience is admirable.}}
【用法說明】admirable 常描述品質或行為值得敬佩
【翻譯】她的耐心令人佩服。

{{tts en_US:admiral}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】海軍上將
【搭配詞】navy admiral / retired admiral / admiral in command
【例句】The admiral spoke to the crew before the mission.
{{tts en_US:The admiral spoke to the crew before the mission.}}
【用法說明】admiral = 海軍上將
【翻譯】那位海軍上將在任務前對船員說話。

{{tts en_US:admiration}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】欽佩；讚賞
【搭配詞】with admiration / deep admiration / feel admiration for
【例句】I looked at her work with admiration.
{{tts en_US:I looked at her work with admiration.}}
【用法說明】with admiration
【翻譯】我帶著敬佩看著她的作品。

{{tts en_US:admire}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】欣賞；欽佩
【搭配詞】admire someone / admire the view / admire courage
【例句】I really admire your confidence.
{{tts en_US:I really admire your confidence.}}
【用法說明】admire + 人／特質
【翻譯】我真的很欣賞你的自信。

{{tts en_US:admission}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】承認；入場；錄取
【搭配詞】admission ticket / admission to college / free admission
【例句】Admission to the museum is free on Sundays.
{{tts en_US:Admission to the museum is free on Sundays.}}
【用法說明】admission to + 地方／學校
【翻譯】這間博物館星期天免費入場。

{{tts en_US:admit}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】承認；准許進入
【搭配詞】admit a mistake / admit the truth / admit students
【例句】He finally admitted his mistake.
{{tts en_US:He finally admitted his mistake.}}
【用法說明】admit + 錯誤／事實
【翻譯】他終於承認了自己的錯誤。

{{tts en_US:adolescence}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】青春期
【搭配詞】during adolescence / early adolescence / adolescence and growth
【例句】Many people struggle with change during adolescence.
{{tts en_US:Many people struggle with change during adolescence.}}
【用法說明】during adolescence
【翻譯】很多人在青春期會對改變感到掙扎。

{{tts en_US:adolescent}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】青少年的；青少年
【搭配詞】adolescent boys / adolescent development / adolescent health
【例句】The program is designed for adolescent boys.
{{tts en_US:The program is designed for adolescent boys.}}
【用法說明】adolescent 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】這個計畫是為青少年男孩設計的。

{{tts en_US:adopt}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】採用；收養
【搭配詞】adopt a child / adopt a policy / adopt a method
【例句】They decided to adopt a child.
{{tts en_US:They decided to adopt a child.}}
【用法說明】adopt + child / idea / method
【翻譯】他們決定收養一個孩子。

{{tts en_US:adore}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】非常喜愛；熱愛
【搭配詞】adore her dog / adore music / absolutely adore
【例句】She absolutely adores her dog.
{{tts en_US:She absolutely adores her dog.}}
【用法說明】adore + 人／動物／事物
【翻譯】她非常愛她的狗。

{{tts en_US:adult}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】成年人；成人的
【搭配詞】adult life / adult student / become an adult
【例句】The course is open to adults of all ages.
{{tts en_US:The course is open to adults of all ages.}}
【用法說明】adult 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】這門課對各年齡層的成年人開放。

{{tts en_US:advance}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】前進；進展；預先
【搭配詞】in advance / advance payment / make an advance
【例句】We paid for the tickets in advance.
{{tts en_US:We paid for the tickets in advance.}}
【用法說明】in advance = 提前
【翻譯】我們提前付了票錢。

{{tts en_US:advanced}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】進階的；先進的
【搭配詞】advanced class / advanced technology / advanced level
【例句】She's taking an advanced math class this year.
{{tts en_US:She's taking an advanced math class this year.}}
【用法說明】advanced + 課程／技術／程度
【翻譯】她今年在修進階數學課。

{{tts en_US:advantage}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】優勢；好處
【搭配詞】have an advantage / take advantage of / major advantage
【例句】Working from home has many advantages.
{{tts en_US:Working from home has many advantages.}}
【用法說明】have / offer an advantage
【翻譯】在家工作有很多優點。

{{tts en_US:adventure}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】冒險；奇遇
【搭配詞】go on an adventure / sense of adventure / travel adventure
【例句】We went on an adventure in the mountains.
{{tts en_US:We went on an adventure in the mountains.}}
【用法說明】go on an adventure
【翻譯】我們去山裡冒險了。

{{tts en_US:adverse}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】不利的；有害的
【搭配詞】adverse effects / adverse weather / adverse reaction
【例句】The medicine had no adverse effects.
{{tts en_US:The medicine had no adverse effects.}}
【用法說明】adverse effects / conditions / reaction
【翻譯】這種藥沒有不良副作用。

{{tts en_US:advice}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】建議；忠告
【搭配詞】give advice / ask for advice / take advice
【例句】Thanks for your advice.
{{tts en_US:Thanks for your advice.}}
【用法說明】advice 為不可數名詞
【翻譯】謝謝你的建議。

{{tts en_US:advise}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】建議；勸告
【搭配詞】advise you to / strongly advise / advise against
【例句】I advise you to wait a little longer.
{{tts en_US:I advise you to wait a little longer.}}
【用法說明】advise + 人 + to V
【翻譯】我建議你再等一下。

{{tts en_US:adviser/advisor}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】顧問；指導老師
【搭配詞】talk to your adviser / financial advisor / academic adviser
【例句】Talk to your adviser before choosing your classes.
{{tts en_US:Talk to your adviser before choosing your classes.}}
【用法說明】adviser / advisor 都可指顧問、指導老師
【翻譯】選課前先和你的指導老師談談。

{{tts en_US:advisory}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】顧問的；諮詢的
【搭配詞】advisory board / advisory role / advisory group
【例句】The committee serves in an advisory role.
{{tts en_US:The committee serves in an advisory role.}}
【用法說明】advisory role / board / group
【翻譯】這個委員會扮演的是顧問角色。

{{tts en_US:advocate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】提倡；擁護者
【搭配詞】advocate for change / advocate a policy / human rights advocate
【例句】She advocates for better public health care.
{{tts en_US:She advocates for better public health care.}}
【用法說明】advocate for + 事物
【翻譯】她倡議更好的公共醫療照護。

{{tts en_US:aesthetic}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】美學的；美感
【搭配詞】clean aesthetic / aesthetic appeal / aesthetic style
【例句】They love the café's clean aesthetic.
{{tts en_US:They love the café's clean aesthetic.}}
【用法說明】aesthetic 常描述風格與美感
【翻譯】他們很喜歡這家咖啡店簡潔的美感。

{{tts en_US:accidental}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】意外的；非故意的
【搭配詞】accidental death / accidental damage / accidental mistake
【例句】It was an accidental mistake, not a lie.
{{tts en_US:It was an accidental mistake, not a lie.}}
【用法說明】accidental + 名詞
【翻譯】那是個無心的失誤，不是說謊。

{{tts en_US:acclaim}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】稱讚；高度讚賞
【搭配詞】critical acclaim / win acclaim / receive acclaim
【例句】The film won critical acclaim.
{{tts en_US:The film won critical acclaim.}}
【用法說明】win / receive acclaim
【翻譯】這部電影獲得了影評高度讚賞。

{{tts en_US:accommodate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】容納；配合；提供住宿
【搭配詞】accommodate guests / accommodate needs / can accommodate
【例句】This hotel can accommodate up to 200 guests.
{{tts en_US:This hotel can accommodate up to 200 guests.}}
【用法說明】accommodate + 人數／需求
【翻譯】這間飯店最多可容納兩百位客人。

{{tts en_US:accommodation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】住宿；住處
【搭配詞】find accommodation / book accommodation / student accommodation
【例句】We found cheap accommodation near the station.
{{tts en_US:We found cheap accommodation near the station.}}
【用法說明】find / book accommodation
【翻譯】我們在車站附近找到便宜的住宿。

{{tts en_US:accompany}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】陪同；伴隨
【搭配詞】accompany a friend / accompany him to / accompany the song
【例句】She accompanied her friend to the hospital.
{{tts en_US:She accompanied her friend to the hospital.}}
【用法說明】accompany + 人 + to + 地點
【翻譯】她陪朋友去了醫院。

{{tts en_US:accord}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】一致；符合
【搭配詞】in accord with / in full accord / accord with policy
【例句】The decision is in accord with company policy.
{{tts en_US:The decision is in accord with company policy.}}
【用法說明】in accord with = 與…一致
【翻譯】這項決定符合公司政策。

{{tts en_US:accordance}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】依照；一致
【搭配詞】in accordance with / accordance with the law / full accordance
【例句】The work was done in accordance with the rules.
{{tts en_US:The work was done in accordance with the rules.}}
【用法說明】in accordance with + 規則／法律
【翻譯】這項工作是依照規定完成的。

{{tts en_US:accordingly}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】因此；相應地
【搭配詞】act accordingly / adjust accordingly / plan accordingly
【例句】The schedule changed, and we adjusted accordingly.
{{tts en_US:The schedule changed, and we adjusted accordingly.}}
【用法說明】accordingly 常放句尾，表示因此
【翻譯】行程改了，所以我們也相應調整了。

{{tts en_US:account}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】帳戶；說明；占比
【搭配詞】bank account / account for / social media account
【例句】Please account for every dollar you spend.
{{tts en_US:Please account for every dollar you spend.}}
【用法說明】account for = 說明／占比；也可作帳戶
【翻譯】請交代你花的每一塊錢。

{{tts en_US:accountable}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】需負責的；有責任的
【搭配詞】be accountable for / hold someone accountable / fully accountable
【例句】Managers are accountable for their team's results.
{{tts en_US:Managers are accountable for their team's results.}}
【用法說明】be accountable for + 事
【翻譯】主管要對團隊的成果負責。

{{tts en_US:accountant}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】會計師；會計人員
【搭配詞】work as an accountant / certified accountant / public accountant
【例句】My sister works as an accountant.
{{tts en_US:My sister works as an accountant.}}
【用法說明】work as an accountant
【翻譯】我姊姊的工作是會計師。

{{tts en_US:accounting}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】會計；會計學
【搭配詞】study accounting / accounting firm / accounting system
【例句】He studied accounting in college.
{{tts en_US:He studied accounting in college.}}
【用法說明】study / work in accounting
【翻譯】他大學讀的是會計。

{{tts en_US:accumulate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】累積；聚積
【搭配詞】accumulate wealth / accumulate dust / accumulate experience
【例句】Dust quickly accumulates on this shelf.
{{tts en_US:Dust quickly accumulates on this shelf.}}
【用法說明】accumulate 可作自動詞或 accumulate + 名詞
【翻譯】這個架子很快就會積灰塵。

{{tts en_US:accumulation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】累積；堆積
【搭配詞】accumulation of stress / accumulation of wealth / fat accumulation
【例句】The accumulation of stress can affect your health.
{{tts en_US:The accumulation of stress can affect your health.}}
【用法說明】the accumulation of + 名詞
【翻譯】壓力的累積會影響健康。

{{tts en_US:accuracy}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】準確性；精確度
【搭配詞】check accuracy / improve accuracy / high accuracy
【例句】We checked the report for accuracy.
{{tts en_US:We checked the report for accuracy.}}
【用法說明】check / improve accuracy
【翻譯】我們檢查了這份報告的準確性。

{{tts en_US:accurate}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】準確的；精確的
【搭配詞】accurate information / accurate result / highly accurate
【例句】The weather forecast was accurate today.
{{tts en_US:The weather forecast was accurate today.}}
【用法說明】be accurate
【翻譯】今天天氣預報很準。

{{tts en_US:accusation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】指控；控告
【搭配詞】deny the accusation / serious accusation / face an accusation
【例句】He denied the accusation immediately.
{{tts en_US:He denied the accusation immediately.}}
【用法說明】deny / face an accusation
【翻譯】他立刻否認了這項指控。

{{tts en_US:accuse}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】指控；控告
【搭配詞】accuse him of cheating / falsely accuse / accuse someone of
【例句】They accused him of cheating.
{{tts en_US:They accused him of cheating.}}
【用法說明】accuse + 人 + of + V-ing
【翻譯】他們指控他作弊。

{{tts en_US:accustom}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使習慣
【搭配詞】accustom yourself to / become accustomed to / accustom children to
【例句】You'll soon accustom yourself to the noise.
{{tts en_US:You'll soon accustom yourself to the noise.}}
【用法說明】accustom oneself to + 事物
【翻譯】你很快就會習慣這個噪音。

{{tts en_US:ache}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】疼痛；感到疼痛
【搭配詞】my head aches / stomach ache / aching legs
【例句】My legs ache after a long walk.
{{tts en_US:My legs ache after a long walk.}}
【用法說明】ache 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】走了很久之後，我的腿很痠。

{{tts en_US:achieve}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】達成；實現
【搭配詞】achieve a goal / achieve success / achieve results
【例句】She worked hard to achieve her goal.
{{tts en_US:She worked hard to achieve her goal.}}
【用法說明】achieve + goal / success / result
【翻譯】她努力去實現自己的目標。

{{tts en_US:achievement}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】成就；成果
【搭配詞】great achievement / personal achievement / sense of achievement
【例句】Winning the prize was a huge achievement.
{{tts en_US:Winning the prize was a huge achievement.}}
【用法說明】a great / huge achievement
【翻譯】得獎是一項很大的成就。

{{tts en_US:acid}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】酸；酸性的
【搭配詞】acid rain / stomach acid / contain acid
【例句】Lemon juice is slightly acidic because it contains acid.
{{tts en_US:Lemon juice is slightly acidic because it contains acid.}}
【用法說明】acid 可指酸，也可形容酸性的
【翻譯】檸檬汁因為含有酸，所以略帶酸性。

{{tts en_US:acne}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】青春痘；痤瘡
【搭配詞】have acne / treat acne / acne problem
【例句】He started getting acne in high school.
{{tts en_US:He started getting acne in high school.}}
【用法說明】get / have acne
【翻譯】他從高中開始長痘痘。

{{tts en_US:acquaint}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】使熟悉；使認識
【搭配詞】acquaint you with / become acquainted with / acquaint someone with
【例句】Let me acquaint you with the new system.
{{tts en_US:Let me acquaint you with the new system.}}
【用法說明】acquaint 人 with 事物
【翻譯】讓我來讓你熟悉這套新系統。

{{tts en_US:acquaintance}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】認識的人；熟人
【搭配詞】old acquaintance / casual acquaintance / business acquaintance
【例句】She's an old acquaintance from college.
{{tts en_US:She's an old acquaintance from college.}}
【用法說明】an acquaintance = 認識但不熟的人
【翻譯】她是我大學時期認識的一位舊識。

{{tts en_US:acquire}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】取得；學到
【搭配詞】acquire a skill / acquire knowledge / acquire a company
【例句】She acquired a lot of experience in her first job.
{{tts en_US:She acquired a lot of experience in her first job.}}
【用法說明】acquire 常表示透過努力、時間或交易而取得
【翻譯】她在第一份工作中累積了很多經驗。

{{tts en_US:acquisition}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】獲得；收購
【搭配詞】knowledge acquisition / make an acquisition / company acquisition
【例句】The company announced a new acquisition last week.
{{tts en_US:The company announced a new acquisition last week.}}
【用法說明】acquisition 可指取得某物，也常指企業收購
【翻譯】那家公司上週宣布了一項新的收購案。

{{tts en_US:acre}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】英畝（面積單位）
【搭配詞】ten acres of land / an acre of farmland / half an acre
【例句】They own twenty acres of farmland.
{{tts en_US:They own twenty acres of farmland.}}
【用法說明】acre 用來計算土地面積
【翻譯】他們擁有二十英畝的農地。

{{tts en_US:across}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】穿過；在對面；遍及
【搭配詞】across the street / come across / across the country
【例句】She ran across the street to catch the bus.
{{tts en_US:She ran across the street to catch the bus.}}
【用法說明】across 常表示從一邊到另一邊
【翻譯】她跑過馬路去追公車。

{{tts en_US:act}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】行動；表現；扮演
【搭配詞】act quickly / act like / a kind act
【例句】You need to act fast if you want the tickets.
{{tts en_US:You need to act fast if you want the tickets.}}
【用法說明】act 可作動詞或名詞，常指行動或表演
【翻譯】如果你想買票，就得快點行動。

{{tts en_US:action}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】行動；措施
【搭配詞】take action / course of action / action movie
【例句】We need to take action before it's too late.
{{tts en_US:We need to take action before it's too late.}}
【用法說明】take action = 採取行動
【翻譯】我們得在太晚之前採取行動。

{{tts en_US:active}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】活躍的；積極的
【搭配詞】stay active / active role / active member
【例句】My grandmother is still very active.
{{tts en_US:My grandmother is still very active.}}
【用法說明】active 常描述人、生活方式或參與狀態
【翻譯】我奶奶現在還是很有活力。

{{tts en_US:activist}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】社會運動人士；倡議者
【搭配詞】environmental activist / human rights activist / political activist
【例句】The activist spoke at the rally yesterday.
{{tts en_US:The activist spoke at the rally yesterday.}}
【用法說明】activist 指積極推動某議題的人
【翻譯】那位倡議者昨天在集會上發言。

{{tts en_US:activity}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】活動；活躍
【搭配詞】daily activity / classroom activity / outdoor activity
【例句】The kids enjoyed the art activity.
{{tts en_US:The kids enjoyed the art activity.}}
【用法說明】activity 常指有目的的活動
【翻譯】孩子們很喜歡那個美術活動。

{{tts en_US:actor/actress}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】男演員／女演員
【搭配詞】famous actor / lead actress / supporting actor
【例句】The actress won an award for the film.
{{tts en_US:The actress won an award for the film.}}
【用法說明】actor/actress 指電影、戲劇等表演者
【翻譯】那位女演員因那部電影得獎了。

{{tts en_US:actual}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】實際的；真正的
【搭配詞】actual cost / actual reason / in actual fact
【例句】The actual cost was higher than we expected.
{{tts en_US:The actual cost was higher than we expected.}}
【用法說明】actual 用來強調真實情況
【翻譯】實際費用比我們預期的還高。

{{tts en_US:affair}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】事情；事件；事務
【搭配詞】family affair / political affair / current affairs
【例句】That doesn't concern me, so I'll stay out of the affair.
{{tts en_US:That doesn't concern me, so I'll stay out of the affair.}}
【用法說明】affair 可指事情、事件，也可指私人關係
【翻譯】那件事不關我的事，所以我不插手。

{{tts en_US:affect}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】影響
【搭配詞】affect your health / deeply affect / affect the result
【例句】Lack of sleep can affect your mood.
{{tts en_US:Lack of sleep can affect your mood.}}
【用法說明】affect + 人／事物，表示造成影響
【翻譯】睡眠不足會影響你的心情。

{{tts en_US:affection}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】喜愛；感情
【搭配詞】show affection / feel affection for / signs of affection
【例句】Children need affection from their parents.
{{tts en_US:Children need affection from their parents.}}
【用法說明】affection 常表示溫暖、親密的感情
【翻譯】孩子需要來自父母的關愛。

{{tts en_US:affectionate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】有愛意的；深情的
【搭配詞】affectionate toward / affectionate smile / affectionate message
【例句】He's always affectionate with his dog.
{{tts en_US:He's always affectionate with his dog.}}
【用法說明】affectionate 常描述對人或動物表現出愛意
【翻譯】他對他的狗總是很有愛。

{{tts en_US:affiliate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】附屬機構；使加入
【搭配詞】local affiliate / affiliate company / affiliate with
【例句】The channel is an affiliate of a larger network.
{{tts en_US:The channel is an affiliate of a larger network.}}
【用法說明】affiliate 可作名詞或動詞，指附屬或加入
【翻譯】這個頻道是一個大型媒體網的附屬單位。

{{tts en_US:affirm}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】確認；堅稱
【搭配詞】affirm your support / affirm a decision / affirm that
【例句】She affirmed that she would help us.
{{tts en_US:She affirmed that she would help us.}}
【用法說明】affirm 常用於正式語境，表示確認或重申
【翻譯】她確認自己會幫我們。

{{tts en_US:afford}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】負擔得起；抽得出
【搭配詞】afford a house / can't afford to / afford the time
【例句】I can't afford to buy a new phone right now.
{{tts en_US:I can't afford to buy a new phone right now.}}
【用法說明】afford 常用於金錢或時間上的負擔能力
【翻譯】我現在買不起新手機。

{{tts en_US:afraid}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】害怕的；擔心的
【搭配詞】be afraid of / afraid to say / I'm afraid
【例句】She's afraid of dogs.
{{tts en_US:She's afraid of dogs.}}
【用法說明】be afraid of + 名詞；be afraid to + 動詞
【翻譯】她怕狗。

{{tts en_US:after}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】在…之後
【搭配詞】after school / after dinner / look after
【例句】Let's meet after work.
{{tts en_US:Let's meet after work.}}
【用法說明】after 可表示時間先後，也常見於片語
【翻譯】我們下班後見。

{{tts en_US:afternoon}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】下午
【搭配詞】this afternoon / afternoon class / all afternoon
【例句】I have a dentist appointment this afternoon.
{{tts en_US:I have a dentist appointment this afternoon.}}
【用法說明】afternoon 指中午到傍晚之間
【翻譯】我今天下午要去看牙醫。

{{tts en_US:again}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】再一次；又
【搭配詞】try again / again and again / see you again
【例句】Can you say that again?
{{tts en_US:Can you say that again?}}
【用法說明】again 表示重複一次
【翻譯】你可以再說一次嗎？

{{tts en_US:against}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】反對；倚著；對著
【搭配詞】against the wall / against the law / vote against
【例句】He leaned his bike against the wall.
{{tts en_US:He leaned his bike against the wall.}}
【用法說明】against 常表示接觸、對立或反對
【翻譯】他把腳踏車靠在牆邊。

{{tts en_US:age}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】年齡；變老
【搭配詞】at my age / old age / age well
【例句】Kids of all ages love this game.
{{tts en_US:Kids of all ages love this game.}}
【用法說明】age 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】各個年齡層的小孩都喜歡這個遊戲。

{{tts en_US:agency}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】機構；代理公司
【搭配詞】travel agency / government agency / ad agency
【例句】She booked the trip through a travel agency.
{{tts en_US:She booked the trip through a travel agency.}}
【用法說明】agency 常指提供服務的機構或代理商
【翻譯】她透過旅行社訂了這趟旅程。

{{tts en_US:agenda}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】議程；待辦重點
【搭配詞】on the agenda / hidden agenda / meeting agenda
【例句】What's first on today's agenda?
{{tts en_US:What's first on today's agenda?}}
【用法說明】agenda 可指會議議程，也可指背後目的
【翻譯】今天議程的第一項是什麼？

{{tts en_US:agent}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】代理人；經紀人；特工
【搭配詞】real estate agent / talent agent / travel agent
【例句】His agent helped him get the role.
{{tts en_US:His agent helped him get the role.}}
【用法說明】agent 指代表他人處理事務的人
【翻譯】他的經紀人幫他拿到了那個角色。

{{tts en_US:aggression}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】侵略；攻擊性
【搭配詞】show aggression / act of aggression / aggression toward
【例句】The coach warned him to control his aggression.
{{tts en_US:The coach warned him to control his aggression.}}
【用法說明】aggression 常指敵意或攻擊行為
【翻譯】教練警告他要控制自己的攻擊性。

{{tts en_US:aggressive}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】有攻擊性的；積極進取的
【搭配詞】aggressive behavior / aggressive marketing / too aggressive
【例句】The dog became aggressive when a stranger came close.
{{tts en_US:The dog became aggressive when a stranger came close.}}
【用法說明】aggressive 可指具攻擊性，也可指強勢積極
【翻譯】陌生人靠近時，那隻狗變得很有攻擊性。

{{tts en_US:ago}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】以前；之前
【搭配詞】a year ago / long ago / not long ago
【例句】We moved here two years ago.
{{tts en_US:We moved here two years ago.}}
【用法說明】ago 用在表示現在往前算的時間
【翻譯】我們是兩年前搬來這裡的。

{{tts en_US:agony}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】極度痛苦
【搭配詞】in agony / agony of defeat / mental agony
【例句】He was in agony after the accident.
{{tts en_US:He was in agony after the accident.}}
【用法說明】agony 指身體或心理上的劇烈痛苦
【翻譯】事故後他痛苦不堪。

{{tts en_US:agree}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】同意；贊成
【搭配詞】agree with / agree to / agree on
【例句】I agree with you on that point.
{{tts en_US:I agree with you on that point.}}
【用法說明】agree with + 人／意見；agree on + 事項
【翻譯】那一點我同意你。

{{tts en_US:agreement}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】同意；協議
【搭配詞】reach an agreement / sign an agreement / trade agreement
【例句】We finally reached an agreement.
{{tts en_US:We finally reached an agreement.}}
【用法說明】reach an agreement = 達成協議
【翻譯】我們終於達成協議了。

{{tts en_US:agreeable}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】令人愉快的；和善的
【搭配詞】agreeable person / agreeable weather / quite agreeable
【例句】The hotel staff were very agreeable.
{{tts en_US:The hotel staff were very agreeable.}}
【用法說明】agreeable 常表示人好相處、事情令人愉快
【翻譯】那家飯店的員工都很和善。

{{tts en_US:agricultural}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】農業的
【搭配詞】agricultural products / agricultural land / agricultural policy
【例句】This area is known for its agricultural products.
{{tts en_US:This area is known for its agricultural products.}}
【用法說明】agricultural 用來描述農業相關事物
【翻譯】這個地區以農產品聞名。

{{tts en_US:agriculture}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】農業
【搭配詞】modern agriculture / organic agriculture / agriculture industry
【例句】Agriculture is still important to the local economy.
{{tts en_US:Agriculture is still important to the local economy.}}
【用法說明】agriculture 指農作、畜牧等產業
【翻譯】農業對當地經濟仍然很重要。

{{tts en_US:ahead}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】在前面；提前；向前
【搭配詞】go ahead / plan ahead / ahead of time
【例句】Go ahead and start without me.
{{tts en_US:Go ahead and start without me.}}
【用法說明】go ahead 常表示『請開始／繼續』
【翻譯】你先開始，不用等我。

{{tts en_US:aid}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】幫助；援助
【搭配詞】first aid / foreign aid / financial aid
【例句】The charity provides aid to poor families.
{{tts en_US:The charity provides aid to poor families.}}
【用法說明】aid 可作名詞或動詞，表示援助
【翻譯】這個慈善機構提供援助給貧困家庭。

{{tts en_US:aim}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】目標；力求；瞄準
【搭配詞】aim at / aim for / with the aim of
【例句】We're aiming for a better result this year.
{{tts en_US:We're aiming for a better result this year.}}
【用法說明】aim for = 以…為目標；aim at 也可指瞄準
【翻譯】我們今年的目標是爭取更好的結果。

{{tts en_US:air}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】空氣；天空；使通風
【搭配詞】fresh air / in the air / air out
【例句】Let's open the window and get some fresh air.
{{tts en_US:Let's open the window and get some fresh air.}}
【用法說明】air 最常指空氣，也可作動詞表示通風
【翻譯】我們把窗戶打開透透氣吧。

{{tts en_US:aircraft}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】飛機；航空器
【搭配詞】military aircraft / passenger aircraft / aircraft safety
【例句】The aircraft landed safely despite the storm.
{{tts en_US:The aircraft landed safely despite the storm.}}
【用法說明】aircraft 是正式用語，指各類航空器
【翻譯】儘管有暴風雨，那架飛機還是安全降落了。

{{tts en_US:airline}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】航空公司
【搭配詞】budget airline / major airline / airline ticket
【例句】Which airline are you flying with?
{{tts en_US:Which airline are you flying with?}}
【用法說明】airline 指提供航班服務的公司
【翻譯】你要搭哪一家航空公司的飛機？

{{tts en_US:airplane/plane}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】飛機
【搭配詞】take a plane / on the plane / board the airplane
【例句】Our plane leaves at seven in the morning.
{{tts en_US:Our plane leaves at seven in the morning.}}
【用法說明】plane 是日常更常見的說法
【翻譯】我們的飛機早上七點起飛。

{{tts en_US:airport}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】機場
【搭配詞】at the airport / airport shuttle / airport security
【例句】I'll meet you at the airport.
{{tts en_US:I'll meet you at the airport.}}
【用法說明】airport 指飛機起降與旅客出入的地方
【翻譯】我會去機場接你。

{{tts en_US:airtight}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】密封的；無懈可擊的
【搭配詞】airtight container / airtight argument / airtight lid
【例句】Keep the cookies in an airtight container.
{{tts en_US:Keep the cookies in an airtight container.}}
【用法說明】airtight 常指密封，也可比喻毫無漏洞
【翻譯】把餅乾放在密封容器裡。

{{tts en_US:airway}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】呼吸道；航線
【搭配詞】clear the airway / blocked airway / upper airway
【例句】The doctor checked whether her airway was clear.
{{tts en_US:The doctor checked whether her airway was clear.}}
【用法說明】airway 在醫療語境常指呼吸道
【翻譯】醫生確認她的呼吸道是否暢通。

{{tts en_US:aisle}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】走道
【搭配詞】walk down the aisle / aisle seat / supermarket aisle
【例句】I asked for an aisle seat on the flight.
{{tts en_US:I asked for an aisle seat on the flight.}}
【用法說明】aisle 指兩排座位或貨架之間的走道
【翻譯】我在那班飛機上要求靠走道的座位。

{{tts en_US:alarm}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】警報；鬧鐘；使驚慌
【搭配詞】set an alarm / fire alarm / alarm clock
【例句】My alarm didn't go off this morning.
{{tts en_US:My alarm didn't go off this morning.}}
【用法說明】alarm 可指警報或鬧鐘，也可作動詞
【翻譯】我今天早上的鬧鐘沒有響。

{{tts en_US:album}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】相簿；專輯
【搭配詞】photo album / new album / debut album
【例句】Her new album comes out next month.
{{tts en_US:Her new album comes out next month.}}
【用法說明】album 可指照片相簿或音樂專輯
【翻譯】她的新專輯下個月發行。

{{tts en_US:alcohol}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】酒；酒精
【搭配詞】drink alcohol / alcohol content / too much alcohol
【例句】He doesn't drink alcohol.
{{tts en_US:He doesn't drink alcohol.}}
【用法說明】alcohol 可指酒類，也可指酒精成分
【翻譯】他不喝酒。

{{tts en_US:alcoholic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】與「alcoholic」相關的用法
【搭配詞】alcoholic in use / use alcoholic / common alcoholic
【例句】We often use alcoholic in daily English.
{{tts en_US:We often use alcoholic in daily English.}}
【用法說明】alcoholic 依語境判讀
【翻譯】這句是在示範 alcoholic 的基本用法。

{{tts en_US:alert}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】與「alert」相關的用法
【搭配詞】alert in use / use alert / common alert
【例句】We often use alert in daily English.
{{tts en_US:We often use alert in daily English.}}
【用法說明】alert 依語境判讀
【翻譯】這句是在示範 alert 的基本用法。

{{tts en_US:algebra}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】與「algebra」相關的事物、概念或狀態
【搭配詞】algebra problem / algebra system / algebra idea
【例句】The algebra caused a lot of discussion.
{{tts en_US:The algebra caused a lot of discussion.}}
【用法說明】algebra 常作名詞使用
【翻譯】這個 algebra 引發了很多討論。

{{tts en_US:alien}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】與「alien」相關的用法
【搭配詞】alien in use / use alien / common alien
【例句】We often use alien in daily English.
{{tts en_US:We often use alien in daily English.}}
【用法說明】alien 依語境判讀
【翻譯】這句是在示範 alien 的基本用法。

{{tts en_US:alienate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】表示與「alienate」相關的動作或行為
【搭配詞】alienate a plan / alienate the problem / alienate carefully
【例句】They plan to alienate it tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:They plan to alienate it tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】alienate 常作動詞使用
【翻譯】他們計畫明天alienate這件事。

{{tts en_US:align}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】表示與「align」相關的動作或行為
【搭配詞】align a plan / align the problem / align carefully
【例句】They plan to align it tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:They plan to align it tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】align 常作動詞使用
【翻譯】他們計畫明天align這件事。

{{tts en_US:alike}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】與「alike」相關的用法
【搭配詞】alike in use / use alike / common alike
【例句】We often use alike in daily English.
{{tts en_US:We often use alike in daily English.}}
【用法說明】alike 依語境判讀
【翻譯】這句是在示範 alike 的基本用法。

{{tts en_US:alive}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】表示與「alive」相關的特徵或狀態
【搭配詞】feel alive / seem alive / look alive
【例句】The result seems alive to me.
{{tts en_US:The result seems alive to me.}}
【用法說明】alive 常用來描述人、事、物
【翻譯】這個結果在我看來是alive的。

{{tts en_US:all}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】全部；所有的
【搭配詞】all day / all of us / all the time
【例句】I've been busy all day.
{{tts en_US:I've been busy all day.}}
【用法說明】all 可修飾名詞，也常放在時間詞前
【翻譯】我一整天都很忙。

{{tts en_US:allege}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】表示與「allege」相關的動作或行為
【搭配詞】allege a plan / allege the problem / allege carefully
【例句】They plan to allege it tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:They plan to allege it tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】allege 常作動詞使用
【翻譯】他們計畫明天allege這件事。

{{tts en_US:allergic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】過敏的
【搭配詞】allergic to cats / allergic reaction / be allergic to
【例句】I'm allergic to peanuts.
{{tts en_US:I'm allergic to peanuts.}}
【用法說明】be allergic to + 食物／動物／物質
【翻譯】我對花生過敏。

{{tts en_US:allergy}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】過敏
【搭配詞】food allergy / skin allergy / allergy to dust
【例句】She has an allergy to shellfish.
{{tts en_US:She has an allergy to shellfish.}}
【用法說明】allergy to + 物質／食物
【翻譯】她對貝類過敏。

{{tts en_US:alley}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】小巷；巷弄
【搭配詞】dark alley / back alley / walk down the alley
【例句】They disappeared into a narrow alley.
{{tts en_US:They disappeared into a narrow alley.}}
【用法說明】alley 指建築物之間狹窄的小路
【翻譯】他們消失在一條狹窄的小巷裡。

{{tts en_US:alliance}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】聯盟；結盟
【搭配詞】form an alliance / political alliance / strategic alliance
【例句】The two companies formed an alliance last year.
{{tts en_US:The two companies formed an alliance last year.}}
【用法說明】alliance 指合作結盟的關係
【翻譯】那兩家公司去年建立了聯盟。

{{tts en_US:alligator}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】短吻鱷
【搭配詞】young alligator / alligator skin / large alligator
【例句】We saw an alligator near the river.
{{tts en_US:We saw an alligator near the river.}}
【用法說明】alligator 是一種鱷魚
【翻譯】我們在河邊看到一隻短吻鱷。

{{tts en_US:allocate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】分配；配置
【搭配詞】allocate resources / allocate time / allocate funds
【例句】We need to allocate more time for training.
{{tts en_US:We need to allocate more time for training.}}
【用法說明】allocate 常用於時間、金錢、人力分配
【翻譯】我們需要分配更多時間給訓練。

{{tts en_US:allow}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】允許；准許
【搭配詞】allow someone to / allow access / allow time
【例句】My parents don't allow me to stay out late.
{{tts en_US:My parents don't allow me to stay out late.}}
【用法說明】allow + 人 + to V
【翻譯】我爸媽不准我在外面待太晚。

{{tts en_US:allowance}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】零用錢；津貼
【搭配詞】weekly allowance / travel allowance / give an allowance
【例句】My son gets a small allowance every week.
{{tts en_US:My son gets a small allowance every week.}}
【用法說明】allowance 可指零用錢，也可指補助津貼
【翻譯】我兒子每週都會拿到一點零用錢。

{{tts en_US:ally}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】盟友；支持者
【搭配詞】close ally / political ally / become allies
【例句】She became one of my closest allies at work.
{{tts en_US:She became one of my closest allies at work.}}
【用法說明】ally 可指國家盟友，也可指支持你的人
【翻譯】她成了我在職場上最親近的盟友之一。

{{tts en_US:almond}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】與「almond」相關的事物、概念或狀態
【搭配詞】almond problem / almond system / almond idea
【例句】The almond caused a lot of discussion.
{{tts en_US:The almond caused a lot of discussion.}}
【用法說明】almond 常作名詞使用
【翻譯】這個 almond 引發了很多討論。

{{tts en_US:almost}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】幾乎；差不多
【搭配詞】almost ready / almost never / almost done
【例句】I'm almost done with my homework.
{{tts en_US:I'm almost done with my homework.}}
【用法說明】almost 常放在形容詞、動詞前
【翻譯】我的作業快寫完了。

{{tts en_US:alone}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】單獨地；獨自的
【搭配詞】be alone / leave me alone / live alone
【例句】She lives alone in Taipei.
{{tts en_US:She lives alone in Taipei.}}
【用法說明】alone 可作形容詞或副詞，表示獨自一人
【翻譯】她一個人住在台北。

{{tts en_US:along}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】沿著；一起；向前
【搭配詞】walk along the river / come along / get along
【例句】We walked along the beach after dinner.
{{tts en_US:We walked along the beach after dinner.}}
【用法說明】along 常表示沿著某方向前進
【翻譯】晚餐後我們沿著海邊散步。

{{tts en_US:alongside}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】在旁邊；與…一起
【搭配詞】work alongside / stand alongside / alongside the road
【例句】She worked alongside experienced teachers.
{{tts en_US:She worked alongside experienced teachers.}}
【用法說明】alongside 常表示在旁邊或共同合作
【翻譯】她和有經驗的老師一起工作。

{{tts en_US:aloud}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】大聲地
【搭配詞】read aloud / say aloud / think aloud
【例句】Can you read the sentence aloud?
{{tts en_US:Can you read the sentence aloud?}}
【用法說明】aloud 表示發出聲音地說出來
【翻譯】你可以把那個句子大聲念出來嗎？

{{tts en_US:alphabet}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】字母表
【搭配詞】learn the alphabet / English alphabet / alphabet song
【例句】The kids are learning the alphabet at school.
{{tts en_US:The kids are learning the alphabet at school.}}
【用法說明】alphabet 指一套語言使用的字母系統
【翻譯】孩子們正在學校學字母表。

{{tts en_US:already}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】已經
【搭配詞】already finished / already know / already there
【例句】I've already eaten, thanks.
{{tts en_US:I've already eaten, thanks.}}
【用法說明】already 常用於表示事情比預期更早完成
【翻譯】我已經吃過了，謝謝。

{{tts en_US:also}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】也；而且
【搭配詞】also know / also need / not only... but also...
【例句】She also wants to join the trip.
{{tts en_US:She also wants to join the trip.}}
【用法說明】also 常用來補充另一個資訊
【翻譯】她也想加入這趟旅行。

{{tts en_US:alter}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】改變；修改
【搭配詞】alter a plan / alter the design / slightly alter
【例句】We had to alter our plans because of the rain.
{{tts en_US:We had to alter our plans because of the rain.}}
【用法說明】alter 表示做出改動，常用於計畫、設計、衣服
【翻譯】因為下雨，我們只好修改原本的計畫。

{{tts en_US:alternate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】交替的；輪流的；替代的
【搭配詞】alternate route / alternate between / on alternate days
【例句】We took an alternate route to avoid traffic.
{{tts en_US:We took an alternate route to avoid traffic.}}
【用法說明】alternate 可作形容詞或動詞，表示替代或交替
【翻譯】我們改走替代路線來避開塞車。

{{tts en_US:alternative}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】替代方案；替代的
【搭配詞】better alternative / alternative energy / have no alternative
【例句】We need a cheaper alternative.
{{tts en_US:We need a cheaper alternative.}}
【用法說明】alternative 常指另一個可選方案
【翻譯】我們需要一個更便宜的替代方案。

{{tts en_US:although}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】雖然；儘管
【搭配詞】although it was late / although I tried / although he said no
【例句】Although it was raining, we still went out.
{{tts en_US:Although it was raining, we still went out.}}
【用法說明】although 用來引導讓步子句
【翻譯】雖然在下雨，我們還是出門了。

{{tts en_US:altitude}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】高度；海拔
【搭配詞】high altitude / at this altitude / change in altitude
【例句】Some people get headaches at high altitude.
{{tts en_US:Some people get headaches at high altitude.}}
【用法說明】altitude 常指離海平面的高度
【翻譯】有些人在高海拔會頭痛。

{{tts en_US:altogether}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】總共；完全地
【搭配詞】altogether different / not altogether / cost altogether
【例句】It cost me fifty dollars altogether.
{{tts en_US:It cost me fifty dollars altogether.}}
【用法說明】altogether 可表示總共，也可表示完全
【翻譯】總共花了我五十美元。

{{tts en_US:aluminum}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】鋁
【搭配詞】aluminum foil / aluminum can / made of aluminum
【例句】Wrap the food in aluminum foil.
{{tts en_US:Wrap the food in aluminum foil.}}
【用法說明】aluminum 是金屬『鋁』的美式拼法
【翻譯】把食物用鋁箔包起來。

{{tts en_US:always}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】總是；一直
【搭配詞】always late / always remember / as always
【例句】He's always losing his keys.
{{tts en_US:He's always losing his keys.}}
【用法說明】always 表示頻率高，幾乎每次都如此
【翻譯】他老是弄丟鑰匙。

{{tts en_US:amateur}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】業餘的；業餘者
【搭配詞】amateur photographer / amateur player / complete amateur
【例句】He's an amateur photographer with a great eye.
{{tts en_US:He's an amateur photographer with a great eye.}}
【用法說明】amateur 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】他是個很有眼光的業餘攝影師。

{{tts en_US:amaze}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】使驚訝
【搭配詞】amaze me / amaze everyone / never cease to amaze
【例句】Her energy amazes me.
{{tts en_US:Her energy amazes me.}}
【用法說明】amaze + 人，表示讓某人感到驚訝
【翻譯】她的活力讓我很驚訝。

{{tts en_US:amazement}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】驚訝；驚奇
【搭配詞】to my amazement / in amazement / with amazement
【例句】To my amazement, he remembered my name.
{{tts en_US:To my amazement, he remembered my name.}}
【用法說明】amazement 常見於固定片語 to my amazement
【翻譯】讓我很驚訝的是，他記得我的名字。

{{tts en_US:ambassador}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】大使；代表
【搭配詞】brand ambassador / ambassador to / serve as ambassador
【例句】She was appointed ambassador to France.
{{tts en_US:She was appointed ambassador to France.}}
【用法說明】ambassador 可指外交大使，也可指品牌代言人
【翻譯】她被任命為駐法國大使。

{{tts en_US:ambiguity}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】模糊；歧義
【搭配詞】avoid ambiguity / legal ambiguity / source of ambiguity
【例句】The contract leaves too much room for ambiguity.
{{tts en_US:The contract leaves too much room for ambiguity.}}
【用法說明】ambiguity 指意思或規則不清楚
【翻譯】這份合約留下太多模糊空間。

{{tts en_US:ambiguous}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】模糊不清的；有歧義的
【搭配詞】ambiguous answer / ambiguous message / intentionally ambiguous
【例句】His reply was too ambiguous to understand.
{{tts en_US:His reply was too ambiguous to understand.}}
【用法說明】ambiguous 表示意思不明確，可能有多種解讀
【翻譯】他的回覆太模糊，讓人看不懂。

{{tts en_US:ambition}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】抱負；野心
【搭配詞】have ambition / career ambition / full of ambition
【例句】She has the ambition to start her own business.
{{tts en_US:She has the ambition to start her own business.}}
【用法說明】ambition 常表示想達成大目標的企圖心
【翻譯】她有自己創業的抱負。

{{tts en_US:ambitious}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】有抱負的；宏大的
【搭配詞】ambitious plan / ambitious goal / highly ambitious
【例句】They're working on an ambitious new project.
{{tts en_US:They're working on an ambitious new project.}}
【用法說明】ambitious 可指人有野心，也可指計畫目標很大
【翻譯】他們正在進行一個很有企圖心的新計畫。

{{tts en_US:ambulance}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】救護車
【搭配詞】call an ambulance / ambulance driver / in the ambulance
【例句】Someone called an ambulance right away.
{{tts en_US:Someone called an ambulance right away.}}
【用法說明】ambulance 指載送病患的急救車輛
【翻譯】有人立刻叫了救護車。

{{tts en_US:amend}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】修正；修改
【搭配詞】amend the law / amend the report / amend a mistake
【例句】They amended the contract before signing it.
{{tts en_US:They amended the contract before signing it.}}
【用法說明】amend 常用於法律、文件或正式內容的修正
【翻譯】他們在簽約前修改了合約。

{{tts en_US:amid/amidst}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】在…之中；在…期間
【搭配詞】amid the noise / amidst the trees / amidst growing pressure
【例句】He stayed quiet amidst all the noise.
{{tts en_US:He stayed quiet amidst all the noise.}}
【用法說明】amidst 是 amid 的較正式變體
【翻譯】在一片吵雜中，他仍然保持安靜。

{{tts en_US:among}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】在…之中
【搭配詞】among friends / among the trees / popular among students
【例句】She felt relaxed among close friends.
{{tts en_US:She felt relaxed among close friends.}}
【用法說明】among 用於三者以上的人事物之中
【翻譯】她和親近的朋友在一起時很放鬆。

{{tts en_US:amount}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】數量；總額
【搭配詞】a large amount of / amount to / total amount
【例句】We spent a huge amount of money on repairs.
{{tts en_US:We spent a huge amount of money on repairs.}}
【用法說明】a large amount of + 不可數名詞
【翻譯】我們花了很多錢在修繕上。

{{tts en_US:ample}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】充足的；寬敞的
【搭配詞】ample time / ample space / ample evidence
【例句】We had ample time to get ready.
{{tts en_US:We had ample time to get ready.}}
【用法說明】ample 表示綽綽有餘、很充足
【翻譯】我們有很充裕的時間準備。

{{tts en_US:amplify}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】放大；增強
【搭配詞】amplify the sound / amplify your voice / amplify the effect
【例句】The microphone amplified her voice.
{{tts en_US:The microphone amplified her voice.}}
【用法說明】amplify 常表示讓聲音、效果或影響變得更強
【翻譯】麥克風放大了她的聲音。

{{tts en_US:amuse}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】逗樂；使發笑
【搭配詞】amuse the kids / amuse yourself / be amused by
【例句】His jokes always amuse the whole class.
{{tts en_US:His jokes always amuse the whole class.}}
【用法說明】amuse + 人，表示把某人逗笑
【翻譯】他的笑話總是能把全班逗笑。

{{tts en_US:amusement}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】娛樂；有趣
【搭配詞】for amusement / amusement park / to my amusement
【例句】The kids ran straight to the amusement rides.
{{tts en_US:The kids ran straight to the amusement rides.}}
【用法說明】amusement 可指娛樂活動或覺得有趣
【翻譯】孩子們一進去就直奔遊樂設施。

{{tts en_US:analogy}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】類比；比喻
【搭配詞】draw an analogy / useful analogy / analogy between
【例句】The teacher used a simple analogy to explain the idea.
{{tts en_US:The teacher used a simple analogy to explain the idea.}}
【用法說明】analogy 常用來幫助理解抽象概念
【翻譯】老師用一個簡單的比喻來解釋這個概念。

{{tts en_US:analysis}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】分析
【搭配詞】data analysis / in-depth analysis / market analysis
【例句】We need more analysis before making a decision.
{{tts en_US:We need more analysis before making a decision.}}
【用法說明】analysis 指仔細研究與拆解問題
【翻譯】我們在做決定前還需要更多分析。

{{tts en_US:analyst}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】分析師
【搭配詞】financial analyst / data analyst / political analyst
【例句】She works as a data analyst at a tech company.
{{tts en_US:She works as a data analyst at a tech company.}}
【用法說明】analyst 指專門做分析工作的人
【翻譯】她在科技公司擔任資料分析師。

{{tts en_US:analytical}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】分析的；有分析能力的
【搭配詞】analytical skills / analytical mind / analytical approach
【例句】He's very analytical when solving problems.
{{tts en_US:He's very analytical when solving problems.}}
【用法說明】analytical 常形容人思考有條理、重分析
【翻譯】他在解決問題時非常有分析能力。

{{tts en_US:analyze}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】分析
【搭配詞】analyze the data / analyze a problem / carefully analyze
【例句】Let's analyze the results first.
{{tts en_US:Let's analyze the results first.}}
【用法說明】analyze + 資料／問題／情況
【翻譯】我們先來分析結果吧。

{{tts en_US:ancestor}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】祖先；祖宗
【搭配詞】common ancestor / family ancestor / distant ancestor
【例句】My ancestors came from this region.
{{tts en_US:My ancestors came from this region.}}
【用法說明】ancestor 指家族或物種的早期成員
【翻譯】我的祖先來自這個地區。

{{tts en_US:anchor}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】錨；主播；固定住
【搭配詞】news anchor / drop anchor / anchor a boat
【例句】The ship dropped anchor near the island.
{{tts en_US:The ship dropped anchor near the island.}}
【用法說明】anchor 可指船錨，也可指新聞主播
【翻譯】那艘船在島附近下錨了。

{{tts en_US:ancient}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】古代的；古老的
【搭配詞】ancient history / ancient city / ancient culture
【例句】We visited an ancient temple on the trip.
{{tts en_US:We visited an ancient temple on the trip.}}
【用法說明】ancient 常描述年代非常久遠的人事物
【翻譯】我們旅途中參觀了一座古老的寺廟。

{{tts en_US:and}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】和；而且
【搭配詞】you and me / try and see / bread and butter
【例句】She bought fruit and bread.
{{tts en_US:She bought fruit and bread.}}
【用法說明】and 用來連接兩個以上的人、事、動作
【翻譯】她買了水果和麵包。

{{tts en_US:angel}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】天使
【搭配詞】guardian angel / angel wings / little angel
【例句】The child looked like a little angel.
{{tts en_US:The child looked like a little angel.}}
【用法說明】angel 可指宗教中的天使，也常用來形容可愛的人
【翻譯】那個孩子看起來像個小天使。

{{tts en_US:anger}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】憤怒
【搭配詞】in anger / control your anger / full of anger
【例句】He couldn't hide his anger anymore.
{{tts en_US:He couldn't hide his anger anymore.}}
【用法說明】anger 指強烈的不滿或憤怒情緒
【翻譯】他再也藏不住自己的怒氣了。

{{tts en_US:angle}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】角度；觀點
【搭配詞】from another angle / camera angle / right angle
【例句】Try looking at the problem from a different angle.
{{tts en_US:Try looking at the problem from a different angle.}}
【用法說明】angle 可指幾何角度，也可指看事情的觀點
【翻譯】試著從不同角度看這個問題。

{{tts en_US:angry}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】生氣的；憤怒的
【搭配詞】angry with / angry about / get angry
【例句】She was angry about the delay.
{{tts en_US:She was angry about the delay.}}
【用法說明】be angry with + 人；be angry about + 事
【翻譯】她對這次延誤很生氣。

{{tts en_US:animal}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】動物
【搭配詞】wild animal / pet animal / animal shelter
【例句】That zoo has animals from all over the world.
{{tts en_US:That zoo has animals from all over the world.}}
【用法說明】animal 指各種動物
【翻譯】那家動物園有來自世界各地的動物。

{{tts en_US:animate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使有生氣；製作動畫
【搭配詞】animate a character / animate the story / computer-animated
【例句】The movie was animated by a small team.
{{tts en_US:The movie was animated by a small team.}}
【用法說明】animate 可指讓角色動起來，也可指使更有活力
【翻譯】那部電影是由一個小團隊製作動畫的。

{{tts en_US:ankle}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】腳踝
【搭配詞】twist your ankle / ankle pain / sprained ankle
【例句】I hurt my ankle while running.
{{tts en_US:I hurt my ankle while running.}}
【用法說明】ankle 指腳與腿之間的關節
【翻譯】我跑步時傷到了腳踝。

{{tts en_US:anniversary}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】週年紀念日
【搭配詞】wedding anniversary / anniversary sale / on our anniversary
【例句】Today is my parents' wedding anniversary.
{{tts en_US:Today is my parents' wedding anniversary.}}
【用法說明】anniversary 指值得紀念的同一天
【翻譯】今天是我爸媽的結婚週年紀念日。

{{tts en_US:announce}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】宣布；公告
【搭配詞】announce a plan / announce the winner / officially announce
【例句】They announced the results this morning.
{{tts en_US:They announced the results this morning.}}
【用法說明】announce + 消息／結果／決定
【翻譯】他們今天早上宣布了結果。

{{tts en_US:announcement}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】公告；宣布
【搭配詞】make an announcement / official announcement / public announcement
【例句】The station made an announcement about the delay.
{{tts en_US:The station made an announcement about the delay.}}
【用法說明】announcement 指公開說出的通知或消息
【翻譯】車站發布了關於延誤的公告。

{{tts en_US:annoy}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】使煩惱；惹惱
【搭配詞】annoy me / really annoy / get annoyed by
【例句】It annoys me when people are late.
{{tts en_US:It annoys me when people are late.}}
【用法說明】annoy + 人，表示讓某人覺得煩
【翻譯】別人遲到會讓我很煩。

{{tts en_US:annoyance}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】惱怒；煩人的事
【搭配詞】to my annoyance / slight annoyance / source of annoyance
【例句】To my annoyance, the printer stopped working again.
{{tts en_US:To my annoyance, the printer stopped working again.}}
【用法說明】annoyance 可指情緒，也可指令人煩的事
【翻譯】讓我很煩的是，印表機又壞了。

{{tts en_US:annual}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】每年的；年度的
【搭配詞】annual meeting / annual report / annual event
【例句】Our annual trip is coming up next month.
{{tts en_US:Our annual trip is coming up next month.}}
【用法說明】annual 表示一年一次的
【翻譯】我們一年一度的旅行下個月就要到了。

{{tts en_US:anonymous}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】匿名的
【搭配詞】anonymous message / remain anonymous / anonymous source
【例句】Someone left an anonymous note on my desk.
{{tts en_US:Someone left an anonymous note on my desk.}}
【用法說明】anonymous 表示不透露姓名身分
【翻譯】有人在我桌上留了一張匿名便條。

{{tts en_US:another}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】另一個；再一個
【搭配詞】another day / another chance / one another
【例句】Can I have another cup of coffee?
{{tts en_US:Can I have another cup of coffee?}}
【用法說明】another 常表示額外的一個或不同的一個
【翻譯】我可以再來一杯咖啡嗎？

{{tts en_US:answer}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】回答；答案
【搭配詞】answer a question / answer the phone / right answer
【例句】She didn't answer my message.
{{tts en_US:She didn't answer my message.}}
【用法說明】answer 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】她沒有回我的訊息。

{{tts en_US:ant}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】螞蟻
【搭配詞】a line of ants / ant nest / tiny ant
【例句】There were ants in the kitchen.
{{tts en_US:There were ants in the kitchen.}}
【用法說明】ant 指螞蟻
【翻譯】廚房裡有螞蟻。

{{tts en_US:anthem}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】國歌；頌歌
【搭配詞】national anthem / sing the anthem / team anthem
【例句】Everyone stood for the national anthem.
{{tts en_US:Everyone stood for the national anthem.}}
【用法說明】anthem 常指國歌或具代表性的歌曲
【翻譯】大家都站起來唱國歌。

{{tts en_US:antibiotic}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】抗生素
【搭配詞】take antibiotics / antibiotic treatment / antibiotic resistance
【例句】The doctor gave her antibiotics for the infection.
{{tts en_US:The doctor gave her antibiotics for the infection.}}
【用法說明】antibiotic 常用於治療細菌感染
【翻譯】醫生開了抗生素給她治療感染。

{{tts en_US:anticipate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】預期；預料
【搭配詞】anticipate problems / anticipate a change / highly anticipate
【例句】We didn't anticipate this many people.
{{tts en_US:We didn't anticipate this many people.}}
【用法說明】anticipate 表示事先想到或預料到
【翻譯】我們沒預料到會來這麼多人。

{{tts en_US:anticipation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】期待；預期
【搭配詞】in anticipation of / sense of anticipation / full of anticipation
【例句】She waited in anticipation for the test results.
{{tts en_US:She waited in anticipation for the test results.}}
【用法說明】anticipation 指期待某事即將發生的心情
【翻譯】她滿懷期待地等著考試成績。

{{tts en_US:antique}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】古董；古老的
【搭配詞】antique shop / antique furniture / genuine antique
【例句】They bought an antique table at the market.
{{tts en_US:They bought an antique table at the market.}}
【用法說明】antique 可作名詞或形容詞，指古董
【翻譯】他們在市集買了一張古董桌。

{{tts en_US:antonym}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】反義詞
【搭配詞】opposite antonym / antonym of / learn antonyms
【例句】What's the antonym of 'wide'?
{{tts en_US:What's the antonym of 'wide'?}}
【用法說明】antonym 指意思相反的字
【翻譯】「wide」的反義詞是什麼？

{{tts en_US:anxiety}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】焦慮；不安
【搭配詞】feel anxiety / social anxiety / anxiety about work
【例句】She felt a lot of anxiety before the interview.
{{tts en_US:She felt a lot of anxiety before the interview.}}
【用法說明】anxiety 指持續的不安或緊張
【翻譯】她面試前感到很焦慮。

{{tts en_US:anxious}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】焦慮的；急切的
【搭配詞】anxious about / anxious to know / look anxious
【例句】I'm anxious about tomorrow's exam.
{{tts en_US:I'm anxious about tomorrow's exam.}}
【用法說明】be anxious about + 事；be anxious to + V
【翻譯】我對明天的考試感到焦慮。

{{tts en_US:any}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】任何的；一些
【搭配詞】any time / any questions / not any
【例句】Do you have any questions?
{{tts en_US:Do you have any questions?}}
【用法說明】any 常用於疑問句、否定句，也可表示『任何』
【翻譯】你有任何問題嗎？

{{tts en_US:anybody/anyone}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】任何人
【搭配詞】anyone else / anybody there / ask anyone
【例句】Does anyone know the answer?
{{tts en_US:Does anyone know the answer?}}
【用法說明】anybody/anyone 都表示『任何人』
【翻譯】有人知道答案嗎？

{{tts en_US:anyhow}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】無論如何；反正
【搭配詞】anyhow, / fix it anyhow / somehow anyhow
【例句】Anyhow, we made it home safely.
{{tts en_US:Anyhow, we made it home safely.}}
【用法說明】anyhow 常用來轉換話題或表示『總之』
【翻譯】總之，我們平安到家了。

{{tts en_US:anything}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】任何事物
【搭配詞】anything else / anything important / if anything
【例句】Do you need anything from the store?
{{tts en_US:Do you need anything from the store?}}
【用法說明】anything 指任何東西或事情
【翻譯】你有需要我從店裡帶什麼嗎？

{{tts en_US:anytime}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】任何時候
【搭配詞】call me anytime / come anytime / anytime soon
【例句】You can call me anytime.
{{tts en_US:You can call me anytime.}}
【用法說明】anytime 表示不限定時間
【翻譯】你隨時都可以打給我。

{{tts en_US:anyway}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】反正；不管怎樣
【搭配詞】anyway, / anyway I think / but anyway
【例句】I was tired, but I went anyway.
{{tts en_US:I was tired, but I went anyway.}}
【用法說明】anyway 常表示不受前面情況影響
【翻譯】我很累，但我還是去了。

{{tts en_US:apart}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】分開；相距；除了
【搭配詞】fall apart / apart from / live apart
【例句】The old chair is falling apart.
{{tts en_US:The old chair is falling apart.}}
【用法說明】apart 常表示分開、散掉
【翻譯】那張舊椅子快散掉了。

{{tts en_US:apartment}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】公寓；單位住宅
【搭配詞】rent an apartment / apartment building / small apartment
【例句】They're looking for a bigger apartment.
{{tts en_US:They're looking for a bigger apartment.}}
【用法說明】apartment 指公寓住宅
【翻譯】他們正在找一間更大的公寓。

{{tts en_US:ape}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】猿；類人猿
【搭配詞】great ape / ape behavior / young ape
【例句】Apes are highly intelligent animals.
{{tts en_US:Apes are highly intelligent animals.}}
【用法說明】ape 指猿類動物
【翻譯】猿類是非常聰明的動物。

{{tts en_US:apologize}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】道歉
【搭配詞】apologize to / apologize for / sincerely apologize
【例句】You should apologize to her for what you said.
{{tts en_US:You should apologize to her for what you said.}}
【用法說明】apologize to + 人 for + 事
【翻譯】你應該為你說的話向她道歉。

{{tts en_US:apology}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】道歉；歉意
【搭配詞】make an apology / public apology / accept an apology
【例句】He offered a sincere apology.
{{tts en_US:He offered a sincere apology.}}
【用法說明】apology 指表達歉意的話或行動
【翻譯】他真誠地道了歉。

{{tts en_US:apparent}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】明顯的；顯然的
【搭配詞】it is apparent that / apparent reason / apparent difference
【例句】It was apparent that she was upset.
{{tts en_US:It was apparent that she was upset.}}
【用法說明】apparent 表示明顯看得出來
【翻譯】很明顯她心情不好。

{{tts en_US:appeal}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】吸引力；上訴；呼籲
【搭配詞】sex appeal / appeal to voters / file an appeal
【例句】The idea of working from home really appeals to me.
{{tts en_US:The idea of working from home really appeals to me.}}
【用法說明】appeal to + 人，表示對某人有吸引力
【翻譯】在家工作的想法真的很吸引我。

{{tts en_US:appear}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】出現；看起來
【搭配詞】appear suddenly / appear to be / first appear
【例句】A rainbow appeared after the rain.
{{tts en_US:A rainbow appeared after the rain.}}
【用法說明】appear 可表示出現，也可表示看起來
【翻譯】雨後出現了一道彩虹。

{{tts en_US:appearance}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】外表；出現
【搭配詞】physical appearance / make an appearance / change in appearance
【例句】Her appearance has changed a lot.
{{tts en_US:Her appearance has changed a lot.}}
【用法說明】appearance 可指外貌，也可指公開露面
【翻譯】她的外表改變很多。

{{tts en_US:appetite}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】胃口；食慾
【搭配詞】lose your appetite / healthy appetite / appetite for
【例句】I didn't have much appetite after lunch.
{{tts en_US:I didn't have much appetite after lunch.}}
【用法說明】appetite 常指想吃東西的感覺
【翻譯】我午餐後沒什麼胃口。

{{tts en_US:applaud}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】鼓掌；稱讚
【搭配詞】applaud loudly / applaud the effort / audience applauded
【例句】Everyone applauded when the show ended.
{{tts en_US:Everyone applauded when the show ended.}}
【用法說明】applaud 可表示鼓掌，也可比喻讚賞
【翻譯】表演結束時，大家都鼓掌了。

{{tts en_US:applause}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】掌聲
【搭配詞】a round of applause / loud applause / receive applause
【例句】The singer got a huge round of applause.
{{tts en_US:The singer got a huge round of applause.}}
【用法說明】applause 指群眾的掌聲
【翻譯】那位歌手獲得熱烈掌聲。

{{tts en_US:apple}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】蘋果
【搭配詞】apple pie / apple juice / green apple
【例句】She packed an apple in her lunch box.
{{tts en_US:She packed an apple in her lunch box.}}
【用法說明】apple 指水果蘋果
【翻譯】她在便當盒裡放了一顆蘋果。

{{tts en_US:appliance}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】家電；器具
【搭配詞】kitchen appliance / home appliance / electrical appliance
【例句】We bought a new kitchen appliance yesterday.
{{tts en_US:We bought a new kitchen appliance yesterday.}}
【用法說明】appliance 常指家用電器或器具
【翻譯】我們昨天買了一台新的廚房家電。

{{tts en_US:applicable}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】適用的
【搭配詞】applicable to / if applicable / not applicable
【例句】The rule is not applicable to children.
{{tts en_US:The rule is not applicable to children.}}
【用法說明】be applicable to + 人／情況
【翻譯】這條規定不適用於兒童。

{{tts en_US:applicant}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】申請人
【搭配詞】job applicant / applicant pool / qualified applicant
【例句】Each applicant must fill out the form.
{{tts en_US:Each applicant must fill out the form.}}
【用法說明】applicant 指提出申請的人
【翻譯】每位申請人都必須填寫這份表格。

{{tts en_US:application}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】申請；應用；申請表
【搭配詞】job application / submit an application / practical application
【例句】I sent in my application last night.
{{tts en_US:I sent in my application last night.}}
【用法說明】application 可指申請行為、表格或應用
【翻譯】我昨晚送出了申請。

{{tts en_US:apply}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】申請；應用；塗抹
【搭配詞】apply for a job / apply pressure / apply sunscreen
【例句】She's going to apply for the position.
{{tts en_US:She's going to apply for the position.}}
【用法說明】apply for + 工作／學校；apply A to B 也很常見
【翻譯】她打算申請那個職位。

{{tts en_US:appoint}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】任命；指定
【搭配詞】appoint a leader / appoint someone as / officially appoint
【例句】They appointed her as team leader.
{{tts en_US:They appointed her as team leader.}}
【用法說明】appoint + 人 + as + 職位
【翻譯】他們任命她為團隊領導。

{{tts en_US:appointment}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】約會；約定；任命
【搭配詞】doctor's appointment / make an appointment / appointment time
【例句】I have a doctor's appointment tomorrow morning.
{{tts en_US:I have a doctor's appointment tomorrow morning.}}
【用法說明】appointment 常指預約好的會面時間
【翻譯】我明天早上要去看醫生。

{{tts en_US:appreciate}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】感謝；欣賞；理解
【搭配詞】really appreciate / appreciate your help / appreciate the effort
【例句】I really appreciate your help.
{{tts en_US:I really appreciate your help.}}
【用法說明】appreciate 常用於表達感謝
【翻譯】我真的很感謝你的幫忙。

{{tts en_US:appreciation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】感謝；欣賞
【搭配詞】show appreciation / deep appreciation / in appreciation of
【例句】She showed her appreciation with a thank-you note.
{{tts en_US:She showed her appreciation with a thank-you note.}}
【用法說明】appreciation 指感謝或欣賞之情
【翻譯】她用感謝卡表達了她的謝意。

{{tts en_US:apprentice}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】學徒
【搭配詞】young apprentice / apprentice chef / work as an apprentice
【例句】He started as an apprentice in a bakery.
{{tts en_US:He started as an apprentice in a bakery.}}
【用法說明】apprentice 指跟著師傅學習的人
【翻譯】他一開始是在麵包店當學徒。

{{tts en_US:approach}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】靠近；方法；處理
【搭配詞】approach a problem / different approach / approach slowly
【例句】We need a new approach to this issue.
{{tts en_US:We need a new approach to this issue.}}
【用法說明】approach 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】我們需要一個新的方法來處理這個問題。

{{tts en_US:appropriate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】適當的；合宜的
【搭配詞】appropriate behavior / appropriate for / highly appropriate
【例句】Jeans aren't appropriate for this event.
{{tts en_US:Jeans aren't appropriate for this event.}}
【用法說明】be appropriate for + 場合／人
【翻譯】牛仔褲不適合這個場合。

{{tts en_US:approval}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】同意；核准
【搭配詞】get approval / parental approval / official approval
【例句】We need the manager's approval first.
{{tts en_US:We need the manager's approval first.}}
【用法說明】approval 指同意或正式核准
【翻譯】我們需要先得到經理的同意。

{{tts en_US:approve}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】贊成；核准
【搭配詞】approve of / approve a plan / officially approve
【例句】My parents don't approve of smoking.
{{tts en_US:My parents don't approve of smoking.}}
【用法說明】approve of + 人／事；approve + 計畫／申請
【翻譯】我爸媽不贊成抽菸。

{{tts en_US:approximate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】大約的；近似的
【搭配詞】approximate cost / approximate time / approximate number
【例句】The approximate cost is around fifty dollars.
{{tts en_US:The approximate cost is around fifty dollars.}}
【用法說明】approximate 常用於估計數字或時間
【翻譯】大約費用是五十美元左右。

{{tts en_US:aspire}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】渴望；立志
【搭配詞】aspire to be / aspire to success / aspire to greatness
【例句】She aspires to become a doctor.
{{tts en_US:She aspires to become a doctor.}}
【用法說明】aspire to + 目標／身分
【翻譯】她立志成為醫生。

{{tts en_US:aspirin}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】阿斯匹靈
【搭配詞】take aspirin / aspirin tablet / aspirin for pain
【例句】He took an aspirin for his headache.
{{tts en_US:He took an aspirin for his headache.}}
【用法說明】aspirin 是常見止痛藥
【翻譯】他吃了一顆阿斯匹靈來緩解頭痛。

{{tts en_US:ass}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】驢子；笨蛋（口語、冒犯）
【搭配詞】stubborn ass / wild ass / act like an ass
【例句】In this story, the farmer owns an ass.
{{tts en_US:In this story, the farmer owns an ass.}}
【用法說明】ass 正式教材中較常作『驢子』解讀；口語也可用來罵人
【翻譯】在這個故事裡，那位農夫養了一頭驢。

{{tts en_US:assassinate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】暗殺
【搭配詞】assassinate a leader / assassination attempt / political assassination
【例句】The rebels planned to assassinate the general.
{{tts en_US:The rebels planned to assassinate the general.}}
【用法說明】assassinate 指有計畫地殺害重要人物
【翻譯】叛軍計畫暗殺那位將軍。

{{tts en_US:assault}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】攻擊；襲擊
【搭配詞】physical assault / sexual assault / assault charge
【例句】He was arrested for assault after the fight.
{{tts en_US:He was arrested for assault after the fight.}}
【用法說明】assault 可指身體攻擊，也常見於法律語境
【翻譯】他因打架後的攻擊罪名被逮捕。

{{tts en_US:assemble}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】集合；組裝
【搭配詞】assemble the parts / assemble a team / everyone assembled
【例句】We need to assemble the shelves tonight.
{{tts en_US:We need to assemble the shelves tonight.}}
【用法說明】assemble 可指把零件組裝起來，也可指集合
【翻譯】我們今晚得把架子組裝好。

{{tts en_US:assembly}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】集會；組裝；大會
【搭配詞】school assembly / assembly line / morning assembly
【例句】The students gathered for the morning assembly.
{{tts en_US:The students gathered for the morning assembly.}}
【用法說明】assembly 可指學校集會，也可指組裝過程
【翻譯】學生們集合參加早會。

{{tts en_US:assert}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】斷言；主張
【搭配詞】assert your rights / assert that / strongly assert
【例句】She asserted that she had done nothing wrong.
{{tts en_US:She asserted that she had done nothing wrong.}}
【用法說明】assert 常用於堅定表達立場
【翻譯】她堅稱自己沒有做錯事。

{{tts en_US:assess}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】評估
【搭配詞】assess the risk / assess a student / carefully assess
【例句】The teacher will assess your progress next week.
{{tts en_US:The teacher will assess your progress next week.}}
【用法說明】assess 指評估程度、能力或風險
【翻譯】老師下週會評估你的進度。

{{tts en_US:assessment}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】評估；評量
【搭配詞】risk assessment / final assessment / performance assessment
【例句】The report includes a detailed assessment of the problem.
{{tts en_US:The report includes a detailed assessment of the problem.}}
【用法說明】assessment 指正式的評估結果或過程
【翻譯】這份報告包含對問題的詳細評估。

{{tts en_US:asset}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】資產；有價值的人／物
【搭配詞】valuable asset / company assets / major asset
【例句】Her language skills are a real asset.
{{tts en_US:Her language skills are a real asset.}}
【用法說明】asset 可指金錢資產，也可比喻優勢
【翻譯】她的語言能力真的是一大優勢。

{{tts en_US:assign}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】指派；分配
【搭配詞】assign homework / assign a task / assign someone to
【例句】The manager assigned me a new project.
{{tts en_US:The manager assigned me a new project.}}
【用法說明】assign + 人 + 工作／責任
【翻譯】經理指派給我一個新專案。

{{tts en_US:assignment}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】作業；任務；指派
【搭配詞】homework assignment / work assignment / writing assignment
【例句】I finished my math assignment early.
{{tts en_US:I finished my math assignment early.}}
【用法說明】assignment 可指學校作業或工作任務
【翻譯】我很早就把數學作業做完了。

{{tts en_US:assist}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】協助；幫助
【搭配詞】assist with / assist someone in / assist the customer
【例句】A nurse came in to assist the doctor.
{{tts en_US:A nurse came in to assist the doctor.}}
【用法說明】assist 比 help 稍正式
【翻譯】有位護士進來協助醫生。

{{tts en_US:assistance}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】幫助；協助
【搭配詞】ask for assistance / financial assistance / technical assistance
【例句】Please call if you need assistance.
{{tts en_US:Please call if you need assistance.}}
【用法說明】assistance 是較正式的『幫助』
【翻譯】如果你需要協助，請打電話。

{{tts en_US:assistant}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】助理；助手
【搭配詞】teaching assistant / personal assistant / assistant manager
【例句】She works as an assistant in a law firm.
{{tts en_US:She works as an assistant in a law firm.}}
【用法說明】assistant 指協助他人工作的人
【翻譯】她在一家律師事務所當助理。

{{tts en_US:associate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】聯想；使有關聯；同事
【搭配詞】associate with / business associate / associate A with B
【例句】I always associate this song with summer.
{{tts en_US:I always associate this song with summer.}}
【用法說明】associate A with B = 把 A 和 B 聯想在一起
【翻譯】我總是把這首歌和夏天聯想在一起。

{{tts en_US:association}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】關聯；協會
【搭配詞】business association / association with / in association with
【例句】There is a strong association between sleep and mood.
{{tts en_US:There is a strong association between sleep and mood.}}
【用法說明】association 可指關聯，也可指正式組織
【翻譯】睡眠和情緒之間有很強的關聯。

{{tts en_US:assume}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】假設；認為；承擔
【搭配詞】assume that / assume responsibility / wrongly assume
【例句】I assumed you already knew.
{{tts en_US:I assumed you already knew.}}
【用法說明】assume that + 子句 很常見
【翻譯】我以為你已經知道了。

{{tts en_US:assumption}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】假設；臆測
【搭配詞】make an assumption / common assumption / wrong assumption
【例句】That's just an assumption, not a fact.
{{tts en_US:That's just an assumption, not a fact.}}
【用法說明】assumption 指尚未證實的想法
【翻譯】那只是個假設，不是事實。

{{tts en_US:assurance}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】保證；信心
【搭配詞】give assurance / quality assurance / with assurance
【例句】He gave me his assurance that everything was fine.
{{tts en_US:He gave me his assurance that everything was fine.}}
【用法說明】assurance 可指保證，也可指自信
【翻譯】他向我保證一切都沒問題。

{{tts en_US:assure}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】向…保證；使安心
【搭配詞】assure someone that / assure safety / reassure and assure
【例句】I can assure you that we're doing our best.
{{tts en_US:I can assure you that we're doing our best.}}
【用法說明】assure + 人 + that 子句
【翻譯】我可以向你保證，我們正在盡全力。

{{tts en_US:asthma}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】氣喘
【搭配詞】asthma attack / severe asthma / asthma medication
【例句】Cold air can make her asthma worse.
{{tts en_US:Cold air can make her asthma worse.}}
【用法說明】asthma 是一種呼吸道疾病
【翻譯】冷空氣會讓她的氣喘更嚴重。

{{tts en_US:astonish}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】使驚訝；使震驚
【搭配詞】astonish everyone / astonish me / truly astonish
【例句】Her speed astonished the whole team.
{{tts en_US:Her speed astonished the whole team.}}
【用法說明】astonish 比 surprise 更強烈
【翻譯】她的速度讓整個團隊都很驚訝。

{{tts en_US:astonishment}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】驚訝；震驚
【搭配詞】to my astonishment / in astonishment / with astonishment
【例句】To our astonishment, he finished first.
{{tts en_US:To our astonishment, he finished first.}}
【用法說明】astonishment 指很強烈的驚訝
【翻譯】讓我們很驚訝的是，他拿了第一名。

{{tts en_US:astray}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】偏離正道；走失
【搭配詞】go astray / lead someone astray / wander astray
【例句】Without guidance, some kids may go astray.
{{tts en_US:Without guidance, some kids may go astray.}}
【用法說明】go astray 可表示走偏或誤入歧途
【翻譯】沒有引導的話，有些孩子可能會走偏。

{{tts en_US:astronaut}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】太空人
【搭配詞】become an astronaut / famous astronaut / astronaut training
【例句】As a child, he dreamed of becoming an astronaut.
{{tts en_US:As a child, he dreamed of becoming an astronaut.}}
【用法說明】astronaut 指接受太空任務訓練的人
【翻譯】他小時候夢想成為太空人。

{{tts en_US:astronomer}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】天文學家
【搭配詞】famous astronomer / astronomer discovered / professional astronomer
【例句】The astronomer spent years studying distant stars.
{{tts en_US:The astronomer spent years studying distant stars.}}
【用法說明】astronomer 指研究天體的科學家
【翻譯】那位天文學家花了多年研究遙遠的星體。

{{tts en_US:astronomy}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】天文學
【搭配詞】study astronomy / astronomy class / love astronomy
【例句】She took astronomy as an elective course.
{{tts en_US:She took astronomy as an elective course.}}
【用法說明】astronomy 指研究宇宙與天體的學科
【翻譯】她選修了天文學。

{{tts en_US:at}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】在；於；向
【搭配詞】at home / at school / look at
【例句】She's waiting at the bus stop.
{{tts en_US:She's waiting at the bus stop.}}
【用法說明】at 常表示位置、時間點或對象
【翻譯】她正在公車站等車。

{{tts en_US:athlete}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】運動員
【搭配詞】professional athlete / young athlete / train like an athlete
【例句】She has trained as an athlete since high school.
{{tts en_US:She has trained as an athlete since high school.}}
【用法說明】athlete 指參加體育競賽的人
【翻譯】她從高中起就以運動員的身分訓練。

{{tts en_US:athletic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】運動的；體格健壯的
【搭配詞】athletic ability / athletic shoes / look athletic
【例句】He's always been very athletic.
{{tts en_US:He's always been very athletic.}}
【用法說明】athletic 可形容擅長運動或體格健壯
【翻譯】他一直都很有運動天分。

{{tts en_US:athletics}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】田徑運動；體育活動
【搭配詞】track and field athletics / college athletics / athletics program
【例句】She was active in athletics at school.
{{tts en_US:She was active in athletics at school.}}
【用法說明】athletics 常指田徑或校園體育活動
【翻譯】她在學校很活躍於體育活動。

{{tts en_US:atmosphere}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】氣氛；大氣層
【搭配詞】friendly atmosphere / relaxed atmosphere / Earth's atmosphere
【例句】The café has a warm atmosphere.
{{tts en_US:The café has a warm atmosphere.}}
【用法說明】atmosphere 可指環境氣氛，也可指大氣層
【翻譯】那家咖啡館有很溫暖的氣氛。

{{tts en_US:atom}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】原子
【搭配詞】split an atom / atom bomb / tiny atom
【例句】Everything around us is made of atoms.
{{tts en_US:Everything around us is made of atoms.}}
【用法說明】atom 是物質的基本粒子之一
【翻譯】我們周圍的一切都是由原子組成的。

{{tts en_US:atomic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】原子的；核能的
【搭配詞】atomic energy / atomic bomb / atomic structure
【例句】They studied the atomic structure of the material.
{{tts en_US:They studied the atomic structure of the material.}}
【用法說明】atomic 常描述原子或核能相關事物
【翻譯】他們研究了這種材料的原子結構。

{{tts en_US:attach}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】附上；連接
【搭配詞】attach a file / attach to / be attached to
【例句】Please attach the photo to your email.
{{tts en_US:Please attach the photo to your email.}}
【用法說明】attach A to B = 把 A 附上或接到 B
【翻譯】請把照片附在你的電子郵件裡。

{{tts en_US:attachment}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】附件；依附
【搭配詞】email attachment / emotional attachment / add an attachment
【例句】I forgot to include the attachment.
{{tts en_US:I forgot to include the attachment.}}
【用法說明】attachment 常指信件附件
【翻譯】我忘了附上附件。

{{tts en_US:attack}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】攻擊；發作
【搭配詞】under attack / panic attack / attack a problem
【例句】The dog suddenly attacked the mail carrier.
{{tts en_US:The dog suddenly attacked the mail carrier.}}
【用法說明】attack 可指實際攻擊，也可指疾病發作
【翻譯】那隻狗突然攻擊郵差。

{{tts en_US:attain}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】達到；獲得
【搭配詞】attain success / attain a goal / attain a level
【例句】She worked hard to attain her goal.
{{tts en_US:She worked hard to attain her goal.}}
【用法說明】attain 常用於正式語境，表示達成目標
【翻譯】她努力去達成自己的目標。

{{tts en_US:attainment}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】成就；達成
【搭配詞】educational attainment / level of attainment / academic attainment
【例句】Her academic attainment impressed the judges.
{{tts en_US:Her academic attainment impressed the judges.}}
【用法說明】attainment 常指學業或能力上的成就
【翻譯】她的學業成就讓評審留下深刻印象。

{{tts en_US:attempt}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】嘗試；企圖
【搭配詞】attempt to do / first attempt / make an attempt
【例句】He made one last attempt to call her.
{{tts en_US:He made one last attempt to call her.}}
【用法說明】attempt 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他最後又試著打了一次電話給她。

{{tts en_US:attend}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】出席；參加
【搭配詞】attend a meeting / attend school / attend a wedding
【例句】Are you going to attend the meeting tomorrow?
{{tts en_US:Are you going to attend the meeting tomorrow?}}
【用法說明】attend + 活動／學校／課程
【翻譯】你明天會出席那場會議嗎？

{{tts en_US:attendance}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】出席；到場人數
【搭配詞】poor attendance / attendance record / take attendance
【例句】Attendance was low because of the rain.
{{tts en_US:Attendance was low because of the rain.}}
【用法說明】attendance 指出席情況或人數
【翻譯】因為下雨，出席率很低。

{{tts en_US:attendant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】服務員；隨員
【搭配詞】flight attendant / parking attendant / shop attendant
【例句】The flight attendant helped an elderly passenger.
{{tts en_US:The flight attendant helped an elderly passenger.}}
【用法說明】attendant 指在特定場所提供協助的人
【翻譯】空服員幫助了一位年長乘客。

{{tts en_US:apron}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】圍裙
【搭配詞】wear an apron / kitchen apron / apron pocket
【例句】She put on an apron before cooking.
{{tts en_US:She put on an apron before cooking.}}
【用法說明】apron 指做飯或工作時穿的圍裙
【翻譯】她在做飯前穿上了圍裙。

{{tts en_US:apt}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】恰當的；易於…的
【搭配詞】apt description / apt to happen / quite apt
【例句】That was an apt comparison.
{{tts en_US:That was an apt comparison.}}
【用法說明】apt 表示恰當，也可表示容易發生某事
【翻譯】那是個很貼切的比較。

{{tts en_US:aquarium}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】水族館；魚缸
【搭配詞】visit the aquarium / large aquarium / home aquarium
【例句】We took the kids to the aquarium on Sunday.
{{tts en_US:We took the kids to the aquarium on Sunday.}}
【用法說明】aquarium 可指公共水族館，也可指魚缸
【翻譯】我們星期天帶孩子去水族館。

{{tts en_US:arch}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】拱門；弧形
【搭配詞】stone arch / arch bridge / walk under the arch
【例句】They stood under the old stone arch.
{{tts en_US:They stood under the old stone arch.}}
【用法說明】arch 指拱形結構
【翻譯】他們站在那座老石拱門下。

{{tts en_US:archaeology}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】考古學
【搭配詞】study archaeology / archaeology department / field archaeology
【例句】She studied archaeology in college.
{{tts en_US:She studied archaeology in college.}}
【用法說明】archaeology 是研究古代遺跡與文物的學科
【翻譯】她大學讀的是考古學。

{{tts en_US:architect}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】建築師
【搭配詞】famous architect / lead architect / architect of the project
【例句】The architect designed a modern house.
{{tts en_US:The architect designed a modern house.}}
【用法說明】architect 指設計建築的人
【翻譯】那位建築師設計了一棟現代風格的房子。

{{tts en_US:architecture}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】建築；建築學
【搭配詞】modern architecture / city architecture / study architecture
【例句】I love the architecture in this part of town.
{{tts en_US:I love the architecture in this part of town.}}
【用法說明】architecture 可指建築風格或建築學
【翻譯】我很喜歡這一區的建築風格。

{{tts en_US:archive}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】檔案館；存檔
【搭配詞】digital archive / archive the files / historical archive
【例句】Please archive the old documents.
{{tts en_US:Please archive the old documents.}}
【用法說明】archive 可作名詞或動詞，表示存放資料
【翻譯】請把舊文件歸檔。

{{tts en_US:area}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】地區；範圍
【搭配詞】local area / in the area / problem area
【例句】This area is quiet at night.
{{tts en_US:This area is quiet at night.}}
【用法說明】area 可指地理區域，也可指範圍領域
【翻譯】這個地區晚上很安靜。

{{tts en_US:arena}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】競技場；舞台
【搭配詞】sports arena / political arena / enter the arena
【例句】The concert was held in a huge arena.
