【用法說明】casino 指提供賭博娛樂的場所
【翻譯】他們旅行時去了一家賭場。

{{tts en_US:cast}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】投射；演員陣容；石膏
【搭配詞】cast a shadow / movie cast / cast a vote
【例句】The tree cast a long shadow.
{{tts en_US:The tree cast a long shadow.}}
【用法說明】cast 有很多意思，這裡採最常見的『投射』
【翻譯】那棵樹投下了一道長長的影子。

{{tts en_US:castle}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】城堡
【搭配詞】old castle / sand castle / castle wall
【例句】We visited a castle on our trip to Europe.
{{tts en_US:We visited a castle on our trip to Europe.}}
【用法說明】castle 指城堡
【翻譯】我們去歐洲旅行時參觀了一座城堡。

{{tts en_US:casual}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】休閒的；隨意的
【搭配詞】casual clothes / casual conversation / casual style
【例句】Friday is a casual dress day at work.
{{tts en_US:Friday is a casual dress day at work.}}
【用法說明】casual 形容不正式、輕鬆的風格
【翻譯】星期五是公司可以穿休閒服的日子。

{{tts en_US:casualty}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】傷亡者；意外受害者
【搭配詞】civilian casualty / war casualty / casualty report
【例句】The accident caused several casualties.
{{tts en_US:The accident caused several casualties.}}
【用法說明】casualty 多用於事故、災難或戰爭語境
【翻譯】這起事故造成多人傷亡。

{{tts en_US:cat}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】貓
【搭配詞】pet cat / black cat / cat food
【例句】The cat is sleeping on the sofa.
{{tts en_US:The cat is sleeping on the sofa.}}
【用法說明】cat 指家貓或貓科動物
【翻譯】那隻貓正在沙發上睡覺。

{{tts en_US:catalogue}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】目錄；商品冊
【搭配詞】product catalogue / online catalogue / browse the catalogue
【例句】I looked through the catalogue before ordering.
{{tts en_US:I looked through the catalogue before ordering.}}
【用法說明】catalogue 指列出商品或資料的目錄
【翻譯】我下單前先翻了一下商品目錄。

{{tts en_US:catastrophe}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】災難；大禍
【搭配詞】natural catastrophe / avoid catastrophe / complete catastrophe
【例句】Losing all the data would be a catastrophe.
{{tts en_US:Losing all the data would be a catastrophe.}}
【用法說明】catastrophe 指非常嚴重的災難
【翻譯】如果資料全不見，那會是一場災難。

{{tts en_US:catch}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】抓住；接住；趕上
【搭配詞】catch the bus / catch a ball / catch a cold
【例句】Run, or we'll miss the train and have to catch the next one.
{{tts en_US:Run, or we'll miss the train and have to catch the next one.}}
【用法說明】catch 很常見，表示抓住、趕上或感染
【翻譯】快跑，不然我們趕不上火車，只能搭下一班。

{{tts en_US:category}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】類別；種類
【搭配詞】product category / in this category / category list
【例句】This item belongs in a different category.
{{tts en_US:This item belongs in a different category.}}
【用法說明】category 指分類
【翻譯】這個項目應該歸到另一個類別。

{{tts en_US:cater}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】供應餐飲；迎合
【搭配詞】cater for / cater to / catering service
【例句】The restaurant caters for large groups.
{{tts en_US:The restaurant caters for large groups.}}
【用法說明】cater for/to 表示提供服務或迎合需求
【翻譯】這家餐廳可以接待大型團體。

{{tts en_US:caterpillar}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】毛毛蟲
【搭配詞】green caterpillar / butterfly caterpillar / crawling caterpillar
【例句】A caterpillar crawled across the leaf.
{{tts en_US:A caterpillar crawled across the leaf.}}
【用法說明】caterpillar 指會變成蝴蝶或蛾的幼蟲
【翻譯】一隻毛毛蟲爬過葉子。

{{tts en_US:cathedral}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】大教堂
【搭配詞】old cathedral / visit the cathedral / cathedral square
【例句】We visited the cathedral in the city center.
{{tts en_US:We visited the cathedral in the city center.}}
【用法說明】cathedral 指大型重要教堂
【翻譯】我們參觀了市中心的大教堂。

{{tts en_US:cattle}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】牛群；家畜
【搭配詞】raise cattle / cattle farm / head of cattle
【例句】The farmer raises cattle on the hill.
{{tts en_US:The farmer raises cattle on the hill.}}
【用法說明】cattle 是集合名詞，指牛群
【翻譯】那位農夫在山坡上養牛。

{{tts en_US:cause}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】造成；原因
【搭配詞】cause trouble / cause an accident / main cause
【例句】Lack of sleep can cause headaches.
{{tts en_US:Lack of sleep can cause headaches.}}
【用法說明】cause 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】睡眠不足會造成頭痛。

{{tts en_US:caution}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】小心；警告
【搭配詞】with caution / use caution / word of caution
【例句】Drive with caution in heavy rain.
{{tts en_US:Drive with caution in heavy rain.}}
【用法說明】caution 指謹慎，也可指正式警告
【翻譯】下大雨時開車要小心。

{{tts en_US:cautious}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】小心的；謹慎的
【搭配詞】be cautious / cautious approach / cautious about
【例句】He's cautious about lending money.
{{tts en_US:He's cautious about lending money.}}
【用法說明】cautious 形容做事很小心
【翻譯】他在借錢這件事上很謹慎。

{{tts en_US:cave}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】洞穴
【搭配詞】dark cave / cave entrance / explore a cave
【例句】The hikers rested near the cave entrance.
{{tts en_US:The hikers rested near the cave entrance.}}
【用法說明】cave 指天然洞穴
【翻譯】登山客在洞口附近休息。

{{tts en_US:cavity}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】洞；蛀牙
【搭配詞】tooth cavity / body cavity / fill a cavity
【例句】The dentist found a cavity in my tooth.
{{tts en_US:The dentist found a cavity in my tooth.}}
【用法說明】cavity 常見於牙科語境，指蛀洞
【翻譯】牙醫發現我有蛀牙。

{{tts en_US:cease}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】停止；終止
【搭配詞】cease operations / cease to exist / cease doing
【例句】The rain finally ceased in the afternoon.
{{tts en_US:The rain finally ceased in the afternoon.}}
【用法說明】cease 是較正式的 stop
【翻譯】下午雨終於停了。

{{tts en_US:ceiling}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】天花板；上限
【搭配詞】paint the ceiling / glass ceiling / ceiling fan
【例句】The bedroom has a high ceiling.
{{tts en_US:The bedroom has a high ceiling.}}
【用法說明】ceiling 可指房間天花板，也可比喻上限
【翻譯】那間臥室的天花板很高。

{{tts en_US:celebrate}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】慶祝
【搭配詞】celebrate a birthday / celebrate success / celebrate with friends
【例句】We went out to celebrate her birthday.
{{tts en_US:We went out to celebrate her birthday.}}
【用法說明】celebrate 指為特別日子或成就慶祝
【翻譯】我們出去替她慶生。

{{tts en_US:celebration}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】慶祝；慶典
【搭配詞】birthday celebration / celebration dinner / in celebration of
【例句】The whole town joined the celebration.
{{tts en_US:The whole town joined the celebration.}}
【用法說明】celebration 指慶祝活動
【翻譯】整個小鎮都參加了這場慶祝活動。

{{tts en_US:celebrity}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】名人；明星
【搭配詞】movie celebrity / local celebrity / celebrity news
【例句】The restaurant is popular with celebrities.
{{tts en_US:The restaurant is popular with celebrities.}}
【用法說明】celebrity 指知名人物
【翻譯】那家餐廳很受名人歡迎。

{{tts en_US:celery}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】芹菜
【搭配詞】chopped celery / celery soup / celery sticks
【例句】She added celery to the salad.
{{tts en_US:She added celery to the salad.}}
【用法說明】celery 指芹菜
【翻譯】她在沙拉裡加了芹菜。

{{tts en_US:cell}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】細胞；小房間；電池格
【搭配詞】brain cell / prison cell / cell division
【例句】Your body is made of billions of cells.
{{tts en_US:Your body is made of billions of cells.}}
【用法說明】cell 最常見是生物學裡的細胞
【翻譯】你的身體由數十億個細胞組成。

{{tts en_US:cellphone}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】手機
【搭配詞】use a cellphone / cellphone number / cellphone screen
【例句】I left my cellphone on the desk.
{{tts en_US:I left my cellphone on the desk.}}
【用法說明】cellphone 指手機
【翻譯】我把手機忘在桌上了。

{{tts en_US:cellular}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】細胞的；行動通訊的
【搭配詞】cellular level / cellular network / cellular signal
【例句】The island has a weak cellular signal.
{{tts en_US:The island has a weak cellular signal.}}
【用法說明】cellular 常見於行動網路或生物學語境
【翻譯】那座島上的手機訊號很弱。

{{tts en_US:Celsius}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】攝氏
【搭配詞】degrees Celsius / below zero Celsius / 30 Celsius
【例句】It's over 35 degrees Celsius today.
{{tts en_US:It's over 35 degrees Celsius today.}}
【用法說明】Celsius 是攝氏溫標
【翻譯】今天超過攝氏三十五度。

{{tts en_US:cement}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】水泥；鞏固
【搭配詞】cement wall / wet cement / cement a relationship
【例句】They poured cement for the new floor.
{{tts en_US:They poured cement for the new floor.}}
【用法說明】cement 可指建材，也可比喻鞏固關係
【翻譯】他們替新地板灌了水泥。

{{tts en_US:cemetery}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】墓地；公墓
【搭配詞】old cemetery / cemetery gate / visit the cemetery
【例句】They visited the cemetery on the holiday.
{{tts en_US:They visited the cemetery on the holiday.}}
【用法說明】cemetery 指埋葬死者的地方
【翻譯】他們在假日去掃墓。

{{tts en_US:census}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】人口普查；普查
【搭配詞】national census / census data / take a census
【例句】The government released the latest census data.
{{tts en_US:The government released the latest census data.}}
【用法說明】census 指對人口或其他資料的全面調查
【翻譯】政府公布了最新的人口普查資料。

{{tts en_US:cent}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】分；分錢
【搭配詞】50 cents / one cent / cent coin
【例句】This candy costs fifty cents.
{{tts en_US:This candy costs fifty cents.}}
【用法說明】cent 是貨幣單位，通常是一元的百分之一
【翻譯】這顆糖果要五十分。

{{tts en_US:center}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】中心；使集中
【搭配詞】city center / shopping center / center of attention
【例句】Let's meet in the city center.
{{tts en_US:Let's meet in the city center.}}
【用法說明】center 可作名詞，也可作動詞
【翻譯】我們在市中心見吧。

{{tts en_US:centimeter}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】公分；厘米
【搭配詞】ten centimeters / centimeter ruler / one centimeter
【例句】The fish was about 20 centimeters long.
{{tts en_US:The fish was about 20 centimeters long.}}
【用法說明】centimeter 是長度單位
【翻譯】那條魚大約二十公分長。

{{tts en_US:central}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】中心的；主要的
【搭配詞】central station / central issue / central role
【例句】This station is in a central location.
{{tts en_US:This station is in a central location.}}
【用法說明】central 可表示位於中心或很重要
【翻譯】這個車站的位置很中心。

{{tts en_US:century}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】世紀；百年
【搭配詞】21st century / for centuries / century-old
【例句】This building is more than a century old.
{{tts en_US:This building is more than a century old.}}
【用法說明】century 指一百年
【翻譯】這棟建築已有超過一百年的歷史。

{{tts en_US:ceramic}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】陶瓷；陶瓷的
【搭配詞】ceramic bowl / ceramic tile / ceramic art
【例句】She bought a ceramic cup at the market.
{{tts en_US:She bought a ceramic cup at the market.}}
【用法說明】ceramic 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】她在市場買了一個陶瓷杯。

{{tts en_US:cereal}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】穀類；麥片
【搭配詞】breakfast cereal / cereal box / bowl of cereal
【例句】I usually eat cereal for breakfast.
{{tts en_US:I usually eat cereal for breakfast.}}
【用法說明】cereal 常指早餐麥片
【翻譯】我早餐通常吃麥片。

{{tts en_US:ceremony}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】典禮；儀式
【搭配詞】wedding ceremony / opening ceremony / award ceremony
【例句】The ceremony starts at three o'clock.
{{tts en_US:The ceremony starts at three o'clock.}}
【用法說明】ceremony 指正式儀式或典禮
【翻譯】典禮三點開始。

{{tts en_US:certain}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】確定的；某個
【搭配詞】be certain / certain people / for certain
【例句】I'm not certain about the date yet.
{{tts en_US:I'm not certain about the date yet.}}
【用法說明】certain 可表示確定，也可表示某些
【翻譯】我還不確定日期。

{{tts en_US:certainty}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】確定；把握
【搭配詞】with certainty / sense of certainty / absolute certainty
【例句】Nobody can say with certainty what will happen.
{{tts en_US:Nobody can say with certainty what will happen.}}
【用法說明】certainty 指毫無疑問的確定感
【翻譯】沒有人能百分之百確定會發生什麼。

{{tts en_US:certificate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】證書；證明
【搭配詞】birth certificate / certificate of completion / certificate holder
【例句】She received a certificate after the course.
{{tts en_US:She received a certificate after the course.}}
【用法說明】certificate 指正式證明文件
【翻譯】她上完課後拿到一張證書。

{{tts en_US:certify}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】證明；認證
【搭配詞】certify that / certified teacher / certify a product
【例句】The report was certified as accurate.
{{tts en_US:The report was certified as accurate.}}
【用法說明】certify 表示正式證明或認證
【翻譯】這份報告被認證為準確。

{{tts en_US:chain}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】鏈子；連鎖；連接
【搭配詞】gold chain / chain store / chain reaction
【例句】This store is part of a national chain.
{{tts en_US:This store is part of a national chain.}}
【用法說明】chain 可指實體鏈條，也可指連鎖體系
【翻譯】這家店是全國連鎖品牌的一部分。

{{tts en_US:chair}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】椅子；主席
【搭配詞】sit on a chair / office chair / chair the meeting
【例句】He pulled up a chair and sat down.
{{tts en_US:He pulled up a chair and sat down.}}
【用法說明】chair 可指椅子，也可作動詞表示主持
【翻譯】他拉了張椅子坐下。

{{tts en_US:chairwoman}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】女主席；女會長
【搭配詞】chairwoman of the board / elected chairwoman / former chairwoman
【例句】She was elected chairwoman last year.
{{tts en_US:She was elected chairwoman last year.}}
【用法說明】chairwoman 指女性主席或主持者
【翻譯】她去年被選為女主席。

{{tts en_US:chalk}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】粉筆
【搭配詞】piece of chalk / chalk dust / write in chalk
【例句】The teacher wrote the answer in chalk.
{{tts en_US:The teacher wrote the answer in chalk.}}
【用法說明】chalk 指粉筆
【翻譯】老師用粉筆寫下答案。

{{tts en_US:challenge}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】挑戰；向…挑戰
【搭配詞】face a challenge / take on a challenge / challenge yourself
【例句】Learning a new language can be a challenge.
{{tts en_US:Learning a new language can be a challenge.}}
【用法說明】challenge 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】學一門新語言可能是一項挑戰。

{{tts en_US:chamber}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】房間；議院；室
【搭配詞】council chamber / gas chamber / chamber music
【例句】They met in a small chamber upstairs.
{{tts en_US:They met in a small chamber upstairs.}}
【用法說明】chamber 指較正式或特定用途的房間
【翻譯】他們在樓上一個小房間裡碰面。

{{tts en_US:champagne}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】香檳
【搭配詞】glass of champagne / champagne bottle / pop champagne
【例句】They opened a bottle of champagne to celebrate.
{{tts en_US:They opened a bottle of champagne to celebrate.}}
【用法說明】champagne 指香檳酒
【翻譯】他們開了一瓶香檳慶祝。

{{tts en_US:champion}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】冠軍；捍衛者
【搭配詞】world champion / defend the champion / champion a cause
【例句】She became the national champion last year.
{{tts en_US:She became the national champion last year.}}
【用法說明】champion 可指比賽冠軍，也可指支持某事的人
【翻譯】她去年成為全國冠軍。

{{tts en_US:championship}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】錦標賽；冠軍頭銜
【搭配詞】world championship / championship game / win the championship
【例句】Their team won the championship.
{{tts en_US:Their team won the championship.}}
【用法說明】championship 指大型比賽或冠軍身分
【翻譯】他們的隊伍拿下了冠軍。

{{tts en_US:chance}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】機會；可能性
【搭配詞】have a chance / by chance / chance of rain
【例句】Do you have a chance to talk now?
{{tts en_US:Do you have a chance to talk now?}}
【用法說明】chance 指機會或可能
【翻譯】你現在有空聊一下嗎？

{{tts en_US:change}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】改變；零錢；更換
【搭配詞】change your mind / small change / change clothes
【例句】I need to change my password.
{{tts en_US:I need to change my password.}}
【用法說明】change 有很多意思，常見是改變或更換
【翻譯】我需要更改密碼。

{{tts en_US:channel}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】頻道；管道
【搭配詞】TV channel / YouTube channel / communication channel
【例句】We watched the game on a sports channel.
{{tts en_US:We watched the game on a sports channel.}}
【用法說明】channel 可指媒體頻道，也可指溝通管道
【翻譯】我們在體育頻道看了這場比賽。

{{tts en_US:chant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】反覆喊叫；口號
【搭配詞】chant loudly / crowd chant / political chant
【例句】The fans began to chant his name.
{{tts en_US:The fans began to chant his name.}}
【用法說明】chant 指反覆有節奏地喊
【翻譯】球迷開始齊聲喊他的名字。

{{tts en_US:chaos}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】混亂
【搭配詞】total chaos / create chaos / in chaos
【例句】The room was in complete chaos after the party.
{{tts en_US:The room was in complete chaos after the party.}}
【用法說明】chaos 指非常混亂的狀態
【翻譯】派對結束後房間一團亂。

{{tts en_US:chapel}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】小教堂
【搭配詞】wedding chapel / school chapel / old chapel
【例句】They got married in a small chapel.
{{tts en_US:They got married in a small chapel.}}
【用法說明】chapel 指規模較小的教堂
【翻譯】他們在一間小教堂結婚。

{{tts en_US:chapter}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】章；章節
【搭配詞】first chapter / final chapter / chapter of a book
【例句】I finished the first chapter last night.
{{tts en_US:I finished the first chapter last night.}}
【用法說明】chapter 指書或故事中的章節
【翻譯】我昨晚看完了第一章。

{{tts en_US:character}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】角色；性格；字元
【搭配詞】main character / strong character / Chinese character
【例句】My favorite character in the movie is the grandmother.
{{tts en_US:My favorite character in the movie is the grandmother.}}
【用法說明】character 有很多意思，最常見是角色或性格
【翻譯】我最喜歡電影裡的奶奶角色。

{{tts en_US:characteristic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】特徵；特有的
【搭配詞】key characteristic / characteristic of / personal characteristic
【例句】Patience is one of her best characteristics.
{{tts en_US:Patience is one of her best characteristics.}}
【用法說明】characteristic 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】耐心是她最好的特質之一。

{{tts en_US:characterize}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】描寫；成為…的特徵
【搭配詞】characterize someone as / characterize the style / be characterized by
【例句】People often characterize him as quiet but reliable.
{{tts en_US:People often characterize him as quiet but reliable.}}
【用法說明】characterize 指描述某人或某物的特色
【翻譯】人們常形容他安靜但可靠。

{{tts en_US:charge}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】收費；充電；指控；負責
【搭配詞】charge your phone / charge a fee / in charge of
【例句】I forgot to charge my phone last night.
{{tts en_US:I forgot to charge my phone last night.}}
【用法說明】charge 有很多意思，生活中很常指充電或收費
【翻譯】我昨晚忘了幫手機充電。

{{tts en_US:charitable}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】慈善的；仁慈的
【搭配詞】charitable organization / charitable donation / charitable work
【例句】She volunteers for a charitable organization.
{{tts en_US:She volunteers for a charitable organization.}}
【用法說明】charitable 常描述與公益慈善有關的事
【翻譯】她在一個慈善組織當志工。

{{tts en_US:charity}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】慈善；慈善機構
【搭配詞】give to charity / charity event / local charity
【例句】We donated clothes to charity.
{{tts en_US:We donated clothes to charity.}}
【用法說明】charity 指慈善行為或慈善團體
【翻譯】我們把衣服捐給慈善機構。

{{tts en_US:charm}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】魅力；使著迷
【搭配詞】personal charm / charm bracelet / charm someone
【例句】Her smile has a lot of charm.
{{tts en_US:Her smile has a lot of charm.}}
【用法說明】charm 可指個人魅力，也可作動詞表示吸引
【翻譯】她的笑容很有魅力。

{{tts en_US:chart}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】圖表；排行榜
【搭配詞】bar chart / chart the progress / music chart
【例句】The report includes a chart of monthly sales.
{{tts en_US:The report includes a chart of monthly sales.}}
【用法說明】chart 常指圖表，也可指排行榜
【翻譯】這份報告附了一張月銷售圖表。

{{tts en_US:chase}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】追趕；追求
【搭配詞】chase after / chase a dream / police chase
【例句】The dog chased the ball across the yard.
{{tts en_US:The dog chased the ball across the yard.}}
【用法說明】chase 可指實際追趕，也可比喻追求目標
【翻譯】那隻狗追著球跑過院子。

{{tts en_US:chat}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】聊天；閒談
【搭配詞】chat with / have a chat / group chat
【例句】We had a quick chat after class.
{{tts en_US:We had a quick chat after class.}}
【用法說明】chat 可作名詞或動詞，表示輕鬆聊天
【翻譯】我們下課後聊了一下。

{{tts en_US:cheap}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】便宜的；廉價的
【搭配詞】cheap price / cheap hotel / cheap flight
【例句】This shirt was really cheap.
{{tts en_US:This shirt was really cheap.}}
【用法說明】cheap 指價格低，也可帶有品質普通的意思
【翻譯】這件襯衫真的很便宜。

{{tts en_US:cheat}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】作弊；欺騙
【搭配詞】cheat on a test / cheat on someone / cheat the system
【例句】He got in trouble for cheating on the test.
{{tts en_US:He got in trouble for cheating on the test.}}
【用法說明】cheat 可指考試作弊，也可指欺騙
【翻譯】他因為考試作弊而惹上麻煩。

{{tts en_US:check}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】檢查；查看；支票
【搭配詞】check your email / check the time / safety check
【例句】Can you check if the door is locked?
{{tts en_US:Can you check if the door is locked?}}
【用法說明】check 有很多意思，最常見是查看或確認
【翻譯】你可以確認一下門有沒有鎖嗎？

{{tts en_US:checkup}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】健康檢查；檢查
【搭配詞】regular checkup / health checkup / dental checkup
【例句】I have a dental checkup next week.
{{tts en_US:I have a dental checkup next week.}}
【用法說明】checkup 指例行檢查，常見於醫療
【翻譯】我下週要做牙科檢查。

{{tts en_US:cheek}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】臉頰
【搭配詞】kiss on the cheek / rosy cheeks / cheek bone
【例句】Her cheeks turned red from the cold.
{{tts en_US:Her cheeks turned red from the cold.}}
【用法說明】cheek 指臉兩側的頰部
【翻譯】她的臉頰被凍得發紅。

{{tts en_US:cheer}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】歡呼；鼓舞
【搭配詞】cheer for / cheer up / loud cheer
【例句】The crowd cheered when the band came on stage.
{{tts en_US:The crowd cheered when the band came on stage.}}
【用法說明】cheer 可作動詞或名詞，表示歡呼或打氣
【翻譯】樂團上台時，觀眾歡呼起來。

{{tts en_US:cheerful}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】開朗的；令人愉快的
【搭配詞】cheerful smile / cheerful mood / stay cheerful
【例句】She always sounds cheerful in the morning.
{{tts en_US:She always sounds cheerful in the morning.}}
【用法說明】cheerful 形容人或氣氛很愉快
【翻譯】她早上說話總是很有精神。

{{tts en_US:cheese}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】起司；乳酪
【搭配詞】cheese sandwich / slice of cheese / melted cheese
【例句】He added cheese to the pasta.
{{tts en_US:He added cheese to the pasta.}}
【用法說明】cheese 指乳酪製品
【翻譯】他在義大利麵裡加了起司。

{{tts en_US:chef}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】主廚；廚師
【搭配詞】famous chef / pastry chef / head chef
【例句】The chef prepared a special menu tonight.
{{tts en_US:The chef prepared a special menu tonight.}}
【用法說明】chef 多指專業廚師，尤其是主廚
【翻譯】主廚今晚準備了特別菜單。

{{tts en_US:chemical}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】化學的；化學品
【搭配詞】chemical reaction / chemical smell / harmful chemical
【例句】The label says the cleaner contains strong chemicals.
{{tts en_US:The label says the cleaner contains strong chemicals.}}
【用法說明】chemical 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】標籤上寫這種清潔劑含有強烈化學成分。

{{tts en_US:chemist}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】藥劑師；化學家
【搭配詞】local chemist / chemist shop / research chemist
【例句】She works as a chemist in a lab.
{{tts en_US:She works as a chemist in a lab.}}
【用法說明】chemist 可指化學家，在英式英文也可指藥局藥劑師
【翻譯】她在實驗室當化學家。

{{tts en_US:chemistry}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】化學；默契
【搭配詞】study chemistry / chemistry class / good chemistry
【例句】They have great chemistry on screen.
{{tts en_US:They have great chemistry on screen.}}
【用法說明】chemistry 除了學科，也常比喻人與人之間很合拍
【翻譯】他們在螢幕上的默契很好。

{{tts en_US:cherish}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】珍惜；珍愛
【搭配詞】cherish the memory / cherish your family / deeply cherish
【例句】I really cherish our friendship.
{{tts en_US:I really cherish our friendship.}}
【用法說明】cherish 表示非常重視並珍惜
【翻譯】我真的很珍惜我們的友誼。

{{tts en_US:cherry}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】櫻桃
【搭配詞】cherry tree / cherry pie / fresh cherries
【例句】She put a cherry on top of the cake.
{{tts en_US:She put a cherry on top of the cake.}}
【用法說明】cherry 指櫻桃
【翻譯】她在蛋糕上放了一顆櫻桃。

{{tts en_US:chess}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】西洋棋
【搭配詞】play chess / chess club / chess board
【例句】My grandfather taught me how to play chess.
{{tts en_US:My grandfather taught me how to play chess.}}
【用法說明】chess 指西洋棋這項遊戲
【翻譯】我爺爺教我下西洋棋。

{{tts en_US:chest}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】胸口；胸膛；箱子
【搭配詞】chest pain / chest pocket / wooden chest
【例句】He felt a sharp pain in his chest.
{{tts en_US:He felt a sharp pain in his chest.}}
【用法說明】chest 可指身體胸部，也可指大箱子
【翻譯】他胸口感到一陣劇痛。

{{tts en_US:chestnut}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】栗子；栗樹；栗色
【搭配詞】roasted chestnuts / chestnut tree / chestnut hair
【例句】We bought roasted chestnuts from a street vendor.
{{tts en_US:We bought roasted chestnuts from a street vendor.}}
【用法說明】chestnut 最常指栗子
【翻譯】我們跟路邊攤買了烤栗子。

{{tts en_US:chew}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】咀嚼
【搭配詞】chew your food / chew gum / chew slowly
【例句】You should chew your food slowly.
{{tts en_US:You should chew your food slowly.}}
【用法說明】chew 指用牙齒嚼食物
【翻譯】你應該慢慢咀嚼食物。

{{tts en_US:chicken}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】雞；雞肉
【搭配詞】fried chicken / chicken soup / roast chicken
【例句】We had chicken and rice for dinner.
{{tts en_US:We had chicken and rice for dinner.}}
【用法說明】chicken 可指動物或雞肉
【翻譯】我們晚餐吃雞肉飯。

{{tts en_US:chief}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】首領；主要的
【搭配詞】chief reason / police chief / editor-in-chief
【例句】Safety is our chief concern.
{{tts en_US:Safety is our chief concern.}}
【用法說明】chief 可作名詞或形容詞，表示最高的或最主要的
【翻譯】安全是我們最主要的考量。

{{tts en_US:child}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】小孩；兒童
【搭配詞】small child / only child / child care
【例句】That child is very curious.
{{tts en_US:That child is very curious.}}
【用法說明】child 指兒童
【翻譯】那個孩子很好奇。

{{tts en_US:childhood}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】童年
【搭配詞】happy childhood / childhood memory / during childhood
【例句】I spent most of my childhood in Taichung.
{{tts en_US:I spent most of my childhood in Taichung.}}
【用法說明】childhood 指人生中的童年時期
【翻譯】我童年大部分時間都在台中度過。

{{tts en_US:childish}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】孩子氣的；幼稚的
【搭配詞】childish behavior / sound childish / stop being childish
【例句】It was childish to argue over something so small.
{{tts en_US:It was childish to argue over something so small.}}
【用法說明】childish 常帶負面語氣，表示不成熟
【翻譯】為了這麼小的事爭吵很幼稚。

{{tts en_US:chili}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】辣椒；辣椒做的料理
【搭配詞】chili sauce / red chili / bowl of chili
【例句】This soup has too much chili in it.
{{tts en_US:This soup has too much chili in it.}}
【用法說明】chili 指辣椒，也可指辣味料理
【翻譯】這碗湯加了太多辣椒。

{{tts en_US:chill}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】放鬆；寒意；變冷
【搭配詞】chill out / feel a chill / chill in the air
【例句】Let's just chill at home tonight.
{{tts en_US:Let's just chill at home tonight.}}
【用法說明】chill 在口語裡常表示放鬆
【翻譯】我們今晚就在家放鬆吧。

{{tts en_US:chilly}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】微冷的；冷颼颼的
【搭配詞】chilly morning / get chilly / feel chilly
【例句】It was a chilly morning, so I wore a jacket.
{{tts en_US:It was a chilly morning, so I wore a jacket.}}
【用法說明】chilly 表示有點冷
【翻譯】早上有點冷，所以我穿了外套。

{{tts en_US:chimney}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】煙囪
【搭配詞】brick chimney / smoke from the chimney / tall chimney
【例句】Smoke was coming out of the chimney.
{{tts en_US:Smoke was coming out of the chimney.}}
【用法說明】chimney 指屋頂上的排煙通道
【翻譯】煙正從煙囪裡冒出來。

{{tts en_US:chimpanzee}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】黑猩猩
【搭配詞】young chimpanzee / chimpanzee habitat / wild chimpanzee
【例句】The chimpanzee used a stick to get food.
{{tts en_US:The chimpanzee used a stick to get food.}}
【用法說明】chimpanzee 指黑猩猩
【翻譯】那隻黑猩猩用木棍取食物。

{{tts en_US:chin}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】下巴
【搭配詞】touch your chin / chin up / rest your chin on
【例句】He rubbed his chin while thinking.
{{tts en_US:He rubbed his chin while thinking.}}
【用法說明】chin 指下巴
【翻譯】他思考時摸了摸下巴。

{{tts en_US:china}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】瓷器；中國
【搭配詞】fine china / made in China / china cup
【例句】She keeps the good china in a cabinet.
{{tts en_US:She keeps the good china in a cabinet.}}
【用法說明】china 小寫常指瓷器
【翻譯】她把那套好瓷器收在櫥櫃裡。

{{tts en_US:chip}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】薯片；碎片；晶片
【搭配詞】potato chips / computer chip / chip of paint
【例句】He opened a bag of chips during the movie.
{{tts en_US:He opened a bag of chips during the movie.}}
【用法說明】chip 有很多意思，最常見是洋芋片
【翻譯】他看電影時打開了一包洋芋片。

{{tts en_US:chirp}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】吱吱叫；啁啾聲
【搭配詞】birds chirp / cheerful chirp / chirp softly
【例句】The birds were chirping outside my window.
{{tts en_US:The birds were chirping outside my window.}}
【用法說明】chirp 指小鳥清脆叫聲
【翻譯】窗外的小鳥一直在啁啾。

{{tts en_US:chocolate}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】巧克力
【搭配詞】dark chocolate / chocolate cake / hot chocolate
【例句】She bought a bar of chocolate.
{{tts en_US:She bought a bar of chocolate.}}
【用法說明】chocolate 指巧克力食品或飲品
【翻譯】她買了一條巧克力。

{{tts en_US:choice}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】選擇；選項
【搭配詞】good choice / make a choice / have no choice
【例句】You have a choice between tea and coffee.
{{tts en_US:You have a choice between tea and coffee.}}
【用法說明】choice 指可選的項目或做出的決定
【翻譯】你可以選茶或咖啡。

{{tts en_US:choir}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】合唱團
【搭配詞】school choir / church choir / join the choir
【例句】She sings in the church choir.
{{tts en_US:She sings in the church choir.}}
【用法說明】choir 指合唱團
【翻譯】她在教會合唱團唱歌。

{{tts en_US:choke}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】哽住；窒息
【搭配詞】choke on food / nearly choke / choke back tears
【例句】He started to choke on a piece of bread.
{{tts en_US:He started to choke on a piece of bread.}}
【用法說明】choke 可指噎到，也可比喻情緒堵住
【翻譯】他被一口麵包噎到了。

{{tts en_US:cholesterol}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】膽固醇
【搭配詞】high cholesterol / cholesterol level / lower cholesterol
【例句】He's trying to lower his cholesterol.
{{tts en_US:He's trying to lower his cholesterol.}}
【用法說明】cholesterol 常見於健康醫療語境
【翻譯】他正在努力降低膽固醇。

{{tts en_US:choose}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】選擇
【搭配詞】choose wisely / choose between / choose a gift
【例句】You can choose any seat you like.
{{tts en_US:You can choose any seat you like.}}
【用法說明】choose 指從多個選項中挑選
【翻譯】你可以選任何你喜歡的位子。

{{tts en_US:chop}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】切；砍
【搭配詞】chop vegetables / chop wood / chop into pieces
【例句】She chopped the onions into small pieces.
{{tts en_US:She chopped the onions into small pieces.}}
【用法說明】chop 指快速切碎
【翻譯】她把洋蔥切成小塊。

{{tts en_US:chopstick}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】筷子（單數）
【搭配詞】use a chopstick / one chopstick / pick up with a chopstick
【例句】He picked it up with a chopstick.
{{tts en_US:He picked it up with a chopstick.}}
【用法說明】chopstick 單數較少單獨用，但可作教學說明
【翻譯】他用一根筷子把它夾起來。

{{tts en_US:chopsticks}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】筷子
【搭配詞】use chopsticks / pair of chopsticks / wooden chopsticks
【例句】I'm still learning how to use chopsticks.
{{tts en_US:I'm still learning how to use chopsticks.}}
【用法說明】chopsticks 是較自然常見的用法
【翻譯】我還在學怎麼用筷子。

{{tts en_US:chord}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】和弦
【搭配詞】play a chord / guitar chord / major chord
【例句】He played a simple chord on the guitar.
{{tts en_US:He played a simple chord on the guitar.}}
【用法說明】chord 指同時發出的和聲音組
【翻譯】他在吉他上彈了一個簡單的和弦。

{{tts en_US:chore}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】家事；雜務
【搭配詞】do chores / household chore / daily chores
【例句】I have to finish my chores before dinner.
{{tts en_US:I have to finish my chores before dinner.}}
【用法說明】chore 指日常要做的雜務
【翻譯】我得在晚餐前把家事做完。

{{tts en_US:chorus}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】副歌；合唱
【搭配詞】sing the chorus / in chorus / catchy chorus
【例句】Everyone joined in for the chorus.
{{tts en_US:Everyone joined in for the chorus.}}
【用法說明】chorus 可指歌曲副歌，也可指合唱部分
【翻譯】大家一起唱了副歌。

{{tts en_US:chronic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】慢性的；長期的
【搭配詞】chronic pain / chronic illness / chronic problem
【例句】He suffers from chronic back pain.
{{tts en_US:He suffers from chronic back pain.}}
【用法說明】chronic 常用於醫療或長期問題
【翻譯】他長期受背痛所苦。

{{tts en_US:chubby}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】胖嘟嘟的；圓潤的
【搭配詞】chubby cheeks / slightly chubby / chubby baby
【例句】The baby had cute chubby cheeks.
{{tts en_US:The baby had cute chubby cheeks.}}
【用法說明】chubby 通常形容可愛、圓潤的樣子
【翻譯】那個寶寶有一對胖嘟嘟的臉頰。

{{tts en_US:chunk}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】大塊；一大部分
【搭配詞】chunk of ice / big chunk / chunk of time
【例句】He cut the bread into big chunks.
{{tts en_US:He cut the bread into big chunks.}}
【用法說明】chunk 指厚實的大塊
【翻譯】他把麵包切成大塊。

{{tts en_US:church}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】教堂；教會
【搭配詞】go to church / church service / church building
【例句】They went to church on Sunday morning.
{{tts en_US:They went to church on Sunday morning.}}
【用法說明】church 可指建築物，也可指教會團體
【翻譯】他們星期天早上去教堂。

{{tts en_US:cigar}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】雪茄
【搭配詞】smoke a cigar / cigar shop / expensive cigar
【例句】The old man was smoking a cigar outside.
{{tts en_US:The old man was smoking a cigar outside.}}
【用法說明】cigar 指雪茄
【翻譯】那位老人正在外面抽雪茄。

{{tts en_US:cigarette}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】香菸
【搭配詞】smoke a cigarette / pack of cigarettes / cigarette smoke
【例句】He stepped outside to smoke a cigarette.
{{tts en_US:He stepped outside to smoke a cigarette.}}
【用法說明】cigarette 指香菸
【翻譯】他走到外面去抽一根菸。

{{tts en_US:cinema}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】電影院；電影
【搭配詞】go to the cinema / cinema ticket / love cinema
【例句】We went to the cinema after dinner.
{{tts en_US:We went to the cinema after dinner.}}
【用法說明】cinema 常指電影院，也可泛指電影藝術
【翻譯】我們晚餐後去看電影。

{{tts en_US:circle}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】圓圈；圈子；環繞
【搭配詞】draw a circle / social circle / circle around
【例句】The teacher drew a circle on the board.
{{tts en_US:The teacher drew a circle on the board.}}
【用法說明】circle 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】老師在黑板上畫了一個圓。

{{tts en_US:circuit}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】電路；巡迴路線；圈
【搭配詞】electrical circuit / racing circuit / on the circuit
【例句】The lights went out because of a problem in the circuit.
{{tts en_US:The lights went out because of a problem in the circuit.}}
【用法說明】circuit 常用於電學或固定路線
【翻譯】燈熄了是因為電路出了問題。

{{tts en_US:circular}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】圓形的；循環的；通知單
【搭配詞】circular table / circular motion / company circular
【例句】We sat around a circular table.
{{tts en_US:We sat around a circular table.}}
【用法說明】circular 可作形容詞，也可作名詞指通知
【翻譯】我們圍坐在一張圓桌旁。

{{tts en_US:circulate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】循環；流傳；傳播
【搭配詞】circulate the news / blood circulates / circulate among
【例句】A rumor started to circulate online.
{{tts en_US:A rumor started to circulate online.}}
【用法說明】circulate 表示在群體或系統中流動
【翻譯】一則謠言開始在網路上流傳。

{{tts en_US:circulation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】循環；流通；發行量
【搭配詞】blood circulation / newspaper circulation / in circulation
【例句】Exercise helps improve blood circulation.
{{tts en_US:Exercise helps improve blood circulation.}}
【用法說明】circulation 常指血液循環，也可指流通量
【翻譯】運動有助於改善血液循環。

{{tts en_US:circumstance}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】情況；處境
【搭配詞】under the circumstances / difficult circumstances / in any circumstance
【例句】Under the circumstances, we had no choice.
{{tts en_US:Under the circumstances, we had no choice.}}
【用法說明】circumstance 常以複數 circumstances 出現
【翻譯】在那種情況下，我們別無選擇。

{{tts en_US:circus}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】馬戲團
【搭配詞】traveling circus / circus tent / join the circus
【例句】The kids were excited to see the circus.
{{tts en_US:The kids were excited to see the circus.}}
【用法說明】circus 指馬戲團表演
【翻譯】孩子們很興奮能看到馬戲團。

{{tts en_US:cite}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】引用；引述
【搭配詞】cite a source / cite an example / cite evidence
【例句】Please cite your sources in the report.
{{tts en_US:Please cite your sources in the report.}}
【用法說明】cite 常用於正式寫作或學術語境
【翻譯】請在報告中標註你的資料來源。

{{tts en_US:citizen}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】公民；市民
【搭配詞】local citizen / good citizen / citizen of the country
【例句】Every citizen has the right to vote.
{{tts en_US:Every citizen has the right to vote.}}
【用法說明】citizen 指一國公民或城市居民
【翻譯】每位公民都有投票權。

{{tts en_US:citizenship}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】公民身分；公民資格
【搭配詞】dual citizenship / apply for citizenship / citizenship status
【例句】She applied for citizenship last year.
{{tts en_US:She applied for citizenship last year.}}
【用法說明】citizenship 指法律上的公民資格
【翻譯】她去年申請了公民身分。

{{tts en_US:city}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】城市
【搭配詞】big city / city center / city life
【例句】He moved to the city for work.
{{tts en_US:He moved to the city for work.}}
【用法說明】city 指城市
【翻譯】他為了工作搬到城市裡。

{{tts en_US:civic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】公民的；城市的
【搭配詞】civic duty / civic center / civic pride
【例句】Voting is a basic civic duty.
{{tts en_US:Voting is a basic civic duty.}}
【用法說明】civic 常與公民責任或城市事務有關
【翻譯】投票是基本的公民責任。

{{tts en_US:civil}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】公民的；民事的；有禮的
【搭配詞】civil rights / civil law / keep it civil
【例句】Please keep the discussion civil.
{{tts en_US:Please keep the discussion civil.}}
【用法說明】civil 有多種意思，常見之一是『有禮貌的』
【翻譯】請讓討論保持理性有禮。

{{tts en_US:civilian}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】平民；平民的
【搭配詞】civilian life / civilian clothes / protect civilians
【例句】The area was evacuated to protect civilians.
{{tts en_US:The area was evacuated to protect civilians.}}
【用法說明】civilian 指非軍方的人
【翻譯】那個地區被撤離以保護平民。

{{tts en_US:civilization}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】文明
【搭配詞】ancient civilization / modern civilization / rise of civilization
【例句】The museum has artifacts from an ancient civilization.
{{tts en_US:The museum has artifacts from an ancient civilization.}}
【用法說明】civilization 指高度發展的人類社會
【翻譯】博物館收藏了古代文明的文物。

{{tts en_US:civilize}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使文明化；教化
【搭配詞】civilize society / civilize the region / be civilized
【例句】Education can help civilize a society.
{{tts en_US:Education can help civilize a society.}}
【用法說明】civilize 指使人或社會變得更文明
【翻譯】教育可以幫助社會變得更文明。

{{tts en_US:claim}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】聲稱；索取；主張
【搭配詞】claim that / claim a prize / insurance claim
【例句】He claimed that he had never seen it before.
{{tts en_US:He claimed that he had never seen it before.}}
【用法說明】claim 可作動詞或名詞，常見於聲稱或申請
【翻譯】他聲稱自己以前從沒看過那個。

{{tts en_US:clam}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】蛤蜊
【搭配詞】clam soup / clam shell / fresh clams
【例句】We had clam soup for lunch.
{{tts en_US:We had clam soup for lunch.}}
【用法說明】clam 指可食用貝類
【翻譯】我們午餐喝了蛤蜊湯。

{{tts en_US:clap}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】拍手；鼓掌
【搭配詞】clap your hands / clap loudly / audience clapped
【例句】Everyone clapped after the performance.
{{tts en_US:Everyone clapped after the performance.}}
【用法說明】clap 可作動詞或名詞，表示拍手
【翻譯】表演結束後大家都鼓掌了。

{{tts en_US:clarify}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】澄清；說明清楚
【搭配詞】clarify a point / clarify the issue / clarify what you mean
【例句】Can you clarify what you mean?
{{tts en_US:Can you clarify what you mean?}}
【用法說明】clarify 表示把模糊的事情說清楚
【翻譯】你可以說明一下你的意思嗎？

{{tts en_US:clarity}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】清楚；明晰
【搭配詞】with clarity / lack of clarity / greater clarity
【例句】Her explanation brought clarity to the problem.
{{tts en_US:Her explanation brought clarity to the problem.}}
【用法說明】clarity 指表達或想法的清晰程度
【翻譯】她的說明讓問題變清楚了。

{{tts en_US:clash}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】衝突；不協調；撞擊
【搭配詞】clash with / style clash / schedule clash
【例句】Our meeting times clash on Friday.
{{tts en_US:Our meeting times clash on Friday.}}
【用法說明】clash 常表示時間、意見或風格互相衝突
【翻譯】我們星期五的會議時間撞到了。

{{tts en_US:clasp}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】扣住；緊握；扣環
【搭配詞】clasp your hands / silver clasp / clasp tightly
【例句】She clasped his hand before the speech.
{{tts en_US:She clasped his hand before the speech.}}
【用法說明】clasp 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】演講前她握住了他的手。

{{tts en_US:class}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】課；班級；階級
【搭配詞】take a class / class schedule / middle class
【例句】I have an English class this afternoon.
{{tts en_US:I have an English class this afternoon.}}
【用法說明】class 最常指課程或班級
【翻譯】我今天下午有英文課。

{{tts en_US:classic}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】經典的；經典作品
【搭配詞】classic movie / classic style / a classic
【例句】That's a classic movie everyone should see.
{{tts en_US:That's a classic movie everyone should see.}}
【用法說明】classic 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】那是一部每個人都該看的經典電影。

{{tts en_US:classical}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】古典的；經典文學的
【搭配詞】classical music / classical dance / classical education
【例句】She listens to classical music while studying.
{{tts en_US:She listens to classical music while studying.}}
【用法說明】classical 常指古典音樂或古典風格
【翻譯】她讀書時會聽古典音樂。

{{tts en_US:classification}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】分類；分類法
【搭配詞】scientific classification / product classification / clear classification
【例句】The books are arranged by classification.
{{tts en_US:The books are arranged by classification.}}
【用法說明】classification 指分門別類的方式
【翻譯】這些書是按照分類排列的。

{{tts en_US:classify}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】分類；歸類
【搭配詞】classify the data / classify as / classify by type
【例句】Please classify these files by date.
{{tts en_US:Please classify these files by date.}}
【用法說明】classify 指依照標準分組
【翻譯】請依日期把這些檔案分類。

{{tts en_US:classmate}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】同學
【搭配詞】old classmate / meet a classmate / my classmates
【例句】I ran into an old classmate yesterday.
{{tts en_US:I ran into an old classmate yesterday.}}
【用法說明】classmate 指同班同學
【翻譯】我昨天巧遇一位老同學。

{{tts en_US:clause}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】子句；條款
【搭配詞】contract clause / if-clause / add a clause
【例句】Please read the last clause of the contract.
{{tts en_US:Please read the last clause of the contract.}}
【用法說明】clause 可指文法子句或合約條款
【翻譯】請閱讀合約最後一條條款。

{{tts en_US:claw}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】爪子；爪狀物
【搭配詞】cat's claw / sharp claws / claw machine
【例句】The cat scratched the sofa with its claws.
{{tts en_US:The cat scratched the sofa with its claws.}}
【用法說明】claw 指動物的爪
【翻譯】那隻貓用爪子抓了沙發。

{{tts en_US:clay}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】黏土
【搭配詞】wet clay / clay pot / modeling clay
【例句】The kids made small bowls from clay.
{{tts en_US:The kids made small bowls from clay.}}
【用法說明】clay 指可塑形的黏土
【翻譯】孩子們用黏土做了小碗。

{{tts en_US:clean}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】乾淨的；打掃
【搭配詞】clean the room / keep clean / clean clothes
【例句】I need to clean the kitchen tonight.
{{tts en_US:I need to clean the kitchen tonight.}}
【用法說明】clean 可作形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】我今晚得打掃廚房。

{{tts en_US:cleaner}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】清潔工；清潔劑
【搭配詞】window cleaner / bathroom cleaner / dry cleaner
【例句】This cleaner works well on glass.
{{tts en_US:This cleaner works well on glass.}}
【用法說明】cleaner 可指人，也可指清潔用品
【翻譯】這種清潔劑很適合擦玻璃。

{{tts en_US:clear}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】清楚的；清理；放晴
【搭配詞】clear answer / clear the table / all clear
【例句】The instructions are clear and easy to follow.
{{tts en_US:The instructions are clear and easy to follow.}}
【用法說明】clear 有很多意思，常見是清楚、乾淨或清除

{{tts en_US:cold}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】冷的；感冒；冷淡的
【搭配詞】catch a cold / cold weather / feel cold
【例句】I think I'm coming down with a cold.
{{tts en_US:I think I'm coming down with a cold.}}
【用法說明】cold 常指低溫，也常指感冒
【翻譯】我覺得自己快感冒了。

{{tts en_US:collaboration}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】合作；協作
【搭配詞】close collaboration / international collaboration / collaboration with
【例句】The project was a collaboration between two schools.
{{tts en_US:The project was a collaboration between two schools.}}
【用法說明】collaboration 指共同合作完成某事
【翻譯】這個計畫是兩所學校合作的成果。

{{tts en_US:collapse}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】倒塌；崩潰
【搭配詞】building collapse / collapse from exhaustion / collapse into
【例句】He collapsed on the sofa after work.
{{tts en_US:He collapsed on the sofa after work.}}
【用法說明】collapse 可指建築倒塌，也可指人累倒或制度崩潰
【翻譯】他下班後倒在沙發上。

{{tts en_US:collar}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】衣領；項圈
【搭配詞】shirt collar / dog collar / white-collar
【例句】His shirt collar was wrinkled.
{{tts en_US:His shirt collar was wrinkled.}}
【用法說明】collar 最常指衣領，也可指寵物項圈
【翻譯】他的襯衫領子皺掉了。

{{tts en_US:colleague}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】同事
【搭配詞】work with colleagues / former colleague / close colleague
【例句】I'm meeting a colleague for lunch.
{{tts en_US:I'm meeting a colleague for lunch.}}
【用法說明】colleague 指工作上的同事
【翻譯】我要和一位同事一起吃午餐。

{{tts en_US:communicate}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】溝通；傳達
【搭配詞】communicate with / communicate clearly / communicate ideas
【例句】We need to communicate better as a team.
{{tts en_US:We need to communicate better as a team.}}
【用法說明】communicate 指交換資訊或表達想法
【翻譯】我們這個團隊需要更好地溝通。

{{tts en_US:communication}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】溝通；通訊
【搭配詞】good communication / communication skills / improve communication
【例句】Good communication is important in any relationship.
{{tts en_US:Good communication is important in any relationship.}}
【用法說明】communication 指交流資訊的過程
【翻譯】良好的溝通在任何關係中都很重要。

{{tts en_US:communicative}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】善於溝通的；愛說話的
【搭配詞】highly communicative / communicative style / more communicative
【例句】She's friendly and very communicative.
{{tts en_US:She's friendly and very communicative.}}
【用法說明】communicative 形容人樂於表達、好溝通
【翻譯】她很友善，也很善於溝通。

{{tts en_US:communism}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】共產主義
【搭配詞】history of communism / oppose communism / communism theory
【例句】The class discussed the history of communism.
{{tts en_US:The class discussed the history of communism.}}
【用法說明】communism 指一種政治與經濟思想制度
【翻譯】那堂課討論了共產主義的歷史。

{{tts en_US:communist}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】共產主義者；共產主義的
【搭配詞】communist party / communist system / communist leader
【例句】The book analyzes communist movements in Asia.
{{tts en_US:The book analyzes communist movements in Asia.}}
【用法說明】communist 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】那本書分析了亞洲的共產主義運動。

{{tts en_US:community}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】社區；群體
【搭配詞】local community / online community / sense of community
【例句】The library is important to the local community.
{{tts en_US:The library is important to the local community.}}
【用法說明】community 指地區居民或有共同興趣的一群人
【翻譯】這座圖書館對當地社區很重要。

{{tts en_US:commute}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】通勤；通勤路程
【搭配詞】daily commute / commute to work / long commute
【例句】She commutes to Taipei every day.
{{tts en_US:She commutes to Taipei every day.}}
【用法說明】commute 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】她每天通勤到台北。

{{tts en_US:commuter}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】通勤者
【搭配詞】daily commuter / train commuter / busy commuter
【例句】Many commuters were waiting for the train.
{{tts en_US:Many commuters were waiting for the train.}}
【用法說明】commuter 指每天往返住家與工作地的人
【翻譯】很多通勤族正在等火車。

{{tts en_US:compact}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】小巧的；緊密的
【搭配詞】compact car / compact design / compact size
【例句】She bought a compact car for city driving.
{{tts en_US:She bought a compact car for city driving.}}
【用法說明】compact 常形容體積小、好攜帶
【翻譯】她買了一台適合在市區開的小車。

{{tts en_US:companion}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】同伴；陪伴者
【搭配詞】travel companion / constant companion / loyal companion
【例句】My dog has been my companion for years.
{{tts en_US:My dog has been my companion for years.}}
【用法說明】companion 指一起生活、旅行或相處的同伴
【翻譯】我的狗多年來一直是我的陪伴。

{{tts en_US:company}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】公司；陪伴
【搭配詞】work for a company / start a company / enjoy your company
【例句】She works for a software company.
{{tts en_US:She works for a software company.}}
【用法說明】company 最常指公司，也可指陪伴
【翻譯】她在一家軟體公司上班。

{{tts en_US:comparable}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】可比較的；相當的
【搭配詞】comparable to / comparable quality / roughly comparable
【例句】The two phones are comparable in price.
{{tts en_US:The two phones are comparable in price.}}
【用法說明】be comparable to = 可與…相比
【翻譯】這兩支手機的價格差不多。

{{tts en_US:comparative}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】比較的；相對的
【搭配詞】comparative study / comparative advantage / comparative form
【例句】We did a comparative study of the two methods.
{{tts en_US:We did a comparative study of the two methods.}}
【用法說明】comparative 常用於比較研究或文法
【翻譯】我們對這兩種方法做了比較研究。

{{tts en_US:compare}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】比較；對照
【搭配詞】compare A with B / compare prices / compare notes
【例句】Let's compare the two plans before deciding.
{{tts en_US:Let's compare the two plans before deciding.}}
【用法說明】compare 常指把兩個東西放在一起對照
【翻譯】我們先比較這兩個方案再決定。

{{tts en_US:comparison}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】比較；對照
【搭配詞】in comparison with / by comparison / make a comparison
【例句】In comparison with last year, sales are up.
{{tts en_US:In comparison with last year, sales are up.}}
【用法說明】comparison 指比較這件事或結果
【翻譯】和去年相比，銷售量上升了。

{{tts en_US:compass}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】指南針；羅盤
【搭配詞】use a compass / magnetic compass / compass app
【例句】We used a compass to find the trail.
{{tts en_US:We used a compass to find the trail.}}
【用法說明】compass 指用來辨別方向的工具
【翻譯】我們用指南針找路。

{{tts en_US:compassion}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】同情；憐憫
【搭配詞】show compassion / compassion for / feel compassion
【例句】She treated the patient with compassion.
{{tts en_US:She treated the patient with compassion.}}
【用法說明】compassion 指對他人痛苦的同理與關懷
【翻譯】她很有同理心地照顧那位病人。

{{tts en_US:compassionate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】有同情心的；慈悲的
【搭配詞】compassionate person / compassionate care / be compassionate
【例句】He's a compassionate teacher.
{{tts en_US:He's a compassionate teacher.}}
【用法說明】compassionate 形容人有同理心、會體貼別人
【翻譯】他是一位很有同理心的老師。

{{tts en_US:compatible}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】相容的；合得來的
【搭配詞】compatible with / compatible device / highly compatible
【例句】This charger isn't compatible with my phone.
{{tts en_US:This charger isn't compatible with my phone.}}
【用法說明】be compatible with = 與…相容
【翻譯】這個充電器和我的手機不相容。

{{tts en_US:compel}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】迫使；驅使
【搭配詞】compel someone to / feel compelled / compel action
【例句】The law compels drivers to wear seat belts.
{{tts en_US:The law compels drivers to wear seat belts.}}
【用法說明】compel 表示強迫或使人不得不
【翻譯】法律強制駕駛人繫安全帶。

{{tts en_US:compensate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】補償；彌補
【搭配詞】compensate for / compensate someone / fully compensate
【例句】They offered money to compensate for the delay.
{{tts en_US:They offered money to compensate for the delay.}}
【用法說明】compensate for = 補償、彌補
【翻譯】他們提供金錢補償這次延誤。

{{tts en_US:compensation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】補償；賠償；報酬
【搭配詞】financial compensation / workers' compensation / receive compensation
【例句】She received compensation for the damage.
{{tts en_US:She received compensation for the damage.}}
【用法說明】compensation 指因損失而得到的補償
【翻譯】她因損失而獲得賠償。

{{tts en_US:compete}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】競爭；參賽
【搭配詞】compete with / compete in / compete for
【例句】Our team will compete in the final round.
{{tts en_US:Our team will compete in the final round.}}
【用法說明】compete 指與他人競爭或參賽
【翻譯】我們隊伍會參加最後一輪比賽。

{{tts en_US:competence}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】能力；勝任
【搭配詞】professional competence / demonstrate competence / level of competence
【例句】The job requires a high level of competence.
{{tts en_US:The job requires a high level of competence.}}
【用法說明】competence 指做某事的能力與勝任程度
【翻譯】這份工作需要很高的能力。

{{tts en_US:competent}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】有能力的；勝任的
【搭配詞】competent staff / highly competent / be competent at
【例句】She's a competent manager.
{{tts en_US:She's a competent manager.}}
【用法說明】competent 形容人做事可靠、有能力
【翻譯】她是一位很能幹的主管。

{{tts en_US:competition}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】競爭；比賽
【搭配詞】fierce competition / singing competition / face competition
【例句】There was strong competition for the job.
{{tts en_US:There was strong competition for the job.}}
【用法說明】competition 可指競爭情況或正式比賽
【翻譯】這份工作競爭很激烈。

{{tts en_US:competitive}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】有競爭力的；好勝的
【搭配詞】competitive price / competitive market / very competitive
【例句】This company offers competitive salaries.
{{tts en_US:This company offers competitive salaries.}}
【用法說明】competitive 可指價格有競爭力，也可指人好勝
【翻譯】這家公司提供有競爭力的薪資。

{{tts en_US:competitor}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】競爭者；對手
【搭配詞】main competitor / direct competitor / beat a competitor
【例句】Their biggest competitor lowered prices.
{{tts en_US:Their biggest competitor lowered prices.}}
【用法說明】competitor 指和你競爭的人或公司
【翻譯】他們最大的競爭對手降價了。

{{tts en_US:compile}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】編輯；彙整
【搭配詞】compile data / compile a report / compile a list
【例句】She compiled a list of useful websites.
{{tts en_US:She compiled a list of useful websites.}}
【用法說明】compile 指把資料蒐集整理成一份內容
【翻譯】她整理出一份實用網站清單。

{{tts en_US:complain}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】抱怨
【搭配詞】complain about / complain to / complain that
【例句】He keeps complaining about the noise.
{{tts en_US:He keeps complaining about the noise.}}
【用法說明】complain about + 事物
【翻譯】他一直抱怨那個噪音。

{{tts en_US:complaint}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】抱怨；申訴
【搭配詞】file a complaint / customer complaint / make a complaint
【例句】The store received several complaints today.
{{tts en_US:The store received several complaints today.}}
【用法說明】complaint 指正式或非正式的抱怨
【翻譯】那家店今天收到好幾則客訴。

{{tts en_US:complement}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】補足；補充物
【搭配詞】complement each other / perfect complement / complement the design
【例句】The sauce complements the dish nicely.
{{tts en_US:The sauce complements the dish nicely.}}
【用法說明】complement 指使某物更完整、互相襯托
【翻譯】這個醬汁讓整道菜更出色。

{{tts en_US:complete}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】完成的；完成
【搭配詞】complete the task / complete set / be complete
【例句】I need to complete this form today.
{{tts en_US:I need to complete this form today.}}
【用法說明】complete 可作形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】我今天得把這張表填完。

{{tts en_US:complex}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】複雜的；綜合體
【搭配詞】complex problem / apartment complex / very complex
【例句】This is a complex issue.
{{tts en_US:This is a complex issue.}}
【用法說明】complex 可指事情複雜，也可指建築綜合體
【翻譯】這是一個很複雜的問題。

{{tts en_US:complexion}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】膚色；氣色
【搭配詞】clear complexion / pale complexion / healthy complexion
【例句】She has a clear complexion.
{{tts en_US:She has a clear complexion.}}
【用法說明】complexion 通常指皮膚顏色或膚況
【翻譯】她的膚況很好。

{{tts en_US:complexity}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】複雜性
【搭配詞】level of complexity / reduce complexity / complexity of the task
【例句】I didn't expect this level of complexity.
{{tts en_US:I didn't expect this level of complexity.}}
【用法說明】complexity 指事情有多複雜
【翻譯】我沒想到事情會這麼複雜。

{{tts en_US:compliance}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】遵守；合規
【搭配詞】in compliance with / legal compliance / ensure compliance
【例句】The company is working to ensure compliance with the law.
{{tts en_US:The company is working to ensure compliance with the law.}}
【用法說明】compliance 常用於法律與規範語境
【翻譯】那家公司正努力確保符合法規。

{{tts en_US:complicate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】使複雜化
【搭配詞】complicate the issue / complicate matters / further complicate
【例句】Don't complicate things more than necessary.
{{tts en_US:Don't complicate things more than necessary.}}
【用法說明】complicate 表示讓事情變得更複雜
【翻譯】別把事情弄得比必要的更複雜。

{{tts en_US:complication}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】複雜情況；併發症
【搭配詞】medical complication / avoid complications / unexpected complication
【例句】There were no complications after the surgery.
{{tts en_US:There were no complications after the surgery.}}
【用法說明】complication 可指醫療併發症，也可指麻煩狀況
【翻譯】手術後沒有出現併發症。

{{tts en_US:compliment}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】稱讚；讚美
【搭配詞】pay a compliment / compliment someone on / nice compliment
【例句】She complimented me on my presentation.
{{tts en_US:She complimented me on my presentation.}}
【用法說明】compliment 指稱讚他人
【翻譯】她稱讚了我的簡報。

{{tts en_US:collect}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】收集；收取
【搭配詞】collect stamps / collect data / collect money
【例句】I collect postcards from different countries.
{{tts en_US:I collect postcards from different countries.}}
【用法說明】collect 指把東西集中收起來
【翻譯】我蒐集不同國家的明信片。

{{tts en_US:collection}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】收藏；蒐集；作品集
【搭配詞】art collection / collection of books / garbage collection
【例句】He has a large collection of vinyl records.
{{tts en_US:He has a large collection of vinyl records.}}
【用法說明】collection 指蒐集到的一組東西
【翻譯】他收藏了很多黑膠唱片。

{{tts en_US:collective}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】集體的；共同的
【搭配詞】collective effort / collective decision / collective memory
【例句】It was a collective effort by the whole team.
{{tts en_US:It was a collective effort by the whole team.}}
【用法說明】collective 表示由整體共同完成
【翻譯】這是整個團隊共同努力的成果。

{{tts en_US:collector}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】收藏家；收集者
【搭配詞】art collector / ticket collector / debt collector
【例句】She's a collector of rare coins.
{{tts en_US:She's a collector of rare coins.}}
【用法說明】collector 指專門蒐集某類東西的人
【翻譯】她是一位稀有硬幣收藏家。

{{tts en_US:college}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】大學；學院
【搭配詞】go to college / college student / college life
【例句】My sister just started college.
{{tts en_US:My sister just started college.}}
【用法說明】college 指高等教育機構
【翻譯】我姊姊剛開始上大學。

{{tts en_US:collision}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】碰撞；衝突
【搭配詞】car collision / head-on collision / collision with
【例句】Two cars were involved in the collision.
{{tts en_US:Two cars were involved in the collision.}}
【用法說明】collision 指車禍或物體相撞
【翻譯】那場碰撞事故涉及兩輛車。

{{tts en_US:colloquial}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】口語的；白話的
【搭配詞】colloquial English / colloquial expression / colloquial style
【例句】That phrase is too colloquial for formal writing.
{{tts en_US:That phrase is too colloquial for formal writing.}}
【用法說明】colloquial 指接近日常口語的表達
【翻譯】那個片語太口語，不適合正式寫作。

{{tts en_US:colonial}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】殖民的；殖民時期的
【搭配詞】colonial rule / colonial history / colonial building
【例句】The city still has many colonial buildings.
{{tts en_US:The city still has many colonial buildings.}}
【用法說明】colonial 常用於歷史與建築語境
【翻譯】那座城市仍有許多殖民時期建築。

{{tts en_US:colony}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】殖民地；群體
【搭配詞】ant colony / former colony / bird colony
【例句】We watched an ant colony near the tree.
{{tts en_US:We watched an ant colony near the tree.}}
【用法說明】colony 可指一群生物，也可指歷史上的殖民地
【翻譯】我們在樹旁觀察一群螞蟻。

{{tts en_US:color}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】顏色；上色
【搭配詞】bright color / change color / favorite color
【例句】Blue is my favorite color.
{{tts en_US:Blue is my favorite color.}}
【用法說明】color 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】藍色是我最喜歡的顏色。

{{tts en_US:colorful}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】色彩鮮豔的；多采多姿的
【搭配詞】colorful dress / colorful history / colorful flowers
【例句】She wore a colorful scarf.
{{tts en_US:She wore a colorful scarf.}}
【用法說明】colorful 可形容色彩豐富，也可比喻內容多樣
【翻譯】她圍了一條色彩鮮豔的圍巾。

{{tts en_US:column}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】欄；柱子；專欄
【搭配詞】newspaper column / first column / stone column
【例句】Put the names in the left column.
{{tts en_US:Put the names in the left column.}}
【用法說明】column 可指表格欄位、報紙專欄或建築柱子
【翻譯】把名字放在左邊那一欄。

{{tts en_US:columnist}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】專欄作家
【搭配詞】newspaper columnist / political columnist / weekly columnist
【例句】She's a popular columnist for a local paper.
{{tts en_US:She's a popular columnist for a local paper.}}
【用法說明】columnist 指定期寫專欄的人
【翻譯】她是地方報紙很受歡迎的專欄作家。

{{tts en_US:comb}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】梳子；梳理
【搭配詞】hair comb / comb your hair / fine-tooth comb
【例句】He used a comb to fix his hair.
{{tts en_US:He used a comb to fix his hair.}}
【用法說明】comb 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他拿梳子整理頭髮。

{{tts en_US:combat}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】戰鬥；對抗
【搭配詞】combat stress / combat crime / in combat
【例句】The city is trying to combat air pollution.
{{tts en_US:The city is trying to combat air pollution.}}
【用法說明】combat 可指對抗問題，也可指戰鬥
【翻譯】這座城市正努力對抗空氣污染。

{{tts en_US:combination}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】組合；結合
【搭配詞】good combination / in combination with / winning combination
【例句】Black and gold is a great color combination.
{{tts en_US:Black and gold is a great color combination.}}
【用法說明】combination 指兩樣以上事物的組合
【翻譯】黑色和金色是很棒的顏色搭配。

{{tts en_US:combine}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】結合；合併
【搭配詞】combine A with B / combine efforts / combine the files
【例句】You can combine these two ideas.
{{tts en_US:You can combine these two ideas.}}
【用法說明】combine 指把不同東西合在一起
【翻譯】你可以把這兩個想法結合起來。

{{tts en_US:come}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】來；來到
【搭配詞】come here / come back / come with me
【例句】Can you come a little earlier tomorrow?
{{tts en_US:Can you come a little earlier tomorrow?}}
【用法說明】come 是最常見的移動動詞之一
【翻譯】你明天可以早一點來嗎？

{{tts en_US:comedian}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】喜劇演員
【搭配詞】stand-up comedian / famous comedian / comedian on stage
【例句】The comedian made everyone laugh.
{{tts en_US:The comedian made everyone laugh.}}
【用法說明】comedian 指以搞笑表演為主的人
【翻譯】那位喜劇演員把大家都逗笑了。

{{tts en_US:comedy}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】喜劇
【搭配詞】romantic comedy / comedy show / watch a comedy
【例句】We watched a comedy last night.
{{tts en_US:We watched a comedy last night.}}
【用法說明】comedy 指讓人發笑的電影、節目或戲劇
【翻譯】我們昨晚看了一部喜劇。

{{tts en_US:comet}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】彗星
【搭配詞】see a comet / comet tail / passing comet
【例句】The children stayed up to see the comet.
{{tts en_US:The children stayed up to see the comet.}}
【用法說明】comet 指在太空中帶有尾巴的天體
【翻譯】孩子們熬夜想看彗星。

{{tts en_US:comfort}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】安慰；舒適
【搭配詞】take comfort in / comfort someone / comfort zone
【例句】She tried to comfort her friend after the bad news.
{{tts en_US:She tried to comfort her friend after the bad news.}}
【用法說明】comfort 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】壞消息傳來後，她試著安慰朋友。

{{tts en_US:comfortable}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】舒服的；自在的
【搭配詞】comfortable chair / feel comfortable / comfortable with
【例句】These shoes are really comfortable.
{{tts en_US:These shoes are really comfortable.}}
【用法說明】comfortable 可形容身體感受或心理自在
【翻譯】這雙鞋真的很舒服。

{{tts en_US:comic}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】漫畫的；喜劇的；漫畫家
【搭配詞】comic book / comic actor / comic style
【例句】He bought a comic book at the station.
{{tts en_US:He bought a comic book at the station.}}
【用法說明】comic 常見於 comic book，也可作形容詞
【翻譯】他在車站買了一本漫畫。

{{tts en_US:comics}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】漫畫
【搭配詞】read comics / comic strip / comics section
【例句】My son loves reading comics.
{{tts en_US:My son loves reading comics.}}
【用法說明】comics 通常指漫畫作品
【翻譯】我兒子很喜歡看漫畫。

{{tts en_US:comma}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】逗號
【搭配詞】put a comma / missing comma / comma mistake
【例句】Don't forget the comma after that word.
{{tts en_US:Don't forget the comma after that word.}}
【用法說明】comma 是標點符號之一
【翻譯】別忘了在那個字後面加逗號。

{{tts en_US:command}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】命令；指揮
【搭配詞】give a command / command respect / in command
【例句】The captain gave the command to move.
{{tts en_US:The captain gave the command to move.}}
【用法說明】command 可作名詞或動詞，表示命令或指揮
【翻譯】隊長下令前進。

{{tts en_US:commander}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】指揮官
【搭配詞】army commander / unit commander / commander in chief
【例句】The commander spoke to the troops.
{{tts en_US:The commander spoke to the troops.}}
【用法說明】commander 指帶領軍隊或團隊的人
【翻譯】指揮官對部隊發表談話。

{{tts en_US:comment}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】評論；留言
【搭配詞】make a comment / leave a comment / no comment
【例句】She left a comment under the video.
{{tts en_US:She left a comment under the video.}}
【用法說明】comment 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她在影片下方留了留言。

{{tts en_US:commentary}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】評論；解說
【搭配詞】news commentary / sports commentary / political commentary
【例句】The documentary included expert commentary.
{{tts en_US:The documentary included expert commentary.}}
【用法說明】commentary 指帶有分析或說明的評論
【翻譯】那部紀錄片裡有專家解說。

{{tts en_US:commentator}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】評論員；講評員
【搭配詞】sports commentator / political commentator / TV commentator
【例句】The commentator explained the game clearly.
{{tts en_US:The commentator explained the game clearly.}}
【用法說明】commentator 指在媒體上解說或評論的人
【翻譯】那位講評員把比賽講得很清楚。

{{tts en_US:commerce}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】商業；貿易
【搭配詞】international commerce / online commerce / department of commerce
【例句】The city grew rich through trade and commerce.
{{tts en_US:The city grew rich through trade and commerce.}}
【用法說明】commerce 是較正式的『商業』
【翻譯】那座城市靠著貿易與商業繁榮起來。

{{tts en_US:commercial}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】商業的；廣告
【搭配詞】commercial use / TV commercial / commercial area
【例句】I saw that commercial on TV last night.
{{tts en_US:I saw that commercial on TV last night.}}
【用法說明】commercial 可作形容詞，也可作名詞指廣告
【翻譯】我昨晚在電視上看到那支廣告。

{{tts en_US:commission}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】委員會；佣金；委託
【搭配詞】sales commission / government commission / commission a painting
【例句】He earns a commission on every sale.
{{tts en_US:He earns a commission on every sale.}}
【用法說明】commission 有多種意思，商業上常指佣金
【翻譯】他每做成一筆生意都能拿佣金。

{{tts en_US:commit}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】承諾；投入；犯下
【搭配詞】commit to / commit a crime / commit yourself
【例句】You need to commit to the plan if you want it to work.
{{tts en_US:You need to commit to the plan if you want it to work.}}
【用法說明】commit to + 名詞／V-ing，表示投入承諾
【翻譯】如果你想讓這個計畫成功，就得真的投入。

{{tts en_US:commitment}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】承諾；投入；責任
【搭配詞】make a commitment / long-term commitment / serious commitment
【例句】Learning a language takes time and commitment.
{{tts en_US:Learning a language takes time and commitment.}}
【用法說明】commitment 指持續投入的決心
【翻譯】學語言需要時間和持續投入。

{{tts en_US:committee}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】委員會
【搭配詞】school committee / committee member / join the committee
【例句】The committee will meet next week.
{{tts en_US:The committee will meet next week.}}
【用法說明】committee 指一群負責決策或討論的人
【翻譯】委員會下週會開會。

{{tts en_US:commodity}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】商品；日用品
【搭配詞】basic commodity / global commodity / price of commodities
【例句】Oil is an important global commodity.
{{tts en_US:Oil is an important global commodity.}}
【用法說明】commodity 指可交易的商品，常見於經濟語境
【翻譯】石油是重要的全球商品。

{{tts en_US:common}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】常見的；共同的
【搭配詞】common mistake / common sense / in common
【例句】This is a common problem for beginners.
{{tts en_US:This is a common problem for beginners.}}
【用法說明】common 表示普遍常見
【翻譯】這是初學者常見的問題。

{{tts en_US:commonplace}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】常見的；平凡的
【搭配詞】commonplace idea / become commonplace / something commonplace
【例句】Smartphones are now commonplace.
{{tts en_US:Smartphones are now commonplace.}}
【用法說明】commonplace 表示已經很普遍、不稀奇
【翻譯】智慧型手機現在已經很普遍了。

{{tts en_US:commonwealth}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】共和國；聯邦；共同利益
【搭配詞】British Commonwealth / commonwealth nation / commonwealth of states
【例句】Several countries belong to the Commonwealth.
{{tts en_US:Several countries belong to the Commonwealth.}}
【用法說明】commonwealth 常見於政治歷史語境
【翻譯】有幾個國家屬於大英國協。

{{tts en_US:comply}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】遵守；照做
【搭配詞】comply with / refuse to comply / fully comply
【例句】All drivers must comply with the new rule.
{{tts en_US:All drivers must comply with the new rule.}}
【用法說明】comply with = 遵守
【翻譯】所有駕駛都必須遵守新規定。

{{tts en_US:component}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】零件；組成部分
【搭配詞】electronic component / key component / main component
【例句】This machine has many small components.
{{tts en_US:This machine has many small components.}}
【用法說明】component 指整體中的一個部分
【翻譯】這台機器有很多小零件。

{{tts en_US:compose}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】組成；作曲；撰寫
【搭配詞】compose a song / be composed of / compose an email
【例句】Water is composed of hydrogen and oxygen.
{{tts en_US:Water is composed of hydrogen and oxygen.}}
【用法說明】compose 常見於 be composed of，也可指作曲寫作
【翻譯】水是由氫和氧組成的。

{{tts en_US:composer}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】作曲家
【搭配詞】famous composer / modern composer / classical composer
【例句】Mozart was a brilliant composer.
{{tts en_US:Mozart was a brilliant composer.}}
【用法說明】composer 指創作音樂的人
【翻譯】莫札特是一位傑出的作曲家。

{{tts en_US:composition}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】組成；作品；作文
【搭配詞】chemical composition / music composition / write a composition
【例句】The teacher asked us to write a short composition.
{{tts en_US:The teacher asked us to write a short composition.}}
【用法說明】composition 可指組成結構，也可指作文
【翻譯】老師要我們寫一篇短作文。

{{tts en_US:compound}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】化合物；複合的；使加劇
【搭配詞】chemical compound / compound word / compound the problem
【例句】Salt is a simple chemical compound.
{{tts en_US:Salt is a simple chemical compound.}}
【用法說明】compound 可作名詞或形容詞，常見於科學與語言
【翻譯】鹽是一種簡單的化合物。

{{tts en_US:comprehend}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】理解；明白
【搭配詞】comprehend the idea / fail to comprehend / fully comprehend
【例句】It took me a while to comprehend the instructions.
{{tts en_US:It took me a while to comprehend the instructions.}}
【用法說明】comprehend 是較正式的 understand
【翻譯】我花了一點時間才理解那些說明。

{{tts en_US:comprehension}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】理解；領悟力
【搭配詞】reading comprehension / comprehension test / improve comprehension
【例句】Good reading comprehension takes practice.
{{tts en_US:Good reading comprehension takes practice.}}
【用法說明】comprehension 指理解內容的能力
【翻譯】良好的閱讀理解能力需要練習。

{{tts en_US:comprehensive}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】全面的；綜合的
【搭配詞】comprehensive report / comprehensive school / comprehensive plan
【例句】The guide gives a comprehensive overview of the city.
{{tts en_US:The guide gives a comprehensive overview of the city.}}
【用法說明】comprehensive 表示涵蓋很完整
【翻譯】這本指南完整介紹了這座城市。

{{tts en_US:comprise}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】由…組成；包含
【搭配詞】be comprised of / comprise several parts / comprise the team
【例句】The course comprises ten short lessons.
{{tts en_US:The course comprises ten short lessons.}}
【用法說明】comprise 常用來表示『包含、構成』
【翻譯】這門課由十個短單元組成。

{{tts en_US:compromise}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】妥協；折衷
【搭配詞】reach a compromise / compromise with / compromise quality
【例句】We finally reached a compromise.
{{tts en_US:We finally reached a compromise.}}
【用法說明】compromise 可作名詞或動詞，表示互相讓步
【翻譯】我們最後終於達成折衷方案。

{{tts en_US:compulsory}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】強制的；必修的
【搭配詞】compulsory education / compulsory class / compulsory military service
【例句】English is a compulsory subject here.
{{tts en_US:English is a compulsory subject here.}}
【用法說明】compulsory 表示必須做、不能選擇
【翻譯】英文在這裡是必修科目。

{{tts en_US:compute}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】計算
【搭配詞】compute the result / compute data / compute quickly
【例句】The software can compute the total automatically.
{{tts en_US:The software can compute the total automatically.}}
【用法說明】compute 是較正式的 calculate
【翻譯】這個軟體可以自動計算總額。

{{tts en_US:computer}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】電腦
【搭配詞】desktop computer / computer screen / use a computer
【例句】My computer is running very slowly today.
{{tts en_US:My computer is running very slowly today.}}
【用法說明】computer 指桌機、筆電等電腦設備
【翻譯】我的電腦今天跑得很慢。

{{tts en_US:computerize}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】電腦化
【搭配詞】computerize the system / computerize records / fully computerized
【例句】The hospital plans to computerize its records.
{{tts en_US:The hospital plans to computerize its records.}}
【用法說明】computerize 表示把紙本或人工流程改成電腦系統
【翻譯】那家醫院打算把紀錄全面電腦化。

{{tts en_US:comrade}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】同志；同伴
【搭配詞】old comrade / political comrade / fellow comrade
【例句】He greeted his old comrades warmly.
{{tts en_US:He greeted his old comrades warmly.}}
【用法說明】comrade 常見於政治、軍事或歷史語境
【翻譯】他熱情地向老同志們打招呼。

{{tts en_US:conceal}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】隱藏；隱瞞
【搭配詞】conceal the truth / conceal a weapon / conceal from
【例句】He tried to conceal his disappointment.
{{tts en_US:He tried to conceal his disappointment.}}
【用法說明】conceal 表示把某事藏起來不讓人看見
【翻譯】他試著掩飾自己的失望。

{{tts en_US:concede}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】承認；讓步
【搭配詞】concede defeat / concede that / reluctantly concede
【例句】She finally conceded that I was right.
{{tts en_US:She finally conceded that I was right.}}
【用法說明】concede 表示勉強承認或讓步
【翻譯】她最後終於承認我是對的。

{{tts en_US:conceive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】構想；懷孕；想像
【搭配詞】conceive an idea / conceive of / conceive a child
【例句】It was hard to conceive such a plan at first.
{{tts en_US:It was hard to conceive such a plan at first.}}
【用法說明】conceive 常指在腦中形成想法
【翻譯】一開始很難想像出這樣的計畫。

{{tts en_US:concentrate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】專心；集中
【搭配詞】concentrate on / concentrate hard / concentrate the effort
【例句】Please concentrate on your work.
{{tts en_US:Please concentrate on your work.}}
【用法說明】concentrate on + 事物 很常見
【翻譯】請專心做你的工作。

{{tts en_US:concentration}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】專心；集中；濃度
【搭配詞】lack of concentration / concentration camp / concentration level
【例句】I can't study without concentration.
{{tts en_US:I can't study without concentration.}}
【用法說明】concentration 指專注程度，也可指濃度
【翻譯】沒有專注力我就讀不下去。

{{tts en_US:concept}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】概念；觀念
【搭配詞】basic concept / new concept / concept of time
【例句】The concept is simple once you see an example.
{{tts en_US:The concept is simple once you see an example.}}
【用法說明】concept 指抽象的觀念或想法
【翻譯】一看到例子，這個概念就很簡單了。

{{tts en_US:conception}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】概念；構想；受孕
【搭配詞】public conception / original conception / conception of the idea
【例句】Their conception of success is very different.
{{tts en_US:Their conception of success is very different.}}
【用法說明】conception 多指對某事的理解或觀念
【翻譯】他們對成功的看法很不一樣。

{{tts en_US:concern}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】擔心；關心；問題
【搭配詞】concern about / major concern / concern someone
【例句】I'm concerned about his health.
{{tts en_US:I'm concerned about his health.}}
【用法說明】concern 可作名詞或動詞，形容詞是 concerned
【翻譯】我很擔心他的健康。

{{tts en_US:concerning}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】關於；令人擔憂的
【搭配詞】concerning the matter / concerning behavior / concerning news
【例句】I have a question concerning the schedule.
{{tts en_US:I have a question concerning the schedule.}}
【用法說明】concerning 可表示『關於』，也可作形容詞表示令人擔憂
【翻譯】我有個關於時程的問題。

{{tts en_US:concert}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】音樂會；演唱會
【搭配詞】go to a concert / live concert / concert ticket
【例句】We bought tickets for the concert next month.
{{tts en_US:We bought tickets for the concert next month.}}
【用法說明】concert 指現場音樂演出
【翻譯】我們買了下個月音樂會的票。

{{tts en_US:concession}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】讓步；優惠
【搭配詞】make a concession / tax concession / concession stand
【例句】They made a concession during the negotiation.
{{tts en_US:They made a concession during the negotiation.}}
【用法說明】concession 可指談判讓步，也可指優惠條件
【翻譯】他們在談判中做出了讓步。

{{tts en_US:concise}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】簡潔的
【搭配詞】clear and concise / concise answer / concise summary
【例句】Please keep your answer short and concise.
{{tts en_US:Please keep your answer short and concise.}}
【用法說明】concise 形容表達簡短但重點清楚
【翻譯】請把你的回答講得簡短扼要。

{{tts en_US:conclude}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】作結；下結論
【搭配詞】conclude that / conclude the meeting / conclude with
【例句】We concluded the meeting at five.
{{tts en_US:We concluded the meeting at five.}}
【用法說明】conclude 可指結束某事，也可指下結論
【翻譯】我們五點結束了會議。

{{tts en_US:conclusion}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】結論；結尾
【搭配詞】reach a conclusion / in conclusion / final conclusion
【例句】The report reaches the same conclusion.
{{tts en_US:The report reaches the same conclusion.}}
【用法說明】conclusion 指推論結果或文章結尾
【翻譯】這份報告得出了相同的結論。

{{tts en_US:concrete}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】具體的；混凝土
【搭配詞】concrete example / concrete plan / concrete wall
【例句】Can you give me a concrete example?
{{tts en_US:Can you give me a concrete example?}}
【用法說明】concrete 可指實體的混凝土，也可指具體明確
【翻譯】你可以給我一個具體的例子嗎？

{{tts en_US:condemn}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】譴責；判罪
【搭配詞】strongly condemn / condemn violence / condemn to
【例句】Leaders condemned the attack immediately.
{{tts en_US:Leaders condemned the attack immediately.}}
【用法說明】condemn 常用於正式譴責
【翻譯】領袖們立刻譴責了這起攻擊。

{{tts en_US:condense}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】濃縮；縮短
【搭配詞】condense the report / condense into / steam condenses
【例句】Can you condense this paragraph into one sentence?
{{tts en_US:Can you condense this paragraph into one sentence?}}
【用法說明】condense 表示把內容壓縮得更短
【翻譯】你可以把這段濃縮成一句話嗎？

{{tts en_US:condition}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】狀況；條件
【搭配詞】medical condition / good condition / on one condition
【例句】The car is still in good condition.
{{tts en_US:The car is still in good condition.}}
【用法說明】condition 可指物品狀況、健康情況或條件
【翻譯】那台車狀況還很好。

{{tts en_US:conduct}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】進行；行為
【搭配詞】conduct research / bad conduct / conduct an interview
【例句】The team will conduct a survey next week.
{{tts en_US:The team will conduct a survey next week.}}
【用法說明】conduct 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】這個團隊下週會進行一項調查。

{{tts en_US:conductor}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】指揮；列車長；導體
【搭配詞】orchestra conductor / train conductor / electrical conductor
【例句】The conductor raised his baton and the music began.
{{tts en_US:The conductor raised his baton and the music began.}}
【用法說明】conductor 最常指樂團指揮
【翻譯】指揮一舉起指揮棒，音樂就開始了。

{{tts en_US:cone}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】圓錐；甜筒
【搭配詞】ice cream cone / pine cone / traffic cone
【例句】She bought an ice cream cone after lunch.
{{tts en_US:She bought an ice cream cone after lunch.}}
【用法說明】cone 可指圓錐形物體，也常指甜筒
【翻譯】她午餐後買了一支甜筒。

{{tts en_US:confederation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】聯盟；邦聯
【搭配詞】trade confederation / confederation of states / sports confederation
【例句】The teams belong to the same football confederation.
{{tts en_US:The teams belong to the same football confederation.}}
【用法說明】confederation 指由多個組織或地區組成的聯盟
【翻譯】那些隊伍屬於同一個足球聯盟。

{{tts en_US:conference}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】會議；研討會
【搭配詞】annual conference / video conference / attend a conference
【例句】She's speaking at a conference this weekend.
{{tts en_US:She's speaking at a conference this weekend.}}
【用法說明】conference 指正式會議或研討會
【翻譯】她這個週末要在研討會上發表。

{{tts en_US:confess}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】承認；坦白
【搭配詞】confess to / confess that / finally confess
【例句】He confessed that he had lied.
{{tts en_US:He confessed that he had lied.}}
【用法說明】confess 表示坦白承認
【翻譯】他坦承自己說了謊。

{{tts en_US:confession}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】承認；供詞
【搭配詞】make a confession / written confession / public confession
【例句】His confession surprised everyone.
{{tts en_US:His confession surprised everyone.}}
【用法說明】confession 指公開或私下的坦白
【翻譯】他的坦白讓大家都很驚訝。

{{tts en_US:confidence}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】自信；信心
【搭配詞】build confidence / have confidence in / boost confidence
【例句】She has a lot of confidence in her team.
{{tts en_US:She has a lot of confidence in her team.}}
【用法說明】confidence 可指對自己或他人的信心
【翻譯】她對自己的團隊很有信心。

{{tts en_US:confident}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】有自信的；確信的
【搭配詞】feel confident / confident about / confident that
【例句】I'm confident you'll do well.
{{tts en_US:I'm confident you'll do well.}}
【用法說明】confident 常用於 confident about/that
【翻譯】我相信你會表現得很好。

{{tts en_US:confidential}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】機密的；保密的
【搭配詞】confidential information / keep confidential / confidential file
【例句】This document is confidential.
{{tts en_US:This document is confidential.}}
【用法說明】confidential 指不能公開的資訊
【翻譯】這份文件是機密的。

{{tts en_US:confine}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】限制；關在…裡
【搭配詞】confine yourself to / be confined to / confine the animal
【例句】Please confine your comments to the main topic.
{{tts en_US:Please confine your comments to the main topic.}}
【用法說明】confine 表示限制範圍
【翻譯】請把你的發言限制在主題內。

{{tts en_US:confirm}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】確認；證實
【搭配詞】confirm a booking / confirm that / confirm the news
【例句】Can you confirm our reservation?
{{tts en_US:Can you confirm our reservation?}}
【用法說明】confirm 表示再次確認或證實
【翻譯】你可以幫我確認一下我們的訂位嗎？

{{tts en_US:conflict}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】衝突；矛盾
【搭配詞】armed conflict / conflict with / avoid conflict
【例句】Their schedules conflict with each other.
{{tts en_US:Their schedules conflict with each other.}}
【用法說明】conflict 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他們的行程彼此衝突。

{{tts en_US:conform}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】遵從；符合
【搭配詞】conform to / conform with / refuse to conform
【例句】The product must conform to safety standards.
{{tts en_US:The product must conform to safety standards.}}
【用法說明】conform to = 符合／遵守
【翻譯】這項產品必須符合安全標準。

{{tts en_US:confront}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】面對；對抗
【搭配詞】confront a problem / confront someone / be confronted with
【例句】We need to confront the issue directly.
{{tts en_US:We need to confront the issue directly.}}
【用法說明】confront 指正面面對問題或人
【翻譯】我們需要正面處理這個問題。

{{tts en_US:confrontation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】對抗；衝突
【搭配詞】direct confrontation / violent confrontation / avoid confrontation
【例句】She wanted to avoid a confrontation at work.
{{tts en_US:She wanted to avoid a confrontation at work.}}
【用法說明】confrontation 指正面衝突
【翻譯】她想避免在工作上發生正面衝突。

{{tts en_US:confuse}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】使困惑；混淆
【搭配詞】confuse A with B / confuse people / be confused by
【例句】The instructions confused me.
{{tts en_US:The instructions confused me.}}
【用法說明】confuse 指讓人搞不清楚
【翻譯】這些說明把我搞糊塗了。

{{tts en_US:confusion}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】困惑；混亂
【搭配詞】cause confusion / in confusion / source of confusion
【例句】The sudden change caused confusion.
{{tts en_US:The sudden change caused confusion.}}
【用法說明】confusion 指搞不清楚的狀態
【翻譯】這個突然的改變造成了混亂。

{{tts en_US:congratulate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】恭喜；祝賀
【搭配詞】congratulate someone on / warmly congratulate / congratulate yourself
【例句】I called to congratulate her on the good news.
{{tts en_US:I called to congratulate her on the good news.}}
【用法說明】congratulate + 人 + on + 事
【翻譯】我打電話恭喜她這個好消息。

{{tts en_US:congratulation}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】祝賀；賀詞（較少單用）
【搭配詞】message of congratulation / letter of congratulation / offer congratulations
【例句】He sent a note of congratulation.
{{tts en_US:He sent a note of congratulation.}}
【用法說明】congratulation 單數較少見，多見於正式語境
【翻譯】他寄了一張祝賀便條。

{{tts en_US:congratulations}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】恭喜
【搭配詞】say congratulations / big congratulations / congratulations on
【例句】Congratulations on your new job!
{{tts en_US:Congratulations on your new job!}}
【用法說明】congratulations 是最自然常見的祝賀說法
【翻譯】恭喜你找到新工作！

{{tts en_US:congress}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】國會；代表大會
【搭配詞】national congress / congress session / congress member
【例句】The bill will be discussed in Congress.
{{tts en_US:The bill will be discussed in Congress.}}
