【翻譯】這項法案會在國會中討論。

{{tts en_US:congresswoman}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】女國會議員
【搭配詞】local congresswoman / elected congresswoman / congresswoman from
【例句】The congresswoman spoke to reporters outside.
{{tts en_US:The congresswoman spoke to reporters outside.}}
【用法說明】congresswoman 指女性國會議員
【翻譯】那位女國會議員在外面對記者發言。

{{tts en_US:connect}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】連接；聯絡；建立關聯
【搭配詞】connect to Wi-Fi / connect with / connect A to B
【例句】I can't connect to the Wi-Fi.
{{tts en_US:I can't connect to the Wi-Fi.}}
【用法說明】connect 可指實體連接或建立聯繫
【翻譯】我連不上 Wi-Fi。

{{tts en_US:connection}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】連接；關係；人脈
【搭配詞】internet connection / strong connection / family connection
【例句】The video stopped because of a weak connection.
{{tts en_US:The video stopped because of a weak connection.}}
【用法說明】connection 可指網路連線，也可指關係
【翻譯】影片因為連線太差而停住了。

{{tts en_US:conquer}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】征服；克服
【搭配詞】conquer fear / conquer the mountain / conquer the market
【例句】She worked hard to conquer her fear of speaking.
{{tts en_US:She worked hard to conquer her fear of speaking.}}
【用法說明】conquer 可指征服土地，也可比喻克服問題
【翻譯】她努力克服對公開說話的恐懼。

{{tts en_US:conquest}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】征服；戰勝
【搭配詞】military conquest / conquest of fear / great conquest
【例句】The climb felt like a personal conquest.
{{tts en_US:The climb felt like a personal conquest.}}
【用法說明】conquest 指征服或重大戰勝
【翻譯】那次攀登像是一場個人的勝利。

{{tts en_US:conscience}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】良心；道德感
【搭配詞】clear conscience / guilty conscience / conscience tells me
【例句】I can't do that with a clear conscience.
{{tts en_US:I can't do that with a clear conscience.}}
【用法說明】conscience 指內在的是非判斷
【翻譯】我沒辦法問心無愧地做那件事。

{{tts en_US:conscientious}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】認真的；盡責的
【搭配詞】conscientious worker / be conscientious / conscientious student
【例句】She's a very conscientious student.
{{tts en_US:She's a very conscientious student.}}
【用法說明】conscientious 形容人做事認真負責
【翻譯】她是一個非常認真的學生。

{{tts en_US:conscious}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】有意識的；意識到的
【搭配詞】be conscious of / remain conscious / socially conscious
【例句】He was conscious but weak after the accident.
{{tts en_US:He was conscious but weak after the accident.}}
【用法說明】conscious 可指身體有意識，也可指察覺到
【翻譯】事故後他還清醒，但很虛弱。

{{tts en_US:consecutive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】連續的
【搭配詞】three consecutive days / consecutive wins / consecutive numbers
【例句】It rained for five consecutive days.
{{tts en_US:It rained for five consecutive days.}}
【用法說明】consecutive 指不中斷地接連發生
【翻譯】雨連下了五天。

{{tts en_US:consensus}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】共識
【搭配詞】reach a consensus / general consensus / broad consensus
【例句】The team reached a consensus after a long discussion.
{{tts en_US:The team reached a consensus after a long discussion.}}
【用法說明】consensus 指大家共同同意的結果
【翻譯】團隊在長時間討論後達成了共識。

{{tts en_US:consent}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】同意；准許
【搭配詞】give consent / with consent / parental consent
【例句】You need parental consent to join the trip.
{{tts en_US:You need parental consent to join the trip.}}
【用法說明】consent 指正式或明確的同意
【翻譯】參加這趟旅行需要家長同意。

{{tts en_US:consequence}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】結果；後果
【搭配詞】face the consequences / serious consequence / as a consequence
【例句】He didn't think about the consequences.
{{tts en_US:He didn't think about the consequences.}}
【用法說明】consequence 常指某行為帶來的結果
【翻譯】他沒有想到後果。

{{tts en_US:consequent}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】隨之發生的；作為結果的
【搭配詞】consequent changes / consequent effect / consequent upon
【例句】The decision and its consequent effects were discussed.
{{tts en_US:The decision and its consequent effects were discussed.}}
【用法說明】consequent 是較正式用法，表示隨之而來
【翻譯】大家討論了那項決定及其後續影響。

{{tts en_US:conservation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】保育；保護；節約
【搭配詞】wildlife conservation / energy conservation / conservation effort
【例句】The park supports wildlife conservation.
{{tts en_US:The park supports wildlife conservation.}}
【用法說明】conservation 常指自然保育，也可指資源節約
【翻譯】這座公園支持野生動物保育。

{{tts en_US:conservative}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】保守的；守舊的
【搭配詞】conservative view / conservative estimate / conservative dress
【例句】He has a conservative approach to money.
{{tts en_US:He has a conservative approach to money.}}
【用法說明】conservative 可指觀點或作風保守
【翻譯】他在金錢上採取保守作法。

{{tts en_US:conserve}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】保存；節約；保護
【搭配詞】conserve water / conserve energy / conserve resources
【例句】We should conserve water during the dry season.
{{tts en_US:We should conserve water during the dry season.}}
【用法說明】conserve 表示節約使用或保護
【翻譯】旱季時我們應該節約用水。

{{tts en_US:consider}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】考慮；認為
【搭配詞】consider doing / consider someone as / seriously consider
【例句】I'm considering taking a short trip next month.
{{tts en_US:I'm considering taking a short trip next month.}}
【用法說明】consider + V-ing 很常見
【翻譯】我在考慮下個月去短旅行。

{{tts en_US:considerable}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】相當大的；相當多的
【搭配詞】considerable amount / considerable time / considerable effort
【例句】The project requires a considerable amount of time.
{{tts en_US:The project requires a considerable amount of time.}}
【用法說明】considerable 表示數量或程度相當大
【翻譯】這個計畫需要相當多的時間。

{{tts en_US:considerate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】體貼的；替人著想的
【搭配詞】considerate person / be considerate of / thoughtful and considerate
【例句】It was considerate of you to call first.
{{tts en_US:It was considerate of you to call first.}}
【用法說明】considerate 形容人會想到別人
【翻譯】你先打電話來真的很體貼。

{{tts en_US:consideration}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】考慮；體諒；因素
【搭配詞】take into consideration / under consideration / careful consideration
【例句】Price is an important consideration.
{{tts en_US:Price is an important consideration.}}
【用法說明】consideration 可指思考過程，也可指考量因素
【翻譯】價格是一個重要的考量。

{{tts en_US:consist}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】由…組成
【搭配詞】consist of / mainly consist of / consist entirely of
【例句】The team consists of five members.
{{tts en_US:The team consists of five members.}}
【用法說明】consist of = 由…組成
【翻譯】這個團隊由五位成員組成。

{{tts en_US:consistent}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】一致的；穩定的
【搭配詞】consistent result / remain consistent / be consistent with
【例句】Her work is always consistent and careful.
{{tts en_US:Her work is always consistent and careful.}}
【用法說明】consistent 形容表現或內容前後一致
【翻譯】她的工作一向穩定又細心。

{{tts en_US:consolation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】安慰；慰藉
【搭配詞】offer consolation / small consolation / prize of consolation
【例句】His kind words were a great consolation.
{{tts en_US:His kind words were a great consolation.}}
【用法說明】consolation 指在失望或難過時得到的安慰
【翻譯】他的安慰話語給了我很大的慰藉。

{{tts en_US:console}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】安慰；控制台
【搭配詞】console someone / game console / central console
【例句】She tried to console her little brother.
{{tts en_US:She tried to console her little brother.}}
【用法說明】console 可作動詞表示安慰，也可作名詞指控制台
【翻譯】她試著安慰她弟弟。

{{tts en_US:consonant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】子音；輔音
【搭配詞】consonant sound / final consonant / consonant cluster
【例句】The word ends with a consonant.
{{tts en_US:The word ends with a consonant.}}
【用法說明】consonant 指語音中的輔音
【翻譯】這個字以子音結尾。

{{tts en_US:conspiracy}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】陰謀；密謀
【搭配詞】conspiracy theory / political conspiracy / secret conspiracy
【例句】He believes in every conspiracy theory online.
{{tts en_US:He believes in every conspiracy theory online.}}
【用法說明】conspiracy 指暗中策劃的不法或秘密行動
【翻譯】他相信網路上的每一個陰謀論。

{{tts en_US:constant}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】持續的；不斷的；固定的
【搭配詞】constant change / constant pain / remain constant
【例句】The noise was a constant distraction.
{{tts en_US:The noise was a constant distraction.}}
【用法說明】constant 形容不斷存在或持續發生
【翻譯】那個噪音一直讓人分心。

{{tts en_US:constitute}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】構成；組成
【搭配詞】constitute a threat / constitute the majority / legally constitute
【例句】Women constitute more than half the team.
{{tts en_US:Women constitute more than half the team.}}
【用法說明】constitute 是較正式的『構成』
【翻譯】女性占這個團隊一半以上。

{{tts en_US:constitution}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】憲法；體質
【搭配詞】national constitution / strong constitution / constitution of the country
【例句】The law must follow the constitution.
{{tts en_US:The law must follow the constitution.}}
【用法說明】constitution 可指國家憲法，也可指人的體質
【翻譯】法律必須符合憲法。

{{tts en_US:constitutional}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】憲法的；體質上的
【搭配詞】constitutional right / constitutional law / constitutional problem
【例句】Free speech is a constitutional right.
{{tts en_US:Free speech is a constitutional right.}}
【用法說明】constitutional 常用於法律語境
【翻譯】言論自由是一項憲法權利。

{{tts en_US:constraint}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】限制；約束
【搭配詞】time constraint / financial constraint / under constraint
【例句】We had to work under tight time constraints.
{{tts en_US:We had to work under tight time constraints.}}
【用法說明】constraint 指讓人無法自由行動的限制
【翻譯】我們得在時間非常有限的情況下工作。

{{tts en_US:construct}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】建造；構成
【搭配詞】construct a building / construct a model / carefully construct
【例句】They plan to construct a new bridge.
{{tts en_US:They plan to construct a new bridge.}}
【用法說明】construct 是較正式的『建造』
【翻譯】他們打算蓋一座新橋。

{{tts en_US:construction}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】建造；建築工程
【搭配詞】under construction / road construction / construction site
【例句】The road is under construction.
{{tts en_US:The road is under construction.}}
【用法說明】construction 指施工或建設工程
【翻譯】這條路正在施工中。

{{tts en_US:constructive}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】建設性的
【搭配詞】constructive feedback / constructive discussion / constructive idea
【例句】She gave me some constructive feedback.
{{tts en_US:She gave me some constructive feedback.}}
【用法說明】constructive 形容有幫助、能改善事情
【翻譯】她給了我一些很有建設性的回饋。

{{tts en_US:consult}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】請教；查閱；諮詢
【搭配詞】consult a doctor / consult with / consult the guide
【例句】You should consult a doctor if the pain continues.
{{tts en_US:You should consult a doctor if the pain continues.}}
【用法說明】consult 指向專業人士請教或查閱資料
【翻譯】如果疼痛持續，你應該去看醫生。

{{tts en_US:consultant}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】顧問
【搭配詞】business consultant / consultant doctor / hire a consultant
【例句】The company hired a marketing consultant.
{{tts en_US:The company hired a marketing consultant.}}
【用法說明】consultant 指提供專業建議的人
【翻譯】那家公司聘請了一位行銷顧問。

{{tts en_US:consultation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】諮詢；商討
【搭配詞】medical consultation / free consultation / consultation with
【例句】I booked a consultation with the dentist.
{{tts en_US:I booked a consultation with the dentist.}}
【用法說明】consultation 指正式諮詢或討論
【翻譯】我預約了和牙醫的諮詢。

{{tts en_US:consume}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】消耗；吃喝；耗費
【搭配詞】consume energy / consume alcohol / consume a lot of time
【例句】This machine consumes too much electricity.
{{tts en_US:This machine consumes too much electricity.}}
【用法說明】consume 表示使用掉或消耗掉
【翻譯】這台機器太耗電了。

{{tts en_US:consumer}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】消費者
【搭配詞】consumer behavior / consumer rights / online consumer
【例句】Consumers are spending less this year.
{{tts en_US:Consumers are spending less this year.}}
【用法說明】consumer 指購買商品或服務的人
【翻譯】消費者今年花得比較少。

{{tts en_US:consumption}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】消耗；消費
【搭配詞】energy consumption / water consumption / reduce consumption
【例句】We need to reduce electricity consumption.
{{tts en_US:We need to reduce electricity consumption.}}
【用法說明】consumption 指使用、耗費的量
【翻譯】我們需要降低用電量。

{{tts en_US:contact}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】聯絡；接觸；聯絡人
【搭配詞】contact me / eye contact / emergency contact
【例句】Please contact me if you have questions.
{{tts en_US:Please contact me if you have questions.}}
【用法說明】contact 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】如果你有問題，請聯絡我。

{{tts en_US:contagious}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】會傳染的；有感染力的
【搭配詞】contagious disease / highly contagious / contagious laugh
【例句】This illness is very contagious.
{{tts en_US:This illness is very contagious.}}
【用法說明】contagious 可指疾病會傳染，也可比喻情緒感染力
【翻譯】這個疾病傳染性很強。

{{tts en_US:contain}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】包含；容納；控制
【搭配詞】contain sugar / contain the fire / contain information
【例句】This bottle contains fresh juice.
{{tts en_US:This bottle contains fresh juice.}}
【用法說明】contain 指裡面有某物，也可指控制局面
【翻譯】這瓶裡面裝的是新鮮果汁。

{{tts en_US:container}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】容器；貨櫃
【搭配詞】plastic container / food container / shipping container
【例句】Put the leftovers in a container.
{{tts en_US:Put the leftovers in a container.}}
【用法說明】container 指拿來裝東西的容器
【翻譯】把剩菜放進容器裡。

{{tts en_US:contaminate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】污染；弄髒
【搭配詞】contaminate the water / contaminated food / contaminate a sample
【例句】The river was contaminated by waste.
{{tts en_US:The river was contaminated by waste.}}
【用法說明】contaminate 指使某物受到污染
【翻譯】這條河被廢棄物污染了。

{{tts en_US:contemplate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】沉思；考慮
【搭配詞】contemplate the future / contemplate doing / quietly contemplate
【例句】She's contemplating a career change.
{{tts en_US:She's contemplating a career change.}}
【用法說明】contemplate 是較正式的『仔細考慮』
【翻譯】她正在考慮轉換職涯。

{{tts en_US:contemporary}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】當代的；同時代的
【搭配詞】contemporary art / contemporary issue / contemporary writer
【例句】The museum shows contemporary art.
{{tts en_US:The museum shows contemporary art.}}
【用法說明】contemporary 指現代當代的
【翻譯】那間博物館展出當代藝術。

{{tts en_US:contempt}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】輕視；鄙視
【搭配詞】feel contempt / with contempt / show contempt for
【例句】He spoke with obvious contempt.
{{tts en_US:He spoke with obvious contempt.}}
【用法說明】contempt 指帶有輕蔑的負面情緒
【翻譯】他說話時明顯帶著輕視。

{{tts en_US:contend}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】競爭；主張
【搭配詞】contend with / contend that / contend for
【例句】Some students contend that the test was unfair.
{{tts en_US:Some students contend that the test was unfair.}}
【用法說明】contend 可表示主張，也可表示競爭
【翻譯】有些學生主張這次考試不公平。

{{tts en_US:content}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】內容
【搭配詞】table of contents / online content / content creator
【例句】The content of the article was easy to understand.
{{tts en_US:The content of the article was easy to understand.}}
【用法說明】這一筆取名詞義，指內容
【翻譯】這篇文章的內容很容易理解。

{{tts en_US:content}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】內容
【搭配詞】table of contents / online content / content creator
【例句】The content of the article was easy to understand.
{{tts en_US:The content of the article was easy to understand.}}
【用法說明】這一筆取名詞義，指內容
【翻譯】這篇文章的內容很容易理解。

{{tts en_US:contentment}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】滿足；滿意
【搭配詞】sense of contentment / quiet contentment / feel contentment
【例句】She felt a deep sense of contentment.
{{tts en_US:She felt a deep sense of contentment.}}
【用法說明】contentment 指內心平靜滿足
【翻譯】她感到深深的滿足。

{{tts en_US:contention}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】爭論；主張
【搭配詞】main contention / point of contention / source of contention
【例句】Money became a point of contention between them.
{{tts en_US:Money became a point of contention between them.}}
【用法說明】contention 指爭議焦點或主張
【翻譯】金錢成了他們之間的爭執點。

{{tts en_US:contest}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】比賽；競賽；爭奪
【搭配詞】singing contest / win a contest / contest the result
【例句】She entered a cooking contest.
{{tts en_US:She entered a cooking contest.}}
【用法說明】contest 可作名詞或動詞，最常見是比賽
【翻譯】她參加了一場烹飪比賽。

{{tts en_US:contestant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】參賽者
【搭配詞】game show contestant / contestant on the show / finalist contestant
【例句】Each contestant had two minutes to speak.
{{tts en_US:Each contestant had two minutes to speak.}}
【用法說明】contestant 指參加比賽的人
【翻譯】每位參賽者都有兩分鐘發言。

{{tts en_US:context}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】上下文；背景
【搭配詞】in context / social context / historical context
【例句】You need to read the sentence in context.
{{tts en_US:You need to read the sentence in context.}}
【用法說明】context 指理解事情所需的背景
【翻譯】你需要放在上下文裡看這句話。

{{tts en_US:continent}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】洲；大陸
【搭配詞】Asian continent / African continent / continent map
【例句】Australia is the smallest continent.
{{tts en_US:Australia is the smallest continent.}}
【用法說明】continent 指大陸或洲
【翻譯】澳洲是最小的洲。

{{tts en_US:continental}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】大陸的；洲際的
【搭配詞】continental Europe / continental breakfast / continental drift
【例句】The hotel serves a continental breakfast.
{{tts en_US:The hotel serves a continental breakfast.}}
【用法說明】continental breakfast 是固定用法
【翻譯】那家飯店提供歐陸式早餐。

{{tts en_US:continual}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】持續發生的；頻繁的
【搭配詞】continual noise / continual complaints / continual change
【例句】The continual noise made it hard to focus.
{{tts en_US:The continual noise made it hard to focus.}}
【用法說明】continual 強調一再發生
【翻譯】持續不斷的噪音讓人很難專心。

{{tts en_US:continue}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】繼續
【搭配詞】continue to work / continue doing / continue with
【例句】Please continue with your presentation.
{{tts en_US:Please continue with your presentation.}}
【用法說明】continue 可接 to V 或 V-ing
【翻譯】請繼續你的簡報。

{{tts en_US:continuity}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】連續性；延續
【搭配詞】continuity of service / story continuity / maintain continuity
【例句】We need continuity in the project.
{{tts en_US:We need continuity in the project.}}
【用法說明】continuity 指不中斷的持續狀態
【翻譯】這個專案需要延續性。

{{tts en_US:continuous}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】持續的；連續的
【搭配詞】continuous rain / continuous improvement / continuous line
【例句】The city had continuous rain for three days.
{{tts en_US:The city had continuous rain for three days.}}
【用法說明】continuous 強調不中斷地持續
【翻譯】這座城市連下了三天雨。

{{tts en_US:contract}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】合約；縮小；感染
【搭配詞】sign a contract / contract the disease / contract with
【例句】I signed the contract this morning.
{{tts en_US:I signed the contract this morning.}}
【用法說明】contract 常見意思是合約
【翻譯】我今天早上簽了合約。

{{tts en_US:contractor}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】承包商
【搭配詞】building contractor / hire a contractor / local contractor
【例句】They hired a contractor to renovate the kitchen.
{{tts en_US:They hired a contractor to renovate the kitchen.}}
【用法說明】contractor 指承接工程或服務的人
【翻譯】他們找了一位承包商來翻修廚房。

{{tts en_US:contradict}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】反駁；與…矛盾
【搭配詞】contradict yourself / contradict the evidence / contradict someone
【例句】His actions contradict his words.
{{tts en_US:His actions contradict his words.}}
【用法說明】contradict 表示前後不一致或反對
【翻譯】他的行為和他的話互相矛盾。

{{tts en_US:contradiction}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】矛盾；不一致
【搭配詞】direct contradiction / contradiction in terms / point out a contradiction
【例句】There's a contradiction in his story.
{{tts en_US:There's a contradiction in his story.}}
【用法說明】contradiction 指兩件事互相衝突
【翻譯】他的說法裡有矛盾。

{{tts en_US:contrary}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】相反的
【搭配詞】contrary to / on the contrary / contrary view
【例句】Contrary to expectations, the train arrived on time.
{{tts en_US:Contrary to expectations, the train arrived on time.}}
【用法說明】contrary to = 與…相反
【翻譯】和預期相反，火車準時到了。

{{tts en_US:contrast}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】對比；形成對比
【搭配詞】in contrast / sharp contrast / contrast with
【例句】The dark walls contrast with the white floor.
{{tts en_US:The dark walls contrast with the white floor.}}
【用法說明】contrast 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】深色牆面和白色地板形成對比。

{{tts en_US:contribute}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】貢獻；投稿；捐助
【搭配詞】contribute to / contribute money / contribute ideas
【例句】Everyone can contribute to the project.
{{tts en_US:Everyone can contribute to the project.}}
【用法說明】contribute to + 事物 很常見
【翻譯】每個人都可以為這個專案做出貢獻。

{{tts en_US:contribution}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】貢獻；捐款；投稿
【搭配詞】make a contribution / valuable contribution / contribution to
【例句】Her contribution made a big difference.
{{tts en_US:Her contribution made a big difference.}}
【用法說明】contribution 指對事情有幫助的投入
【翻譯】她的貢獻帶來了很大的影響。

{{tts en_US:control}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】控制；掌控；管制
【搭配詞】control your temper / under control / remote control
【例句】Try to control your spending this month.
{{tts en_US:Try to control your spending this month.}}
【用法說明】control 可作動詞或名詞，表示掌控或管理
【翻譯】你這個月要盡量控制開銷。

{{tts en_US:controller}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】控制器；管理人員
【搭配詞】game controller / air traffic controller / financial controller
【例句】My little brother broke the game controller.
{{tts en_US:My little brother broke the game controller.}}
【用法說明】controller 可指裝置控制器，也可指管理職務
【翻譯】我弟把遊戲控制器弄壞了。

{{tts en_US:controversial}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】有爭議的
【搭配詞】controversial issue / controversial decision / highly controversial
【例句】The new rule has been very controversial.
{{tts en_US:The new rule has been very controversial.}}
【用法說明】controversial 形容容易引發爭議
【翻譯】這項新規定一直很有爭議。

{{tts en_US:controversy}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】爭議；爭論
【搭配詞】cause controversy / political controversy / public controversy
【例句】The ad created a lot of controversy online.
{{tts en_US:The ad created a lot of controversy online.}}
【用法說明】controversy 指公開爭議或論戰
【翻譯】那支廣告在網路上引發很多爭議。

{{tts en_US:convene}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】召開；集合
【搭配詞】convene a meeting / convene the committee / convene in June
【例句】The board will convene next Monday.
{{tts en_US:The board will convene next Monday.}}
【用法說明】convene 是較正式的『召開會議』
【翻譯】董事會將於下週一召開。

{{tts en_US:convenience}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】方便；便利
【搭配詞】for convenience / convenience store / at your convenience
【例句】For convenience, we met online.
{{tts en_US:For convenience, we met online.}}
【用法說明】convenience 指省時省力的方便性
【翻譯】為了方便，我們在線上碰面。

{{tts en_US:convenient}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】方便的；便利的
【搭配詞】convenient time / convenient location / if convenient
【例句】Is this time convenient for you?
{{tts en_US:Is this time convenient for you?}}
【用法說明】convenient 常用來問時間或地點是否方便
【翻譯】這個時間你方便嗎？

{{tts en_US:convention}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】慣例；大會
【搭配詞】social convention / business convention / by convention
【例句】They attended a gaming convention in Taipei.
{{tts en_US:They attended a gaming convention in Taipei.}}
【用法說明】convention 可指習俗，也可指大型會議
【翻譯】他們參加了在台北舉辦的遊戲展會。

{{tts en_US:conventional}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】傳統的；一般的
【搭配詞】conventional method / conventional wisdom / conventional design
【例句】This is a more conventional approach.
{{tts en_US:This is a more conventional approach.}}
【用法說明】conventional 表示較傳統、常見的做法
【翻譯】這是一種比較傳統的做法。

{{tts en_US:conversation}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】對話；談話
【搭配詞】have a conversation / phone conversation / casual conversation
【例句】We had a long conversation after dinner.
{{tts en_US:We had a long conversation after dinner.}}
【用法說明】conversation 指兩人以上的交談
【翻譯】我們晚餐後聊了很久。

{{tts en_US:converse}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】交談；相反的
【搭配詞】converse with / converse freely / the converse is true
【例句】They sat outside and conversed quietly.
{{tts en_US:They sat outside and conversed quietly.}}
【用法說明】converse 作動詞時較正式，表示交談
【翻譯】他們坐在外面安靜交談。

{{tts en_US:conversion}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】轉換；轉變
【搭配詞】currency conversion / data conversion / conversion rate
【例句】The app handles file conversion quickly.
{{tts en_US:The app handles file conversion quickly.}}
【用法說明】conversion 指從一種形式轉成另一種
【翻譯】這個 app 處理檔案轉換很快。

{{tts en_US:convert}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】轉變；改變；換算
【搭配詞】convert into / convert a file / convert to dollars
【例句】Can you convert this file to PDF?
{{tts en_US:Can you convert this file to PDF?}}
【用法說明】convert 指把東西轉成另一種形式
【翻譯】你可以把這個檔案轉成 PDF 嗎？

{{tts en_US:convey}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】傳達；運送
【搭配詞】convey a message / convey feelings / convey by truck
【例句】Her face conveyed her disappointment.
{{tts en_US:Her face conveyed her disappointment.}}
【用法說明】convey 常用來表示傳達情感或訊息
【翻譯】她的表情透露出她的失望。

{{tts en_US:convict}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】定罪；罪犯
【搭配詞】convict someone of / convicted criminal / former convict
【例句】The court convicted him of theft.
{{tts en_US:The court convicted him of theft.}}
【用法說明】convict 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】法院判他犯了竊盜罪。

{{tts en_US:conviction}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】信念；定罪
【搭配詞】strong conviction / criminal conviction / moral conviction
【例句】She spoke with great conviction.
{{tts en_US:She spoke with great conviction.}}
【用法說明】conviction 可指堅定信念，也可指有罪判決
【翻譯】她說話時帶著很強的信念。

{{tts en_US:convince}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】說服；使相信
【搭配詞】convince someone to / convince me that / fully convince
【例句】He convinced me to try the new restaurant.
{{tts en_US:He convinced me to try the new restaurant.}}
【用法說明】convince + 人 + to V 很常見
【翻譯】他說服我去試那家新餐廳。

{{tts en_US:cook}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】煮；廚師
【搭配詞】cook dinner / cook rice / a good cook
【例句】I'm going to cook dinner tonight.
{{tts en_US:I'm going to cook dinner tonight.}}
【用法說明】cook 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】我今晚要煮晚餐。

{{tts en_US:cooker}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】炊具；爐具
【搭配詞】rice cooker / pressure cooker / gas cooker
【例句】The rice cooker is on the counter.
{{tts en_US:The rice cooker is on the counter.}}
【用法說明】cooker 指煮東西的器具
【翻譯】電鍋放在流理台上。

{{tts en_US:cookie}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】餅乾
【搭配詞】chocolate chip cookie / bake cookies / cookie jar
【例句】She baked cookies for the class.
{{tts en_US:She baked cookies for the class.}}
【用法說明】cookie 指小甜餅乾
【翻譯】她為全班烤了餅乾。

{{tts en_US:cool}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】涼的；很棒的；冷卻
【搭配詞】cool down / cool weather / that's cool
【例句】It's nice and cool in the shade.
{{tts en_US:It's nice and cool in the shade.}}
【用法說明】cool 可指溫度低，也很常見於口語稱讚
【翻譯】在陰影下很涼爽。

{{tts en_US:cooperate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】合作
【搭配詞】cooperate with / refuse to cooperate / cooperate closely
【例句】The two teams agreed to cooperate.
{{tts en_US:The two teams agreed to cooperate.}}
【用法說明】cooperate with + 人／組織
【翻譯】這兩個團隊同意合作。

{{tts en_US:cooperation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】合作
【搭配詞】international cooperation / close cooperation / in cooperation with
【例句】The project depends on good cooperation.
{{tts en_US:The project depends on good cooperation.}}
【用法說明】cooperation 指共同合作的狀態
【翻譯】這個計畫仰賴良好的合作。

{{tts en_US:cooperative}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】合作的；合作社的
【搭配詞】cooperative attitude / cooperative team / cooperative bank
【例句】The kids were calm and cooperative.
{{tts en_US:The kids were calm and cooperative.}}
【用法說明】cooperative 形容願意配合
【翻譯】孩子們很冷靜也很配合。

{{tts en_US:coordinate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】協調；座標
【搭配詞】coordinate with / coordinate the event / map coordinates
【例句】Can you coordinate with the design team?
{{tts en_US:Can you coordinate with the design team?}}
【用法說明】coordinate 常用於人與事之間的協調
【翻譯】你可以和設計團隊協調一下嗎？

{{tts en_US:cope}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】應付；處理
【搭配詞】cope with / struggle to cope / cope well
【例句】It's hard to cope with so much stress.
{{tts en_US:It's hard to cope with so much stress.}}
【用法說明】cope with = 應付、處理
【翻譯】要應付這麼大的壓力很不容易。

{{tts en_US:copper}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】銅
【搭配詞】copper wire / copper pipe / copper pan
【例句】The old pipes were made of copper.
{{tts en_US:The old pipes were made of copper.}}
【用法說明】copper 指金屬銅
【翻譯】那些舊水管是銅做的。

{{tts en_US:copy}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】複製；副本
【搭配詞】make a copy / copy the file / hard copy
【例句】Can you copy this file to my USB?
{{tts en_US:Can you copy this file to my USB?}}
【用法說明】copy 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】你可以把這個檔案複製到我的 USB 嗎？

{{tts en_US:copyright}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】版權；著作權
【搭配詞】copyright law / under copyright / copyright notice
【例句】The image is protected by copyright.
{{tts en_US:The image is protected by copyright.}}
【用法說明】copyright 指作品的法律保護權利
【翻譯】這張圖片受版權保護。

{{tts en_US:coral}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】珊瑚
【搭配詞】coral reef / pink coral / coral island
【例句】The divers explored a colorful coral reef.
{{tts en_US:The divers explored a colorful coral reef.}}
【用法說明】coral 指海中珊瑚
【翻譯】潛水客探索了一片色彩繽紛的珊瑚礁。

{{tts en_US:cord}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】繩；電線
【搭配詞】power cord / cord around / extension cord
【例句】The lamp's power cord is too short.
{{tts en_US:The lamp's power cord is too short.}}
【用法說明】cord 指較粗的線或繩
【翻譯】那盞燈的電源線太短了。

{{tts en_US:core}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】核心；最重要部分
【搭配詞】core value / at the core / core skill
【例句】Trust is at the core of the relationship.
{{tts en_US:Trust is at the core of the relationship.}}
【用法說明】core 指中心或最重要的部分
【翻譯】信任是這段關係的核心。

{{tts en_US:corn}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】玉米
【搭配詞】sweet corn / corn field / corn soup
【例句】We bought corn at the market.
{{tts en_US:We bought corn at the market.}}
【用法說明】corn 指玉米
【翻譯】我們在市場買了玉米。

{{tts en_US:corner}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】角落；轉角
【搭配詞】street corner / in the corner / around the corner
【例句】There's a café on the corner.
{{tts en_US:There's a café on the corner.}}
【用法說明】corner 指空間角落或街道轉角
【翻譯】轉角有一家咖啡店。

{{tts en_US:corporate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】公司的；企業的
【搭配詞】corporate office / corporate culture / corporate world
【例句】She works in corporate finance.
{{tts en_US:She works in corporate finance.}}
【用法說明】corporate 常描述企業相關事務
【翻譯】她在企業財務部門工作。

{{tts en_US:coverage}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】報導；涵蓋範圍；保險給付
【搭配詞】news coverage / insurance coverage / full coverage
【例句】The event got a lot of media coverage.
{{tts en_US:The event got a lot of media coverage.}}
【用法說明】coverage 有很多意思，常見是媒體報導或保險保障
【翻譯】這個活動獲得很多媒體報導。

{{tts en_US:cow}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】母牛；牛
【搭配詞】milk cow / herd of cows / feed the cows
【例句】The cows were grazing in the field.
{{tts en_US:The cows were grazing in the field.}}
【用法說明】cow 指母牛，也可泛指牛
【翻譯】牛群正在田裡吃草。

{{tts en_US:coward}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】懦夫；膽小的人
【搭配詞】call someone a coward / complete coward / act like a coward
【例句】He called himself a coward for not speaking up.
{{tts en_US:He called himself a coward for not speaking up.}}
【用法說明】coward 指膽怯、不敢面對事情的人
【翻譯】他因為沒說出口而罵自己是懦夫。

{{tts en_US:cowardly}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】膽小的；懦弱的
【搭配詞】cowardly act / look cowardly / cowardly behavior
【例句】Running away was a cowardly act.
{{tts en_US:Running away was a cowardly act.}}
【用法說明】cowardly 形容行為缺乏勇氣
【翻譯】逃跑是一種懦弱的行為。

{{tts en_US:cowboy}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】牛仔；牛仔式的人物
【搭配詞】cowboy hat / cowboy boots / old cowboy movie
【例句】He wore a cowboy hat to the party.
{{tts en_US:He wore a cowboy hat to the party.}}
【用法說明】cowboy 指趕牛的牛仔，也常見於服裝文化
【翻譯】他戴著牛仔帽去參加派對。

{{tts en_US:cozy}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】舒適的；溫馨的
【搭配詞】cozy room / cozy blanket / feel cozy
【例句】The café felt small and cozy.
{{tts en_US:The café felt small and cozy.}}
【用法說明】cozy 形容空間令人覺得舒服溫暖
【翻譯】那家咖啡館小小的，很溫馨。

{{tts en_US:crab}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】螃蟹
【搭配詞】steamed crab / crab shell / catch crabs
【例句】We had steamed crab for dinner.
{{tts en_US:We had steamed crab for dinner.}}
【用法說明】crab 指螃蟹
【翻譯】我們晚餐吃了蒸螃蟹。

{{tts en_US:crack}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】裂縫；破裂；破解
【搭配詞】crack in the wall / crack open / crack a joke
【例句】There's a crack in the window.
{{tts en_US:There's a crack in the window.}}
【用法說明】crack 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】窗戶上有一道裂痕。

{{tts en_US:crackdown}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】打擊；嚴格取締
【搭配詞】government crackdown / crackdown on crime / police crackdown
【例句】The city announced a crackdown on illegal parking.
{{tts en_US:The city announced a crackdown on illegal parking.}}
【用法說明】crackdown 常指政府或警方加強取締
【翻譯】這座城市宣布嚴格取締違規停車。

{{tts en_US:cracker}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】薄脆餅乾；爆竹
【搭配詞】cheese cracker / packet of crackers / firecracker
【例句】She ate a few crackers with soup.
{{tts en_US:She ate a few crackers with soup.}}
【用法說明】cracker 常指鹹味薄餅乾
【翻譯】她配湯吃了幾片薄脆餅乾。

{{tts en_US:cradle}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】搖籃；發源地
【搭配詞】baby cradle / cradle of civilization / in the cradle
【例句】The baby was sleeping in the cradle.
{{tts en_US:The baby was sleeping in the cradle.}}
【用法說明】cradle 指嬰兒搖籃，也可比喻發源地
【翻譯】寶寶正在搖籃裡睡覺。

{{tts en_US:craft}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】手工藝；技巧；製作
【搭配詞】craft project / craft beer / craft a message
【例句】The kids made paper crafts in class.
{{tts en_US:The kids made paper crafts in class.}}
【用法說明】craft 可指手作作品，也可作動詞表示精心製作
【翻譯】孩子們在課堂上做了紙藝作品。

{{tts en_US:cram}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】死記硬背；塞滿
【搭配詞】cram for a test / cram into / cram a bag
【例句】He's cramming for tomorrow's exam.
{{tts en_US:He's cramming for tomorrow's exam.}}
【用法說明】cram 常指臨時抱佛腳
【翻譯】他正在為明天的考試臨時抱佛腳。

{{tts en_US:cramp}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】抽筋；痙攣
【搭配詞】leg cramp / stomach cramps / get a cramp
【例句】I got a cramp in my leg while swimming.
{{tts en_US:I got a cramp in my leg while swimming.}}
【用法說明】cramp 指肌肉突然抽痛
【翻譯】我游泳時腿抽筋了。

{{tts en_US:crane}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】起重機；鶴
【搭配詞】construction crane / white crane / crane your neck
【例句】A tall crane stood at the construction site.
{{tts en_US:A tall crane stood at the construction site.}}
【用法說明】crane 可指機器，也可指鳥類
【翻譯】工地上立著一台高高的起重機。

{{tts en_US:crash}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】撞擊；當機；墜毀
【搭配詞】car crash / system crash / crash into
【例句】My computer crashed in the middle of the meeting.
{{tts en_US:My computer crashed in the middle of the meeting.}}
【用法說明】crash 可指碰撞，也可指電腦當機
【翻譯】我的電腦在會議進行到一半時當機了。

{{tts en_US:crater}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】坑；彈坑；火山口
【搭配詞】moon crater / huge crater / volcanic crater
【例句】The meteor left a large crater.
{{tts en_US:The meteor left a large crater.}}
【用法說明】crater 指地面上的凹坑，常見於火山或撞擊
【翻譯】那顆隕石留下了一個大坑。

{{tts en_US:crawl}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】爬行；緩慢移動
【搭配詞】crawl on the floor / traffic crawls / baby crawl
【例句】The baby is learning to crawl.
{{tts en_US:The baby is learning to crawl.}}
【用法說明】crawl 可指嬰兒爬，也可比喻移動很慢
【翻譯】那個寶寶正在學爬。

{{tts en_US:crayon}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】蠟筆
【搭配詞】box of crayons / red crayon / draw with crayons
【例句】The kids colored the picture with crayons.
{{tts en_US:The kids colored the picture with crayons.}}
【用法說明】crayon 指蠟筆
【翻譯】孩子們用蠟筆幫圖畫上色。

{{tts en_US:crazy}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】瘋狂的；很喜歡的；荒唐的
【搭配詞】crazy idea / go crazy / crazy about
【例句】That movie was crazy but fun.
{{tts en_US:That movie was crazy but fun.}}
【用法說明】crazy 在口語裡很常表示誇張、瘋狂
【翻譯】那部電影很瘋，但很好看。

{{tts en_US:cream}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】奶油；乳霜；奶油色
【搭配詞】face cream / whipped cream / coffee with cream
【例句】She put some cream in her coffee.
{{tts en_US:She put some cream in her coffee.}}
【用法說明】cream 有很多意思，常見是乳脂或保養乳霜
【翻譯】她在咖啡裡加了些奶油。

{{tts en_US:create}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】創造；建立
【搭配詞】create a plan / create art / create a problem
【例句】They want to create a better system.
{{tts en_US:They want to create a better system.}}
【用法說明】create 表示產生出新的東西
【翻譯】他們想建立一個更好的系統。

{{tts en_US:creation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】創造；作品；創作物
【搭配詞】process of creation / new creation / artistic creation
【例句】The game is his latest creation.
{{tts en_US:The game is his latest creation.}}
【用法說明】creation 指被創造出來的東西
【翻譯】這個遊戲是他最新的作品。

{{tts en_US:creative}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】有創意的；創造性的
【搭配詞】creative idea / creative work / be creative
【例句】She's very creative with colors.
{{tts en_US:She's very creative with colors.}}
【用法說明】creative 形容人或作品富有創意
【翻譯】她在配色上很有創意。

{{tts en_US:creativity}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】創造力；創意
【搭配詞】show creativity / boost creativity / artistic creativity
【例句】The job gives you room for creativity.
{{tts en_US:The job gives you room for creativity.}}
【用法說明】creativity 指想出新點子的能力
【翻譯】這份工作讓你有發揮創意的空間。

{{tts en_US:creator}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】創作者；創造者
【搭配詞】content creator / creator of the show / original creator
【例句】The creator of the app is from Taiwan.
{{tts en_US:The creator of the app is from Taiwan.}}
【用法說明】creator 指創作某物的人
【翻譯】這個 app 的創作者來自台灣。

{{tts en_US:creature}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】生物；動物
【搭配詞】sea creature / strange creature / living creature
【例句】A strange creature appeared in the story.
{{tts en_US:A strange creature appeared in the story.}}
【用法說明】creature 可指任何生物，也常見於故事語境
【翻譯】故事裡出現了一種奇怪的生物。

{{tts en_US:credibility}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】可信度；公信力
【搭配詞】lose credibility / media credibility / build credibility
【例句】The mistake hurt the company's credibility.
{{tts en_US:The mistake hurt the company's credibility.}}
【用法說明】credibility 指是否讓人信任
【翻譯】這個錯誤傷害了公司的公信力。

{{tts en_US:credible}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】可信的；可靠的
【搭配詞】credible source / credible explanation / sound credible
【例句】That sounds like a credible explanation.
{{tts en_US:That sounds like a credible explanation.}}
【用法說明】credible 形容說法、來源或人值得相信
【翻譯】那聽起來是個可信的解釋。

{{tts en_US:credit}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】讚譽；學分；信用；賒帳
【搭配詞】credit card / deserve credit / course credit
【例句】She deserves credit for the idea.
{{tts en_US:She deserves credit for the idea.}}
【用法說明】credit 有很多意思，常見是信用卡、功勞、學分
【翻譯】這個點子她值得被記一功。

{{tts en_US:creek}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】小溪
【搭配詞】small creek / mountain creek / by the creek
【例句】They had a picnic by the creek.
{{tts en_US:They had a picnic by the creek.}}
【用法說明】creek 指小溪流
【翻譯】他們在小溪旁野餐。

{{tts en_US:creep}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】爬行；悄悄移動；令人毛骨悚然的人
【搭配詞】creep up / creep into / creepy creep
【例句】The cat crept quietly across the room.
{{tts en_US:The cat crept quietly across the room.}}
【用法說明】creep 常指慢慢、悄悄移動
【翻譯】那隻貓悄悄穿過房間。

{{tts en_US:crew}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】團隊；工作人員；機組員
【搭配詞】film crew / flight crew / cleaning crew
【例句】The flight crew welcomed us on board.
{{tts en_US:The flight crew welcomed us on board.}}
【用法說明】crew 指一起工作的成員
【翻譯】機組員歡迎我們登機。

{{tts en_US:cricket}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】板球；蟋蟀
【搭配詞】play cricket / cricket match / hear crickets
【例句】We could hear crickets outside at night.
{{tts en_US:We could hear crickets outside at night.}}
【用法說明】cricket 有兩個常見意思，這裡例句用蟋蟀
【翻譯】我們晚上可以聽到外面的蟋蟀聲。

{{tts en_US:crime}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】犯罪；罪行
【搭配詞】fight crime / violent crime / crime rate
【例句】The city is trying to reduce crime.
{{tts en_US:The city is trying to reduce crime.}}
【用法說明】crime 指違法行為
【翻譯】這座城市正努力降低犯罪率。

{{tts en_US:criminal}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】罪犯；犯罪的
【搭配詞】criminal case / criminal law / dangerous criminal
【例句】The police caught the criminal yesterday.
{{tts en_US:The police caught the criminal yesterday.}}
【用法說明】criminal 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】警方昨天抓到了那名罪犯。

{{tts en_US:cripple}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】使癱瘓；造成重創
【搭配詞】cripple the system / cripple the economy / be crippled
【例句】The storm crippled the power system.
{{tts en_US:The storm crippled the power system.}}
【用法說明】cripple 在現代較常用於比喻重創系統或運作
【翻譯】暴風雨讓電力系統幾乎癱瘓。

{{tts en_US:crisis}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】危機
【搭配詞】economic crisis / in crisis / face a crisis
【例句】The company is facing a financial crisis.
{{tts en_US:The company is facing a financial crisis.}}
【用法說明】crisis 指嚴重且緊急的困境
【翻譯】那家公司正面臨財務危機。

{{tts en_US:crispy}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】酥脆的
【搭配詞】crispy chicken / crispy skin / nice and crispy
【例句】The fries are hot and crispy.
{{tts en_US:The fries are hot and crispy.}}

【翻譯】這些薯條熱熱的，而且很酥脆。

{{tts en_US:criterion/criteria}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】標準／標準（複數）
【搭配詞】selection criteria / meet the criterion / judging criteria
【例句】Price is one of the main criteria.
{{tts en_US:Price is one of the main criteria.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 criterion 和 criteria 放在一起
【翻譯】價格是主要標準之一。

{{tts en_US:corporation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】公司；法人
【搭配詞】large corporation / corporation tax / multinational corporation
【例句】She works for a global corporation.
{{tts en_US:She works for a global corporation.}}
【用法說明】corporation 指規模較正式的公司組織
【翻譯】她在一家跨國企業工作。

{{tts en_US:corpse}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】屍體
【搭配詞】dead corpse / human corpse / find a corpse
【例句】The police found a corpse near the river.
{{tts en_US:The police found a corpse near the river.}}
【用法說明】corpse 是較正式的『屍體』
【翻譯】警方在河邊發現一具屍體。

{{tts en_US:correct}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】正確的；改正
【搭配詞】correct answer / correct a mistake / spelling correction
【例句】Please correct the spelling in this sentence.
{{tts en_US:Please correct the spelling in this sentence.}}
【用法說明】correct 可作形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】請改正這句話裡的拼字。

{{tts en_US:correlation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】關聯；相關性
【搭配詞】strong correlation / correlation between / positive correlation
【例句】There is a strong correlation between sleep and mood.
{{tts en_US:There is a strong correlation between sleep and mood.}}
【用法說明】correlation 指兩件事之間的關聯程度
【翻譯】睡眠和情緒之間有很強的關聯。

{{tts en_US:correspond}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】通信；相符
【搭配詞】correspond with / correspond to / correspond by email
【例句】The two numbers don't correspond.
{{tts en_US:The two numbers don't correspond.}}
【用法說明】correspond 可指一致，也可指通信
【翻譯】這兩個數字對不起來。

{{tts en_US:correspondence}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】通信；來往信件；一致
【搭配詞】email correspondence / business correspondence / correspondence with
【例句】Most of our correspondence is by email.
{{tts en_US:Most of our correspondence is by email.}}
【用法說明】correspondence 常指書信或電子郵件往來
【翻譯】我們大多數的往來都是靠電子郵件。

{{tts en_US:correspondent}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】記者；通信者
【搭配詞】foreign correspondent / war correspondent / news correspondent
【例句】The correspondent reported live from Tokyo.
{{tts en_US:The correspondent reported live from Tokyo.}}
【用法說明】correspondent 常指駐外記者
【翻譯】那位記者從東京現場連線報導。

{{tts en_US:corridor}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】走廊
【搭配詞】long corridor / narrow corridor / down the corridor
【例句】The meeting room is down the corridor.
{{tts en_US:The meeting room is down the corridor.}}
【用法說明】corridor 指室內長走道
【翻譯】會議室在走廊那頭。

{{tts en_US:corrupt}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】腐敗的；使腐化
【搭配詞】corrupt official / corrupt system / morally corrupt
【例句】People were angry at the corrupt officials.
{{tts en_US:People were angry at the corrupt officials.}}
【用法說明】corrupt 常見於政治或制度腐敗
【翻譯】人們對那些貪腐官員很憤怒。

{{tts en_US:corruption}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】腐敗；貪污
【搭配詞】political corruption / corruption scandal / fight corruption
【例句】The mayor promised to fight corruption.
{{tts en_US:The mayor promised to fight corruption.}}
【用法說明】corruption 指濫權與貪污問題
【翻譯】市長承諾要打擊貪腐。

{{tts en_US:cosmetic}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】化妝品的；表面的
【搭配詞】cosmetic surgery / cosmetic change / cosmetic product
【例句】The update made only cosmetic changes.
{{tts en_US:The update made only cosmetic changes.}}
【用法說明】cosmetic 可指美妝，也可比喻表面上的改變
【翻譯】這次更新只做了表面上的改動。

{{tts en_US:cosmetics}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】化妝品
【搭配詞】buy cosmetics / cosmetic brand / carry cosmetics
【例句】She spent too much money on cosmetics.
{{tts en_US:She spent too much money on cosmetics.}}
【用法說明】cosmetics 指美妝用品
【翻譯】她在化妝品上花了太多錢。

{{tts en_US:cost}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】花費；成本；代價
【搭配詞】cost a lot / at low cost / living cost
【例句】This phone costs too much.
{{tts en_US:This phone costs too much.}}
【用法說明】cost 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】這支手機太貴了。

{{tts en_US:costly}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】昂貴的；代價高的
【搭配詞】costly mistake / costly repair / very costly
【例句】It turned out to be a costly mistake.
{{tts en_US:It turned out to be a costly mistake.}}
【用法說明】costly 可指價格高，也可指後果代價大
【翻譯】結果那是一個代價高昂的錯誤。

{{tts en_US:costume}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】服裝；戲服
【搭配詞】Halloween costume / stage costume / wear a costume
【例句】He wore a pirate costume to the party.
{{tts en_US:He wore a pirate costume to the party.}}
【用法說明】costume 指特定角色或場合的服裝
【翻譯】他穿著海盜服去參加派對。

{{tts en_US:cottage}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】小屋；鄉間小屋
【搭配詞】country cottage / small cottage / cottage by the lake
【例句】They stayed in a cottage by the lake.
{{tts en_US:They stayed in a cottage by the lake.}}
【用法說明】cottage 常指鄉間溫馨小屋
【翻譯】他們住在湖邊的一間小屋裡。

{{tts en_US:cotton}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】棉；棉花
【搭配詞】cotton shirt / cotton fabric / made of cotton
【例句】This shirt is made of cotton.
{{tts en_US:This shirt is made of cotton.}}
【用法說明】cotton 指棉花或棉布
【翻譯】這件襯衫是棉做的。

{{tts en_US:couch}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】沙發
【搭配詞】sit on the couch / couch cushion / comfy couch
【例句】I fell asleep on the couch.
{{tts en_US:I fell asleep on the couch.}}
【用法說明】couch 指可躺可坐的長沙發
【翻譯】我在沙發上睡著了。

{{tts en_US:cough}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】咳嗽；咳
【搭配詞】dry cough / cough medicine / cough badly
【例句】He has had a bad cough for days.
{{tts en_US:He has had a bad cough for days.}}
【用法說明】cough 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他已經咳好幾天了。

{{tts en_US:council}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】議會；委員會
【搭配詞】city council / student council / council member
【例句】The city council approved the plan.
{{tts en_US:The city council approved the plan.}}
【用法說明】council 指正式的決策或代表機構
【翻譯】市議會通過了這項計畫。

{{tts en_US:counsel}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】建議；勸告；律師
【搭配詞】legal counsel / seek counsel / counsel someone
【例句】She sought counsel from a senior teacher.
{{tts en_US:She sought counsel from a senior teacher.}}
【用法說明】counsel 是較正式的 advice，也可指法律顧問
【翻譯】她向一位資深老師尋求建議。

{{tts en_US:counselor}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】顧問；輔導老師；諮商師
【搭配詞】school counselor / marriage counselor / camp counselor
【例句】The school counselor listened carefully.
{{tts en_US:The school counselor listened carefully.}}
【用法說明】counselor 指提供建議或心理支持的人
【翻譯】學校輔導老師很仔細地聽她說。

{{tts en_US:count}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】數；算作
【搭配詞】count to ten / count the votes / count as
【例句】Can you count how many chairs we need?
{{tts en_US:Can you count how many chairs we need?}}
【用法說明】count 可表示數數，也可表示算作
【翻譯】你可以數一下我們需要幾張椅子嗎？

{{tts en_US:countable}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】可數的
【搭配詞】countable noun / countable item / be countable
【例句】Apple is a countable noun.
{{tts en_US:Apple is a countable noun.}}
【用法說明】countable 常見於文法用法
【翻譯】apple 是可數名詞。

{{tts en_US:counter}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】櫃台；計數器；反擊
【搭配詞】kitchen counter / front counter / at the counter
【例句】Please pay at the front counter.
{{tts en_US:Please pay at the front counter.}}
【用法說明】counter 常見於店裡的服務櫃台
【翻譯】請到前面的櫃台結帳。

{{tts en_US:counterpart}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】對應的人／物；職位對等者
【搭配詞】foreign counterpart / counterpart in / meet my counterpart
【例句】She spoke with her Japanese counterpart online.
{{tts en_US:She spoke with her Japanese counterpart online.}}
【用法說明】counterpart 指在另一方中職位或功能相當的人或東西
【翻譯】她在線上和她的日本對口聯絡人談話。

{{tts en_US:country}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】國家；鄉村
【搭配詞】foreign country / country road / leave the country
【例句】He wants to travel to another country next year.
{{tts en_US:He wants to travel to another country next year.}}
【用法說明】country 最常指國家，也可指鄉下地區
【翻譯】他想明年去另一個國家旅行。

{{tts en_US:countryside}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】鄉下；鄉村地區
【搭配詞】quiet countryside / in the countryside / drive through the countryside
【例句】They moved to the countryside for a quieter life.
{{tts en_US:They moved to the countryside for a quieter life.}}
【用法說明】countryside 指城市以外的鄉村地區
【翻譯】他們搬到鄉下，過比較安靜的生活。

{{tts en_US:county}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】郡；縣
【搭配詞】county fair / county office / county government
【例句】She works for the county government.
{{tts en_US:She works for the county government.}}
【用法說明】county 指行政區
【翻譯】她在縣政府工作。

{{tts en_US:couple}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】一對；兩個；夫妻
【搭配詞】a couple of days / married couple / young couple
【例句】I'll be there in a couple of minutes.
{{tts en_US:I'll be there in a couple of minutes.}}
【用法說明】a couple of 很常表示『兩個／幾個』
【翻譯】我再過幾分鐘就到。

{{tts en_US:coupon}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】折價券；優惠券
【搭配詞】discount coupon / use a coupon / coupon code
【例句】I found a coupon for free delivery.
{{tts en_US:I found a coupon for free delivery.}}
【用法說明】coupon 指可折抵金額的優惠券
【翻譯】我找到一張免運優惠券。

{{tts en_US:courage}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】勇氣
【搭配詞】have courage / lose courage / gather your courage
【例句】It took a lot of courage to speak up.
{{tts en_US:It took a lot of courage to speak up.}}
【用法說明】courage 指面對困難時的勇氣
【翻譯】開口說出來需要很大的勇氣。

{{tts en_US:courageous}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】勇敢的
【搭配詞】courageous decision / courageous act / be courageous
【例句】She was courageous enough to tell the truth.
{{tts en_US:She was courageous enough to tell the truth.}}
【用法說明】courageous 形容人勇敢面對困難
【翻譯】她很勇敢，把真相說了出來。

{{tts en_US:course}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】課程；過程；路線
【搭配詞】take a course / of course / golf course
【例句】I'm taking an online course this month.
{{tts en_US:I'm taking an online course this month.}}
【用法說明】course 有很多意思，常見是課程
【翻譯】我這個月正在上線上課程。

{{tts en_US:court}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】法院；球場；追求
【搭配詞】basketball court / court case / go to court
【例句】The kids were playing on the basketball court.
{{tts en_US:The kids were playing on the basketball court.}}
【用法說明】court 常見意思是法院或球場
【翻譯】孩子們正在籃球場打球。

{{tts en_US:courteous}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】有禮貌的
【搭配詞】courteous service / be courteous / courteous reply
【例句】The staff were polite and courteous.
{{tts en_US:The staff were polite and courteous.}}
【用法說明】courteous 是較正式的『有禮貌』
【翻譯】工作人員既有禮又客氣。

{{tts en_US:courtesy}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】禮貌；好意；免費提供
【搭配詞】common courtesy / courtesy call / courtesy of
【例句】A simple thank-you is common courtesy.
{{tts en_US:A simple thank-you is common courtesy.}}
【用法說明】courtesy 指待人接物的禮貌
【翻譯】說句謝謝是基本禮貌。

{{tts en_US:courtyard}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】庭院；院子
【搭配詞】school courtyard / inner courtyard / quiet courtyard
【例句】The children were playing in the courtyard.
{{tts en_US:The children were playing in the courtyard.}}
【用法說明】courtyard 指建築物中間或旁邊的院子
【翻譯】孩子們正在庭院裡玩。

{{tts en_US:cousin}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】表／堂兄弟姊妹
【搭配詞】my cousin / younger cousin / cousin from Canada
【例句】My cousin is visiting us this weekend.
{{tts en_US:My cousin is visiting us this weekend.}}
【用法說明】cousin 指堂表親
【翻譯】我表哥這個週末要來看我們。

{{tts en_US:cover}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】覆蓋；遮住；報導；封面
【搭配詞】cover the table / cover a story / book cover
【例句】Please cover the food before you leave.
{{tts en_US:Please cover the food before you leave.}}
【用法說明】cover 有很多意思，常見是蓋住或覆蓋
【翻譯】你離開前請把食物蓋起來。

{{tts en_US:critic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】評論家；批評者
【搭配詞】movie critic / harsh critic / art critic
【例句】The film received praise from several critics.
{{tts en_US:The film received praise from several critics.}}
【用法說明】critic 指專門評論作品的人
【翻譯】那部電影獲得幾位影評人的好評。

{{tts en_US:critical}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】關鍵的；批判的；嚴重的
【搭配詞】critical moment / critical condition / be critical of
【例句】This is a critical moment for the team.
{{tts en_US:This is a critical moment for the team.}}
【用法說明】critical 可指很重要，也可指情況危急
【翻譯】這對團隊來說是個關鍵時刻。

{{tts en_US:criticism}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】批評；批判
【搭配詞】face criticism / public criticism / harsh criticism
【例句】The decision received a lot of criticism.
{{tts en_US:The decision received a lot of criticism.}}
【用法說明】criticism 指外界的批評意見
【翻譯】這項決定受到了很多批評。

{{tts en_US:criticize}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】批評；指責
【搭配詞】criticize someone for / openly criticize / unfairly criticize
【例句】He criticized me for being late.
{{tts en_US:He criticized me for being late.}}
【用法說明】criticize + 人 + for + 事
【翻譯】他因為我遲到而批評我。

{{tts en_US:crocodile}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】鱷魚
【搭配詞】huge crocodile / crocodile skin / see a crocodile
【例句】We saw a crocodile at the zoo.
{{tts en_US:We saw a crocodile at the zoo.}}
【用法說明】crocodile 指鱷魚
【翻譯】我們在動物園看到一隻鱷魚。

{{tts en_US:crop}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】作物；收成；裁切
【搭配詞】rice crop / crop failure / crop a photo
【例句】Farmers are worried about this year's crop.
{{tts en_US:Farmers are worried about this year's crop.}}
【用法說明】crop 可指農作物，也可作動詞表示裁切
【翻譯】農夫們很擔心今年的收成。

{{tts en_US:cross}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】穿過；交叉的；生氣的
【搭配詞】cross the street / cross your arms / be cross with
【例句】Let's cross the road at the light.
{{tts en_US:Let's cross the road at the light.}}
【用法說明】cross 最常見是穿越、交叉
【翻譯】我們在紅綠燈那裡過馬路吧。

{{tts en_US:crossing}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】穿越；十字路口；平交道
【搭配詞】pedestrian crossing / crossing point / railroad crossing
【例句】Wait at the crossing until the light turns green.
{{tts en_US:Wait at the crossing until the light turns green.}}
【用法說明】crossing 常指行人穿越道或交會處
【翻譯】在穿越道等到綠燈再走。

{{tts en_US:crow}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】烏鴉；啼叫
【搭配詞】black crow / hear a crow / crow loudly
【例句】A crow was sitting on the fence.
{{tts en_US:A crow was sitting on the fence.}}
【用法說明】crow 指烏鴉
【翻譯】一隻烏鴉停在籬笆上。

{{tts en_US:crowd}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】人群；擠滿
【搭配詞】large crowd / crowd into / gather in a crowd
【例句】A crowd waited outside the stadium.
{{tts en_US:A crowd waited outside the stadium.}}
【用法說明】crowd 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】一群人在體育館外等候。

{{tts en_US:crown}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】王冠；冠軍
【搭配詞】wear a crown / crown a winner / dental crown
【例句】The queen wore a gold crown.
{{tts en_US:The queen wore a gold crown.}}
【用法說明】crown 最常指王冠，也可指冠軍頭銜
【翻譯】女王戴著一頂金色王冠。

{{tts en_US:crucial}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】關鍵的；極重要的
【搭配詞】crucial role / crucial decision / crucial moment
【例句】Water is crucial for life.
{{tts en_US:Water is crucial for life.}}
【用法說明】crucial 表示非常重要、不可少
【翻譯】水對生命非常重要。

{{tts en_US:crude}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】粗糙的；天然的；粗魯的
【搭配詞】crude oil / crude drawing / crude joke
【例句】The sketch was crude but clear.
{{tts en_US:The sketch was crude but clear.}}
【用法說明】crude 可指不精細，也可指原始未加工
【翻譯】那張草圖雖然粗略，但很清楚。

{{tts en_US:cruel}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】殘忍的；冷酷的
【搭配詞】cruel act / cruel joke / be cruel to
【例句】It was cruel to laugh at him.
{{tts en_US:It was cruel to laugh at him.}}
【用法說明】cruel 形容對人缺乏同情心
【翻譯】嘲笑他很殘忍。

{{tts en_US:cruelty}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】殘忍；虐待
【搭配詞】animal cruelty / act of cruelty / cruelty to children
【例句】The law punishes animal cruelty.
{{tts en_US:The law punishes animal cruelty.}}
【用法說明】cruelty 指殘酷行為
【翻譯】法律會處罰虐待動物的行為。

{{tts en_US:cruise}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】郵輪旅行；巡航
【搭配詞】go on a cruise / cruise ship / cruise around
【例句】My parents are going on a cruise next month.
{{tts en_US:My parents are going on a cruise next month.}}
【用法說明】cruise 可指搭郵輪旅遊，也可指平穩航行
【翻譯】我爸媽下個月要去搭郵輪旅行。

{{tts en_US:crunchy}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】脆脆的；嘎吱作響的
【搭配詞】crunchy snack / crunchy peanut butter / nice and crunchy
【例句】These cookies are warm and crunchy.
{{tts en_US:These cookies are warm and crunchy.}}
【用法說明】crunchy 形容食物咬起來脆
【翻譯】這些餅乾熱熱的，而且很酥脆。

{{tts en_US:crush}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】壓碎；迷戀；擠壓
【搭配詞】crush ice / have a crush on / crush the can
【例句】She had a crush on him in high school.
{{tts en_US:She had a crush on him in high school.}}
【用法說明】have a crush on 是常見片語，表示暗戀
【翻譯】她高中時暗戀過他。

{{tts en_US:crutch}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】拐杖；依靠
【搭配詞】walk with crutches / emotional crutch / use a crutch
【例句】He used crutches after the accident.
{{tts en_US:He used crutches after the accident.}}
【用法說明】crutch 指走路輔助用拐杖，也可比喻依賴
【翻譯】事故後他靠拐杖走路。

{{tts en_US:cry}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】哭；叫喊
【搭配詞】cry for help / cry loudly / make a baby cry
【例句】The baby started to cry.
{{tts en_US:The baby started to cry.}}
【用法說明】cry 可作動詞或名詞，最常見是哭
【翻譯】那個寶寶開始哭了。

{{tts en_US:crystal}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】水晶；晶體
【搭配詞】crystal clear / crystal ball / crystal glass
【例句】The water in the lake was crystal clear.
{{tts en_US:The water in the lake was crystal clear.}}
【用法說明】crystal 可指水晶，也常見於 crystal clear
【翻譯】湖水清澈見底。

{{tts en_US:cub}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】幼獸；幼崽
【搭配詞】lion cub / bear cub / little cub
【例句】The lioness stayed close to her cubs.
{{tts en_US:The lioness stayed close to her cubs.}}
【用法說明】cub 指獅子、熊等動物的幼崽
【翻譯】那隻母獅一直靠近牠的幼崽。

{{tts en_US:cube}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】立方體；方塊
【搭配詞】ice cube / cube shape / sugar cube
【例句】She dropped an ice cube into the glass.
{{tts en_US:She dropped an ice cube into the glass.}}
【用法說明】cube 指立方形的東西
【翻譯】她把一塊冰塊丟進杯子裡。

{{tts en_US:cucumber}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】小黃瓜；黃瓜
【搭配詞】fresh cucumber / cucumber salad / slice a cucumber
【例句】He added cucumber to the sandwich.
{{tts en_US:He added cucumber to the sandwich.}}
【用法說明】cucumber 指黃瓜類蔬菜
【翻譯】他在三明治裡加了小黃瓜。

{{tts en_US:cue}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】提示；暗示；球桿
【搭配詞】take the cue / visual cue / cue card
【例句】That was my cue to leave.
{{tts en_US:That was my cue to leave.}}
【用法說明】cue 指提醒你該做什麼的信號
【翻譯】那就是我該離開的提示。

{{tts en_US:cuisine}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】料理；菜系
【搭配詞】French cuisine / local cuisine / cuisine style
【例句】Thai cuisine is popular around the world.
{{tts en_US:Thai cuisine is popular around the world.}}
【用法說明】cuisine 指特定文化的料理風格
【翻譯】泰式料理在世界各地都很受歡迎。

{{tts en_US:cultivate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】培養；栽培；耕作
【搭配詞】cultivate a habit / cultivate friendship / cultivate the land
【例句】Reading helps cultivate patience.
{{tts en_US:Reading helps cultivate patience.}}
【用法說明】cultivate 可指種植，也可比喻培養特質
【翻譯】閱讀有助於培養耐心。

{{tts en_US:cultural}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】文化的
【搭配詞】cultural difference / cultural event / cultural background
【例句】We talked about cultural differences in class.
{{tts en_US:We talked about cultural differences in class.}}
【用法說明】cultural 用來描述文化相關事物
【翻譯】我們在課堂上談到文化差異。

{{tts en_US:culture}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】文化；培養；文化氛圍
【搭配詞】local culture / company culture / pop culture
【例句】The company has a relaxed work culture.
{{tts en_US:The company has a relaxed work culture.}}
【用法說明】culture 最常指文化，也可指組織文化
【翻譯】那家公司有很放鬆的工作文化。

{{tts en_US:cumulative}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】累積的；逐漸增加的
【搭配詞】cumulative effect / cumulative score / cumulative damage
【例句】Stress can have a cumulative effect on health.
{{tts en_US:Stress can have a cumulative effect on health.}}
【用法說明】cumulative 指一點一點累積起來的
【翻譯】壓力會對健康產生累積影響。

{{tts en_US:cunning}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】狡猾的；機靈的
【搭配詞】cunning plan / cunning fox / look cunning
【例句】The fox in the story is clever and cunning.
{{tts en_US:The fox in the story is clever and cunning.}}
【用法說明】cunning 常帶有狡猾、精明的意思
【翻譯】故事裡的那隻狐狸又聰明又狡猾。

{{tts en_US:cup}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】杯子；一杯的量
【搭配詞】cup of tea / paper cup / coffee cup
【例句】Would you like a cup of tea?
{{tts en_US:Would you like a cup of tea?}}
【用法說明】cup 可指容器，也可指一杯的份量
【翻譯】你要不要來一杯茶？

{{tts en_US:cupboard}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】櫥櫃
【搭配詞】kitchen cupboard / open the cupboard / cupboard door
【例句】The mugs are in the cupboard.
{{tts en_US:The mugs are in the cupboard.}}
【用法說明】cupboard 指收納餐具或物品的櫃子
【翻譯】馬克杯放在櫥櫃裡。

{{tts en_US:curb}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】路緣；抑制
【搭配詞】curb your spending / at the curb / curb bad habits
【例句】We need to curb unnecessary costs.
{{tts en_US:We need to curb unnecessary costs.}}
【用法說明】curb 可作動詞表示控制、抑制
【翻譯】我們需要抑制不必要的成本。

{{tts en_US:cure}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】治療；治癒；解方
【搭配詞】cure a disease / no cure / find a cure
【例句】Scientists are still searching for a cure.
{{tts en_US:Scientists are still searching for a cure.}}
【用法說明】cure 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】科學家仍在尋找治療方法。

{{tts en_US:curfew}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】宵禁；晚歸時間限制
【搭配詞】break curfew / under curfew / set a curfew
【例句】My parents gave me a 10 p.m. curfew.
{{tts en_US:My parents gave me a 10 p.m. curfew.}}
【用法說明】curfew 可指政府宵禁，也可指家長規定的晚歸時間
【翻譯】我爸媽規定我晚上十點前要回家。

{{tts en_US:curiosity}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】好奇心
【搭配詞】out of curiosity / arouse curiosity / full of curiosity
【例句】Out of curiosity, I opened the box.
{{tts en_US:Out of curiosity, I opened the box.}}
【用法說明】curiosity 指想知道更多的心情
【翻譯】出於好奇，我打開了那個盒子。

{{tts en_US:curious}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】好奇的；奇怪的
【搭配詞】curious about / be curious to know / curious look
【例句】I'm curious about your new project.
{{tts en_US:I'm curious about your new project.}}
【用法說明】curious about + 人／事 很常見
【翻譯】我很好奇你的新專案。

{{tts en_US:curl}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】捲曲；捲髮
【搭配詞】curl your hair / curl up / curly curl
【例句】The cat curled up on the sofa.
{{tts en_US:The cat curled up on the sofa.}}
【用法說明】curl 可作動詞或名詞，表示捲起來
【翻譯】那隻貓蜷縮在沙發上。

{{tts en_US:currency}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】貨幣
【搭配詞】foreign currency / local currency / digital currency
【例句】You need local currency to buy food there.
{{tts en_US:You need local currency to buy food there.}}
【用法說明】currency 指一個國家或地區使用的貨幣
【翻譯】你在那裡買東西需要當地貨幣。

{{tts en_US:current}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】目前的；水流；電流
【搭配詞】current situation / current job / ocean current
【例句】What's your current address?
{{tts en_US:What's your current address?}}
【用法說明】current 最常指目前現在的
【翻譯】你目前的地址是什麼？

{{tts en_US:curriculum}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】課程；課綱
【搭配詞】school curriculum / revise the curriculum / curriculum design
【例句】The school updated its English curriculum.
{{tts en_US:The school updated its English curriculum.}}
【用法說明】curriculum 指課程整體規畫
【翻譯】學校更新了英文課程。

{{tts en_US:curry}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】咖哩
【搭配詞】chicken curry / curry rice / spicy curry
【例句】We had curry rice for lunch.
{{tts en_US:We had curry rice for lunch.}}
【用法說明】curry 指咖哩料理
【翻譯】我們午餐吃了咖哩飯。

{{tts en_US:curse}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】詛咒；咒罵
【搭配詞】put a curse on / curse under your breath / ancient curse
【例句】He muttered a curse when he dropped his phone.
{{tts en_US:He muttered a curse when he dropped his phone.}}
【用法說明】curse 可指詛咒，也可指低聲罵人
【翻譯】他手機掉下去時低聲罵了一句。

{{tts en_US:curtain}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】窗簾；布幕
【搭配詞】close the curtain / shower curtain / behind the curtain
【例句】She opened the curtain to let in light.
{{tts en_US:She opened the curtain to let in light.}}
【用法說明】curtain 指遮光的簾子或舞台布幕
【翻譯】她拉開窗簾讓光照進來。

{{tts en_US:curve}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】曲線；轉彎
【搭配詞】sharp curve / learning curve / curve of the road
【例句】Be careful at the curve ahead.
{{tts en_US:Be careful at the curve ahead.}}
【用法說明】curve 可指彎道，也可指曲線
【翻譯】前面的彎道要小心。

{{tts en_US:cushion}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】坐墊；靠墊；緩衝
【搭配詞】seat cushion / soft cushion / cushion the blow
【例句】She put a cushion behind her back.
{{tts en_US:She put a cushion behind her back.}}
【用法說明】cushion 可指墊子，也可比喻緩衝
【翻譯】她在背後墊了一個靠墊。

{{tts en_US:custody}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】監護權；拘留
【搭配詞】take custody of / child custody / in police custody
【例句】They are fighting over child custody.
{{tts en_US:They are fighting over child custody.}}
【用法說明】custody 常見於法律語境
【翻譯】他們正在爭取孩子的監護權。

{{tts en_US:custom}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】習俗；習慣；訂製
【搭配詞】local custom / custom-made / by custom
【例句】It's a local custom to remove your shoes.
{{tts en_US:It's a local custom to remove your shoes.}}
【用法說明】custom 可指文化習俗，也可指訂製的
【翻譯】當地習俗是要先脫鞋。

{{tts en_US:customary}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】慣常的；習慣上的
【搭配詞】customary practice / customary greeting / as is customary
【例句】He arrived later than his customary time.
{{tts en_US:He arrived later than his customary time.}}
【用法說明】customary 指依照慣例的
【翻譯】他比平常慣常的時間晚到了。

{{tts en_US:customer}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】顧客；客戶
【搭配詞】serve a customer / loyal customer / customer service
【例句】The store was full of customers.
{{tts en_US:The store was full of customers.}}
【用法說明】customer 指購買商品或服務的人
【翻譯】那家店裡擠滿了顧客。

{{tts en_US:customs}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】海關
【搭配詞】go through customs / customs officer / customs check
【例句】We spent an hour going through customs.
{{tts en_US:We spent an hour going through customs.}}
【用法說明】customs 指機場或港口的海關檢查
【翻譯】我們花了一個小時過海關。

{{tts en_US:cut}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】切；剪；削減
【搭配詞】cut the paper / cut costs / get a cut
【例句】Be careful not to cut yourself.
{{tts en_US:Be careful not to cut yourself.}}
【用法說明】cut 有很多意思，常見是切割或削減
【翻譯】小心不要割到自己。

{{tts en_US:cute}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】可愛的
【搭配詞】cute baby / really cute / look cute
【例句】That puppy is so cute.
{{tts en_US:That puppy is so cute.}}
【用法說明】cute 常用來形容可愛討喜
【翻譯】那隻小狗超可愛。

{{tts en_US:cycle}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】循環；週期；騎腳踏車
【搭配詞】sleep cycle / business cycle / cycle to school
【例句】The washing machine is on a long cycle.
{{tts en_US:The washing machine is on a long cycle.}}
【用法說明】cycle 可指週期，也可作動詞表示騎車
【翻譯】洗衣機現在在跑一個很長的洗程。

{{tts en_US:cynical}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】憤世嫉俗的；不信任人的
【搭配詞】cynical view / cynical about / sound cynical
【例句】He's cynical about politics.
{{tts en_US:He's cynical about politics.}}
【用法說明】cynical 形容對人或制度不太信任
【翻譯】他對政治很犬儒。

{{tts en_US:daily}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】每天的；每日
【搭配詞】daily life / daily routine / daily report
【例句】Walking is part of my daily routine.
{{tts en_US:Walking is part of my daily routine.}}
【用法說明】daily 可作形容詞或副詞
【翻譯】散步是我每天日常的一部分。

{{tts en_US:dairy}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】乳製品；乳品業的
【搭配詞】dairy products / dairy farm / dairy section
【例句】Milk and cheese are dairy products.
{{tts en_US:Milk and cheese are dairy products.}}
【用法說明】dairy 指牛奶、起司等乳製品
【翻譯】牛奶和起司都是乳製品。

{{tts en_US:dam}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】水壩
【搭配詞】build a dam / dam wall / hydroelectric dam
【例句】The river is controlled by a large dam.
{{tts en_US:The river is controlled by a large dam.}}
【用法說明】dam 指擋水的堤壩
【翻譯】這條河由一座大型水壩控制。

{{tts en_US:damage}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】損害；損傷
【搭配詞】cause damage / water damage / serious damage
【例句】The storm caused a lot of damage.
{{tts en_US:The storm caused a lot of damage.}}
【用法說明】damage 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】暴風雨造成了許多損害。

{{tts en_US:damp}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】潮濕的；微濕的
【搭配詞】damp clothes / damp wall / feel damp
【例句】The towel was still damp.
{{tts en_US:The towel was still damp.}}
【用法說明】damp 指有點濕但沒完全濕透
【翻譯】那條毛巾還有點濕。

{{tts en_US:dance}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】跳舞；舞蹈
【搭配詞】dance class / dance together / slow dance
【例句】Do you want to dance?
{{tts en_US:Do you want to dance?}}
【用法說明】dance 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】你想跳舞嗎？

{{tts en_US:dancer}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】舞者；舞蹈演員
【搭配詞】ballet dancer / professional dancer / talented dancer
【例句】She wants to be a professional dancer.
{{tts en_US:She wants to be a professional dancer.}}
【用法說明】dancer 指以跳舞為主的人
【翻譯】她想成為專業舞者。

{{tts en_US:danger}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】危險
【搭配詞】in danger / sense of danger / out of danger
【例句】The children were not in any danger.
{{tts en_US:The children were not in any danger.}}
【用法說明】danger 指可能造成傷害的風險
【翻譯】那些孩子並沒有處於危險中。

{{tts en_US:dangerous}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】危險的
【搭配詞】dangerous road / dangerous situation / be dangerous to
【例句】It's dangerous to swim here.
{{tts en_US:It's dangerous to swim here.}}
【用法說明】dangerous 形容有風險或可能造成傷害
【翻譯】在這裡游泳很危險。

{{tts en_US:dare}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】敢；膽敢
【搭配詞】dare to / how dare you / I dare you
【例句】I didn't dare to ask.
{{tts en_US:I didn't dare to ask.}}
【用法說明】dare to + V 表示敢做某事
【翻譯】我不敢問。

{{tts en_US:dark}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】黑暗的；深色的
【搭配詞】dark room / dark blue / after dark
【例句】It gets dark early in winter.
{{tts en_US:It gets dark early in winter.}}
【用法說明】dark 可指光線暗，也可指顏色深
【翻譯】冬天很早就天黑了。

{{tts en_US:darling}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】親愛的；心愛的人
【搭配詞】my darling / darling child / oh darling
【例句】Good night, darling.
{{tts en_US:Good night, darling.}}
【用法說明】darling 常用於親密稱呼
【翻譯】晚安，親愛的。

{{tts en_US:dash}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】衝；短跑；破折號
【搭配詞】dash across / make a dash for / em dash
【例句】She dashed across the street in the rain.
{{tts en_US:She dashed across the street in the rain.}}
【用法說明】dash 可指快速衝過去
【翻譯】她在雨中衝過馬路。

{{tts en_US:data}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】資料；數據
【搭配詞】collect data / data analysis / personal data
【例句】We need more data before deciding.
{{tts en_US:We need more data before deciding.}}
【用法說明】data 指資訊或數據資料
【翻譯】我們在做決定前還需要更多資料。

{{tts en_US:database}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】資料庫
【搭配詞】database system / search the database / customer database
【例句】The file is stored in a secure database.
{{tts en_US:The file is stored in a secure database.}}
【用法說明】database 指有系統整理的資料集合
【翻譯】那個檔案存放在安全的資料庫裡。

{{tts en_US:date}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】日期；約會；棗子
【搭配詞】set a date / go on a date / due date
【例句】Let's set a date for the meeting.
{{tts en_US:Let's set a date for the meeting.}}
【用法說明】date 最常指日期，也可指約會
【翻譯】我們來訂一個開會日期吧。

{{tts en_US:daughter}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】女兒
【搭配詞】my daughter / only daughter / daughter and son
【例句】Their daughter just started school.
{{tts en_US:Their daughter just started school.}}
【用法說明】daughter 指女兒
【翻譯】他們的女兒剛開始上學。

{{tts en_US:dawn}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】黎明；破曉
【搭配詞】at dawn / before dawn / dawn sky
【例句】We left the house at dawn.
{{tts en_US:We left the house at dawn.}}
【用法說明】dawn 指天快亮的時候
【翻譯】我們在黎明時分離開了家。

{{tts en_US:day}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】白天；一天
【搭配詞】all day / day off / one day
【例句】I had a long day at work.
{{tts en_US:I had a long day at work.}}
【用法說明】day 可指二十四小時或白天時間
【翻譯】我今天上班上了很長的一天。

{{tts en_US:dazzle}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使目眩；使驚艷
【搭配詞】dazzle the audience / dazzling light / be dazzled by
【例句】Her performance dazzled the audience.
{{tts en_US:Her performance dazzled the audience.}}
【用法說明】dazzle 表示以光彩或表現讓人驚艷
【翻譯】她的表演讓觀眾驚艷。

{{tts en_US:dead}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】死的；沒電的；完全的
【搭配詞】dead battery / dead tired / be dead
【例句】My phone is dead.
{{tts en_US:My phone is dead.}}
【用法說明】dead 除了死亡，也常指沒電
【翻譯】我的手機沒電了。

{{tts en_US:deadline}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】截止期限
【搭配詞】meet the deadline / tight deadline / miss a deadline
【例句】I have to finish this by the deadline.
{{tts en_US:I have to finish this by the deadline.}}
【用法說明】deadline 指最後期限
【翻譯】我得在截止日前把這個做完。

{{tts en_US:deadly}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】致命的；極度的
【搭配詞】deadly disease / deadly weapon / deadly quiet
【例句】This snake can be deadly.
{{tts en_US:This snake can be deadly.}}
【用法說明】deadly 指可能造成死亡，也可比喻非常強烈
【翻譯】這種蛇可能致命。

{{tts en_US:deaf}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】失聰的；聽不見的
【搭配詞】go deaf / deaf child / be deaf in one ear
【例句】He's deaf in one ear.
{{tts en_US:He's deaf in one ear.}}
【用法說明】deaf 指聽力喪失
【翻譯】他一隻耳朵聽不見。

{{tts en_US:deafen}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】震聾；使聽不見
【搭配詞】deafen someone / deafen the crowd / nearly deafen
【例句】The explosion nearly deafened us.
{{tts en_US:The explosion nearly deafened us.}}
【用法說明】deafen 表示讓人暫時或永久聽不清
【翻譯】那次爆炸差點把我們震聾。

{{tts en_US:deal}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】處理；交易；大量
【搭配詞】deal with / good deal / make a deal
【例句】I need to deal with this problem first.
{{tts en_US:I need to deal with this problem first.}}
【用法說明】deal 有很多意思，常見是處理或交易
【翻譯】我得先處理這個問題。

{{tts en_US:dealer}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】商人；經銷商；發牌者
【搭配詞】car dealer / drug dealer / card dealer
【例句】We bought the car from a local dealer.
{{tts en_US:We bought the car from a local dealer.}}
【用法說明】dealer 指販售某類商品的人或公司
【翻譯】我們向本地經銷商買了那台車。

{{tts en_US:dear}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】親愛的；昂貴的；珍愛的
【搭配詞】dear friend / dear sir / too dear
【例句】She's a dear friend of mine.
{{tts en_US:She's a dear friend of mine.}}
【用法說明】dear 常用於稱呼或表示珍視
【翻譯】她是我很珍惜的一位朋友。

{{tts en_US:death}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】死亡
【搭配詞】cause of death / death certificate / sudden death
【例句】The news of his death shocked everyone.
{{tts en_US:The news of his death shocked everyone.}}
【用法說明】death 指生命終止這件事
【翻譯】他去世的消息讓大家都很震驚。

{{tts en_US:debate}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】辯論；討論
【搭配詞】have a debate / debate over / political debate
【例句】We had a long debate about the new rule.
{{tts en_US:We had a long debate about the new rule.}}
【用法說明】debate 可指正式辯論，也可指來回討論
【翻譯】我們針對新規定討論了很久。

{{tts en_US:debris}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】碎片；殘骸
【搭配詞】storm debris / clear the debris / debris on the road
【例句】The street was covered with debris after the storm.
{{tts en_US:The street was covered with debris after the storm.}}
【用法說明】debris 指災後或破壞後的碎片殘骸
【翻譯】暴風雨過後，街上到處都是殘骸。

{{tts en_US:debt}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】債務；欠款
【搭配詞】pay off debt / in debt / credit card debt
【例句】She's trying to pay off her student debt.
{{tts en_US:She's trying to pay off her student debt.}}
【用法說明】debt 指欠下的金錢或義務
【翻譯】她正努力還清學貸。

{{tts en_US:debut}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】初次登場；首次亮相
【搭配詞】make a debut / debut album / debut on stage
【例句】The singer made her debut last year.
{{tts en_US:The singer made her debut last year.}}
【用法說明】debut 指第一次公開登場或發表作品
【翻譯】那位歌手去年首次亮相。

{{tts en_US:decade}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】十年
【搭配詞】over the past decade / last decade / for decades
【例句】A lot has changed over the last decade.
{{tts en_US:A lot has changed over the last decade.}}
【用法說明】decade 指十年期間
【翻譯】過去十年改變了很多。

{{tts en_US:decay}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】腐壞；衰敗
【搭配詞】tooth decay / decay over time / signs of decay
【例句】Too much sugar can lead to tooth decay.
{{tts en_US:Too much sugar can lead to tooth decay.}}
【用法說明】decay 可指物體腐壞，也可指制度衰敗
【翻譯】吃太多糖會導致蛀牙。

{{tts en_US:deceive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】欺騙；誤導
【搭配詞】deceive someone / deceive the public / be deceived by
【例句】He tried to deceive his parents.
{{tts en_US:He tried to deceive his parents.}}
【用法說明】deceive 指故意讓人相信錯誤的事
【翻譯】他試著欺騙父母。

{{tts en_US:decent}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】不錯的；體面的；像樣的
【搭配詞】decent job / decent meal / pretty decent
【例句】The hotel was clean and decent.
{{tts en_US:The hotel was clean and decent.}}
【用法說明】decent 常用來形容品質還不錯、夠好
【翻譯】那家飯店乾淨又不錯。

{{tts en_US:decide}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】決定
【搭配詞】decide to / decide on / decide that
【例句】We decided to leave early.
{{tts en_US:We decided to leave early.}}
【用法說明】decide 可接 to V 或 on + 名詞
【翻譯】我們決定早點離開。

{{tts en_US:decision}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】決定
【搭配詞】make a decision / difficult decision / final decision
【例句】It was a hard decision to make.
{{tts en_US:It was a hard decision to make.}}
【用法說明】decision 指做出的選擇或判斷
【翻譯】那是一個很難做的決定。

{{tts en_US:decisive}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】果斷的；決定性的
【搭配詞】decisive action / decisive leader / decisive win
【例句】She took decisive action right away.
{{tts en_US:She took decisive action right away.}}
【用法說明】decisive 可形容人果斷，也可指影響關鍵結果
【翻譯】她立刻採取了果斷行動。

{{tts en_US:deck}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】甲板；平台；一副牌
【搭配詞】on the deck / card deck / wooden deck
【例句】We sat on the deck and watched the sunset.
{{tts en_US:We sat on the deck and watched the sunset.}}
【用法說明】deck 可指船甲板、陽台平台或一副牌
【翻譯】我們坐在平台上看日落。

{{tts en_US:declaration}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】宣言；宣布
【搭配詞】formal declaration / declaration of independence / make a declaration
【例句】The president made a public declaration.
{{tts en_US:The president made a public declaration.}}
【用法說明】declaration 指正式公開宣布的內容
【翻譯】總統做了一項公開聲明。

{{tts en_US:declare}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】宣布；聲明
【搭配詞】declare war / declare that / declare your income
【例句】They declared the event open.
{{tts en_US:They declared the event open.}}
【用法說明】declare 是較正式的『宣布』
【翻譯】他們宣布活動正式開始。

{{tts en_US:decline}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】下降；婉拒；衰退
【搭配詞】decline an offer / sales decline / health decline
【例句】She politely declined the invitation.
{{tts en_US:She politely declined the invitation.}}
【用法說明】decline 可指數量下降，也可指婉拒
【翻譯】她很有禮貌地婉拒了邀請。

{{tts en_US:decorate}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】裝飾；布置
【搭配詞】decorate the room / decorate with / decorate a cake
【例句】We decorated the room for the party.
{{tts en_US:We decorated the room for the party.}}
【用法說明】decorate 指讓空間或物品更好看
【翻譯】我們為派對布置了房間。

{{tts en_US:decoration}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】裝飾；裝飾品
【搭配詞】Christmas decoration / wall decoration / simple decoration
【例句】The table needs some decoration.
{{tts en_US:The table needs some decoration.}}
【用法說明】decoration 指裝飾本身或裝飾物
【翻譯】這張桌子需要一些裝飾。

{{tts en_US:decrease}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】減少；下降
【搭配詞】decrease by / sharp decrease / decrease the cost
【例句】Sales decreased last month.
{{tts en_US:Sales decreased last month.}}
【用法說明】decrease 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】上個月銷售下降了。

{{tts en_US:dedicate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】奉獻；致力於；獻給
【搭配詞】dedicate yourself to / dedicate time to / dedicate a book
【例句】She dedicated her life to teaching.
{{tts en_US:She dedicated her life to teaching.}}
【用法說明】dedicate 常表示全心投入
【翻譯】她把一生奉獻給教育。

{{tts en_US:dedication}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】奉獻；投入；題詞
【搭配詞】show dedication / hard work and dedication / with dedication
【例句】Her dedication impressed everyone.
{{tts en_US:Her dedication impressed everyone.}}
【用法說明】dedication 指長期投入與努力
【翻譯】她的投入讓大家印象深刻。

{{tts en_US:deduct}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】扣除；減去
【搭配詞】deduct from / deduct tax / deduct points
【例句】The fee will be deducted from your account.
{{tts en_US:The fee will be deducted from your account.}}
【用法說明】deduct 指從總額中扣除
【翻譯】這筆費用會從你的帳戶中扣除。

{{tts en_US:deed}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】行為；契約；地契
【搭配詞】good deed / do a deed / property deed
【例句】Helping her was a kind deed.
{{tts en_US:Helping her was a kind deed.}}
【用法說明】deed 常見於 good deed，表示善行
【翻譯】幫助她是一件善行。

{{tts en_US:deem}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】視為；認為
【搭配詞】deem it necessary / deem someone fit / be deemed
【例句】The judge deemed the evidence unreliable.
{{tts en_US:The judge deemed the evidence unreliable.}}
【用法說明】deem 是較正式的『認為』
【翻譯】法官認為那份證據不可靠。

{{tts en_US:deep}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】深的；深刻的
【搭配詞】deep water / deep sleep / deep breath
【例句】Take a deep breath and relax.
{{tts en_US:Take a deep breath and relax.}}
【用法說明】deep 可形容距離、程度或感受
【翻譯】深呼吸，放輕鬆。

{{tts en_US:deepen}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】加深；使更深
【搭配詞】deepen understanding / deepen the color / deepen relations
【例句】The discussion helped deepen my understanding.
{{tts en_US:The discussion helped deepen my understanding.}}
【用法說明】deepen 表示讓程度變得更深
【翻譯】那場討論幫助我加深理解。

{{tts en_US:deer}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】鹿
【搭配詞】wild deer / deer in the forest / herd of deer
【例句】We saw a deer near the road.
{{tts en_US:We saw a deer near the road.}}
【用法說明】deer 指鹿，單複數同形
【翻譯】我們在路邊看到一隻鹿。

{{tts en_US:default}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】預設；違約；默認值
【搭配詞】default setting / by default / default on a loan
【例句】The app uses dark mode by default.
{{tts en_US:The app uses dark mode by default.}}
【用法說明】default 常見意思是預設值
【翻譯】這個 app 預設使用深色模式。

{{tts en_US:defeat}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】擊敗；失敗
【搭配詞】suffer defeat / defeat the enemy / admit defeat
【例句】Our team was defeated in the final.
{{tts en_US:Our team was defeated in the final.}}
【用法說明】defeat 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】我們隊在決賽中被擊敗了。

{{tts en_US:defect}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】缺點；缺陷；脫離
【搭配詞】product defect / birth defect / defect from
【例句】The phone had a small defect in the screen.
{{tts en_US:The phone had a small defect in the screen.}}
【用法說明】defect 最常指產品缺陷
【翻譯】那支手機螢幕有一點小瑕疵。

{{tts en_US:defend}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】保衛；辯護
【搭配詞】defend yourself / defend the team / defend an idea
【例句】She defended her choice calmly.
{{tts en_US:She defended her choice calmly.}}
【用法說明】defend 可指實際保護，也可指為想法辯護
【翻譯】她很冷靜地為自己的選擇辯護。

{{tts en_US:defendant}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】被告
【搭配詞】criminal defendant / defendant in court / the defendant said
【例句】The defendant remained silent in court.
{{tts en_US:The defendant remained silent in court.}}
【用法說明】defendant 是法律語境中的被告
【翻譯】那名被告在法庭上保持沉默。

{{tts en_US:defense}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】防禦；辯護
【搭配詞】self-defense / national defense / in defense of
【例句】He spoke in defense of his friend.
{{tts en_US:He spoke in defense of his friend.}}
【用法說明】defense 可指防衛，也可指替人辯護
【翻譯】他發言替朋友辯護。

{{tts en_US:defensible}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】站得住腳的；可辯護的
【搭配詞】defensible position / legally defensible / morally defensible
【例句】The decision is legally defensible.
{{tts en_US:The decision is legally defensible.}}
【用法說明】defensible 指有合理依據、可辯護
【翻譯】這項決定在法律上站得住腳。

{{tts en_US:defensive}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】防禦的；有戒心的
【搭配詞】defensive player / get defensive / defensive attitude
【例句】He got defensive when I asked about it.
{{tts en_US:He got defensive when I asked about it.}}
【用法說明】defensive 也常形容人被問到時立刻防衛
【翻譯】我一問到那件事，他就開始防衛。

{{tts en_US:defiance}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】反抗；違抗
【搭配詞】in defiance of / act of defiance / open defiance
【例句】She refused in open defiance of the rule.
{{tts en_US:She refused in open defiance of the rule.}}
【用法說明】defiance 指公然不服從
【翻譯】她公然違抗那項規定。

{{tts en_US:deficit}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】赤字；不足額
【搭配詞】budget deficit / calorie deficit / trade deficit
【例句】The city is facing a large budget deficit.
{{tts en_US:The city is facing a large budget deficit.}}
【用法說明】deficit 指某種數量不足或財務赤字
【翻譯】這座城市正面臨大筆預算赤字。

{{tts en_US:define}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】定義；界定
【搭配詞】define a word / define success / clearly define
【例句】How would you define happiness?
{{tts en_US:How would you define happiness?}}
【用法說明】define 指說明某事的明確意義
【翻譯】你會怎麼定義幸福？

{{tts en_US:definite}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】明確的；一定的
【搭配詞】definite answer / definite plan / definite reason
【例句】I need a definite answer by Friday.
{{tts en_US:I need a definite answer by Friday.}}
【用法說明】definite 表示清楚明確，沒有模糊空間
【翻譯】我需要你在星期五前給我明確答覆。

{{tts en_US:definition}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】定義；解釋
【搭配詞】dictionary definition / clear definition / working definition
【例句】The dictionary gives two definitions of the word.
{{tts en_US:The dictionary gives two definitions of the word.}}
【用法說明】definition 指詞語或概念的解釋
【翻譯】字典給了這個字兩種定義。

{{tts en_US:definitive}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】最終的；權威性的
【搭配詞】definitive answer / definitive guide / definitive proof
【例句】We still don't have a definitive answer.
{{tts en_US:We still don't have a definitive answer.}}
【用法說明】definitive 表示最終、明確、無可爭議
【翻譯】我們仍然沒有最終答案。

{{tts en_US:defy}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】違抗；挑戰；使難以解釋
【搭配詞】defy the law / defy expectations / defy explanation
【例句】The result defied everyone's expectations.
{{tts en_US:The result defied everyone's expectations.}}
【用法說明】defy 可指反抗規則，也可指出乎預料
【翻譯】這個結果出乎所有人的預料。

{{tts en_US:degree}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】程度；學位；度數
【搭配詞】a high degree of / college degree / temperature degree
【例句】She has a degree in biology.
{{tts en_US:She has a degree in biology.}}
【用法說明】degree 有很多意思，常見是學位或程度
【翻譯】她有生物學學位。

{{tts en_US:delay}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】延誤；延遲
【搭配詞】flight delay / delay the plan / without delay
【例句】The train was delayed by the storm.
{{tts en_US:The train was delayed by the storm.}}
【用法說明】delay 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】火車因暴風雨而延誤。

{{tts en_US:delegate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】委派；代表
【搭配詞】delegate a task / conference delegate / delegate authority
【例句】She delegated the task to her assistant.
{{tts en_US:She delegated the task to her assistant.}}
【用法說明】delegate 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】她把這項工作交辦給助理。

{{tts en_US:delegation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】代表團；委派
【搭配詞】official delegation / business delegation / lead a delegation
【例句】A delegation from Japan visited the school.
{{tts en_US:A delegation from Japan visited the school.}}
【用法說明】delegation 指一群代表某個單位的人
【翻譯】一個來自日本的代表團參訪了學校。

{{tts en_US:deliberate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】故意的；慎重考慮
【搭配詞】deliberate choice / deliberate action / deliberate carefully
【例句】It was a deliberate decision, not an accident.
{{tts en_US:It was a deliberate decision, not an accident.}}
【用法說明】deliberate 可作形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】那是刻意做出的決定，不是意外。

{{tts en_US:delicate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】脆弱的；細緻的；棘手的
【搭配詞】delicate skin / delicate issue / delicate flower
【例句】This is a delicate situation.
{{tts en_US:This is a delicate situation.}}
【用法說明】delicate 可指易碎，也可指需要小心處理
【翻譯】這是一個棘手的情況。

{{tts en_US:delicious}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】好吃的；美味的
【搭配詞】delicious meal / smell delicious / absolutely delicious
【例句】The soup smells delicious.
{{tts en_US:The soup smells delicious.}}
【用法說明】delicious 用來稱讚食物很好吃
【翻譯】這湯聞起來好香。

{{tts en_US:delight}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】使開心；喜悅
【搭配詞】take delight in / delight the audience / with delight
【例句】The news delighted her family.
{{tts en_US:The news delighted her family.}}
【用法說明】delight 可作名詞或動詞，表示很大的開心
【翻譯】這個消息讓她的家人很開心。

{{tts en_US:delightful}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】令人愉快的；討喜的
【搭配詞】delightful evening / delightful child / simply delightful
【例句】We had a delightful evening together.
{{tts en_US:We had a delightful evening together.}}
【用法說明】delightful 形容讓人感到很愉快
【翻譯】我們一起度過了一個很愉快的晚上。

{{tts en_US:deliver}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】送達；交付；發表
【搭配詞】deliver a package / deliver a speech / deliver results
【例句】The driver delivered the package this morning.
{{tts en_US:The driver delivered the package this morning.}}
【用法說明】deliver 可指送貨、交付，也可指發表演說
【翻譯】司機今天早上把包裹送到了。

{{tts en_US:delivery}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】遞送；送貨；分娩
【搭配詞】free delivery / pizza delivery / express delivery
【例句】We paid extra for faster delivery.
{{tts en_US:We paid extra for faster delivery.}}
【用法說明】delivery 常指送貨服務
【翻譯】我們多付了一點錢換更快的配送。

{{tts en_US:demand}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】要求；需求
【搭配詞】in demand / demand an answer / customer demand
【例句】The manager demanded an explanation.
{{tts en_US:The manager demanded an explanation.}}
【用法說明】demand 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】經理要求一個解釋。

{{tts en_US:democracy}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】民主；民主制度
【搭配詞】support democracy / democracy and freedom / modern democracy
【例句】They talked about the value of democracy.
{{tts en_US:They talked about the value of democracy.}}
【用法說明】democracy 指由人民參與決策的制度
【翻譯】他們談到了民主的價值。

{{tts en_US:democrat}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】民主主義者；民主黨人
【搭配詞】young democrat / party democrat / local democrat
【例句】He describes himself as a democrat.
{{tts en_US:He describes himself as a democrat.}}
【用法說明】democrat 可指支持民主理念的人，也可指特定政黨成員
【翻譯】他形容自己是民主主義者。

{{tts en_US:democratic}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】民主的
【搭配詞】democratic system / democratic election / democratic value
【例句】Free elections are part of a democratic system.
{{tts en_US:Free elections are part of a democratic system.}}
【用法說明】democratic 形容制度或作法具民主性
【翻譯】自由選舉是民主制度的一部分。

{{tts en_US:demonstrate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】展示；證明；示威
【搭配詞】demonstrate how / demonstrate skill / demonstrate against
【例句】She demonstrated how to use the app.
{{tts en_US:She demonstrated how to use the app.}}
【用法說明】demonstrate 常指實際示範或證明
【翻譯】她示範了這個 app 要怎麼用。

{{tts en_US:demonstration}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】示範；示威；展示
【搭配詞】live demonstration / street demonstration / product demonstration
【例句】The teacher gave a short demonstration.
{{tts en_US:The teacher gave a short demonstration.}}
【用法說明】demonstration 可指教學示範或街頭示威
【翻譯】老師做了一個簡短示範。

{{tts en_US:denial}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】否認；拒絕承認
【搭配詞】in denial / official denial / denial of responsibility
【例句】His denial didn't convince anyone.
{{tts en_US:His denial didn't convince anyone.}}
【用法說明】denial 指對某事的否認
【翻譯】他的否認沒有說服任何人。

{{tts en_US:dense}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】密集的；濃密的；難懂的
【搭配詞】dense forest / dense traffic / dense writing
【例句】A dense fog covered the road.
{{tts en_US:A dense fog covered the road.}}
【用法說明】dense 可形容數量密集或內容難懂
【翻譯】濃霧覆蓋了整條道路。

{{tts en_US:density}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】密度；密集程度
【搭配詞】population density / density of the material / high density
【例句】The city has a high population density.
{{tts en_US:The city has a high population density.}}
【用法說明】density 指單位空間內的集中程度
【翻譯】這座城市的人口密度很高。

{{tts en_US:dental}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】牙科的；牙齒的
【搭配詞】dental care / dental clinic / dental checkup
【例句】I have a dental appointment tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:I have a dental appointment tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】dental 常用於牙科相關語境
【翻譯】我明天有牙科預約。

{{tts en_US:dentist}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】牙醫
【搭配詞】see a dentist / family dentist / visit the dentist
【例句】I need to see the dentist this week.
{{tts en_US:I need to see the dentist this week.}}
【用法說明】dentist 指牙科醫師
【翻譯】我這週得去看牙醫。

{{tts en_US:deny}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】否認；拒絕
【搭配詞】deny that / deny access / cannot deny
【例句】He denied taking the money.
{{tts en_US:He denied taking the money.}}
【用法說明】deny 可接名詞或 V-ing
【翻譯】他否認拿了那筆錢。

{{tts en_US:depart}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】離開；出發
【搭配詞】depart from / depart at noon / depart for
【例句】The train departs at 8:30.
{{tts en_US:The train departs at 8:30.}}
【用法說明】depart 是較正式的『出發』
【翻譯】火車八點半出發。
