{{tts en_US:department}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】部門；系；百貨部
【搭配詞】sales department / history department / department store
【例句】She works in the marketing department.
{{tts en_US:She works in the marketing department.}}
【用法說明】department 指組織內的部門
【翻譯】她在行銷部工作。

{{tts en_US:departure}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】出發；離開
【搭配詞】departure time / departure gate / delay in departure
【例句】Please arrive at the airport two hours before departure.
{{tts en_US:Please arrive at the airport two hours before departure.}}
【用法說明】departure 指交通工具出發或人的離開
【翻譯】請在出發前兩小時抵達機場。

{{tts en_US:depend}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】依靠；取決於
【搭配詞】depend on / depend heavily on / depend entirely
【例句】It depends on the weather.
{{tts en_US:It depends on the weather.}}
【用法說明】depend on = 取決於／依靠
【翻譯】那要看天氣。

{{tts en_US:dependent}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】依賴的；受扶養的
【搭配詞】dependent on / financially dependent / dependent child
【例句】Children are dependent on adults for care.
{{tts en_US:Children are dependent on adults for care.}}
【用法說明】dependent on = 依賴於
【翻譯】孩子在照顧上依賴大人。

{{tts en_US:depict}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】描繪；描述
【搭配詞】depict a scene / depict someone as / vividly depict
【例句】The painting depicts a quiet village.
{{tts en_US:The painting depicts a quiet village.}}
【用法說明】depict 常用於畫作、電影、文字中的描寫
【翻譯】這幅畫描繪了一個安靜的村莊。

{{tts en_US:deplete}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】耗盡；消耗
【搭配詞】deplete resources / deplete energy / severely depleted
【例句】Long meetings can deplete your energy.
{{tts en_US:Long meetings can deplete your energy.}}
【用法說明】deplete 表示逐漸用盡
【翻譯】冗長的會議會耗光你的精力。

{{tts en_US:deploy}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】部署；調派；使用
【搭配詞】deploy troops / deploy a system / deploy resources
【例句】The company deployed a new software system.
{{tts en_US:The company deployed a new software system.}}
【用法說明】deploy 可指調派人力，也可指正式啟用系統
【翻譯】那家公司部署了一套新的軟體系統。

{{tts en_US:deposit}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】存款；押金；存放
【搭配詞】security deposit / deposit money / make a deposit
【例句】We paid a deposit for the apartment.
{{tts en_US:We paid a deposit for the apartment.}}
【用法說明】deposit 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們付了那間公寓的押金。

{{tts en_US:depress}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】使沮喪；使蕭條
【搭配詞】depress the market / depress someone / deeply depress
【例句】Bad news always depresses him.
{{tts en_US:Bad news always depresses him.}}
【用法說明】depress 指讓人情緒低落
【翻譯】壞消息總是讓他很沮喪。

{{tts en_US:depression}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】憂鬱；蕭條；凹陷
【搭配詞】economic depression / severe depression / depression in the ground
【例句】She sought help for depression.
{{tts en_US:She sought help for depression.}}
【用法說明】depression 常指憂鬱症或情緒低落
【翻譯】她因為憂鬱而尋求協助。

{{tts en_US:deprive}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】剝奪；使失去
【搭配詞】deprive someone of / sleep-deprived / deprive the children of
【例句】Lack of sleep can deprive you of energy.
{{tts en_US:Lack of sleep can deprive you of energy.}}
【用法說明】deprive A of B = 使 A 失去 B
【翻譯】睡眠不足會讓你失去精力。

{{tts en_US:depth}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】深度；深處
【搭配詞】depth of the water / emotional depth / in depth
【例句】I don't know the depth of the pool.
{{tts en_US:I don't know the depth of the pool.}}
【用法說明】depth 指實際深度，也可比喻內容深度
【翻譯】我不知道泳池有多深。

{{tts en_US:deputy}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】副手；副職
【搭配詞】deputy mayor / deputy manager / deputy director
【例句】The deputy manager handled the meeting.
{{tts en_US:The deputy manager handled the meeting.}}
【用法說明】deputy 指主要負責人的副手
【翻譯】副理處理了那場會議。

{{tts en_US:derive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】得到；衍生
【搭配詞】derive from / derive meaning / derive pleasure from
【例句】Many English words derive from Latin.
{{tts en_US:Many English words derive from Latin.}}
【用法說明】derive from = 源自於
【翻譯】很多英文單字源自拉丁文。

{{tts en_US:descend}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】下降；下來；傳下來
【搭配詞】descend from / descend the stairs / descend into
【例句】We descended the stairs slowly.
{{tts en_US:We descended the stairs slowly.}}
【用法說明】descend 是較正式的『往下走／下降』
【翻譯】我們慢慢走下樓梯。

{{tts en_US:descent}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】下降；血統；家世
【搭配詞】rapid descent / of Chinese descent / descent into chaos
【例句】She is of Korean descent.
{{tts en_US:She is of Korean descent.}}
【用法說明】descent 可指往下降，也可指家族血統
【翻譯】她有韓裔血統。

{{tts en_US:describe}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】描述；形容
【搭配詞】describe the scene / describe as / describe in detail
【例句】Can you describe what happened?
{{tts en_US:Can you describe what happened?}}
【用法說明】describe 指把事情說明出來
【翻譯】你可以描述一下發生了什麼嗎？

{{tts en_US:description}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】描述；說明
【搭配詞】job description / short description / detailed description
【例句】The website gives a clear description of the product.
{{tts en_US:The website gives a clear description of the product.}}
【用法說明】description 指文字說明或描述內容
【翻譯】網站上對這項產品有清楚說明。

{{tts en_US:descriptive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】描述性的；描寫的
【搭配詞】descriptive writing / descriptive term / highly descriptive
【例句】Her writing is vivid and descriptive.
{{tts en_US:Her writing is vivid and descriptive.}}
【用法說明】descriptive 形容很會描寫細節
【翻譯】她的寫作生動又很有畫面感。

{{tts en_US:desert}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】沙漠；遺棄
【搭配詞】cross the desert / desert island / desert your friends
【例句】They drove through the desert for hours.
{{tts en_US:They drove through the desert for hours.}}
【用法說明】desert 作名詞時指沙漠；作動詞時重音不同
【翻譯】他們開車穿越沙漠好幾個小時。

{{tts en_US:deserve}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】值得；應得
【搭配詞】deserve respect / deserve a break / deserve to win
【例句】You deserve a good rest.
{{tts en_US:You deserve a good rest.}}
【用法說明】deserve 表示某人理應得到某事
【翻譯】你值得好好休息。

{{tts en_US:design}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】設計；圖樣
【搭配詞】design a logo / product design / by design
【例句】She designed the poster herself.
{{tts en_US:She designed the poster herself.}}
【用法說明】design 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那張海報是她自己設計的。

{{tts en_US:designer}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】設計師
【搭配詞】fashion designer / graphic designer / interior designer
【例句】He's a graphic designer at a small studio.
{{tts en_US:He's a graphic designer at a small studio.}}
【用法說明】designer 指從事設計工作的人
【翻譯】他是一間小工作室的平面設計師。

{{tts en_US:desirable}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】理想的；值得擁有的
【搭配詞】desirable job / highly desirable / desirable location
【例句】A quiet neighborhood is very desirable.
{{tts en_US:A quiet neighborhood is very desirable.}}
【用法說明】desirable 指讓人想要、很理想
【翻譯】安靜的社區很理想。

{{tts en_US:desire}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】渴望；想要
【搭配詞】strong desire / desire to / express a desire
【例句】She has a strong desire to learn.
{{tts en_US:She has a strong desire to learn.}}
【用法說明】desire 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她有很強的學習渴望。

{{tts en_US:desk}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】書桌；辦公桌
【搭配詞】office desk / clean your desk / front desk
【例句】My keys are on the desk.
{{tts en_US:My keys are on the desk.}}
【用法說明】desk 指書桌或辦公桌
【翻譯】我的鑰匙在桌上。

{{tts en_US:despair}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】絕望；感到絕望
【搭配詞】in despair / despair of / cry in despair
【例句】He looked at the mess in despair.
{{tts en_US:He looked at the mess in despair.}}
【用法說明】despair 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他絕望地看著那一團亂。

{{tts en_US:desperate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】絕望的；非常需要的
【搭配詞】desperate for / desperate situation / sound desperate
【例句】They were desperate for help.
{{tts en_US:They were desperate for help.}}
【用法說明】desperate for + 名詞 很常見
【翻譯】他們急需幫助。

{{tts en_US:despise}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】鄙視；看不起
【搭配詞】despise someone / despise cruelty / secretly despise
【例句】She despises people who lie.
{{tts en_US:She despises people who lie.}}
【用法說明】despise 是強烈的『看不起』
【翻譯】她很看不起說謊的人。

{{tts en_US:despite}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】儘管
【搭配詞】despite the rain / despite being tired / despite all that
【例句】Despite the rain, we went out.
{{tts en_US:Despite the rain, we went out.}}
【用法說明】despite 後面接名詞或 V-ing
【翻譯】儘管下雨，我們還是出門了。

{{tts en_US:dessert}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】甜點
【搭配詞】have dessert / dessert menu / chocolate dessert
【例句】We ordered dessert after dinner.
{{tts en_US:We ordered dessert after dinner.}}
【用法說明】dessert 指飯後甜點
【翻譯】我們晚餐後點了甜點。

{{tts en_US:destination}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】目的地
【搭配詞】final destination / tourist destination / reach your destination
【例句】What's your final destination?
{{tts en_US:What's your final destination?}}
【用法說明】destination 指旅行或運送的終點
【翻譯】你的最終目的地是哪裡？

{{tts en_US:destined}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】註定的；命中注定的
【搭配詞】destined to / be destined for / destined life
【例句】She felt destined to be a teacher.
{{tts en_US:She felt destined to be a teacher.}}
【用法說明】destined to = 註定會
【翻譯】她覺得自己註定要當老師。

{{tts en_US:destiny}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】命運
【搭配詞】change your destiny / sense of destiny / fate and destiny
【例句】Some people believe destiny can be changed.
{{tts en_US:Some people believe destiny can be changed.}}
【用法說明】destiny 指命運、人生走向
【翻譯】有些人相信命運是可以改變的。

{{tts en_US:destroy}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】破壞；毀掉
【搭配詞】destroy the building / completely destroy / destroy evidence
【例句】The fire destroyed the old house.
{{tts en_US:The fire destroyed the old house.}}
【用法說明】destroy 指徹底破壞
【翻譯】那場火燒毀了老房子。

{{tts en_US:destruction}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】破壞；毀滅
【搭配詞】cause destruction / mass destruction / destruction of property
【例句】The fire caused a lot of destruction.
{{tts en_US:The fire caused a lot of destruction.}}
【用法說明】destruction 指大規模破壞或毀損
【翻譯】那場火造成了很大的破壞。

{{tts en_US:destructive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】有破壞性的
【搭配詞】destructive behavior / destructive force / highly destructive
【例句】The storm was extremely destructive.
{{tts en_US:The storm was extremely destructive.}}
【用法說明】destructive 形容會造成傷害或破壞
【翻譯】那場暴風雨的破壞力非常強。

{{tts en_US:detach}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】拆下；分開；使脫離
【搭配詞】detach from / detach the label / feel detached
【例句】Please detach the form and return it.
{{tts en_US:Please detach the form and return it.}}
【用法說明】detach 表示把某物從原本位置分開
【翻譯】請把這張表格拆下來再交回。

{{tts en_US:detail}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】細節；詳述
【搭配詞】in detail / small detail / pay attention to detail
【例句】She explained the plan in detail.
{{tts en_US:She explained the plan in detail.}}
【用法說明】detail 可作名詞或動詞，常見是細節
【翻譯】她很詳細地說明了那個計畫。

{{tts en_US:detain}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】扣留；拘留
【搭配詞】detain someone / be detained / briefly detain
【例句】The police detained him for questioning.
{{tts en_US:The police detained him for questioning.}}
【用法說明】detain 是法律語境中的扣留
【翻譯】警方將他留置問話。

{{tts en_US:detect}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】察覺；偵測
【搭配詞】detect a problem / detect smoke / hard to detect
【例句】The test can detect the virus early.
{{tts en_US:The test can detect the virus early.}}
【用法說明】detect 指發現不容易察覺的事物
【翻譯】這項檢測可以及早驗出病毒。

{{tts en_US:detective}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】偵探；警探
【搭配詞】private detective / detective story / police detective
【例句】The detective looked for clues in the room.
{{tts en_US:The detective looked for clues in the room.}}
【用法說明】detective 指調查案件的人
【翻譯】那位警探在房間裡尋找線索。

{{tts en_US:detention}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】拘留；留校
【搭配詞】after-school detention / in detention / detention center
【例句】He got detention for fighting at school.
{{tts en_US:He got detention for fighting at school.}}
【用法說明】detention 可指法律拘留，也可指留校處分
【翻譯】他因為在學校打架被留校。

{{tts en_US:deter}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】阻止；嚇阻
【搭配詞】deter crime / deter someone from / fail to deter
【例句】High prices may deter people from buying.
{{tts en_US:High prices may deter people from buying.}}
【用法說明】deter A from B = 阻止 A 做 B
【翻譯】高價格可能會讓人不想買。

{{tts en_US:detergent}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】清潔劑；洗衣精
【搭配詞】laundry detergent / liquid detergent / dish detergent
【例句】We ran out of laundry detergent.
{{tts en_US:We ran out of laundry detergent.}}
【用法說明】detergent 指清洗衣物或餐具的清潔用品
【翻譯】我們的洗衣精用完了。

{{tts en_US:determination}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】決心；毅力
【搭配詞】show determination / great determination / with determination
【例句】Her determination helped her finish the race.
{{tts en_US:Her determination helped her finish the race.}}
【用法說明】determination 指持續努力到底的決心
【翻譯】她的決心幫助她跑完比賽。

{{tts en_US:determine}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】決定；查明；下定決心
【搭配詞】determine the cause / determine whether / be determined to
【例句】We need more time to determine the cause.
{{tts en_US:We need more time to determine the cause.}}
【用法說明】determine 可指查明，也可指決定
【翻譯】我們還需要更多時間查明原因。

{{tts en_US:develop}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】發展；培養；開發
【搭配詞】develop a skill / develop a plan / develop over time
【例句】She wants to develop her speaking skills.
{{tts en_US:She wants to develop her speaking skills.}}
【用法說明】develop 可指讓某事逐漸成長或成熟
【翻譯】她想培養自己的口說能力。

{{tts en_US:development}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】發展；開發
【搭配詞】child development / software development / economic development
【例句】The city has seen rapid development.
{{tts en_US:The city has seen rapid development.}}
【用法說明】development 指成長變化或開發過程
【翻譯】這座城市發展得很快。

{{tts en_US:device}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】裝置；設備
【搭配詞】mobile device / electronic device / safety device
【例句】This device can measure your heart rate.
{{tts en_US:This device can measure your heart rate.}}
【用法說明】device 指特定用途的機器或裝置
【翻譯】這個裝置可以測量你的心跳。

{{tts en_US:devil}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】惡魔；魔鬼
【搭配詞】the devil / devil costume / poor devil
【例句】The child dressed as a devil for Halloween.
{{tts en_US:The child dressed as a devil for Halloween.}}
【用法說明】devil 指宗教中的惡魔，也常見於比喻
【翻譯】那個孩子萬聖節打扮成小惡魔。

{{tts en_US:devise}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】設計；想出
【搭配詞】devise a plan / devise a method / carefully devise
【例句】They devised a new way to save time.
{{tts en_US:They devised a new way to save time.}}
【用法說明】devise 表示經過思考想出方法
【翻譯】他們想出了一個節省時間的新方法。

{{tts en_US:devote}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】奉獻；投入
【搭配詞】devote time to / devote yourself to / fully devote
【例句】She devotes a lot of time to her students.
{{tts en_US:She devotes a lot of time to her students.}}
【用法說明】devote A to B = 把 A 投入到 B
【翻譯】她花很多時間在學生身上。

{{tts en_US:devotion}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】奉獻；熱愛
【搭配詞】deep devotion / show devotion / devotion to family
【例句】His devotion to his work is obvious.
{{tts en_US:His devotion to his work is obvious.}}
【用法說明】devotion 指長期而真誠的投入
【翻譯】他對工作的投入顯而易見。

{{tts en_US:devour}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】狼吞虎嚥；吞沒
【搭配詞】devour a meal / devour books / flames devoured
【例句】The kids devoured the pizza in minutes.
{{tts en_US:The kids devoured the pizza in minutes.}}
【用法說明】devour 可比喻吃得很快或大量吸收
【翻譯】孩子們幾分鐘內就把披薩吃光了。

{{tts en_US:dew}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】露水
【搭配詞】morning dew / drops of dew / covered with dew
【例句】The grass was wet with morning dew.
{{tts en_US:The grass was wet with morning dew.}}
【用法說明】dew 指清晨附著在植物上的小水珠
【翻譯】草地上沾滿了晨露。

{{tts en_US:diabetes}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】糖尿病
【搭配詞】type 2 diabetes / diabetes care / have diabetes
【例句】Her father has diabetes.
{{tts en_US:Her father has diabetes.}}
【用法說明】diabetes 是常見慢性病名
【翻譯】她爸爸有糖尿病。

{{tts en_US:diagnose}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】診斷
【搭配詞】diagnose a disease / diagnose the problem / be diagnosed with
【例句】The doctor diagnosed him with the flu.
{{tts en_US:The doctor diagnosed him with the flu.}}
【用法說明】diagnose 可用於醫療，也可比喻找出問題
【翻譯】醫生診斷他得了流感。

{{tts en_US:diagnosis}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】診斷；判斷
【搭配詞】medical diagnosis / early diagnosis / receive a diagnosis
【例句】Early diagnosis can save lives.
{{tts en_US:Early diagnosis can save lives.}}
【用法說明】diagnosis 指醫師做出的診斷結果
【翻譯】及早診斷可以救命。

{{tts en_US:diagram}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】圖表；示意圖
【搭配詞】draw a diagram / simple diagram / flow diagram
【例句】The teacher drew a diagram on the board.
{{tts en_US:The teacher drew a diagram on the board.}}
【用法說明】diagram 指說明結構或流程的圖
【翻譯】老師在黑板上畫了一張示意圖。

{{tts en_US:dial}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】撥號；刻度盤
【搭配詞】dial a number / phone dial / turn the dial
【例句】She dialed my number by mistake.
{{tts en_US:She dialed my number by mistake.}}
【用法說明】dial 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】她不小心撥了我的電話。

{{tts en_US:dialect}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】方言
【搭配詞】local dialect / speak a dialect / regional dialect
【例句】My grandparents speak a local dialect.
{{tts en_US:My grandparents speak a local dialect.}}
【用法說明】dialect 指某地區使用的語言變體
【翻譯】我祖父母說的是一種地方方言。

{{tts en_US:dialogue}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】對話
【搭配詞】have a dialogue / dialogue between / open dialogue
【例句】The film's dialogue sounded natural.
{{tts en_US:The film's dialogue sounded natural.}}
【用法說明】dialogue 指角色或人與人之間的對話
【翻譯】那部電影的對白聽起來很自然。

{{tts en_US:diameter}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】直徑
【搭配詞】diameter of the circle / large diameter / measure the diameter
【例句】The table is one meter in diameter.
{{tts en_US:The table is one meter in diameter.}}
【用法說明】diameter 指圓的直徑
【翻譯】這張桌子的直徑是一公尺。

{{tts en_US:diamond}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】鑽石
【搭配詞】diamond ring / baseball diamond / real diamond
【例句】He gave her a diamond ring.
{{tts en_US:He gave her a diamond ring.}}
【用法說明】diamond 最常指鑽石
【翻譯】他送了她一枚鑽戒。

{{tts en_US:diaper}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】尿布
【搭配詞】change a diaper / baby diaper / diaper bag
【例句】The baby needs a clean diaper.
{{tts en_US:The baby needs a clean diaper.}}
【用法說明】diaper 指嬰兒尿布
【翻譯】那個寶寶需要換一片乾淨尿布。

{{tts en_US:diary}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】日記
【搭配詞】write a diary / keep a diary / diary entry
【例句】She writes in her diary every night.
{{tts en_US:She writes in her diary every night.}}
【用法說明】diary 指記錄日常生活的本子
【翻譯】她每天晚上都會寫日記。

{{tts en_US:dictate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】口述；命令；決定
【搭配詞】dictate a letter / dictate terms / circumstances dictate
【例句】The boss dictated a short email.
{{tts en_US:The boss dictated a short email.}}
【用法說明】dictate 可指口述內容，也可指強勢規定
【翻譯】老闆口述了一封短郵件。

{{tts en_US:dictation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】聽寫；口述
【搭配詞】take dictation / English dictation / dictation exercise
【例句】We had an English dictation in class.
{{tts en_US:We had an English dictation in class.}}
【用法說明】dictation 常見於語言學習中的聽寫
【翻譯】我們在課堂上做了英文聽寫。

{{tts en_US:dictator}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】獨裁者
【搭配詞】military dictator / former dictator / cruel dictator
【例句】The country was once ruled by a dictator.
{{tts en_US:The country was once ruled by a dictator.}}
【用法說明】dictator 指獨裁統治者
【翻譯】那個國家曾由一位獨裁者統治。

{{tts en_US:dictatorship}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】獨裁統治；專政
【搭配詞】military dictatorship / under dictatorship / oppose dictatorship
【例句】People protested against the dictatorship.
{{tts en_US:People protested against the dictatorship.}}
【用法說明】dictatorship 指由少數人專斷統治的制度
【翻譯】人們抗議那個獨裁政權。

{{tts en_US:dictionary}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】字典
【搭配詞】look it up in the dictionary / dictionary entry / online dictionary
【例句】I checked the word in the dictionary.
{{tts en_US:I checked the word in the dictionary.}}
【用法說明】dictionary 指字典
【翻譯】我在字典裡查了那個字。

{{tts en_US:die}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】死；熄滅；消失
【搭配詞】die young / phone died / die out
【例句】My phone died on the way home.
{{tts en_US:My phone died on the way home.}}
【用法說明】die 除了『死亡』，也常指設備沒電
【翻譯】我回家路上手機沒電了。

{{tts en_US:diesel}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】柴油
【搭配詞】diesel engine / diesel fuel / diesel truck
【例句】That truck runs on diesel.
{{tts en_US:That truck runs on diesel.}}
【用法說明】diesel 指柴油或柴油引擎
【翻譯】那台卡車是燒柴油的。

{{tts en_US:diet}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】飲食；節食
【搭配詞】balanced diet / go on a diet / healthy diet
【例句】I'm trying to eat a healthier diet.
{{tts en_US:I'm trying to eat a healthier diet.}}
【用法說明】diet 可指日常飲食，也可指減重飲食
【翻譯】我正在努力吃得更健康。

{{tts en_US:differ}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】不同；有差異
【搭配詞】differ from / differ in / opinions differ
【例句】My opinion differs from yours.
{{tts en_US:My opinion differs from yours.}}
【用法說明】differ from = 與…不同
【翻譯】我的看法和你不同。

{{tts en_US:difference}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】差異；不同
【搭配詞】big difference / make a difference / difference between
【例句】There's a big difference between the two plans.
{{tts en_US:There's a big difference between the two plans.}}
【用法說明】difference 指兩者之間的不同
【翻譯】這兩個方案差很多。

{{tts en_US:different}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】不同的
【搭配詞】different from / a different idea / completely different
【例句】This one looks different from the old one.
{{tts en_US:This one looks different from the old one.}}
【用法說明】different from 是最常見搭配
【翻譯】這個看起來和舊的不一樣。

{{tts en_US:differentiate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】區分；使有差異
【搭配詞】differentiate between / differentiate yourself / hard to differentiate
【例句】It's hard to differentiate the twins.
{{tts en_US:It's hard to differentiate the twins.}}
【用法說明】differentiate between A and B = 區分 A 和 B
【翻譯】很難分辨這對雙胞胎。

{{tts en_US:difficult}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】困難的；艱難的
【搭配詞】difficult task / very difficult / difficult to understand
【例句】This question is too difficult for me.
{{tts en_US:This question is too difficult for me.}}
【用法說明】difficult 形容事情不容易做到或理解
【翻譯】這題對我來說太難了。

{{tts en_US:difficulty}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】困難；難題
【搭配詞】have difficulty / with difficulty / financial difficulty
【例句】I had difficulty falling asleep.
{{tts en_US:I had difficulty falling asleep.}}
【用法說明】have difficulty + V-ing 很常見
【翻譯】我很難入睡。

{{tts en_US:dig}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】挖；翻找
【搭配詞】dig a hole / dig into / dig through a bag
【例句】The dog dug a hole in the yard.
{{tts en_US:The dog dug a hole in the yard.}}
【用法說明】dig 指用手或工具挖
【翻譯】那隻狗在院子裡挖了一個洞。

{{tts en_US:digest}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】消化；理解摘要
【搭配詞】digest food / digest the information / news digest
【例句】It took me time to digest the news.
{{tts en_US:It took me time to digest the news.}}
【用法說明】digest 可指消化食物，也可比喻吸收資訊
【翻譯】我花了一些時間消化那個消息。

{{tts en_US:digestion}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】消化
【搭配詞】help digestion / digestive system / poor digestion
【例句】Walking after dinner may help digestion.
{{tts en_US:Walking after dinner may help digestion.}}
【用法說明】digestion 指身體消化食物的過程
【翻譯】晚餐後散步可能有助於消化。

{{tts en_US:digital}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】數位的；數碼的
【搭配詞】digital camera / digital tools / digital file
【例句】The photos are stored in digital form.
{{tts en_US:The photos are stored in digital form.}}
【用法說明】digital 指以電子數據形式存在
【翻譯】這些照片以數位形式儲存。

{{tts en_US:dignity}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】尊嚴；體面
【搭配詞】human dignity / with dignity / lose your dignity
【例句】Everyone deserves to be treated with dignity.
{{tts en_US:Everyone deserves to be treated with dignity.}}
【用法說明】dignity 指人應有的尊嚴與體面
【翻譯】每個人都值得被有尊嚴地對待。

{{tts en_US:dilemma}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】兩難；進退兩難
【搭配詞】face a dilemma / moral dilemma / in a dilemma
【例句】I'm in a dilemma about whether to quit my job.
{{tts en_US:I'm in a dilemma about whether to quit my job.}}
【用法說明】dilemma 指兩個都不好選的情況
【翻譯】我正為要不要辭職感到兩難。

{{tts en_US:diligence}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】勤奮；認真
【搭配詞】show diligence / with diligence / hard work and diligence
【例句】Her diligence paid off in the end.
{{tts en_US:Her diligence paid off in the end.}}
【用法說明】diligence 指持續而認真的努力
【翻譯】她的勤奮最後得到了回報。

{{tts en_US:diligent}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】勤奮的；認真的
【搭配詞】diligent student / be diligent / diligent worker
【例句】He's a diligent student who never gives up.
{{tts en_US:He's a diligent student who never gives up.}}
【用法說明】diligent 形容做事踏實認真
【翻譯】他是個從不放棄、很認真的學生。

{{tts en_US:dim}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】昏暗的；使變暗
【搭配詞】dim light / dim room / dim the lights
【例句】The room was dim and quiet.
{{tts en_US:The room was dim and quiet.}}
【用法說明】dim 可形容光線昏暗，也可作動詞
【翻譯】那個房間昏暗又安靜。

{{tts en_US:dime}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】一角硬幣
【搭配詞】drop a dime / a dime short / on a dime
【例句】He found a dime on the sidewalk.
{{tts en_US:He found a dime on the sidewalk.}}
【用法說明】dime 是美國十美分硬幣
【翻譯】他在人行道上撿到一枚一角硬幣。

{{tts en_US:dimension}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】尺寸；面向；維度
【搭配詞】three dimensions / new dimension / dimension of the room
【例句】The table's dimensions are listed online.
{{tts en_US:The table's dimensions are listed online.}}
【用法說明】dimension 可指長寬高，也可指抽象面向
【翻譯】這張桌子的尺寸已列在線上。

{{tts en_US:diminish}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】減少；削弱
【搭配詞】diminish the value / diminish over time / gradually diminish
【例句】The pain began to diminish after a while.
{{tts en_US:The pain began to diminish after a while.}}
【用法說明】diminish 指程度逐漸減弱
【翻譯】過了一會兒，疼痛開始減輕。

{{tts en_US:dine}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】用餐；吃正餐
【搭配詞】dine out / dine with friends / fine dining
【例句】We dined at a small Italian restaurant.
{{tts en_US:We dined at a small Italian restaurant.}}
【用法說明】dine 是較正式的『用餐』
【翻譯】我們在一家小義式餐廳用餐。

{{tts en_US:dinner}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】晚餐；正餐
【搭配詞】have dinner / cook dinner / dinner table
【例句】We're having dinner at seven.
{{tts en_US:We're having dinner at seven.}}
【用法說明】dinner 最常指晚餐
【翻譯】我們七點吃晚餐。

{{tts en_US:dinosaur}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】恐龍
【搭配詞】huge dinosaur / dinosaur fossil / dinosaur museum
【例句】The kids loved the dinosaur exhibit.
{{tts en_US:The kids loved the dinosaur exhibit.}}
【用法說明】dinosaur 指恐龍
【翻譯】孩子們很喜歡那個恐龍展。

{{tts en_US:dip}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】沾；浸；短暫下降
【搭配詞】dip into / dip the bread / slight dip
【例句】She dipped the bread into the soup.
{{tts en_US:She dipped the bread into the soup.}}
【用法說明】dip 可指沾一下，也可指數值小幅下降
【翻譯】她把麵包沾了湯。

{{tts en_US:diploma}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】文憑；畢業證書
【搭配詞】high school diploma / receive a diploma / diploma ceremony
【例句】She received her diploma last week.
{{tts en_US:She received her diploma last week.}}
【用法說明】diploma 指學校發的正式證書
【翻譯】她上週拿到畢業證書。

{{tts en_US:diplomacy}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】外交；外交手腕
【搭配詞】international diplomacy / use diplomacy / skillful diplomacy
【例句】Good diplomacy can prevent conflict.
{{tts en_US:Good diplomacy can prevent conflict.}}
【用法說明】diplomacy 指國際外交或圓融應對
【翻譯】良好的外交手腕可以避免衝突。

{{tts en_US:diplomat}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】外交官
【搭配詞】senior diplomat / foreign diplomat / career diplomat
【例句】The diplomat arrived for the meeting this morning.
{{tts en_US:The diplomat arrived for the meeting this morning.}}
【用法說明】diplomat 指代表國家處理外交事務的人
【翻譯】那位外交官今天早上抵達參加會議。

{{tts en_US:diplomatic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】外交的；圓融的
【搭配詞】diplomatic relations / diplomatic answer / be diplomatic
【例句】She gave a diplomatic response.
{{tts en_US:She gave a diplomatic response.}}
【用法說明】diplomatic 可指外交，也可指說話圓融
【翻譯】她給了一個很圓融的回應。

{{tts en_US:direct}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】直接的；指導；指向
【搭配詞】direct flight / direct answer / direct someone to
【例句】Please be direct with me.
{{tts en_US:Please be direct with me.}}
【用法說明】direct 可作形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】請直接跟我說。

{{tts en_US:direction}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】方向；指示；指導
【搭配詞】ask for directions / wrong direction / follow directions
【例句】Can you give me directions to the station?
{{tts en_US:Can you give me directions to the station?}}
【用法說明】direction 可指方向，也可指說明
【翻譯】你可以告訴我去車站的路嗎？

{{tts en_US:directive}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】指示；命令
【搭配詞】new directive / follow the directive / official directive
【例句】The staff received a directive from management.
{{tts en_US:The staff received a directive from management.}}
【用法說明】directive 指正式指令
【翻譯】員工收到了管理層的指示。

{{tts en_US:director}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】主任；導演；董事
【搭配詞】movie director / art director / managing director
【例句】The director approved the proposal.
{{tts en_US:The director approved the proposal.}}
【用法說明】director 可指管理職，也可指導演
【翻譯】主管核准了這份提案。

{{tts en_US:directory}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】名錄；目錄
【搭配詞】phone directory / file directory / staff directory
【例句】I found her name in the staff directory.
{{tts en_US:I found her name in the staff directory.}}
【用法說明】directory 指整理好可查找的名單或資料夾目錄
【翻譯】我在員工名錄裡找到她的名字。

{{tts en_US:dirt}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】泥土；髒污
【搭配詞】dirt road / wipe off the dirt / covered in dirt
【例句】The kids came home covered in dirt.
{{tts en_US:The kids came home covered in dirt.}}
【用法說明】dirt 可指泥土，也可指髒東西
【翻譯】孩子們全身髒兮兮地回到家。

{{tts en_US:dirty}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】髒的
【搭配詞】dirty hands / dirty clothes / get dirty
【例句】My shoes got dirty in the rain.
{{tts en_US:My shoes got dirty in the rain.}}
【用法說明】dirty 形容不乾淨
【翻譯】我的鞋子在雨裡弄髒了。

{{tts en_US:disability}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】身心障礙；失能
【搭配詞】physical disability / learning disability / disability support
【例句】The school provides support for students with disabilities.
{{tts en_US:The school provides support for students with disabilities.}}
【用法說明】disability 指身體或心理功能上的障礙
【翻譯】學校為身心障礙學生提供支援。

{{tts en_US:disable}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使失去功能；停用
【搭配詞】disable the alarm / disable the account / permanently disable
【例句】You can disable notifications in the settings.
{{tts en_US:You can disable notifications in the settings.}}
【用法說明】disable 指讓系統或功能停止運作
【翻譯】你可以在設定裡停用通知。

{{tts en_US:disadvantage}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】缺點；不利條件
【搭配詞】main disadvantage / put at a disadvantage / compared disadvantage
【例句】The biggest disadvantage is the high cost.
{{tts en_US:The biggest disadvantage is the high cost.}}
【用法說明】disadvantage 指不利之處
【翻譯】最大的缺點是成本太高。

{{tts en_US:disagree}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】不同意
【搭配詞】disagree with / strongly disagree / politely disagree
【例句】I disagree with that idea.
{{tts en_US:I disagree with that idea.}}
【用法說明】disagree with + 人／事
【翻譯】我不同意那個想法。

{{tts en_US:disagreement}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】意見不合；爭執
【搭配詞】have a disagreement / serious disagreement / disagreement about
【例句】We had a disagreement about the schedule.
{{tts en_US:We had a disagreement about the schedule.}}
【用法說明】disagreement 指看法不同
【翻譯】我們對時程有不同意見。

{{tts en_US:disappear}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】消失；不見
【搭配詞】suddenly disappear / disappear from sight / disappear into
【例句】My keys seem to have disappeared.
{{tts en_US:My keys seem to have disappeared.}}
【用法說明】disappear 指從視線或存在中消失
【翻譯】我的鑰匙好像不見了。

{{tts en_US:disappoint}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】使失望
【搭配詞】disappoint someone / don't disappoint me / deeply disappoint
【例句】I don't want to disappoint my parents.
{{tts en_US:I don't want to disappoint my parents.}}
【用法說明】disappoint + 人
【翻譯】我不想讓我爸媽失望。

{{tts en_US:disappointment}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】失望；令人失望的事
【搭配詞】big disappointment / feel disappointment / source of disappointment
【例句】The result was a huge disappointment.
{{tts en_US:The result was a huge disappointment.}}
【用法說明】disappointment 指失望的感受或事情
【翻譯】這個結果讓人非常失望。

{{tts en_US:disapprove}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】不贊成；不認可
【搭配詞】disapprove of / strongly disapprove / parents disapprove
【例句】My parents disapprove of smoking.
{{tts en_US:My parents disapprove of smoking.}}
【用法說明】disapprove of + 人／事
【翻譯】我爸媽不贊成抽菸。

{{tts en_US:disaster}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】災難；慘事
【搭配詞】natural disaster / total disaster / avoid disaster
【例句】The trip turned into a disaster.
{{tts en_US:The trip turned into a disaster.}}
【用法說明】disaster 可指真正災害，也可比喻很糟的情況
【翻譯】這趟旅行變成了一場災難。

{{tts en_US:disastrous}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】災難性的；很糟的
【搭配詞】disastrous result / disastrous mistake / economically disastrous
【例句】The meeting was a disastrous waste of time.
{{tts en_US:The meeting was a disastrous waste of time.}}
【用法說明】disastrous 形容後果很糟
【翻譯】那場會議根本是災難性的浪費時間。

{{tts en_US:disbelief}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】不相信；懷疑
【搭配詞】in disbelief / shake your head in disbelief / with disbelief
【例句】She stared at the screen in disbelief.
{{tts en_US:She stared at the screen in disbelief.}}
【用法說明】disbelief 指難以相信的反應
【翻譯】她不敢相信地盯著螢幕看。

{{tts en_US:discard}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】丟棄；拋棄
【搭配詞】discard old clothes / discard the idea / safely discard
【例句】Please discard the damaged items.
{{tts en_US:Please discard the damaged items.}}
【用法說明】discard 是較正式的『丟掉』
【翻譯】請把損壞的物品丟掉。

{{tts en_US:discharge}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】出院；排出；釋放
【搭配詞】be discharged from / discharge water / discharge from the hospital
【例句】He was discharged from the hospital yesterday.
{{tts en_US:He was discharged from the hospital yesterday.}}
【用法說明】discharge 在醫療上常指出院
【翻譯】他昨天出院了。

{{tts en_US:disciple}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】門徒；追隨者
【搭配詞】disciple of / faithful disciple / devoted disciple
【例句】The book tells the story of a young disciple.
{{tts en_US:The book tells the story of a young disciple.}}
【用法說明】disciple 指追隨某位老師或信仰的人
【翻譯】那本書講述了一位年輕門徒的故事。

{{tts en_US:disciplinary}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】紀律的；懲戒的
【搭配詞】disciplinary action / disciplinary problem / disciplinary rule
【例句】The school took disciplinary action.
{{tts en_US:The school took disciplinary action.}}
【用法說明】disciplinary 常見於學校或職場處分
【翻譯】學校採取了懲戒措施。

{{tts en_US:discipline}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】紀律；訓練；管教
【搭配詞】self-discipline / lack discipline / discipline a child
【例句】Learning a language takes discipline.
{{tts en_US:Learning a language takes discipline.}}
【用法說明】discipline 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】學語言需要紀律。

{{tts en_US:disclose}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】揭露；透露
【搭配詞】disclose information / disclose the truth / refuse to disclose
【例句】The company refused to disclose the details.
{{tts en_US:The company refused to disclose the details.}}
【用法說明】disclose 是較正式的『揭露』
【翻譯】那家公司拒絕透露細節。

{{tts en_US:disclosure}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】揭露；公開
【搭配詞】full disclosure / public disclosure / financial disclosure
【例句】The report requires full disclosure.
{{tts en_US:The report requires full disclosure.}}
【用法說明】disclosure 指正式公開資訊
【翻譯】這份報告要求完整揭露資訊。

{{tts en_US:discomfort}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】不舒服；不適
【搭配詞】physical discomfort / cause discomfort / slight discomfort
【例句】I felt some discomfort in my back.
{{tts en_US:I felt some discomfort in my back.}}
【用法說明】discomfort 指輕微不適或不自在
【翻譯】我的背有些不舒服。

{{tts en_US:disconnect}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】斷開；中斷；脫節
【搭配詞】disconnect the cable / feel disconnected / internet disconnect
【例句】The call suddenly disconnected.
{{tts en_US:The call suddenly disconnected.}}
【用法說明】disconnect 可指連線中斷或感情疏離
【翻譯】那通電話突然斷線了。

{{tts en_US:discount}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】折扣
【搭配詞】discount price / student discount / offer a discount
【例句】We got a 20 percent discount.
{{tts en_US:We got a 20 percent discount.}}
【用法說明】discount 指折扣金額或比例
【翻譯】我們拿到了八折優惠。

{{tts en_US:discourse}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】論述；談話
【搭配詞】public discourse / political discourse / academic discourse
【例句】Social media has changed public discourse.
{{tts en_US:Social media has changed public discourse.}}
【用法說明】discourse 是較正式的『論述或談論方式』
【翻譯】社群媒體改變了公共論述。

{{tts en_US:discover}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】發現
【搭配詞】discover a place / discover that / newly discovered
【例句】We discovered a nice café near the station.
{{tts en_US:We discovered a nice café near the station.}}
【用法說明】discover 指原本不知道，後來發現
【翻譯】我們在車站附近發現了一家不錯的咖啡店。

{{tts en_US:discovery}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】發現
【搭配詞】new discovery / scientific discovery / make a discovery
【例句】The discovery surprised the whole team.
{{tts en_US:The discovery surprised the whole team.}}
【用法說明】discovery 指發現這件事或新發現的事物
【翻譯】這個發現讓整個團隊都很驚訝。

{{tts en_US:discreet}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】謹慎低調的；不張揚的
【搭配詞】be discreet / discreet service / discreet question
【例句】Please be discreet about this matter.
{{tts en_US:Please be discreet about this matter.}}
【用法說明】discreet 指說話做事低調謹慎
【翻譯】這件事請低調處理。

{{tts en_US:discriminate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】歧視；區別
【搭配詞】discriminate against / discriminate between / unfairly discriminate
【例句】It's wrong to discriminate against people because of their background.
{{tts en_US:It's wrong to discriminate against people because of their background.}}
【用法說明】discriminate against = 歧視
【翻譯】因為他人的背景而歧視他們是不對的。

{{tts en_US:discrimination}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】歧視；區別對待
【搭配詞】racial discrimination / gender discrimination / unfair discrimination
【例句】The company has strict rules against discrimination.
{{tts en_US:The company has strict rules against discrimination.}}
【用法說明】discrimination 常指不公平差別待遇
【翻譯】那家公司對歧視有嚴格規定。

{{tts en_US:discuss}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】討論
【搭配詞】discuss a plan / discuss with / openly discuss
【例句】Let's discuss it after lunch.
{{tts en_US:Let's discuss it after lunch.}}
【用法說明】discuss 可直接接討論的事物
【翻譯】我們午餐後再討論這件事吧。

{{tts en_US:discussion}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】討論；商談
【搭配詞】group discussion / have a discussion / open discussion
【例句】We had a useful discussion in class.
{{tts en_US:We had a useful discussion in class.}}
【用法說明】discussion 指交換意見的過程
【翻譯】我們在課堂上有一場很有幫助的討論。

{{tts en_US:disease}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】疾病
【搭配詞】heart disease / serious disease / prevent disease
【例句】Regular exercise can help prevent disease.
{{tts en_US:Regular exercise can help prevent disease.}}
【用法說明】disease 指疾病或病症
【翻譯】規律運動有助於預防疾病。

{{tts en_US:disgrace}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】恥辱；丟臉
【搭配詞】bring disgrace / public disgrace / a disgrace to
【例句】The scandal brought disgrace to the company.
{{tts en_US:The scandal brought disgrace to the company.}}
【用法說明】disgrace 指令人蒙羞的事
【翻譯】那場醜聞讓公司蒙羞。

{{tts en_US:disguise}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】偽裝；掩飾
【搭配詞】in disguise / disguise yourself / disguise the truth
【例句】He wore a hat and sunglasses as a disguise.
{{tts en_US:He wore a hat and sunglasses as a disguise.}}
【用法說明】disguise 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他戴帽子和太陽眼鏡來偽裝自己。

{{tts en_US:disgust}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】使噁心；厭惡
【搭配詞】disgust me / look at with disgust / feel disgust
【例句】The smell disgusted everyone in the room.
{{tts en_US:The smell disgusted everyone in the room.}}
【用法說明】disgust 可作動詞或名詞，表示強烈厭惡
【翻譯】那個味道讓房間裡每個人都很反感。

{{tts en_US:dish}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】盤子；一道菜
【搭配詞】wash the dishes / main dish / serve a dish
【例句】My favorite dish here is the curry chicken.
{{tts en_US:My favorite dish here is the curry chicken.}}
【用法說明】dish 可指餐盤，也可指一道料理
【翻譯】我最喜歡這裡的咖哩雞。

{{tts en_US:dishonest}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】不誠實的
【搭配詞】dishonest person / dishonest answer / be dishonest
【例句】It was dishonest to hide the truth.
{{tts en_US:It was dishonest to hide the truth.}}
【用法說明】dishonest 形容說謊或不誠實
【翻譯】隱瞞真相是不誠實的。

{{tts en_US:disk/disc}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】磁碟；光碟
【搭配詞】hard disk / compact disc / disk drive
【例句】The file is saved on an external disk.
{{tts en_US:The file is saved on an external disk.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 disk 和 disc 放在一起
【翻譯】那個檔案存放在外接磁碟裡。

{{tts en_US:dislike}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】不喜歡；反感
【搭配詞】dislike doing / strongly dislike / dislike the idea
【例句】I dislike waking up early on weekends.
{{tts en_US:I dislike waking up early on weekends.}}
【用法說明】dislike 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】我不喜歡週末還要早起。

{{tts en_US:dismay}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】沮喪；驚愕
【搭配詞】to my dismay / with dismay / show dismay
【例句】To my dismay, the shop was already closed.
{{tts en_US:To my dismay, the shop was already closed.}}
【用法說明】dismay 指失望又錯愕的感受
【翻譯】讓我很傻眼的是，那家店已經關了。

{{tts en_US:dismiss}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】解散；開除；不理會
【搭配詞】dismiss an idea / dismiss the class / dismiss an employee
【例句】The teacher dismissed the class early.
{{tts en_US:The teacher dismissed the class early.}}
【用法說明】dismiss 可表示讓人離開或不予理會
【翻譯】老師提早下課了。

{{tts en_US:disorder}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】混亂；疾病；失調
【搭配詞】eating disorder / in disorder / mental disorder
【例句】The room was in complete disorder.
{{tts en_US:The room was in complete disorder.}}
【用法說明】disorder 可指凌亂狀態，也可指身心失調
【翻譯】那個房間亂成一團。

{{tts en_US:dispensable}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】可有可無的；非必要的
【搭配詞】dispensable item / seem dispensable / not dispensable
【例句】This step may seem dispensable, but it matters.
{{tts en_US:This step may seem dispensable, but it matters.}}
【用法說明】dispensable 指不是必需的
【翻譯】這個步驟看起來可省，但其實很重要。

{{tts en_US:dispense}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】分發；配發
【搭配詞】dispense medicine / dispense with / dispense advice
【例句】The machine dispenses hot coffee.
{{tts en_US:The machine dispenses hot coffee.}}
【用法說明】dispense 指自動發放或分配
【翻譯】那台機器會供應熱咖啡。

{{tts en_US:display}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】展示；顯示
【搭配詞】display a photo / on display / display the result
【例句】The museum displays local artwork.
{{tts en_US:The museum displays local artwork.}}
【用法說明】display 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】那間博物館展示當地藝術作品。

{{tts en_US:disposable}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】一次性的；可拋棄的
【搭配詞】disposable cup / disposable income / disposable gloves
【例句】We used disposable cups at the picnic.
{{tts en_US:We used disposable cups at the picnic.}}
【用法說明】disposable 最常指用完就丟的一次性用品
【翻譯】我們野餐時用了免洗杯。

{{tts en_US:disposal}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】處理；清除
【搭配詞】waste disposal / at your disposal / garbage disposal
【例句】Proper waste disposal is important.
{{tts en_US:Proper waste disposal is important.}}
【用法說明】disposal 指清除或處理某物
【翻譯】妥善處理垃圾很重要。

{{tts en_US:dispose}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】處理；安排；使傾向於
【搭配詞】dispose of / dispose the furniture / be disposed to
【例句】Please dispose of the trash properly.
{{tts en_US:Please dispose of the trash properly.}}
【用法說明】dispose of = 處理掉、丟棄
【翻譯】請妥善處理垃圾。

{{tts en_US:dispute}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】爭議；爭論
【搭配詞】settle a dispute / legal dispute / dispute over
【例句】The two companies are in a dispute over money.
{{tts en_US:The two companies are in a dispute over money.}}
【用法說明】dispute 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那兩家公司因為錢的問題起了爭議。

{{tts en_US:disrupt}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】打亂；擾亂
【搭配詞】disrupt the class / disrupt traffic / disrupt the market
【例句】The storm disrupted train service.
{{tts en_US:The storm disrupted train service.}}
【用法說明】disrupt 指讓原本正常進行的事中斷
【翻譯】暴風雨打亂了火車服務。

{{tts en_US:dissent}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】異議；不同意見
【搭配詞】voice dissent / political dissent / in dissent
【例句】Some members expressed dissent during the meeting.
{{tts en_US:Some members expressed dissent during the meeting.}}
【用法說明】dissent 指公開表達不同意
【翻譯】有些成員在會議中表達了異議。

{{tts en_US:dissolve}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】溶解；解散
【搭配詞】dissolve in water / dissolve the team / begin to dissolve
【例句】The sugar dissolved in the tea.
{{tts en_US:The sugar dissolved in the tea.}}
【用法說明】dissolve 可指物質溶解，也可指組織解散
【翻譯】糖在茶裡溶解了。

{{tts en_US:distance}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】距離；疏遠
【搭配詞】long distance / keep your distance / in the distance
【例句】The station is within walking distance.
{{tts en_US:The station is within walking distance.}}
【用法說明】distance 可指實際距離，也可比喻關係疏遠
【翻譯】車站在步行可到的距離內。

{{tts en_US:distant}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】遙遠的；疏遠的
【搭配詞】distant relative / distant sound / distant future
【例句】We could hear a distant train.
{{tts en_US:We could hear a distant train.}}
【用法說明】distant 可指空間遙遠，也可指關係不親近
【翻譯】我們聽得到遠處火車的聲音。

{{tts en_US:distinct}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】明顯不同的；清楚的
【搭配詞】distinct difference / distinct smell / clearly distinct
【例句】There is a distinct difference between the two.
{{tts en_US:There is a distinct difference between the two.}}
【用法說明】distinct 強調容易分辨的不同
【翻譯】這兩者有很明顯的差別。

{{tts en_US:distinction}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】區別；卓越；榮譽
【搭配詞】make a distinction / with distinction / important distinction
【例句】There's an important distinction between the two terms.
{{tts en_US:There's an important distinction between the two terms.}}
【用法說明】distinction 指差別或傑出表現
【翻譯】這兩個詞之間有個重要區別。

{{tts en_US:distinctive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】有特色的；獨特的
【搭配詞】distinctive style / distinctive voice / highly distinctive
【例句】Her paintings have a distinctive style.
{{tts en_US:Her paintings have a distinctive style.}}
【用法說明】distinctive 指一看就有特色
【翻譯】她的畫風很有個人特色。

{{tts en_US:distinguish}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】區分；辨別；使出眾
【搭配詞】distinguish between / distinguish yourself / hard to distinguish
【例句】It's hard to distinguish the twins.
{{tts en_US:It's hard to distinguish the twins.}}
【用法說明】distinguish between A and B = 區分 A 和 B
【翻譯】這對雙胞胎很難分辨。

{{tts en_US:distinguished}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】傑出的；卓越的
【搭配詞】distinguished guest / distinguished career / look distinguished
【例句】He had a long and distinguished career.
{{tts en_US:He had a long and distinguished career.}}
【用法說明】distinguished 形容成就出眾、受人尊敬
【翻譯】他擁有一段長久而傑出的職涯。

{{tts en_US:distract}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】分心；轉移注意力
【搭配詞】distract someone / distract from / get distracted
【例句】The noise distracted me from my work.
{{tts en_US:The noise distracted me from my work.}}
【用法說明】distract 指讓人無法專心
【翻譯】那個噪音讓我工作分心。

{{tts en_US:distraction}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】分心；使人分心的事
【搭配詞】major distraction / avoid distractions / source of distraction
【例句】My phone is a big distraction when I study.
{{tts en_US:My phone is a big distraction when I study.}}
【用法說明】distraction 指讓人分心的東西
【翻譯】我讀書時手機很容易讓我分心。

{{tts en_US:distress}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】痛苦；苦惱；使痛苦
【搭配詞】emotional distress / in distress / distress signal
【例句】She was clearly in distress.
{{tts en_US:She was clearly in distress.}}
【用法說明】distress 指強烈的不安或痛苦
【翻譯】她顯然很痛苦。

{{tts en_US:distribute}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】分發；分配
【搭配詞】distribute food / distribute the flyers / evenly distribute
【例句】They distributed free drinks to the runners.
{{tts en_US:They distributed free drinks to the runners.}}
【用法說明】distribute 指把東西分給很多人
【翻譯】他們把免費飲料發給跑者。

{{tts en_US:distribution}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】分配；分發；分布
【搭配詞】income distribution / product distribution / normal distribution
【例句】The company handles product distribution nationwide.
{{tts en_US:The company handles product distribution nationwide.}}
【用法說明】distribution 指分配或運送出去的方式
【翻譯】那家公司負責全國的商品配送。

{{tts en_US:district}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】區；行政區
【搭配詞】school district / shopping district / business district
【例句】She lives in a quiet district of the city.
{{tts en_US:She lives in a quiet district of the city.}}
【用法說明】district 指城市或行政劃分區域
【翻譯】她住在城市裡一個安靜的區域。

{{tts en_US:disturb}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】打擾；使不安
【搭配詞】disturb someone / don't disturb / disturb the peace
【例句】Sorry to disturb you so late.
{{tts en_US:Sorry to disturb you so late.}}
【用法說明】disturb 指打擾別人或讓人心神不寧
【翻譯】不好意思這麼晚打擾你。

{{tts en_US:disturbance}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】打擾；騷動；干擾
【搭配詞】noise disturbance / public disturbance / minor disturbance
【例句】The loud music caused a disturbance.
{{tts en_US:The loud music caused a disturbance.}}
【用法說明】disturbance 指讓人不安的騷動或干擾
【翻譯】那個大聲音樂引起了騷動。

{{tts en_US:ditch}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】溝渠；拋棄；甩掉
【搭配詞】roadside ditch / ditch a plan / ditch school
【例句】We ditched the original plan and stayed home.
{{tts en_US:We ditched the original plan and stayed home.}}
【用法說明】ditch 在口語裡常表示放棄或甩掉
【翻譯】我們放棄了原本的計畫，改待在家。

{{tts en_US:dive}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】跳水；潛水；俯衝
【搭配詞】dive into / dive underwater / take a dive
【例句】He dived into the pool.
{{tts en_US:He dived into the pool.}}
【用法說明】dive 指跳入水中或快速俯衝
【翻譯】他跳進了游泳池。

{{tts en_US:diverse}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】多樣的；多元的
【搭配詞】diverse group / diverse opinions / culturally diverse
【例句】The class is made up of students from diverse backgrounds.
{{tts en_US:The class is made up of students from diverse backgrounds.}}
【用法說明】diverse 指種類、背景等很多樣
【翻譯】這個班由來自多元背景的學生組成。

{{tts en_US:diversify}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使多樣化
【搭配詞】diversify the business / diversify investments / diversify the team
【例句】The company wants to diversify its products.
{{tts en_US:The company wants to diversify its products.}}
【用法說明】diversify 指讓內容更豐富多元
【翻譯】那家公司想讓產品更多元。

{{tts en_US:diversion}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】轉移；繞道；消遣
【搭配詞】traffic diversion / welcome diversion / create a diversion
【例句】There was a diversion because of road work.
{{tts en_US:There was a diversion because of road work.}}
【用法說明】diversion 常指改道，也可指轉移注意力
【翻譯】因為道路施工，所以改道了。

{{tts en_US:diversity}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】多樣性；多元性
【搭配詞】cultural diversity / diversity of ideas / promote diversity
【例句】The company values diversity in the workplace.
{{tts en_US:The company values diversity in the workplace.}}
【用法說明】diversity 指不同背景與觀點的多元
【翻譯】那家公司重視職場多元性。

{{tts en_US:divert}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】轉移；使改道
【搭配詞】divert traffic / divert attention / divert the river
【例句】The police diverted traffic around the accident.
{{tts en_US:The police diverted traffic around the accident.}}
【用法說明】divert 指把方向或注意力轉開
【翻譯】警方把車流導離事故現場。

{{tts en_US:divide}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】分開；分配；除
【搭配詞】divide into / divide the cake / divide by
【例句】Let's divide the work equally.
{{tts en_US:Let's divide the work equally.}}
【用法說明】divide 指分割或分配
【翻譯】我們把工作平均分一分吧。

{{tts en_US:dividend}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】股息；紅利
【搭配詞】pay dividends / stock dividend / receive a dividend
【例句】The company paid a small dividend this year.
{{tts en_US:The company paid a small dividend this year.}}
【用法說明】dividend 指投資分紅
【翻譯】那家公司今年發了小額股息。

{{tts en_US:divine}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】神聖的；極好的
【搭配詞】divine power / look divine / divine love
【例句】The dessert tasted divine.
{{tts en_US:The dessert tasted divine.}}
【用法說明】divine 除了神聖，也常口語表示『超棒』
【翻譯】那道甜點好吃到不行。

{{tts en_US:division}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】分開；部門；除法
【搭配詞】sales division / division of labor / long division
【例句】She works in the sales division.
{{tts en_US:She works in the sales division.}}
【用法說明】division 可指組織裡的部門，也可指分割
【翻譯】她在業務部工作。

{{tts en_US:divorce}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】離婚；與…離婚
【搭配詞】get a divorce / file for divorce / divorce someone
【例句】They decided to get a divorce last year.
{{tts en_US:They decided to get a divorce last year.}}
【用法說明】divorce 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他們去年決定離婚。

{{tts en_US:dizzy}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】頭暈的；暈眩的
【搭配詞】feel dizzy / get dizzy / dizzy spell
【例句】I felt dizzy after standing up too quickly.
{{tts en_US:I felt dizzy after standing up too quickly.}}
【用法說明】dizzy 指頭暈、站不穩的感覺
【翻譯】我站起來太快，感到頭暈。

{{tts en_US:do}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】做
【搭配詞】do homework / do the dishes / do your best
【例句】I need to do my homework tonight.
{{tts en_US:I need to do my homework tonight.}}
【用法說明】do 是最常見的基本動詞之一
【翻譯】我今晚得寫作業。

{{tts en_US:dock}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】碼頭；停靠
【搭配詞】at the dock / dock the boat / loading dock
【例句】The boat was tied up at the dock.
{{tts en_US:The boat was tied up at the dock.}}
【用法說明】dock 指船隻停靠的碼頭
【翻譯】那艘船停靠在碼頭。

{{tts en_US:doctor/doc}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】醫生
【搭配詞】see a doctor / family doctor / doctor's office
【例句】You should see a doctor if the pain gets worse.
{{tts en_US:You should see a doctor if the pain gets worse.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 doctor 和 doc 放在一起
【翻譯】如果疼痛變嚴重，你應該去看醫生。

{{tts en_US:doctrine}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】學說；信條
【搭配詞】political doctrine / religious doctrine / official doctrine
【例句】The book explains the basic doctrine of the movement.
{{tts en_US:The book explains the basic doctrine of the movement.}}
【用法說明】doctrine 指一套正式信念或原則
【翻譯】那本書解釋了這個運動的基本信條。

{{tts en_US:document}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】文件；紀錄
【搭配詞】official document / document the process / travel document
【例句】Please send me the document by email.
{{tts en_US:Please send me the document by email.}}
【用法說明】document 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】請用電子郵件把文件寄給我。

{{tts en_US:documentary}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】紀錄片
【搭配詞】watch a documentary / nature documentary / documentary film
【例句】We watched a documentary about whales.
{{tts en_US:We watched a documentary about whales.}}
【用法說明】documentary 指紀錄真實事件的影片
【翻譯】我們看了一部關於鯨魚的紀錄片。

{{tts en_US:dodge}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】閃開；躲避
【搭配詞】dodge a question / dodge the ball / dodge traffic
【例句】He dodged the ball at the last second.
{{tts en_US:He dodged the ball at the last second.}}
【用法說明】dodge 指快速閃開或迴避
【翻譯】他在最後一秒閃過了球。

{{tts en_US:dog}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】狗
【搭配詞】pet dog / dog food / walk the dog
【例句】The dog is sleeping by the door.
{{tts en_US:The dog is sleeping by the door.}}
【用法說明】dog 指狗
【翻譯】那隻狗正在門邊睡覺。

{{tts en_US:doll}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】洋娃娃
【搭配詞】baby doll / doll house / play with dolls
【例句】She kept her favorite doll on the bed.
{{tts en_US:She kept her favorite doll on the bed.}}
【用法說明】doll 指玩具娃娃
【翻譯】她把最喜歡的洋娃娃放在床上。

{{tts en_US:dollar}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】元；美元
【搭配詞】ten dollars / US dollar / dollar bill
【例句】This book costs fifteen dollars.
{{tts en_US:This book costs fifteen dollars.}}
【用法說明】dollar 是常見貨幣單位
【翻譯】這本書十五美元。

{{tts en_US:dolphin}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】海豚
【搭配詞】see a dolphin / dolphin show / wild dolphin
【例句】We saw dolphins near the boat.
{{tts en_US:We saw dolphins near the boat.}}
【用法說明】dolphin 指海豚
【翻譯】我們在船邊看到了海豚。

{{tts en_US:domain}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】領域；網域；範圍
【搭配詞】public domain / online domain / area of domain
【例句】Teaching is not really my domain.
{{tts en_US:Teaching is not really my domain.}}
【用法說明】domain 可指專長領域或網域名稱
【翻譯】教學其實不是我的專長領域。

{{tts en_US:dome}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】圓頂；穹頂
【搭配詞】glass dome / under the dome / dome roof
【例句】The old church has a beautiful dome.
{{tts en_US:The old church has a beautiful dome.}}
【用法說明】dome 指建築物圓弧形屋頂
【翻譯】那座老教堂有一個很漂亮的圓頂。

{{tts en_US:domestic}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】國內的；家用的；家庭的
【搭配詞】domestic flight / domestic violence / domestic product
【例句】We took a domestic flight to Kaohsiung.
{{tts en_US:We took a domestic flight to Kaohsiung.}}
【用法說明】domestic 常指國內，也可指家庭相關
【翻譯】我們搭國內航班去高雄。

{{tts en_US:dominant}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】主導的；占優勢的
【搭配詞】dominant role / dominant hand / dominant species
【例句】Blue is the dominant color in the painting.
{{tts en_US:Blue is the dominant color in the painting.}}
【用法說明】dominant 指最明顯或最有影響力
【翻譯】藍色是那幅畫裡的主色。

{{tts en_US:dominate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】主導；支配；佔優勢
【搭配詞】dominate the market / dominate the conversation / dominate the game
【例句】One company dominates the local market.
{{tts en_US:One company dominates the local market.}}
【用法說明】dominate 指在某範圍中占明顯優勢
【翻譯】有一家公司主導了當地市場。

{{tts en_US:donate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】捐贈
【搭配詞】donate money / donate blood / donate clothes
【例句】We donated clothes to the shelter.
{{tts en_US:We donated clothes to the shelter.}}
【用法說明】donate 指把物品或金錢捐出去
【翻譯】我們把衣服捐給了收容所。

{{tts en_US:donation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】捐款；捐贈物
【搭配詞】charity donation / make a donation / food donation
【例句】The school received a large donation.
{{tts en_US:The school received a large donation.}}
【用法說明】donation 指捐出的金錢或物品
【翻譯】學校收到了一筆大額捐款。

{{tts en_US:donkey}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】驢子
【搭配詞】ride a donkey / stubborn donkey / little donkey
【例句】The farmer used a donkey to carry bags.
{{tts en_US:The farmer used a donkey to carry bags.}}
【用法說明】donkey 指驢子
【翻譯】那位農夫用驢子搬運袋子。

{{tts en_US:donor}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】捐贈者；捐助者
【搭配詞】blood donor / organ donor / major donor
【例句】Every blood donor helps save lives.
{{tts en_US:Every blood donor helps save lives.}}
【用法說明】donor 指捐出血液、器官或金錢的人
【翻譯】每位捐血者都在幫助救人。

{{tts en_US:doom}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】厄運；毀滅；注定失敗
【搭配詞】spell doom / doom the plan / sense of doom
【例句】The storm seemed to doom their trip.
{{tts en_US:The storm seemed to doom their trip.}}
【用法說明】doom 可指毀滅，也可作動詞表示註定失敗
【翻譯】那場暴風雨似乎注定要毀掉他們的旅行。

{{tts en_US:door}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】門
【搭配詞】open the door / front door / knock on the door
【例句】Someone knocked on the door.
{{tts en_US:Someone knocked on the door.}}
【用法說明】door 指門
【翻譯】有人在敲門。

{{tts en_US:doorway}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】門口；出入口
【搭配詞】stand in the doorway / narrow doorway / doorway to
【例句】He stood in the doorway and smiled.
{{tts en_US:He stood in the doorway and smiled.}}
【用法說明】doorway 指門的開口處
【翻譯】他站在門口微笑。

{{tts en_US:dormitory/dorm}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】宿舍
【搭配詞】college dorm / live in a dorm / dorm room
【例句】She lives in a dorm near campus.
{{tts en_US:She lives in a dorm near campus.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 dormitory 和 dorm 放在一起
【翻譯】她住在校園附近的宿舍。

{{tts en_US:dose}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】一劑；一次用量
【搭配詞】daily dose / take a dose / dose of medicine
【例句】Take one dose after dinner.
{{tts en_US:Take one dose after dinner.}}
【用法說明】dose 指藥物一次服用的量
【翻譯】晚餐後服用一劑。

{{tts en_US:dot}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】點；小圓點
【搭配詞】dot the line / black dot / dot pattern
【例句】There's a small dot on the screen.
{{tts en_US:There's a small dot on the screen.}}
【用法說明】dot 指小點點
【翻譯】螢幕上有一個小點。

{{tts en_US:double}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】雙倍的；加倍
【搭配詞】double room / double the amount / double check
【例句】The price has doubled this year.
{{tts en_US:The price has doubled this year.}}
【用法說明】double 可作形容詞、名詞或動詞
【翻譯】價格今年翻倍了。

{{tts en_US:doubt}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】懷疑；不確定
【搭配詞】have doubts / no doubt / doubt that
【例句】I doubt he'll arrive on time.
{{tts en_US:I doubt he'll arrive on time.}}
【用法說明】doubt 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我懷疑他能不能準時到。

{{tts en_US:doubtful}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】懷疑的；不太可能的
【搭配詞】be doubtful about / highly doubtful / look doubtful
【例句】It's doubtful that we'll finish today.
{{tts en_US:It's doubtful that we'll finish today.}}
【用法說明】doubtful 指心存懷疑或可能性低
【翻譯】我們今天完成的可能性不大。

{{tts en_US:dough}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】麵團
【搭配詞】pizza dough / knead the dough / bread dough
【例句】She made the dough from scratch.
{{tts en_US:She made the dough from scratch.}}
【用法說明】dough 指做麵包、披薩前的麵團
【翻譯】她從頭開始揉麵團。

{{tts en_US:doughnut}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】甜甜圈
【搭配詞】chocolate doughnut / box of doughnuts / doughnut shop
【例句】He bought a doughnut with his coffee.
{{tts en_US:He bought a doughnut with his coffee.}}
【用法說明】doughnut 指甜甜圈
【翻譯】他買了一個甜甜圈配咖啡。

{{tts en_US:dove}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】鴿子
【搭配詞】white dove / dove in the park / symbol of peace
【例句】A dove landed on the roof.
{{tts en_US:A dove landed on the roof.}}
【用法說明】dove 指鴿子
【翻譯】一隻鴿子停在屋頂上。

{{tts en_US:down}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】向下；在下方；低落
【搭配詞】sit down / fall down / look down
【例句】Please write your name down.
{{tts en_US:Please write your name down.}}
【用法說明】down 用法很多，常表示向下或完成記錄
【翻譯】請把你的名字寫下來。

{{tts en_US:download}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】下載
【搭配詞】download an app / download a file / finish downloading
【例句】I downloaded the file last night.
{{tts en_US:I downloaded the file last night.}}
【用法說明】download 指從網路把檔案存到裝置
【翻譯】我昨晚把那個檔案下載下來了。

{{tts en_US:downstairs}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】樓下；在樓下
【搭配詞】go downstairs / wait downstairs / downstairs room
【例句】I'll meet you downstairs.
{{tts en_US:I'll meet you downstairs.}}
【用法說明】downstairs 可作副詞或形容詞
【翻譯】我在樓下等你。

{{tts en_US:downtown}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】市中心
【搭配詞】go downtown / downtown area / live downtown
【例句】We went downtown for dinner.
{{tts en_US:We went downtown for dinner.}}
【用法說明】downtown 指城市中心區
【翻譯】我們去市中心吃晚餐。

{{tts en_US:downward}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】向下的；下降的
【搭配詞】downward trend / move downward / downward pressure
【例句】Sales are on a downward trend.
{{tts en_US:Sales are on a downward trend.}}
【用法說明】downward 指往下的方向或趨勢
【翻譯】銷售呈現下降趨勢。

{{tts en_US:doze}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】打瞌睡；小睡
【搭配詞】doze off / doze in the chair / half doze
【例句】I dozed off on the train.
{{tts en_US:I dozed off on the train.}}
【用法說明】doze 指短暫小睡
【翻譯】我在火車上打瞌睡了。

{{tts en_US:dozen}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】一打；十二個
【搭配詞】a dozen eggs / dozens of / half a dozen
【例句】I bought a dozen eggs.
{{tts en_US:I bought a dozen eggs.}}
【用法說明】dozen 指十二個
【翻譯】我買了一打雞蛋。

{{tts en_US:draft}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】草稿；徵兵；氣流
【搭配詞】first draft / write a draft / cold draft
【例句】This is only the first draft of the report.
{{tts en_US:This is only the first draft of the report.}}
【用法說明】draft 常見意思是草稿
【翻譯】這只是報告的第一版草稿。

{{tts en_US:drag}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】拖；拉；拖累
【搭配詞】drag the chair / drag on / drag someone along
【例句】He dragged the box across the floor.
{{tts en_US:He dragged the box across the floor.}}
【用法說明】drag 指用力拖動
【翻譯】他把箱子拖過地板。

{{tts en_US:dragon}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】龍
【搭配詞】mythical dragon / dragon boat / fierce dragon
【例句】The story is about a girl and a dragon.
{{tts en_US:The story is about a girl and a dragon.}}
【用法說明】dragon 指神話中的龍
【翻譯】這個故事是在講一個女孩和一條龍。

{{tts en_US:dragonfly}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】蜻蜓
【搭配詞】blue dragonfly / dragonfly wings / watch dragonflies
【例句】A dragonfly landed on the leaf.
{{tts en_US:A dragonfly landed on the leaf.}}
【用法說明】dragonfly 指蜻蜓
【翻譯】一隻蜻蜓停在葉子上。

{{tts en_US:drain}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】排水；耗盡；排水管
【搭配詞】drain the water / energy drain / kitchen drain
【例句】Please drain the pasta before serving.
{{tts en_US:Please drain the pasta before serving.}}
【用法說明】drain 可指排掉液體，也可比喻耗盡
【翻譯】上桌前請先把義大利麵瀝乾。

{{tts en_US:drama}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】戲劇；戲劇性事件
【搭配詞】TV drama / family drama / drama class
【例句】She's watching a Korean drama.
{{tts en_US:She's watching a Korean drama.}}
【用法說明】drama 可指戲劇作品，也可比喻風波
【翻譯】她正在看韓劇。

{{tts en_US:dramatic}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】戲劇性的；巨大的
【搭配詞】dramatic change / dramatic ending / sound dramatic
【例句】The city has seen dramatic changes.
{{tts en_US:The city has seen dramatic changes.}}
【用法說明】dramatic 可指變化很大，也可指充滿戲劇性
【翻譯】這座城市經歷了很大的改變。

{{tts en_US:drastic}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】激烈的；極端的
【搭配詞】drastic measure / drastic change / something drastic
【例句】We need to take drastic action.
{{tts en_US:We need to take drastic action.}}
【用法說明】drastic 指幅度大、手段強烈
【翻譯】我們需要採取強力行動。

{{tts en_US:draught}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】氣流；生啤；草稿（英式）
【搭配詞】cold draught / draught beer / first draught
【例句】A cold draught came in through the window.
{{tts en_US:A cold draught came in through the window.}}
【用法說明】draught 是英式拼法，常指冷風或生啤
【翻譯】一陣冷風吹進窗戶。

{{tts en_US:draw}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】畫；拉；吸引
【搭配詞】draw a picture / draw attention / draw the curtain
【例句】She likes to draw flowers in her notebook.
{{tts en_US:She likes to draw flowers in her notebook.}}
【用法說明】draw 有很多意思，最常見是畫圖
【翻譯】她喜歡在筆記本裡畫花。

{{tts en_US:drawer}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】抽屜
【搭配詞】open the drawer / kitchen drawer / top drawer
【例句】The scissors are in the top drawer.
{{tts en_US:The scissors are in the top drawer.}}
【用法說明】drawer 指櫃子的抽屜
【翻譯】剪刀在最上面的抽屜裡。

{{tts en_US:drawing}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】圖畫；繪畫
【搭配詞】pencil drawing / make a drawing / drawing class
【例句】Her drawing of the cat was really cute.
{{tts en_US:Her drawing of the cat was really cute.}}
【用法說明】drawing 指畫出來的圖或繪畫活動
【翻譯】她畫的那隻貓真的很可愛。

{{tts en_US:dread}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】害怕；憂懼
【搭配詞】dread doing / feel dread / sense of dread
【例句】I dread going to the dentist.
{{tts en_US:I dread going to the dentist.}}
【用法說明】dread 指對即將發生的事感到很怕
【翻譯】我很怕去看牙醫。

{{tts en_US:dreadful}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】可怕的；糟透的
【搭配詞】dreadful weather / feel dreadful / dreadful mistake
【例句】We had dreadful weather all weekend.
{{tts en_US:We had dreadful weather all weekend.}}
【用法說明】dreadful 可指令人害怕，也常表示很糟
【翻譯】整個週末天氣都糟透了。

{{tts en_US:dream}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】夢；夢想
【搭配詞】have a dream / bad dream / dream of
【例句】I had a strange dream last night.
{{tts en_US:I had a strange dream last night.}}
【用法說明】dream 可指睡夢，也可指理想
【翻譯】我昨晚做了一個奇怪的夢。

{{tts en_US:dress}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】洋裝；穿衣
【搭配詞】wear a dress / get dressed / dress up
【例句】She wore a blue dress to the party.
{{tts en_US:She wore a blue dress to the party.}}
【用法說明】dress 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她穿著一件藍色洋裝去參加派對。

{{tts en_US:dresser}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】梳妝台；衣櫃式抽屜櫃
【搭配詞】bedroom dresser / top of the dresser / wooden dresser
【例句】The socks are in the dresser.
{{tts en_US:The socks are in the dresser.}}
【用法說明】dresser 指放衣物的小櫃子
【翻譯】襪子在抽屜櫃裡。

{{tts en_US:dressing}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】醬料；敷料；穿衣
【搭配詞】salad dressing / wound dressing / dressing room
【例句】Would you like any dressing on your salad?
{{tts en_US:Would you like any dressing on your salad?}}
【用法說明】dressing 常指沙拉醬
【翻譯】你的沙拉要加醬嗎？

{{tts en_US:drift}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】漂流；飄移；趨向
【搭配詞】drift away / snow drift / drift into sleep
【例句】A leaf drifted across the water.
{{tts en_US:A leaf drifted across the water.}}
【用法說明】drift 指順著水流或風慢慢移動
【翻譯】一片葉子漂過水面。

{{tts en_US:drill}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】鑽孔；演練；鑽頭
【搭配詞】fire drill / drill a hole / military drill
【例句】We had a fire drill at school today.
{{tts en_US:We had a fire drill at school today.}}
【用法說明】drill 可指演習，也可指鑽孔工具
【翻譯】我們今天在學校做了消防演練。

{{tts en_US:drink}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】喝；飲料
【搭配詞】drink water / soft drink / drink too much
【例句】You should drink more water.
{{tts en_US:You should drink more water.}}
【用法說明】drink 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】你應該多喝水。

{{tts en_US:drip}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】滴下；滴水
【搭配詞】drip from / dripping tap / coffee drip
【例句】Water was dripping from the ceiling.
{{tts en_US:Water was dripping from the ceiling.}}
【用法說明】drip 指液體一滴一滴往下掉
【翻譯】水正從天花板一滴一滴落下。

{{tts en_US:drive}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】開車；驅動；逼使
【搭配詞】drive to work / drive safely / drive someone crazy
【例句】I usually drive to work.
{{tts en_US:I usually drive to work.}}
【用法說明】drive 最常指開車
【翻譯】我通常開車去上班。

{{tts en_US:driver}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】駕駛；司機
【搭配詞】bus driver / taxi driver / careful driver
【例句】The bus driver was very friendly.
{{tts en_US:The bus driver was very friendly.}}
【用法說明】driver 指開車的人
【翻譯】那位公車司機很親切。

{{tts en_US:driveway}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】車道；私人車道
【搭配詞】park in the driveway / long driveway / driveway gate
【例句】Don't block the driveway.
{{tts en_US:Don't block the driveway.}}
【用法說明】driveway 指通往房子的私人車道
【翻譯】不要擋住車道。

{{tts en_US:drop}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】掉下；下降；滴
【搭配詞】drop your phone / price drop / drop by
【例句】Be careful not to drop the glass.
{{tts en_US:Be careful not to drop the glass.}}
【用法說明】drop 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】小心不要把玻璃杯掉了。

{{tts en_US:drought}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】乾旱
【搭配詞】long drought / severe drought / drought season
【例句】The region is suffering from drought.
{{tts en_US:The region is suffering from drought.}}
【用法說明】drought 指長期缺雨造成的乾旱
【翻譯】這個地區正遭受乾旱。

{{tts en_US:drown}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】淹死；淹沒
【搭配詞】drown in / nearly drown / drown out
【例句】He almost drowned when he was young.
{{tts en_US:He almost drowned when he was young.}}
【用法說明】drown 指因溺水而死，也可比喻被淹沒
【翻譯】他小時候差點溺水。

{{tts en_US:drowsy}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】昏昏欲睡的
【搭配詞】feel drowsy / make you drowsy / drowsy after lunch
【例句】This medicine may make you drowsy.
{{tts en_US:This medicine may make you drowsy.}}
【用法說明】drowsy 指想睡、昏沉沉的
【翻譯】這種藥可能會讓你想睡。

{{tts en_US:drug}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】藥物；毒品
【搭配詞】take a drug / illegal drug / drug problem
【例句】The doctor gave him a drug for the pain.
{{tts en_US:The doctor gave him a drug for the pain.}}
【用法說明】drug 可指藥物，也可指非法毒品
【翻譯】醫生開了一種藥給他止痛。

{{tts en_US:drugstore}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】藥妝店；藥局
【搭配詞】go to the drugstore / local drugstore / drugstore chain
【例句】I stopped by the drugstore for toothpaste.
{{tts en_US:I stopped by the drugstore for toothpaste.}}
【用法說明】drugstore 指販售藥品和日用品的店
【翻譯】我順路去藥妝店買牙膏。

{{tts en_US:drum}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】鼓
【搭配詞】play the drum / drum set / beat the drum
【例句】He plays the drums in a band.
{{tts en_US:He plays the drums in a band.}}
【用法說明】drum 指鼓類樂器
【翻譯】他在樂團裡打鼓。

{{tts en_US:drunk}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】喝醉的
【搭配詞】get drunk / be drunk / drunk driver
【例句】He was too drunk to drive.
{{tts en_US:He was too drunk to drive.}}
【用法說明】drunk 形容酒醉狀態
【翻譯】他醉得沒辦法開車。

{{tts en_US:dry}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】乾的；把…弄乾
【搭配詞】dry clothes / dry skin / let it dry
【例句】Please hang the towel somewhere dry.
{{tts en_US:Please hang the towel somewhere dry.}}
【用法說明】dry 可作形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】請把毛巾掛在乾一點的地方。

{{tts en_US:dryer}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】烘乾機；吹風機
【搭配詞】hair dryer / clothes dryer / put it in the dryer
【例句】The clothes are still in the dryer.
{{tts en_US:The clothes are still in the dryer.}}
【用法說明】dryer 指用來烘乾或吹乾的機器
【翻譯】衣服還在烘乾機裡。

{{tts en_US:dual}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】雙重的；兩部分的
【搭配詞】dual purpose / dual role / dual citizenship
【例句】She has dual citizenship.
{{tts en_US:She has dual citizenship.}}
【用法說明】dual 表示有兩個部分或兩種功能
【翻譯】她有雙重國籍。

{{tts en_US:dubious}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】可疑的；半信半疑的
【搭配詞】dubious claim / seem dubious / look dubious
【例句】I'm dubious about that excuse.
{{tts en_US:I'm dubious about that excuse.}}
【用法說明】dubious 可表示覺得某事不太可信
【翻譯】我對那個藉口半信半疑。

{{tts en_US:duck}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】鴨子；低頭閃避
【搭配詞】feed the ducks / duck down / roast duck
【例句】The duck was swimming across the pond.
{{tts en_US:The duck was swimming across the pond.}}
【用法說明】duck 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那隻鴨子正游過池塘。

{{tts en_US:due}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】到期的；應得的；因為
【搭配詞】due date / due to / payment is due
【例句】The report is due on Friday.
{{tts en_US:The report is due on Friday.}}
【用法說明】due 常見於到期時間
【翻譯】這份報告星期五到期。

{{tts en_US:dull}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】無聊的；鈍的；暗淡的
【搭配詞】dull knife / dull class / dull color
【例句】The lecture was long and dull.
{{tts en_US:The lecture was long and dull.}}
【用法說明】dull 可形容事情無趣，也可指刀不利
【翻譯】那場演講又長又無聊。

{{tts en_US:dumb}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】笨的；啞的
【搭配詞】sound dumb / dumb mistake / play dumb
【例句】That was a dumb mistake.
{{tts en_US:That was a dumb mistake.}}
【用法說明】dumb 在口語中常指『很蠢』，語氣較不客氣
【翻譯】那真是個蠢錯誤。

{{tts en_US:dump}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】丟棄；傾倒；垃圾場
【搭配詞】dump the trash / dump something on / garbage dump
【例句】Don't dump your problems on me.
{{tts en_US:Don't dump your problems on me.}}
【用法說明】dump 可指倒垃圾，也可比喻把問題丟給別人
【翻譯】不要把你的問題一股腦丟給我。

{{tts en_US:dumpling}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】餃子
【搭配詞】boiled dumplings / pork dumpling / plate of dumplings
【例句】We made dumplings together at home.
{{tts en_US:We made dumplings together at home.}}
【用法說明】dumpling 指餃子或包餡麵食
【翻譯】我們在家一起包餃子。

{{tts en_US:durable}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】耐用的
【搭配詞】durable material / durable shoes / highly durable
【例句】These shoes are light but durable.
{{tts en_US:These shoes are light but durable.}}
【用法說明】durable 指可以用很久、不易壞
【翻譯】這雙鞋很輕又很耐穿。

{{tts en_US:duration}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】持續時間
【搭配詞】short duration / duration of the meeting / for the duration
【例句】The flight duration is about two hours.
{{tts en_US:The flight duration is about two hours.}}
【用法說明】duration 指一段事情持續多久
【翻譯】這趟航班大約飛兩個小時。

{{tts en_US:during}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】在…期間
【搭配詞】during class / during the trip / during the meeting
【例句】Please stay quiet during the movie.
{{tts en_US:Please stay quiet during the movie.}}
【用法說明】during 後面接名詞，表示某段期間內
【翻譯】看電影時請保持安靜。

{{tts en_US:dusk}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】黃昏；傍晚
【搭配詞】at dusk / before dusk / dusk sky
【例句】We got home just before dusk.
{{tts en_US:We got home just before dusk.}}
【用法說明】dusk 指天快黑的時候
【翻譯】我們在黃昏前剛好到家。

{{tts en_US:dust}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】灰塵；撣灰
【搭配詞】dust the shelf / layer of dust / dust in the air
【例句】There was dust on the bookshelf.
{{tts en_US:There was dust on the bookshelf.}}
【用法說明】dust 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】書架上有灰塵。

{{tts en_US:dusty}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】滿是灰塵的
【搭配詞】dusty room / dusty road / get dusty
【例句】The old room was dark and dusty.
{{tts en_US:The old room was dark and dusty.}}
【用法說明】dusty 形容某物積滿灰塵
【翻譯】那間老房間又暗又滿是灰塵。

{{tts en_US:duty}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】責任；職責；值班
【搭配詞】do your duty / sense of duty / on duty
【例句】It's my duty to help my team.
{{tts en_US:It's my duty to help my team.}}
【用法說明】duty 指應該做的責任
【翻譯】幫助團隊是我的責任。

{{tts en_US:dwarf}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】侏儒；矮小的人／物
【搭配詞】garden dwarf / dwarf planet / become dwarfed
【例句】Pluto was once called a dwarf planet.
{{tts en_US:Pluto was once called a dwarf planet.}}
【用法說明】dwarf 也常見於 dwarf planet
【翻譯】冥王星曾經被稱作矮行星。

{{tts en_US:dwell}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】居住；停留於
【搭配詞】dwell on / dwell in / continue to dwell
【例句】Don't dwell on your mistakes too long.
{{tts en_US:Don't dwell on your mistakes too long.}}
【用法說明】dwell on = 一直反覆想某事
【翻譯】不要一直糾結在自己的錯誤上。

{{tts en_US:dwelling}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】住處；住宅
【搭配詞】small dwelling / family dwelling / simple dwelling
【例句】The cave was used as a dwelling.
{{tts en_US:The cave was used as a dwelling.}}
【用法說明】dwelling 是較正式的『住所』
【翻譯】那個洞穴曾被當作住處。

{{tts en_US:dye}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】染色；染料
【搭配詞】hair dye / dye the fabric / natural dye
【例句】She dyed her hair brown.
{{tts en_US:She dyed her hair brown.}}
【用法說明】dye 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】她把頭髮染成棕色。

{{tts en_US:dynamic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】有活力的；動態的
【搭配詞】dynamic team / dynamic change / dynamic speaker
【例句】She's a dynamic leader with lots of ideas.
{{tts en_US:She's a dynamic leader with lots of ideas.}}
【用法說明】dynamic 形容人事物充滿活力、變化
【翻譯】她是一位很有活力、點子很多的領導者。

{{tts en_US:dynasty}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】王朝；朝代
【搭配詞】ancient dynasty / royal dynasty / during the dynasty
【例句】The museum has paintings from the Ming dynasty.
{{tts en_US:The museum has paintings from the Ming dynasty.}}
【用法說明】dynasty 指一個朝代或統治家族
【翻譯】博物館裡有明朝的畫作。

{{tts en_US:each}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】每個；各自
【搭配詞】each student / each of us / five dollars each
【例句】Each student needs a notebook.
{{tts en_US:Each student needs a notebook.}}
【用法說明】each 表示一個一個地看待
【翻譯】每位學生都需要一本筆記本。

{{tts en_US:eager}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】渴望的；急切的
【搭配詞】eager to / eager for / look eager
【例句】She's eager to learn more.
{{tts en_US:She's eager to learn more.}}
【用法說明】eager to + V 很常見
【翻譯】她很渴望學到更多。

{{tts en_US:eagle}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】老鷹；鷹
【搭配詞】golden eagle / eagle nest / see an eagle
【例句】An eagle was flying above the mountain.
{{tts en_US:An eagle was flying above the mountain.}}
【用法說明】eagle 指老鷹這類大型猛禽
【翻譯】一隻老鷹正在山上空飛翔。

{{tts en_US:ear}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】耳朵
【搭配詞】ear pain / in my ear / whisper in someone's ear
【例句】My ear still hurts a little.
{{tts en_US:My ear still hurts a little.}}
【用法說明】ear 指耳朵
【翻譯】我的耳朵還有點痛。

{{tts en_US:early}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】早的；提早地
【搭配詞】wake up early / early morning / too early
【例句】I got up early to catch the train.
{{tts en_US:I got up early to catch the train.}}
【用法說明】early 可作形容詞或副詞
【翻譯】我早起去趕火車。

{{tts en_US:earn}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】賺得；贏得
【搭配詞】earn money / earn respect / earn a living
【例句】She earns enough to support her family.
{{tts en_US:She earns enough to support her family.}}
【用法說明】earn 指透過工作或努力獲得
【翻譯】她賺的錢足以養家。

{{tts en_US:earnest}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】認真的；誠懇的
【搭配詞】earnest effort / earnest request / look earnest
【例句】He made an earnest promise to change.
{{tts en_US:He made an earnest promise to change.}}
【用法說明】earnest 形容態度真誠認真
【翻譯】他誠懇地承諾會改變。

{{tts en_US:earphone}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】耳機（單邊／泛稱）
【搭配詞】wireless earphone / lose an earphone / earphone case
【例句】I can't find my left earphone.
{{tts en_US:I can't find my left earphone.}}
【用法說明】earphone 常指單邊耳機，也可泛指耳機
【翻譯】我找不到左邊那個耳機。

{{tts en_US:earring}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】耳環（單邊）
【搭配詞】gold earring / lose an earring / wear an earring
【例句】She lost one earring at the party.
{{tts en_US:She lost one earring at the party.}}
【用法說明】earring 指單邊耳環
【翻譯】她在派對上弄丟了一只耳環。

{{tts en_US:earrings}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】耳環（一副／複數）
【搭配詞】silver earrings / wear earrings / pair of earrings
【例句】She bought a new pair of earrings.
{{tts en_US:She bought a new pair of earrings.}}
【用法說明】earrings 較常指一副耳環
【翻譯】她買了一副新的耳環。

{{tts en_US:earth}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】地球；泥土
【搭配詞】planet Earth / the earth beneath / move earth
【例句】The Earth goes around the sun.
{{tts en_US:The Earth goes around the sun.}}
【用法說明】earth 可指地球，也可指土壤
【翻譯】地球繞著太陽運行。

{{tts en_US:earthquake}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】地震
【搭配詞】strong earthquake / earthquake warning / after the earthquake
【例句】The earthquake woke us up last night.
{{tts en_US:The earthquake woke us up last night.}}
【用法說明】earthquake 指地震
【翻譯】昨晚那場地震把我們震醒了。

{{tts en_US:ease}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】容易；減輕；自在
【搭配詞】with ease / ease the pain / feel at ease
【例句】A warm drink may ease your sore throat.
{{tts en_US:A warm drink may ease your sore throat.}}
【用法說明】ease 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】喝點熱飲可能能緩解你的喉嚨痛。

{{tts en_US:east}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】東方；東邊
【搭配詞】in the east / east side / face east
【例句】The sun rises in the east.
{{tts en_US:The sun rises in the east.}}
【用法說明】east 指東方
【翻譯】太陽從東方升起。

{{tts en_US:eastern}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】東方的；東部的
【搭配詞】eastern Taiwan / eastern culture / eastern coast
【例句】They traveled along the eastern coast.
{{tts en_US:They traveled along the eastern coast.}}
【用法說明】eastern 指東部或東方相關
【翻譯】他們沿著東海岸旅行。

{{tts en_US:easy}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】容易的；輕鬆的
【搭配詞】easy job / easy to use / take it easy
【例句】This app is easy to use.
{{tts en_US:This app is easy to use.}}
【用法說明】easy 形容事情不難
【翻譯】這個 app 很容易使用。

{{tts en_US:eat}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】吃
【搭配詞】eat breakfast / eat out / eat too much
【例句】Did you eat yet?
{{tts en_US:Did you eat yet?}}
【用法說明】eat 是基本高頻動詞
【翻譯】你吃了嗎？

{{tts en_US:eccentric}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】古怪的；怪異的
【搭配詞】eccentric uncle / eccentric style / seem eccentric
【例句】He has an eccentric way of dressing.
{{tts en_US:He has an eccentric way of dressing.}}
【用法說明】eccentric 形容行為或風格古怪
【翻譯】他穿衣風格很古怪。

{{tts en_US:echo}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】回音；回響
【搭配詞】hear an echo / echo through / echo someone's words
【例句】Our voices echoed in the hallway.
{{tts en_US:Our voices echoed in the hallway.}}
【用法說明】echo 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們的聲音在走廊裡迴盪。

{{tts en_US:eclipse}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】蝕；日蝕／月蝕；使黯然失色
【搭配詞】solar eclipse / lunar eclipse / eclipse the others
【例句】We watched the solar eclipse online.
{{tts en_US:We watched the solar eclipse online.}}
【用法說明】eclipse 常見於天文現象
【翻譯】我們在線上看了日蝕。

{{tts en_US:ecological}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】生態的；生態學的
