【搭配詞】good enough / enough time / not enough
【例句】Do we have enough chairs for everyone?
{{tts en_US:Do we have enough chairs for everyone?}}
【用法說明】enough 可作形容詞、副詞或代名詞
【翻譯】我們有足夠的椅子給大家嗎？

{{tts en_US:enrich}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】豐富；充實
【搭配詞】enrich your life / enrich the soil / culturally enrich
【例句】Travel can enrich your life in many ways.
{{tts en_US:Travel can enrich your life in many ways.}}
【用法說明】enrich 指讓內容更充實
【翻譯】旅行能在很多方面豐富你的人生。

{{tts en_US:enrichment}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】充實；豐富化
【搭配詞】cultural enrichment / enrichment program / personal enrichment
【例句】The class offers cultural enrichment for students.
{{tts en_US:The class offers cultural enrichment for students.}}
【用法說明】enrichment 指讓內容更有價值的增加
【翻譯】這堂課為學生提供文化上的充實。

{{tts en_US:enroll}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】註冊；報名
【搭配詞】enroll in / enroll at / enroll for classes
【例句】She enrolled in an English course.
{{tts en_US:She enrolled in an English course.}}
【用法說明】enroll in + 課程／學校
【翻譯】她報名了一門英文課。

{{tts en_US:enrollment}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】註冊；入學人數
【搭配詞】school enrollment / enrollment form / online enrollment
【例句】School enrollment has increased this year.
{{tts en_US:School enrollment has increased this year.}}
【用法說明】enrollment 指報名或註冊人數
【翻譯】今年的入學人數增加了。

{{tts en_US:ensure}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】確保
【搭配詞】ensure that / ensure safety / help ensure
【例句】Please ensure that the door is locked.
{{tts en_US:Please ensure that the door is locked.}}
【用法說明】ensure that + 子句 很常見
【翻譯】請確認門有鎖好。

{{tts en_US:enter}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】進入；輸入
【搭配詞】enter the room / enter your password / enter a contest
【例句】He entered the room quietly.
{{tts en_US:He entered the room quietly.}}
【用法說明】enter 指進到某地，也可指輸入資訊
【翻譯】他安靜地走進房間。

{{tts en_US:enterprise}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】企業；事業；進取心
【搭配詞】private enterprise / business enterprise / risky enterprise
【例句】Starting a company is a big enterprise.
{{tts en_US:Starting a company is a big enterprise.}}
【用法說明】enterprise 可指公司，也可指事業計畫
【翻譯】創業是一項大工程。

{{tts en_US:entertain}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】娛樂；招待
【搭配詞】entertain guests / entertain an idea / entertain the audience
【例句】We need something to entertain the kids.
{{tts en_US:We need something to entertain the kids.}}
【用法說明】entertain 指讓人覺得有趣，也可指接待
【翻譯】我們需要一些東西來讓孩子們開心。

{{tts en_US:entertainment}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】娛樂
【搭配詞】live entertainment / family entertainment / source of entertainment
【例句】The show provided great entertainment.
{{tts en_US:The show provided great entertainment.}}
【用法說明】entertainment 指讓人放鬆開心的活動
【翻譯】那場表演帶來很棒的娛樂效果。

{{tts en_US:enthusiasm}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】熱情；熱忱
【搭配詞】show enthusiasm / with enthusiasm / lack enthusiasm
【例句】She spoke with enthusiasm about the project.
{{tts en_US:She spoke with enthusiasm about the project.}}
【用法說明】enthusiasm 指積極熱情的態度
【翻譯】她很有熱情地談這個專案。

{{tts en_US:enthusiastic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】熱情的
【搭配詞】enthusiastic about / enthusiastic support / very enthusiastic
【例句】The students were enthusiastic about the trip.
{{tts en_US:The students were enthusiastic about the trip.}}
【用法說明】enthusiastic about + 事物
【翻譯】學生們對這次旅行很有熱情。

{{tts en_US:entire}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】全部的；整個的
【搭配詞】entire day / entire family / entire process
【例句】I spent the entire afternoon cleaning.
{{tts en_US:I spent the entire afternoon cleaning.}}
【用法說明】entire 指完整全部
【翻譯】我整個下午都在打掃。

{{tts en_US:entitle}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】給…命名；使有資格
【搭配詞】entitle someone to / be entitled / entitle the book
【例句】This ticket entitles you to a free drink.
{{tts en_US:This ticket entitles you to a free drink.}}
【用法說明】entitle A to B = 使 A 有資格得到 B
【翻譯】這張票讓你有資格免費拿一杯飲料。

{{tts en_US:entity}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】個體；實體；單位
【搭配詞】separate entity / legal entity / business entity
【例句】The company is treated as a separate legal entity.
{{tts en_US:The company is treated as a separate legal entity.}}
【用法說明】entity 是較正式的『實體』
【翻譯】那家公司被視為獨立的法律實體。

{{tts en_US:entrance}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】入口；入學；進入
【搭配詞】front entrance / entrance exam / make an entrance
【例句】Please wait at the main entrance.
{{tts en_US:Please wait at the main entrance.}}
【用法說明】entrance 可指入口，也可指入學考試
【翻譯】請在正門入口等候。

{{tts en_US:entrepreneur}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】企業家；創業者
【搭配詞】young entrepreneur / successful entrepreneur / tech entrepreneur
【例句】She became an entrepreneur in her twenties.
{{tts en_US:She became an entrepreneur in her twenties.}}
【用法說明】entrepreneur 指自己創業的人
【翻譯】她二十幾歲就成了創業者。

{{tts en_US:entry}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】進入；條目；參賽作品
【搭配詞】blog entry / entry fee / make an entry
【例句】The contest received over 500 entries.
{{tts en_US:The contest received over 500 entries.}}
【用法說明】entry 可指進入，也可指名單或參賽件
【翻譯】那場比賽收到了五百多件參賽作品。

{{tts en_US:envelope}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】信封
【搭配詞】put it in an envelope / white envelope / sealed envelope
【例句】I put the letter in an envelope.
{{tts en_US:I put the letter in an envelope.}}
【用法說明】envelope 指信封
【翻譯】我把信放進信封裡。

{{tts en_US:envious}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】羨慕的；嫉妒的
【搭配詞】be envious of / sound envious / slightly envious
【例句】I'm a little envious of your vacation plans.
{{tts en_US:I'm a little envious of your vacation plans.}}
【用法說明】envious of + 人／事
【翻譯】我有點羨慕你的假期計畫。

{{tts en_US:environment}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】環境
【搭配詞】natural environment / work environment / safe environment
【例句】Children need a safe environment to grow.
{{tts en_US:Children need a safe environment to grow.}}
【用法說明】environment 可指自然環境或生活工作環境
【翻譯】孩子需要安全的環境才能成長。

{{tts en_US:environmental}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】環境的；環保的
【搭配詞】environmental issue / environmental protection / environmental impact
【例句】We're studying environmental problems in class.
{{tts en_US:We're studying environmental problems in class.}}
【用法說明】environmental 指和環境有關
【翻譯】我們在課堂上學環境問題。

{{tts en_US:envision}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】想像；展望
【搭配詞】envision a future / envision doing / clearly envision
【例句】Can you envision living in another country?
{{tts en_US:Can you envision living in another country?}}
【用法說明】envision 指在腦中描繪未來畫面
【翻譯】你能想像自己住在另一個國家嗎？

{{tts en_US:envy}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】羨慕；忌妒
【搭配詞】envy someone / green with envy / object of envy
【例句】I envy her confidence.
{{tts en_US:I envy her confidence.}}
【用法說明】envy 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】我很羨慕她的自信。

{{tts en_US:epidemic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】流行病；大規模蔓延
【搭配詞】flu epidemic / epidemic of violence / epidemic spread
【例句】The city faced a flu epidemic that winter.
{{tts en_US:The city faced a flu epidemic that winter.}}
【用法說明】epidemic 指疾病大範圍流行
【翻譯】那年冬天那座城市爆發了流感。

{{tts en_US:episode}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】一集；事件
【搭配詞】TV episode / latest episode / difficult episode
【例句】I watched two episodes before bed.
{{tts en_US:I watched two episodes before bed.}}
【用法說明】episode 常指影集的一集
【翻譯】我睡前看了兩集影集。

{{tts en_US:equal}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】相等的；平等的
【搭配詞】equal rights / equal to / be equal
【例句】All students should have equal chances.
{{tts en_US:All students should have equal chances.}}
【用法說明】equal 可指數量相等，也可指權利平等
【翻譯】所有學生都應該有平等的機會。

{{tts en_US:equality}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】平等
【搭配詞】gender equality / equality of opportunity / social equality
【例句】We believe in equality for all.
{{tts en_US:We believe in equality for all.}}
【用法說明】equality 指每個人享有平等權利與機會
【翻譯】我們相信人人都應享有平等。

{{tts en_US:equalize}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使相等；使平衡
【搭配詞】equalize the score / equalize pressure / equalize the chances
【例句】A late goal helped equalize the score.
{{tts en_US:A late goal helped equalize the score.}}
【用法說明】equalize 指讓原本不一樣的東西變得相等
【翻譯】最後一刻的進球讓比數追平了。

{{tts en_US:equate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】視為等同；等同看待
【搭配詞】equate A with B / equate success with money / wrongly equate
【例句】Don't equate being busy with being productive.
{{tts en_US:Don't equate being busy with being productive.}}
【用法說明】equate A with B = 把 A 視為 B
【翻譯】不要把忙碌等同於有效率。

{{tts en_US:equation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】等式；關係式
【搭配詞】math equation / equation between / solve the equation
【例句】The teacher wrote an equation on the board.
{{tts en_US:The teacher wrote an equation on the board.}}
【用法說明】equation 可指數學等式，也可比喻關係
【翻譯】老師在黑板上寫了一道等式。

{{tts en_US:equip}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】裝備；使具備
【搭配詞】equip with / well-equipped / equip someone for
【例句】The school equipped every classroom with a projector.
{{tts en_US:The school equipped every classroom with a projector.}}
【用法說明】equip A with B = 用 B 裝備 A
【翻譯】學校替每間教室都裝上了投影機。

{{tts en_US:equipment}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】設備；器材
【搭配詞】sports equipment / lab equipment / safety equipment
【例句】The gym has modern exercise equipment.
{{tts en_US:The gym has modern exercise equipment.}}
【用法說明】equipment 是不可數名詞
【翻譯】那間健身房有現代化的運動器材。

{{tts en_US:equity}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】公平；股權；資產淨值
【搭配詞】social equity / equity market / home equity
【例句】The policy aims to improve educational equity.
{{tts en_US:The policy aims to improve educational equity.}}
【用法說明】equity 常指公平，也可指金融上的股權
【翻譯】這項政策旨在提升教育公平。

{{tts en_US:equivalent}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】相等的；等值的；對應物
【搭配詞】equivalent to / rough equivalent / English equivalent
【例句】One mile is equivalent to about 1.6 kilometers.
{{tts en_US:One mile is equivalent to about 1.6 kilometers.}}
【用法說明】equivalent to = 相當於
【翻譯】一英里大約等於 1.6 公里。

{{tts en_US:era}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】時代；年代
【搭配詞】digital era / modern era / new era
【例句】We live in the digital era.
{{tts en_US:We live in the digital era.}}
【用法說明】era 指一段具有特色的時期
【翻譯】我們活在數位時代。

{{tts en_US:erase}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】擦掉；刪除
【搭配詞】erase the board / erase a file / erase the memory
【例句】Please erase the answer and try again.
{{tts en_US:Please erase the answer and try again.}}
【用法說明】erase 指清除寫過的東西或資料
【翻譯】請把答案擦掉再試一次。

{{tts en_US:eraser}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】橡皮擦
【搭配詞】use an eraser / pencil eraser / white eraser
【例句】Can I borrow your eraser?
{{tts en_US:Can I borrow your eraser?}}
【用法說明】eraser 指擦鉛筆字用的橡皮擦
【翻譯】我可以借你的橡皮擦嗎？

{{tts en_US:erect}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】豎立；建立；直立的
【搭配詞】erect a statue / erect a building / stand erect
【例句】They plan to erect a new sign at the entrance.
{{tts en_US:They plan to erect a new sign at the entrance.}}
【用法說明】erect 是較正式的『豎立、搭建』
【翻譯】他們打算在入口豎立一個新告示牌。

{{tts en_US:errand}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】差事；跑腿
【搭配詞】run an errand / quick errand / do errands
【例句】I need to run a few errands this afternoon.
{{tts en_US:I need to run a few errands this afternoon.}}
【用法說明】errand 指順路辦的小事
【翻譯】我今天下午要去辦幾件雜事。

{{tts en_US:error}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】錯誤
【搭配詞】make an error / spelling error / human error
【例句】There was an error in the report.
{{tts en_US:There was an error in the report.}}
【用法說明】error 指書寫、計算或判斷上的錯誤
【翻譯】那份報告裡有一個錯誤。

{{tts en_US:erupt}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】爆發；噴發
【搭配詞】erupt in anger / volcano erupt / violence erupted
【例句】The volcano erupted without warning.
{{tts en_US:The volcano erupted without warning.}}
【用法說明】erupt 可指火山噴發，也可比喻情緒或衝突爆發
【翻譯】那座火山在毫無預警下噴發了。

{{tts en_US:escalator}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】手扶梯
【搭配詞】take the escalator / stand on the escalator / escalator down
【例句】We took the escalator to the second floor.
{{tts en_US:We took the escalator to the second floor.}}
【用法說明】escalator 指手扶梯
【翻譯】我們搭手扶梯到二樓。

{{tts en_US:escape}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】逃走；逃脫；避開
【搭配詞】escape from / narrow escape / escape the heat
【例句】The cat escaped through the window.
{{tts en_US:The cat escaped through the window.}}
【用法說明】escape 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】那隻貓從窗戶逃走了。

{{tts en_US:escort}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】護送；陪同；護送者
【搭配詞】escort someone home / police escort / escort service
【例句】He escorted his grandmother across the street.
{{tts en_US:He escorted his grandmother across the street.}}
【用法說明】escort 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】他陪奶奶走過馬路。

{{tts en_US:especially}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】尤其；特別是
【搭配詞】especially for / especially important / especially like
【例句】I love fruit, especially mangoes.
{{tts en_US:I love fruit, especially mangoes.}}
【用法說明】especially 用來特別指出其中一項
【翻譯】我很喜歡水果，尤其是芒果。

{{tts en_US:essay}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】文章；作文
【搭配詞】write an essay / essay topic / short essay
【例句】We have to write an essay for class.
{{tts en_US:We have to write an essay for class.}}
【用法說明】essay 指較正式的短文或作文
【翻譯】我們得為課堂寫一篇作文。

{{tts en_US:essence}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】本質；精華
【搭配詞】the essence of / in essence / capture the essence
【例句】Trust is the essence of a good friendship.
{{tts en_US:Trust is the essence of a good friendship.}}
【用法說明】essence 指最核心、最重要的部分
【翻譯】信任是好友情的本質。

{{tts en_US:essential}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】必要的；關鍵的
【搭配詞】essential skill / absolutely essential / essential for
【例句】Water is essential for life.
{{tts en_US:Water is essential for life.}}
【用法說明】essential 表示不可缺少
【翻譯】水對生命是必需的。

{{tts en_US:establish}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】建立；設立；確立
【搭配詞】establish a company / establish trust / establish a rule
【例句】They established a new office in Taipei.
{{tts en_US:They established a new office in Taipei.}}
【用法說明】establish 指正式創立或建立
【翻譯】他們在台北設立了一個新辦公室。

{{tts en_US:establishment}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】機構；建立；體制
【搭配詞】educational establishment / establishment of / political establishment
【例句】The restaurant is a popular local establishment.
{{tts en_US:The restaurant is a popular local establishment.}}
【用法說明】establishment 可指機構或體制
【翻譯】那家餐廳是當地很受歡迎的一間店。

{{tts en_US:estate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】地產；遺產；莊園
【搭配詞】real estate / estate agent / family estate
【例句】He works in real estate.
{{tts en_US:He works in real estate.}}
【用法說明】estate 常見於 real estate
【翻譯】他在房地產業工作。

{{tts en_US:esteem}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】尊重；敬重
【搭配詞】self-esteem / hold in high esteem / earn esteem
【例句】The teacher is held in high esteem by the students.
{{tts en_US:The teacher is held in high esteem by the students.}}
【用法說明】esteem 指尊敬，也常見於 self-esteem
【翻譯】那位老師很受學生敬重。

{{tts en_US:estimate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】估計；估價
【搭配詞】estimate the cost / rough estimate / estimate that
【例句】Can you estimate how long it will take?
{{tts en_US:Can you estimate how long it will take?}}
【用法說明】estimate 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】你可以估一下要花多久嗎？

{{tts en_US:eternal}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】永恆的；不斷的
【搭配詞】eternal love / eternal question / feel eternal
【例句】They promised eternal love.
{{tts en_US:They promised eternal love.}}
【用法說明】eternal 指永遠持續的
【翻譯】他們承諾永恆的愛。

{{tts en_US:eternity}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】永恆；漫長時間
【搭配詞】for eternity / feel like an eternity / eternity ring
【例句】I've been waiting for what feels like an eternity.
{{tts en_US:I've been waiting for what feels like an eternity.}}
【用法說明】eternity 可指真正的永恆，也可誇飾很久
【翻譯】我已經等了久到像永遠一樣。

{{tts en_US:ethic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】道德標準；倫理觀
【搭配詞】work ethic / personal ethic / professional ethic
【例句】She has a strong work ethic.
{{tts en_US:She has a strong work ethic.}}
【用法說明】ethic 常見於 work ethic
【翻譯】她很有職業道德，也很認真。

{{tts en_US:ethics}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】倫理；道德學
【搭配詞】business ethics / medical ethics / ethics committee
【例句】The course covers business ethics.
{{tts en_US:The course covers business ethics.}}
【用法說明】ethics 是關於對錯與責任的原則
【翻譯】這門課涵蓋商業倫理。

{{tts en_US:ethical}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】倫理的；合乎道德的
【搭配詞】ethical issue / ethical decision / ethically responsible
【例句】This is an ethical question, not just a legal one.
{{tts en_US:This is an ethical question, not just a legal one.}}
【用法說明】ethical 指符合道德原則
【翻譯】這不只是法律問題，也是倫理問題。

{{tts en_US:ethnic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】族群的；民族的
【搭配詞】ethnic group / ethnic food / ethnic background
【例句】The city has a rich mix of ethnic cultures.
{{tts en_US:The city has a rich mix of ethnic cultures.}}
【用法說明】ethnic 指與族群或民族有關
【翻譯】這座城市融合了多元族群文化。

{{tts en_US:evacuate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】撤離；疏散
【搭配詞】evacuate the building / evacuate residents / be evacuated
【例句】The police evacuated the building after the alarm.
{{tts en_US:The police evacuated the building after the alarm.}}
【用法說明】evacuate 指在危險時讓人離開
【翻譯】警報響起後，警方疏散了整棟建築。

{{tts en_US:evaluate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】評估；評價
【搭配詞】evaluate the result / evaluate performance / carefully evaluate
【例句】We need to evaluate all the options first.
{{tts en_US:We need to evaluate all the options first.}}
【用法說明】evaluate 指仔細判斷價值或效果
【翻譯】我們得先評估所有選項。

{{tts en_US:evaluation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】評估；評價
【搭配詞】performance evaluation / course evaluation / detailed evaluation
【例句】The teacher gave us a written evaluation.
{{tts en_US:The teacher gave us a written evaluation.}}
【用法說明】evaluation 指正式的評估結果或過程
【翻譯】老師給了我們一份書面評估。

{{tts en_US:eve}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】前夕；前夜
【搭配詞】Christmas Eve / on the eve of / New Year's Eve
【例句】We stayed up late on New Year's Eve.
{{tts en_US:We stayed up late on New Year's Eve.}}
【用法說明】eve 指重要日子的前一晚
【翻譯】我們在跨年前夕熬夜到很晚。

{{tts en_US:even}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】甚至；平坦的；均勻的
【搭配詞】even now / even number / even surface
【例句】Even my little brother knows that.
{{tts en_US:Even my little brother knows that.}}
【用法說明】even 常用來強調『甚至』
【翻譯】連我弟弟都知道那件事。

{{tts en_US:evening}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】傍晚；晚上
【搭配詞】good evening / evening class / in the evening
【例句】We usually go for a walk in the evening.
{{tts en_US:We usually go for a walk in the evening.}}
【用法說明】evening 指傍晚到夜晚之間
【翻譯】我們通常晚上去散步。

{{tts en_US:event}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】活動；事件
【搭配詞】special event / major event / school event
【例句】The school is planning a special event.
{{tts en_US:The school is planning a special event.}}
【用法說明】event 可指活動或發生的事
【翻譯】學校正在籌備一場特別活動。

{{tts en_US:eventual}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】最終的；最後的
【搭配詞】eventual winner / eventual success / eventual outcome
【例句】The eventual outcome surprised everyone.
{{tts en_US:The eventual outcome surprised everyone.}}
【用法說明】eventual 指經過一段時間後最終出現
【翻譯】最終結果讓所有人都很意外。

{{tts en_US:ever}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】曾經；永遠；到底
【搭配詞】ever before / best ever / ever since
【例句】Have you ever been to Japan?
{{tts en_US:Have you ever been to Japan?}}
【用法說明】ever 常用於疑問句與最高級
【翻譯】你去過日本嗎？

{{tts en_US:evergreen}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】常綠的；長青的
【搭配詞】evergreen tree / evergreen topic / evergreen song
【例句】Pine is an evergreen tree.
{{tts en_US:Pine is an evergreen tree.}}
【用法說明】evergreen 可指植物，也可比喻長久不退流行
【翻譯】松樹是常綠樹。

{{tts en_US:every}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】每一個；所有的
【搭配詞】every day / every student / every time
【例句】Every child needs love and care.
{{tts en_US:Every child needs love and care.}}
【用法說明】every 後面接單數名詞
【翻譯】每個孩子都需要愛和照顧。

{{tts en_US:everything}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】每件事；所有東西
【搭配詞】everything is fine / tell me everything / lose everything
【例句】Everything will be okay.
{{tts en_US:Everything will be okay.}}
【用法說明】everything 指所有事物
【翻譯】一切都會沒事的。

{{tts en_US:evidence}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】證據；跡象
【搭配詞】clear evidence / evidence of / no evidence
【例句】The police found evidence at the scene.
{{tts en_US:The police found evidence at the scene.}}
【用法說明】evidence 是不可數名詞
【翻譯】警方在現場找到了證據。

{{tts en_US:evident}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】明顯的；顯然的
【搭配詞】be evident / evident from / clearly evident
【例句】Her excitement was evident in her voice.
{{tts en_US:Her excitement was evident in her voice.}}
【用法說明】evident 表示很明顯看得出來
【翻譯】她聲音裡明顯聽得出興奮。

{{tts en_US:evil}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】邪惡的；惡行
【搭配詞】evil plan / evil person / fight evil
【例句】The story is about the battle between good and evil.
{{tts en_US:The story is about the battle between good and evil.}}
【用法說明】evil 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】這個故事是在講善與惡的對抗。

{{tts en_US:evoke}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】喚起；引起
【搭配詞】evoke memories / evoke emotion / strongly evoke
【例句】The song evokes childhood memories.
{{tts en_US:The song evokes childhood memories.}}
【用法說明】evoke 指勾起情感或回憶
【翻譯】這首歌喚起了童年回憶。

{{tts en_US:evolution}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】演化；發展
【搭配詞】human evolution / evolution of technology / gradual evolution
【例句】The museum has an exhibit on human evolution.
{{tts en_US:The museum has an exhibit on human evolution.}}
【用法說明】evolution 指長時間的變化與發展
【翻譯】博物館有一個關於人類演化的展區。

{{tts en_US:evolve}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】演變；進化
【搭配詞】evolve over time / evolve into / continue to evolve
【例句】The plan evolved over several weeks.
{{tts en_US:The plan evolved over several weeks.}}
【用法說明】evolve 指逐漸改變、發展
【翻譯】這個計畫經過幾週逐漸演變。

{{tts en_US:exact}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】精確的；確切的
【搭配詞】exact time / exact answer / exact location
【例句】What's the exact address?
{{tts en_US:What's the exact address?}}
【用法說明】exact 指沒有誤差、很準確
【翻譯】確切地址是什麼？

{{tts en_US:exaggerate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】誇大；誇張
【搭配詞】exaggerate a story / greatly exaggerate / not exaggerate
【例句】Don't exaggerate the problem.
{{tts en_US:Don't exaggerate the problem.}}
【用法說明】exaggerate 指把事情說得比實際更大
【翻譯】不要把問題說得太誇張。

{{tts en_US:exaggeration}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】誇張；誇大說法
【搭配詞】slight exaggeration / obvious exaggeration / without exaggeration
【例句】That sounds like an exaggeration.
{{tts en_US:That sounds like an exaggeration.}}
【用法說明】exaggeration 指說得太超過的內容
【翻譯】那聽起來有點太誇張了。

{{tts en_US:examination/exam}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】考試；檢查
【搭配詞】final exam / medical examination / take an exam
【例句】I have a math exam tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:I have a math exam tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 examination 和 exam 放在一起
【翻譯】我明天有數學考試。

{{tts en_US:examine}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】檢查；審視
【搭配詞】examine the evidence / examine a patient / closely examine
【例句】The doctor examined my throat.
{{tts en_US:The doctor examined my throat.}}
【用法說明】examine 指仔細查看或檢查
【翻譯】醫生檢查了我的喉嚨。

{{tts en_US:examinee}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】應試者；受試者
【搭配詞】test examinee / examinee number / each examinee
【例句】Each examinee must bring an ID card.
{{tts en_US:Each examinee must bring an ID card.}}
【用法說明】examinee 指參加考試的人
【翻譯】每位應試者都必須帶身分證。

{{tts en_US:examiner}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】考官；檢查員
【搭配詞】driving examiner / chief examiner / examiner's report
【例句】The examiner asked me a few questions.
{{tts en_US:The examiner asked me a few questions.}}
【用法說明】examiner 指負責評量或檢查的人
【翻譯】考官問了我幾個問題。

{{tts en_US:example}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】例子；榜樣
【搭配詞】for example / good example / set an example
【例句】Can you give me an example?
{{tts en_US:Can you give me an example?}}
【用法說明】example 是最常見的『例子』
【翻譯】你可以給我一個例子嗎？

{{tts en_US:exceed}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】超過；超出
【搭配詞】exceed the limit / exceed expectations / exceed the budget
【例句】Don't exceed the speed limit.
{{tts en_US:Don't exceed the speed limit.}}
【用法說明】exceed 指超過某個界線或標準
【翻譯】不要超速。

{{tts en_US:excel}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】擅長；表現出色
【搭配詞】excel at / excel in school / truly excel
【例句】She excels at solving problems.
{{tts en_US:She excels at solving problems.}}
【用法說明】excel at / in 表示在某方面表現優秀
【翻譯】她很擅長解決問題。

{{tts en_US:excellence}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】卓越；優秀
【搭配詞】pursue excellence / academic excellence / standard of excellence
【例句】The school is known for academic excellence.
{{tts en_US:The school is known for academic excellence.}}
【用法說明】excellence 指很高水準的優秀表現
【翻譯】那所學校以學術卓越聞名。

{{tts en_US:excellent}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】極好的；優秀的
【搭配詞】excellent job / excellent idea / in excellent condition
【例句】You did an excellent job.
{{tts en_US:You did an excellent job.}}
【用法說明】excellent 是很常見的稱讚用語
【翻譯】你做得非常好。

{{tts en_US:except}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】除了；除…之外
【搭配詞】except for / everyone except / except that
【例句】Everyone came except Tom.
{{tts en_US:Everyone came except Tom.}}
【用法說明】except 用來排除某人某物
【翻譯】除了 Tom 之外大家都來了。

{{tts en_US:exception}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】例外；例外情況
【搭配詞】with one exception / make an exception / no exception
【例句】Everyone passed the test, with one exception.
{{tts en_US:Everyone passed the test, with one exception.}}
【用法說明】exception 指不符合一般情況的例外
【翻譯】除了一个例外，大家都通過了考試。

{{tts en_US:exceptional}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】異常優秀的；例外的
【搭配詞】exceptional talent / exceptional case / truly exceptional
【例句】She's an exceptional teacher.
{{tts en_US:She's an exceptional teacher.}}
【用法說明】exceptional 表示特別出色
【翻譯】她是一位非常優秀的老師。

{{tts en_US:excerpt}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】摘錄；節錄
【搭配詞】read an excerpt / short excerpt / excerpt from the book
【例句】The article included an excerpt from the novel.
{{tts en_US:The article included an excerpt from the novel.}}
【用法說明】excerpt 指從較長內容中節錄的一小段
【翻譯】那篇文章引用了小說的一段摘錄。

{{tts en_US:excess}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】過量；過度；超額
【搭配詞】in excess of / excess weight / excess baggage
【例句】Too much sugar can lead to excess weight.
{{tts en_US:Too much sugar can lead to excess weight.}}
【用法說明】excess 指超出適當範圍
【翻譯】糖分太多可能導致體重過重。

{{tts en_US:excessive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】過度的；過多的
【搭配詞】excessive noise / excessive spending / excessive force
【例句】The teacher warned against excessive screen time.
{{tts en_US:The teacher warned against excessive screen time.}}
【用法說明】excessive 形容超過合理程度
【翻譯】老師提醒不要過度使用螢幕。

{{tts en_US:exchange}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】交換；交流；兌換
【搭配詞】exchange ideas / student exchange / exchange money
【例句】We exchanged gifts at the party.
{{tts en_US:We exchanged gifts at the party.}}
【用法說明】exchange 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】我們在派對上交換了禮物。

{{tts en_US:excite}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】使興奮；使激動
【搭配詞】excite someone / really excite / excite interest
【例句】The trip really excited the kids.
{{tts en_US:The trip really excited the kids.}}
【用法說明】excite + 人
【翻譯】這趟旅行讓孩子們超興奮。

{{tts en_US:excitement}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】興奮；激動
【搭配詞】with excitement / full of excitement / sense of excitement
【例句】The room was filled with excitement.
{{tts en_US:The room was filled with excitement.}}
【用法說明】excitement 指高昂激動的情緒
【翻譯】房間裡充滿了興奮的氣氛。

{{tts en_US:excited}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】興奮的；期待的
【搭配詞】be excited about / excited to / get excited
【例句】I'm excited about the weekend trip.
{{tts en_US:I'm excited about the weekend trip.}}
【用法說明】excited about / to 都很常見
【翻譯】我很期待週末的旅行。

{{tts en_US:exciting}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】令人興奮的
【搭配詞】exciting news / exciting game / exciting opportunity
【例句】This is really exciting news.
{{tts en_US:This is really exciting news.}}
【用法說明】exciting 形容讓人感到興奮的事物
【翻譯】這真的是很令人興奮的消息。

{{tts en_US:exclaim}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】驚呼；喊出
【搭配詞】exclaim in surprise / suddenly exclaim / exclaim that
【例句】She exclaimed in surprise when she saw the gift.
{{tts en_US:She exclaimed in surprise when she saw the gift.}}
【用法說明】exclaim 指因情緒激動而喊出
【翻譯】她看到禮物時驚呼了一聲。

{{tts en_US:exclude}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】排除；把…排除在外
【搭配詞】exclude from / exclude the possibility / feel excluded
【例句】The price excludes tax.
{{tts en_US:The price excludes tax.}}
【用法說明】exclude 指不包含或不讓加入
【翻譯】這個價格不含稅。

{{tts en_US:exclusion}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】排除；排斥
【搭配詞】social exclusion / exclusion from / sense of exclusion
【例句】The rules allow no exclusion based on age.
{{tts en_US:The rules allow no exclusion based on age.}}
【用法說明】exclusion 指不被納入或被排除
【翻譯】這些規則不允許因年齡而排除任何人。

{{tts en_US:exclusive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】獨家的；專屬的；排他的
【搭配詞】exclusive interview / exclusive club / exclusive offer
【例句】Members get access to exclusive content.
{{tts en_US:Members get access to exclusive content.}}
【用法說明】exclusive 指只有特定人能取得
【翻譯】會員可以看到專屬內容。

{{tts en_US:excuse}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】藉口；原諒；請問
【搭配詞】make an excuse / excuse me / no excuse
【例句】Excuse me, is this seat taken?
{{tts en_US:Excuse me, is this seat taken?}}
【用法說明】excuse 可作名詞或動詞，也常見於禮貌用語
【翻譯】不好意思，這個位子有人坐嗎？

{{tts en_US:execute}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】執行；處決
【搭配詞】execute a plan / execute the task / execute an order
【例句】The team executed the plan well.
{{tts en_US:The team executed the plan well.}}
【用法說明】execute 常見於把計畫落實執行
【翻譯】這個團隊把計畫執行得很好。

{{tts en_US:execution}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】執行；實施；處決
【搭配詞】successful execution / plan execution / public execution
【例句】The idea was good, but the execution was weak.
{{tts en_US:The idea was good, but the execution was weak.}}
【用法說明】execution 指把想法做出來的過程
【翻譯】這個點子不錯，但執行很弱。

{{tts en_US:executive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】主管；行政的
【搭配詞】company executive / executive meeting / executive role
【例句】She is an executive at a tech company.
{{tts en_US:She is an executive at a tech company.}}
【用法說明】executive 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】她是一家科技公司的主管。

{{tts en_US:exempt}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】免除的；豁免的
【搭配詞】be exempt from / tax-exempt / exempt someone from
【例句】Students are exempt from this fee.
{{tts en_US:Students are exempt from this fee.}}
【用法說明】exempt from = 免於
【翻譯】學生可以免繳這筆費用。

{{tts en_US:exercise}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】運動；練習
【搭配詞】do exercise / morning exercise / practice exercise
【例句】I try to get some exercise every day.
{{tts en_US:I try to get some exercise every day.}}
【用法說明】exercise 可指身體運動，也可指練習題
【翻譯】我每天都盡量做點運動。

{{tts en_US:exert}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】施加；運用
【搭配詞】exert pressure / exert influence / exert yourself
【例句】Don't exert too much pressure on yourself.
{{tts en_US:Don't exert too much pressure on yourself.}}
【用法說明】exert 指施加力量、影響或努力
【翻譯】不要給自己太大壓力。

{{tts en_US:exhaust}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】使筋疲力盡；排氣
【搭配詞】exhaust someone / feel exhausted / exhaust all options
【例句】The long trip exhausted me.
{{tts en_US:The long trip exhausted me.}}
【用法說明】exhaust 可指讓人累壞，也可指耗盡
【翻譯】那趟長途旅行把我累壞了。

{{tts en_US:exhibit}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】展出；展覽品
【搭配詞】exhibit artwork / museum exhibit / exhibit at the fair
【例句】The museum is exhibiting local paintings.
{{tts en_US:The museum is exhibiting local paintings.}}
【用法說明】exhibit 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】那間博物館正在展出本地畫作。

{{tts en_US:exhibition}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】展覽；展示
【搭配詞】art exhibition / exhibition hall / hold an exhibition
【例句】We visited an art exhibition on Saturday.
{{tts en_US:We visited an art exhibition on Saturday.}}
【用法說明】exhibition 指公開展出的活動
【翻譯】我們星期六去看了一場藝術展。

{{tts en_US:exile}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】流亡；放逐
【搭配詞】live in exile / political exile / send into exile
【例句】The writer spent years in exile.
{{tts en_US:The writer spent years in exile.}}
【用法說明】exile 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那位作家流亡了好多年。

{{tts en_US:exist}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】存在
【搭配詞】still exist / only exist in / cease to exist
【例句】Do ghosts really exist?
{{tts en_US:Do ghosts really exist?}}
【用法說明】exist 是基本高頻抽象動詞
【翻譯】鬼真的存在嗎？

{{tts en_US:existence}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】存在；生活
【搭配詞】proof of existence / human existence / daily existence
【例句】Scientists found no evidence of its existence.
{{tts en_US:Scientists found no evidence of its existence.}}
【用法說明】existence 指存在這件事
【翻譯】科學家沒有找到它存在的證據。

{{tts en_US:exit}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】出口；離開
【搭配詞】emergency exit / exit the building / nearest exit
【例句】Please use the back exit.
{{tts en_US:Please use the back exit.}}
【用法說明】exit 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】請走後門出口。

{{tts en_US:exotic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】異國風的；奇特的
【搭配詞】exotic fruit / exotic location / look exotic
【例句】We tried some exotic fruit at the market.
{{tts en_US:We tried some exotic fruit at the market.}}
【用法說明】exotic 指來自異地、感覺特別
【翻譯】我們在市場吃了一些異國水果。

{{tts en_US:expand}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】擴大；擴展
【搭配詞】expand the business / expand your knowledge / expand rapidly
【例句】The company plans to expand next year.
{{tts en_US:The company plans to expand next year.}}
【用法說明】expand 指規模或範圍變大
【翻譯】那家公司打算明年擴張。

{{tts en_US:expansion}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】擴張；擴大
【搭配詞】business expansion / rapid expansion / expansion plan
【例句】The store is planning an expansion.
{{tts en_US:The store is planning an expansion.}}
【用法說明】expansion 指擴大後的發展
【翻譯】那家店正在規劃擴張。

{{tts en_US:expect}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】期待；預期
【搭配詞】expect to / expect that / expect too much
【例句】I didn't expect the test to be so hard.
{{tts en_US:I didn't expect the test to be so hard.}}
【用法說明】expect 常接 to V 或 that 子句
【翻譯】我沒想到考試會這麼難。

{{tts en_US:expectation}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】期待；預期
【搭配詞】meet expectations / high expectation / exceed expectations
【例句】The movie didn't meet my expectations.
{{tts en_US:The movie didn't meet my expectations.}}
【用法說明】expectation 指事先的期待
【翻譯】那部電影沒有達到我的期待。

{{tts en_US:expedition}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】遠征；探險
【搭配詞】scientific expedition / mountain expedition / join an expedition
【例句】The team went on an expedition to the Arctic.
{{tts en_US:The team went on an expedition to the Arctic.}}
【用法說明】expedition 指有目的的探險旅程
【翻譯】那支隊伍前往北極進行探險。

{{tts en_US:expenditure}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】支出；開銷
【搭配詞】government expenditure / household expenditure / reduce expenditure
【例句】The report shows a rise in health expenditure.
{{tts en_US:The report shows a rise in health expenditure.}}
【用法說明】expenditure 是較正式的『支出』
【翻譯】報告顯示醫療支出上升了。

{{tts en_US:expense}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】費用；花費
【搭配詞】travel expense / at my expense / cut expenses
【例句】We need to keep our expenses low.
{{tts en_US:We need to keep our expenses low.}}
【用法說明】expense 指花出去的費用
【翻譯】我們得把開銷控制低一點。

{{tts en_US:expensive}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】昂貴的
【搭配詞】too expensive / expensive meal / look expensive
【例句】This restaurant is too expensive for me.
{{tts en_US:This restaurant is too expensive for me.}}
【用法說明】expensive 形容價格高
【翻譯】這家餐廳對我來說太貴了。

{{tts en_US:experience}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】經驗；經歷
【搭配詞】work experience / personal experience / have experience
【例句】She has a lot of teaching experience.
{{tts en_US:She has a lot of teaching experience.}}
【用法說明】experience 可指知識累積，也可指親身經歷
【翻譯】她有很多教學經驗。

{{tts en_US:experiment}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】實驗；試驗
【搭配詞】science experiment / conduct an experiment / experiment with
【例句】The students did a simple experiment in class.
{{tts en_US:The students did a simple experiment in class.}}
【用法說明】experiment 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】學生們在課堂上做了一個簡單的實驗。

{{tts en_US:experimental}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】實驗性的
【搭配詞】experimental method / experimental film / still experimental
【例句】This treatment is still experimental.
{{tts en_US:This treatment is still experimental.}}
【用法說明】experimental 指還在測試階段
【翻譯】這種療法仍在實驗階段。

{{tts en_US:expert}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】專家；熟練的
【搭配詞】language expert / be an expert in / expert advice
【例句】She's an expert in child development.
{{tts en_US:She's an expert in child development.}}
【用法說明】expert 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】她是兒童發展方面的專家。

{{tts en_US:expertise}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】專業知識；專長
【搭配詞】technical expertise / area of expertise / share your expertise
【例句】We need someone with financial expertise.
{{tts en_US:We need someone with financial expertise.}}
【用法說明】expertise 指專門領域的能力與知識
【翻譯】我們需要有財務專長的人。

{{tts en_US:expiration}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】到期；期限屆滿
【搭配詞】expiration date / card expiration / nearing expiration
【例句】Check the expiration date before you buy it.
{{tts en_US:Check the expiration date before you buy it.}}
【用法說明】expiration 常見於食品或證件到期
【翻譯】你買之前先看保存期限。

{{tts en_US:expire}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】到期；失效；斷氣
【搭配詞】expire soon / passport expired / expire at the end
【例句】My passport will expire next month.
{{tts en_US:My passport will expire next month.}}
【用法說明】expire 常指證件或合約到期
【翻譯】我的護照下個月會到期。

{{tts en_US:explain}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】解釋；說明
【搭配詞】explain the reason / explain clearly / explain to someone
【例句】Can you explain this to me again?
{{tts en_US:Can you explain this to me again?}}
【用法說明】explain 指把事情講清楚
【翻譯】你可以再跟我解釋一次嗎？

{{tts en_US:explanation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】解釋；說明
【搭配詞】simple explanation / need an explanation / give an explanation
【例句】I need a better explanation.
{{tts en_US:I need a better explanation.}}
【用法說明】explanation 指說明內容本身
【翻譯】我需要一個更清楚的解釋。

{{tts en_US:explicit}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】明確的；直白的
【搭配詞】explicit instruction / explicit detail / be explicit about
【例句】The teacher gave us explicit instructions.
{{tts en_US:The teacher gave us explicit instructions.}}
【用法說明】explicit 指說得非常清楚、不含糊
【翻譯】老師給了我們非常明確的指示。

{{tts en_US:explode}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】爆炸；激增
【搭配詞】bomb explode / explode with anger / prices explode
【例句】The balloon exploded with a loud pop.
{{tts en_US:The balloon exploded with a loud pop.}}
【用法說明】explode 可指真的爆炸，也可比喻情緒爆發
【翻譯】氣球砰的一聲爆掉了。

{{tts en_US:exploit}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】利用；剝削；功績
【搭配詞】exploit workers / exploit a weakness / military exploit
【例句】Some companies exploit cheap labor.
{{tts en_US:Some companies exploit cheap labor.}}
【用法說明】exploit 常見負面義，指利用或剝削
【翻譯】有些公司會剝削廉價勞工。

{{tts en_US:exploration}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】探索；探勘
【搭配詞】space exploration / exploration of ideas / scientific exploration
【例句】Space exploration has always fascinated her.
{{tts en_US:Space exploration has always fascinated her.}}
【用法說明】exploration 指探索未知的過程
【翻譯】太空探索一直很吸引她。

{{tts en_US:explore}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】探索；探究
【搭配詞】explore the city / explore an idea / explore options
【例句】We spent the day exploring the old town.
{{tts en_US:We spent the day exploring the old town.}}
【用法說明】explore 指實際去看或深入了解
【翻譯】我們花了一整天探索老城區。

{{tts en_US:explosion}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】爆炸；激增
【搭配詞】gas explosion / population explosion / hear an explosion
【例句】There was an explosion in the factory.
{{tts en_US:There was an explosion in the factory.}}
【用法說明】explosion 可指爆炸，也可比喻快速增加
【翻譯】工廠裡發生了爆炸。

{{tts en_US:explosive}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】爆炸性的；炸藥
【搭配詞】explosive growth / explosive material / highly explosive
【例句】The chemicals are highly explosive.
{{tts en_US:The chemicals are highly explosive.}}
【用法說明】explosive 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】這些化學品非常容易爆炸。

{{tts en_US:export}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】出口；輸出
【搭配詞】export goods / major export / export to Japan
【例句】The company exports tea to Europe.
{{tts en_US:The company exports tea to Europe.}}
【用法說明】export 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】那家公司把茶出口到歐洲。

{{tts en_US:expose}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】暴露；揭露；使接觸
【搭配詞】expose the truth / expose skin / expose to sunlight
【例句】The report exposed several serious problems.
{{tts en_US:The report exposed several serious problems.}}
【用法說明】expose 指讓某事顯露出來
【翻譯】那份報告揭露了幾個嚴重問題。

{{tts en_US:exposure}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】暴露；接觸；曝光
【搭配詞】sun exposure / media exposure / exposure to risk
【例句】Too much sun exposure can damage your skin.
{{tts en_US:Too much sun exposure can damage your skin.}}
【用法說明】exposure 指接觸某物的狀態
【翻譯】曬太多太陽會傷皮膚。

{{tts en_US:express}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】表達；快遞；特快的
【搭配詞】express your feelings / express train / express concern
【例句】It's okay to express your opinion.
{{tts en_US:It's okay to express your opinion.}}
【用法說明】express 可作動詞或形容詞
【翻譯】表達自己的意見沒有問題。

{{tts en_US:expression}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】表情；表達；詞語
【搭配詞】facial expression / self-expression / common expression
【例句】Her expression changed when she heard the news.
{{tts en_US:Her expression changed when she heard the news.}}
【用法說明】expression 可指臉上表情或語言表達
【翻譯】她聽到消息後表情變了。

{{tts en_US:expressive}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】富有表現力的
【搭配詞】expressive eyes / expressive voice / highly expressive
【例句】The actor has a very expressive face.
{{tts en_US:The actor has a very expressive face.}}
【用法說明】expressive 形容很能傳達情感
【翻譯】那位演員的臉很有表現力。

{{tts en_US:extend}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】延長；伸出；擴大
【搭配詞】extend the deadline / extend your hand / extend help
【例句】We decided to extend the deadline by two days.
{{tts en_US:We decided to extend the deadline by two days.}}
【用法說明】extend 指讓時間或範圍變長
【翻譯】我們決定把期限延長兩天。

{{tts en_US:extension}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】延長；分機；擴建
【搭配詞】file extension / phone extension / deadline extension
【例句】I asked for an extension on the assignment.
{{tts en_US:I asked for an extension on the assignment.}}
【用法說明】extension 可指延長的時間，也可指檔案副檔名
【翻譯】我申請了作業延期。

{{tts en_US:extensive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】廣泛的；大量的
【搭配詞】extensive damage / extensive research / extensive experience
【例句】The storm caused extensive damage.
{{tts en_US:The storm caused extensive damage.}}
【用法說明】extensive 指範圍很大
【翻譯】暴風雨造成了大範圍損害。

{{tts en_US:extent}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】程度；範圍
【搭配詞】to some extent / full extent / extent of the damage
【例句】I agree with you to some extent.
{{tts en_US:I agree with you to some extent.}}
【用法說明】to some extent 很常見
【翻譯】某種程度上我同意你。

{{tts en_US:exterior}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】外部；外觀
【搭配詞】building exterior / exterior wall / exterior design
【例句】The house has a simple exterior.
{{tts en_US:The house has a simple exterior.}}
【用法說明】exterior 指外面部分
【翻譯】那棟房子的外觀很簡單。

{{tts en_US:external}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】外部的；外來的
【搭配詞】external drive / external factor / external pressure
【例句】Save the file on an external drive.
{{tts en_US:Save the file on an external drive.}}
【用法說明】external 指來自外部或位於外面的
【翻譯】把檔案存到外接硬碟裡。

{{tts en_US:extinct}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】滅絕的
【搭配詞】go extinct / extinct species / become extinct
【例句】Some animals are now extinct.
{{tts en_US:Some animals are now extinct.}}
【用法說明】extinct 指已經消失不復存在
【翻譯】有些動物現在已經滅絕了。

{{tts en_US:extra}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】額外的；另外的
【搭配詞】extra time / extra money / extra chair
【例句】Could I get an extra fork?
{{tts en_US:Could I get an extra fork?}}
【用法說明】extra 指比原本更多一份
【翻譯】我可以多拿一支叉子嗎？

{{tts en_US:extract}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】提取；摘錄
【搭配詞】extract information / vanilla extract / extract from
【例句】The machine extracts juice from the fruit.
{{tts en_US:The machine extracts juice from the fruit.}}
【用法說明】extract 可指取出液體、資訊或文字
【翻譯】那台機器會從水果中榨出汁。

{{tts en_US:extracurricular}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】課外的
【搭配詞】extracurricular activity / extracurricular club / extracurricular program
【例句】She joined several extracurricular activities.
{{tts en_US:She joined several extracurricular activities.}}
【用法說明】extracurricular 指課堂以外的活動
【翻譯】她參加了好幾個課外活動。

{{tts en_US:extraordinary}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】非凡的；特別的
【搭配詞】extraordinary talent / extraordinary event / quite extraordinary
【例句】She has an extraordinary memory.
{{tts en_US:She has an extraordinary memory.}}
【用法說明】extraordinary 指超出一般水準
【翻譯】她有非凡的記憶力。

{{tts en_US:extreme}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】極端的；極度的
【搭配詞】extreme weather / extreme pain / go to extremes
【例句】The desert has extreme temperatures.
{{tts en_US:The desert has extreme temperatures.}}
【用法說明】extreme 指程度非常大
【翻譯】沙漠的溫差非常極端。

{{tts en_US:eye}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】眼睛
【搭配詞】close your eyes / eye contact / sore eye
【例句】My eyes are tired from reading.
{{tts en_US:My eyes are tired from reading.}}
【用法說明】eye 指眼睛
【翻譯】我看書看到眼睛很累。

{{tts en_US:eyebrow/brow}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】眉毛
【搭配詞】raise your eyebrows / thick brows / eyebrow pencil
【例句】She raised her eyebrows in surprise.
{{tts en_US:She raised her eyebrows in surprise.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 eyebrow 和 brow 放在一起
【翻譯】她驚訝地挑起眉毛。

{{tts en_US:eyelash/lash}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】睫毛
【搭配詞】long eyelashes / fake lashes / brush your lashes
【例句】She has long eyelashes.
{{tts en_US:She has long eyelashes.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 eyelash 和 lash 放在一起
【翻譯】她有很長的睫毛。

{{tts en_US:eyelid}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】眼皮
【搭配詞】close your eyelids / upper eyelid / swollen eyelid
【例句】Her eyelids felt heavy from lack of sleep.
{{tts en_US:Her eyelids felt heavy from lack of sleep.}}
【用法說明】eyelid 指眼皮
【翻譯】她因為睡眠不足，眼皮很沉。

{{tts en_US:eyesight}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】視力
【搭配詞】poor eyesight / improve eyesight / lose your eyesight
【例句】My grandfather's eyesight is getting worse.
{{tts en_US:My grandfather's eyesight is getting worse.}}
【用法說明】eyesight 指看東西的能力
【翻譯】我爺爺的視力越來越差。

{{tts en_US:fable}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】寓言
【搭配詞】Aesop's fables / short fable / moral fable
【例句】The teacher read us a fable about honesty.
{{tts en_US:The teacher read us a fable about honesty.}}
【用法說明】fable 指帶有寓意的小故事
【翻譯】老師讀了一則關於誠實的寓言給我們聽。

{{tts en_US:fabric}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】布料；織物
【搭配詞】cotton fabric / soft fabric / piece of fabric
【例句】This fabric feels really soft.
{{tts en_US:This fabric feels really soft.}}
【用法說明】fabric 指布料材質
【翻譯】這塊布摸起來很柔軟。

{{tts en_US:fabulous}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】極好的；很棒的
【搭配詞】fabulous idea / look fabulous / absolutely fabulous
【例句】You look fabulous in that dress.
{{tts en_US:You look fabulous in that dress.}}
【用法說明】fabulous 是偏口語的強烈稱讚
【翻譯】你穿那件洋裝超好看。

{{tts en_US:face}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】臉；面對；表面
【搭配詞】wash your face / face a problem / on the face of
【例句】She washed her face with cold water.
{{tts en_US:She washed her face with cold water.}}
【用法說明】face 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她用冷水洗了臉。

{{tts en_US:facial}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】臉部的；臉部護理
【搭配詞】facial expression / facial cream / get a facial
【例句】His facial expression said everything.
{{tts en_US:His facial expression said everything.}}
【用法說明】facial 常指臉部相關
【翻譯】他的表情已經說明了一切。

{{tts en_US:facilitate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】促進；使便利
【搭配詞】facilitate communication / facilitate learning / help facilitate
【例句】The app facilitates online learning.
{{tts en_US:The app facilitates online learning.}}
【用法說明】facilitate 指讓事情更容易進行
【翻譯】這個 app 讓線上學習更方便。

{{tts en_US:facility}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】設施；設備；才能
【搭配詞】sports facility / public facility / learning facility
【例句】The new sports facility opens next week.
{{tts en_US:The new sports facility opens next week.}}
【用法說明】facility 常指建築設施或公共設備
【翻譯】新的體育設施下週開放。

{{tts en_US:fact}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】事實；真相
【搭配詞】in fact / face the facts / simple fact
【例句】In fact, I already knew the answer.
{{tts en_US:In fact, I already knew the answer.}}
【用法說明】fact 指真實情況
【翻譯】其實我早就知道答案了。

{{tts en_US:faction}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】派系；小團體
【搭配詞】political faction / rival faction / faction within
【例句】The party was divided into two factions.
{{tts en_US:The party was divided into two factions.}}
【用法說明】faction 指團體內部不同立場的小群體
【翻譯】那個政黨分成了兩派。

{{tts en_US:factor}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】因素；因子
【搭配詞】important factor / risk factor / key factor
【例句】Cost is an important factor in the decision.
{{tts en_US:Cost is an important factor in the decision.}}
【用法說明】factor 指影響結果的原因之一
【翻譯】成本是這個決定裡的重要因素。

{{tts en_US:factory}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】工廠
【搭配詞】car factory / factory worker / work in a factory
【例句】My uncle works in a car factory.
{{tts en_US:My uncle works in a car factory.}}
【用法說明】factory 指生產東西的工廠
【翻譯】我叔叔在汽車工廠上班。

{{tts en_US:faculty}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】教職員；學院；能力
【搭配詞】faculty meeting / language faculty / faculty of science
【例句】The school invited all faculty members to the event.
{{tts en_US:The school invited all faculty members to the event.}}
【用法說明】faculty 常指大學教職員或學院
【翻譯】學校邀請所有教職員參加活動。

{{tts en_US:fade}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】褪色；逐漸消失
【搭配詞】fade away / fade in the sun / memory fades
【例句】The color faded after many washes.
{{tts en_US:The color faded after many washes.}}
【用法說明】fade 指顏色、聲音、記憶等慢慢變淡
【翻譯】洗了很多次之後，顏色褪掉了。

{{tts en_US:Fahrenheit}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】華氏溫標
【搭配詞】degrees Fahrenheit / 70 Fahrenheit / Fahrenheit scale
【例句】The weather report said it was 68 degrees Fahrenheit.
{{tts en_US:The weather report said it was 68 degrees Fahrenheit.}}
【用法說明】Fahrenheit 是華氏溫標
【翻譯】天氣報告說是華氏六十八度。

{{tts en_US:fail}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】失敗；未做到；不及格
【搭配詞】fail a test / fail to do / fail badly
【例句】I don't want to fail the exam.
{{tts en_US:I don't want to fail the exam.}}
【用法說明】fail 可指考試不及格或事情失敗
【翻譯】我不想考試不及格。

{{tts en_US:failure}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】失敗；失敗者；故障
【搭配詞】complete failure / fear of failure / engine failure
【例句】The plan was a complete failure.
{{tts en_US:The plan was a complete failure.}}
【用法說明】failure 指失敗的結果，也可指機器故障
【翻譯】這個計畫徹底失敗了。

{{tts en_US:faint}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】微弱的；昏倒；隱約的
【搭配詞】faint voice / faint smell / faint from heat
【例句】I heard a faint sound outside.
{{tts en_US:I heard a faint sound outside.}}
【用法說明】faint 可指聲音、氣味微弱，也可指昏倒
【翻譯】我聽到外面有個微弱的聲音。

{{tts en_US:fair}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】公平的；合理的；市集
【搭配詞】fair decision / fair price / job fair
【例句】That's a fair question.
{{tts en_US:That's a fair question.}}
【用法說明】fair 常指公平合理
【翻譯】那是個很合理的問題。

{{tts en_US:fairly}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】相當地；還算；公平地
【搭配詞】fairly easy / fairly well / treat someone fairly
【例句】The test was fairly easy.
{{tts en_US:The test was fairly easy.}}
【用法說明】fairly 常表示『還算、相當』
【翻譯】這次考試還算簡單。

{{tts en_US:fairy}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】仙子；小精靈
【搭配詞】fairy tale / fairy wings / tooth fairy
【例句】The child was dressed like a fairy.
{{tts en_US:The child was dressed like a fairy.}}
【用法說明】fairy 常見於童話故事
【翻譯】那個孩子打扮得像個小仙子。

{{tts en_US:faith}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】信念；信仰
【搭配詞】have faith / lose faith / faith in yourself
【例句】You need to have faith in yourself.
{{tts en_US:You need to have faith in yourself.}}
【用法說明】faith 可指宗教信仰，也可指信心
【翻譯】你要對自己有信心。

{{tts en_US:faithful}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】忠實的；忠誠的
【搭配詞】faithful dog / faithful friend / remain faithful
【例句】The dog stayed faithful to its owner.
{{tts en_US:The dog stayed faithful to its owner.}}
【用法說明】faithful 指長期忠誠不變
【翻譯】那隻狗一直忠於主人。

{{tts en_US:fake}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】假的；假貨；偽造
【搭配詞】fake smile / fake news / fake a reason
【例句】That watch looks fake.
{{tts en_US:That watch looks fake.}}
【用法說明】fake 可作形容詞、名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那支手錶看起來是假的。

{{tts en_US:fall}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】掉落；秋天；下降
【搭配詞】fall down / fall asleep / in the fall
【例句】Be careful not to fall.
{{tts en_US:Be careful not to fall.}}
【用法說明】fall 用法很多，最常見是跌倒或掉下
【翻譯】小心不要跌倒。

{{tts en_US:false}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】錯誤的；假的
【搭配詞】false alarm / false information / false hope
【例句】The story turned out to be false.
{{tts en_US:The story turned out to be false.}}
【用法說明】false 指不真實或錯誤
【翻譯】結果那個故事是假的。

{{tts en_US:falter}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】結巴；猶豫；衰弱
【搭配詞】voice falter / begin to falter / not falter
【例句】Her voice faltered when she spoke.
{{tts en_US:Her voice faltered when she spoke.}}
【用法說明】falter 指聲音或表現突然變弱、猶豫
【翻譯】她說話時聲音有些顫抖。

{{tts en_US:fame}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】名氣；名聲
【搭配詞】rise to fame / international fame / seek fame
【例句】She found fame at a young age.
{{tts en_US:She found fame at a young age.}}
【用法說明】fame 指很多人知道你的名聲
【翻譯】她很年輕就成名了。

{{tts en_US:familiar}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】熟悉的
【搭配詞】be familiar with / look familiar / sound familiar
【例句】This song sounds familiar.
{{tts en_US:This song sounds familiar.}}
【用法說明】familiar 指以前見過、聽過而覺得熟悉
【翻譯】這首歌聽起來很熟。

{{tts en_US:familiarity}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】熟悉；熟悉感
【搭配詞】sense of familiarity / familiarity with / growing familiarity
【例句】Her familiarity with the system saved us time.
{{tts en_US:Her familiarity with the system saved us time.}}
【用法說明】familiarity 指對某事很熟悉的程度
【翻譯】她對系統的熟悉幫我們省了很多時間。

{{tts en_US:family}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】家庭；家人
【搭配詞】family dinner / family member / start a family
【例句】My family eats together every Sunday.
{{tts en_US:My family eats together every Sunday.}}
【用法說明】family 指家人或家庭單位
【翻譯】我們家每個星期天都一起吃飯。

{{tts en_US:famous}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】有名的
【搭配詞】famous actor / famous for / become famous
【例句】That restaurant is famous for its noodles.
{{tts en_US:That restaurant is famous for its noodles.}}
【用法說明】famous for = 因…有名
【翻譯】那家餐廳以麵聞名。

{{tts en_US:fan}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】粉絲；風扇
【搭配詞】huge fan / ceiling fan / fan of
【例句】I'm a big fan of that singer.
{{tts en_US:I'm a big fan of that singer.}}
【用法說明】fan 可指愛好者，也可指風扇
【翻譯】我是那位歌手的大粉絲。

{{tts en_US:fancy}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】花俏的；想要；高級的
【搭配詞】fancy restaurant / fancy doing / look fancy
【例句】Do you fancy some coffee?
{{tts en_US:Do you fancy some coffee?}}
【用法說明】fancy 在英式口語裡可表示『想要』
【翻譯】你想喝點咖啡嗎？

{{tts en_US:fantastic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】極好的；太棒的
【搭配詞】fantastic job / fantastic news / sound fantastic
【例句】You did a fantastic job.
{{tts en_US:You did a fantastic job.}}
【用法說明】fantastic 是強烈稱讚用語
【翻譯】你做得太棒了。

{{tts en_US:fantasy}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】幻想；奇幻作品
【搭配詞】fantasy world / live in a fantasy / fantasy novel
【例句】She loves reading fantasy novels.
{{tts en_US:She loves reading fantasy novels.}}
【用法說明】fantasy 指想像中的不真實世界
【翻譯】她很喜歡看奇幻小說。

{{tts en_US:far}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】遠；很；到…程度
【搭配詞】far away / so far / far better
【例句】The station is too far to walk.
{{tts en_US:The station is too far to walk.}}
【用法說明】far 可表示距離遠，也可強調程度
【翻譯】車站太遠，走路去不了。

{{tts en_US:fare}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】票價；餐食；表現
【搭配詞】bus fare / traditional fare / how did you fare
【例句】How much is the bus fare?
{{tts en_US:How much is the bus fare?}}
【用法說明】fare 常指交通票價
【翻譯】公車票多少錢？

{{tts en_US:farewell}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】告別；再見
【搭配詞】farewell party / say farewell / farewell speech
【例句】We had a farewell dinner for her.
{{tts en_US:We had a farewell dinner for her.}}
【用法說明】farewell 指離別時的告別
【翻譯】我們為她辦了一場送別晚餐。

{{tts en_US:farm}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】農場；耕作
【搭配詞】on a farm / dairy farm / farm animals
【例句】He grew up on a farm.
{{tts en_US:He grew up on a farm.}}
【用法說明】farm 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他在農場長大。

{{tts en_US:farmer}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】農夫
【搭配詞】rice farmer / local farmer / farmer's market
【例句】The farmer was working in the field.
{{tts en_US:The farmer was working in the field.}}
【用法說明】farmer 指務農的人
【翻譯】那位農夫正在田裡工作。

{{tts en_US:farther}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】更遠地；較遠的
【搭配詞】farther away / go farther / farther than
【例句】The next town is farther than I thought.
{{tts en_US:The next town is farther than I thought.}}
【用法說明】farther 常用於實際距離
【翻譯】下一個城鎮比我想的還遠。

{{tts en_US:fascinate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】使著迷；使入迷
【搭配詞】fascinate someone / really fascinate / be fascinated by
【例句】Space has always fascinated me.
{{tts en_US:Space has always fascinated me.}}
【用法說明】fascinate 指讓人非常感興趣
【翻譯】太空一直都讓我很著迷。

{{tts en_US:fascination}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】著迷；迷戀
【搭配詞】with fascination / source of fascination / deep fascination
【例句】Children watched the magician with fascination.
{{tts en_US:Children watched the magician with fascination.}}
【用法說明】fascination 指被深深吸引的感覺
【翻譯】孩子們著迷地看著魔術師。

{{tts en_US:fashion}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】時尚；方式
【搭配詞】fashion show / in fashion / old-fashioned
【例句】She works in the fashion industry.
{{tts en_US:She works in the fashion industry.}}
【用法說明】fashion 最常指時尚與穿搭風格
【翻譯】她在時尚產業工作。

{{tts en_US:fashionable}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】時髦的；流行的
【搭配詞】fashionable clothes / look fashionable / fashionable area
【例句】That coat is simple but fashionable.
{{tts en_US:That coat is simple but fashionable.}}
【用法說明】fashionable 指符合流行
【翻譯】那件外套很簡單但很時髦。

{{tts en_US:fast}}

【例句】This computer is much faster than mine.
{{tts en_US:This computer is much faster than mine.}}
【用法說明】fast 可作形容詞或副詞
【翻譯】這台電腦比我的快多了。

{{tts en_US:fasten}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】繫緊；扣好
【搭配詞】fasten your seatbelt / fasten the button / fasten tightly

{{tts en_US:Please fasten your seatbelt.}}
【用法說明】fasten 指把東西扣牢、繫好
【翻譯】請繫好安全帶。

{{tts en_US:fat}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】胖的；脂肪
【搭配詞】body fat / too fat / fat cat
【例句】The cat was soft and fat.
{{tts en_US:The cat was soft and fat.}}
【用法說明】fat 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】那隻貓又胖又軟。

{{tts en_US:fatal}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】致命的；毀滅性的
【搭配詞】fatal accident / fatal mistake / prove fatal
【例句】It was a fatal mistake.
{{tts en_US:It was a fatal mistake.}}
【用法說明】fatal 可指造成死亡，也可比喻後果嚴重
【翻譯】那是一個致命的錯誤。

{{tts en_US:fate}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】命運
【搭配詞】change your fate / leave it to fate / cruel fate
【例句】They believed it was fate that brought them together.

【用法說明】fate 指命運安排
【翻譯】他們相信是命運讓他們相遇。

{{tts en_US:father}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】父親
【搭配詞】my father / father and son / become a father
【例句】My father makes breakfast every Sunday.
{{tts en_US:My father makes breakfast every Sunday.}}
【用法說明】father 指爸爸、父親
【翻譯】我爸爸每個星期天都會做早餐。

{{tts en_US:fatigue}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】疲勞；疲憊
【搭配詞】mental fatigue / physical fatigue / signs of fatigue

{{tts en_US:Long hours can lead to fatigue.}}
【用法說明】fatigue 是較正式的『疲勞』
【翻譯】長時間工作可能導致疲勞。

{{tts en_US:faucet}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】水龍頭
【搭配詞】turn on the faucet / kitchen faucet / leaky faucet

{{tts en_US:The faucet in the bathroom is leaking.}}
【用法說明】faucet 指水龍頭
【翻譯】浴室的水龍頭在漏水。

{{tts en_US:fault}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】錯；缺點；責任
【搭配詞】my fault / find fault / fault line
【例句】It was my fault that we were late.
{{tts en_US:It was my fault that we were late.}}
【用法說明】fault 指過失或責任
【翻譯】我們遲到是我的錯。

{{tts en_US:favor}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】幫忙；偏愛；支持
【搭配詞】do me a favor / in favor of / favor one side

{{tts en_US:Could you do me a favor?}}
【用法說明】do someone a favor 很常見
【翻譯】你可以幫我一個忙嗎？

{{tts en_US:favorable}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】有利的；良好的
【搭配詞】favorable result / favorable conditions / favorable review
【例句】The weather looks favorable for the trip.
{{tts en_US:The weather looks favorable for the trip.}}
【用法說明】favorable 指對某事有利
【翻譯】這天氣看起來很適合旅行。

{{tts en_US:favorite}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】最喜歡的
【搭配詞】favorite food / my favorite / all-time favorite
【例句】Blue is my favorite color.
{{tts en_US:Blue is my favorite color.}}
【用法說明】favorite 指最喜愛的人或物
【翻譯】藍色是我最喜歡的顏色。

{{tts en_US:fax}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】傳真；傳真機
【搭配詞】send a fax / fax machine / fax number
【例句】The office still uses a fax machine.
{{tts en_US:The office still uses a fax machine.}}
【用法說明】fax 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那間辦公室還在用傳真機。

{{tts en_US:fear}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】害怕；恐懼
【搭配詞】fear of heights / feel fear / fear that
【例句】She has a fear of flying.
{{tts en_US:She has a fear of flying.}}
【用法說明】fear 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她害怕搭飛機。

{{tts en_US:fearful}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】害怕的；令人害怕的
【搭配詞】fearful of / look fearful / fearful night
【例句】The child looked fearful in the dark.
{{tts en_US:The child looked fearful in the dark.}}
【用法說明】fearful 形容感到害怕或令人害怕
【翻譯】那個孩子在黑暗中看起來很害怕。

{{tts en_US:feasible}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】可行的；辦得到的
【搭配詞】feasible plan / financially feasible / technically feasible
【例句】This plan sounds feasible to me.
{{tts en_US:This plan sounds feasible to me.}}
【用法說明】feasible 指實際上做得到、可執行
【翻譯】這個計畫在我看來是可行的。

{{tts en_US:feast}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】盛宴；大吃一頓
【搭配詞】wedding feast / feast on / a feast of
【例句】We had a big feast on New Year's Eve.
{{tts en_US:We had a big feast on New Year's Eve.}}
【用法說明】feast 指豐盛的大餐
【翻譯】我們在跨年前夕吃了一頓大餐。

{{tts en_US:feather}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】羽毛
【搭配詞】bird feather / soft feather / feather pillow
【例句】A feather floated down from the tree.
{{tts en_US:A feather floated down from the tree.}}
【用法說明】feather 指鳥類羽毛
【翻譯】一根羽毛從樹上飄了下來。

{{tts en_US:feature}}

【搭配詞】main feature / special feature / safety feature

{{tts en_US:One useful feature of this app is offline mode.}}
【用法說明】feature 可指產品功能或事物特色
【翻譯】這個 app 很實用的一個功能是離線模式。

{{tts en_US:federal}}
【等級】Level 5

【搭配詞】federal government / federal law / federal judge

【用法說明】federal 常見於聯邦制國家的政府用語
【翻譯】這件事由聯邦政府處理。

{{tts en_US:fee}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】費用；手續費
【搭配詞】service fee / entrance fee / pay a fee
【例句】There is no extra fee for delivery.
{{tts en_US:There is no extra fee for delivery.}}
【用法說明】fee 指為服務或手續支付的費用
【翻譯】配送不另外收費。

{{tts en_US:feeble}}

【翻譯】虛弱的；微弱的

{{tts en_US:He gave a feeble smile.}}
【用法說明】feeble 指力氣小、很弱
【翻譯】他勉強擠出一個虛弱的笑容。

{{tts en_US:feed}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】餵；供給
【搭配詞】feed the cat / feed on / feed information into

{{tts en_US:feedback}}

{{tts en_US:feel}}

【翻譯】感覺；摸起來

{{tts en_US:I feel much better today.}}

{{tts en_US:feeling}}

{{tts en_US:fellow}}

{{tts en_US:female}}

【搭配詞】female student / female doctor / female cat
【例句】The hospital hired more female doctors.
{{tts en_US:The hospital hired more female doctors.}}

{{tts en_US:feminine}}

【翻譯】女性化的
【搭配詞】feminine style / feminine voice / look feminine

{{tts en_US:She likes soft, feminine colors.}}

{{tts en_US:fence}}

【搭配詞】wooden fence / jump the fence / paint the fence

{{tts en_US:The dog ran along the fence.}}
【用法說明】fence 指圍住空間的柵欄

{{tts en_US:ferry}}

【翻譯】渡輪；擺渡
【搭配詞】take a ferry / ferry terminal / ferry people across

{{tts en_US:fertile}}

{{tts en_US:fertility}}

【翻譯】肥沃；生育力
【搭配詞】soil fertility / fertility rate / fertility treatment
【例句】The region is known for its soil fertility.
{{tts en_US:The region is known for its soil fertility.}}
【用法說明】fertility 可指土地或生育能力
【翻譯】這個地區以土壤肥沃聞名。

{{tts en_US:fertilizer}}

【翻譯】肥料
【搭配詞】chemical fertilizer / organic fertilizer / use fertilizer
【例句】The farmer spread fertilizer over the field.
{{tts en_US:The farmer spread fertilizer over the field.}}

【翻譯】那位農夫把肥料撒在田裡。

{{tts en_US:festival}}

【翻譯】節日；慶典；影展
【搭配詞】music festival / spring festival / film festival
【例句】We went to a lantern festival last night.
{{tts en_US:We went to a lantern festival last night.}}
【用法說明】festival 指大型慶典活動

{{tts en_US:fetch}}

【翻譯】去拿來；取回

【例句】Could you fetch me a glass of water?

{{tts en_US:fever}}

{{tts en_US:few}}

{{tts en_US:Only a few people know the truth.}}

{{tts en_US:fiber}}

【翻譯】纖維

{{tts en_US:Vegetables are high in fiber.}}

{{tts en_US:fiction}}

【搭配詞】science fiction / fiction writer / work of fiction

{{tts en_US:She enjoys reading historical fiction.}}
【用法說明】fiction 指虛構文學作品
【翻譯】她喜歡讀歷史小說。

{{tts en_US:field}}

【搭配詞】soccer field / field of study / work in the field

{{tts en_US:fierce}}

【搭配詞】fierce competition / fierce wind / fierce dog

{{tts en_US:fight}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】打架；戰鬥；努力對抗
【搭配詞】fight with / fight for / get in a fight

{{tts en_US:The two boys started to fight.}}

【翻譯】那兩個男孩打起來了。

{{tts en_US:fighter}}

【翻譯】戰士；鬥士；戰機
【搭配詞】brave fighter / freedom fighter / fighter jet
【例句】She's a strong fighter who never gives up.

【用法說明】fighter 可比喻意志堅強的人

{{tts en_US:figure}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】數字；人物；認為；想
【搭配詞】public figure / sales figures / figure out
【例句】I can't figure out the answer.
{{tts en_US:I can't figure out the answer.}}

{{tts en_US:file}}

【翻譯】檔案；文件夾；歸檔
【搭配詞】save a file / computer file / file a report
【例句】Please save the file before you close it.

【用法說明】file 可指電子檔，也可作動詞表示提交

{{tts en_US:fill}}

【翻譯】裝滿；填寫
【搭配詞】fill the bottle / fill in a form / fill up

{{tts en_US:filter}}

【翻譯】過濾；濾器
【搭配詞】water filter / filter the air / coffee filter
【例句】This app lets you filter the results.

{{tts en_US:fin}}

【翻譯】鰭；魚翅

{{tts en_US:final}}

【翻譯】最後的；決賽；期末考

{{tts en_US:finally}}

{{tts en_US:finance}}
