{{tts en_US:heighten}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】提高；加強
【搭配詞】heighten awareness / heighten the tension / heighten interest
【例句】The music heightened the mood.
{{tts en_US:The music heightened the mood.}}
【用法說明】heighten 指讓程度變高
【翻譯】音樂讓氣氛更強烈了。

{{tts en_US:heir}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】繼承人
【搭配詞】sole heir / heir to the fortune / royal heir
【例句】He is the heir to the family business.
{{tts en_US:He is the heir to the family business.}}
【用法說明】heir 指財產或地位的繼承人
【翻譯】他是家族企業的繼承人。

{{tts en_US:helicopter}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】直升機
【搭配詞】rescue helicopter / fly a helicopter / helicopter ride
【例句】A helicopter flew over the mountain.
{{tts en_US:A helicopter flew over the mountain.}}
【用法說明】helicopter 指直升機
【翻譯】一架直升機飛過山頭。

{{tts en_US:hell}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】地獄；很糟的處境
【搭配詞】go through hell / what the hell / from hell
【例句】The week from hell is finally over.
{{tts en_US:The week from hell is finally over.}}
【用法說明】hell 除了宗教意義，也常口語強調很糟
【翻譯】那個地獄般的一週終於結束了。

{{tts en_US:hello}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】哈囉；你好
【搭配詞】say hello / hello there / hello everyone
【例句】Hello, how are you?
{{tts en_US:Hello, how are you?}}
【用法說明】hello 是最基本的打招呼用語
【翻譯】哈囉，你好嗎？

{{tts en_US:helmet}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】安全帽；頭盔
【搭配詞】wear a helmet / bike helmet / safety helmet
【例句】Always wear a helmet when riding a bike.
{{tts en_US:Always wear a helmet when riding a bike.}}
【用法說明】helmet 指保護頭部的裝備
【翻譯】騎腳踏車時一定要戴安全帽。

{{tts en_US:help}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】幫助
【搭配詞】help me / ask for help / help with homework
【例句】Can you help me with this?
{{tts en_US:Can you help me with this?}}
【用法說明】help 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】你可以幫我一下嗎？

{{tts en_US:helpful}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】有幫助的；樂於助人的
【搭配詞】helpful advice / very helpful / helpful teacher
【例句】Your suggestion was really helpful.
{{tts en_US:Your suggestion was really helpful.}}
【用法說明】helpful 可形容人或建議有幫助
【翻譯】你的建議真的很有幫助。

{{tts en_US:hemisphere}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】半球
【搭配詞】northern hemisphere / southern hemisphere / western hemisphere
【例句】Australia is in the southern hemisphere.
{{tts en_US:Australia is in the southern hemisphere.}}
【用法說明】hemisphere 指地球半球
【翻譯】澳洲位於南半球。

{{tts en_US:hen}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】母雞
【搭配詞】laying hen / old hen / feed the hens
【例句】The hen laid an egg this morning.
{{tts en_US:The hen laid an egg this morning.}}
【用法說明】hen 指母雞
【翻譯】那隻母雞今天早上下了一顆蛋。

{{tts en_US:hence}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】因此；所以
【搭配詞】hence the name / hence why / and hence
【例句】The roads were icy, hence the delay.
{{tts en_US:The roads were icy, hence the delay.}}
【用法說明】hence 是較正式的『因此』
【翻譯】路面結冰了，因此延誤了。

{{tts en_US:herb}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】香草；藥草
【搭配詞】fresh herb / herb garden / medicinal herb
【例句】She grows herbs on the balcony.
{{tts en_US:She grows herbs on the balcony.}}
【用法說明】herb 指烹飪或藥用植物
【翻譯】她在陽台種香草。

{{tts en_US:herd}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】獸群；放牧
【搭配詞】herd of cows / herd the sheep / elephant herd
【例句】We saw a herd of cows in the field.
{{tts en_US:We saw a herd of cows in the field.}}
【用法說明】herd 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們在田裡看到一群牛。

{{tts en_US:here}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】這裡；在這裡
【搭配詞】come here / right here / here and now
【例句】Please sit here.
{{tts en_US:Please sit here.}}
【用法說明】here 是高頻副詞
【翻譯】請坐這裡。

{{tts en_US:heritage}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】文化遺產；傳統
【搭配詞】cultural heritage / family heritage / world heritage
【例句】The city is proud of its cultural heritage.
{{tts en_US:The city is proud of its cultural heritage.}}
【用法說明】heritage 指祖先傳下來的文化或傳統
【翻譯】這座城市以自己的文化遺產為榮。

{{tts en_US:hero/heroine}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】英雄／女英雄
【搭配詞】movie hero / local heroine / become a hero
【例句】The firefighter became a local hero.
{{tts en_US:The firefighter became a local hero.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 hero 和 heroine 放在一起
【翻譯】那位消防員成了地方英雄。

{{tts en_US:heroic}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】英勇的；英雄般的
【搭配詞】heroic act / heroic effort / look heroic
【例句】The rescue team made a heroic effort.
{{tts en_US:The rescue team made a heroic effort.}}
【用法說明】heroic 指很勇敢、很了不起
【翻譯】救援隊做出了英勇的努力。

{{tts en_US:heroin}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】海洛因
【搭配詞】heroin addiction / heroin use / heroin problem
【例句】The program helps people recover from heroin addiction.
{{tts en_US:The program helps people recover from heroin addiction.}}
【用法說明】heroin 指毒品海洛因
【翻譯】這個計畫幫助人們擺脫海洛因成癮。

{{tts en_US:hesitate}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】猶豫
【搭配詞】hesitate to / don't hesitate / hesitate for a moment
【例句】Don't hesitate to ask questions.
{{tts en_US:Don't hesitate to ask questions.}}
【用法說明】don't hesitate to 是常見用法
【翻譯】有問題就儘管問。

{{tts en_US:hesitation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】猶豫；遲疑
【搭配詞】without hesitation / slight hesitation / show hesitation
【例句】She agreed without hesitation.
{{tts en_US:She agreed without hesitation.}}
【用法說明】hesitation 指不立刻行動的猶豫
【翻譯】她毫不猶豫地答應了。

{{tts en_US:heterosexual}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】異性戀的；異性戀者
【搭配詞】heterosexual couple / identify as heterosexual / heterosexual relationship
【例句】The survey included both heterosexual and same-sex couples.
{{tts en_US:The survey included both heterosexual and same-sex couples.}}
【用法說明】heterosexual 指異性戀相關
【翻譯】這份調查包含異性伴侶和同性伴侶。

{{tts en_US:hide}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】藏；躲藏
【搭配詞】hide the gift / hide behind / hide from
【例句】Where did you hide the key?
{{tts en_US:Where did you hide the key?}}
【用法說明】hide 是高頻基本動詞
【翻譯】你把鑰匙藏哪裡了？

{{tts en_US:hierarchy}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】階層；等級制度
【搭配詞】social hierarchy / company hierarchy / hierarchy of needs
【例句】The company has a clear hierarchy.
{{tts en_US:The company has a clear hierarchy.}}
【用法說明】hierarchy 指由上到下的等級結構
【翻譯】那家公司有清楚的階層制度。

{{tts en_US:high}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】高的；高處；高水平的
【搭配詞】high mountain / high price / jump high
【例句】The shelf is too high for me to reach.
{{tts en_US:The shelf is too high for me to reach.}}
【用法說明】high 可作形容詞、副詞或名詞
【翻譯】這個架子太高了，我拿不到。

{{tts en_US:highlight}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】強調；亮點；標示重點
【搭配詞】highlight the point / trip highlight / highlight text
【例句】The teacher highlighted the key ideas.
{{tts en_US:The teacher highlighted the key ideas.}}
【用法說明】highlight 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】老師把重點標了出來。

{{tts en_US:highly}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】高度地；非常
【搭配詞】highly recommended / highly likely / think highly of
【例句】This book is highly recommended.
{{tts en_US:This book is highly recommended.}}
【用法說明】highly 常用來加強程度
【翻譯】這本書非常值得推薦。

{{tts en_US:highway}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】公路；高速公路
【搭配詞】drive on the highway / highway exit / busy highway
【例句】There was an accident on the highway.
{{tts en_US:There was an accident on the highway.}}
【用法說明】highway 指主要公路或高速公路
【翻譯】高速公路上發生了一起事故。

{{tts en_US:hijack}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】劫持；劫機
【搭配詞】hijack a plane / hijack a truck / hijack the discussion
【例句】The group tried to hijack the bus.
{{tts en_US:The group tried to hijack the bus.}}
【用法說明】hijack 可指真實劫持，也可比喻奪走控制權
【翻譯】那群人試圖劫持那輛巴士。

{{tts en_US:hike}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】健行；提高
【搭配詞】go on a hike / price hike / hike in the mountains
【例句】We went on a hike last weekend.
{{tts en_US:We went on a hike last weekend.}}
【用法說明】hike 可指登山健行，也可指價格上漲
【翻譯】我們上週末去健行了。

{{tts en_US:hill}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】小山；山丘
【搭配詞】climb a hill / grassy hill / top of the hill
【例句】They sat on the hill and watched the sunset.
{{tts en_US:They sat on the hill and watched the sunset.}}
【用法說明】hill 指小山坡
【翻譯】他們坐在山丘上看日落。

{{tts en_US:hint}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】暗示；提示
【搭配詞】drop a hint / hint that / useful hint
【例句】She gave me a hint about the answer.
{{tts en_US:She gave me a hint about the answer.}}
【用法說明】hint 指不直接說破的提示
【翻譯】她給了我一個關於答案的提示。

{{tts en_US:hip}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】臀部；髖部；時髦的
【搭配詞】hurt your hip / hip pain / be hip
【例句】My grandmother hurt her hip.
{{tts en_US:My grandmother hurt her hip.}}
【用法說明】hip 可指身體部位，也可作口語形容詞
【翻譯】我奶奶傷到了髖部。

{{tts en_US:hire}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】雇用；租用
【搭配詞】hire a driver / hire someone / hire a car
【例句】The company plans to hire more staff.
{{tts en_US:The company plans to hire more staff.}}
【用法說明】hire 可指聘人，也可指租東西
【翻譯】那家公司打算再多聘一些員工。

{{tts en_US:historian}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】歷史學家
【搭配詞】famous historian / modern historian / historian of China
【例句】The historian wrote a book about the war.
{{tts en_US:The historian wrote a book about the war.}}
【用法說明】historian 指研究歷史的人
【翻譯】那位歷史學家寫了一本關於那場戰爭的書。

{{tts en_US:historic}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】歷史性的；有歷史意義的
【搭配詞】historic event / historic building / historic moment
【例句】It was a historic moment for the country.
{{tts en_US:It was a historic moment for the country.}}
【用法說明】historic 強調『具有歷史意義』
【翻譯】那對這個國家來說是個歷史性時刻。

{{tts en_US:historical}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】歷史的；與歷史有關的
【搭配詞】historical novel / historical record / historical site
【例句】The museum has many historical documents.
{{tts en_US:The museum has many historical documents.}}
【用法說明】historical 強調『與歷史有關』
【翻譯】那間博物館有很多歷史文件。

{{tts en_US:history}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】歷史；病史
【搭配詞】world history / family history / medical history
【例句】I enjoy studying history.
{{tts en_US:I enjoy studying history.}}
【用法說明】history 可指人類歷史，也可指個人病史
【翻譯】我很喜歡讀歷史。

{{tts en_US:hit}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】打；撞；擊中
【搭配詞】hit the ball / hit your head / hit the target
【例句】Be careful not to hit your head.
{{tts en_US:Be careful not to hit your head.}}
【用法說明】hit 是高頻基本動詞
【翻譯】小心不要撞到頭。

{{tts en_US:hive}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】蜂巢
【搭配詞】bee hive / beehive / hive of activity
【例句】We found a hive in the tree.
{{tts en_US:We found a hive in the tree.}}
【用法說明】hive 指蜂巢，也可比喻忙碌中心
【翻譯】我們在樹上發現了一個蜂巢。

{{tts en_US:hoarse}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】沙啞的
【搭配詞】hoarse voice / sound hoarse / get hoarse
【例句】My voice is still hoarse from singing last night.
{{tts en_US:My voice is still hoarse from singing last night.}}
【用法說明】hoarse 形容嗓音沙啞
【翻譯】我昨晚唱太久，聲音到現在還是沙啞的。

{{tts en_US:hobby}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】嗜好；興趣
【搭配詞】have a hobby / favorite hobby / hobby shop
【例句】Reading is one of my favorite hobbies.
{{tts en_US:Reading is one of my favorite hobbies.}}
【用法說明】hobby 指平常喜歡做的休閒活動
【翻譯】閱讀是我最喜歡的嗜好之一。

{{tts en_US:hockey}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】曲棍球；冰球
【搭配詞】play hockey / hockey team / hockey game
【例句】He joined the school hockey team.
{{tts en_US:He joined the school hockey team.}}
【用法說明】hockey 指曲棍球類運動
【翻譯】他加入了學校的曲棍球隊。

{{tts en_US:hold}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】拿著；舉行；容納
【搭配詞】hold a meeting / hold my hand / hold 100 people
【例句】Can you hold this for a second?
{{tts en_US:Can you hold this for a second?}}
【用法說明】hold 用法很多，常見是拿著或舉行
【翻譯】你可以幫我拿一下這個嗎？

{{tts en_US:holder}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】持有人；支架；容器
【搭配詞】ticket holder / cup holder / card holder
【例句】Put your drink in the cup holder.
{{tts en_US:Put your drink in the cup holder.}}
【用法說明】holder 指用來放某物的架子或持有者
【翻譯】把你的飲料放在杯架裡。

{{tts en_US:hole}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】洞；坑
【搭配詞】small hole / dig a hole / hole in the wall
【例句】There's a hole in my sock.
{{tts en_US:There's a hole in my sock.}}
【用法說明】hole 指洞或破洞
【翻譯】我的襪子破了一個洞。

{{tts en_US:holiday}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】假日；假期
【搭配詞】summer holiday / public holiday / go on holiday
【例句】We're going to the beach during the holiday.
{{tts en_US:We're going to the beach during the holiday.}}
【用法說明】holiday 可指假日或較長的假期
【翻譯】我們假期要去海邊。

{{tts en_US:hollow}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】中空的；空洞的
【搭配詞】hollow tree / hollow sound / feel hollow
【例句】The box sounds hollow.
{{tts en_US:The box sounds hollow.}}
【用法說明】hollow 指裡面是空的
【翻譯】這個箱子敲起來是空的。

{{tts en_US:holy}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】神聖的
【搭配詞】holy place / holy book / holy day
【例句】They visited a holy temple.
{{tts en_US:They visited a holy temple.}}
【用法說明】holy 指宗教上神聖的
【翻譯】他們去了一座神聖的寺廟。

{{tts en_US:home}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】家；回家；本國的
【搭配詞】go home / at home / home page
【例句】I just want to go home and rest.
{{tts en_US:I just want to go home and rest.}}
【用法說明】home 可作名詞、副詞或形容詞
【翻譯】我只想回家休息。

{{tts en_US:homeland}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】祖國；家鄉
【搭配詞】return to your homeland / protect the homeland / homeland culture
【例句】He missed his homeland deeply.
{{tts en_US:He missed his homeland deeply.}}
【用法說明】homeland 指自己的祖國或故鄉
【翻譯】他非常想念自己的家鄉。

{{tts en_US:homesick}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】想家的
【搭配詞】feel homesick / get homesick / homesick student
【例句】I felt homesick during my first week abroad.
{{tts en_US:I felt homesick during my first week abroad.}}
【用法說明】homesick 指離家後思念家鄉
【翻譯】我剛到國外的第一週很想家。

{{tts en_US:hometown}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】家鄉
【搭配詞】my hometown / small hometown / hometown friend
【例句】My hometown is near the mountains.
{{tts en_US:My hometown is near the mountains.}}
【用法說明】hometown 指自己長大的地方
【翻譯】我的家鄉在山附近。

{{tts en_US:homework}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】作業
【搭配詞】do homework / math homework / finish your homework
【例句】I have too much homework tonight.
{{tts en_US:I have too much homework tonight.}}
【用法說明】homework 指學校作業
【翻譯】我今晚作業好多。

{{tts en_US:homosexual}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】同性戀的；同性戀者
【搭配詞】homosexual couple / identify as homosexual / homosexual rights
【例句】The article discusses the history of homosexual rights.
{{tts en_US:The article discusses the history of homosexual rights.}}
【用法說明】homosexual 指同性戀相關
【翻譯】那篇文章討論了同志權利的歷史。

{{tts en_US:honest}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】誠實的
【搭配詞】honest person / be honest with / honest answer
【例句】Please be honest with me.
{{tts en_US:Please be honest with me.}}
【用法說明】honest 指不說謊、真誠
【翻譯】請對我誠實。

{{tts en_US:honesty}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】誠實
【搭配詞】value honesty / honesty is important / honesty and trust
【例句】Honesty is important in any relationship.
{{tts en_US:Honesty is important in any relationship.}}
【用法說明】honesty 指誠實這種品格
【翻譯】誠實在任何關係中都很重要。

{{tts en_US:honey}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】蜂蜜；親愛的
【搭配詞】add honey / honey tea / sweet as honey
【例句】I put a little honey in my tea.
{{tts en_US:I put a little honey in my tea.}}
【用法說明】honey 最常指蜂蜜，也可作親暱稱呼
【翻譯】我在茶裡加了一點蜂蜜。

{{tts en_US:honeymoon}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】蜜月
【搭配詞】go on a honeymoon / honeymoon trip / on their honeymoon
【例句】They went to Bali for their honeymoon.
{{tts en_US:They went to Bali for their honeymoon.}}
【用法說明】honeymoon 指新婚旅行
【翻譯】他們去峇里島度蜜月。

{{tts en_US:honor}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】榮譽；尊敬；使感到榮幸
【搭配詞】in honor of / honor a promise / have the honor
【例句】It was an honor to meet her.
{{tts en_US:It was an honor to meet her.}}
【用法說明】honor 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】能見到她是我的榮幸。

{{tts en_US:honorable}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】可敬的；光榮的
【搭配詞】honorable person / honorable decision / honorable judge
【例句】He is an honorable man.
{{tts en_US:He is an honorable man.}}
【用法說明】honorable 指值得尊敬的
【翻譯】他是個可敬的人。

{{tts en_US:honorary}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】名譽的；榮譽性的
【搭配詞】honorary degree / honorary title / honorary member
【例句】She received an honorary degree from the university.
{{tts en_US:She received an honorary degree from the university.}}
【用法說明】honorary 指象徵性授予的榮譽
【翻譯】她獲得了那所大學頒發的榮譽學位。

{{tts en_US:hook}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】鉤子；鉤住；吸引人的點
【搭配詞】coat hook / hook onto / story hook
【例句】Hang your bag on the hook.
{{tts en_US:Hang your bag on the hook.}}
【用法說明】hook 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】把你的包包掛在鉤子上。

{{tts en_US:hop}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】跳；單腳跳
【搭配詞】hop on one foot / hop over / little hop
【例句】The rabbit hopped across the grass.
{{tts en_US:The rabbit hopped across the grass.}}
【用法說明】hop 指輕快地跳
【翻譯】那隻兔子跳過草地。

{{tts en_US:hope}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】希望；希望做某事
【搭配詞】hope for / hope to / give hope
【例句】I hope you feel better soon.
{{tts en_US:I hope you feel better soon.}}
【用法說明】hope 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】希望你快點好起來。

{{tts en_US:hopeful}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】有希望的；抱持希望的
【搭配詞】be hopeful about / hopeful sign / sound hopeful
【例句】She feels hopeful about the future.
{{tts en_US:She feels hopeful about the future.}}
【用法說明】hopeful 指心裡有希望
【翻譯】她對未來抱有希望。

{{tts en_US:horizon}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】地平線；眼界
【搭配詞】on the horizon / broad horizon / beyond the horizon
【例句】The sun was setting below the horizon.
{{tts en_US:The sun was setting below the horizon.}}
【用法說明】horizon 可指地平線，也可比喻眼界
【翻譯】太陽正落到地平線下。

{{tts en_US:horizontal}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】水平的
【搭配詞】horizontal line / horizontal position / lie horizontal
【例句】Draw a horizontal line across the page.
{{tts en_US:Draw a horizontal line across the page.}}
【用法說明】horizontal 指水平的
【翻譯】在紙上畫一條水平線。

{{tts en_US:hormone}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】荷爾蒙
【搭配詞】stress hormone / hormone level / female hormone
【例句】Exercise can affect hormone levels.
{{tts en_US:Exercise can affect hormone levels.}}
【用法說明】hormone 指身體分泌的荷爾蒙
【翻譯】運動可能會影響荷爾蒙水平。

{{tts en_US:horn}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】角；喇叭；號角
【搭配詞】car horn / animal horn / blow the horn
【例句】Someone honked the car horn.
{{tts en_US:Someone honked the car horn.}}
【用法說明】horn 可指動物的角或車子的喇叭
【翻譯】有人按了汽車喇叭。

{{tts en_US:horrible}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】可怕的；很糟的
【搭配詞】horrible smell / horrible day / feel horrible
【例句】The food tasted horrible.
{{tts en_US:The food tasted horrible.}}
【用法說明】horrible 常用來表示很糟、很可怕
【翻譯】那食物吃起來超難吃。

{{tts en_US:horrify}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】使驚駭；使害怕
【搭配詞】horrify someone / be horrified by / absolutely horrify
【例句】The news horrified everyone.
{{tts en_US:The news horrified everyone.}}
【用法說明】horrify 指讓人非常震驚害怕
【翻譯】那則消息嚇壞了大家。

{{tts en_US:horror}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】恐怖；驚駭
【搭配詞】horror movie / in horror / sense of horror
【例句】She loves watching horror movies.
{{tts en_US:She loves watching horror movies.}}
【用法說明】horror 指恐怖感，也常用於恐怖片
【翻譯】她很喜歡看恐怖片。

{{tts en_US:horse}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】馬
【搭配詞】ride a horse / horse race / horse stable
【例句】The horse ran across the field.
{{tts en_US:The horse ran across the field.}}
【用法說明】horse 指馬
【翻譯】那匹馬跑過田野。

{{tts en_US:hose}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】水管；軟管
【搭配詞】garden hose / water hose / hose down
【例句】Use the hose to water the plants.
{{tts en_US:Use the hose to water the plants.}}
【用法說明】hose 指用來灑水或輸送液體的管子
【翻譯】用水管替植物澆水。

{{tts en_US:hospitable}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】好客的
【搭配詞】hospitable host / warm and hospitable / hospitable family
【例句】The villagers were very hospitable.
{{tts en_US:The villagers were very hospitable.}}
【用法說明】hospitable 指待客親切熱情
【翻譯】那些村民非常好客。

{{tts en_US:hospital}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】醫院
【搭配詞】go to the hospital / hospital room / children's hospital
【例句】He was taken to the hospital.
{{tts en_US:He was taken to the hospital.}}
【用法說明】hospital 指醫院
【翻譯】他被送去了醫院。

{{tts en_US:hospitality}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】好客；餐旅業
【搭配詞】warm hospitality / show hospitality / hospitality industry
【例句】We were touched by their hospitality.
{{tts en_US:We were touched by their hospitality.}}
【用法說明】hospitality 指待客之道，也可指餐旅業
【翻譯】他們的熱情款待讓我們很感動。

{{tts en_US:hospitalize}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使住院
【搭配詞】hospitalize someone / be hospitalized / hospitalize for treatment
【例句】He was hospitalized after the accident.
{{tts en_US:He was hospitalized after the accident.}}
【用法說明】hospitalize 指安排進醫院治療
【翻譯】他在事故後住院了。

{{tts en_US:host/hostess}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】主人／女主人；主持人
【搭配詞】TV host / dinner hostess / good host
【例句】Our host welcomed us at the door.
{{tts en_US:Our host welcomed us at the door.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 host 和 hostess 放在一起
【翻譯】主人在門口迎接我們。

{{tts en_US:hostage}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】人質
【搭配詞】take hostage / release the hostages / hostage situation
【例句】The police worked to free the hostages.
{{tts en_US:The police worked to free the hostages.}}
【用法說明】hostage 指被挾持的人
【翻譯】警方努力救出那些人質。

{{tts en_US:hostel}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】青年旅館
【搭配詞】stay at a hostel / youth hostel / hostel room
【例句】We stayed at a cheap hostel near the station.
{{tts en_US:We stayed at a cheap hostel near the station.}}
【用法說明】hostel 指較便宜、簡單的旅館
【翻譯】我們住在車站附近一間便宜的青年旅館。

{{tts en_US:hostile}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】敵意的；不友善的
【搭配詞】hostile attitude / hostile crowd / become hostile
【例句】The crowd grew hostile.
{{tts en_US:The crowd grew hostile.}}
【用法說明】hostile 指充滿敵意、不友善
【翻譯】人群變得很有敵意。

{{tts en_US:hostility}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】敵意；敵對
【搭配詞】open hostility / hostility toward / years of hostility
【例句】There was clear hostility between the two groups.
{{tts en_US:There was clear hostility between the two groups.}}
【用法說明】hostility 指公開或明顯的敵意
【翻譯】那兩群人之間有明顯的敵意。

{{tts en_US:hot}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】熱的；辣的；很受歡迎的
【搭配詞】hot coffee / hot weather / really hot
【例句】The soup is too hot to eat.
{{tts en_US:The soup is too hot to eat.}}
【用法說明】hot 用法很多，常見是溫度高
【翻譯】這碗湯太燙了，沒辦法吃。

{{tts en_US:hotel}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】飯店；旅館
【搭配詞】stay at a hotel / hotel room / book a hotel
【例句】We booked a hotel near the airport.
{{tts en_US:We booked a hotel near the airport.}}
【用法說明】hotel 指提供住宿的地方
【翻譯】我們訂了一間機場附近的飯店。

{{tts en_US:hour}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】小時
【搭配詞】an hour / rush hour / for two hours
【例句】It takes about an hour to get there.
{{tts en_US:It takes about an hour to get there.}}
【用法說明】hour 指小時
【翻譯】到那裡大概要一個小時。

{{tts en_US:hourly}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】每小時的；按小時計
【搭配詞】hourly pay / hourly update / hourly rate
【例句】The workers are paid hourly.
{{tts en_US:The workers are paid hourly.}}
【用法說明】hourly 指按小時計算
【翻譯】工人是按小時計薪的。

{{tts en_US:house}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】房子；容納
【搭配詞】house key / small house / house a family
【例句】They bought a small house in the suburbs.
{{tts en_US:They bought a small house in the suburbs.}}
【用法說明】house 最常指房子
【翻譯】他們在郊區買了一棟小房子。

{{tts en_US:household}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】家庭的；一家人；家務用品
【搭配詞】household chores / household income / household goods
【例句】Each household received a notice.
{{tts en_US:Each household received a notice.}}
【用法說明】household 可指家庭整體或家用相關
【翻譯】每戶人家都收到了一份通知。

{{tts en_US:housekeeper}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】管家；家務管理者
【搭配詞】hotel housekeeper / housekeeper service / head housekeeper
【例句】The hotel housekeeper cleaned our room.
{{tts en_US:The hotel housekeeper cleaned our room.}}
【用法說明】housekeeper 可指飯店房務人員或管理家務的人
【翻譯】飯店房務人員打掃了我們的房間。

{{tts en_US:housewife}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】家庭主婦
【搭配詞】full-time housewife / traditional housewife / housewife role
【例句】She was a housewife for many years.
{{tts en_US:She was a housewife for many years.}}
【用法說明】housewife 指以照顧家庭為主的已婚女性
【翻譯】她當了很多年的家庭主婦。

{{tts en_US:housework}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】家事
【搭配詞】do the housework / help with housework / daily housework
【例句】I spent the morning doing housework.
{{tts en_US:I spent the morning doing housework.}}
【用法說明】housework 指打掃、洗衣等家務
【翻譯】我整個早上都在做家事。

{{tts en_US:housing}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】住宅；住房
【搭配詞】public housing / housing market / affordable housing
【例句】The city needs more affordable housing.
{{tts en_US:The city needs more affordable housing.}}
【用法說明】housing 指住宅供給或居住問題
【翻譯】這座城市需要更多可負擔住宅。

{{tts en_US:hover}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】盤旋；徘徊；懸停
【搭配詞】hover above / hover near / hover over someone
【例句】A helicopter hovered above the building.
{{tts en_US:A helicopter hovered above the building.}}
【用法說明】hover 指停在半空或在附近徘徊
【翻譯】一架直升機盤旋在建築上方。

{{tts en_US:how}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】如何；怎麼；多麼
【搭配詞】how are you / how to / how much
【例句】How did you do that?
{{tts en_US:How did you do that?}}
【用法說明】how 是高頻疑問詞
【翻譯】你是怎麼做到的？

{{tts en_US:however}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】然而；不管怎樣；無論多麼
【搭配詞】however, / however hard / however you like
【例句】The plan sounds good. However, it's too expensive.
{{tts en_US:The plan sounds good. However, it's too expensive.}}
【用法說明】however 常作轉折連接詞
【翻譯】這個計畫聽起來不錯，不過太貴了。

{{tts en_US:howl}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】嚎叫；呼嘯
【搭配詞】wolf howl / howl in pain / wind howled
【例句】We heard a dog howl in the distance.
{{tts en_US:We heard a dog howl in the distance.}}
【用法說明】howl 指動物或風發出長長的叫聲
【翻譯】我們聽到遠方有狗在嚎叫。

{{tts en_US:hug}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】擁抱
【搭配詞】give a hug / hug someone tightly / big hug
【例句】She gave me a warm hug.
{{tts en_US:She gave me a warm hug.}}
【用法說明】hug 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她給了我一個溫暖的擁抱。

{{tts en_US:huge}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】巨大的
【搭配詞】huge problem / huge house / huge success
【例句】They live in a huge apartment.
{{tts en_US:They live in a huge apartment.}}
【用法說明】huge 指非常大
【翻譯】他們住在一間很大的公寓。

{{tts en_US:hum}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】哼唱；嗡嗡作響
【搭配詞】hum a song / machine hum / low hum
【例句】She hummed quietly while cooking.
{{tts en_US:She hummed quietly while cooking.}}
【用法說明】hum 可指輕聲哼唱或機器發出嗡嗡聲
【翻譯】她煮飯時輕聲哼著歌。

{{tts en_US:human}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】人類的；人
【搭配詞】human body / human rights / human being
【例句】We all make human mistakes.
{{tts en_US:We all make human mistakes.}}
【用法說明】human 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】我們都會犯人會犯的錯。

{{tts en_US:humanity}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】人類；人性；人道
【搭配詞】common humanity / love for humanity / crime against humanity
【例句】The disaster reminded us of our shared humanity.
{{tts en_US:The disaster reminded us of our shared humanity.}}
【用法說明】humanity 可指整體人類，也可指人性
【翻譯】那場災難提醒了我們彼此同為人類。

{{tts en_US:humble}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】謙虛的；簡樸的
【搭配詞】humble person / humble home / remain humble
【例句】He stayed humble despite his success.
{{tts en_US:He stayed humble despite his success.}}
【用法說明】humble 可指態度謙遜，也可指條件簡樸
【翻譯】儘管很成功，他仍保持謙虛。

{{tts en_US:humid}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】潮濕悶熱的
【搭配詞】humid weather / hot and humid / humid air
【例句】It's too humid to sleep well.
{{tts en_US:It's too humid to sleep well.}}
【用法說明】humid 常形容空氣濕悶
【翻譯】天氣太悶濕了，睡不好。

{{tts en_US:humidity}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】濕度
【搭配詞】high humidity / humidity level / low humidity
【例句】The humidity is very high today.
{{tts en_US:The humidity is very high today.}}
【用法說明】humidity 指空氣中的濕氣程度
【翻譯】今天濕度很高。

{{tts en_US:humiliate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】羞辱；使難堪
【搭配詞】humiliate someone / publicly humiliate / feel humiliated
【例句】He was humiliated in front of the class.
{{tts en_US:He was humiliated in front of the class.}}
【用法說明】humiliate 指讓人感到丟臉、受辱
【翻譯】他在全班面前被羞辱了。

{{tts en_US:hunch}}

{{tts en_US:hungry}}

{{tts en_US:hunter}}

{{tts en_US:hut}}

{{tts en_US:hybrid}}

{{tts en_US:immigration}}

{{tts en_US:imminent}}

{{tts en_US:implement}}

{{tts en_US:impressive}}

{{tts en_US:imprison}}

{{tts en_US:imprisonment}}

{{tts en_US:improve}}

【翻譯】改善；進步

{{tts en_US:improvement}}

【翻譯】改善；進步
【搭配詞】big improvement / room for improvement / show improvement

{{tts en_US:impulse}}

{{tts en_US:incentive}}

{{tts en_US:increase}}

{{tts en_US:incredible}}

【翻譯】難以置信的；超棒的
【搭配詞】incredible story / incredible view / sound incredible
【例句】The view from the top was incredible.
{{tts en_US:The view from the top was incredible.}}
【用法說明】incredible 常指令人驚嘆、超棒
【翻譯】從上面看到的景色太驚人了。

{{tts en_US:incur}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】招致；承受
【搭配詞】incur costs / incur debt / incur damage
【例句】You may incur extra charges if you're late.
{{tts en_US:You may incur extra charges if you're late.}}
【用法說明】incur 是較正式的『招致』
【翻譯】如果你遲到，可能會被加收費用。

{{tts en_US:indeed}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】的確；其實；甚至
【搭配詞】indeed it is / very indeed / and indeed
【例句】It was indeed a difficult choice.
{{tts en_US:It was indeed a difficult choice.}}
【用法說明】indeed 常用來加強肯定
【翻譯】那的確是個艱難的選擇。

{{tts en_US:independence}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】獨立；自主
【搭配詞】financial independence / independence day / gain independence
【例句】She values her independence.
{{tts en_US:She values her independence.}}
【用法說明】independence 指不依賴他人的狀態
【翻譯】她很重視自己的獨立。

{{tts en_US:independent}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】獨立的；自主的
【搭配詞】independent student / independent life / independent study
【例句】He's very independent for his age.
{{tts en_US:He's very independent for his age.}}
【用法說明】independent 指能自己處理事情
【翻譯】以他的年紀來說，他非常獨立。

{{tts en_US:index}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】索引；指數
【搭配詞】price index / book index / index finger
【例句】Look it up in the index at the back.
{{tts en_US:Look it up in the index at the back.}}
【用法說明】index 可指書末索引，也可指指數
【翻譯】去後面的索引查查看。

{{tts en_US:indicate}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】指出；顯示；表明
【搭配詞】indicate that / indicate a direction / clearly indicate
【例句】The sign indicates the way to the station.
{{tts en_US:The sign indicates the way to the station.}}
【用法說明】indicate 指用文字、動作或訊號表明
【翻譯】這個標誌指出了去車站的方向。

{{tts en_US:indication}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】跡象；顯示；暗示
【搭配詞】clear indication / indication of / no indication
【例句】There was no indication of rain.
{{tts en_US:There was no indication of rain.}}
【用法說明】indication 指可觀察到的跡象
【翻譯】沒有要下雨的跡象。

{{tts en_US:hypocrite}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】偽君子；虛偽的人
【搭配詞】call someone a hypocrite / total hypocrite / sound like a hypocrite
【例句】He called the politician a hypocrite.
{{tts en_US:He called the politician a hypocrite.}}
【用法說明】hypocrite 指說一套做一套的人
【翻譯】他說那個政治人物是偽君子。

{{tts en_US:hypothesis}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】假設；假說
【搭配詞】test a hypothesis / scientific hypothesis / working hypothesis
【例句】The students tested their hypothesis in the lab.
{{tts en_US:The students tested their hypothesis in the lab.}}
【用法說明】hypothesis 常用於科學與研究語境
【翻譯】學生們在實驗室驗證他們的假設。

{{tts en_US:ice}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】冰；冰塊
【搭配詞】ice cream / piece of ice / ice water
【例句】There is ice in my drink.
{{tts en_US:There is ice in my drink.}}
【用法說明】ice 可指冰塊或冰的狀態
【翻譯】我的飲料裡有冰。

{{tts en_US:iceberg}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】冰山
【搭配詞】tip of the iceberg / giant iceberg / iceberg lettuce
【例句】What we know is only the tip of the iceberg.
{{tts en_US:What we know is only the tip of the iceberg.}}
【用法說明】tip of the iceberg 是常見片語
【翻譯】我們知道的只是冰山一角。

{{tts en_US:icon}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】圖示；偶像；代表人物
【搭配詞】desktop icon / fashion icon / cultural icon
【例句】Click the icon to open the app.
{{tts en_US:Click the icon to open the app.}}
【用法說明】icon 可指電腦圖示，也可指代表性人物
【翻譯】點一下那個圖示就能打開 app。

{{tts en_US:icy}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】冰冷的；結冰的
【搭配詞】icy road / icy wind / icy water
【例句】Be careful—the road is icy.
{{tts en_US:Be careful—the road is icy.}}
【用法說明】icy 指表面結冰或非常冰冷
【翻譯】小心，路面結冰了。

{{tts en_US:idea}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】想法；主意
【搭配詞】good idea / have an idea / no idea
【例句】That's a good idea.
{{tts en_US:That's a good idea.}}
【用法說明】idea 是超高頻名詞
【翻譯】那是個好主意。

{{tts en_US:ideal}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】理想的；理想
【搭配詞】ideal job / ideal place / not ideal
【例句】This café is an ideal place to study.
{{tts en_US:This café is an ideal place to study.}}
【用法說明】ideal 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】這家咖啡店是很理想的讀書地點。

{{tts en_US:identical}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】完全相同的
【搭配詞】identical twins / look identical / almost identical
【例句】The two bags look identical.
{{tts en_US:The two bags look identical.}}
【用法說明】identical 指完全一樣
【翻譯】這兩個包包看起來一模一樣。

{{tts en_US:identification}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】身分證明；辨識
【搭配詞】photo identification / show identification / form of identification
【例句】Please show some identification at the door.
{{tts en_US:Please show some identification at the door.}}
【用法說明】identification 常指證明身分的文件
【翻譯】請在門口出示身分證明。

{{tts en_US:identify}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】辨認；確認；認同
【搭配詞】identify the problem / identify someone / identify as
【例句】Can you identify the person in the photo?
{{tts en_US:Can you identify the person in the photo?}}
【用法說明】identify 指認出或確認
【翻譯】你認得出照片裡的人嗎？

{{tts en_US:identity}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】身分；認同；特徵
【搭配詞】national identity / sense of identity / identity card
【例句】College helped her build a stronger sense of identity.
{{tts en_US:College helped her build a stronger sense of identity.}}
【用法說明】identity 可指個人認同或身分
【翻譯】大學生活幫助她建立更強的自我認同。

{{tts en_US:ideology}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】意識形態；思想體系
【搭配詞】political ideology / ideology behind / strong ideology
【例句】They have very different political ideologies.
{{tts en_US:They have very different political ideologies.}}
【用法說明】ideology 指一整套信念系統
【翻譯】他們的政治意識形態非常不同。

{{tts en_US:idiom}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】慣用語；成語
【搭配詞】English idiom / common idiom / learn idioms
【例句】This phrase is a common English idiom.
{{tts en_US:This phrase is a common English idiom.}}
【用法說明】idiom 指不能照字面直譯的固定說法
【翻譯】這個片語是常見的英文慣用語。

{{tts en_US:idiot}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】白痴；笨蛋
【搭配詞】complete idiot / act like an idiot / don't be an idiot
【例句】Don't call yourself an idiot.
{{tts en_US:Don't call yourself an idiot.}}
【用法說明】idiot 是很不客氣的字，例句避免鼓勵攻擊他人
【翻譯】不要罵自己是白痴。

{{tts en_US:idle}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】閒置的；懶散的；空轉
【搭配詞】idle time / engine idle / sit idle
【例句】The machine sat idle for weeks.
{{tts en_US:The machine sat idle for weeks.}}
【用法說明】idle 指沒有在使用或懶得行動
【翻譯】那台機器閒置了好幾週。

{{tts en_US:idol}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】偶像；崇拜對象
【搭配詞】pop idol / childhood idol / worship an idol
【例句】She's been my idol since high school.
{{tts en_US:She's been my idol since high school.}}
【用法說明】idol 指非常崇拜的人
【翻譯】她從高中開始就是我的偶像。

{{tts en_US:if}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】如果；是否
【搭配詞】if you want / ask if / if possible
【例句】Call me if you need help.
{{tts en_US:Call me if you need help.}}
【用法說明】if 是高頻連接詞
【翻譯】如果你需要幫忙就打給我。

{{tts en_US:ignorance}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】無知；不了解
【搭配詞】out of ignorance / ignorance of the law / plain ignorance
【例句】Fear often comes from ignorance.
{{tts en_US:Fear often comes from ignorance.}}
【用法說明】ignorance 指不知道、不了解
【翻譯】恐懼常常來自無知。

{{tts en_US:ignorant}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】無知的；不了解的
【搭配詞】be ignorant of / sound ignorant / not ignorant
【例句】I was ignorant of the rule.
{{tts en_US:I was ignorant of the rule.}}
【用法說明】ignorant of 表示不知道某事
【翻譯】我不知道那條規定。

{{tts en_US:ignore}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】忽略；不理會
【搭配詞】ignore the message / ignore advice / can't ignore
【例句】You shouldn't ignore the warning signs.
{{tts en_US:You shouldn't ignore the warning signs.}}
【用法說明】ignore 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】你不應該忽略那些警訊。

{{tts en_US:ill}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】生病的；不好的
【搭配詞】feel ill / seriously ill / ill health
【例句】She stayed home because she felt ill.
{{tts en_US:She stayed home because she felt ill.}}
【用法說明】ill 常指身體不舒服、生病
【翻譯】她因為不舒服所以待在家裡。

{{tts en_US:illuminate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】照亮；闡明
【搭配詞】illuminate the room / illuminate the issue / brightly illuminated
【例句】Streetlights illuminated the road.
{{tts en_US:Streetlights illuminated the road.}}
【用法說明】illuminate 可指實際照亮，也可比喻說明清楚
【翻譯】路燈照亮了道路。

{{tts en_US:illusion}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】錯覺；幻覺；假象
【搭配詞】optical illusion / under the illusion / create an illusion
【例句】For a moment, I had the illusion that someone was behind me.
{{tts en_US:For a moment, I had the illusion that someone was behind me.}}
【用法說明】illusion 指看起來像真的、其實不是的感覺
【翻譯】有那麼一瞬間，我以為後面有人。

{{tts en_US:illustrate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】說明；舉例說明；畫插圖
【搭配詞】illustrate a point / illustrate with / illustrated book
【例句】Let me illustrate my point with an example.
{{tts en_US:Let me illustrate my point with an example.}}
【用法說明】illustrate 常指用例子或圖片說明
【翻譯】讓我用一個例子來說明我的觀點。

{{tts en_US:illustration}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】插圖；說明；例證
【搭配詞】book illustration / by way of illustration / clear illustration
【例句】The book has beautiful illustrations.
{{tts en_US:The book has beautiful illustrations.}}
【用法說明】illustration 可指插圖，也可指例證
【翻譯】那本書有很漂亮的插圖。

{{tts en_US:image}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】影像；形象；圖像
【搭配詞】public image / image file / clear image
【例句】This image is too blurry.
{{tts en_US:This image is too blurry.}}
【用法說明】image 可指照片影像，也可指對外形象
【翻譯】這張圖片太模糊了。

{{tts en_US:imaginary}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】想像中的；虛構的
【搭配詞】imaginary friend / imaginary world / purely imaginary
【例句】As a child, she had an imaginary friend.
{{tts en_US:As a child, she had an imaginary friend.}}
【用法說明】imaginary 指不存在、只存在想像裡
【翻譯】她小時候有一個想像中的朋友。

{{tts en_US:imagination}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】想像力
【搭配詞】use your imagination / rich imagination / active imagination
【例句】Children have amazing imagination.
{{tts en_US:Children have amazing imagination.}}
【用法說明】imagination 指在腦中創造畫面的能力
【翻譯】孩子的想像力很驚人。

{{tts en_US:imaginative}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】富有想像力的
【搭配詞】imaginative idea / imaginative story / highly imaginative
【例句】Her drawings are colorful and imaginative.
{{tts en_US:Her drawings are colorful and imaginative.}}
【用法說明】imaginative 形容人或作品很有創意
【翻譯】她的畫作色彩豐富又充滿想像力。

{{tts en_US:imagine}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】想像
【搭配詞】imagine doing / can you imagine / imagine that
【例句】Can you imagine living on the moon?
{{tts en_US:Can you imagine living on the moon?}}
【用法說明】imagine 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】你能想像住在月球上嗎？

{{tts en_US:imitate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】模仿
【搭配詞】imitate someone / imitate a voice / imitate the style
【例句】The child likes to imitate his father.
{{tts en_US:The child likes to imitate his father.}}
【用法說明】imitate 指學某人的動作、聲音或風格
【翻譯】那個孩子喜歡模仿他爸爸。

{{tts en_US:imitation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】模仿；仿製品
【搭配詞】cheap imitation / imitation leather / in imitation of
【例句】This bag is just an imitation.
{{tts en_US:This bag is just an imitation.}}
【用法說明】imitation 可指模仿行為，也可指仿製品
【翻譯】這個包只是仿品。

{{tts en_US:immediate}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】立即的；直接的
【搭配詞】immediate danger / immediate response / immediate family
【例句】We need an immediate answer.
{{tts en_US:We need an immediate answer.}}
【用法說明】immediate 指不用等、馬上的
【翻譯】我們需要立刻得到答覆。

{{tts en_US:immense}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】巨大的；極大的
【搭配詞】immense pressure / immense pleasure / immense size
【例句】They faced immense pressure.
{{tts en_US:They faced immense pressure.}}
【用法說明】immense 指非常大，常用於抽象程度
【翻譯】他們承受了極大的壓力。

{{tts en_US:immigrant}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】移民
【搭配詞】new immigrant / immigrant family / immigrant worker
【例句】Her parents were immigrants from Vietnam.
{{tts en_US:Her parents were immigrants from Vietnam.}}
【用法說明】immigrant 指移居到新國家的人
【翻譯】她的父母是從越南移民來的。

{{tts en_US:immigrate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】移民；移居
【搭配詞】immigrate to / immigrate with family / decide to immigrate
【例句】They immigrated to Canada ten years ago.
{{tts en_US:They immigrated to Canada ten years ago.}}
【用法說明】immigrate to + 國家
【翻譯】他們十年前移民到加拿大。

{{tts en_US:indifference}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】冷漠；不在乎
【搭配詞】show indifference / with indifference / public indifference
【例句】His indifference hurt her feelings.
{{tts en_US:His indifference hurt her feelings.}}
【用法說明】indifference 指明顯的不關心
【翻譯】他的冷漠傷了她的感情。

{{tts en_US:indifferent}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】冷漠的；無所謂的
【搭配詞】be indifferent to / seem indifferent / indifferent attitude
【例句】She seemed indifferent to the news.
{{tts en_US:She seemed indifferent to the news.}}
【用法說明】indifferent to = 對…不在乎
【翻譯】她對那個消息似乎無動於衷。

{{tts en_US:indigenous}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】原住的；本土的
【搭配詞】indigenous people / indigenous culture / indigenous language
【例句】The museum has exhibits on indigenous cultures.
{{tts en_US:The museum has exhibits on indigenous cultures.}}
【用法說明】indigenous 指某地原生、本土的
【翻譯】那間博物館有原住民族文化的展覽。

{{tts en_US:indignant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】憤慨的；氣憤的
【搭配詞】feel indignant / sound indignant / indignant tone
【例句】She was indignant at the unfair treatment.
{{tts en_US:She was indignant at the unfair treatment.}}
【用法說明】indignant 指因不公平而生氣
【翻譯】她對不公平的待遇感到憤慨。

{{tts en_US:indispensable}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】不可或缺的
【搭配詞】indispensable tool / indispensable role / be indispensable
【例句】A good dictionary is indispensable for language learners.
{{tts en_US:A good dictionary is indispensable for language learners.}}
【用法說明】indispensable 指少了就不行
【翻譯】一本好字典對語言學習者來說不可或缺。

{{tts en_US:individual}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】個人的；個體
【搭配詞】individual choice / each individual / individual student
【例句】Each individual has different needs.
{{tts en_US:Each individual has different needs.}}
【用法說明】individual 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】每個人都有不同的需求。

{{tts en_US:indoor}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】室內的
【搭配詞】indoor pool / indoor activity / indoor shoes
【例句】We planned an indoor activity because of the rain.
{{tts en_US:We planned an indoor activity because of the rain.}}
【用法說明】indoor 指在室內進行的
【翻譯】因為下雨，我們安排了室內活動。

{{tts en_US:indoors}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】在室內
【搭配詞】stay indoors / play indoors / go indoors
【例句】Let's stay indoors today.
{{tts en_US:Let's stay indoors today.}}
【用法說明】indoors 是副詞，表示在室內
【翻譯】我們今天待在室內吧。

{{tts en_US:induce}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】引起；導致；勸誘
【搭配詞】induce sleep / induce stress / induce someone to
【例句】Too much caffeine can induce anxiety.
{{tts en_US:Too much caffeine can induce anxiety.}}
【用法說明】induce 是較正式的『引起』
【翻譯】咖啡因太多可能引發焦慮。

{{tts en_US:indulge}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】放縱；沉迷；享受一下
【搭配詞】indulge in / indulge yourself / indulge a habit
【例句】I let myself indulge in dessert.
{{tts en_US:I let myself indulge in dessert.}}
【用法說明】indulge in 常指放任自己享受某事
【翻譯】我讓自己放縱一下吃了甜點。

{{tts en_US:industrial}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】工業的；產業的
【搭配詞】industrial area / industrial design / industrial waste
【例句】The city has a large industrial zone.
{{tts en_US:The city has a large industrial zone.}}
【用法說明】industrial 指與工業或工廠有關
【翻譯】那座城市有很大的工業區。

{{tts en_US:industrialize}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使工業化
【搭配詞】industrialize a region / rapidly industrialize / become industrialized
【例句】The country industrialized quickly in the 20th century.
{{tts en_US:The country industrialized quickly in the 20th century.}}
【用法說明】industrialize 指發展工業體系
【翻譯】那個國家在二十世紀快速工業化。

{{tts en_US:industry}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】產業；工業
【搭配詞】film industry / service industry / in the industry
【例句】She works in the fashion industry.
{{tts en_US:She works in the fashion industry.}}
【用法說明】industry 指某一領域的整體產業
【翻譯】她在時尚產業工作。

{{tts en_US:inevitable}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】不可避免的
【搭配詞】inevitable result / inevitable change / seem inevitable
【例句】Some change is inevitable.
{{tts en_US:Some change is inevitable.}}
【用法說明】inevitable 指一定會發生、躲不掉
【翻譯】有些改變是不可避免的。

{{tts en_US:infant}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】嬰兒
【搭配詞】newborn infant / infant care / infant formula
【例句】The nurse checked the infant carefully.
{{tts en_US:The nurse checked the infant carefully.}}
【用法說明】infant 是較正式的『嬰兒』
【翻譯】護理師仔細檢查了那名嬰兒。

{{tts en_US:infect}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】感染；傳染
【搭配詞】infect someone / infect the wound / easily infect
【例句】The virus can infect many people quickly.
{{tts en_US:The virus can infect many people quickly.}}
【用法說明】infect 指把疾病傳給別人
【翻譯】這種病毒可能很快感染很多人。

{{tts en_US:infection}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】感染；傳染病
【搭配詞】ear infection / serious infection / signs of infection
【例句】The doctor said I had a minor infection.
{{tts en_US:The doctor said I had a minor infection.}}
【用法說明】infection 指身體被病原感染
【翻譯】醫生說我有輕微感染。

{{tts en_US:infectious}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】傳染性的；有感染力的
【搭配詞】infectious disease / highly infectious / infectious laugh
【例句】The doctor warned that the illness was infectious.
{{tts en_US:The doctor warned that the illness was infectious.}}
【用法說明】infectious 可指疾病會傳染，也可比喻笑聲很有感染力
【翻譯】醫生警告說這種病有傳染性。

{{tts en_US:infer}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】推論；推斷
【搭配詞】infer from / infer that / clearly infer
【例句】From her tone, I inferred that she was upset.
{{tts en_US:From her tone, I inferred that she was upset.}}
【用法說明】infer 指根據線索推得結果
【翻譯】從她的語氣，我推測她心情不好。

{{tts en_US:inferior}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】較差的；下等的
【搭配詞】inferior quality / feel inferior / inferior product
【例句】This product feels inferior to the old one.
{{tts en_US:This product feels inferior to the old one.}}
【用法說明】inferior 指品質或地位較低
【翻譯】這個產品感覺比舊的差。

{{tts en_US:infinite}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】無限的；極大的
【搭配詞】infinite space / infinite patience / infinite number
【例句】The sky looked almost infinite.
{{tts en_US:The sky looked almost infinite.}}
【用法說明】infinite 指沒有盡頭
【翻譯】天空看起來幾乎無邊無際。

{{tts en_US:inflation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】通貨膨脹
【搭配詞】high inflation / inflation rate / control inflation
【例句】Inflation has made groceries more expensive.
{{tts en_US:Inflation has made groceries more expensive.}}
【用法說明】inflation 指物價普遍上漲
【翻譯】通膨讓雜貨變得更貴了。

{{tts en_US:inflict}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】造成；使遭受
【搭配詞】inflict damage / inflict pain / inflict harm on
【例句】The storm inflicted serious damage on the town.
{{tts en_US:The storm inflicted serious damage on the town.}}
【用法說明】inflict 是較正式的『造成傷害』
【翻譯】那場暴風雨對小鎮造成了嚴重損害。

{{tts en_US:influence}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】影響；影響力
【搭配詞】have an influence on / under the influence / influence someone
【例句】Parents have a big influence on children.
{{tts en_US:Parents have a big influence on children.}}
【用法說明】influence 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】父母對孩子有很大影響。

{{tts en_US:influential}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】有影響力的
【搭配詞】influential person / highly influential / influential book
【例句】She became an influential writer.
{{tts en_US:She became an influential writer.}}
【用法說明】influential 指能影響很多人
【翻譯】她成了一位很有影響力的作家。

{{tts en_US:inform}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】告知；通知
【搭配詞】inform someone of / keep you informed / inform the public
【例句】Please inform me of any changes.
{{tts en_US:Please inform me of any changes.}}
【用法說明】inform 是較正式的『告知』
【翻譯】如果有任何變更，請通知我。

{{tts en_US:information}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】資訊；消息
【搭配詞】more information / personal information / information desk
【例句】I need more information before deciding.
{{tts en_US:I need more information before deciding.}}
【用法說明】information 是不可數名詞
【翻譯】我在決定前還需要更多資訊。

{{tts en_US:informative}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】資訊豐富的；有教育性的
【搭配詞】informative article / informative talk / very informative
【例句】The workshop was short but informative.
{{tts en_US:The workshop was short but informative.}}
【用法說明】informative 指讓人學到很多東西
【翻譯】那場工作坊雖然短，但資訊很多。

{{tts en_US:infrastructure}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】基礎建設
【搭配詞】public infrastructure / transport infrastructure / improve infrastructure
【例句】The city is investing in transport infrastructure.
{{tts en_US:The city is investing in transport infrastructure.}}
【用法說明】infrastructure 指道路、交通、水電等基礎系統
【翻譯】這座城市正在投資交通基礎建設。

{{tts en_US:ingredient}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】材料；成分
【搭配詞】main ingredient / secret ingredient / fresh ingredients
【例句】Flour is the main ingredient in bread.
{{tts en_US:Flour is the main ingredient in bread.}}
【用法說明】ingredient 最常指食材成分
【翻譯】麵粉是麵包的主要材料。

{{tts en_US:inhabit}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】居住於；棲息於
【搭配詞】inhabit the island / inhabit the forest / be inhabited by
【例句】Many birds inhabit this wetland.
{{tts en_US:Many birds inhabit this wetland.}}
【用法說明】inhabit 指動植物住在某地
【翻譯】很多鳥棲息在這片濕地。

{{tts en_US:inhabitant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】居民；棲息者
【搭配詞】local inhabitant / island inhabitant / early inhabitants
【例句】The island has only a few inhabitants.
{{tts en_US:The island has only a few inhabitants.}}
【用法說明】inhabitant 指住在某地的人或生物
【翻譯】那座島只有少數居民。

{{tts en_US:inherent}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】固有的；天生的
【搭配詞】inherent risk / inherent quality / be inherent in
【例句】There is inherent risk in any investment.
{{tts en_US:There is inherent risk in any investment.}}
【用法說明】inherent 指本身就存在的
【翻譯】任何投資都本身帶有風險。

{{tts en_US:inherit}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】繼承；遺傳
【搭配詞】inherit money / inherit a house / inherit traits
【例句】She inherited her grandmother's ring.
{{tts en_US:She inherited her grandmother's ring.}}
【用法說明】inherit 可指繼承財產，也可指遺傳特徵
【翻譯】她繼承了奶奶的戒指。

{{tts en_US:initial}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】最初的；開頭的；縮寫字首
【搭配詞】initial plan / initial reaction / write your initials
【例句】My initial reaction was surprise.
{{tts en_US:My initial reaction was surprise.}}
【用法說明】initial 常指一開始的
【翻譯】我一開始的反應是驚訝。

{{tts en_US:initiate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】開始；發起
【搭配詞】initiate a discussion / initiate contact / be initiated into
【例句】The school initiated a new reading program.
{{tts en_US:The school initiated a new reading program.}}
【用法說明】initiate 指正式啟動某事
【翻譯】學校發起了一個新的閱讀計畫。

{{tts en_US:initiative}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】主動性；倡議；新計畫
【搭配詞】take the initiative / new initiative / show initiative
【例句】She took the initiative and solved the problem.
{{tts en_US:She took the initiative and solved the problem.}}
【用法說明】initiative 可指主動去做，也可指新方案
【翻譯】她主動出手解決了問題。

{{tts en_US:inject}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】注射；注入
【搭配詞】inject a drug / inject energy into / be injected with
【例句】The doctor injected the medicine into his arm.
{{tts en_US:The doctor injected the medicine into his arm.}}
【用法說明】inject 可指醫療注射，也可比喻注入活力
【翻譯】醫生把藥打進他的手臂。

{{tts en_US:injection}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】注射；注射劑
【搭配詞】get an injection / flu injection / pain-relief injection
【例句】The nurse gave him an injection.
{{tts en_US:The nurse gave him an injection.}}
【用法說明】injection 指打針這件事或針劑
【翻譯】護理師替他打了一針。

{{tts en_US:injure}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】使受傷；傷害
【搭配詞】injure your back / badly injure / be injured in
【例句】She injured her knee while running.
{{tts en_US:She injured her knee while running.}}
【用法說明】injure 指使身體受傷
【翻譯】她跑步時傷到了膝蓋。

{{tts en_US:injury}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】傷害；受傷；傷口
【搭配詞】serious injury / head injury / suffer an injury
【例句】He had a minor hand injury.
{{tts en_US:He had a minor hand injury.}}
【用法說明】injury 指受傷的狀況
【翻譯】他的手受了輕傷。

{{tts en_US:injustice}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】不公正；冤屈
【搭配詞】fight injustice / sense of injustice / social injustice
【例句】The film is about fighting injustice.
{{tts en_US:The film is about fighting injustice.}}
【用法說明】injustice 指不公平待遇
【翻譯】那部電影是在講對抗不公。

{{tts en_US:ink}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】墨水；油墨
【搭配詞】blue ink / ink pen / run out of ink
【例句】My pen is out of ink.
{{tts en_US:My pen is out of ink.}}
【用法說明】ink 指筆或印刷用墨水
【翻譯】我的筆沒墨水了。

{{tts en_US:inland}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】內陸的；向內陸
【搭配詞】inland city / move inland / inland area
【例句】They moved inland after the storm.
{{tts en_US:They moved inland after the storm.}}
【用法說明】inland 指不靠海的內陸地區
【翻譯】暴風雨後他們搬到內陸去了。

{{tts en_US:inn}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】小旅館；客棧
【搭配詞】country inn / stay at an inn / old inn
【例句】We stayed at a small inn by the lake.
{{tts en_US:We stayed at a small inn by the lake.}}
【用法說明】inn 指較小、較傳統的旅館
【翻譯】我們住在湖邊一間小旅館。

{{tts en_US:inner}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】內在的；裡面的
【搭配詞】inner voice / inner circle / inner pocket
【例句】She listened to her inner voice.
{{tts en_US:She listened to her inner voice.}}
【用法說明】inner 可指內心，也可指物體內部
【翻譯】她傾聽自己內心的聲音。

{{tts en_US:inning}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】局（棒球）
【搭配詞】first inning / last inning / extra inning
【例句】They scored two runs in the final inning.
{{tts en_US:They scored two runs in the final inning.}}
【用法說明】inning 指棒球比賽中的一局
【翻譯】他們在最後一局得了兩分。

{{tts en_US:innocence}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】天真；清白；無罪
【搭配詞】prove innocence / childlike innocence / lose innocence
【例句】The child looked at us with innocence.
{{tts en_US:The child looked at us with innocence.}}
【用法說明】innocence 可指天真，也可指無罪
【翻譯】那個孩子用天真的眼神看著我們。

{{tts en_US:innocent}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】無辜的；天真的；無害的
【搭配詞】innocent person / look innocent / innocent mistake
【例句】He insisted that he was innocent.
{{tts en_US:He insisted that he was innocent.}}
【用法說明】innocent 可指沒做錯事，也可指單純天真
【翻譯】他堅持自己是無辜的。

{{tts en_US:innovation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】創新；革新
【搭配詞】technological innovation / encourage innovation / innovation in education
【例句】The company is known for innovation.
{{tts en_US:The company is known for innovation.}}
【用法說明】innovation 指新方法、新點子帶來的改變
【翻譯】那家公司以創新聞名。

{{tts en_US:innovative}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】創新的
【搭配詞】innovative idea / innovative design / highly innovative
【例句】It's an innovative solution to an old problem.
{{tts en_US:It's an innovative solution to an old problem.}}
【用法說明】innovative 形容新穎、有創意
【翻譯】這是解決老問題的一個創新方法。

{{tts en_US:innumerable}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】無數的；數不清的
【搭配詞】innumerable stars / innumerable times / innumerable reasons
【例句】There were innumerable stars in the sky.
{{tts en_US:There were innumerable stars in the sky.}}
【用法說明】innumerable 指多到數不清
【翻譯】天空中有無數顆星星。

{{tts en_US:input}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】輸入；意見；投入
【搭配詞】user input / valuable input / input data
【例句】Thanks for your input on the project.
{{tts en_US:Thanks for your input on the project.}}
【用法說明】input 常指意見回饋，也可指資料輸入
【翻譯】謝謝你對這個專案提供意見。

{{tts en_US:inquire}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】詢問；查詢
【搭配詞】inquire about / inquire into / inquire whether
【例句】She called to inquire about the job.
{{tts en_US:She called to inquire about the job.}}
【用法說明】inquire 是較正式的『詢問』
【翻譯】她打電話詢問那份工作。

{{tts en_US:inquiry}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】詢問；調查
【搭配詞】make an inquiry / customer inquiry / official inquiry
【例句】We received an inquiry about the course.
{{tts en_US:We received an inquiry about the course.}}
【用法說明】inquiry 可指詢問，也可指正式調查
【翻譯】我們收到一則關於課程的詢問。

{{tts en_US:insane}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】瘋狂的；精神失常的
【搭配詞】insane idea / sound insane / go insane
【例句】That price is insane.
{{tts en_US:That price is insane.}}
【用法說明】insane 口語中很常用來表示誇張到離譜
【翻譯】那個價格太誇張了。

{{tts en_US:insect}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】昆蟲
【搭配詞】small insect / insect bite / insect repellent
【例句】A tiny insect landed on my arm.
{{tts en_US:A tiny insect landed on my arm.}}
【用法說明】insect 指昆蟲
【翻譯】一隻小昆蟲停在我手臂上。

{{tts en_US:insert}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】插入；放入
【搭配詞】insert a card / insert into / insert a sentence
【例句】Please insert your card into the machine.
{{tts en_US:Please insert your card into the machine.}}
【用法說明】insert 指把某物放進去
【翻譯】請把你的卡片插入機器。

{{tts en_US:inside}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】裡面；在裡面；內部的
【搭配詞】inside the box / go inside / inside information
【例句】It's warm inside the house.
{{tts en_US:It's warm inside the house.}}
【用法說明】inside 可作名詞、副詞、介詞或形容詞
【翻譯】屋子裡很暖。

{{tts en_US:insight}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】洞察力；見解
【搭配詞】gain insight into / valuable insight / personal insight
【例句】The book gave me new insight into the issue.
{{tts en_US:The book gave me new insight into the issue.}}
【用法說明】insight 指看得更深入的理解
【翻譯】這本書讓我對這個議題有了新的理解。

{{tts en_US:insist}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】堅持；執意
【搭配詞】insist on / insist that / keep insisting
【例句】She insisted on paying for dinner.
{{tts en_US:She insisted on paying for dinner.}}
【用法說明】insist on + V-ing / 名詞 很常見
【翻譯】她堅持要付晚餐的錢。

{{tts en_US:insistence}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】堅持；執意
【搭配詞】at someone's insistence / strong insistence / repeated insistence
【例句】At her insistence, we stayed for dessert.
{{tts en_US:At her insistence, we stayed for dessert.}}
【用法說明】insistence 指一再堅持某件事
【翻譯】在她堅持之下，我們留下來吃甜點。

{{tts en_US:inspect}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】檢查；視察
【搭配詞】inspect the building / inspect closely / inspect for damage
【例句】The mechanic inspected the car carefully.
{{tts en_US:The mechanic inspected the car carefully.}}
【用法說明】inspect 指仔細檢查
【翻譯】技師仔細檢查了那台車。

{{tts en_US:inspection}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】檢查；視察
【搭配詞】safety inspection / routine inspection / pass inspection
【例句】The building passed the safety inspection.
{{tts en_US:The building passed the safety inspection.}}
【用法說明】inspection 指正式或例行檢查
【翻譯】那棟建築通過了安全檢查。

{{tts en_US:inspector}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】檢查員；巡官
【搭配詞】safety inspector / police inspector / school inspector
【例句】The inspector arrived early in the morning.
{{tts en_US:The inspector arrived early in the morning.}}
【用法說明】inspector 指負責檢查的人
【翻譯】檢查員一大早就到了。

{{tts en_US:inspiration}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】靈感；激勵
【搭配詞】source of inspiration / give inspiration / find inspiration
【例句】Nature is a big source of inspiration for her.
{{tts en_US:Nature is a big source of inspiration for her.}}
【用法說明】inspiration 可指創作靈感或鼓舞力量
【翻譯】大自然是她很大的靈感來源。

{{tts en_US:inspire}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】激勵；啟發
【搭配詞】inspire someone to / inspire confidence / inspire a team
【例句】Her story inspired me to keep going.
{{tts en_US:Her story inspired me to keep going.}}
【用法說明】inspire 指讓人更有動力
【翻譯】她的故事激勵我繼續走下去。

{{tts en_US:install}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】安裝；設置
【搭配詞】install an app / install software / install a window
【例句】I installed the app on my phone.
{{tts en_US:I installed the app on my phone.}}
【用法說明】install 指把設備或程式裝好
【翻譯】我把這個 app 安裝到手機上了。

{{tts en_US:installation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】安裝；裝置作品
【搭配詞】software installation / installation process / art installation
【例句】The installation took about ten minutes.
{{tts en_US:The installation took about ten minutes.}}
【用法說明】installation 可指安裝過程，也可指裝置藝術
【翻譯】安裝大概花了十分鐘。

{{tts en_US:instance}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】例子；情況；實例
【搭配詞】for instance / in this instance / rare instance
【例句】For instance, we could start earlier.
{{tts en_US:For instance, we could start earlier.}}
【用法說明】for instance 很常見，等於 for example
【翻譯】例如，我們可以更早開始。

{{tts en_US:instant}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】立刻的；瞬間；即食的
【搭配詞】instant noodles / instant reply / in an instant
【例句】He understood it in an instant.
{{tts en_US:He understood it in an instant.}}
【用法說明】instant 指幾乎沒有延遲
【翻譯】他一瞬間就懂了。

{{tts en_US:instead}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】反而；改成；而不是
【搭配詞】instead of / do this instead / stay home instead
【例句】Let's stay home instead.
{{tts en_US:Let's stay home instead.}}
【用法說明】instead 常見於 instead of 與句尾
【翻譯】我們改待在家裡吧。

{{tts en_US:instinct}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】本能；直覺
【搭配詞】natural instinct / trust your instinct / survival instinct
【例句】My first instinct was to run.
{{tts en_US:My first instinct was to run.}}
【用法說明】instinct 指不經思考的直覺反應
【翻譯】我的第一反應就是跑。

{{tts en_US:instinctive}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】本能的；直覺的
【搭配詞】instinctive reaction / instinctive fear / instinctive response
【例句】She gave an instinctive smile.
{{tts en_US:She gave an instinctive smile.}}
【用法說明】instinctive 指出於本能、不用想
【翻譯】她本能地露出了一個笑容。

{{tts en_US:institute}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】機構；設立
【搭配詞】research institute / institute a rule / medical institute
【例句】He works at a research institute.
{{tts en_US:He works at a research institute.}}
【用法說明】institute 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他在一間研究機構工作。

{{tts en_US:institution}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】機構；制度
【搭配詞】educational institution / public institution / major institution
【例句】The university is a respected institution.
{{tts en_US:The university is a respected institution.}}
【用法說明】institution 指正式組織或制度
【翻譯】那所大學是一個受尊敬的機構。

{{tts en_US:instruct}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】指示；教導
【搭配詞】instruct someone to / instruct the class / be instructed on
【例句】The teacher instructed us to open our books.
{{tts en_US:The teacher instructed us to open our books.}}
【用法說明】instruct 指清楚告知該做什麼
【翻譯】老師指示我們把書打開。

{{tts en_US:instruction}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】指示；說明；教學
【搭配詞】follow the instructions / clear instruction / driving instruction
【例句】Please read the instructions carefully.
{{tts en_US:Please read the instructions carefully.}}
【用法說明】instruction 可指步驟說明，也可指教學
【翻譯】請仔細閱讀說明。

{{tts en_US:instructor}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】指導員；講師
【搭配詞】driving instructor / yoga instructor / course instructor
【例句】Our instructor was very patient.
{{tts en_US:Our instructor was very patient.}}
【用法說明】instructor 指教技能或課程的人
【翻譯】我們的講師很有耐心。

{{tts en_US:instrument}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】樂器；儀器；工具
【搭配詞】musical instrument / measuring instrument / surgical instrument
【例句】She plays three musical instruments.
{{tts en_US:She plays three musical instruments.}}
【用法說明】instrument 可指樂器，也可指精密工具
【翻譯】她會演奏三種樂器。

{{tts en_US:insult}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】侮辱；羞辱
【搭配詞】insult someone / feel insulted / personal insult
【例句】That comment was meant to insult him.
{{tts en_US:That comment was meant to insult him.}}
【用法說明】insult 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那句話就是在羞辱他。

{{tts en_US:insurance}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】保險
【搭配詞】health insurance / car insurance / insurance company
【例句】Do you have travel insurance?
{{tts en_US:Do you have travel insurance?}}
【用法說明】insurance 指保險服務
【翻譯】你有旅遊保險嗎？

{{tts en_US:intact}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】完整無缺的
【搭配詞】remain intact / still intact / keep something intact
【例句】The box arrived intact.
{{tts en_US:The box arrived intact.}}
【用法說明】intact 指沒有壞掉、保持完整
【翻譯】箱子完整無損地送到了。

{{tts en_US:intake}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】攝取量；吸入；入口
【搭配詞】water intake / calorie intake / intake of sugar
【例句】Try to reduce your sugar intake.
{{tts en_US:Try to reduce your sugar intake.}}
【用法說明】intake 常見於食物、熱量、水分攝取
【翻譯】盡量減少糖分攝取。

{{tts en_US:integrate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】整合；融入
【搭配詞】integrate into / integrate technology / integrate with
【例句】The school is trying to integrate technology into lessons.
{{tts en_US:The school is trying to integrate technology into lessons.}}
【用法說明】integrate 指把不同部分結合起來
【翻譯】學校正試著把科技整合進課程。

{{tts en_US:integration}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】整合；融合
【搭配詞】social integration / economic integration / successful integration
【例句】The system allows easy integration with other tools.
{{tts en_US:The system allows easy integration with other tools.}}
【用法說明】integration 指把東西順利結合在一起
【翻譯】這個系統可以輕鬆和其他工具整合。

{{tts en_US:integrity}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】正直；誠信；完整性
【搭配詞】personal integrity / data integrity / act with integrity
【例句】She is respected for her honesty and integrity.
{{tts en_US:She is respected for her honesty and integrity.}}
【用法說明】integrity 可指人格正直，也可指資料完整性
【翻譯】她因為誠實和正直而受人尊敬。

{{tts en_US:intellect}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】智力；智慧
【搭配詞】great intellect / sharp intellect / use your intellect
【例句】He has a sharp intellect.
{{tts en_US:He has a sharp intellect.}}
【用法說明】intellect 指理解與思考能力
【翻譯】他有敏銳的頭腦。

{{tts en_US:intellectual}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】智力的；知識分子的
【搭配詞】intellectual property / intellectual discussion / intellectual life
【例句】They had an intellectual conversation over dinner.
{{tts en_US:They had an intellectual conversation over dinner.}}
【用法說明】intellectual 可指思考層次高，也可指知識界相關
【翻譯】他們在晚餐時聊了一場很有深度的對話。

{{tts en_US:intelligence}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】智力；情報
【搭配詞】artificial intelligence / intelligence test / military intelligence
【例句】She has both intelligence and kindness.
{{tts en_US:She has both intelligence and kindness.}}
【用法說明】intelligence 可指聰明才智，也可指情報資訊
【翻譯】她既聰明又善良。

{{tts en_US:intelligent}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】聰明的
【搭配詞】intelligent student / highly intelligent / intelligent answer
【例句】He's an intelligent and curious child.
{{tts en_US:He's an intelligent and curious child.}}
【用法說明】intelligent 指理解快、判斷好
【翻譯】他是個聰明又好奇的孩子。

{{tts en_US:intend}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】打算；想要
【搭配詞】intend to / intend for / fully intend
【例句】I intend to finish this tonight.
{{tts en_US:I intend to finish this tonight.}}
【用法說明】intend to + V 很常見
【翻譯】我打算今晚把這個做完。

{{tts en_US:intense}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】強烈的；激烈的
【搭配詞】intense heat / intense competition / intense feeling
【例句】The pain was intense at first.
{{tts en_US:The pain was intense at first.}}
【用法說明】intense 指程度很強
【翻譯】一開始的疼痛很強烈。

{{tts en_US:intensify}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】加劇；加強
【搭配詞】intensify the problem / intensify effort / tensions intensified
【例句】The rain began to intensify.
{{tts en_US:The rain began to intensify.}}
【用法說明】intensify 指程度變得更強
【翻譯】雨勢開始變大了。

{{tts en_US:intensity}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】強度；激烈程度
【搭配詞】light intensity / emotional intensity / high intensity
【例句】I wasn't prepared for the intensity of the training.
{{tts en_US:I wasn't prepared for the intensity of the training.}}
【用法說明】intensity 指力量、情緒或活動強度
【翻譯】我沒料到那個訓練強度那麼高。

{{tts en_US:intensive}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】密集的；加強的
【搭配詞】intensive course / intensive care / intensive training
【例句】She took an intensive English course.
{{tts en_US:She took an intensive English course.}}
【用法說明】intensive 指短時間內高強度進行
【翻譯】她上了一門密集英文課。

{{tts en_US:intent}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】意圖；專注的
【搭配詞】criminal intent / intent on / clear intent
【例句】He was intent on finishing the work.
{{tts en_US:He was intent on finishing the work.}}
【用法說明】intent 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】他一心想把工作完成。

{{tts en_US:intention}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】打算；意圖
【搭配詞】good intention / intention to / original intention
【例句】My intention was to help.
{{tts en_US:My intention was to help.}}
【用法說明】intention 指心裡原本想做的事
【翻譯】我的本意是想幫忙。

{{tts en_US:interact}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】互動；交流
【搭配詞】interact with / interact online / learn to interact
【例句】Kids need time to interact with others.
{{tts en_US:Kids need time to interact with others.}}
【用法說明】interact with 是最常見搭配
【翻譯】孩子需要時間和別人互動。

{{tts en_US:interaction}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】互動；交流
【搭配詞】social interaction / human interaction / class interaction
【例句】Online classes have less face-to-face interaction.
{{tts en_US:Online classes have less face-to-face interaction.}}
【用法說明】interaction 指雙方互相來往
【翻譯】線上課程比較少面對面的互動。

{{tts en_US:interest}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】興趣；利息；關注
【搭配詞】show interest in / personal interest / pay interest
【例句】She has a strong interest in art.
{{tts en_US:She has a strong interest in art.}}
【用法說明】interest 用法很多，常見是興趣
【翻譯】她對藝術很有興趣。

{{tts en_US:interested}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】感興趣的
【搭配詞】be interested in / interested to know / look interested
【例句】I'm interested in learning Japanese.
{{tts en_US:I'm interested in learning Japanese.}}
【用法說明】interested in + 名詞/V-ing 很常見
【翻譯】我對學日文有興趣。

{{tts en_US:interesting}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】有趣的
【搭配詞】interesting idea / very interesting / sound interesting
【例句】That's an interesting question.
{{tts en_US:That's an interesting question.}}
【用法說明】interesting 形容讓人感到有趣
【翻譯】那是個很有趣的問題。

{{tts en_US:interfere}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】干涉；妨礙
【搭配詞】interfere with / don't interfere / interfere in
【例句】Loud noise can interfere with sleep.
{{tts en_US:Loud noise can interfere with sleep.}}
【用法說明】interfere with 表示妨礙
【翻譯】噪音會影響睡眠。

{{tts en_US:interference}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】干涉；干擾
【搭配詞】government interference / radio interference / outside interference
【例句】The call was affected by radio interference.
{{tts en_US:The call was affected by radio interference.}}
【用法說明】interference 指妨礙正常進行的干擾
【翻譯】那通電話受到電波干擾。

{{tts en_US:interior}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】內部；室內的
【搭配詞】car interior / interior design / interior wall
【例句】The hotel has a modern interior.
{{tts en_US:The hotel has a modern interior.}}
【用法說明】interior 指裡面的部分
【翻譯】那家飯店的室內設計很現代。

{{tts en_US:intermediate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】中級的；中間的
【搭配詞】intermediate level / intermediate step / intermediate learner
【例句】This class is for intermediate students.
{{tts en_US:This class is for intermediate students.}}
【用法說明】intermediate 常見於程度分級
【翻譯】這堂課是給中級程度學生的。

{{tts en_US:internal}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】內部的；體內的
【搭配詞】internal issue / internal organs / internal system
【例句】The company is facing internal problems.
{{tts en_US:The company is facing internal problems.}}
【用法說明】internal 指內部發生的
【翻譯】那家公司正面臨內部問題。

{{tts en_US:international}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】國際的
【搭配詞】international student / international flight / international news
【例句】She works for an international company.
{{tts en_US:She works for an international company.}}
【用法說明】international 指跨國或全球範圍
【翻譯】她在一家國際公司工作。

{{tts en_US:Internet/internet}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】網際網路
【搭配詞】on the internet / internet access / use the internet
【例句】I found the answer on the internet.
{{tts en_US:I found the answer on the internet.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 Internet 和 internet 放在一起
【翻譯】我在網路上找到答案。

{{tts en_US:interpret}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】解釋；口譯；理解
【搭配詞】interpret a dream / interpret for / interpret the data
【例句】How do you interpret this sentence?
{{tts en_US:How do you interpret this sentence?}}
【用法說明】interpret 可指翻譯口語，也可指理解意義
【翻譯】你怎麼解讀這句話？

{{tts en_US:interpretation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】解釋；詮釋；口譯
【搭配詞】different interpretation / personal interpretation / legal interpretation
【例句】Your interpretation makes sense.
{{tts en_US:Your interpretation makes sense.}}
【用法說明】interpretation 指對內容的理解方式
【翻譯】你的解讀很合理。

{{tts en_US:interpreter}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】口譯員；詮釋者
【搭配詞】sign language interpreter / court interpreter / hire an interpreter
【例句】We needed an interpreter at the meeting.
{{tts en_US:We needed an interpreter at the meeting.}}
【用法說明】interpreter 指替人現場翻譯的人
【翻譯】我們開會時需要一位口譯員。

{{tts en_US:interrupt}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】打斷；中斷
【搭配詞】interrupt someone / sorry to interrupt / interrupt the process
【例句】Sorry to interrupt, but I have a question.
{{tts en_US:Sorry to interrupt, but I have a question.}}
【用法說明】interrupt 常指打斷別人說話
【翻譯】不好意思打斷一下，我有個問題。

{{tts en_US:interruption}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】打斷；中斷
【搭配詞】brief interruption / without interruption / power interruption
【例句】There was a brief interruption during the show.

{{tts en_US:intersection}}

{{tts en_US:intervene}}

【翻譯】介入；干預

{{tts en_US:intervention}}

{{tts en_US:interview}}

{{tts en_US:intimacy}}

【翻譯】親密；親近
【搭配詞】emotional intimacy / physical intimacy / sense of intimacy

{{tts en_US:intimate}}

【翻譯】親密的；私人的；暗示
【搭配詞】intimate relationship / intimate detail / intimate friend

{{tts en_US:intimidate}}

【搭配詞】intimidate someone / feel intimidated / try to intimidate

{{tts en_US:into}}

{{tts en_US:intrigue}}

{{tts en_US:introduce}}

【翻譯】介紹；引進

{{tts en_US:Let me introduce myself.}}

{{tts en_US:introduction}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】介紹；引言
【搭配詞】brief introduction / self-introduction / introduction to the book
【例句】He gave a short introduction before the talk.

{{tts en_US:intrude}}

【搭配詞】intrude on / feel like I'm intruding / intrude into

【用法說明】intrude 指進入他人空間或打擾別人

{{tts en_US:intruder}}

【翻譯】闖入者

{{tts en_US:intuition}}

【翻譯】直覺
【搭配詞】trust your intuition / gut intuition / female intuition

【翻譯】我的直覺告訴我要等等。

{{tts en_US:invaluable}}

{{tts en_US:invention}}

{{tts en_US:investment}}

{{tts en_US:lavish}}

{{tts en_US:lawmaker}}

{{tts en_US:lawsuit}}

{{tts en_US:lay}}

{{tts en_US:lead}}

{{tts en_US:left}}

{{tts en_US:legislator}}

{{tts en_US:lend}}

【例句】Can you lend me a pen?
{{tts en_US:Can you lend me a pen?}}
【用法說明】lend 指把東西借給別人
【翻譯】你可以借我一支筆嗎？

{{tts en_US:length}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】長度；時間長短
【搭配詞】the length of / full length / arm's length
【例句】What's the length of the table?
{{tts en_US:What's the length of the table?}}
【用法說明】length 指物體長度或時間長短
【翻譯】這張桌子有多長？

{{tts en_US:lengthen}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】加長；延長
【搭配詞】lengthen the skirt / lengthen the meeting / day lengthens
【例句】We need to lengthen the deadline.
{{tts en_US:We need to lengthen the deadline.}}
【用法說明】lengthen 指讓某物更長
【翻譯】我們需要延長截止日期。

{{tts en_US:lengthy}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】冗長的；很長的
【搭配詞】lengthy discussion / lengthy report / lengthy process
【例句】It was a lengthy meeting.
{{tts en_US:It was a lengthy meeting.}}
【用法說明】lengthy 常帶有『長到有點久』的感覺
【翻譯】那是一場很冗長的會議。

{{tts en_US:lens}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】鏡片；鏡頭
【搭配詞】camera lens / contact lens / wide-angle lens
【例句】I cleaned the camera lens.
{{tts en_US:I cleaned the camera lens.}}
【用法說明】lens 指相機鏡頭或眼鏡鏡片
【翻譯】我把相機鏡頭擦乾淨了。

{{tts en_US:leopard}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】豹
【搭配詞】wild leopard / leopard print / snow leopard
【例句】The leopard moved silently through the grass.
{{tts en_US:The leopard moved silently through the grass.}}
【用法說明】leopard 指豹類動物
【翻譯】那隻豹安靜地穿過草叢。

{{tts en_US:lesbian}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】女同性戀者；女同性戀的
【搭配詞】lesbian couple / identify as lesbian / lesbian rights
【例句】The article interviewed several lesbian activists.
{{tts en_US:The article interviewed several lesbian activists.}}
【用法說明】lesbian 指女性同性戀相關
【翻譯】那篇文章訪問了幾位女同志運動者。

{{tts en_US:less}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】更少；較不
【搭配詞】less than / eat less / less expensive
【例句】I need less sugar in my coffee.
{{tts en_US:I need less sugar in my coffee.}}
【用法說明】less 是高頻比較字
【翻譯】我的咖啡需要少一點糖。

{{tts en_US:lessen}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】減少；減輕
【搭配詞】lessen the pain / lessen the impact / gradually lessen
【例句】A break can lessen your stress.
{{tts en_US:A break can lessen your stress.}}
【用法說明】lessen 指程度變小
【翻譯】休息一下可以減輕你的壓力。

{{tts en_US:lesson}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】課；教訓
【搭配詞】English lesson / learn a lesson / driving lesson
【例句】I have a piano lesson this evening.
{{tts en_US:I have a piano lesson this evening.}}
【用法說明】lesson 可指上課內容，也可指教訓
【翻譯】我今晚有鋼琴課。

{{tts en_US:lest}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】唯恐；以免
【搭配詞】lest we forget / lest someone / for fear lest
【例句】Take an umbrella lest it rain later.
{{tts en_US:Take an umbrella lest it rain later.}}
【用法說明】lest 是較正式的『以免』
【翻譯】帶把傘吧，以免等等下雨。

{{tts en_US:let}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】讓；允許
【搭配詞】let me / let go / let someone do
【例句】Please let me know if you're free.
{{tts en_US:Please let me know if you're free.}}
【用法說明】let 是高頻基本動詞
【翻譯】如果你有空，請跟我說一聲。

{{tts en_US:lethal}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】致命的
【搭配詞】lethal weapon / lethal dose / potentially lethal
【例句】The snake's bite can be lethal.
{{tts en_US:The snake's bite can be lethal.}}
【用法說明】lethal 指可能致命
【翻譯】那種蛇的咬傷可能致命。

{{tts en_US:letter}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】信；字母
【搭配詞】write a letter / capital letter / cover letter
【例句】I got a letter from my friend.
{{tts en_US:I got a letter from my friend.}}
【用法說明】letter 可指信件，也可指英文字母
【翻譯】我收到朋友寄來的一封信。

{{tts en_US:lettuce}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】萵苣；生菜
【搭配詞】fresh lettuce / lettuce salad / head of lettuce
【例句】We need some lettuce for the sandwiches.
{{tts en_US:We need some lettuce for the sandwiches.}}
【用法說明】lettuce 指生菜
【翻譯】做三明治需要一些生菜。

{{tts en_US:level}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】水平；程度；樓層；使平
【搭配詞】high level / water level / level the table
【例句】His English is at an intermediate level.
{{tts en_US:His English is at an intermediate level.}}
【用法說明】level 可作名詞、形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】他的英文是中級程度。

{{tts en_US:liability}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】責任；負債；不利因素
【搭配詞】legal liability / liability insurance / be a liability
【例句】The company accepted liability for the damage.
{{tts en_US:The company accepted liability for the damage.}}
【用法說明】liability 常指法律責任或負債
【翻譯】那家公司承擔了這次損害的責任。

{{tts en_US:liable}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】有責任的；可能會…的
【搭配詞】liable for / liable to / legally liable
【例句】You may be liable for the cost.
{{tts en_US:You may be liable for the cost.}}
【用法說明】liable for = 對…負責
【翻譯】你可能得負擔這筆費用。

{{tts en_US:liar}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】說謊的人
【搭配詞】call someone a liar / terrible liar / proven liar
【例句】Nobody trusts him because he's a liar.
{{tts en_US:Nobody trusts him because he's a liar.}}
【用法說明】liar 指常說謊或被認定說謊的人
【翻譯】沒人相信他，因為他是個騙子。

{{tts en_US:liberal}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】自由派的；開放的；寬鬆的
【搭配詞】liberal views / liberal education / be liberal with
【例句】Her parents are fairly liberal.
{{tts en_US:Her parents are fairly liberal.}}
【用法說明】liberal 可指政治立場，也可指態度開放
【翻譯】她父母的觀念算滿開放的。

{{tts en_US:liberate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】解放；釋放
【搭配詞】liberate a country / liberate from / feel liberated
【例句】The movement aimed to liberate the oppressed.
{{tts en_US:The movement aimed to liberate the oppressed.}}
【用法說明】liberate 指讓人脫離壓迫或束縛
【翻譯】那場運動旨在解放受壓迫的人。

{{tts en_US:liberation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】解放；釋放
【搭配詞】national liberation / liberation from / sense of liberation
【例句】She felt a sense of liberation after quitting.
{{tts en_US:She felt a sense of liberation after quitting.}}
【用法說明】liberation 指從束縛中解脫
【翻譯】辭職後她有一種解放感。

{{tts en_US:liberty}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】自由
【搭配詞】personal liberty / take the liberty of / liberty and justice
【例句】People fought for liberty and rights.
{{tts en_US:People fought for liberty and rights.}}
【用法說明】liberty 是較正式的『自由』
【翻譯】人們為自由與權利而奮鬥。

{{tts en_US:librarian}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】圖書館員
【搭配詞】school librarian / friendly librarian / ask the librarian
【例句】The librarian helped me find the book.
{{tts en_US:The librarian helped me find the book.}}
【用法說明】librarian 指圖書館工作人員
【翻譯】圖書館員幫我找到那本書。

{{tts en_US:library}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】圖書館
【搭配詞】school library / public library / library card
【例句】I borrowed a book from the library.
{{tts en_US:I borrowed a book from the library.}}
【用法說明】library 指圖書館
【翻譯】我從圖書館借了一本書。

{{tts en_US:license}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】執照；許可證；授權
【搭配詞】driver's license / license plate / get a license
【例句】I need to renew my driver's license.
{{tts en_US:I need to renew my driver's license.}}
【用法說明】license 指官方核發的證件或授權
【翻譯】我得更新我的駕照。

{{tts en_US:lick}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】舔
【搭配詞】lick an ice cream / lick your lips / dog licked
【例句】The dog licked my hand.
{{tts en_US:The dog licked my hand.}}
【用法說明】lick 指用舌頭舔
【翻譯】那隻狗舔了我的手。

{{tts en_US:lid}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】蓋子
【搭配詞】put the lid on / jar lid / lift the lid
【例句】Put the lid back on the pot.
{{tts en_US:Put the lid back on the pot.}}
【用法說明】lid 指容器的蓋子
【翻譯】把鍋蓋蓋回去。

{{tts en_US:lie}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】躺；說謊；謊言
【搭配詞】lie down / lie to / tell a lie
【例句】I need to lie down for a while.
{{tts en_US:I need to lie down for a while.}}
【用法說明】lie 用法很多，這裡例句取『躺下』義
【翻譯】我需要躺一下。

{{tts en_US:lieutenant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】中尉；副手
【搭配詞】army lieutenant / police lieutenant / trusted lieutenant
【例句】The lieutenant gave the order.
{{tts en_US:The lieutenant gave the order.}}
【用法說明】lieutenant 可指軍警階級，也可比喻副手
【翻譯】那位中尉下了命令。

{{tts en_US:life}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】生命；生活；人生
【搭配詞】life story / real life / save a life
【例句】Life is full of surprises.
{{tts en_US:Life is full of surprises.}}
【用法說明】life 是超高頻名詞
【翻譯】人生充滿驚喜。

{{tts en_US:lifeguard}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】救生員
【搭配詞】beach lifeguard / lifeguard tower / trained lifeguard
【例句】The lifeguard blew the whistle.
{{tts en_US:The lifeguard blew the whistle.}}
【用法說明】lifeguard 指泳池或海邊的救生員
【翻譯】救生員吹了哨子。

{{tts en_US:lifelong}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】終身的；一生的
【搭配詞】lifelong dream / lifelong friend / lifelong learning
【例句】She's been a lifelong friend.
{{tts en_US:She's been a lifelong friend.}}
【用法說明】lifelong 指持續一生
【翻譯】她是一位一輩子的朋友。

{{tts en_US:lifetime}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】一生；終生；有生之年
【搭配詞】once in a lifetime / in my lifetime / lifetime warranty
【例句】It was a once-in-a-lifetime experience.
{{tts en_US:It was a once-in-a-lifetime experience.}}
【用法說明】lifetime 常見於 once in a lifetime
【翻譯】那是一生只有一次的經驗。

{{tts en_US:lift}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】抬起；搭便車；電梯
【搭配詞】lift the box / give someone a lift / take the lift
【例句】Can you help me lift this box?
{{tts en_US:Can you help me lift this box?}}
【用法說明】lift 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】你可以幫我抬這個箱子嗎？

{{tts en_US:light}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】光；輕的；點燃
【搭配詞】turn on the light / light bag / light a candle
【例句】Please turn on the light.
{{tts en_US:Please turn on the light.}}
【用法說明】light 用法很多，常見是燈光
【翻譯】請把燈打開。

{{tts en_US:lighten}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】減輕；照亮；變淡
【搭配詞】lighten the load / lighten up / hair lightened
【例句】The joke helped lighten the mood.
{{tts en_US:The joke helped lighten the mood.}}
【用法說明】lighten 可指讓氣氛變輕鬆
【翻譯】那個笑話讓氣氛輕鬆了些。

{{tts en_US:lighthouse}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】燈塔
【搭配詞】old lighthouse / lighthouse keeper / by the lighthouse
【例句】We could see the lighthouse from the beach.
{{tts en_US:We could see the lighthouse from the beach.}}
【用法說明】lighthouse 指燈塔
【翻譯】我們從海灘上看得到燈塔。

{{tts en_US:lightning}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】閃電
【搭配詞】flash of lightning / lightning strike / thunder and lightning
【例句】Lightning lit up the sky.
{{tts en_US:Lightning lit up the sky.}}
【用法說明】lightning 指閃電
【翻譯】閃電照亮了天空。

{{tts en_US:like}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】喜歡；像；例如
【搭配詞】like music / look like / things like that
【例句】I like this song a lot.
{{tts en_US:I like this song a lot.}}
【用法說明】like 是超高頻字，可作動詞、介系詞、連接詞
【翻譯】我很喜歡這首歌。

{{tts en_US:likelihood}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】可能性
【搭配詞】high likelihood / likelihood of / increase the likelihood
【例句】There's a strong likelihood of rain tonight.
{{tts en_US:There's a strong likelihood of rain tonight.}}
【用法說明】likelihood 指某事發生的機率
【翻譯】今晚很有可能下雨。

{{tts en_US:likely}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】可能的；很可能
【搭配詞】be likely to / most likely / likely result
【例句】She's likely to be late.
{{tts en_US:She's likely to be late.}}
【用法說明】likely to + V 很常見
【翻譯】她很可能會遲到。

{{tts en_US:likewise}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】同樣地；也一樣
【搭配詞】and likewise / likewise important / likewise for
【例句】It was nice meeting you—likewise.
{{tts en_US:It was nice meeting you—likewise.}}
【用法說明】likewise 常用於回應對方相同心意
【翻譯】很高興認識你——我也是。

{{tts en_US:lily}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】百合花；睡蓮
【搭配詞】white lily / water lily / lily pond
【例句】She bought a bouquet of lilies.
{{tts en_US:She bought a bouquet of lilies.}}
【用法說明】lily 指百合類花卉
【翻譯】她買了一束百合花。

{{tts en_US:limb}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】四肢；大樹枝
【搭配詞】broken limb / tree limb / lose a limb
【例句】A bird landed on a tree limb.
{{tts en_US:A bird landed on a tree limb.}}
【用法說明】limb 可指手腳，也可指粗樹枝
【翻譯】一隻鳥停在樹枝上。

{{tts en_US:limit}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】限制；限度；限制某事
【搭配詞】speed limit / set a limit / limit your spending
【例句】There's a limit to how much I can do.
{{tts en_US:There's a limit to how much I can do.}}
【用法說明】limit 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我能做的事情是有限度的。

{{tts en_US:limitation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】限制；局限
【搭配詞】physical limitation / limitation of the system / major limitation
【例句】Every method has its limitations.
{{tts en_US:Every method has its limitations.}}
【用法說明】limitation 指能力或系統上的限制
【翻譯】每種方法都有它的限制。

{{tts en_US:limp}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】跛行；一瘸一拐地走
【搭配詞】walk with a limp / start to limp / limp home
【例句】He limped off the field after the game.
{{tts en_US:He limped off the field after the game.}}
【用法說明】limp 指因受傷而跛行
【翻譯】比賽後他一瘸一拐地走下場。

{{tts en_US:line}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】線；排隊；路線；台詞
【搭配詞】draw a line / stand in line / phone line
【例句】There was a long line at the ticket office.
{{tts en_US:There was a long line at the ticket office.}}
【用法說明】line 用法很多，常見是隊伍或線條
【翻譯】售票處排了一條長隊。

{{tts en_US:linen}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】亞麻布；床單織品
【搭配詞】bed linen / linen shirt / fresh linen
【例句】The hotel provides clean bed linen.
{{tts en_US:The hotel provides clean bed linen.}}
【用法說明】linen 指亞麻材質或床單類布品
【翻譯】那家飯店提供乾淨的床單。

{{tts en_US:liner}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】班機；班輪；內襯
【搭配詞】ocean liner / airline liner / drawer liner
【例句】The cruise liner left in the evening.
{{tts en_US:The cruise liner left in the evening.}}
【用法說明】liner 最常指大型定期船班
【翻譯】那艘郵輪在傍晚出發。

{{tts en_US:linger}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】逗留；持續存在
【搭配詞】linger on / linger in the air / linger too long
【例句】The smell of coffee lingered in the room.
{{tts en_US:The smell of coffee lingered in the room.}}
【用法說明】linger 指停留比預期久
【翻譯】咖啡香在房間裡久久不散。

{{tts en_US:lining}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】內襯；襯裡
【搭配詞】jacket lining / silver lining / soft lining
【例句】The coat has a warm lining.
{{tts en_US:The coat has a warm lining.}}
【用法說明】lining 指衣物或容器內側那層
【翻譯】這件外套有保暖內襯。

{{tts en_US:link}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】連結；關聯；把…連起來
【搭配詞】link to / direct link / close link
【例句】Can you send me the link?
{{tts en_US:Can you send me the link?}}

{{tts en_US:lot}}

{{tts en_US:It took a mere five minutes.}}
【用法說明】mere 用來強調『只有這麼一點』
【翻譯】這只花了短短五分鐘。

{{tts en_US:merge}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】合併；融合
【搭配詞】merge with / merge into / companies merge
【例句】The two companies decided to merge.
{{tts en_US:The two companies decided to merge.}}
【用法說明】merge 指兩個東西合成一個
【翻譯】那兩家公司決定合併。

{{tts en_US:merit}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】優點；價值；值得
【搭配詞】on its own merit / have merit / merit attention
【例句】Your idea has real merit.
{{tts en_US:Your idea has real merit.}}
【用法說明】merit 指某事值得肯定的地方
【翻譯】你的想法很有價值。

{{tts en_US:mermaid}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】美人魚
【搭配詞】little mermaid / mermaid tail / mermaid story
【例句】The child was dressed like a mermaid.
{{tts en_US:The child was dressed like a mermaid.}}
【用法說明】mermaid 指美人魚
【翻譯】那個孩子打扮得像美人魚。

{{tts en_US:merry}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】愉快的；歡樂的
【搭配詞】merry Christmas / merry laugh / sound merry
【例句】We had a merry evening with friends.
{{tts en_US:We had a merry evening with friends.}}
【用法說明】merry 常帶節慶歡樂感
【翻譯】我們和朋友度過了一個愉快的夜晚。

{{tts en_US:mess}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】混亂；弄亂
【搭配詞】make a mess / clean up the mess / messy desk
【例句】The kitchen is a mess.
{{tts en_US:The kitchen is a mess.}}
【用法說明】mess 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】廚房亂成一團。

{{tts en_US:message}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】訊息；留言；訊息內容
【搭配詞】send a message / leave a message / text message
【例句】I got your message this morning.
{{tts en_US:I got your message this morning.}}
【用法說明】message 指文字或口頭傳達的內容
【翻譯】我今天早上收到你的訊息。

{{tts en_US:messenger}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】信使；傳訊者
【搭配詞】messenger app / royal messenger / send a messenger
【例句】The app works like a messenger service.
{{tts en_US:The app works like a messenger service.}}
【用法說明】messenger 可指送信人，也常見於聊天軟體名稱
【翻譯】這個 app 就像一個傳訊服務。

{{tts en_US:messy}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】凌亂的；髒亂的
【搭配詞】messy room / messy hair / messy desk
【例句】Your room is really messy.
{{tts en_US:Your room is really messy.}}
【用法說明】messy 指不整齊、很亂
【翻譯】你的房間真的很亂。

{{tts en_US:metal}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】金屬
【搭配詞】metal chair / heavy metal / sheet of metal
【例句】The table is made of metal.
{{tts en_US:The table is made of metal.}}
【用法說明】metal 指金屬材質
【翻譯】這張桌子是金屬做的。

{{tts en_US:metaphor}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】隱喻
【搭配詞】use a metaphor / simple metaphor / metaphor for life
【例句】The poem uses a bird as a metaphor for freedom.
{{tts en_US:The poem uses a bird as a metaphor for freedom.}}
【用法說明】metaphor 指比喻的一種
【翻譯】那首詩用鳥來隱喻自由。

{{tts en_US:meter}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】公尺；計量表
【搭配詞】parking meter / one meter long / gas meter
【例句】The rope is two meters long.
{{tts en_US:The rope is two meters long.}}
【用法說明】meter 可指長度單位或計量儀表
【翻譯】這條繩子長兩公尺。

{{tts en_US:method}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】方法
【搭配詞】teaching method / simple method / effective method
【例句】We need a better method.
{{tts en_US:We need a better method.}}
【用法說明】method 指做事的方法
【翻譯】我們需要一個更好的方法。

{{tts en_US:metropolitan}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】大都市的
【搭配詞】metropolitan area / metropolitan city / metropolitan museum
【例句】She moved to a large metropolitan area.
{{tts en_US:She moved to a large metropolitan area.}}
【用法說明】metropolitan 指大都市相關
【翻譯】她搬到了大都會地區。

{{tts en_US:microphone/mike}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】麥克風
【搭配詞】hold a microphone / turn on the mic / wireless microphone
【例句】Can you speak into the microphone?
{{tts en_US:Can you speak into the microphone?}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 microphone 和 mike 放在一起
【翻譯】你可以對著麥克風說話嗎？

{{tts en_US:microscope}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】顯微鏡
【搭配詞】look through a microscope / microscope slide / powerful microscope
【例句】We looked at the sample through a microscope.
{{tts en_US:We looked at the sample through a microscope.}}
【用法說明】microscope 指顯微鏡
【翻譯】我們用顯微鏡看了那個樣本。

{{tts en_US:microwave}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】微波爐；用微波加熱
【搭配詞】microwave oven / microwave the food / in the microwave
