【翻譯】我得整理一下筆記。

{{tts en_US:organizer}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】主辦人；收納盒；組織者
【搭配詞】event organizer / desk organizer / professional organizer
【例句】The organizer sent out the schedule.
{{tts en_US:The organizer sent out the schedule.}}
【用法說明】organizer 指活動主辦者或整理工具
【翻譯】主辦人把行程表寄出去了。

{{tts en_US:orient}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使適應方向；定位
【搭配詞】orient yourself / orient to / orient new students
【例句】The map helped us orient ourselves.
{{tts en_US:The map helped us orient ourselves.}}
【用法說明】orient 指找方向或讓人熟悉環境
【翻譯】那張地圖幫助我們找到方向。

{{tts en_US:oriental}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】東方的；東方人（舊用法）
【搭配詞】oriental art / oriental style / oriental rug
【例句】The room was decorated in an oriental style.
{{tts en_US:The room was decorated in an oriental style.}}
【用法說明】oriental 用於風格物品較常見，用於稱人已偏舊
【翻譯】那個房間布置成東方風格。

{{tts en_US:orientation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】方向；迎新；適應介紹
【搭配詞】new student orientation / job orientation / sense of orientation
【例句】The company held an orientation for new staff.
{{tts en_US:The company held an orientation for new staff.}}
【用法說明】orientation 常指新生或新員工說明會
【翻譯】公司為新員工舉辦了說明會。

{{tts en_US:origin}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】起源；來源
【搭配詞】origin of / country of origin / trace the origin
【例句】No one knows the origin of the tradition.
{{tts en_US:No one knows the origin of the tradition.}}
【用法說明】origin 指某事最初從哪來
【翻譯】沒有人知道這個傳統的起源。

{{tts en_US:original}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】原本的；原創的；原件
【搭配詞】original plan / original version / be original
【例句】This is the original painting.
{{tts en_US:This is the original painting.}}
【用法說明】original 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】這是原畫。

{{tts en_US:originality}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】原創性；獨創性
【搭配詞】show originality / lack originality / creative originality
【例句】The design stands out for its originality.
{{tts en_US:The design stands out for its originality.}}
【用法說明】originality 指有自己的創意
【翻譯】這個設計因為原創性而特別突出。

{{tts en_US:originate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】起源於；發起
【搭配詞】originate in / originate from / originate an idea
【例句】The custom originated in Europe.
{{tts en_US:The custom originated in Europe.}}
【用法說明】originate 指最初出現於
【翻譯】這個習俗起源於歐洲。

{{tts en_US:ornament}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】裝飾品；點綴
【搭配詞】Christmas ornament / hair ornament / ornament a room
【例句】She hung a small ornament on the tree.
{{tts en_US:She hung a small ornament on the tree.}}
【用法說明】ornament 指裝飾用小物
【翻譯】她在樹上掛了一個小裝飾品。

{{tts en_US:orphan}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】孤兒
【搭配詞】war orphan / young orphan / orphan child
【例句】The novel follows the life of an orphan.
{{tts en_US:The novel follows the life of an orphan.}}
【用法說明】orphan 指失去父母的孩子
【翻譯】那本小說描述一個孤兒的人生。

{{tts en_US:orphanage}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】孤兒院
【搭配詞】local orphanage / work at an orphanage / donate to an orphanage
【例句】They donated books to the orphanage.
{{tts en_US:They donated books to the orphanage.}}
【用法說明】orphanage 指收容孤兒的地方
【翻譯】他們捐書給那間孤兒院。

{{tts en_US:orthodox}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】正統的；傳統的
【搭配詞】orthodox method / orthodox view / religious orthodox
【例句】He follows a very orthodox teaching style.
{{tts en_US:He follows a very orthodox teaching style.}}
【用法說明】orthodox 指遵循傳統標準做法
【翻譯】他採用非常傳統的教學方式。

{{tts en_US:other}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】其他的；別的
【搭配詞】other people / the other side / each other
【例句】Do you have any other questions?
{{tts en_US:Do you have any other questions?}}
【用法說明】other 是高頻字
【翻譯】你還有其他問題嗎？

{{tts en_US:otherwise}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】否則；不然；除此之外
【搭配詞】or otherwise / think otherwise / otherwise fine
【例句】Hurry up, otherwise we'll be late.
{{tts en_US:Hurry up, otherwise we'll be late.}}
【用法說明】otherwise 最常指『否則』
【翻譯】快一點，不然我們會遲到。

{{tts en_US:ounce}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】盎司；少量
【搭配詞】one ounce / ounce of gold / not an ounce of
【例句】The recipe needs two ounces of butter.
{{tts en_US:The recipe needs two ounces of butter.}}
【用法說明】ounce 是重量單位
【翻譯】這份食譜需要兩盎司奶油。

{{tts en_US:out}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】出去；外面；熄滅
【搭配詞】go out / out of stock / lights out
【例句】Let's eat out tonight.
{{tts en_US:Let's eat out tonight.}}
【用法說明】out 用法很多，常見是出去、在外面
【翻譯】我們今晚出去吃吧。

{{tts en_US:outbreak}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】爆發；突然發生
【搭配詞】disease outbreak / outbreak of violence / sudden outbreak
【例句】The city responded quickly to the outbreak.
{{tts en_US:The city responded quickly to the outbreak.}}
【用法說明】outbreak 常指疾病或衝突爆發
【翻譯】那座城市很快就對這次爆發做出反應。

{{tts en_US:outcome}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】結果
【搭配詞】possible outcome / final outcome / outcome of the test
【例句】We still don't know the outcome.
{{tts en_US:We still don't know the outcome.}}
【用法說明】outcome 指事情最後的結果
【翻譯】我們還不知道結果。

{{tts en_US:outdoor}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】戶外的
【搭配詞】outdoor activity / outdoor pool / outdoor market
【例句】We planned an outdoor picnic.
{{tts en_US:We planned an outdoor picnic.}}
【用法說明】outdoor 指在戶外進行的
【翻譯】我們安排了一場戶外野餐。

{{tts en_US:outdoors}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】在戶外
【搭配詞】play outdoors / spend time outdoors / be outdoors
【例句】The kids were playing outdoors.
{{tts en_US:The kids were playing outdoors.}}
【用法說明】outdoors 是副詞，表示在戶外
【翻譯】孩子們正在外面玩。

{{tts en_US:outer}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】外部的；外面的
【搭配詞】outer layer / outer space / outer wall
【例句】The jacket has an outer layer that blocks wind.
{{tts en_US:The jacket has an outer layer that blocks wind.}}
【用法說明】outer 指外側那一層
【翻譯】這件外套有一層防風的外層。

{{tts en_US:outfit}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】穿搭；整套服裝；裝備
【搭配詞】casual outfit / school outfit / change your outfit
【例句】I like your outfit today.
{{tts en_US:I like your outfit today.}}
【用法說明】outfit 常指整體穿搭
【翻譯】我喜歡你今天的穿搭。

{{tts en_US:outgoing}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】外向的；即將離任的；外寄的
【搭配詞】outgoing person / outgoing mail / outgoing manager
【例句】She's very outgoing and easy to talk to.
{{tts en_US:She's very outgoing and easy to talk to.}}
【用法說明】outgoing 最常指外向
【翻譯】她很外向，也很好聊。

{{tts en_US:outing}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】郊遊；短途出遊
【搭配詞】school outing / family outing / day outing
【例句】We went on a family outing last weekend.
{{tts en_US:We went on a family outing last weekend.}}
【用法說明】outing 指輕鬆短途出遊
【翻譯】我們上週末全家去郊遊。

{{tts en_US:outlaw}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】法外之徒；宣布…非法
【搭配詞】famous outlaw / outlaw smoking / make it outlawed
【例句】The movie is about an outlaw in the old West.
{{tts en_US:The movie is about an outlaw in the old West.}}
【用法說明】outlaw 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那部電影是在講西部時代的一名法外之徒。

{{tts en_US:outlet}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】出口；插座；門市；發洩管道
【搭配詞】power outlet / news outlet / outlet mall
【例句】I need to charge my phone, but I can't find an outlet.
{{tts en_US:I need to charge my phone, but I can't find an outlet.}}
【用法說明】outlet 用法很多，常見是插座
【翻譯】我得幫手機充電，但找不到插座。

{{tts en_US:outline}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】大綱；輪廓；概述
【搭配詞】essay outline / outline the plan / clear outline
【例句】She wrote an outline before starting the report.
{{tts en_US:She wrote an outline before starting the report.}}
【用法說明】outline 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她在開始寫報告前先列了大綱。

{{tts en_US:outlook}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】觀點；前景；展望
【搭配詞】positive outlook / job outlook / outlook on life
【例句】He has a positive outlook on life.
{{tts en_US:He has a positive outlook on life.}}
【用法說明】outlook 指看法或未來前景
【翻譯】他對人生抱持正面的看法。

{{tts en_US:outnumber}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】數量上超過
【搭配詞】outnumber by / women outnumber men / greatly outnumber
【例句】Students outnumber teachers at the event.
{{tts en_US:Students outnumber teachers at the event.}}
【用法說明】outnumber 指某方人數比較多
【翻譯】活動上學生的人數比老師多。

{{tts en_US:output}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】產出；輸出
【搭配詞】work output / output level / computer output
【例句】The factory increased its output this year.
{{tts en_US:The factory increased its output this year.}}
【用法說明】output 指產量或系統輸出結果
【翻譯】那家工廠今年提高了產量。

{{tts en_US:outrage}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】憤怒；公憤
【搭配詞】public outrage / express outrage / cause outrage
【例句】The decision caused public outrage.
{{tts en_US:The decision caused public outrage.}}
【用法說明】outrage 指非常強烈的憤怒
【翻譯】那個決定引發了公憤。

{{tts en_US:outrageous}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】離譜的；令人憤怒的
【搭配詞】outrageous price / outrageous comment / sound outrageous
【例句】That's an outrageous price.
{{tts en_US:That's an outrageous price.}}
【用法說明】outrageous 常見於口語表示誇張到不行
【翻譯】那個價格也太離譜了。

{{tts en_US:outright}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】完全地；公開地
【搭配詞】outright lie / reject outright / outright winner
【例句】He denied it outright.
{{tts en_US:He denied it outright.}}
【用法說明】outright 指直接、完全地
【翻譯】他直接否認了。

{{tts en_US:outset}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】開始；開端
【搭配詞】from the outset / at the outset / from the very outset
【例句】She was honest from the outset.
{{tts en_US:She was honest from the outset.}}
【用法說明】outset 常見於 from the outset
【翻譯】她從一開始就很誠實。

{{tts en_US:outside}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】外面；外部的；在…外面
【搭配詞】outside the house / outside world / wait outside
【例句】I'll wait for you outside.
{{tts en_US:I'll wait for you outside.}}
【用法說明】outside 可作名詞、副詞、介詞或形容詞
【翻譯】我會在外面等你。

{{tts en_US:outsider}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】外人；局外人
【搭配詞】feel like an outsider / political outsider / complete outsider
【例句】He felt like an outsider at the party.
{{tts en_US:He felt like an outsider at the party.}}
【用法說明】outsider 指不屬於某個圈子的人
【翻譯】他在派對上覺得自己像個局外人。

{{tts en_US:outskirts}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】郊區；市郊
【搭配詞】on the outskirts / city outskirts / outskirts of town
【例句】They live on the outskirts of the city.
{{tts en_US:They live on the outskirts of the city.}}
【用法說明】outskirts 通常用複數，指城市邊緣
【翻譯】他們住在城市郊區。

{{tts en_US:outstanding}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】傑出的；未完成的
【搭配詞】outstanding student / outstanding debt / outstanding performance
【例句】She did an outstanding job.
{{tts en_US:She did an outstanding job.}}
【用法說明】outstanding 常用來稱讚表現很優秀
【翻譯】她做得非常出色。

{{tts en_US:outward}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】向外的；外表上的
【搭配詞】outward appearance / outward sign / move outward
【例句】His outward calm hid his stress.
{{tts en_US:His outward calm hid his stress.}}
【用法說明】outward 指往外或表面上看起來
【翻譯】他表面上的平靜掩蓋了內心壓力。

{{tts en_US:outward/outwards}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】向外地
【搭配詞】move outwards / face outward / spread outward
【例句】The door opens outward.
{{tts en_US:The door opens outward.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 outward 和 outwards 放在一起
【翻譯】這扇門是向外開的。

{{tts en_US:oval}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】橢圓形的；橢圓
【搭配詞】oval table / oval shape / draw an oval
【例句】The mirror is oval.
{{tts en_US:The mirror is oval.}}
【用法說明】oval 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】那面鏡子是橢圓形的。

{{tts en_US:oven}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】烤箱；烤爐
【搭配詞】bake in the oven / oven door / hot oven
【例句】The cookies are in the oven.
{{tts en_US:The cookies are in the oven.}}
【用法說明】oven 指烤箱
【翻譯】餅乾正在烤箱裡。

{{tts en_US:over}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】在…上方；結束；超過
【搭配詞】over there / all over / over 100
【例句】The game is over.
{{tts en_US:The game is over.}}
【用法說明】over 用法很多，常見是結束或在上方
【翻譯】比賽結束了。

{{tts en_US:overall}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】整體的；總體上
【搭配詞】overall result / overall impression / overall,
【例句】Overall, the trip was great.
{{tts en_US:Overall, the trip was great.}}
【用法說明】overall 常用來總結整體情況
【翻譯】整體來說，這趟旅行很棒。

{{tts en_US:overcoat}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】大衣
【搭配詞】winter overcoat / black overcoat / wear an overcoat
【例句】He put on an overcoat before going out.
{{tts en_US:He put on an overcoat before going out.}}
【用法說明】overcoat 指穿在外面的長大衣
【翻譯】他出門前穿上了一件大衣。

{{tts en_US:overcome}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】克服；戰勝
【搭配詞】overcome fear / overcome a problem / be overcome by
【例句】She worked hard to overcome her fear of speaking.
{{tts en_US:She worked hard to overcome her fear of speaking.}}
【用法說明】overcome 指跨越困難
【翻譯】她努力克服自己害怕講話的問題。

{{tts en_US:overdo}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】做過頭；過度
【搭配詞】overdo it / overdo the makeup / don't overdo
【例句】Don't overdo it at the gym.
{{tts en_US:Don't overdo it at the gym.}}
【用法說明】overdo 常見於提醒別做太多
【翻譯】去健身房別練過頭。

{{tts en_US:overflow}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】溢出；滿出來
【搭配詞】overflow with / sink overflowed / emotional overflow
【例句】The cup overflowed onto the table.
{{tts en_US:The cup overflowed onto the table.}}
【用法說明】overflow 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】杯子滿出來，水流到桌上。

{{tts en_US:overhead}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】在頭頂上；間接費用；架空的
【搭配詞】fly overhead / overhead costs / overhead light
【例句】A plane passed overhead.
{{tts en_US:A plane passed overhead.}}
【用法說明】overhead 可作副詞、形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】一架飛機從頭頂飛過。

{{tts en_US:overhear}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】無意中聽到
【搭配詞】overhear a conversation / overhear someone say / accidentally overhear
【例句】I overheard them talking about the trip.
{{tts en_US:I overheard them talking about the trip.}}
【用法說明】overhear 指不是故意卻聽見
【翻譯】我無意間聽到他們在談旅行。

{{tts en_US:overlap}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】重疊；重合部分
【搭配詞】overlap with / time overlap / areas overlap
【例句】Our schedules overlap on Fridays.
{{tts en_US:Our schedules overlap on Fridays.}}
【用法說明】overlap 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們的行程在星期五有重疊。

{{tts en_US:overlook}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】忽略；俯瞰
【搭配詞】overlook a detail / room overlooks the sea / easily overlook
【例句】Don't overlook the small details.
{{tts en_US:Don't overlook the small details.}}
【用法說明】overlook 可指漏看，也可指從高處俯瞰
【翻譯】不要忽略那些小細節。

{{tts en_US:overnight}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】一夜之間；過夜的
【搭配詞】stay overnight / overnight success / overnight bag
【例句】We stayed overnight at a hotel.
{{tts en_US:We stayed overnight at a hotel.}}
【用法說明】overnight 可作副詞或形容詞
【翻譯】我們在飯店住了一晚。

{{tts en_US:overseas}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】海外的；在海外
【搭配詞】study overseas / overseas market / travel overseas
【例句】She wants to study overseas.
{{tts en_US:She wants to study overseas.}}
【用法說明】overseas 指國外、海外
【翻譯】她想出國留學。

{{tts en_US:oversee}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】監督；監管
【搭配詞】oversee a project / oversee operations / oversee the team
【例句】He oversees the whole department.
{{tts en_US:He oversees the whole department.}}
【用法說明】oversee 指管理並監督
【翻譯】他負責監督整個部門。

{{tts en_US:overtake}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】超車；超越
【搭配詞】overtake a car / overtake the leader / be overtaken by
【例句】A truck overtook us on the highway.
{{tts en_US:A truck overtook us on the highway.}}
【用法說明】overtake 指從後面超過
【翻譯】一輛卡車在高速公路上超過了我們。

{{tts en_US:overthrow}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】推翻；顛覆
【搭配詞】overthrow a government / attempt to overthrow / be overthrown
【例句】The rebels tried to overthrow the ruler.
{{tts en_US:The rebels tried to overthrow the ruler.}}
【用法說明】overthrow 指用強烈方式推翻政權
【翻譯】叛軍試圖推翻統治者。

{{tts en_US:overturn}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】推翻；翻倒
【搭配詞】overturn a decision / car overturned / overturn the ruling
【例句】The court overturned the decision.
{{tts en_US:The court overturned the decision.}}
【用法說明】overturn 可指推翻裁決，也可指翻車翻倒
【翻譯】法院推翻了那個決定。

{{tts en_US:overwhelm}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】壓倒；使不知所措
【搭配詞】feel overwhelmed / overwhelm someone / be overwhelmed by
【例句】I was overwhelmed by all the work.
{{tts en_US:I was overwhelmed by all the work.}}
【用法說明】overwhelm 指事情太多讓人承受不住
【翻譯】工作太多，讓我有點招架不住。

{{tts en_US:overwork}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】過度工作；使過勞
【搭配詞】overwork yourself / overwork your staff / due to overwork
【例句】Don't overwork yourself.
{{tts en_US:Don't overwork yourself.}}
【用法說明】overwork 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】不要讓自己過勞。

{{tts en_US:owe}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】欠；歸功於
【搭配詞】owe money / owe someone an apology / owe it to
【例句】I owe you ten dollars.
{{tts en_US:I owe you ten dollars.}}
【用法說明】owe 指欠債或覺得該做某事
【翻譯】我欠你十塊錢。

{{tts en_US:owl}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】貓頭鷹
【搭配詞】night owl / owl in the tree / snowy owl
【例句】We heard an owl in the woods.
{{tts en_US:We heard an owl in the woods.}}
【用法說明】owl 指貓頭鷹
【翻譯】我們在樹林裡聽見一隻貓頭鷹。

{{tts en_US:own}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】自己的；擁有
【搭配詞】my own room / own a car / on your own
【例句】I want my own room.
{{tts en_US:I want my own room.}}
【用法說明】own 可作形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】我想要自己的房間。

{{tts en_US:owner}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】主人；所有者
【搭配詞】shop owner / car owner / pet owner
【例句】The owner of the café was very friendly.
{{tts en_US:The owner of the café was very friendly.}}
【用法說明】owner 指擁有某物的人
【翻譯】那家咖啡店的老闆很友善。

{{tts en_US:ownership}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】所有權；擁有感
【搭配詞】take ownership / sense of ownership / ownership of property
【例句】She took ownership of the mistake.
{{tts en_US:She took ownership of the mistake.}}
【用法說明】ownership 可指法律所有權，也可指願意負責
【翻譯】她承擔了那個錯誤。

{{tts en_US:ox}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】公牛
【搭配詞】ox cart / strong as an ox / ox in the field
【例句】The ox pulled the cart slowly.
{{tts en_US:The ox pulled the cart slowly.}}
【用法說明】ox 指牛車常見的公牛
【翻譯】那頭公牛慢慢地拉著車。

{{tts en_US:oxygen}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】氧氣
【搭配詞】oxygen tank / oxygen level / need oxygen
【例句】Plants release oxygen into the air.
{{tts en_US:Plants release oxygen into the air.}}
【用法說明】oxygen 指氧氣
【翻譯】植物會把氧氣釋放到空氣中。

{{tts en_US:oyster}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】牡蠣；蠔
【搭配詞】eat oysters / fresh oyster / oyster shell
【例句】He ordered grilled oysters.
{{tts en_US:He ordered grilled oysters.}}
【用法說明】oyster 指牡蠣
【翻譯】他點了烤牡蠣。

{{tts en_US:ozone}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】臭氧
【搭配詞】ozone layer / ozone hole / protect the ozone layer
【例句】The ozone layer protects the Earth.
{{tts en_US:The ozone layer protects the Earth.}}
【用法說明】ozone 常見於 ozone layer
【翻譯】臭氧層保護著地球。

{{tts en_US:pace}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】步調；速度；踱步
【搭配詞】set the pace / at a fast pace / pace around
【例句】The course moves at a slow pace.
{{tts en_US:The course moves at a slow pace.}}
【用法說明】pace 指速度或節奏
【翻譯】這門課進行的步調比較慢。

{{tts en_US:pack}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】打包；一包；一群
【搭配詞】pack a bag / pack of cards / wolves pack
【例句】I need to pack for the trip.
{{tts en_US:I need to pack for the trip.}}
【用法說明】pack 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我得為這趟旅行打包。

{{tts en_US:package}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】包裹；套裝；包裝
【搭配詞】send a package / software package / gift package
【例句】A package arrived this morning.
{{tts en_US:A package arrived this morning.}}
【用法說明】package 指郵寄包裹或整套內容
【翻譯】今天早上有個包裹送到。

{{tts en_US:packet}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】小包；資料包
【搭配詞】tea packet / packet of chips / data packet
【例句】I found a packet of sugar in my bag.
{{tts en_US:I found a packet of sugar in my bag.}}
【用法說明】packet 指小包裝，也可指資訊封包
【翻譯】我在包包裡找到一小包糖。

{{tts en_US:pad}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】墊子；便條本；護墊
【搭配詞】notepad / knee pad / pad of paper
【例句】He wrote it on a small pad.
{{tts en_US:He wrote it on a small pad.}}
【用法說明】pad 用法很多，常見是便條本或墊子
【翻譯】他把它寫在一本小便條本上。

{{tts en_US:paddle}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】槳；划槳
【搭配詞】canoe paddle / paddle the boat / paddle in the water
【例句】She used a paddle to move the canoe.
{{tts en_US:She used a paddle to move the canoe.}}
【用法說明】paddle 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她用槳划動獨木舟。

{{tts en_US:page}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】頁；頁面
【搭配詞】turn the page / web page / first page
【例句】Please turn to page ten.
{{tts en_US:Please turn to page ten.}}
【用法說明】page 指書頁或網頁
【翻譯】請翻到第十頁。

{{tts en_US:pain}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】痛；疼痛；痛苦
【搭配詞】back pain / in pain / cause pain
【例句】I have a pain in my shoulder.
{{tts en_US:I have a pain in my shoulder.}}
【用法說明】pain 指身體或心理上的痛
【翻譯】我的肩膀在痛。

{{tts en_US:painful}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】痛苦的；疼痛的
【搭配詞】painful memory / painful injury / very painful
【例句】That cut looks painful.
{{tts en_US:That cut looks painful.}}
【用法說明】painful 指讓人感到疼痛或難受
【翻譯】那道傷口看起來很痛。

{{tts en_US:paint}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】油漆；顏料；塗漆
【搭配詞】paint the wall / paint brush / wet paint
【例句】We're going to paint the bedroom blue.
{{tts en_US:We're going to paint the bedroom blue.}}
【用法說明】paint 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們要把臥室漆成藍色。

{{tts en_US:painter}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】畫家；油漆工
【搭配詞】house painter / famous painter / painter's brush
【例句】The painter finished the wall in one day.
{{tts en_US:The painter finished the wall in one day.}}
【用法說明】painter 可指藝術家或刷漆的人
【翻譯】那位油漆工一天就把牆刷好了。

{{tts en_US:painting}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】畫作；繪畫
【搭配詞】oil painting / painting class / famous painting
【例句】The painting hangs above the sofa.
{{tts en_US:The painting hangs above the sofa.}}
【用法說明】painting 指畫作或畫畫這件事
【翻譯】那幅畫掛在沙發上方。

{{tts en_US:pair}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】一對；一雙
【搭配詞】pair of shoes / a pair of glasses / in pairs
【例句】I bought a new pair of shoes.
{{tts en_US:I bought a new pair of shoes.}}
【用法說明】pair 最常和成雙成對的東西搭配
【翻譯】我買了一雙新鞋。

{{tts en_US:pajamas}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】睡衣
【搭配詞】wear pajamas / change into pajamas / clean pajamas
【例句】The kids were already in their pajamas.
{{tts en_US:The kids were already in their pajamas.}}
【用法說明】pajamas 通常用複數
【翻譯】孩子們已經換上睡衣了。

{{tts en_US:pal}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】朋友；哥們
【搭配詞】old pal / best pal / school pal
【例句】He's been my pal since high school.
{{tts en_US:He's been my pal since high school.}}
【用法說明】pal 是口語的『朋友』
【翻譯】他從高中起就是我的朋友。

{{tts en_US:palace}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】宮殿
【搭配詞】royal palace / ancient palace / visit a palace
【例句】We toured the old palace in the capital.
{{tts en_US:We toured the old palace in the capital.}}
【用法說明】palace 指王室住的宮殿
【翻譯】我們參觀了首都那座古老的宮殿。

{{tts en_US:pale}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】蒼白的；淡色的
【搭配詞】pale face / pale blue / look pale
【例句】You look a little pale.
{{tts en_US:You look a little pale.}}
【用法說明】pale 可指臉色蒼白，也可指顏色淡
【翻譯】你看起來有點蒼白。

{{tts en_US:palm}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】手掌；棕櫚樹
【搭配詞】palm tree / palm of your hand / sweaty palms
【例句】She held the coin in her palm.
{{tts en_US:She held the coin in her palm.}}
【用法說明】palm 可指手掌或棕櫚樹
【翻譯】她把硬幣握在手掌裡。

{{tts en_US:pan}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】平底鍋；盤狀器皿
【搭配詞】frying pan / pan of water / cooking pan
【例句】Heat the oil in a pan.
{{tts en_US:Heat the oil in a pan.}}
【用法說明】pan 指煎鍋或淺鍋
【翻譯】先在平底鍋裡把油加熱。

{{tts en_US:pancake}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】鬆餅；薄煎餅
【搭配詞】stack of pancakes / pancake syrup / blueberry pancake
【例句】We made pancakes for breakfast.
{{tts en_US:We made pancakes for breakfast.}}
【用法說明】pancake 指鬆餅或薄煎餅
【翻譯】我們早餐做了鬆餅。

{{tts en_US:panda}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】貓熊
【搭配詞】giant panda / baby panda / panda habitat
【例句】The panda was sleeping in the shade.
{{tts en_US:The panda was sleeping in the shade.}}
【用法說明】panda 指貓熊
【翻譯】那隻貓熊正在陰影下睡覺。

{{tts en_US:panel}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】面板；委員會；座談小組
【搭配詞】solar panel / control panel / panel discussion
【例句】She spoke on a panel about education.
{{tts en_US:She spoke on a panel about education.}}
【用法說明】panel 可指設備面板，也可指討論小組
【翻譯】她在一場教育座談會上發言。

{{tts en_US:panic}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】恐慌；驚慌
【搭配詞】in a panic / panic attack / cause panic
【例句】Don't panic—we still have time.
{{tts en_US:Don't panic—we still have time.}}
【用法說明】panic 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】別慌，我們還有時間。

{{tts en_US:pants}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】褲子
【搭配詞】wear pants / black pants / pair of pants
【例句】He changed into dry pants.
{{tts en_US:He changed into dry pants.}}
【用法說明】pants 通常用複數
【翻譯】他換上了乾的褲子。

{{tts en_US:papaya}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】木瓜
【搭配詞】ripe papaya / papaya juice / slice a papaya
【例句】The papaya was sweet and soft.
{{tts en_US:The papaya was sweet and soft.}}
【用法說明】papaya 指木瓜
【翻譯】那顆木瓜又甜又軟。

{{tts en_US:paper}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】紙；報紙；論文
【搭配詞】sheet of paper / paper bag / research paper
【例句】Write your name on the paper.
{{tts en_US:Write your name on the paper.}}
【用法說明】paper 用法很多，常見是紙張
【翻譯】把你的名字寫在紙上。

{{tts en_US:paperback}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】平裝書
【搭配詞】paperback novel / buy a paperback / paperback edition
【例句】I bought the paperback version.
{{tts en_US:I bought the paperback version.}}
【用法說明】paperback 指平裝本
【翻譯】我買了平裝版。

{{tts en_US:parachute}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】降落傘
【搭配詞】open a parachute / parachute jump / emergency parachute
【例句】The skydiver opened his parachute.
{{tts en_US:The skydiver opened his parachute.}}
【用法說明】parachute 指降落傘
【翻譯】那位跳傘者打開了降落傘。

{{tts en_US:parade}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】遊行；閱兵；隊伍行進
【搭配詞】street parade / parade float / watch a parade
【例句】We watched the parade downtown.
{{tts en_US:We watched the parade downtown.}}
【用法說明】parade 指節慶或正式隊伍遊行
【翻譯】我們在市中心看了遊行。

{{tts en_US:paradise}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】天堂；樂園
【搭配詞】tropical paradise / feel like paradise / island paradise
【例句】The beach felt like paradise.
{{tts en_US:The beach felt like paradise.}}
【用法說明】paradise 可比喻非常舒服美好的地方
【翻譯】那片海灘就像天堂一樣。

{{tts en_US:paradox}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】矛盾；悖論
【搭配詞】strange paradox / paradox of / a seeming paradox
【例句】It's a strange paradox that more choice can cause more stress.
{{tts en_US:It's a strange paradox that more choice can cause more stress.}}
【用法說明】paradox 指表面矛盾卻可能是真的情況
【翻譯】選擇越多反而壓力越大，這是個奇怪的悖論。

{{tts en_US:paragraph}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】段落
【搭配詞】first paragraph / write a paragraph / short paragraph
【例句】Start a new paragraph here.
{{tts en_US:Start a new paragraph here.}}
【用法說明】paragraph 指文章中的段落
【翻譯】這裡開始新的一段。

{{tts en_US:parallel}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】平行的；相似的；平行線
【搭配詞】parallel lines / run in parallel / parallel idea
【例句】The two roads run parallel.
{{tts en_US:The two roads run parallel.}}
【用法說明】parallel 可作形容詞、名詞或動詞
【翻譯】這兩條路是平行延伸的。

{{tts en_US:paralyze}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使癱瘓；使無法行動
【搭配詞】paralyze the body / paralyze traffic / be paralyzed by fear
【例句】Fear can paralyze decision-making.
{{tts en_US:Fear can paralyze decision-making.}}
【用法說明】paralyze 可指身體癱瘓，也可比喻讓人動不了
【翻譯】恐懼會讓人無法做決定。

{{tts en_US:parcel}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】包裹
【搭配詞】send a parcel / postal parcel / small parcel
【例句】A parcel arrived this afternoon.
{{tts en_US:A parcel arrived this afternoon.}}
【用法說明】parcel 指郵寄包裹
【翻譯】今天下午有一個包裹送到。

{{tts en_US:pardon}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】原諒；赦免；不好意思？
【搭配詞】beg your pardon / pardon someone / royal pardon
【例句】Pardon me, could you repeat that?
{{tts en_US:Pardon me, could you repeat that?}}
【用法說明】pardon 可用於禮貌請對方重說
【翻譯】不好意思，你可以再說一次嗎？

{{tts en_US:parent}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】父親或母親；家長
【搭配詞】single parent / parent meeting / proud parent
【例句】Every parent wants their child to be safe.
{{tts en_US:Every parent wants their child to be safe.}}
【用法說明】parent 指爸爸或媽媽其中一位
【翻譯】每位家長都希望孩子平安。

{{tts en_US:parents}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】父母
【搭配詞】my parents / both parents / meet the parents
【例句】My parents live in Tainan.
{{tts en_US:My parents live in Tainan.}}
【用法說明】parents 指父母雙方
【翻譯】我爸媽住在台南。

{{tts en_US:park}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】公園；停車；停放

{{tts en_US:parliament}}

{{tts en_US:parrot}}

{{tts en_US:The parrot repeated my name.}}

【翻譯】那隻鸚鵡重複了我的名字。

{{tts en_US:part}}

【翻譯】部分；角色；分開

【翻譯】這是我最喜歡的電影片段。

{{tts en_US:partial}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】部分的；偏袒的

{{tts en_US:participant}}

【翻譯】參加者

【翻譯】每位參加者都拿到了一個名牌。

{{tts en_US:participate}}

【翻譯】參加；參與

{{tts en_US:She decided to participate in the contest.}}

【翻譯】她決定參加那場比賽。

{{tts en_US:participation}}

【翻譯】參與；參加
【搭配詞】student participation / encourage participation / active participation
【例句】Class participation is part of the grade.
{{tts en_US:Class participation is part of the grade.}}
【用法說明】participation 指參與的程度或行為
【翻譯】課堂參與是成績的一部分。

{{tts en_US:particle}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】微粒；粒子

{{tts en_US:The air was full of tiny dust particles.}}

【翻譯】空氣中充滿細小灰塵微粒。

{{tts en_US:particular}}

【翻譯】我在找一本特定的書。

{{tts en_US:partly}}

【翻譯】那條路部分被擋住了。

{{tts en_US:partner}}

【搭配詞】business partner / dance partner / life partner

{{tts en_US:She started the company with her partner.}}

【翻譯】她和她的夥伴一起創立了那家公司。

{{tts en_US:partnership}}

【搭配詞】business partnership / long-term partnership / form a partnership
【例句】The two schools formed a partnership.
{{tts en_US:The two schools formed a partnership.}}
【用法說明】partnership 指雙方合作的關係
【翻譯】那兩所學校建立了合作關係。

{{tts en_US:party}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】派對；政黨；一方
【搭配詞】birthday party / political party / third party
【例句】We're having a party on Saturday.
{{tts en_US:We're having a party on Saturday.}}
【用法說明】party 最常指聚會派對
【翻譯】我們星期六要辦派對。

{{tts en_US:pass}}

【翻譯】通過；遞給；經過；及格
【搭配詞】pass the test / pass me the salt / time passes

{{tts en_US:I hope I pass the exam.}}
【用法說明】pass 用法很多，常見是通過或及格

{{tts en_US:passage}}

【翻譯】通道；段落；經過

{{tts en_US:passenger}}

【翻譯】乘客
【搭配詞】bus passenger / airline passenger / passenger seat

{{tts en_US:passion}}

【翻譯】熱情；激情

【用法說明】passion 指強烈熱愛

{{tts en_US:passionate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】熱情的；激昂的
【搭配詞】passionate about / passionate speech / passionate fan

{{tts en_US:He's passionate about teaching.}}

{{tts en_US:passive}}

【翻譯】被動的；消極的

{{tts en_US:passport}}

{{tts en_US:password}}

{{tts en_US:past}}

【翻譯】糊；醬；貼上

{{tts en_US:pathetic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】可憐的；很差勁的

【翻譯】耐心

{{tts en_US:It takes patience to teach children.}}

{{tts en_US:patient}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】病人；有耐心的
【搭配詞】hospital patient / be patient / patient care
【例句】Please be patient with yourself.
{{tts en_US:Please be patient with yourself.}}
【用法說明】patient 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】請對自己有耐心一點。

{{tts en_US:patriot}}

{{tts en_US:patriotic}}

【翻譯】愛國的

【例句】The holiday has a patriotic meaning.

{{tts en_US:patrol}}

{{tts en_US:patron}}

{{tts en_US:pattern}}

{{tts en_US:pause}}

【翻譯】暫停；停頓
【搭配詞】pause for a moment / take a pause / long pause

{{tts en_US:pave}}

{{tts en_US:pavement}}

{{tts en_US:pay}}

{{tts en_US:payment}}

【翻譯】付款；支付款項

【例句】The payment went through successfully.

{{tts en_US:pea}}

{{tts en_US:peaceful}}

{{tts en_US:peasant}}

【翻譯】農民；農夫
【搭配詞】poor peasant / peasant village / peasant life
【例句】The story follows the life of a peasant family.
{{tts en_US:The story follows the life of a peasant family.}}
【用法說明】peasant 指傳統社會中的農民
【翻譯】這個故事描述一個農民家庭的生活。

{{tts en_US:pebble}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】小石子
【搭配詞】small pebble / smooth pebble / pebble beach
【例句】A pebble got stuck in my shoe.
{{tts en_US:A pebble got stuck in my shoe.}}
【用法說明】pebble 指小圓石
【翻譯】一顆小石子跑進了我的鞋子裡。

{{tts en_US:peculiar}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】奇怪的；特有的
【搭配詞】peculiar smell / peculiar habit / peculiar to
【例句】There was a peculiar smell in the room.
{{tts en_US:There was a peculiar smell in the room.}}
【用法說明】peculiar 指有點奇怪，或某地特有
【翻譯】房間裡有一股奇怪的味道。

{{tts en_US:pedal}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】踏板；踩踏板
【搭配詞】bike pedal / press the pedal / foot pedal
【例句】He pushed down on the pedal.
{{tts en_US:He pushed down on the pedal.}}
【用法說明】pedal 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他踩下了踏板。

{{tts en_US:pedestrian}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】行人
【搭配詞】pedestrian crossing / pedestrian area / hit a pedestrian
【例句】Drivers should watch for pedestrians.
{{tts en_US:Drivers should watch for pedestrians.}}
【用法說明】pedestrian 指步行的人
【翻譯】駕駛應該注意行人。

{{tts en_US:peek}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】偷看；瞄一眼
【搭配詞】peek inside / take a peek / peek through
【例句】She peeked through the door.
{{tts en_US:She peeked through the door.}}
【用法說明】peek 指快速偷看一下
【翻譯】她從門縫偷看了一眼。

{{tts en_US:peel}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】削皮；皮
【搭配詞】peel an apple / banana peel / peel off
【例句】Can you peel these potatoes?
{{tts en_US:Can you peel these potatoes?}}
【用法說明】peel 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】你可以幫忙削這些馬鈴薯的皮嗎？

{{tts en_US:peep}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】偷看；吱吱叫；瞄一眼
【搭配詞】peep at / little peep / peep out
【例句】I heard chicks peeping in the nest.
{{tts en_US:I heard chicks peeping in the nest.}}
【用法說明】peep 可指小鳥吱吱叫，也可指偷看
【翻譯】我聽見巢裡的小雞在叫。

{{tts en_US:peer}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】同儕；仔細看
【搭配詞】peer pressure / peer at / school peer
【例句】She peered into the dark room.
{{tts en_US:She peered into the dark room.}}
【用法說明】peer 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她仔細朝那間黑暗的房間看去。

{{tts en_US:pen}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】筆；鋼筆；圍欄
【搭配詞】ballpoint pen / black pen / pen for pigs
【例句】Can I borrow your pen?
{{tts en_US:Can I borrow your pen?}}
【用法說明】pen 最常指筆
【翻譯】我可以借你的筆嗎？

{{tts en_US:penalty}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】懲罰；罰款；點球
【搭配詞】pay a penalty / legal penalty / penalty kick
【例句】There is a penalty for late payment.
{{tts en_US:There is a penalty for late payment.}}
【用法說明】penalty 指違規後的處罰
【翻譯】逾期付款會有罰則。

{{tts en_US:pencil}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】鉛筆
【搭配詞】sharpen a pencil / pencil case / colored pencil
【例句】Can I borrow a pencil?
{{tts en_US:Can I borrow a pencil?}}
【用法說明】pencil 指鉛筆
【翻譯】我可以借一支鉛筆嗎？

{{tts en_US:pending}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】待處理的；待定的
【搭配詞】pending issue / decision pending / pending approval
【例句】The final decision is still pending.
{{tts en_US:The final decision is still pending.}}
【用法說明】pending 指還沒完成、還在等待
【翻譯】最後決定仍在待定中。

{{tts en_US:penetrate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】穿透；滲入；看穿
【搭配詞】penetrate the wall / penetrate deeply / penetrate the market
【例句】Sunlight penetrated the curtains.
{{tts en_US:Sunlight penetrated the curtains.}}
【用法說明】penetrate 指穿過某層東西進去
【翻譯】陽光穿透了窗簾。

{{tts en_US:penguin}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】企鵝
【搭配詞】baby penguin / penguin colony / penguin at the zoo
【例句】The penguin waddled across the ice.
{{tts en_US:The penguin waddled across the ice.}}
【用法說明】penguin 指企鵝
【翻譯】那隻企鵝搖搖擺擺地走過冰面。

{{tts en_US:peninsula}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】半島
【搭配詞】Korean Peninsula / small peninsula / peninsula town
【例句】The town sits on a narrow peninsula.
{{tts en_US:The town sits on a narrow peninsula.}}
【用法說明】peninsula 指三面環水的陸地
【翻譯】那個小鎮位在一個狹長的半島上。

{{tts en_US:penny}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】便士；一分錢
【搭配詞】spend a penny / every penny / penny coin
【例句】I found a penny on the sidewalk.
{{tts en_US:I found a penny on the sidewalk.}}
【用法說明】penny 指很小面額的硬幣
【翻譯】我在人行道上撿到一枚便士。

{{tts en_US:pension}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】退休金；年金
【搭配詞】monthly pension / pension plan / receive a pension
【例句】He lives on a small pension.
{{tts en_US:He lives on a small pension.}}
【用法說明】pension 指退休後領取的定期金
【翻譯】他靠一筆不多的退休金生活。

{{tts en_US:people}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】人們；人民
【搭配詞】young people / many people / people around me
【例句】Many people use this app every day.
{{tts en_US:Many people use this app every day.}}
【用法說明】people 是超高頻名詞
【翻譯】很多人每天都用這個 app。

{{tts en_US:pepper}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】胡椒；甜椒；辣椒
【搭配詞】black pepper / green pepper / add pepper
【例句】Add some salt and pepper.
{{tts en_US:Add some salt and pepper.}}
【用法說明】pepper 用法很多，常見是胡椒調味料
【翻譯】加一點鹽和胡椒。

{{tts en_US:per}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】每；按照
【搭配詞】per day / miles per hour / price per person
【例句】The speed limit is 60 kilometers per hour.
{{tts en_US:The speed limit is 60 kilometers per hour.}}
【用法說明】per 指每、按照單位計算
【翻譯】速限是每小時六十公里。

{{tts en_US:perceive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】察覺；理解；看待
【搭配詞】perceive a change / perceive as / be perceived
【例句】Children often perceive things differently.
{{tts en_US:Children often perceive things differently.}}
【用法說明】perceive 指用感官或理解去察覺
【翻譯】孩子常常會用不同方式理解事情。

{{tts en_US:percent}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】百分之…
【搭配詞】ten percent / one hundred percent / percent off
【例句】Only 20 percent of the seats were filled.
{{tts en_US:Only 20 percent of the seats were filled.}}
【用法說明】percent 是百分比表達
【翻譯】只有百分之二十的座位坐了人。

{{tts en_US:percentage}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】百分比；比例
【搭配詞】high percentage / percentage of / small percentage
【例句】A large percentage of students agreed.
{{tts en_US:A large percentage of students agreed.}}
【用法說明】percentage 指某部分所占比例
【翻譯】很大一部分學生都同意。

{{tts en_US:perception}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】看法；知覺；印象
【搭配詞】public perception / change perception / perception of
【例句】The ad changed people's perception of the brand.
{{tts en_US:The ad changed people's perception of the brand.}}
【用法說明】perception 指人怎麼看待某事
【翻譯】那支廣告改變了大家對這個品牌的看法。

{{tts en_US:perch}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】棲木；停棲；高處
【搭配詞】bird perch / perch on / high perch
【例句】A bird perched on the fence.
{{tts en_US:A bird perched on the fence.}}
【用法說明】perch 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】一隻鳥停在柵欄上。

{{tts en_US:perfect}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】完美的；非常適合的
【搭配詞】perfect day / perfect score / perfect for
【例句】This weather is perfect for a walk.
{{tts en_US:This weather is perfect for a walk.}}
【用法說明】perfect 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】這種天氣很適合散步。

{{tts en_US:perfection}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】完美
【搭配詞】aim for perfection / near perfection / demand perfection
【例句】Nobody expects perfection.
{{tts en_US:Nobody expects perfection.}}
【用法說明】perfection 指毫無缺點的狀態
【翻譯】沒有人期待完美無缺。

{{tts en_US:perform}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】表演；執行；表現
【搭配詞】perform on stage / perform a task / perform well
【例句】She performed well in the interview.
{{tts en_US:She performed well in the interview.}}
【用法說明】perform 用法很多，常見是表現或執行
【翻譯】她在面試中表現很好。

{{tts en_US:performance}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】表現；演出
【搭配詞】good performance / live performance / improve performance
【例句】The team's performance improved a lot.
{{tts en_US:The team's performance improved a lot.}}
【用法說明】performance 可指工作表現或舞台演出
【翻譯】團隊的表現進步很多。

{{tts en_US:performer}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】表演者；演員
【搭配詞】street performer / talented performer / stage performer
【例句】The performers came on stage one by one.
{{tts en_US:The performers came on stage one by one.}}
【用法說明】performer 指在台上表演的人
【翻譯】表演者一個接一個走上舞台。

{{tts en_US:perfume}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】香水；香味
【搭配詞】wear perfume / bottle of perfume / perfume shop
【例句】She bought a new perfume.
{{tts en_US:She bought a new perfume.}}
【用法說明】perfume 指香水
【翻譯】她買了一瓶新的香水。

{{tts en_US:perhaps}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】也許；可能
【搭配詞】perhaps later / perhaps not / perhaps we should
【例句】Perhaps we should leave earlier.
{{tts en_US:Perhaps we should leave earlier.}}
【用法說明】perhaps 是較自然的『也許』
【翻譯】也許我們應該早點出發。

{{tts en_US:peril}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】危險；危機
【搭配詞】in peril / great peril / put at peril
【例句】The hikers were in serious peril.
{{tts en_US:The hikers were in serious peril.}}
【用法說明】peril 指嚴重危險
【翻譯】那些登山客處於嚴重危險中。

{{tts en_US:period}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】時期；一段時間；句點
【搭配詞】time period / long period / period at the end
【例句】It was a difficult period in my life.
{{tts en_US:It was a difficult period in my life.}}
【用法說明】period 用法很多，常見是時期
【翻譯】那是我人生中很艱難的一段時期。

{{tts en_US:perish}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】死亡；毀滅
【搭配詞】perish in / perish from cold / perish quickly
【例句】Many plants will perish without water.
{{tts en_US:Many plants will perish without water.}}
【用法說明】perish 指因惡劣條件而死去或消失
【翻譯】很多植物沒有水就會枯死。

{{tts en_US:permanent}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】永久的；長久的
【搭配詞】permanent job / permanent damage / permanent address
【例句】This is not a permanent solution.
{{tts en_US:This is not a permanent solution.}}
【用法說明】permanent 指長期不變
【翻譯】這不是永久的解決辦法。

{{tts en_US:permissible}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】被允許的；可接受的
【搭配詞】legally permissible / permissible limit / morally permissible
【例句】Is it permissible to park here?
{{tts en_US:Is it permissible to park here?}}
【用法說明】permissible 指規則上被允許
【翻譯】這裡可以停車嗎？

{{tts en_US:permission}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】允許；許可
【搭配詞】ask for permission / get permission / without permission
【例句】You need permission to enter.
{{tts en_US:You need permission to enter.}}
【用法說明】permission 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】你需要許可才能進入。

{{tts en_US:permit}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】允許；許可證
【搭配詞】permit someone to / parking permit / work permit
【例句】The teacher permitted us to leave early.
{{tts en_US:The teacher permitted us to leave early.}}
【用法說明】permit 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】老師允許我們提早離開。

{{tts en_US:persevere}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】堅持不懈
【搭配詞】persevere through / persevere with / continue to persevere
【例句】You have to persevere when things get hard.
{{tts en_US:You have to persevere when things get hard.}}
【用法說明】persevere 指困難時仍繼續堅持
【翻譯】事情變難時你還是得撐下去。

{{tts en_US:persist}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】持續；堅持
【搭配詞】persist in / pain persisted / continue to persist
【例句】The rain persisted all afternoon.
{{tts en_US:The rain persisted all afternoon.}}
【用法說明】persist 指某狀態持續不退
【翻譯】那場雨持續下了整個下午。

{{tts en_US:persistence}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】堅持；持續
【搭配詞】with persistence / show persistence / persistence pays off
【例句】Her persistence finally paid off.
{{tts en_US:Her persistence finally paid off.}}
【用法說明】persistence 指不放棄地持續努力
【翻譯】她的堅持最後終於有了回報。

{{tts en_US:persistent}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】持續的；執著的
【搭配詞】persistent pain / persistent problem / be persistent
【例句】He was persistent in asking questions.
{{tts en_US:He was persistent in asking questions.}}
【用法說明】persistent 可指持續存在，也可指很執著
【翻譯】他一直很執著地問問題。

{{tts en_US:person}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】人
【搭配詞】young person / in person / kind person
【例句】She's a very kind person.
{{tts en_US:She's a very kind person.}}
【用法說明】person 是高頻基本名詞
【翻譯】她是個很善良的人。

{{tts en_US:personal}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】個人的；私人的
【搭配詞】personal life / personal opinion / personal information
【例句】That's a very personal question.
{{tts en_US:That's a very personal question.}}
【用法說明】personal 指與個人直接相關
【翻譯】那是個很私人的問題。

{{tts en_US:personality}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】個性；人格；人物
【搭配詞】strong personality / personality test / TV personality
【例句】She has a warm personality.
{{tts en_US:She has a warm personality.}}
【用法說明】personality 指一個人的性格特質
【翻譯】她的個性很溫暖。

{{tts en_US:personnel}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】人員；員工
【搭配詞】military personnel / company personnel / trained personnel
【例句】Only authorized personnel may enter.
{{tts en_US:Only authorized personnel may enter.}}
【用法說明】personnel 指某單位的人員總稱
【翻譯】只有授權人員可以進入。

{{tts en_US:perspective}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】觀點；角度
【搭配詞】different perspective / fresh perspective / perspective on life
【例句】Travel gives you a new perspective.
{{tts en_US:Travel gives you a new perspective.}}
【用法說明】perspective 指看事情的角度
【翻譯】旅行會帶來新的視角。

{{tts en_US:persuade}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】說服
【搭配詞】persuade someone to / try to persuade / be persuaded
【例句】He persuaded me to join the club.
{{tts en_US:He persuaded me to join the club.}}
【用法說明】persuade someone to V 是常見用法
【翻譯】他說服我加入那個社團。

{{tts en_US:persuasion}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】說服；說服力
【搭配詞】gentle persuasion / power of persuasion / by persuasion
【例句】A little persuasion finally worked.
{{tts en_US:A little persuasion finally worked.}}
【用法說明】persuasion 指說服這件事或能力
【翻譯】稍微勸了一下，最後終於有效。

{{tts en_US:persuasive}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】有說服力的
【搭配詞】persuasive argument / persuasive speaker / very persuasive
【例句】Her argument was clear and persuasive.
{{tts en_US:Her argument was clear and persuasive.}}
【用法說明】persuasive 指很能說服人
【翻譯】她的論點清楚又有說服力。

{{tts en_US:pessimism}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】悲觀；悲觀看法
【搭配詞】sense of pessimism / deep pessimism / overcome pessimism
【例句】His constant pessimism affects the team.
{{tts en_US:His constant pessimism affects the team.}}
【用法說明】pessimism 指總往壞處想
【翻譯】他一直的悲觀情緒影響了整個團隊。

{{tts en_US:pessimistic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】悲觀的
【搭配詞】feel pessimistic / pessimistic about / sound pessimistic
【例句】I'm pessimistic about the weather tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:I'm pessimistic about the weather tomorrow.}}

【搭配詞】pit in the road / cherry pit / deep pit
【例句】Be careful not to step into the pit.
{{tts en_US:Be careful not to step into the pit.}}
【用法說明】pit 可指地上的坑，也可指水果核
【翻譯】小心別踩進那個坑裡。

{{tts en_US:pitch}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】投球；音高；推銷說詞
【搭配詞】baseball pitch / sales pitch / high pitch
【例句】He gave a short sales pitch.
{{tts en_US:He gave a short sales pitch.}}
【用法說明】pitch 用法很多，常見於推銷說詞
【翻譯】他做了一段簡短的推銷簡報。

{{tts en_US:pitcher}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】投手；水壺
【搭配詞】baseball pitcher / glass pitcher / fill the pitcher
【例句】The pitcher threw a fast ball.
{{tts en_US:The pitcher threw a fast ball.}}
【用法說明】pitcher 可指棒球投手，也可指大水壺
【翻譯】那位投手投出了一記快速球。

{{tts en_US:pity}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】可惜；同情；憐憫
【搭配詞】what a pity / feel pity for / out of pity
【例句】What a pity you can't come.
{{tts en_US:What a pity you can't come.}}
【用法說明】pity 常見於 what a pity
【翻譯】真可惜你不能來。

{{tts en_US:pizza}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】披薩
【搭配詞】slice of pizza / pizza delivery / cheese pizza
【例句】We ordered pizza for dinner.
{{tts en_US:We ordered pizza for dinner.}}
【用法說明】pizza 指披薩
【翻譯】我們晚餐叫了披薩。

{{tts en_US:place}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】地方；放置；位置
【搭配詞】take place / place it here / favorite place
【例句】This park is my favorite place to relax.
{{tts en_US:This park is my favorite place to relax.}}
【用法說明】place 用法很多，常見是地點或放置
【翻譯】這座公園是我最喜歡放鬆的地方。

{{tts en_US:placement}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】放置；安置；配置
【搭配詞】job placement / product placement / proper placement
【例句】The placement of the table looks awkward.
{{tts en_US:The placement of the table looks awkward.}}
【用法說明】placement 指東西被放的位置或安排
【翻譯】這張桌子的擺放位置看起來有點怪。

{{tts en_US:plague}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】瘟疫；困擾
【搭配詞】the plague / plague the city / be plagued by
【例句】The town was once hit by a plague.
{{tts en_US:The town was once hit by a plague.}}
【用法說明】plague 可指瘟疫，也可比喻持續困擾
【翻譯】那座小鎮曾遭瘟疫襲擊。

{{tts en_US:plain}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】平凡的；清楚的；平原
【搭配詞】plain shirt / plain truth / open plain
【例句】She wore a plain white shirt.
{{tts en_US:She wore a plain white shirt.}}
【用法說明】plain 可指簡單不花俏，也可指明白清楚
【翻譯】她穿著一件素白襯衫。

{{tts en_US:plan}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】計畫；打算
【搭配詞】make a plan / plan to / change the plan
【例句】We need a better plan.
{{tts en_US:We need a better plan.}}
【用法說明】plan 是高頻字，可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們需要一個更好的計畫。

{{tts en_US:planet}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】行星
【搭配詞】planet Earth / another planet / distant planet
【例句】Mars is often called the red planet.
{{tts en_US:Mars is often called the red planet.}}
【用法說明】planet 指行星
【翻譯】火星常被稱為紅色星球。

{{tts en_US:plant}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】植物；工廠；種植
【搭配詞】water the plant / power plant / plant a tree
【例句】I planted flowers in the garden.
{{tts en_US:I planted flowers in the garden.}}
【用法說明】plant 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我在花園裡種了花。

{{tts en_US:plantation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】種植園
【搭配詞】tea plantation / sugar plantation / coffee plantation
【例句】They visited a tea plantation in the mountains.
{{tts en_US:They visited a tea plantation in the mountains.}}
【用法說明】plantation 指大規模種植的農園
【翻譯】他們參觀了山上的茶園。

{{tts en_US:plastic}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】塑膠；塑膠的
【搭配詞】plastic bag / plastic bottle / made of plastic
【例句】Try to use fewer plastic bags.
{{tts en_US:Try to use fewer plastic bags.}}
【用法說明】plastic 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】盡量少用塑膠袋。

{{tts en_US:plate}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】盤子；板塊；牌照
【搭配詞】dinner plate / license plate / plate of noodles
【例句】She put the cake on a plate.
{{tts en_US:She put the cake on a plate.}}
【用法說明】plate 最常指盤子
【翻譯】她把蛋糕放在一個盤子上。

{{tts en_US:platform}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】月台；平台；講台
【搭配詞】train platform / online platform / social media platform
【例句】The train leaves from platform three.
{{tts en_US:The train leaves from platform three.}}
【用法說明】platform 可指車站月台或網路平台
【翻譯】火車從第三月台出發。

{{tts en_US:play}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】玩；演奏；戲劇
【搭配詞】play a game / play the guitar / school play
【例句】The kids were playing outside.
{{tts en_US:The kids were playing outside.}}
【用法說明】play 是高頻字，可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】孩子們正在外面玩。

{{tts en_US:player}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】玩家；選手；演奏者
【搭配詞】soccer player / team player / music player
【例句】She's the best player on the team.
{{tts en_US:She's the best player on the team.}}
【用法說明】player 可指運動員、玩家或裝置
【翻譯】她是隊上最好的選手。

{{tts en_US:playful}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】愛玩的；嬉鬧的
【搭配詞】playful dog / playful mood / playful smile
【例句】The puppy is very playful.
{{tts en_US:The puppy is very playful.}}
【用法說明】playful 指喜歡玩鬧、很活潑
【翻譯】那隻小狗很愛玩。

{{tts en_US:playground}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】操場；遊樂場
【搭配詞】school playground / on the playground / playground slide
【例句】The children ran onto the playground.
{{tts en_US:The children ran onto the playground.}}
【用法說明】playground 指孩子玩耍的地方
【翻譯】孩子們跑上了操場。

{{tts en_US:playwright}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】劇作家
【搭配詞】famous playwright / modern playwright / playwright's work
【例句】The play was written by a well-known playwright.
{{tts en_US:The play was written by a well-known playwright.}}
【用法說明】playwright 指寫戲劇的人
【翻譯】那齣戲是由一位知名劇作家寫的。

{{tts en_US:plea}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】懇求；請求
【搭配詞】urgent plea / make a plea / emotional plea
【例句】She made a plea for more time.
{{tts en_US:She made a plea for more time.}}
【用法說明】plea 指懇切請求
【翻譯】她懇求再多給一些時間。

{{tts en_US:plead}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】懇求；辯稱
【搭配詞】plead for / plead guilty / plead with someone
【例句】He pleaded with them to stay.
{{tts en_US:He pleaded with them to stay.}}
【用法說明】plead 指非常懇切地請求
【翻譯】他苦苦求他們留下來。

{{tts en_US:pleasant}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】愉快的；宜人的
【搭配詞】pleasant day / pleasant surprise / pleasant smell
【例句】It was a pleasant evening.
{{tts en_US:It was a pleasant evening.}}
【用法說明】pleasant 指讓人感到舒服愉快
【翻譯】那是一個很愉快的夜晚。

{{tts en_US:please}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】請；使高興
【搭配詞】please sit down / if you please / please someone
【例句】Please close the door.
{{tts en_US:Please close the door.}}
【用法說明】please 是高頻禮貌用語
【翻譯】請把門關上。

{{tts en_US:pleasure}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】快樂；榮幸
【搭配詞】with pleasure / great pleasure / my pleasure
【例句】It was a pleasure to meet you.
{{tts en_US:It was a pleasure to meet you.}}
【用法說明】pleasure 可指享受，也可用於禮貌表達
【翻譯】很高興認識你。

{{tts en_US:pledge}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】保證；誓言
【搭配詞】make a pledge / campaign pledge / pledge support
【例句】She made a pledge to help.
{{tts en_US:She made a pledge to help.}}
【用法說明】pledge 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她做出了承諾要幫忙。

{{tts en_US:plentiful}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】豐富的；充足的
【搭配詞】plentiful supply / plentiful food / plentiful rain
【例句】Fresh fruit is plentiful in summer.
{{tts en_US:Fresh fruit is plentiful in summer.}}
【用法說明】plentiful 指數量很多
【翻譯】夏天的新鮮水果很充足。

{{tts en_US:plenty}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】很多；充足
【搭配詞】plenty of / have plenty / more than plenty
【例句】We still have plenty of time.
{{tts en_US:We still have plenty of time.}}
【用法說明】plenty 常見於 plenty of
【翻譯】我們還有很多時間。

{{tts en_US:plot}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】情節；陰謀；小塊土地
【搭配詞】movie plot / plot against / small plot of land
【例句】The movie had a simple plot.
{{tts en_US:The movie had a simple plot.}}
【用法說明】plot 可指故事情節，也可指密謀
【翻譯】那部電影的情節很簡單。

{{tts en_US:plow}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】犁；耕地
【搭配詞】snowplow / plow the field / plow through work
【例句】The farmer plowed the field in spring.
{{tts en_US:The farmer plowed the field in spring.}}
【用法說明】plow 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那位農夫在春天耕了田。

{{tts en_US:plug}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】插頭；塞住；推銷
【搭配詞】power plug / pull the plug / plug in
【例句】Plug in your charger here.
{{tts en_US:Plug in your charger here.}}
【用法說明】plug 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】把你的充電器插在這裡。

{{tts en_US:plum}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】李子；深紫紅色
【搭配詞】ripe plum / plum tree / dark plum color
【例句】The plum was sweet and juicy.
{{tts en_US:The plum was sweet and juicy.}}
【用法說明】plum 指李子，也可指顏色
【翻譯】那顆李子又甜又多汁。

{{tts en_US:plumber}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】水電工；管道工
【搭配詞】call a plumber / local plumber / plumber's tools
【例句】We called a plumber to fix the sink.
{{tts en_US:We called a plumber to fix the sink.}}
【用法說明】plumber 指修水管的人
【翻譯】我們叫了水電工來修水槽。

{{tts en_US:plunge}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】跳入；驟降；使陷入
【搭配詞】plunge into / prices plunge / plunge the room into darkness
【例句】The kids plunged into the pool.
{{tts en_US:The kids plunged into the pool.}}
【用法說明】plunge 指快速衝進去或突然下跌
【翻譯】孩子們一股腦跳進泳池裡。

{{tts en_US:plural}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】複數的；複數
【搭配詞】plural form / singular and plural / make it plural
【例句】Children is the plural of child.
{{tts en_US:Children is the plural of child.}}
【用法說明】plural 是文法用語
【翻譯】children 是 child 的複數。

{{tts en_US:plus}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】加；加上；優點
【搭配詞】two plus two / plus tax / big plus
【例句】Breakfast is included, plus free coffee.
{{tts en_US:Breakfast is included, plus free coffee.}}
【用法說明】plus 可指加上，也可比喻額外優點
【翻譯】早餐有附，而且還有免費咖啡。

{{tts en_US:pneumonia}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】肺炎
【搭配詞】get pneumonia / bacterial pneumonia / recover from pneumonia
【例句】He was in the hospital with pneumonia.
{{tts en_US:He was in the hospital with pneumonia.}}
【用法說明】pneumonia 指肺炎
【翻譯】他因為肺炎住院。

{{tts en_US:pocket}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】口袋；小區域；把…放進口袋
【搭配詞】coat pocket / pocket money / pocket the change
【例句】I found my keys in my pocket.
{{tts en_US:I found my keys in my pocket.}}
【用法說明】pocket 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我在口袋裡找到鑰匙。

{{tts en_US:poem}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】詩
【搭配詞】write a poem / love poem / read a poem
【例句】She wrote a poem for the contest.
{{tts en_US:She wrote a poem for the contest.}}
【用法說明】poem 指詩
【翻譯】她為比賽寫了一首詩。

{{tts en_US:poet}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】詩人
【搭配詞】famous poet / modern poet / poet's work
【例句】The poet read his work aloud.
{{tts en_US:The poet read his work aloud.}}
【用法說明】poet 指寫詩的人
【翻譯】那位詩人朗讀了自己的作品。

{{tts en_US:poetic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】詩意的；像詩一樣的
【搭配詞】poetic language / poetic style / sound poetic
【例句】The ending felt poetic.
{{tts en_US:The ending felt poetic.}}
【用法說明】poetic 指帶有詩意或美感
【翻譯】那個結尾很有詩意。

{{tts en_US:poetry}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】詩；詩集；詩歌
【搭配詞】read poetry / poetry book / love poetry
【例句】She enjoys reading poetry.
{{tts en_US:She enjoys reading poetry.}}
【用法說明】poetry 指詩這種文類
【翻譯】她喜歡讀詩。

{{tts en_US:point}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】點；重點；指出；指向
【搭配詞】main point / point at / make a point
【例句】That's a very good point.
{{tts en_US:That's a very good point.}}
【用法說明】point 用法很多，常見是重點或觀點
【翻譯】那真的是一個很好的重點。

{{tts en_US:poison}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】毒；毒害
【搭配詞】rat poison / poisonous plant / poison someone
【例句】Keep the poison away from children.
{{tts en_US:Keep the poison away from children.}}
【用法說明】poison 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】把毒藥放在孩子碰不到的地方。

{{tts en_US:poisonous}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】有毒的
【搭配詞】poisonous snake / poisonous plant / highly poisonous
【例句】Some mushrooms are poisonous.
{{tts en_US:Some mushrooms are poisonous.}}
【用法說明】poisonous 指吃到或碰到可能有毒
【翻譯】有些蘑菇是有毒的。

{{tts en_US:poke}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】戳；碰；伸出
【搭配詞】poke someone / poke a hole / poke with a stick
【例句】He poked the fire with a stick.
{{tts en_US:He poked the fire with a stick.}}
【用法說明】poke 指用手指或棍子輕戳
【翻譯】他用棍子撥了撥火。

{{tts en_US:polar}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】極地的；正好相反的
【搭配詞】polar bear / polar region / polar opposite
【例句】Polar bears live in the Arctic.
{{tts en_US:Polar bears live in the Arctic.}}
【用法說明】polar 常見於極地相關
【翻譯】北極熊住在北極地區。

{{tts en_US:pole}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】柱子；桿子；極
【搭配詞】flag pole / north pole / fishing pole
【例句】They put up a new flag pole.
{{tts en_US:They put up a new flag pole.}}
【用法說明】pole 可指長桿，也可指地球兩極
【翻譯】他們立起了一根新的旗桿。

{{tts en_US:police}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】警察；警方
【搭配詞】call the police / police station / police officer
【例句】We called the police right away.
{{tts en_US:We called the police right away.}}
【用法說明】police 指整體警察或警方
【翻譯】我們立刻報了警。

{{tts en_US:policeman/cop}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】警察
【搭配詞】talk to a cop / local policeman / police uniform
【例句】A policeman helped the lost child.
{{tts en_US:A policeman helped the lost child.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 policeman 和 cop 放在一起；cop 較口語
【翻譯】一位警察幫助了那個迷路的孩子。

{{tts en_US:policy}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】政策；規定；保單
【搭配詞】school policy / company policy / insurance policy
【例句】The company changed its return policy.
{{tts en_US:The company changed its return policy.}}
【用法說明】policy 可指制度規定，也可指保險保單
【翻譯】那家公司改了退貨政策。

{{tts en_US:polish}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】擦亮；潤飾；波蘭的
【搭配詞】polish your shoes / nail polish / polish the draft
【例句】She polished the table until it shined.
{{tts en_US:She polished the table until it shined.}}
【用法說明】polish 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】她把桌子擦到發亮。

{{tts en_US:polite}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】有禮貌的
【搭配詞】be polite / polite reply / polite way
【例句】It's polite to say thank you.
{{tts en_US:It's polite to say thank you.}}

{{tts en_US:politics}}

{{tts en_US:poll}}

{{tts en_US:pollute}}

{{tts en_US:pond}}

{{tts en_US:ponder}}

【搭配詞】ponder a question / ponder over / sit and ponder

{{tts en_US:pony}}

{{tts en_US:pool}}

{{tts en_US:poor}}

{{tts en_US:popcorn}}

{{tts en_US:popular}}

{{tts en_US:popularity}}

{{tts en_US:population}}

{{tts en_US:porcelain}}

{{tts en_US:porch}}

{{tts en_US:portfolio}}

{{tts en_US:portrait}}

{{tts en_US:post}}

{{tts en_US:pot}}

{{tts en_US:potato}}
