{{tts en_US:rack}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】架子；擱架
【搭配詞】coat rack / dish rack / bike rack
【例句】She hung her coat on the rack.
{{tts en_US:She hung her coat on the rack.}}
【用法說明】rack 指用來放東西的架子
【翻譯】她把外套掛在架子上。

{{tts en_US:radar}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】雷達
【搭配詞】weather radar / radar screen / under the radar
【例句】The storm showed up on radar.
{{tts en_US:The storm showed up on radar.}}
【用法說明】radar 指雷達系統
【翻譯】那場暴風雨出現在雷達畫面上。

{{tts en_US:radiant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】容光煥發的；發光的
【搭配詞】radiant smile / radiant skin / radiant light
【例句】She looked radiant in the wedding dress.
{{tts en_US:She looked radiant in the wedding dress.}}
【用法說明】radiant 指發亮或氣色非常好
【翻譯】她穿著婚紗看起來容光煥發。

{{tts en_US:radiate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】發出；散發
【搭配詞】radiate heat / radiate confidence / radiate light
【例句】The lamp radiated a soft glow.
{{tts en_US:The lamp radiated a soft glow.}}
【用法說明】radiate 指向外散發
【翻譯】那盞燈散發出柔和的光。

{{tts en_US:radiation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】輻射
【搭配詞】radiation treatment / harmful radiation / solar radiation
【例句】Too much radiation can be dangerous.
{{tts en_US:Too much radiation can be dangerous.}}
【用法說明】radiation 指能量以輻射方式傳遞
【翻譯】過多輻射可能很危險。

{{tts en_US:radical}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】激進的；根本的
【搭配詞】radical change / radical idea / political radical
【例句】The company made radical changes.
{{tts en_US:The company made radical changes.}}
【用法說明】radical 指很大、很根本的改變
【翻譯】那家公司做出了大刀闊斧的改變。

{{tts en_US:radio}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】收音機；廣播
【搭配詞】listen to the radio / radio show / car radio
【例句】My grandpa listens to the radio every morning.
{{tts en_US:My grandpa listens to the radio every morning.}}
【用法說明】radio 指收音機或廣播節目
【翻譯】我爺爺每天早上都聽廣播。

{{tts en_US:radioactive}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】放射性的
【搭配詞】radioactive material / radioactive waste / highly radioactive
【例句】The warning sign says the area is radioactive.
{{tts en_US:The warning sign says the area is radioactive.}}
【用法說明】radioactive 指具有放射性
【翻譯】警告牌寫著這個區域有放射性。

{{tts en_US:radish}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】蘿蔔；小紅蘿蔔
【搭配詞】slice a radish / white radish / red radish
【例句】She added radish to the salad.
{{tts en_US:She added radish to the salad.}}
【用法說明】radish 指蘿蔔類蔬菜
【翻譯】她在沙拉裡加了蘿蔔。

{{tts en_US:radius}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】半徑
【搭配詞】radius of a circle / five-mile radius / within a radius
【例句】Find the radius of the circle.
{{tts en_US:Find the radius of the circle.}}
【用法說明】radius 是數學中的半徑
【翻譯】求出這個圓的半徑。

{{tts en_US:rag}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】破布；碎布
【搭配詞】cleaning rag / old rag / wipe with a rag
【例句】He used a rag to clean the table.
{{tts en_US:He used a rag to clean the table.}}
【用法說明】rag 指舊布或抹布
【翻譯】他用抹布擦桌子。

{{tts en_US:rage}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】憤怒；狂怒
【搭配詞】in a rage / feel rage / road rage
【例句】She was shaking with rage.
{{tts en_US:She was shaking with rage.}}
【用法說明】rage 指非常強烈的怒氣
【翻譯】她氣得渾身發抖。

{{tts en_US:ragged}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】破舊的；參差不齊的
【搭配詞】ragged clothes / ragged edge / look ragged
【例句】The child wore ragged clothes.
{{tts en_US:The child wore ragged clothes.}}
【用法說明】ragged 指破破爛爛或邊緣不整齊
【翻譯】那個孩子穿著破舊的衣服。

{{tts en_US:raid}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】突襲；搜查
【搭配詞】police raid / raid a house / surprise raid
【例句】The police carried out a raid at dawn.
{{tts en_US:The police carried out a raid at dawn.}}
【用法說明】raid 指突然搜查或襲擊
【翻譯】警方在黎明時進行突襲搜查。

{{tts en_US:rail}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】欄杆；鐵軌
【搭配詞】hand rail / rail line / lean on the rail
【例句】Hold the rail when using the stairs.
{{tts en_US:Hold the rail when using the stairs.}}
【用法說明】rail 可指扶手欄杆或鐵軌
【翻譯】走樓梯時要扶著欄杆。

{{tts en_US:railroad/railway}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】鐵路
【搭配詞】railway station / railroad track / travel by railway
【例句】The town grew around the railway.
{{tts en_US:The town grew around the railway.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 railroad 和 railway 放在一起
【翻譯】那座小鎮是沿著鐵路發展起來的。

{{tts en_US:rain}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】雨；下雨
【搭配詞】heavy rain / rain all day / raincoat in the rain
【例句】It's starting to rain.
{{tts en_US:It's starting to rain.}}
【用法說明】rain 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】開始下雨了。

{{tts en_US:rainbow}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】彩虹
【搭配詞】see a rainbow / rainbow colors / double rainbow
【例句】A rainbow appeared after the storm.
{{tts en_US:A rainbow appeared after the storm.}}
【用法說明】rainbow 指彩虹
【翻譯】暴風雨後出現了一道彩虹。

{{tts en_US:raincoat}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】雨衣
【搭配詞】yellow raincoat / wear a raincoat / put on your raincoat
【例句】Don't forget your raincoat.
{{tts en_US:Don't forget your raincoat.}}
【用法說明】raincoat 指雨衣
【翻譯】別忘了帶雨衣。

{{tts en_US:rainfall}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】降雨量
【搭配詞】annual rainfall / heavy rainfall / low rainfall
【例句】This region gets a lot of rainfall.
{{tts en_US:This region gets a lot of rainfall.}}
【用法說明】rainfall 指一段時間內的雨量
【翻譯】這個地區降雨量很多。

{{tts en_US:rainy}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】下雨的；多雨的
【搭配詞】rainy day / rainy season / rainy afternoon
【例句】It's a cold rainy day.
{{tts en_US:It's a cold rainy day.}}
【用法說明】rainy 指有雨或雨很多
【翻譯】今天是又冷又下雨的一天。

{{tts en_US:raise}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】舉起；提高；養育
【搭配詞】raise your hand / raise money / raise a child
【例句】Please raise your hand if you know the answer.
{{tts en_US:Please raise your hand if you know the answer.}}
【用法說明】raise 用法很多，常見是舉起或提高
【翻譯】如果你知道答案，請舉手。

{{tts en_US:raisin}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】葡萄乾
【搭配詞】box of raisins / raisin bread / add raisins
【例句】She put raisins in the cookies.
{{tts en_US:She put raisins in the cookies.}}
【用法說明】raisin 指葡萄乾
【翻譯】她在餅乾裡加了葡萄乾。

{{tts en_US:rally}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】集會； rally；重新振作
【搭配詞】political rally / rally support / rally after losing
【例句】Thousands of people joined the rally.
{{tts en_US:Thousands of people joined the rally.}}
【用法說明】rally 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】成千上萬的人參加了那場集會。

{{tts en_US:ranch}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】大牧場
【搭配詞】cattle ranch / ranch house / own a ranch
【例句】They own a ranch in Texas.
{{tts en_US:They own a ranch in Texas.}}
【用法說明】ranch 指大型牧場
【翻譯】他們在德州有一座牧場。

{{tts en_US:random}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】隨機的；隨便的
【搭配詞】random choice / random question / at random
【例句】The teacher picked a random student.
{{tts en_US:The teacher picked a random student.}}
【用法說明】random 指沒有特定規則
【翻譯】老師隨機挑了一位學生。

{{tts en_US:range}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】範圍；一系列；射程
【搭配詞】price range / mountain range / wide range
【例句】The store sells a wide range of products.
{{tts en_US:The store sells a wide range of products.}}
【用法說明】range 用法很多，常見是範圍或種類
【翻譯】那家店賣各式各樣的產品。

{{tts en_US:rank}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】排名；軍階；列入等級
【搭配詞】top rank / military rank / rank first
【例句】She ranked first in the class.
{{tts en_US:She ranked first in the class.}}
【用法說明】rank 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她在班上排名第一。

{{tts en_US:rap}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】饒舌；輕敲；快速談話
【搭配詞】rap music / rap on the door / quick rap
【例句】He listens to rap music every day.
{{tts en_US:He listens to rap music every day.}}
【用法說明】rap 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他每天都聽饒舌音樂。

{{tts en_US:rapid}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】快速的
【搭配詞】rapid growth / rapid change / rapid response
【例句】The city saw rapid growth.
{{tts en_US:The city saw rapid growth.}}
【用法說明】rapid 指速度很快
【翻譯】那座城市經歷了快速成長。

{{tts en_US:rare}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】稀有的；罕見的
【搭配詞】rare animal / rare chance / very rare
【例句】It's rare to see snow here.
{{tts en_US:It's rare to see snow here.}}
【用法說明】rare 指不常見
【翻譯】在這裡看到下雪很罕見。

{{tts en_US:rash}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】疹子；草率的
【搭配詞】skin rash / rash decision / get a rash
【例句】The baby developed a rash.
{{tts en_US:The baby developed a rash.}}
【用法說明】rash 可指皮膚疹，也可指草率
【翻譯】那個寶寶起了疹子。

{{tts en_US:rat}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】老鼠
【搭配詞】big rat / rat trap / smell a rat
【例句】A rat ran across the alley.
{{tts en_US:A rat ran across the alley.}}
【用法說明】rat 指老鼠
【翻譯】一隻老鼠跑過巷子。

{{tts en_US:rate}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】比率；評價；速度
【搭配詞】interest rate / high rate / rate the movie
【例句】The birth rate has fallen.
{{tts en_US:The birth rate has fallen.}}
【用法說明】rate 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】出生率下降了。

{{tts en_US:rather}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】相當；寧可；而不是
【搭配詞】rather good / would rather / rather than
【例句】I'd rather stay home tonight.
{{tts en_US:I'd rather stay home tonight.}}
【用法說明】rather 常見於 would rather 與程度副詞
【翻譯】我今晚寧可待在家。

{{tts en_US:ratify}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】批准；正式認可
【搭配詞】ratify an agreement / ratify the treaty / be ratified
【例句】The committee voted to ratify the proposal.
{{tts en_US:The committee voted to ratify the proposal.}}
【用法說明】ratify 指正式通過或認可
【翻譯】委員會投票批准了那項提案。

{{tts en_US:ratio}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】比率；比例
【搭配詞】ratio of / student-teacher ratio / in the ratio
【例句】The ratio of sugar to water is two to one.
{{tts en_US:The ratio of sugar to water is two to one.}}
【用法說明】ratio 指兩者之間的比例關係
【翻譯】糖和水的比例是二比一。

{{tts en_US:rational}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】理性的；合理的
【搭配詞】rational choice / rational explanation / stay rational
【例句】Try to stay rational during the discussion.
{{tts en_US:Try to stay rational during the discussion.}}
【用法說明】rational 指冷靜、有理據
【翻譯】討論時盡量保持理性。

{{tts en_US:rattle}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】發出喀啦聲；使驚慌；撥浪鼓
【搭配詞】windows rattle / rattle someone / baby rattle
【例句】The old windows rattled in the wind.
{{tts en_US:The old windows rattled in the wind.}}
【用法說明】rattle 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】老窗戶在風中喀啦作響。

{{tts en_US:raw}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】生的；未加工的；原始的
【搭配詞】raw fish / raw material / raw emotion
【例句】This meat is still raw.
{{tts en_US:This meat is still raw.}}
【用法說明】raw 指未煮熟或未處理
【翻譯】這塊肉還是生的。

{{tts en_US:ray}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】光線；射線
【搭配詞】sun ray / ray of hope / X-ray
【例句】A ray of sunlight came through the window.
{{tts en_US:A ray of sunlight came through the window.}}
【用法說明】ray 指一道光或射線
【翻譯】一束陽光穿過了窗戶。

{{tts en_US:razor}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】刮鬍刀；剃刀
【搭配詞】electric razor / razor blade / use a razor
【例句】He bought a new razor.
{{tts en_US:He bought a new razor.}}
【用法說明】razor 指刮鬍或剃毛用刀具
【翻譯】他買了一把新的刮鬍刀。

{{tts en_US:reach}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】到達；伸手到；達成
【搭配詞】reach the top / reach for / reach an agreement
【例句】We reached the station on time.
{{tts en_US:We reached the station on time.}}
【用法說明】reach 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】我們準時到達車站。

{{tts en_US:react}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】反應；作出回應
【搭配詞】react quickly / react to / react badly
【例句】How did she react to the news?
{{tts en_US:How did she react to the news?}}
【用法說明】react 指對事情做出反應
【翻譯】她對那個消息有什麼反應？

{{tts en_US:reaction}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】反應
【搭配詞】strong reaction / emotional reaction / chemical reaction
【例句】His reaction surprised everyone.
{{tts en_US:His reaction surprised everyone.}}
【用法說明】reaction 指回應、情緒反應或化學反應
【翻譯】他的反應讓大家都很驚訝。

{{tts en_US:read}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】閱讀；讀懂
【搭配詞】read a book / read aloud / read the sign
【例句】I read before bed every night.
{{tts en_US:I read before bed every night.}}
【用法說明】read 是超高頻動詞
【翻譯】我每天晚上睡前都會看書。

{{tts en_US:ready}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】準備好的
【搭配詞】get ready / be ready to / dinner is ready
【例句】I'm ready to go.
{{tts en_US:I'm ready to go.}}
【用法說明】ready 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】我準備好了。

{{tts en_US:real}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】真的；真正的
【搭配詞】real problem / for real / real life
【例句】Is this for real?
{{tts en_US:Is this for real?}}
【用法說明】real 可指真實存在或不是假的
【翻譯】這是真的嗎？

{{tts en_US:realism}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】現實主義；寫實
【搭配詞】political realism / realism in art / sense of realism
【例句】The painting is known for its realism.
{{tts en_US:The painting is known for its realism.}}
【用法說明】realism 指強調真實呈現
【翻譯】那幅畫以寫實風格聞名。

{{tts en_US:realistic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】實際的；現實的；逼真的
【搭配詞】realistic goal / realistic expectation / realistic drawing
【例句】Let's set a realistic goal.
{{tts en_US:Let's set a realistic goal.}}
【用法說明】realistic 常指可行、不誇張
【翻譯】我們來訂一個實際的目標吧。

{{tts en_US:reality}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】現實；真相
【搭配詞】face reality / in reality / reality show
【例句】In reality, it's harder than it looks.
{{tts en_US:In reality, it's harder than it looks.}}
【用法說明】reality 指真實情況
【翻譯】實際上，這比看起來更難。

{{tts en_US:realization}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】體認；領悟；實現
【搭配詞】sudden realization / realization of a dream / full realization
【例句】It came as a shock to me
{{tts en_US:It came as a shock to me}}
【用法說明】realization 指突然明白某件事
【翻譯】我突然意識到這件事時很震驚。

{{tts en_US:realize}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】意識到；實現
【搭配詞】realize that / realize a dream / suddenly realize
【例句】I didn't realize you were here.
{{tts en_US:I didn't realize you were here.}}
【用法說明】realize 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】我沒注意到你在這裡。

{{tts en_US:really}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】真的；非常
【搭配詞】really like / really important / not really
【例句】I really enjoyed the movie.
{{tts en_US:I really enjoyed the movie.}}
【用法說明】really 是高頻副詞
【翻譯】我真的很喜歡那部電影。

{{tts en_US:realm}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】領域；範圍；王國
【搭配詞】realm of science / magical realm / within the realm of
【例句】This topic belongs to the realm of history.
{{tts en_US:This topic belongs to the realm of history.}}
【用法說明】realm 常指抽象領域或幻想世界
【翻譯】這個主題屬於歷史領域。

{{tts en_US:reap}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】收割；獲得
【搭配詞】reap the benefits / reap a harvest / reap rewards
【例句】You'll reap the benefits of your hard work.
{{tts en_US:You'll reap the benefits of your hard work.}}
【用法說明】reap 常見於 reap the benefits
【翻譯】你會得到努力後的成果。

{{tts en_US:rear}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】後方；養育；豎起
【搭配詞】rear end / rear view / rear a child
【例句】There's a garden at the rear of the house.
{{tts en_US:There's a garden at the rear of the house.}}
【用法說明】rear 可作名詞、形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】房子後面有一個花園。

{{tts en_US:reason}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】原因；理由；理智
【搭配詞】for a reason / good reason / reason why
【例句】There's a reason for everything.
{{tts en_US:There's a reason for everything.}}
【用法說明】reason 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】每件事都有它的原因。

{{tts en_US:reasonable}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】合理的；通情達理的
【搭配詞】reasonable price / reasonable request / be reasonable
【例句】That sounds reasonable to me.
{{tts en_US:That sounds reasonable to me.}}
【用法說明】reasonable 指講理、價格合理或要求不過分
【翻譯】那聽起來很合理。

{{tts en_US:reassure}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】使安心；安慰
【搭配詞】reassure someone / reassure yourself / reassure that
【例句】The doctor reassured her that everything was fine.
{{tts en_US:The doctor reassured her that everything was fine.}}
【用法說明】reassure 指讓人放下擔心
【翻譯】醫生安慰她一切都沒事。

{{tts en_US:rebel}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】反叛者；反抗
【搭配詞】young rebel / rebel against / political rebel
【例句】He rebelled against strict rules.
{{tts en_US:He rebelled against strict rules.}}
【用法說明】rebel 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他反抗那些嚴格規定。

{{tts en_US:rebellion}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】叛亂；反抗
【搭配詞】lead a rebellion / teenage rebellion / armed rebellion
【例句】The book tells the story of a rebellion.
{{tts en_US:The book tells the story of a rebellion.}}
【用法說明】rebellion 指集體反抗或叛亂
【翻譯】那本書講的是一場叛亂的故事。

{{tts en_US:recall}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】回想起；召回；記得
【搭配詞】recall a memory / product recall / vaguely recall
【例句】I don't recall saying that.
{{tts en_US:I don't recall saying that.}}
【用法說明】recall 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我不記得我有說過那句話。

{{tts en_US:receipt}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】收據
【搭配詞】keep the receipt / ask for a receipt / sales receipt
【例句】Do you need a receipt?
{{tts en_US:Do you need a receipt?}}
【用法說明】receipt 指購物憑證
【翻譯】你需要收據嗎？

{{tts en_US:receive}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】收到；接到
【搭配詞】receive a gift / receive an email / receive treatment
【例句】I received your message this morning.
{{tts en_US:I received your message this morning.}}
【用法說明】receive 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】我今天早上收到你的訊息。

{{tts en_US:receiver}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】接收器；接球員；收件人
【搭配詞】radio receiver / wide receiver / message receiver
【例句】The receiver caught the ball cleanly.
{{tts en_US:The receiver caught the ball cleanly.}}
【用法說明】receiver 用法很多，依情境而定
【翻譯】那位接球員穩穩接住了球。

{{tts en_US:recent}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】最近的；近來的
【搭配詞】recent news / recent years / recent changes
【例句】Have you seen any recent photos of her?
{{tts en_US:Have you seen any recent photos of her?}}
【用法說明】recent 指時間上不久前的
【翻譯】你最近有看到她的新照片嗎？

{{tts en_US:reception}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】接待； reception desk；訊號接收
【搭配詞】wedding reception / front reception / good reception
【例句】Please check in at reception.
{{tts en_US:Please check in at reception.}}
【用法說明】reception 用法很多，常見是接待櫃檯
【翻譯】請先到櫃檯報到。

{{tts en_US:recession}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】經濟衰退
【搭配詞】economic recession / deep recession / avoid a recession
【例句】The country entered a recession last year.
{{tts en_US:The country entered a recession last year.}}
【用法說明】recession 指經濟活動下滑
【翻譯】那個國家去年進入經濟衰退。

{{tts en_US:recipe}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】食譜；方法
【搭配詞】follow a recipe / easy recipe / family recipe
【例句】This recipe is simple and delicious.
{{tts en_US:This recipe is simple and delicious.}}
【用法說明】recipe 指做菜步驟，也可比喻方法
【翻譯】這份食譜簡單又好吃。

{{tts en_US:recipient}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】收件人；接受者
【搭配詞】award recipient / email recipient / recipient of the prize
【例句】Please check the recipient before sending the email.
{{tts en_US:Please check the recipient before sending the email.}}
【用法說明】recipient 指收到某物的人
【翻譯】寄出郵件前請確認收件人。

{{tts en_US:recite}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】背誦；朗誦
【搭配詞】recite a poem / recite from memory / recite aloud
【例句】She recited the poem from memory.
{{tts en_US:She recited the poem from memory.}}
【用法說明】recite 指背出來或朗誦
【翻譯】她把那首詩背誦出來了。

{{tts en_US:reckless}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】魯莽的；不顧後果的
【搭配詞】reckless driving / reckless behavior / seem reckless
【例句】That was a reckless decision.
{{tts en_US:That was a reckless decision.}}
【用法說明】reckless 指做事不夠小心
【翻譯】那是個很魯莽的決定。

{{tts en_US:reckon}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】認為；估計
【搭配詞】reckon that / reckon with / I reckon
【例句】I reckon we'll get there by noon.
{{tts en_US:I reckon we'll get there by noon.}}
【用法說明】reckon 是較口語的『我想、我估計』
【翻譯】我想我們中午前會到。

{{tts en_US:recognition}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】承認；認可；辨識
【搭配詞】face recognition / public recognition / gain recognition
【例句】Her hard work finally got recognition.
{{tts en_US:Her hard work finally got recognition.}}
【用法說明】recognition 指被看見、被肯定
【翻譯】她的努力終於獲得認可。

{{tts en_US:recognize}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】認出；承認；辨識
【搭配詞】recognize a face / recognize the problem / easily recognize
【例句】I almost didn't recognize you.
{{tts en_US:I almost didn't recognize you.}}
【用法說明】recognize 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】我差點認不出你。

{{tts en_US:recommend}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】推薦；建議
【搭配詞】recommend a book / highly recommend / recommend that
【例句】Can you recommend a good restaurant?
{{tts en_US:Can you recommend a good restaurant?}}
【用法說明】recommend 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】你可以推薦一家不錯的餐廳嗎？

{{tts en_US:recommendation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】推薦；建議
【搭配詞】make a recommendation / letter of recommendation / strong recommendation
【例句】Thanks for the recommendation.
{{tts en_US:Thanks for the recommendation.}}
【用法說明】recommendation 指建議或推薦內容
【翻譯】謝謝你的推薦。

{{tts en_US:reconcile}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】和解；調和；核對
【搭配詞】reconcile with / reconcile differences / reconcile the accounts
【例句】They finally reconciled after years of conflict.
{{tts en_US:They finally reconciled after years of conflict.}}
【用法說明】reconcile 指讓衝突雙方恢復和好
【翻譯】他們多年衝突後終於和解了。

{{tts en_US:record}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】紀錄；錄音；創紀錄
【搭配詞】set a record / keep a record / record a video
【例句】She recorded the lecture on her phone.
{{tts en_US:She recorded the lecture on her phone.}}
【用法說明】record 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她用手機錄下了那堂課。

{{tts en_US:recorder}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】錄音機；直笛；記錄器
【搭配詞】voice recorder / play the recorder / flight recorder
【例句】The child is learning the recorder at school.
{{tts en_US:The child is learning the recorder at school.}}
【用法說明】recorder 可指樂器或錄音裝置
【翻譯】那個孩子在學校學直笛。

{{tts en_US:recover}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】恢復；找回
【搭配詞】recover from / recover lost files / fully recover
【例句】He recovered quickly from the flu.
{{tts en_US:He recovered quickly from the flu.}}
【用法說明】recover 指恢復健康或找回失去的東西
【翻譯】他很快就從流感中恢復了。

{{tts en_US:recovery}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】恢復；復原
【搭配詞】economic recovery / recovery room / slow recovery
【例句】Her recovery took several weeks.
{{tts en_US:Her recovery took several weeks.}}
【用法說明】recovery 指回到正常狀態
【翻譯】她的復原花了好幾週。

{{tts en_US:recreation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】娛樂；休閒活動
【搭配詞】outdoor recreation / recreation center / for recreation
【例句】The park is used for recreation.
{{tts en_US:The park is used for recreation.}}
【用法說明】recreation 指休閒娛樂活動
【翻譯】那座公園是拿來休閒娛樂的。

{{tts en_US:recreational}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】娛樂的；休閒的
【搭配詞】recreational activity / recreational area / recreational use
【例句】The park offers many recreational activities.
{{tts en_US:The park offers many recreational activities.}}
【用法說明】recreational 指和休閒娛樂有關
【翻譯】那座公園提供很多休閒活動。

{{tts en_US:recruit}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】招募；新進成員
【搭配詞】recruit new staff / army recruit / recruit volunteers
【例句】The company plans to recruit more workers.
{{tts en_US:The company plans to recruit more workers.}}
【用法說明】recruit 可作動詞或名詞
【翻譯】那家公司計畫招募更多員工。

{{tts en_US:rectangle}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】長方形
【搭配詞】draw a rectangle / rectangle shape / large rectangle
【例句】The table is shaped like a rectangle.
{{tts en_US:The table is shaped like a rectangle.}}
【用法說明】rectangle 指長方形
【翻譯】那張桌子是長方形的。

{{tts en_US:recycle}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】回收；再利用
【搭配詞】recycle paper / recycle bottles / recycling bin
【例句】We recycle plastic and paper at home.
{{tts en_US:We recycle plastic and paper at home.}}
【用法說明】recycle 指資源回收再利用
【翻譯】我們在家會回收塑膠和紙類。

{{tts en_US:red}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】紅色的；紅色
【搭配詞】red shirt / bright red / paint it red
【例句】She wore a red jacket.
{{tts en_US:She wore a red jacket.}}
【用法說明】red 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】她穿著一件紅色外套。

{{tts en_US:reduce}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】減少；降低
【搭配詞】reduce costs / reduce stress / reduce the risk
【例句】We need to reduce waste.
{{tts en_US:We need to reduce waste.}}
【用法說明】reduce 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】我們需要減少浪費。

{{tts en_US:reduction}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】減少；降低
【搭配詞】price reduction / reduction in / carbon reduction
【例句】There has been a reduction in traffic.
{{tts en_US:There has been a reduction in traffic.}}
【用法說明】reduction 指數量或程度下降
【翻譯】交通量已經減少了。

{{tts en_US:redundancy}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】多餘；裁員
【搭配詞】job redundancy / avoid redundancy / system redundancy
【例句】The company announced several redundancies.
{{tts en_US:The company announced several redundancies.}}
【用法說明】redundancy 可指重複多餘，也可指裁員
【翻譯】那家公司宣布了幾項裁員。

{{tts en_US:reef}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】礁；暗礁
【搭配詞】coral reef / reef fish / barrier reef
【例句】We saw colorful fish near the reef.
{{tts en_US:We saw colorful fish near the reef.}}
【用法說明】reef 指海中的礁石或珊瑚礁
【翻譯】我們在礁附近看到了彩色魚群。

{{tts en_US:refer}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】提到；參考；轉介
【搭配詞】refer to / refer someone to / refer back to
【例句】Please refer to page ten.
{{tts en_US:Please refer to page ten.}}
【用法說明】refer to 是固定搭配
【翻譯】請參考第十頁。

{{tts en_US:referee}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】裁判
【搭配詞】soccer referee / referee whistle / talk to the referee
【例句】The referee blew the whistle.
{{tts en_US:The referee blew the whistle.}}
【用法說明】referee 指比賽裁判
【翻譯】裁判吹響了哨子。

{{tts en_US:reference}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】參考；提及；推薦人
【搭配詞】for reference / reference book / job reference
【例句】Keep this email for future reference.
{{tts en_US:Keep this email for future reference.}}
【用法說明】reference 用法很多，常見是參考資料
【翻譯】把這封信留著以後參考。

{{tts en_US:referendum}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】公投；全民投票
【搭配詞】national referendum / hold a referendum / referendum result
【例句】The issue will be decided by referendum.
{{tts en_US:The issue will be decided by referendum.}}
【用法說明】referendum 指全民投票決定重大議題
【翻譯】這個議題將透過公投決定。

{{tts en_US:refine}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】精煉；改進；使更完善
【搭配詞】refine the process / refine oil / refine your skills
【例句】We need to refine the design.
{{tts en_US:We need to refine the design.}}
【用法說明】refine 指讓事物更好更精確
【翻譯】我們需要進一步改進這個設計。

{{tts en_US:refinement}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】改進；精緻；優雅
【搭配詞】further refinement / design refinement / sense of refinement
【例句】The product still needs some refinement.
{{tts en_US:The product still needs some refinement.}}
【用法說明】refinement 指持續打磨改進
【翻譯】這個產品還需要再精修。

{{tts en_US:reflect}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】反映；反射；深思
【搭配詞】reflect on / reflect light / reflect the truth
【例句】The mirror reflects the light.
{{tts en_US:The mirror reflects the light.}}
【用法說明】reflect 用法很多，常見是反射或反映
【翻譯】鏡子反射了光線。

{{tts en_US:reflection}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】反射；倒影；反思
【搭配詞】self-reflection / reflection in the water / thoughtful reflection
【例句】I saw my reflection in the window.
{{tts en_US:I saw my reflection in the window.}}
【用法說明】reflection 可指影像倒影，也可指內省思考
【翻譯】我在窗戶上看到了自己的倒影。

{{tts en_US:reflective}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】反射的；深思的
【搭配詞】reflective surface / reflective mood / reflective jacket
【例句】The glass is highly reflective.
{{tts en_US:The glass is highly reflective.}}
【用法說明】reflective 可指會反光，也可指愛思考
【翻譯】那片玻璃非常會反光。

{{tts en_US:reform}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】改革；改造
【搭配詞】education reform / reform the system / call for reform
【例句】The government promised tax reform.
{{tts en_US:The government promised tax reform.}}
【用法說明】reform 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】政府承諾進行稅制改革。

{{tts en_US:refresh}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使清新；使恢復精神；重新整理
【搭配詞】refresh your memory / refresh the page / feel refreshed
【例句】A short walk will refresh you.
{{tts en_US:A short walk will refresh you.}}
【用法說明】refresh 可指身心恢復清新，也可指重新載入頁面
【翻譯】散個短步會讓你恢復精神。

{{tts en_US:refreshment}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】點心；飲料；恢復精神
【搭配詞】light refreshment / offer refreshment / stop for refreshment
【例句】Cold water was a welcome refreshment.
{{tts en_US:Cold water was a welcome refreshment.}}
【用法說明】refreshment 可指提神的飲料或小點
【翻譯】冰水是很受歡迎的提神飲品。

{{tts en_US:refreshment}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】點心；飲料；恢復精神
【搭配詞】light refreshment / offer refreshment / stop for refreshment
【例句】Cold water was a welcome refreshment.
{{tts en_US:Cold water was a welcome refreshment.}}
【用法說明】refreshment 可指提神的飲料或小點
【翻譯】冰水是很受歡迎的提神飲品。

{{tts en_US:refreshments}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】茶點；飲料點心
【搭配詞】serve refreshments / light refreshments / free refreshments
【例句】Refreshments will be provided after the talk.
{{tts en_US:Refreshments will be provided after the talk.}}
【用法說明】refreshments 通常用複數，指茶點
【翻譯】演講後會提供茶點。

{{tts en_US:refrigerator/fridge}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】冰箱
【搭配詞】open the fridge / put it in the refrigerator / fridge door
【例句】The milk is in the fridge.
{{tts en_US:The milk is in the fridge.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 refrigerator 和 fridge 放在一起
【翻譯】牛奶在冰箱裡。

{{tts en_US:refuge}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】避難；庇護所
【搭配詞】take refuge / place of refuge / seek refuge
【例句】They took refuge from the storm.
{{tts en_US:They took refuge from the storm.}}
【用法說明】refuge 指躲避危險的地方或行動
【翻譯】他們躲避暴風雨時找了個避難處。

{{tts en_US:refugee}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】難民
【搭配詞】war refugee / refugee camp / help refugees
【例句】The city accepted many refugees.
{{tts en_US:The city accepted many refugees.}}
【用法說明】refugee 指因戰爭或災難逃離家園的人
【翻譯】那座城市接納了許多難民。

{{tts en_US:refund}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】退款；退還
【搭配詞】full refund / request a refund / refund the money
【例句】Can I get a refund for this shirt?
{{tts en_US:Can I get a refund for this shirt?}}
【用法說明】refund 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】這件襯衫可以退款嗎？

{{tts en_US:refusal}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】拒絕
【搭配詞】flat refusal / polite refusal / refusal to cooperate
【例句】His refusal surprised everyone.
{{tts en_US:His refusal surprised everyone.}}
【用法說明】refusal 指拒絕這件事
【翻譯】他的拒絕讓大家都很意外。

{{tts en_US:refuse}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】拒絕；垃圾廢棄物
【搭配詞】refuse to / refuse help / household refuse
【例句】She refused to answer the question.
{{tts en_US:She refused to answer the question.}}
【用法說明】refuse 可作動詞，也可指廢棄物
【翻譯】她拒絕回答那個問題。

{{tts en_US:refute}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】反駁；駁斥
【搭配詞】refute an argument / refute a claim / be refuted
【例句】He tried to refute the accusation.
{{tts en_US:He tried to refute the accusation.}}
【用法說明】refute 指提出證據反駁
【翻譯】他試圖駁斥那項指控。

{{tts en_US:regard}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】視為；關於；尊重
【搭配詞】regard as / with regard to / in this regard
【例句】Many people regard her as a leader.
{{tts en_US:Many people regard her as a leader.}}
【用法說明】regard 用法很多，常見是視為
【翻譯】很多人都把她視為領袖。

{{tts en_US:regarding}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】關於
【搭配詞】email regarding / regarding your request / regarding the meeting
【例句】I'm writing regarding your application.
{{tts en_US:I'm writing regarding your application.}}
【用法說明】regarding 是正式的『關於』
【翻譯】我寫信是關於你的申請。

{{tts en_US:regardless}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】不管；不顧
【搭配詞】regardless of / regardless whether / continue regardless
【例句】We'll go regardless of the weather.
{{tts en_US:We'll go regardless of the weather.}}
【用法說明】regardless of 是固定搭配
【翻譯】不管天氣如何，我們都會去。

{{tts en_US:regime}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】政權；制度
【搭配詞】political regime / old regime / strict regime
【例句】The country experienced a change in regime.
{{tts en_US:The country experienced a change in regime.}}
【用法說明】regime 常指統治體制
【翻譯】那個國家經歷了政權更替。

{{tts en_US:region}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】地區；區域
【搭配詞】northern region / region of the country / local region
【例句】This region is known for tea.
{{tts en_US:This region is known for tea.}}
【用法說明】region 指地理區域
【翻譯】這個地區以茶聞名。

{{tts en_US:regional}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】地區的；區域性的
【搭配詞】regional office / regional train / regional cuisine
【例句】She works in the regional office.
{{tts en_US:She works in the regional office.}}
【用法說明】regional 指某地區範圍內的
【翻譯】她在區域辦公室工作。

{{tts en_US:register}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】登記；註冊；顯示
【搭配詞】register online / cash register / register a complaint
【例句】Please register before Friday.
{{tts en_US:Please register before Friday.}}
【用法說明】register 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】請在星期五前完成報名。

{{tts en_US:registration}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】登記；註冊
【搭配詞】online registration / registration form / early registration
【例句】Registration closes tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:Registration closes tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】registration 指登記程序
【翻譯】報名明天截止。

{{tts en_US:regret}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】後悔；遺憾
【搭配詞】regret doing / deeply regret / with regret
【例句】I regret not calling her sooner.
{{tts en_US:I regret not calling her sooner.}}
【用法說明】regret 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我後悔沒有早點打給她。

{{tts en_US:regular}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】規律的；一般的；固定的
【搭配詞】regular customer / regular exercise / regular train
【例句】Exercise is part of my regular routine.
{{tts en_US:Exercise is part of my regular routine.}}
【用法說明】regular 指固定、平常、規律
【翻譯】運動是我固定作息的一部分。

{{tts en_US:regulate}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】管理；規範；調節
【搭配詞】regulate the market / regulate temperature / strictly regulate
【例句】The law regulates online sales.
{{tts en_US:The law regulates online sales.}}
【用法說明】regulate 指用規則控制管理
【翻譯】這條法律規範了網路銷售。

{{tts en_US:regulation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】規定；法規；調節
【搭配詞】safety regulation / government regulation / under regulation
【例句】The new regulation takes effect next month.
{{tts en_US:The new regulation takes effect next month.}}
【用法說明】regulation 指正式規定
【翻譯】新規定下個月生效。

{{tts en_US:rehabilitate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使復健；使恢復名譽；修復
【搭配詞】rehabilitate a patient / rehabilitate the building / rehabilitate reputation
【例句】The program helps injured animals rehabilitate.
{{tts en_US:The program helps injured animals rehabilitate.}}
【用法說明】rehabilitate 指幫助恢復正常功能
【翻譯】這個計畫幫助受傷動物復原。

{{tts en_US:rehearsal}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】排練
【搭配詞】final rehearsal / dance rehearsal / rehearsal room
【例句】The band had a rehearsal before the show.
{{tts en_US:The band had a rehearsal before the show.}}
【用法說明】rehearsal 指正式演出前的練習
【翻譯】樂團在演出前進行了排練。

{{tts en_US:rehearse}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】排練；反覆練習
【搭配詞】rehearse a play / rehearse a speech / rehearse with the team
【例句】She rehearsed her presentation all night.
{{tts en_US:She rehearsed her presentation all night.}}
【用法說明】rehearse 指為演出或發表做練習
【翻譯】她整晚都在練簡報。

{{tts en_US:reign}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】統治；在位期間
【搭配詞】reign over / during his reign / long reign
【例句】The castle was built during the king's reign.
{{tts en_US:The castle was built during the king's reign.}}
【用法說明】reign 指君主在位統治期間
【翻譯】那座城堡是在國王統治時期建成的。

{{tts en_US:reinforce}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】加強；強化
【搭配詞】reinforce the wall / reinforce a message / reinforce learning
【例句】The example helps reinforce the idea.
{{tts en_US:The example helps reinforce the idea.}}
【用法說明】reinforce 指讓某事更穩固更強
【翻譯】這個例子有助於強化那個概念。

{{tts en_US:reject}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】拒絕；不接受
【搭配詞】reject an offer / reject the idea / be rejected
【例句】She rejected the invitation politely.
{{tts en_US:She rejected the invitation politely.}}
【用法說明】reject 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】她禮貌地拒絕了邀請。

{{tts en_US:rejection}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】拒絕；駁回
【搭配詞】fear of rejection / job rejection / face rejection
【例句】He took the rejection hard.
{{tts en_US:He took the rejection hard.}}
【用法說明】rejection 指被拒絕這件事
【翻譯】他對那次被拒絕感到很難受。

{{tts en_US:rejoice}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】歡喜；欣喜
【搭配詞】rejoice in / rejoice at / reasons to rejoice
【例句】We rejoiced at the good news.
{{tts en_US:We rejoiced at the good news.}}
【用法說明】rejoice 指因好事而歡喜
【翻譯】我們為那個好消息感到高興。

{{tts en_US:relate}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】有關；敘述；理解共鳴
【搭配詞】relate to / relate a story / relate directly
【例句】I can really relate to her experience.
{{tts en_US:I can really relate to her experience.}}
【用法說明】relate to 常指有共鳴或和某事有關
【翻譯】我真的能對她的經驗感同身受。

{{tts en_US:relation}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】關係；聯繫
【搭配詞】in relation to / close relation / family relation
【例句】The report examines the relation between sleep and stress.
{{tts en_US:The report examines the relation between sleep and stress.}}
【用法說明】relation 指兩者之間的關聯
【翻譯】這份報告檢視睡眠和壓力之間的關係。

{{tts en_US:relationship}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】關係；關聯
【搭配詞】close relationship / healthy relationship / build a relationship
【例句】Trust is important in any relationship.
{{tts en_US:Trust is important in any relationship.}}
【用法說明】relationship 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】信任在任何關係裡都很重要。

{{tts en_US:relative}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】親戚；相對的
【搭配詞】close relative / relative importance / relative to
【例句】A relative came to visit us.
{{tts en_US:A relative came to visit us.}}
【用法說明】relative 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】有位親戚來看我們。

{{tts en_US:relax}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】放鬆；休息
【搭配詞】relax at home / try to relax / relax your shoulders
【例句】I like to relax with music.
{{tts en_US:I like to relax with music.}}
【用法說明】relax 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】我喜歡聽音樂放鬆。

{{tts en_US:relaxation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】放鬆；休閒
【搭配詞】for relaxation / deep relaxation / relaxation time
【例句】Reading is a good form of relaxation.
{{tts en_US:Reading is a good form of relaxation.}}
【用法說明】relaxation 指讓身心放鬆的狀態
【翻譯】閱讀是一種很好的放鬆方式。

{{tts en_US:relay}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】接力；轉達；中繼
【搭配詞】relay race / relay a message / relay station
【例句】Can you relay this message to her?
{{tts en_US:Can you relay this message to her?}}
【用法說明】relay 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】你可以幫我把這個訊息轉達給她嗎？

{{tts en_US:release}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】釋放；發行；放開
【搭配詞】release a song / release pressure / release the bird
【例句】The band will release a new album next month.
{{tts en_US:The band will release a new album next month.}}
【用法說明】release 用法很多，常見是發行或釋放
【翻譯】那個樂團下個月會發行新專輯。

{{tts en_US:relentless}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】不停的；持續猛烈的
【搭配詞】relentless pressure / relentless rain / relentless effort
【例句】The team made a relentless effort to finish on time.
{{tts en_US:The team made a relentless effort to finish on time.}}
【用法說明】relentless 指不間斷、毫不鬆懈
【翻譯】團隊為了準時完成付出了不懈努力。

{{tts en_US:relevant}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】相關的；切題的
【搭配詞】relevant information / highly relevant / directly relevant
【例句】Please include only relevant details.
{{tts en_US:Please include only relevant details.}}
【用法說明】relevant 指和主題有關
【翻譯】請只放入相關細節。

{{tts en_US:reliable}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】可靠的
【搭配詞】reliable source / reliable friend / reliable service
【例句】She's a reliable person.
{{tts en_US:She's a reliable person.}}
【用法說明】reliable 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】她是個很可靠的人。

{{tts en_US:reliance}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】依賴；信賴
【搭配詞】reliance on / heavy reliance / mutual reliance
【例句】The company reduced its reliance on paper.
{{tts en_US:The company reduced its reliance on paper.}}
【用法說明】reliance 指依賴某事物
【翻譯】那家公司減少了對紙本的依賴。

{{tts en_US:reliant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】依賴的
【搭配詞】reliant on / heavily reliant / self-reliant
【例句】The system is too reliant on one person.
{{tts en_US:The system is too reliant on one person.}}
【用法說明】reliant on 是固定搭配
【翻譯】這套系統太依賴單一個人。

{{tts en_US:relic}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】遺物；遺跡
【搭配詞】ancient relic / religious relic / museum relic
【例句】The museum displayed a relic from the old kingdom.
{{tts en_US:The museum displayed a relic from the old kingdom.}}
【用法說明】relic 指古老遺留下來的物品
【翻譯】博物館展出了一件古王國遺物。

{{tts en_US:relief}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】鬆了一口氣；減輕；救助
【搭配詞】feel relief / relief fund / pain relief
【例句】I felt a huge sense of relief.
{{tts en_US:I felt a huge sense of relief.}}
【用法說明】relief 可指情緒上放鬆，也可指救助
【翻譯】我感到大大鬆了一口氣。

{{tts en_US:relieve}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】減輕；解除
【搭配詞】relieve pain / relieve stress / relieve someone of
【例句】A short walk can relieve stress.
{{tts en_US:A short walk can relieve stress.}}
【用法說明】relieve 指讓不舒服或壓力變輕
【翻譯】散個短步可以減輕壓力。

{{tts en_US:religion}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】宗教
【搭配詞】study religion / world religion / freedom of religion
【例句】The course explores the history of religion.
{{tts en_US:The course explores the history of religion.}}
【用法說明】religion 指宗教信仰系統
【翻譯】這門課探討宗教的歷史。

{{tts en_US:religious}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】宗教的；虔誠的
【搭配詞】religious belief / religious holiday / deeply religious
【例句】They celebrated a religious festival.
{{tts en_US:They celebrated a religious festival.}}
【用法說明】religious 指和宗教有關
【翻譯】他們慶祝了一個宗教節日。

{{tts en_US:reluctant}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】不情願的；勉強的
【搭配詞】reluctant to / reluctant smile / feel reluctant
【例句】He was reluctant to speak in public.
{{tts en_US:He was reluctant to speak in public.}}
【用法說明】reluctant to 是常見搭配
【翻譯】他不太情願在公開場合發言。

{{tts en_US:rely}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】依靠；依賴
【搭配詞】rely on / rely heavily on / rely upon
【例句】You can rely on me.
{{tts en_US:You can rely on me.}}
【用法說明】rely on 是高頻搭配
【翻譯】你可以依靠我。

{{tts en_US:remain}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】保持；仍然是；剩下
【搭配詞】remain calm / remain the same / remain in place
【例句】Please remain seated.
{{tts en_US:Please remain seated.}}
【用法說明】remain 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】請保持坐著。

{{tts en_US:remainder}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】剩餘部分；餘數
【搭配詞】the remainder of / small remainder / find the remainder
【例句】We'll discuss the remainder of the book tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:We'll discuss the remainder of the book tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】remainder 指剩下的部分
【翻譯】我們明天會討論這本書剩下的部分。

{{tts en_US:remark}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】評論；說
【搭配詞】make a remark / casual remark / remark that
【例句】She made a funny remark during dinner.
{{tts en_US:She made a funny remark during dinner.}}
【用法說明】remark 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她在晚餐時說了一句很好笑的話。

{{tts en_US:remarkable}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】了不起的；非凡的
【搭配詞】remarkable change / remarkable talent / truly remarkable
【例句】She made remarkable progress.
{{tts en_US:She made remarkable progress.}}
【用法說明】remarkable 指很突出、值得注意
【翻譯】她有了驚人的進步。

{{tts en_US:remedy}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】補救方法；藥方
【搭配詞】simple remedy / remedy the problem / herbal remedy
【例句】We need a remedy for this issue.
{{tts en_US:We need a remedy for this issue.}}
【用法說明】remedy 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們需要一個解決這個問題的辦法。

{{tts en_US:remember}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】記得；想起
【搭配詞】remember to / remember doing / remember clearly
【例句】Do you remember his name?
{{tts en_US:Do you remember his name?}}
【用法說明】remember 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】你記得他的名字嗎？

{{tts en_US:remind}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】提醒；使想起
【搭配詞】remind someone to / remind of / friendly reminder
【例句】Please remind me tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:Please remind me tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】remind 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】請你明天提醒我。

{{tts en_US:reminder}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】提醒；提示
【搭配詞】gentle reminder / set a reminder / email reminder
【例句】I set a reminder on my phone.
{{tts en_US:I set a reminder on my phone.}}
【用法說明】reminder 指提醒訊息或工具
【翻譯】我在手機上設了一個提醒。

{{tts en_US:reminiscent}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】使人聯想到…的
【搭配詞】reminiscent of / smell reminiscent / style reminiscent
【例句】The song is reminiscent of summer.
{{tts en_US:The song is reminiscent of summer.}}
【用法說明】reminiscent of 是固定搭配
【翻譯】這首歌讓人想起夏天。

{{tts en_US:remote}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】遙遠的；遠端的；遙控器
【搭配詞】remote village / remote work / TV remote
【例句】He works from home remotely.
{{tts en_US:He works from home remotely.}}
【用法說明】remote 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】他在家遠端工作。

{{tts en_US:removal}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】移除；搬走
【搭配詞】removal of / waste removal / furniture removal
【例句】The removal of the old files took hours.
{{tts en_US:The removal of the old files took hours.}}
【用法說明】removal 指移開或清除
【翻譯】移除那些舊檔案花了好幾個小時。

{{tts en_US:remove}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】移除；拿走
【搭配詞】remove the lid / remove from / remove makeup
【例句】Please remove your shoes.
{{tts en_US:Please remove your shoes.}}
【用法說明】remove 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】請把鞋子脫掉。

{{tts en_US:render}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】使成為；呈現；渲染
【搭配詞】render useless / render a service / render an image
【例句】The heat rendered the food unsafe.
{{tts en_US:The heat rendered the food unsafe.}}
【用法說明】render 是較正式的『使成為』
【翻譯】高溫讓食物變得不安全。

{{tts en_US:renew}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】更新；續約；恢復
【搭配詞】renew a passport / renew your membership / renew hope
【例句】I need to renew my library card.
{{tts en_US:I need to renew my library card.}}
【用法說明】renew 指讓某事重新有效
【翻譯】我需要更新我的圖書證。

{{tts en_US:renowned}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】著名的
【搭配詞】renowned artist / world-renowned / renowned for
【例句】The city is renowned for its food.
{{tts en_US:The city is renowned for its food.}}
【用法說明】renowned 指很有名
【翻譯】這座城市以美食聞名。

{{tts en_US:rent}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】租；租金
【搭配詞】pay rent / rent a room / for rent
【例句】They rent an apartment downtown.
{{tts en_US:They rent an apartment downtown.}}
【用法說明】rent 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他們在市中心租了一間公寓。

{{tts en_US:rental}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】租借；出租的
【搭配詞】car rental / rental fee / rental apartment
【例句】We booked a rental car online.
{{tts en_US:We booked a rental car online.}}
【用法說明】rental 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】我們在線上訂了一台租車。

{{tts en_US:repair}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】修理；修補
【搭配詞】repair the car / repair work / beyond repair
【例句】He repaired the broken chair.
{{tts en_US:He repaired the broken chair.}}
【用法說明】repair 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他修好了那張壞掉的椅子。

{{tts en_US:repay}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】償還；回報
【搭配詞】repay a loan / repay kindness / repay in full
【例句】I'll repay you next week.
{{tts en_US:I'll repay you next week.}}
【用法說明】repay 指還錢或回報恩情
【翻譯】我下週會還你錢。

{{tts en_US:repeat}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】重複；再說一次
【搭配詞】repeat the question / repeat after me / repeat itself
【例句】Could you repeat that, please?
{{tts en_US:Could you repeat that, please?}}
【用法說明】repeat 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】你可以再說一次嗎？

{{tts en_US:repetition}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】重複；反覆
【搭配詞】through repetition / boring repetition / repetition of
【例句】Language learning takes repetition.
{{tts en_US:Language learning takes repetition.}}
【用法說明】repetition 指反覆出現或反覆練習
【翻譯】學語言需要反覆練習。

{{tts en_US:replace}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】取代；更換
【搭配詞】replace the battery / replace with / be replaced by
【例句】We need to replace the light bulb.
{{tts en_US:We need to replace the light bulb.}}
【用法說明】replace 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】我們需要更換燈泡。

{{tts en_US:replacement}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】替代；替換品
【搭配詞】replacement part / find a replacement / battery replacement
【例句】We ordered a replacement for the damaged part.
{{tts en_US:We ordered a replacement for the damaged part.}}
【用法說明】replacement 指替代物或替換行為
【翻譯】我們替損壞零件訂了一個替換品。

{{tts en_US:reply}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】回覆；回答
【搭配詞】reply to / quick reply / no reply
【例句】I replied to her email this morning.
{{tts en_US:I replied to her email this morning.}}
【用法說明】reply 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我今天早上回了她的 email。

{{tts en_US:report}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】報告；回報；報導
【搭配詞】write a report / report the problem / news report
【例句】Please send me the report by Friday.
{{tts en_US:Please send me the report by Friday.}}
【用法說明】report 是高頻名詞與動詞
【翻譯】請在星期五前把報告寄給我。

{{tts en_US:reporter}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】記者
【搭配詞】news reporter / TV reporter / local reporter
【例句】A reporter asked several questions.
{{tts en_US:A reporter asked several questions.}}
【用法說明】reporter 指採訪與報導新聞的人
【翻譯】一位記者問了好幾個問題。

{{tts en_US:represent}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】代表；象徵
【搭配詞】represent the team / represent a country / represent an idea
【例句】She will represent our class in the contest.
{{tts en_US:She will represent our class in the contest.}}
【用法說明】represent 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】她將代表我們班參加比賽。

{{tts en_US:representation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】代表；呈現；表現方式
【搭配詞】equal representation / visual representation / representation in media
【例句】The chart is a visual representation of the data.
{{tts en_US:The chart is a visual representation of the data.}}
【用法說明】representation 指把某事呈現出來的方式
【翻譯】這張圖表是資料的視覺呈現。

{{tts en_US:representative}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】代表；典型的；有代表性的
【搭配詞】sales representative / representative example / elected representative
【例句】He is a sales representative for the company.
{{tts en_US:He is a sales representative for the company.}}
【用法說明】representative 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】他是那家公司的業務代表。

{{tts en_US:reproduce}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】繁殖；複製；再現
【搭配詞】reproduce quickly / reproduce the results / reproduce an image
【例句】Some plants can reproduce without seeds.
{{tts en_US:Some plants can reproduce without seeds.}}
【用法說明】reproduce 可指生物繁殖或內容複製
【翻譯】有些植物不靠種子也能繁殖。

{{tts en_US:reptile}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】爬蟲類動物
【搭配詞】pet reptile / reptile house / reptile species
【例句】A snake is a reptile.
{{tts en_US:A snake is a reptile.}}
【用法說明】reptile 指爬蟲類
【翻譯】蛇是一種爬蟲類動物。

{{tts en_US:republic}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】共和國
【搭配詞】the republic of / modern republic / republic government
【例句】The country became a republic in the 20th century.
{{tts en_US:The country became a republic in the 20th century.}}
【用法說明】republic 指共和政體國家
【翻譯】那個國家在二十世紀成為共和國。

{{tts en_US:republican}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】共和的；共和主義者；共和黨人
【搭配詞】republican system / republican values / Republican candidate
【例句】They support a republican form of government.
{{tts en_US:They support a republican form of government.}}
【用法說明】republican 可依語境指政體理念或政黨成員
【翻譯】他們支持共和形式的政府。

{{tts en_US:reputation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】名聲；聲譽
【搭配詞】good reputation / build a reputation / reputation for
【例句】The restaurant has a good reputation.
{{tts en_US:The restaurant has a good reputation.}}
【用法說明】reputation 指別人對某人事物的評價
【翻譯】那家餐廳口碑很好。

{{tts en_US:request}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】要求；請求
【搭配詞】make a request / request information / by request
【例句】She made a request for more time.
{{tts en_US:She made a request for more time.}}
【用法說明】request 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她提出希望再多一點時間的請求。

{{tts en_US:require}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】需要；要求
【搭配詞】require help / require that / be required to
【例句】This job requires patience.
{{tts en_US:This job requires patience.}}
【用法說明】require 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】這份工作需要耐心。

{{tts en_US:requirement}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】要求；必要條件
【搭配詞】job requirement / entry requirement / meet the requirements
【例句】Experience is one of the requirements.
{{tts en_US:Experience is one of the requirements.}}
【用法說明】requirement 指必備條件
【翻譯】經驗是條件之一。

{{tts en_US:rescue}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】救援；營救
【搭配詞】rescue a dog / rescue team / come to the rescue
【例句】Firefighters rescued the family.
{{tts en_US:Firefighters rescued the family.}}
【用法說明】rescue 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】消防員救出了那家人。

{{tts en_US:research}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】研究；調查
【搭配詞】do research / research project / market research
【例句】She's doing research on climate change.
{{tts en_US:She's doing research on climate change.}}
【用法說明】research 是高頻名詞與動詞
【翻譯】她正在研究氣候變遷。

{{tts en_US:researcher}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】研究人員
【搭配詞】medical researcher / lead researcher / young researcher
【例句】The researcher published their findings.
{{tts en_US:The researcher published their findings.}}
【用法說明】researcher 指從事研究工作的人
【翻譯】那位研究人員發表了研究結果。

{{tts en_US:resemblance}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】相似；相像
【搭配詞】close resemblance / strong resemblance / resemblance to
【例句】There is a strong resemblance between the sisters.
{{tts en_US:There is a strong resemblance between the sisters.}}
【用法說明】resemblance 指外表或特徵相似
【翻譯】那對姊妹長得很像。

{{tts en_US:resemble}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】像；與…相似
【搭配詞】resemble your father / closely resemble / resemble each other
【例句】You resemble your mother.
{{tts en_US:You resemble your mother.}}
【用法說明】resemble 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】你長得很像你媽媽。

{{tts en_US:resent}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】怨恨；對…感到不滿
【搭配詞】resent being treated / deeply resent / resent the comment
【例句】He resented the unfair criticism.
{{tts en_US:He resented the unfair criticism.}}
【用法說明】resent 指對某事感到憤怒不平
【翻譯】他對那種不公平批評感到很不滿。

{{tts en_US:resentment}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】怨恨；不滿
【搭配詞】feel resentment / deep resentment / resentment toward
【例句】Years of resentment built up between them.
{{tts en_US:Years of resentment built up between them.}}
【用法說明】resentment 指長期累積的不滿
【翻譯】他們之間累積了多年的怨氣。

{{tts en_US:reservation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】預約；保留；存疑
【搭配詞】make a reservation / hotel reservation / without reservation
【例句】I made a dinner reservation.
{{tts en_US:I made a dinner reservation.}}
【用法說明】reservation 最常指訂位預約
【翻譯】我訂了晚餐的位置。

{{tts en_US:reserve}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】保留；預訂；儲備
【搭配詞】reserve a table / in reserve / reserve judgment
【例句】Please reserve a seat for me.
{{tts en_US:Please reserve a seat for me.}}
【用法說明】reserve 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】請幫我保留一個座位。

{{tts en_US:reservoir}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】水庫；儲存處
【搭配詞】water reservoir / reservoir level / underground reservoir
【例句】The city gets water from a nearby reservoir.
{{tts en_US:The city gets water from a nearby reservoir.}}
【用法說明】reservoir 指儲水庫
【翻譯】那座城市的用水來自附近的水庫。

{{tts en_US:reside}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】居住；存在於
【搭配詞】reside in / currently reside / reside with
【例句】She currently resides in Taipei.
{{tts en_US:She currently resides in Taipei.}}
【用法說明】reside 是較正式的『居住』
【翻譯】她目前住在台北。

{{tts en_US:residence}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】住處；住宅；居住
【搭配詞】official residence / place of residence / student residence
【例句】The official residence is open to visitors.
{{tts en_US:The official residence is open to visitors.}}
【用法說明】residence 指住所或官邸
【翻譯】那座官邸對訪客開放。

{{tts en_US:resident}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】居民；住戶
【搭配詞】local resident / permanent resident / resident doctor
【例句】Local residents attended the meeting.
{{tts en_US:Local residents attended the meeting.}}
【用法說明】resident 指住在某地的人
【翻譯】當地居民出席了那場會議。

{{tts en_US:residential}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】住宅的；居住區的
【搭配詞】residential area / residential building / residential street
【例句】This is a quiet residential area.
{{tts en_US:This is a quiet residential area.}}
【用法說明】residential 指住宅用途
【翻譯】這是一個安靜的住宅區。

{{tts en_US:resign}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】辭職；放棄
【搭配詞】resign from / resign yourself to / be forced to resign
【例句】She decided to resign from her position.
{{tts en_US:She decided to resign from her position.}}
【用法說明】resign 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】她決定辭去職位。

{{tts en_US:resignation}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】辭職；辭呈
【搭配詞】submit a resignation / announce your resignation / letter of resignation
【例句】He handed in his resignation yesterday.
{{tts en_US:He handed in his resignation yesterday.}}
【用法說明】resignation 指辭職這件事或辭呈
【翻譯】他昨天遞出了辭呈。

{{tts en_US:resist}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】抵抗；抗拒
【搭配詞】resist temptation / resist change / resist the urge
【例句】It's hard to resist chocolate.
{{tts en_US:It's hard to resist chocolate.}}
【用法說明】resist 指不順從、不被影響
【翻譯】要抗拒巧克力真的很難。

{{tts en_US:resistance}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】抵抗；阻力
【搭配詞】show resistance / antibiotic resistance / resistance to change
【例句】There was strong resistance to the plan.
{{tts en_US:There was strong resistance to the plan.}}
【用法說明】resistance 指反對力量或物理阻力
【翻譯】這個計畫遭到強烈反對。

{{tts en_US:resistant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】有抵抗力的；抗…的
【搭配詞】resistant to / water-resistant / disease-resistant
【例句】This material is resistant to heat.
{{tts en_US:This material is resistant to heat.}}
【用法說明】resistant to 是固定搭配
【翻譯】這種材料耐熱。

{{tts en_US:resolution}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】決議；決心；解析度
【搭配詞】new year's resolution / screen resolution / pass a resolution
【例句】My New Year's resolution is to exercise more.
{{tts en_US:My New Year's resolution is to exercise more.}}
【用法說明】resolution 用法很多，常見是新年新希望
【翻譯】我的新年新希望是多運動。

{{tts en_US:resolve}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】解決；下定決心
【搭配詞】resolve a problem / resolve to / peacefully resolve
【例句】We need to resolve this issue quickly.
{{tts en_US:We need to resolve this issue quickly.}}
【用法說明】resolve 可作動詞或名詞（決心）相關
【翻譯】我們需要趕快解決這個問題。

{{tts en_US:resort}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】度假村；求助於
【搭配詞】beach resort / resort to / ski resort
【例句】They stayed at a mountain resort.
{{tts en_US:They stayed at a mountain resort.}}
【用法說明】resort 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他們住在山上的度假村。

{{tts en_US:resource}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】資源
【搭配詞】natural resource / learning resource / limited resources
【例句】Time is one of our most valuable resources.
{{tts en_US:Time is one of our most valuable resources.}}
【用法說明】resource 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】時間是我們最珍貴的資源之一。

{{tts en_US:respect}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】尊重；敬意
【搭配詞】show respect / respect others / out of respect
【例句】Children should respect their teachers.
{{tts en_US:Children should respect their teachers.}}
【用法說明】respect 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】孩子應該尊重老師。

{{tts en_US:respectable}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】值得尊敬的；體面的
【搭配詞】respectable family / respectable job / look respectable
【例句】He built a respectable career.
{{tts en_US:He built a respectable career.}}
【用法說明】respectable 指值得尊重或體面
【翻譯】他建立了一份體面的事業。

{{tts en_US:respectful}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】有禮貌的；尊重人的
【搭配詞】be respectful / respectful tone / respectful behavior
【例句】Please be respectful to everyone.
{{tts en_US:Please be respectful to everyone.}}
【用法說明】respectful 指態度有尊重
【翻譯】請尊重每一個人。

{{tts en_US:respective}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】各自的；分別的
【搭配詞】their respective roles / respective homes / respective views
【例句】They returned to their respective offices.
{{tts en_US:They returned to their respective offices.}}
【用法說明】respective 常與複數搭配
【翻譯】他們回到各自的辦公室。

{{tts en_US:respond}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】回應；回答
【搭配詞】respond to / respond quickly / respond well
【例句】He didn't respond to my message.
{{tts en_US:He didn't respond to my message.}}
【用法說明】respond 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】他沒有回我的訊息。

{{tts en_US:respondent}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】受訪者；答卷者
【搭配詞】survey respondent / respondent group / interview respondent
【例句】Each respondent answered ten questions.
{{tts en_US:Each respondent answered ten questions.}}
【用法說明】respondent 指問卷或調查的回答者
【翻譯】每位受訪者都回答了十個問題。

{{tts en_US:response}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】回應；反應
【搭配詞】quick response / emotional response / response to
【例句】Thank you for your quick response.
{{tts en_US:Thank you for your quick response.}}
【用法說明】response 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】謝謝你迅速回覆。

{{tts en_US:responsibility}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】責任；職責
【搭配詞】take responsibility / great responsibility / sense of responsibility
【例句】It's your responsibility to lock the door.
{{tts en_US:It's your responsibility to lock the door.}}
【用法說明】responsibility 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】鎖門是你的責任。

{{tts en_US:responsible}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】負責的；有責任的
【搭配詞】be responsible for / responsible adult / feel responsible
【例句】Who is responsible for this mistake?
{{tts en_US:Who is responsible for this mistake?}}
【用法說明】responsible for 是固定搭配
【翻譯】這個錯誤是誰負責的？

{{tts en_US:rest}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】休息；其餘部分
【搭配詞】take a rest / the rest of / at rest
【例句】You should get some rest.
{{tts en_US:You should get some rest.}}
【用法說明】rest 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】你應該休息一下。

{{tts en_US:restaurant}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】餐廳
【搭配詞】Italian restaurant / local restaurant / family restaurant
【例句】We had dinner at a small restaurant.
{{tts en_US:We had dinner at a small restaurant.}}
【用法說明】restaurant 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我們在一間小餐廳吃晚餐。

{{tts en_US:restoration}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】修復；恢復
【搭配詞】building restoration / restoration of health / restoration project
【例句】The painting needed careful restoration.
{{tts en_US:The painting needed careful restoration.}}
【用法說明】restoration 指把東西恢復原狀
【翻譯】那幅畫需要仔細修復。

{{tts en_US:restore}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】恢復；修復
【搭配詞】restore order / restore a building / restore health
【例句】The backup restored all my files.
{{tts en_US:The backup restored all my files.}}
【用法說明】restore 指讓某物回到原本狀態
【翻譯】備份把我所有檔案都恢復了。

{{tts en_US:restrain}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】抑制；約束
【搭配詞】restrain yourself / restrain anger / physically restrain
【例句】He struggled to restrain his laughter.
{{tts en_US:He struggled to restrain his laughter.}}
【用法說明】restrain 指控制住衝動或情緒
【翻譯】他努力忍住笑。

{{tts en_US:restraint}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】克制；限制
【搭配詞】show restraint / legal restraint / with restraint
【例句】She showed great restraint.
{{tts en_US:She showed great restraint.}}
【用法說明】restraint 指自我控制
【翻譯】她表現出很大的克制。

{{tts en_US:restrict}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】限制
【搭配詞】restrict access / restrict use / be restricted to
【例句】This pass restricts access to staff only.
{{tts en_US:This pass restricts access to staff only.}}
【用法說明】restrict 指把範圍縮小
【翻譯】這張通行證限制只有員工能進入。

{{tts en_US:restriction}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】限制；規定
【搭配詞】travel restriction / dietary restriction / without restriction
【例句】There are restrictions on parking here.
{{tts en_US:There are restrictions on parking here.}}
【用法說明】restriction 指限制規則
【翻譯】這裡有停車限制。

{{tts en_US:restroom}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】洗手間
【搭配詞】men's restroom / use the restroom / restroom sign
【例句】Excuse me, where is the restroom?
{{tts en_US:Excuse me, where is the restroom?}}
【用法說明】restroom 是美式英文的『洗手間』
【翻譯】不好意思，洗手間在哪裡？

{{tts en_US:result}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】結果；導致
【搭配詞】as a result / test result / result in
【例句】The result will be announced tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:The result will be announced tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】result 可作名詞或動詞片語相關
【翻譯】結果將於明天公布。

{{tts en_US:resume}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】履歷；重新開始
【搭配詞】send a resume / update your resume / resume work
【例句】Please send your resume by email.
{{tts en_US:Please send your resume by email.}}
【用法說明】resume 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】請用 email 寄你的履歷。

{{tts en_US:retail}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】零售；零售的
【搭配詞】retail store / retail price / work in retail
【例句】She works in retail.
{{tts en_US:She works in retail.}}
【用法說明】retail 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】她在零售業工作。

{{tts en_US:retain}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】保留；保持
【搭配詞】retain control / retain staff / retain heat
【例句】This bottle helps retain heat.
{{tts en_US:This bottle helps retain heat.}}
【用法說明】retain 指持續保有
【翻譯】這個瓶子有助於保溫。

{{tts en_US:retire}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】退休；退下
【搭配詞】retire at sixty / retire from work / retire for the night
【例句】My father plans to retire next year.
{{tts en_US:My father plans to retire next year.}}
【用法說明】retire 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】我爸爸打算明年退休。

{{tts en_US:retirement}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】退休；退休生活
【搭配詞】retirement plan / early retirement / enjoy retirement
【例句】She's saving money for retirement.
{{tts en_US:She's saving money for retirement.}}
【用法說明】retirement 指退休這件事或退休後生活
【翻譯】她正在為退休存錢。

{{tts en_US:retort}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】反駁；回嘴；蒸餾器
【搭配詞】sharp retort / retort angrily / quick retort
【例句】He retorted with a sarcastic comment.
{{tts en_US:He retorted with a sarcastic comment.}}
【用法說明】retort 常見於尖銳回嘴
【翻譯】他用一句諷刺的話回嗆。

{{tts en_US:retreat}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】撤退；靜修；休養地
【搭配詞】retreat from / mountain retreat / spiritual retreat
【例句】The soldiers were forced to retreat.
{{tts en_US:The soldiers were forced to retreat.}}
【用法說明】retreat 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那些士兵被迫撤退。

{{tts en_US:retrieve}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】取回；找回；檢索
【搭配詞】retrieve data / retrieve a ball / retrieve your bag
【例句】I went back to retrieve my phone.
{{tts en_US:I went back to retrieve my phone.}}
【用法說明】retrieve 指把東西找回來
【翻譯】我回去拿我的手機。

{{tts en_US:return}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】返回；歸還；回報
【搭配詞】return home / return a book / return to normal
【例句】I'll return the book tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:I'll return the book tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】return 是高頻動詞與名詞
【翻譯】我明天會把書還回去。

{{tts en_US:reunion}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】重聚；團聚會
【搭配詞】family reunion / school reunion / happy reunion
【例句】We had a family reunion last weekend.
{{tts en_US:We had a family reunion last weekend.}}
【用法說明】reunion 指久別後重聚
【翻譯】我們上週末辦了家庭聚會。

{{tts en_US:reveal}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】揭露；顯示
【搭配詞】reveal the truth / reveal a secret / reveal that
【例句】The report revealed new details.
{{tts en_US:The report revealed new details.}}
【用法說明】reveal 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】那份報告揭露了新的細節。

{{tts en_US:revelation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】揭露；啟示；驚人發現
【搭配詞】shocking revelation / sudden revelation / revelation about
【例句】The book contains a surprising revelation.
{{tts en_US:The book contains a surprising revelation.}}
【用法說明】revelation 指讓人驚訝的新發現
【翻譯】那本書裡有個令人意外的揭露。

{{tts en_US:revenge}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】報復；復仇
【搭配詞】take revenge / revenge on / seek revenge
【例句】He wanted revenge for the insult.
{{tts en_US:He wanted revenge for the insult.}}
【用法說明】revenge 指報復行為
【翻譯】他想為那次羞辱報仇。

{{tts en_US:revenue}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】收入；營收
【搭配詞】tax revenue / increase revenue / annual revenue
【例句】The company increased its revenue this year.
{{tts en_US:The company increased its revenue this year.}}
【用法說明】revenue 指收入總額
【翻譯】那家公司今年增加了營收。

{{tts en_US:reverse}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】相反；倒轉；撤銷
【搭配詞】in reverse / reverse the decision / reverse gear
【例句】Please reverse the car slowly.
{{tts en_US:Please reverse the car slowly.}}
【用法說明】reverse 可作名詞、動詞或形容詞
【翻譯】請慢慢倒車。

{{tts en_US:review}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】複習；評論；審查
【搭配詞】movie review / review for the test / review a document
【例句】I need to review my notes tonight.
{{tts en_US:I need to review my notes tonight.}}
【用法說明】review 用法很多，常見是複習
【翻譯】我今晚得複習筆記。

{{tts en_US:revise}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】修訂；修改；複習
【搭配詞】revise the draft / revise for an exam / revise your plan
【例句】She revised the report before sending it.
{{tts en_US:She revised the report before sending it.}}
【用法說明】revise 指重新修改內容
【翻譯】她在寄出前修改了報告。

{{tts en_US:revision}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】修訂；修改版；複習
【搭配詞】final revision / essay revision / exam revision
【例句】The second revision is much clearer.
{{tts en_US:The second revision is much clearer.}}
【用法說明】revision 指修改後的版本或修訂過程
【翻譯】第二版修訂清楚多了。

{{tts en_US:revival}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】復興；再流行；恢復
【搭配詞】cultural revival / revival of interest / economic revival
【例句】The city hopes for an economic revival.
{{tts en_US:The city hopes for an economic revival.}}
【用法說明】revival 指恢復活力
【翻譯】那座城市希望迎來經濟復甦。

{{tts en_US:revive}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】恢復；使復活；重新流行
【搭配詞】revive the tradition / revive interest / revive a patient
【例句】A cup of coffee revived me.
{{tts en_US:A cup of coffee revived me.}}
【用法說明】revive 指讓某事重新有活力
【翻譯】一杯咖啡讓我恢復精神。

{{tts en_US:revolt}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】反抗；叛亂
【搭配詞】revolt against / armed revolt / peasant revolt
【例句】The people revolted against the ruler.
{{tts en_US:The people revolted against the ruler.}}
【用法說明】revolt 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】人民起來反抗那位統治者。

{{tts en_US:revolution}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】革命；重大變革
【搭配詞】industrial revolution / social revolution / start a revolution
【例句】The internet started a communication revolution.
{{tts en_US:The internet started a communication revolution.}}
【用法說明】revolution 可指政治革命或巨大改變
【翻譯】網路掀起了一場溝通革命。

{{tts en_US:revolutionary}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】革命的；革命者；劃時代的
【搭配詞】revolutionary idea / revolutionary leader / revolutionary change
【例句】It was a revolutionary invention.
{{tts en_US:It was a revolutionary invention.}}
【用法說明】revolutionary 可指非常創新的
【翻譯】那是一項劃時代的發明。

{{tts en_US:revolve}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】旋轉；圍繞
【搭配詞】revolve around / earth revolves / revolve slowly
【例句】The Earth revolves around the Sun.
{{tts en_US:The Earth revolves around the Sun.}}
【用法說明】revolve 指繞著中心轉
【翻譯】地球繞著太陽運行。

{{tts en_US:reward}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】獎勵；報酬；回報
【搭配詞】get a reward / reward someone / hard work pays reward
【例句】Hard work often brings its own reward.
{{tts en_US:Hard work often brings its own reward.}}
【用法說明】reward 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】努力常常會帶來自己的回報。

{{tts en_US:rhetoric}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】修辭；華麗空話
【搭配詞】political rhetoric / empty rhetoric / powerful rhetoric
【例句】People were tired of empty rhetoric.
{{tts en_US:People were tired of empty rhetoric.}}
【用法說明】rhetoric 可指修辭技巧，也可指空洞說詞
【翻譯】人們已經厭倦了空洞的說詞。

{{tts en_US:rhyme}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】押韻；韻文
【搭配詞】rhyme with / nursery rhyme / write a rhyme
【例句】These two words rhyme.
{{tts en_US:These two words rhyme.}}
【用法說明】rhyme 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】這兩個字押韻。

{{tts en_US:rhythm}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】節奏；韻律
【搭配詞】music rhythm / daily rhythm / sense of rhythm
【例句】The song has a strong rhythm.
{{tts en_US:The song has a strong rhythm.}}
【用法說明】rhythm 指音樂或生活節奏
【翻譯】這首歌的節奏感很強。

{{tts en_US:rib}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】肋骨；排骨；羅紋
【搭配詞】broken rib / pork ribs / rib cage
【例句】He hurt a rib while playing basketball.
{{tts en_US:He hurt a rib while playing basketball.}}
【用法說明】rib 指肋骨或排骨
【翻譯】他打籃球時傷到了肋骨。

{{tts en_US:ribbon}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】絲帶；緞帶
【搭配詞】red ribbon / tie with a ribbon / ribbon bow
【例句】She tied the gift with a ribbon.
{{tts en_US:She tied the gift with a ribbon.}}
【用法說明】ribbon 指裝飾用帶子
【翻譯】她用緞帶綁起那份禮物。

{{tts en_US:rice}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】米飯；稻米
【搭配詞】cook rice / bowl of rice / rice field
【例句】We had rice and vegetables for lunch.
{{tts en_US:We had rice and vegetables for lunch.}}
【用法說明】rice 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我們午餐吃了飯和蔬菜。

{{tts en_US:rich}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】富有的；豐富的
【搭配詞】rich family / rich flavor / rich history
【例句】The soup has a rich flavor.
{{tts en_US:The soup has a rich flavor.}}
【用法說明】rich 可指有錢，也可指味道濃郁
【翻譯】這湯味道很濃郁。

{{tts en_US:riches}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】財富
【搭配詞】great riches / seek riches / promise riches
【例句】Money and riches do not guarantee happiness.
{{tts en_US:Money and riches do not guarantee happiness.}}
【用法說明】riches 指大量財富
【翻譯】金錢與財富不保證幸福。

{{tts en_US:rid}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】使擺脫；除掉
【搭配詞】get rid of / rid the house of / be rid of
【例句】I want to get rid of these old boxes.
{{tts en_US:I want to get rid of these old boxes.}}
【用法說明】rid 最常見於 get rid of
【翻譯】我想把這些舊箱子清掉。

{{tts en_US:riddle}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】謎語；難題
【搭配詞】solve a riddle / tricky riddle / a complete riddle
【例句】The old man told us a riddle.
{{tts en_US:The old man told us a riddle.}}
【用法說明】riddle 指謎語或難解的事
【翻譯】那位老人給我們出了一個謎語。

{{tts en_US:ride}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】騎；搭乘；乘坐旅程
【搭配詞】ride a bike / ride the bus / take a ride
【例句】I ride my bike to work.
{{tts en_US:I ride my bike to work.}}
【用法說明】ride 是高頻動詞與名詞
【翻譯】我騎腳踏車去上班。

{{tts en_US:ridge}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】山脊；屋脊
【搭配詞】mountain ridge / narrow ridge / ridge line
【例句】They hiked along the ridge.
{{tts en_US:They hiked along the ridge.}}
【用法說明】ridge 指高起的一條脊線
【翻譯】他們沿著山脊健行。

{{tts en_US:ridiculous}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】荒謬的；可笑的
【搭配詞】ridiculous idea / look ridiculous / absolutely ridiculous
【例句】That price is ridiculous.
{{tts en_US:That price is ridiculous.}}
【用法說明】ridiculous 指誇張到可笑
【翻譯】那個價格太離譜了。

{{tts en_US:rifle}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】步槍；來回翻找
【搭配詞】hunting rifle / rifle through / carry a rifle
【例句】He rifled through the drawer for his keys.
{{tts en_US:He rifled through the drawer for his keys.}}
【用法說明】rifle 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他翻找抽屜找鑰匙。

{{tts en_US:right}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】正確的；右邊；權利
【搭配詞】right answer / turn right / human rights
【例句】You were right about the weather.
{{tts en_US:You were right about the weather.}}
【用法說明】right 是超高頻字
【翻譯】你對天氣的判斷是對的。

{{tts en_US:rigid}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】僵硬的；嚴格的
【搭配詞】rigid structure / rigid rule / feel rigid
【例句】The school has a rigid schedule.
{{tts en_US:The school has a rigid schedule.}}
【用法說明】rigid 指不容易改變或很僵硬
【翻譯】那所學校的作息很死板。

{{tts en_US:rigorous}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】嚴格的；嚴密的
【搭配詞】rigorous test / rigorous training / rigorous standard
【例句】The course has a rigorous grading system.
{{tts en_US:The course has a rigorous grading system.}}
【用法說明】rigorous 指標準高且很嚴謹
【翻譯】那門課的評分制度很嚴格。

{{tts en_US:rim}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】邊緣；輪圈
【搭配詞】rim of the cup / glasses rim / wheel rim
【例句】There was sugar around the rim of the glass.
{{tts en_US:There was sugar around the rim of the glass.}}
【用法說明】rim 指外圍邊緣
【翻譯】杯口邊緣沾了一圈糖。

{{tts en_US:ring}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】戒指；鈴聲；環狀物
【搭配詞】wedding ring / ring the bell / phone ring
【例句】Her phone started to ring.
{{tts en_US:Her phone started to ring.}}
【用法說明】ring 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她的手機開始響了。

{{tts en_US:riot}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】暴動；騷亂
【搭配詞】food riot / start a riot / street riot
【例句】The city was hit by a riot.
{{tts en_US:The city was hit by a riot.}}
【用法說明】riot 指混亂暴動
【翻譯】那座城市爆發了暴動。

{{tts en_US:rip}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】撕裂；裂口
【搭配詞】rip the paper / rip your shirt / a small rip
【例句】I accidentally ripped the bag.
{{tts en_US:I accidentally ripped the bag.}}
【用法說明】rip 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我不小心把袋子撕破了。

{{tts en_US:ripe}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】成熟的
【搭配詞】ripe fruit / ripe tomato / perfectly ripe
【例句】These bananas are ripe now.
{{tts en_US:These bananas are ripe now.}}
【用法說明】ripe 指水果成熟可吃
【翻譯】這些香蕉現在熟了。

{{tts en_US:ripple}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】漣漪；擴散影響
【搭配詞】water ripple / ripple through / ripple effect
【例句】A stone made ripples in the pond.
{{tts en_US:A stone made ripples in the pond.}}
【用法說明】ripple 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】石頭在池塘裡激起漣漪。

{{tts en_US:row}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】一排；划船；爭吵
【搭配詞】front row / row a boat / have a row
【例句】We sat in the front row.
{{tts en_US:We sat in the front row.}}
【用法說明】row 用法很多，常見是排、列
【翻譯】我們坐在第一排。

{{tts en_US:royal}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】皇家的；高貴的
【搭配詞】royal family / royal palace / royal blue
【例句】They visited the royal palace.
{{tts en_US:They visited the royal palace.}}
【用法說明】royal 指與王室有關
【翻譯】他們參觀了皇宮。

{{tts en_US:royalty}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】王族；版稅
【搭配詞】British royalty
【例句】earn royalties / music royalty
{{tts en_US:earn royalties / music royalty}}
【用法說明】The author receives royalties from book sales.
【翻譯】royalty 可指王室成員，也可指版稅

{{tts en_US:rub}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】擦；摩擦
【搭配詞】rub your eyes / rub the table / rub gently
【例句】He rubbed his hands to keep warm.
{{tts en_US:He rubbed his hands to keep warm.}}
【用法說明】rub 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】他搓了搓手取暖。

{{tts en_US:rubber}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】橡膠；橡皮擦
【搭配詞】rubber band / rubber boots / piece of rubber
【例句】I need a rubber to erase this line.
{{tts en_US:I need a rubber to erase this line.}}
【用法說明】rubber 可指橡膠，也可指英式英文的橡皮擦
【翻譯】我需要一塊橡皮擦掉這條線。

{{tts en_US:rubbish}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】垃圾；胡說
【搭配詞】take out the rubbish / pile of rubbish / that's rubbish
【例句】Please take the rubbish out.
{{tts en_US:Please take the rubbish out.}}
【用法說明】rubbish 是英式英文常見的『垃圾』
【翻譯】請把垃圾拿出去。

{{tts en_US:rude}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】粗魯的；沒禮貌的
【搭配詞】rude comment / rude behavior / sound rude
【例句】It was rude to interrupt her.
{{tts en_US:It was rude to interrupt her.}}
【用法說明】rude 指態度不禮貌
【翻譯】打斷她說話很沒禮貌。

{{tts en_US:rug}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】地毯；小地毯
【搭配詞】soft rug / living room rug / put a rug down
【例句】There is a rug under the table.
{{tts en_US:There is a rug under the table.}}
【用法說明】rug 指鋪在地上的毯子
【翻譯】桌子下面有一張地毯。

{{tts en_US:rugged}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】崎嶇的；粗獷的；耐用的
【搭配詞】rugged mountain / rugged phone / rugged face
【例句】They walked through rugged terrain.
{{tts en_US:They walked through rugged terrain.}}
【用法說明】rugged 指地形不好走或東西耐用
【翻譯】他們走過崎嶇的地形。

{{tts en_US:ruin}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】毀壞；毀滅；廢墟
【搭配詞】ruin the plan / ancient ruin / financial ruin
【例句】The rain ruined our picnic.
{{tts en_US:The rain ruined our picnic.}}
【用法說明】ruin 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那場雨毀了我們的野餐。

{{tts en_US:rule}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】規則；統治；裁定
【搭配詞】school rule / follow the rules / rule a country
【例句】You have to follow the rules.
{{tts en_US:You have to follow the rules.}}
【用法說明】rule 是高頻名詞與動詞
【翻譯】你必須遵守規則。

{{tts en_US:ruler}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】尺；統治者
【搭配詞】wooden ruler / fair ruler / use a ruler
【例句】Use a ruler to draw a straight line.
{{tts en_US:Use a ruler to draw a straight line.}}
【用法說明】ruler 可指文具尺，也可指統治者
【翻譯】用尺畫一條直線。

{{tts en_US:rumor}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】謠言；傳聞
【搭配詞】spread a rumor / false rumor / rumor has it
【例句】I heard a rumor about the company.
{{tts en_US:I heard a rumor about the company.}}
【用法說明】rumor 指未證實的消息
【翻譯】我聽到一個關於那家公司的傳聞。

{{tts en_US:run}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】跑；運作；經營
【搭配詞】run fast / run a business / machine runs
【例句】She runs in the park every morning.
{{tts en_US:She runs in the park every morning.}}
【用法說明】run 是超高頻動詞
【翻譯】她每天早上都在公園跑步。

{{tts en_US:runner}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】跑者；跑步選手
【搭配詞】fast runner / marathon runner / runner-up
【例句】He is the fastest runner in the class.
{{tts en_US:He is the fastest runner in the class.}}
【用法說明】runner 指跑步的人
【翻譯】他是班上跑最快的人。

{{tts en_US:rural}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】鄉村的；農村的
【搭配詞】rural area / rural life / rural school
【例句】She grew up in a rural village.
{{tts en_US:She grew up in a rural village.}}
【用法說明】rural 指鄉村地區
【翻譯】她在一個鄉村長大。

{{tts en_US:rush}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】衝；趕忙；匆忙
【搭配詞】rush to work / morning rush / rush hour
【例句】Don't rush—there's still time.
{{tts en_US:Don't rush—there's still time.}}
【用法說明】rush 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】別急，還有時間。

{{tts en_US:rust}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】鐵鏽；生鏽
【搭配詞】rust on the gate / rust quickly / remove rust
【例句】The bike began to rust in the rain.
{{tts en_US:The bike began to rust in the rain.}}
【用法說明】rust 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那台腳踏車在雨中開始生鏽。

{{tts en_US:rusty}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】生鏽的；生疏的
【搭配詞】rusty knife / feel rusty / rusty gate
【例句】My English feels a little rusty.
{{tts en_US:My English feels a little rusty.}}
【用法說明】rusty 也可比喻技能生疏
【翻譯】我覺得自己的英文有點生疏了。

{{tts en_US:ruthless}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】無情的；殘酷的
【搭配詞】ruthless leader / ruthless attack / be ruthless
【例句】The villain was ruthless.
{{tts en_US:The villain was ruthless.}}
【用法說明】ruthless 指沒有同情心
【翻譯】那個反派很殘酷。

{{tts en_US:sack}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】袋子；解雇
【搭配詞】paper sack / sack of rice / get the sack
【例句】He carried a sack of potatoes.
{{tts en_US:He carried a sack of potatoes.}}
【用法說明】sack 可作名詞，也可口語指被開除
【翻譯】他扛著一袋馬鈴薯。

{{tts en_US:sacred}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】神聖的；莊嚴的
【搭配詞】sacred place / sacred text / sacred duty
【例句】This temple is a sacred place.
{{tts en_US:This temple is a sacred place.}}
【用法說明】sacred 指神聖不可侵犯
【翻譯】這座寺廟是神聖的地方。

{{tts en_US:sacrifice}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】犧牲；祭品
【搭配詞】make a sacrifice / sacrifice time / personal sacrifice
【例句】She sacrificed her weekend to finish the project.
{{tts en_US:She sacrificed her weekend to finish the project.}}
【用法說明】sacrifice 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她犧牲了週末來完成專案。

{{tts en_US:sad}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】難過的；令人難過的
【搭配詞】feel sad / sad story / look sad
【例句】I felt sad after the movie.
{{tts en_US:I felt sad after the movie.}}
【用法說明】sad 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】看完電影後我覺得很難過。

{{tts en_US:saddle}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】馬鞍；鞍座
【搭配詞】put on a saddle / bike saddle / leather saddle
【例句】He tightened the saddle before riding.
{{tts en_US:He tightened the saddle before riding.}}
【用法說明】saddle 指馬鞍或腳踏車座墊
【翻譯】他騎乘前把馬鞍繫緊了。

{{tts en_US:safe}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】安全的；保險箱
【搭配詞】stay safe / safe place / keep it safe
【例句】Is it safe to walk here at night?
{{tts en_US:Is it safe to walk here at night?}}
【用法說明】safe 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】晚上走這裡安全嗎？

{{tts en_US:safety}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】安全；安全性
【搭配詞】road safety / safety rule / for your safety
【例句】Safety comes first.
{{tts en_US:Safety comes first.}}
【用法說明】safety 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】安全第一。

{{tts en_US:sail}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】航行；帆
【搭配詞】sail across / set sail / boat sail
【例句】We sailed around the island.
{{tts en_US:We sailed around the island.}}
【用法說明】sail 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們繞著島航行。

{{tts en_US:sailor}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】水手
【搭配詞】young sailor / skilled sailor / sailor uniform
【例句】The sailor climbed onto the deck.
{{tts en_US:The sailor climbed onto the deck.}}
【用法說明】sailor 指在船上工作的人
【翻譯】那位水手爬上了甲板。

{{tts en_US:saint}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】聖人；聖徒
【搭配詞】be a saint / Saint Peter / local saint
【例句】She was patient like a saint.
{{tts en_US:She was patient like a saint.}}
【用法說明】saint 可指宗教聖徒，也可比喻很有耐心的人
【翻譯】她有耐心到像個聖人。

{{tts en_US:sake}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】緣故；目的；清酒
【搭配詞】for the sake of / for your sake / drink sake
【例句】For the sake of everyone, please be quiet.
{{tts en_US:For the sake of everyone, please be quiet.}}
【用法說明】sake 常見於 for the sake of
【翻譯】為了大家，請安靜一點。

{{tts en_US:salad}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】沙拉
【搭配詞】fruit salad / green salad / salad bowl
【例句】I ordered a chicken salad.
{{tts en_US:I ordered a chicken salad.}}
【用法說明】salad 指沙拉
【翻譯】我點了一份雞肉沙拉。

{{tts en_US:salary}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】薪水
【搭配詞】monthly salary / raise your salary / good salary
【例句】She earns a good salary.
{{tts en_US:She earns a good salary.}}
【用法說明】salary 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】她的薪水不錯。

{{tts en_US:sale}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】特價；販售；銷售
【搭配詞】on sale / for sale / big sale
【例句】These shoes are on sale.
{{tts en_US:These shoes are on sale.}}
【用法說明】sale 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】這雙鞋正在特價。

{{tts en_US:saleswoman}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】女售貨員；女業務員
【搭配詞】friendly saleswoman / shop saleswoman / experienced saleswoman
【例句】The saleswoman helped me find my size.
{{tts en_US:The saleswoman helped me find my size.}}
【用法說明】saleswoman 指女性銷售人員
【翻譯】那位女店員幫我找到合適尺寸。

{{tts en_US:salmon}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】鮭魚
【搭配詞】grilled salmon / salmon sushi / fresh salmon
【例句】We had salmon for dinner.
{{tts en_US:We had salmon for dinner.}}
【用法說明】salmon 指鮭魚
【翻譯】我們晚餐吃鮭魚。

{{tts en_US:salon}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】沙龍；美髮店
【搭配詞】hair salon / beauty salon / salon appointment
【例句】She has an appointment at the salon.
{{tts en_US:She has an appointment at the salon.}}
【用法說明】salon 最常指美髮美容店
【翻譯】她在沙龍有預約。

{{tts en_US:salt}}

【翻譯】鹽
【搭配詞】add salt / sea salt / too much salt
【例句】This soup needs a little more salt.
{{tts en_US:This soup needs a little more salt.}}
【用法說明】salt 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】這碗湯還需要再多一點鹽。

{{tts en_US:rise}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】上升；起身；增加
【搭配詞】rise early / prices rise / sun rises
