【用法說明】rise 是高頻動詞與名詞
【翻譯】太陽從東方升起。

{{tts en_US:risk}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】風險；冒險
【搭配詞】take a risk / high risk / risk your life
【例句】It's not worth the risk.
{{tts en_US:It's not worth the risk.}}
【用法說明】risk 是高頻名詞與動詞
【翻譯】這個風險不值得冒。

{{tts en_US:risky}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】有風險的；危險的
【搭配詞】risky move / risky investment / too risky
【例句】It would be risky to wait any longer.
{{tts en_US:It would be risky to wait any longer.}}
【用法說明】risky 指可能帶來危險或損失
【翻譯】再等下去會有風險。

{{tts en_US:ritual}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】儀式；固定習慣
【搭配詞】morning ritual / religious ritual / daily ritual
【例句】Tea time is part of her daily ritual.
{{tts en_US:Tea time is part of her daily ritual.}}
【用法說明】ritual 可指宗教儀式，也可指固定習慣
【翻譯】喝茶時間是她每天固定的儀式感。

{{tts en_US:rival}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】競爭對手；與…競爭
【搭配詞】main rival / rival team / rival company
【例句】The two brands are close rivals.
{{tts en_US:The two brands are close rivals.}}
【用法說明】rival 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】這兩個品牌是勢均力敵的對手。

{{tts en_US:rivalry}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】競爭；對立
【搭配詞】long rivalry / sports rivalry / rivalry between
【例句】There is a long rivalry between the two teams.
{{tts en_US:There is a long rivalry between the two teams.}}
【用法說明】rivalry 指長期競爭關係
【翻譯】這兩支隊伍之間有長久的對立競爭。

{{tts en_US:river}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】河流
【搭配詞】cross a river / river bank / wide river
【例句】We walked along the river.
{{tts en_US:We walked along the river.}}
【用法說明】river 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我們沿著河邊散步。

{{tts en_US:road}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】路；道路
【搭配詞】main road / road trip / cross the road
【例句】The road is very busy today.
{{tts en_US:The road is very busy today.}}
【用法說明】road 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】今天這條路很繁忙。

{{tts en_US:roam}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】漫遊；閒逛
【搭配詞】roam around / roam freely / animals roam
【例句】The cows roamed freely in the field.
{{tts en_US:The cows roamed freely in the field.}}
【用法說明】roam 指沒有固定方向地走動
【翻譯】那些牛在田裡自由走動。

{{tts en_US:roar}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】咆哮；轟鳴
【搭配詞】lion roar / crowd roar / engine roar
【例句】We heard the lion roar.
{{tts en_US:We heard the lion roar.}}
【用法說明】roar 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們聽見獅子咆哮。

{{tts en_US:roast}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】烤；烤肉
【搭配詞】roast chicken / roast in the oven / Sunday roast
【例句】We roasted vegetables for dinner.
{{tts en_US:We roasted vegetables for dinner.}}
【用法說明】roast 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們晚餐烤了蔬菜。

{{tts en_US:rob}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】搶劫；偷走
【搭配詞】rob a bank / rob someone of / be robbed
【例句】A man tried to rob the store.
{{tts en_US:A man tried to rob the store.}}
【用法說明】rob 指搶奪財物
【翻譯】有個人試圖搶那家店。

{{tts en_US:robber}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】強盜；搶匪
【搭配詞】bank robber / masked robber / catch the robber
【例句】The robber ran away before the police arrived.
{{tts en_US:The robber ran away before the police arrived.}}
【用法說明】robber 指搶劫的人
【翻譯】警察到之前那名搶匪就跑了。

{{tts en_US:robbery}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】搶劫案
【搭配詞】bank robbery / armed robbery / report a robbery
【例句】The police are investigating the robbery.
{{tts en_US:The police are investigating the robbery.}}
【用法說明】robbery 指搶劫事件
【翻譯】警方正在調查那起搶劫案。

{{tts en_US:robe}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】長袍；浴袍
【搭配詞】silk robe / bath robe / wear a robe
【例句】He put on a robe after his shower.
{{tts en_US:He put on a robe after his shower.}}
【用法說明】robe 指寬鬆長袍
【翻譯】他洗完澡後穿上了浴袍。

{{tts en_US:robot}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】機器人
【搭配詞】service robot / robot arm / build a robot
【例句】The kids built a small robot.
{{tts en_US:The kids built a small robot.}}
【用法說明】robot 指機器人
【翻譯】孩子們做了一個小機器人。

{{tts en_US:robust}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】強健的；穩固的；強而有力的
【搭配詞】robust system / robust health / robust debate
【例句】We need a more robust plan.
{{tts en_US:We need a more robust plan.}}
【用法說明】robust 指結實可靠、夠強
【翻譯】我們需要一個更穩固的計畫。

{{tts en_US:rock}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】岩石；搖晃；搖滾
【搭配詞】big rock / rock the boat / rock music
【例句】The boat rocked gently in the water.
{{tts en_US:The boat rocked gently in the water.}}
【用法說明】rock 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】船在水面上輕輕搖晃。

{{tts en_US:rocket}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】火箭；迅速上升
【搭配詞】launch a rocket / rocket into space / prices rocket
【例句】The rocket lifted off smoothly.
{{tts en_US:The rocket lifted off smoothly.}}
【用法說明】rocket 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】火箭順利升空了。

{{tts en_US:rocky}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】多岩石的；崎嶇的；不穩的
【搭配詞】rocky road / rocky path / rocky relationship
【例句】The trail was steep and rocky.
{{tts en_US:The trail was steep and rocky.}}
【用法說明】rocky 可指地形崎嶇，也可比喻關係不穩
【翻譯】那條步道陡又多石。

{{tts en_US:rod}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】竿；棒
【搭配詞】fishing rod / metal rod / curtain rod
【例句】He grabbed his fishing rod.
{{tts en_US:He grabbed his fishing rod.}}
【用法說明】rod 指細長的桿狀物
【翻譯】他拿起了釣竿。

{{tts en_US:role}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】角色；作用；職責
【搭配詞】play a role / leadership role / key role
【例句】She played an important role in the project.
{{tts en_US:She played an important role in the project.}}
【用法說明】role 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】她在這個專案中扮演了重要角色。

{{tts en_US:roll}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】滾動；捲；麵包捲
【搭配詞】roll the ball / paper roll / bread roll
【例句】The ball rolled under the table.
{{tts en_US:The ball rolled under the table.}}
【用法說明】roll 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】球滾到桌子底下了。

{{tts en_US:romance}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】愛情；戀愛故事
【搭配詞】office romance / romance novel / short romance
【例句】The movie is a light romance.
{{tts en_US:The movie is a light romance.}}
【用法說明】romance 指浪漫愛情或相關故事
【翻譯】那部電影是一部輕鬆的愛情片。

{{tts en_US:romantic}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】浪漫的；愛情的
【搭配詞】romantic dinner / romantic song / hopelessly romantic
【例句】They had a romantic dinner by the sea.
{{tts en_US:They had a romantic dinner by the sea.}}
【用法說明】romantic 指有浪漫氣氛
【翻譯】他們在海邊吃了一頓浪漫晚餐。

{{tts en_US:roof}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】屋頂
【搭配詞】roof of the house / fix the roof / on the roof
【例句】Rain was dripping from the roof.
{{tts en_US:Rain was dripping from the roof.}}
【用法說明】roof 指屋頂
【翻譯】雨水正從屋頂滴下來。

{{tts en_US:room}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】房間；空間
【搭配詞】living room / make room / room for improvement
【例句】There's no room in the closet.
{{tts en_US:There's no room in the closet.}}
【用法說明】room 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】衣櫃裡沒有空間了。

{{tts en_US:rooster}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】公雞
【搭配詞】farm rooster / crowing rooster / rooster feathers
【例句】The rooster crowed at sunrise.
{{tts en_US:The rooster crowed at sunrise.}}
【用法說明】rooster 指公雞
【翻譯】公雞在日出時啼叫。

{{tts en_US:root}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】根；根源；支持
【搭配詞】tree root / root cause / root for a team
【例句】We need to find the root of the problem.
{{tts en_US:We need to find the root of the problem.}}
【用法說明】root 用法很多，常見是根或根源
【翻譯】我們得找出問題的根源。

{{tts en_US:rope}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】繩子
【搭配詞】jump rope / thick rope / tie with a rope
【例句】He tied the box with a rope.
{{tts en_US:He tied the box with a rope.}}
【用法說明】rope 指繩子
【翻譯】他用繩子把箱子綁起來。

{{tts en_US:rose}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】玫瑰；玫瑰色
【搭配詞】red rose / rose garden / smell a rose
【例句】He gave her a rose.
{{tts en_US:He gave her a rose.}}
【用法說明】rose 最常指玫瑰花
【翻譯】他送了她一朵玫瑰。

{{tts en_US:rot}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】腐爛；腐敗
【搭配詞】food rot / let it rot / wood rot
【例句】The fruit will rot if you leave it outside.
{{tts en_US:The fruit will rot if you leave it outside.}}
【用法說明】rot 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】水果如果放在外面會爛掉。

{{tts en_US:rotate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】旋轉；輪替
【搭配詞】rotate the tires / rotate the image / staff rotate
【例句】Please rotate the picture a little.
{{tts en_US:Please rotate the picture a little.}}
【用法說明】rotate 指轉動或輪流更換
【翻譯】請把這張圖片稍微旋轉一下。

{{tts en_US:rotation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】旋轉；輪替
【搭配詞】earth's rotation / job rotation / in rotation
【例句】The Earth completes one rotation every day.
{{tts en_US:The Earth completes one rotation every day.}}
【用法說明】rotation 指轉動一圈或輪調
【翻譯】地球每天完成一次自轉。

{{tts en_US:rotten}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】腐爛的；糟透的
【搭配詞】rotten fruit / rotten smell / rotten luck
【例句】The tomatoes were rotten.
{{tts en_US:The tomatoes were rotten.}}
【用法說明】rotten 可指真的腐爛，也可比喻很糟
【翻譯】那些番茄都爛掉了。

{{tts en_US:rough}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】粗糙的；艱難的；大概的
【搭配詞】rough surface / rough day / rough estimate
【例句】We had a rough week.
{{tts en_US:We had a rough week.}}
【用法說明】rough 用法很多，常見是艱難或表面粗糙
【翻譯】我們這週過得很辛苦。

{{tts en_US:roughly}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】大約；粗略地；粗暴地
【搭配詞】roughly equal / roughly speaking / handle roughly
【例句】The trip takes roughly two hours.
{{tts en_US:The trip takes roughly two hours.}}
【用法說明】roughly 常表示大約
【翻譯】這趟路大約要兩個小時。

{{tts en_US:round}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】圓的；一輪；繞行
【搭配詞】round table / next round / round and round
【例句】The moon looked big and round.
{{tts en_US:The moon looked big and round.}}
【用法說明】round 可作形容詞、名詞或副詞
【翻譯】月亮看起來又大又圓。

{{tts en_US:route}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】路線；途徑
【搭配詞】bus route / shortest route / route to success
【例句】What's the fastest route home?
{{tts en_US:What's the fastest route home?}}
【用法說明】route 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】回家最快的路線是什麼？

{{tts en_US:routine}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】例行公事；日常作息
【搭配詞】daily routine / morning routine / routine check
【例句】Exercise is part of my routine.
{{tts en_US:Exercise is part of my routine.}}
【用法說明】routine 指固定做的事
【翻譯】運動是我日常作息的一部分。

{{tts en_US:salty}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】鹹的；帶鹽味的
【搭配詞】too salty / salty snack / salty soup
【例句】The soup is a little too salty.
{{tts en_US:The soup is a little too salty.}}
【用法說明】salty 指味道偏鹹
【翻譯】這碗湯有點太鹹了。

{{tts en_US:salute}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】敬禮；致敬
【搭配詞】military salute / salute the flag / salute someone
【例句】The soldiers saluted the officer.
{{tts en_US:The soldiers saluted the officer.}}
【用法說明】salute 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】士兵向那位軍官敬禮。

{{tts en_US:salvage}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】搶救；打撈；可挽回部分
【搭配詞】salvage the project / salvage materials / salvage operation
【例句】They managed to salvage some data.
{{tts en_US:They managed to salvage some data.}}
【用法說明】salvage 指從損壞中搶救出來
【翻譯】他們成功搶救出部分資料。

{{tts en_US:same}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】相同的
【搭配詞】the same thing / same as / stay the same
【例句】We wore the same color.
{{tts en_US:We wore the same color.}}
【用法說明】same 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】我們穿了同樣的顏色。

{{tts en_US:sample}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】樣本；樣品；抽樣
【搭配詞】free sample / blood sample / sample the food
【例句】Would you like a free sample?
{{tts en_US:Would you like a free sample?}}
【用法說明】sample 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】你想要一份免費試吃嗎？

{{tts en_US:sand}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】沙子
【搭配詞】beach sand / fine sand / sand castle
【例句】The children played in the sand.
{{tts en_US:The children played in the sand.}}
【用法說明】sand 指沙子
【翻譯】孩子們在沙裡玩。

{{tts en_US:sandal}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】涼鞋
【搭配詞】leather sandals / wear sandals / pair of sandals
【例句】She wore sandals to the beach.
{{tts en_US:She wore sandals to the beach.}}
【用法說明】sandal 指涼鞋
【翻譯】她穿著涼鞋去海邊。

{{tts en_US:sandwich}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】三明治
【搭配詞】ham sandwich / make a sandwich / sandwich shop
【例句】I had a sandwich for lunch.
{{tts en_US:I had a sandwich for lunch.}}
【用法說明】sandwich 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我午餐吃了三明治。

{{tts en_US:sanitation}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】衛生；環境衛生
【搭配詞】public sanitation / sanitation workers / sanitation problem
【例句】Good sanitation prevents disease.
{{tts en_US:Good sanitation prevents disease.}}
【用法說明】sanitation 指公共與生活衛生條件
【翻譯】良好的衛生能預防疾病。

{{tts en_US:satellite}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】衛星
【搭配詞】weather satellite / satellite image / launch a satellite
【例句】The satellite sent back clear images.
{{tts en_US:The satellite sent back clear images.}}
【用法說明】satellite 指人造或天然衛星
【翻譯】那顆衛星傳回了清楚的影像。

{{tts en_US:satisfaction}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】滿足；滿意
【搭配詞】job satisfaction / sense of satisfaction / with satisfaction
【例句】She smiled with satisfaction.
{{tts en_US:She smiled with satisfaction.}}
【用法說明】satisfaction 指滿意和滿足感
【翻譯】她滿意地笑了。

{{tts en_US:satisfactory}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】令人滿意的
【搭配詞】satisfactory result / satisfactory answer / satisfactory progress
【例句】Your work is satisfactory.
{{tts en_US:Your work is satisfactory.}}
【用法說明】satisfactory 指達到要求、還不錯
【翻譯】你的工作表現令人滿意。

{{tts en_US:satisfy}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】使滿意；滿足
【搭配詞】satisfy a need / satisfy customers / satisfy the conditions
【例句】The meal satisfied my hunger.
{{tts en_US:The meal satisfied my hunger.}}
【用法說明】satisfy 指滿足需求或讓人滿意
【翻譯】這頓飯讓我不餓了。

{{tts en_US:sauce}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】醬汁
【搭配詞】tomato sauce / soy sauce / pasta sauce
【例句】Add some sauce to the noodles.
{{tts en_US:Add some sauce to the noodles.}}
【用法說明】sauce 指各種醬汁
【翻譯】在麵上加點醬。

{{tts en_US:saucer}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】茶碟；小碟子
【搭配詞】cup and saucer / small saucer / on the saucer
【例句】She put the cup on the saucer.
{{tts en_US:She put the cup on the saucer.}}
【用法說明】saucer 指茶杯下面的小碟子
【翻譯】她把杯子放在茶碟上。

{{tts en_US:sausage}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】香腸
【搭配詞】pork sausage / sausage roll / grilled sausage
【例句】We grilled sausages for dinner.
{{tts en_US:We grilled sausages for dinner.}}
【用法說明】sausage 指香腸
【翻譯】我們晚餐烤了香腸。

{{tts en_US:The hunter carried a spear.}}
【用法說明】spear 指長矛
【翻譯】那位獵人拿著一支矛。

{{tts en_US:special}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】特別的；專門的
【搭配詞】special day / special menu / feel special
【例句】Today is a special day for us.
{{tts en_US:Today is a special day for us.}}
【用法說明】special 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】今天對我們來說是很特別的一天。

{{tts en_US:specialist}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】專家；專科醫師
【搭配詞】medical specialist / language specialist / see a specialist
【例句】You should see a specialist.
{{tts en_US:You should see a specialist.}}
【用法說明】specialist 指某方面的專家
【翻譯】你應該去看專科醫師。

{{tts en_US:specialize}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】專攻；專門從事
【搭配詞】specialize in / specialize as / highly specialized
【例句】The company specializes in design.
{{tts en_US:The company specializes in design.}}
【用法說明】specialize in 是固定搭配
【翻譯】那家公司專門做設計。

{{tts en_US:specialty}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】專長；特色產品
【搭配詞】house specialty / local specialty / area of specialty
【例句】Seafood is the restaurant's specialty.
{{tts en_US:Seafood is the restaurant's specialty.}}
【用法說明】specialty 指拿手項目或特產
【翻譯】海鮮是那家餐廳的招牌。

{{tts en_US:species}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】物種；種類
【搭配詞】endangered species / animal species / new species
【例句】This forest is home to many rare species.
{{tts en_US:This forest is home to many rare species.}}
【用法說明】species 單複數同形
【翻譯】這座森林是許多稀有物種的棲地。

{{tts en_US:specific}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】具體的；特定的
【搭配詞】specific reason / specific example / be specific
【例句】Could you be more specific?
{{tts en_US:Could you be more specific?}}
【用法說明】specific 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】你可以講得更具體一點嗎？

{{tts en_US:specify}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】明確說明；指定
【搭配詞】specify the details / specify that / clearly specify
【例句】Please specify your size on the form.
{{tts en_US:Please specify your size on the form.}}
【用法說明】specify 指講清楚、指定
【翻譯】請在表格上註明你的尺寸。

{{tts en_US:specimen}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】樣本；標本
【搭配詞】blood specimen / plant specimen / collect a specimen
【例句】The lab tested the specimen.
{{tts en_US:The lab tested the specimen.}}
【用法說明】specimen 指供檢查研究的樣本
【翻譯】實驗室檢測了那個樣本。

{{tts en_US:spectacle}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】景象；眼鏡（舊/英）
【搭配詞】spectacular spectacle / public spectacle / pair of spectacles
【例句】The fireworks were a beautiful spectacle.
{{tts en_US:The fireworks were a beautiful spectacle.}}
【用法說明】spectacle 指引人注目的景象
【翻譯】那場煙火是一幅很美的景象。

{{tts en_US:spectacular}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】壯觀的；驚人的
【搭配詞】spectacular view / spectacular success / look spectacular
【例句】The sunset was spectacular.
{{tts en_US:The sunset was spectacular.}}
【用法說明】spectacular 指非常壯觀或厲害
【翻譯】那片夕陽很壯觀。

{{tts en_US:spectator}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】觀眾
【搭配詞】sports spectator / spectator seat / excited spectators
【例句】Thousands of spectators watched the game.
{{tts en_US:Thousands of spectators watched the game.}}
【用法說明】spectator 指現場觀看的人
【翻譯】成千上萬的觀眾看了那場比賽。

{{tts en_US:spectrum}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】範圍；光譜
【搭配詞】wide spectrum / color spectrum / on the spectrum
【例句】The program covers a broad spectrum of topics.
{{tts en_US:The program covers a broad spectrum of topics.}}
【用法說明】spectrum 指連續範圍
【翻譯】這個節目涵蓋很廣泛的主題。

{{tts en_US:speculate}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】推測；猜測；投機
【搭配詞】speculate about / speculate that / speculate in stocks
【例句】People began to speculate about the cause.
{{tts en_US:People began to speculate about the cause.}}
【用法說明】speculate 指沒有確證下推測
【翻譯】人們開始猜測原因。

{{tts en_US:speech}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】演講；說話；言語
【搭配詞】give a speech / speech contest / freedom of speech
【例句】She gave a short speech at the ceremony.
{{tts en_US:She gave a short speech at the ceremony.}}
【用法說明】speech 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】她在典禮上做了簡短演講。

{{tts en_US:speed}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】速度；加速
【搭配詞】high speed / speed limit / speed up
【例句】The car was traveling at high speed.
{{tts en_US:The car was traveling at high speed.}}
【用法說明】speed 是高頻名詞與動詞
【翻譯】那輛車正高速行駛。

{{tts en_US:spell}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】拼字；咒語；一段時間
【搭配詞】spell a word / magic spell / a cold spell
【例句】Can you spell your name?
{{tts en_US:Can you spell your name?}}
【用法說明】spell 用法很多，常見是拼字
【翻譯】你可以拼一下你的名字嗎？

{{tts en_US:spelling}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】拼字；拼法
【搭配詞】correct spelling / spelling mistake / spelling test
【例句】Her spelling has improved a lot.
{{tts en_US:Her spelling has improved a lot.}}
【用法說明】spelling 指單字拼法
【翻譯】她的拼字進步很多。

{{tts en_US:spend}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】花費；度過
【搭配詞】spend money / spend time / spend the weekend
【例句】I spent the afternoon reading.
{{tts en_US:I spent the afternoon reading.}}
【用法說明】spend 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】我花了一整個下午看書。

{{tts en_US:sphere}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】球體；領域；範圍
【搭配詞】sphere of influence / glass sphere / public sphere
【例句】Education is one important sphere of life.
{{tts en_US:Education is one important sphere of life.}}
【用法說明】sphere 可指球體，也可比喻領域
【翻譯】教育是人生中一個重要領域。

{{tts en_US:spice}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】香料；增添趣味
【搭配詞】add spice / spice market / spice up
【例句】This dish has too much spice.
{{tts en_US:This dish has too much spice.}}
【用法說明】spice 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】這道菜香料放太多了。

{{tts en_US:spicy}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】辣的；辛香的
【搭配詞】spicy noodles / spicy food / too spicy
【例句】This curry is very spicy.
{{tts en_US:This curry is very spicy.}}
【用法說明】spicy 指帶辣味
【翻譯】這份咖哩很辣。

{{tts en_US:spider}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】蜘蛛
【搭配詞】big spider / spider web / pet spider
【例句】There was a spider in the bathroom.
{{tts en_US:There was a spider in the bathroom.}}
【用法說明】spider 指蜘蛛
【翻譯】浴室裡有一隻蜘蛛。

{{tts en_US:spill}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】灑出；灑落
【搭配詞】spill the water / spill coffee / oil spill
【例句】I accidentally spilled my drink.
{{tts en_US:I accidentally spilled my drink.}}
【用法說明】spill 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我不小心把飲料灑了。

{{tts en_US:spin}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】旋轉；紡紗；快速轉身
【搭配詞】spin around / spin the wheel / spin in circles
【例句】The fan blades spin quickly.
{{tts en_US:The fan blades spin quickly.}}
【用法說明】spin 指快速旋轉
【翻譯】電風扇葉片轉得很快。

{{tts en_US:spinach}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】菠菜
【搭配詞】fresh spinach / spinach soup / cook spinach
【例句】She added spinach to the soup.
{{tts en_US:She added spinach to the soup.}}
【用法說明】spinach 指菠菜
【翻譯】她在湯裡加了菠菜。

{{tts en_US:spine}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】脊椎；書脊
【搭配詞】hurt your spine / spine of the book / straight spine
【例句】The doctor checked his spine.
{{tts en_US:The doctor checked his spine.}}
【用法說明】spine 指脊椎，也可指書脊
【翻譯】醫生檢查了他的脊椎。

{{tts en_US:spiral}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】螺旋形的；盤旋上升；螺旋
【搭配詞】spiral stairs / spiral notebook / spiral upward
【例句】Smoke spiraled into the air.
{{tts en_US:Smoke spiraled into the air.}}
【用法說明】spiral 可作名詞、形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】煙霧盤旋升上空中。

{{tts en_US:spirit}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】精神；靈魂；烈酒
【搭配詞】team spirit / in spirit / free spirit
【例句】The team showed great spirit.
{{tts en_US:The team showed great spirit.}}
【用法說明】spirit 用法很多，常見是精神狀態
【翻譯】這支隊伍展現了很棒的精神。

{{tts en_US:spiritual}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】精神上的；心靈的；宗教的
【搭配詞】spiritual growth / spiritual life / spiritual practice
【例句】She is interested in spiritual practice.
{{tts en_US:She is interested in spiritual practice.}}
【用法說明】spiritual 指心靈或宗教層面
【翻譯】她對心靈修行很有興趣。

{{tts en_US:spit}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】吐口水；吐出
【搭配詞】spit it out / spit on the ground / spit a seed
【例句】The child spit out the medicine.
{{tts en_US:The child spit out the medicine.}}
【用法說明】spit 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那個孩子把藥吐了出來。

{{tts en_US:spite}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】惡意；怨恨
【搭配詞】out of spite / in spite of / despite the spite
【例句】He said it out of spite.
{{tts en_US:He said it out of spite.}}
【用法說明】spite 指帶著惡意
【翻譯】他那樣說是出於惡意。

{{tts en_US:splash}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】潑濺；水花
【搭配詞】splash water / make a splash / big splash
【例句】The kids splashed in the pool.
{{tts en_US:The kids splashed in the pool.}}
【用法說明】splash 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】孩子們在泳池裡玩水花。

{{tts en_US:splendid}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】極好的；華麗的
【搭配詞】splendid view / splendid job / look splendid
【例句】You did a splendid job.
{{tts en_US:You did a splendid job.}}
【用法說明】splendid 指非常棒
【翻譯】你做得非常好。

{{tts en_US:splendor}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】壯麗；輝煌
【搭配詞】in all its splendor / royal splendor / natural splendor
【例句】The palace shone in all its splendor.
{{tts en_US:The palace shone in all its splendor.}}
【用法說明】splendor 指壯觀華麗的美
【翻譯】那座宮殿展現出極致的輝煌。

{{tts en_US:split}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】分開；分裂；裂口
【搭配詞】split into / split the bill / a split in the wood
【例句】Let's split the cost.
{{tts en_US:Let's split the cost.}}
【用法說明】split 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們來分攤費用吧。

{{tts en_US:spoil}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】寵壞；破壞；變質
【搭配詞】spoil a child / spoil the surprise / food spoils
【例句】Don't let the rain spoil the trip.
{{tts en_US:Don't let the rain spoil the trip.}}
【用法說明】spoil 用法很多，常見是搞砸
【翻譯】別讓雨把這趟旅行搞砸了。

{{tts en_US:spokeswoman}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】女發言人
【搭配詞】company spokeswoman / official spokeswoman / spokeswoman said
【例句】The spokeswoman answered reporters' questions.
{{tts en_US:The spokeswoman answered reporters' questions.}}
【用法說明】spokeswoman 指女性發言代表
【翻譯】那位女發言人回答了記者提問。

{{tts en_US:sponge}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】海綿
【搭配詞】kitchen sponge / soft sponge / soak with a sponge
【例句】Use a sponge to clean the sink.
{{tts en_US:Use a sponge to clean the sink.}}
【用法說明】sponge 指海綿
【翻譯】用海綿把水槽擦乾淨。

{{tts en_US:sponsor}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】贊助者；贊助
【搭配詞】event sponsor / sponsor a team / main sponsor
【例句】A local company agreed to sponsor the event.
{{tts en_US:A local company agreed to sponsor the event.}}
【用法說明】sponsor 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】一家本地公司同意贊助這場活動。

{{tts en_US:sponsorship}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】贊助；資助
【搭配詞】corporate sponsorship / seek sponsorship / sponsorship deal
【例句】The program depends on sponsorship.
{{tts en_US:The program depends on sponsorship.}}
【用法說明】sponsorship 指贊助關係或資金
【翻譯】這個計畫仰賴贊助。

{{tts en_US:spontaneous}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】自發的；即興的
【搭配詞】spontaneous reaction / spontaneous trip / be spontaneous
【例句】It was a spontaneous decision.
{{tts en_US:It was a spontaneous decision.}}
【用法說明】spontaneous 指沒有事先安排
【翻譯】那是個臨時起意的決定。

{{tts en_US:spoon}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】湯匙
【搭配詞】wooden spoon / spoonful of sugar / use a spoon
【例句】Can I have a spoon?
{{tts en_US:Can I have a spoon?}}
【用法說明】spoon 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我可以拿一支湯匙嗎？

{{tts en_US:sport}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】運動；體育
【搭配詞】play sport / winter sport / sport event
【例句】Basketball is my favorite sport.
{{tts en_US:Basketball is my favorite sport.}}
【用法說明】sport 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】籃球是我最喜歡的運動。

{{tts en_US:n}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】字母 n
【搭配詞】capital N / lowercase n / letter n
【例句】The word 'north' starts with n.
{{tts en_US:The word 'north' starts with n.}}
【用法說明】這個詞條看起來像是資料中的單字母項目
【翻譯】north 這個字是以 n 開頭的。

{{tts en_US:sportsmanship}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】運動精神
【搭配詞】good sportsmanship / show sportsmanship / poor sportsmanship
【例句】Win or lose, good sportsmanship matters.
{{tts en_US:Win or lose, good sportsmanship matters.}}
【用法說明】sportsmanship 指比賽中的風度與公平態度
【翻譯】不論輸贏，良好的運動精神都很重要。

{{tts en_US:spot}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】地點；斑點；發現
【搭配詞】parking spot / dark spot / spot a mistake
【例句】This is a good spot for a picnic.
{{tts en_US:This is a good spot for a picnic.}}
【用法說明】spot 用法很多，常見是地點
【翻譯】這裡是野餐的好地方。

{{tts en_US:spotlight}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】聚光燈；焦點
【搭配詞】in the spotlight / media spotlight / spotlight on
【例句】The singer stepped into the spotlight.
{{tts en_US:The singer stepped into the spotlight.}}
【用法說明】spotlight 可指實體聚光燈或眾人關注
【翻譯】那位歌手走進了聚光燈下。

{{tts en_US:spouse}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】配偶
【搭配詞】former spouse / spouse visa / talk to your spouse
【例句】She brought her spouse to the dinner.
{{tts en_US:She brought her spouse to the dinner.}}
【用法說明】spouse 是較正式的『配偶』
【翻譯】她帶著配偶來參加晚宴。

{{tts en_US:spray}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】噴霧；噴灑
【搭配詞】hair spray / spray paint / spray water
【例句】Please spray some water on the plant.
{{tts en_US:Please spray some water on the plant.}}
【用法說明】spray 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】請在植物上噴一點水。

{{tts en_US:spread}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】展開；傳播；塗抹
【搭配詞】spread out / spread a rumor / spread butter
【例句】News spread quickly online.
{{tts en_US:News spread quickly online.}}
【用法說明】spread 是高頻動詞與名詞
【翻譯】消息很快就在網路上傳開了。

{{tts en_US:spring}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】春天；彈簧；跳起
【搭配詞】spring break / hot spring / spring from bed
【例句】Flowers bloom in spring.
{{tts en_US:Flowers bloom in spring.}}
【用法說明】spring 用法很多，常見是春天
【翻譯】花會在春天開。

{{tts en_US:sprinkle}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】灑；撒；少量
【搭配詞】sprinkle sugar / sprinkle water / a sprinkle of salt
【例句】She sprinkled cheese on the pasta.
{{tts en_US:She sprinkled cheese on the pasta.}}
【用法說明】sprinkle 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她在義大利麵上灑了起司。

{{tts en_US:spur}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】刺激；激勵；馬刺
【搭配詞】spur growth / spur someone on / a spur to action
【例句】The success spurred them on.
{{tts en_US:The success spurred them on.}}

{{tts en_US:staff}}

【翻譯】受苦；遭受

【翻譯】他飽受背痛之苦。

{{tts en_US:sufficient}}

{{tts en_US:suffocate}}

【翻譯】那陣煙差點讓他窒息。

{{tts en_US:sugar}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】糖
【搭配詞】add sugar / spoonful of sugar / sugar level
【例句】Do you take sugar in your coffee?
{{tts en_US:Do you take sugar in your coffee?}}
【用法說明】sugar 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】你的咖啡要加糖嗎？

{{tts en_US:suggest}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】建議；暗示
【搭配詞】suggest a plan / suggest that / highly suggest
【例句】I suggest taking the earlier train.

【用法說明】suggest 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】我建議搭早一點的火車。

{{tts en_US:suggestion}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】建議
【搭配詞】helpful suggestion / make a suggestion / take someone's suggestion
【例句】Thanks for your suggestion.
{{tts en_US:Thanks for your suggestion.}}
【用法說明】suggestion 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】謝謝你的建議。

{{tts en_US:suicide}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】自殺

【用法說明】suicide 是敏感但常見字彙

{{tts en_US:suit}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】西裝；適合；訴訟
【搭配詞】business suit / suit you / file a suit
【例句】Blue really suits you.
{{tts en_US:Blue really suits you.}}
【用法說明】suit 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】藍色真的很適合你。

{{tts en_US:suitable}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】合適的
【搭配詞】suitable for / suitable candidate / suitable clothing
【例句】This movie isn't suitable for children.
{{tts en_US:This movie isn't suitable for children.}}
【用法說明】suitable for 是常見搭配
【翻譯】這部電影不適合小孩看。

{{tts en_US:suitcase}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】行李箱
【搭配詞】pack a suitcase / heavy suitcase / suitcase wheel
【例句】She packed her suitcase last night.
{{tts en_US:She packed her suitcase last night.}}
【用法說明】suitcase 指旅行箱
【翻譯】她昨晚把行李箱收好了。

{{tts en_US:suite}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】套房；一組；組曲
【搭配詞】hotel suite / software suite / executive suite
【例句】They stayed in a hotel suite.
{{tts en_US:They stayed in a hotel suite.}}
【用法說明】suite 常見於飯店套房
【翻譯】他們住在一間飯店套房。

{{tts en_US:sum}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】總數；總結
【搭配詞】sum up / large sum / sum of money
【例句】The sum of the numbers is fifty.
{{tts en_US:The sum of the numbers is fifty.}}
【用法說明】sum 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】這些數字的總和是五十。

{{tts en_US:summarize}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】總結；摘要
【搭配詞】summarize the article / briefly summarize / summarize the key points
【例句】Can you summarize the report for me?
{{tts en_US:Can you summarize the report for me?}}
【用法說明】summarize 指濃縮重點
【翻譯】你可以幫我總結一下這份報告嗎？

{{tts en_US:summary}}

【翻譯】摘要；總結
【搭配詞】short summary / executive summary / write a summary
【例句】Please write a short summary.
{{tts en_US:Please write a short summary.}}
【用法說明】summary 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】請寫一段簡短摘要。

{{tts en_US:summit}}

【翻譯】山頂；高峰會
【搭配詞】mountain summit / summit meeting / reach the summit

{{tts en_US:summon}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】召喚；召集；鼓起
【搭配詞】summon help / summon the team / summon courage
【例句】She summoned the courage to speak.
{{tts en_US:She summoned the courage to speak.}}
【用法說明】summon 指叫來或鼓起某種力量
【翻譯】她鼓起勇氣發言。

{{tts en_US:sun}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】太陽
【搭配詞】hot sun / sun rise / in the sun

{{tts en_US:The sun was shining brightly.}}
【用法說明】sun 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】太陽正閃亮地照著。

{{tts en_US:sunny}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】晴朗的；陽光充足的
【搭配詞】sunny day / sunny weather / sunny room
【例句】It's a warm sunny day.
{{tts en_US:It's a warm sunny day.}}
【用法說明】sunny 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】今天是個溫暖的晴天。

{{tts en_US:super}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】超棒的；超級；非常
【搭配詞】super fun / super cute / feel super tired
【例句】The concert was super fun.
{{tts en_US:The concert was super fun.}}
【用法說明】super 很口語，常當加強語氣
【翻譯】那場演唱會超好玩。

{{tts en_US:superb}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】極好的；出色的
【搭配詞】superb job / superb view / superb performance
【例句】You did a superb job.
{{tts en_US:You did a superb job.}}
【用法說明】superb 指表現非常優秀
【翻譯】你做得非常出色。

{{tts en_US:superficial}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】表面的；膚淺的
【搭配詞】superficial damage / superficial wound / superficial view
【例句】The problem is more than superficial.
{{tts en_US:The problem is more than superficial.}}
【用法說明】superficial 指只停留在表面
【翻譯】這個問題不只是表面現象。

{{tts en_US:superintendent}}

【翻譯】主管；監督；教育局長
【搭配詞】school superintendent / building superintendent / police superintendent
【例句】The superintendent visited the school.

{{tts en_US:superior}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】較好的；上級的；優於
【搭配詞】superior quality / immediate superior / superior to
【例句】This model is superior to the older one.
{{tts en_US:This model is superior to the older one.}}
【用法說明】superior 可作形容詞或名詞
【翻譯】這個型號比舊款更好。

{{tts en_US:superiority}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】優越；優勢
【搭配詞】sense of superiority / air superiority / superiority over
【例句】He spoke with a sense of superiority.
{{tts en_US:He spoke with a sense of superiority.}}
【用法說明】superiority 指優越感或優勢地位
【翻譯】他說話時帶著一種優越感。

{{tts en_US:supermarket}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】超市
【搭配詞】go to the supermarket / local supermarket / supermarket cart
【例句】I'm going to the supermarket after work.
{{tts en_US:I'm going to the supermarket after work.}}

【翻譯】我下班後要去超市。

{{tts en_US:superstition}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】迷信
【搭配詞】old superstition / local superstition / belief in superstition

【用法說明】superstition 指沒有根據的迷信信念

{{tts en_US:superstitious}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】迷信的
【搭配詞】superstitious belief / be superstitious / very superstitious

{{tts en_US:My grandma is a little superstitious.}}

【翻譯】我奶奶有一點迷信。

{{tts en_US:supervise}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】監督；管理
【搭配詞】supervise the team / supervise workers / closely supervise
【例句】She supervises three interns.
{{tts en_US:She supervises three interns.}}
【用法說明】supervise 指負責看管與指導

{{tts en_US:supervision}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】監督；管理
【搭配詞】under supervision / close supervision / parental supervision
【例句】The children need adult supervision.
{{tts en_US:The children need adult supervision.}}
【用法說明】supervision 指有人在旁看顧
【翻譯】孩子們需要大人看顧。

{{tts en_US:supervisor}}

【翻譯】主管；監督者
【搭配詞】my supervisor / shift supervisor / talk to the supervisor
【例句】Please speak to your supervisor first.
{{tts en_US:Please speak to your supervisor first.}}

{{tts en_US:supper}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】晚餐
【搭配詞】eat supper / family supper / simple supper
【例句】We had a light supper.
{{tts en_US:We had a light supper.}}

{{tts en_US:supplement}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】補充；補充品
【搭配詞】vitamin supplement / supplement your income / useful supplement
【例句】She takes a calcium supplement.
{{tts en_US:She takes a calcium supplement.}}

【翻譯】她有在吃鈣片補充品。

{{tts en_US:supply}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】供應；提供；用品

{{tts en_US:support}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】支持；支撐；幫助
【搭配詞】emotional support / support a friend / customer support
【例句】Thanks for your support.
{{tts en_US:Thanks for your support.}}

【翻譯】謝謝你的支持。

{{tts en_US:suppose}}

【翻譯】假設；認為
【搭配詞】suppose that / be supposed to / I suppose
【例句】I suppose you're right.
{{tts en_US:I suppose you're right.}}

{{tts en_US:supposedly}}

【翻譯】據說；據信

{{tts en_US:supreme}}

【翻譯】最高的；至上的
【搭配詞】supreme court / supreme importance / supreme power

{{tts en_US:sure}}

【翻譯】確定的；一定的；當然

【例句】Are you sure about that?
{{tts en_US:Are you sure about that?}}

{{tts en_US:surf}}

【例句】He wants to learn to surf.
{{tts en_US:He wants to learn to surf.}}

【翻譯】他想學衝浪。

{{tts en_US:surface}}

【翻譯】表面；浮出；顯露
【搭配詞】surface of the water / smooth surface / rise to the surface
【例句】The table has a smooth surface.
{{tts en_US:The table has a smooth surface.}}

【翻譯】這張桌子的表面很平滑。

{{tts en_US:surge}}

【翻譯】激增；湧動
【搭配詞】surge in prices / energy surge / sudden surge

{{tts en_US:surgeon}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】外科醫師
【搭配詞】heart surgeon / plastic surgeon / skilled surgeon
【例句】The surgeon explained the procedure.
{{tts en_US:The surgeon explained the procedure.}}

{{tts en_US:surgery}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】手術；外科；診所
【搭配詞】have surgery / heart surgery / doctor's surgery

{{tts en_US:She needs knee surgery.}}

{{tts en_US:surgical}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】手術的；外科的
【搭配詞】surgical mask / surgical tool / surgical procedure
【例句】He wore a surgical mask.
{{tts en_US:He wore a surgical mask.}}
【用法說明】surgical 指和手術或外科有關
【翻譯】他戴著外科口罩。

{{tts en_US:surname}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】姓氏
【搭配詞】family surname / your surname / common surname
【例句】Please write your surname here.
{{tts en_US:Please write your surname here.}}

【翻譯】請在這裡寫上你的姓氏。

{{tts en_US:surpass}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】超越
【搭配詞】surpass expectations / surpass the record / surpass others
【例句】Her performance surpassed expectations.
{{tts en_US:Her performance surpassed expectations.}}

{{tts en_US:surplus}}

【翻譯】剩餘；過剩；盈餘

【例句】The factory has a surplus of goods.

{{tts en_US:surprise}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】驚喜；使驚訝
【搭配詞】birthday surprise / surprise someone / in surprise
【例句】Your call was a nice surprise.
{{tts en_US:Your call was a nice surprise.}}

【翻譯】你的來電是個驚喜。

{{tts en_US:surprised}}

【翻譯】驚訝的
【搭配詞】feel surprised / surprised by / look surprised
【例句】I was surprised by the news.
{{tts en_US:I was surprised by the news.}}

{{tts en_US:surrender}}

【翻譯】投降；交出
【搭配詞】surrender to / surrender your weapon / full surrender
【例句】The soldiers refused to surrender.

【翻譯】那些士兵拒絕投降。

{{tts en_US:surround}}

{{tts en_US:surroundings}}

【翻譯】周圍環境
【搭配詞】natural surroundings / peaceful surroundings / be aware of your surroundings

{{tts en_US:surveillance}}

【翻譯】監視；監控
【搭配詞】video surveillance / under surveillance / surveillance camera

{{tts en_US:survey}}

【翻譯】調查；問卷；勘查

{{tts en_US:survival}}

【翻譯】生存；存活
【搭配詞】fight for survival / survival skills / survival rate
【例句】Clean water is essential for survival.
{{tts en_US:Clean water is essential for survival.}}
【用法說明】survival 指活下去的狀態
【翻譯】乾淨的水對生存至關重要。

{{tts en_US:survive}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】生存；倖存；撐過
【搭配詞】survive the accident / survive on little money / survive winter
【例句】She survived the earthquake.
{{tts en_US:She survived the earthquake.}}
【用法說明】survive 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】她在那場地震中活了下來。

{{tts en_US:survivor}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】倖存者
【搭配詞】earthquake survivor / cancer survivor / only survivor
【例句】The survivor was taken to safety.
{{tts en_US:The survivor was taken to safety.}}
【用法說明】survivor 指活下來的人
【翻譯】那位倖存者被帶到安全地方。

{{tts en_US:suspect}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】懷疑；嫌疑犯
【搭配詞】suspect that / chief suspect / be suspected of
【例句】Police arrested the main suspect.
{{tts en_US:Police arrested the main suspect.}}
【用法說明】suspect 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】警方逮捕了主要嫌疑犯。

{{tts en_US:suspend}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】暫停；懸掛；停學
【搭配詞】suspend the service / suspend a student / suspend from the ceiling
【例句】The school suspended him for fighting.
{{tts en_US:The school suspended him for fighting.}}
【用法說明】suspend 指暫時中止
【翻譯】學校因打架暫時停了他的學。

{{tts en_US:suspense}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】懸念；緊張感
【搭配詞】build suspense / full of suspense / suspense movie
【例句】The movie kept us in suspense.
{{tts en_US:The movie kept us in suspense.}}
【用法說明】suspense 指讓人緊張想知道後續
【翻譯】那部電影一直讓我們緊張兮兮。

{{tts en_US:suspension}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】暫停；懸掛；停學處分
【搭配詞】bridge suspension / suspension from school / temporary suspension
【例句】He received a three-day suspension.
{{tts en_US:He received a three-day suspension.}}
【用法說明】suspension 指被暫停資格或功能
【翻譯】他被處以三天停學。

{{tts en_US:suspicion}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】懷疑；嫌疑
【搭配詞】raise suspicion / under suspicion / growing suspicion
【例句】Her behavior raised suspicion.
{{tts en_US:Her behavior raised suspicion.}}
【用法說明】suspicion 指覺得可疑
【翻譯】她的行為引起了懷疑。

{{tts en_US:suspicious}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】可疑的；多疑的
【搭配詞】suspicious activity / suspicious person / seem suspicious
【例句】The police noticed a suspicious car.
{{tts en_US:The police noticed a suspicious car.}}
【用法說明】suspicious 指看起來有問題
【翻譯】警方注意到一輛可疑的車。

{{tts en_US:sustain}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】維持；承受；支撐
【搭配詞】sustain growth / sustain damage / sustain life
【例句】The team struggled to sustain its momentum.
{{tts en_US:The team struggled to sustain its momentum.}}
【用法說明】sustain 指讓某狀態持續
【翻譯】那支隊伍努力維持自己的氣勢。

{{tts en_US:sustainable}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】可持續的；永續的
【搭配詞】sustainable energy / sustainable future / sustainable design
【例句】We need more sustainable solutions.
{{tts en_US:We need more sustainable solutions.}}
【用法說明】sustainable 指能長久維持而不耗盡資源
【翻譯】我們需要更永續的解方。

{{tts en_US:swallow}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】吞下；燕子
【搭配詞】swallow the pill / swallow hard / barn swallow
【例句】She swallowed the medicine with water.
{{tts en_US:She swallowed the medicine with water.}}
【用法說明】swallow 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她配水把藥吞了下去。

{{tts en_US:swamp}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】沼澤；使應接不暇
【搭配詞】tropical swamp / be swamped with work / swamp water
【例句】I'm swamped with emails today.
{{tts en_US:I'm swamped with emails today.}}
【用法說明】swamp 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我今天被 email 淹沒了。

{{tts en_US:swan}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】天鵝
【搭配詞】white swan / swan lake / graceful swan
【例句】A swan floated across the lake.
{{tts en_US:A swan floated across the lake.}}
【用法說明】swan 指天鵝
【翻譯】一隻天鵝漂過湖面。

{{tts en_US:swap}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】交換；對調
【搭配詞】swap seats / swap ideas / card swap
【例句】Can we swap seats?
{{tts en_US:Can we swap seats?}}
【用法說明】swap 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們可以交換座位嗎？

{{tts en_US:swarm}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】一大群；蜂擁而上
【搭配詞】swarm of bees / swarm into / tourist swarm
【例句】A swarm of bees flew by.
{{tts en_US:A swarm of bees flew by.}}
【用法說明】swarm 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】一大群蜜蜂飛了過去。

{{tts en_US:sway}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】搖晃；影響
【搭配詞】trees sway / sway public opinion / gentle sway
【例句】The branches swayed in the wind.
{{tts en_US:The branches swayed in the wind.}}
【用法說明】sway 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】樹枝在風中搖晃。

{{tts en_US:swear}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】發誓；罵髒話
【搭配詞】swear to / swear that / stop swearing
【例句】I swear I told the truth.
{{tts en_US:I swear I told the truth.}}
【用法說明】swear 用法很多，常見是發誓
【翻譯】我發誓我說的是實話。

{{tts en_US:sweat}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】汗；流汗
【搭配詞】break into a sweat / sweat a lot / wipe the sweat
【例句】I was sweating after the run.
{{tts en_US:I was sweating after the run.}}
【用法說明】sweat 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】跑完步後我滿身是汗。

{{tts en_US:sweater}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】毛衣
【搭配詞】wool sweater / warm sweater / blue sweater
【例句】She wore a thick sweater.
{{tts en_US:She wore a thick sweater.}}
【用法說明】sweater 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】她穿著一件厚毛衣。

{{tts en_US:sweep}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】打掃；掃過；席捲
【搭配詞】sweep the floor / sweep across / broad sweep
【例句】Please sweep the kitchen floor.
{{tts en_US:Please sweep the kitchen floor.}}
【用法說明】sweep 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】請把廚房地板掃一掃。

{{tts en_US:sweet}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】甜的；可愛的；貼心的
【搭配詞】sweet cake / sweet smile / that's sweet
【例句】This tea is too sweet for me.
{{tts en_US:This tea is too sweet for me.}}
【用法說明】sweet 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】這杯茶對我來說太甜了。

{{tts en_US:swell}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】腫起來；膨脹；很棒（舊用法）
【搭配詞】ankle swell / swell up / ocean swell
【例句】My foot started to swell.
{{tts en_US:My foot started to swell.}}
【用法說明】swell 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我的腳開始腫起來了。

{{tts en_US:swift}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】迅速的；敏捷的
【搭配詞】swift action / swift response / swift movement
【例句】The doctor took swift action.
{{tts en_US:The doctor took swift action.}}
【用法說明】swift 指動作或反應很快
【翻譯】醫生迅速採取了行動。

{{tts en_US:swim}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】游泳
【搭配詞】go swimming / swim across / learn to swim
【例句】The kids love to swim in summer.
{{tts en_US:The kids love to swim in summer.}}
【用法說明】swim 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】孩子們夏天很愛游泳。

{{tts en_US:swimsuit}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】泳裝
【搭配詞】one-piece swimsuit / new swimsuit / wear a swimsuit
【例句】She bought a new swimsuit for the trip.
{{tts en_US:She bought a new swimsuit for the trip.}}
【用法說明】swimsuit 指泳衣泳褲
【翻譯】她為了旅行買了一套新泳裝。

{{tts en_US:swing}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】搖擺；鞦韆；揮動
【搭配詞】swing the bat / playground swing / swing open
【例句】The child sat on the swing.
{{tts en_US:The child sat on the swing.}}
【用法說明】swing 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那個孩子坐在鞦韆上。

{{tts en_US:switch}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】開關；切換；交換
【搭配詞】light switch / switch off / switch places
【例句】Please switch off the light.
{{tts en_US:Please switch off the light.}}
【用法說明】switch 是高頻名詞與動詞
【翻譯】請把燈關掉。

{{tts en_US:sword}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】劍
【搭配詞】sharp sword / draw a sword / wooden sword
【例句】The knight carried a sword.
{{tts en_US:The knight carried a sword.}}
【用法說明】sword 指劍
【翻譯】那位騎士帶著一把劍。

{{tts en_US:syllable}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】音節
【搭配詞】two syllables / stress the first syllable / syllable count
【例句】The word has three syllables.
{{tts en_US:The word has three syllables.}}
【用法說明】syllable 指音節
【翻譯】這個字有三個音節。

{{tts en_US:symbol}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】象徵；符號
【搭配詞】national symbol / symbol of peace / math symbol
【例句】The dove is a symbol of peace.
{{tts en_US:The dove is a symbol of peace.}}
【用法說明】symbol 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】鴿子是和平的象徵。

{{tts en_US:symbolic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】象徵性的
【搭配詞】symbolic meaning / symbolic gesture / symbolic value
【例句】The gift was small but symbolic.
{{tts en_US:The gift was small but symbolic.}}
【用法說明】symbolic 指有象徵意義
【翻譯】那份禮物雖小，卻很有象徵意義。

{{tts en_US:symbolize}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】象徵；代表
【搭配詞】symbolize hope / symbolize peace / symbolize love
【例句】White flowers often symbolize purity.
{{tts en_US:White flowers often symbolize purity.}}
【用法說明】symbolize 指代表某種意義
【翻譯】白花常常象徵純潔。

{{tts en_US:symmetry}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】對稱；對稱美
【搭配詞】facial symmetry / perfect symmetry / symmetry in design
【例句】The building is admired for its symmetry.
{{tts en_US:The building is admired for its symmetry.}}
【用法說明】symmetry 指左右或整體平衡對稱
【翻譯】那棟建築因其對稱之美而受人欣賞。

{{tts en_US:sympathetic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】同情的；有同理心的
【搭配詞】sympathetic friend / be sympathetic / sympathetic to
【例句】She was very sympathetic when I told her.
{{tts en_US:She was very sympathetic when I told her.}}
【用法說明】sympathetic 指能理解並同情他人
【翻譯】我告訴她時，她很有同理心。

{{tts en_US:sympathize}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】同情；表示理解
【搭配詞】sympathize with / deeply sympathize / sympathize but
【例句】I sympathize with your situation.
{{tts en_US:I sympathize with your situation.}}
【用法說明】sympathize with 是固定搭配
【翻譯】我很同情你的處境。

{{tts en_US:sympathy}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】同情；慰問
【搭配詞】feel sympathy / express sympathy / out of sympathy
【例句】She showed sympathy for the victims.
{{tts en_US:She showed sympathy for the victims.}}
【用法說明】sympathy 指對他人處境的同情
【翻譯】她對受害者表達了同情。

{{tts en_US:symphony}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】交響樂；交響曲
【搭配詞】play a symphony / symphony orchestra / Beethoven symphony
【例句】We listened to a symphony at the concert hall.
{{tts en_US:We listened to a symphony at the concert hall.}}
【用法說明】symphony 指大型交響樂作品
【翻譯】我們在音樂廳聽了一場交響樂。

{{tts en_US:symptom}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】症狀
【搭配詞】flu symptom / early symptom / symptom of stress
【例句】A fever can be a symptom of infection.
{{tts en_US:A fever can be a symptom of infection.}}
【用法說明】symptom 是高頻醫療字
【翻譯】發燒可能是感染的症狀。

{{tts en_US:syndrome}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】症候群
【搭配詞】down syndrome / syndrome of / stress-related syndrome
【例句】The doctor explained the syndrome clearly.
{{tts en_US:The doctor explained the syndrome clearly.}}
【用法說明】syndrome 指一組相關症狀
【翻譯】醫生清楚說明了那種症候群。

{{tts en_US:synonym}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】同義詞
【搭配詞】English synonym / find a synonym / close synonym
【例句】Happy is a synonym for glad.
{{tts en_US:Happy is a synonym for glad.}}
【用法說明】synonym 指同義詞
【翻譯】happy 是 glad 的同義詞。

{{tts en_US:synthetic}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】合成的；人造的
【搭配詞】synthetic fabric / synthetic material / synthetic voice
【例句】This jacket is made of synthetic fiber.
{{tts en_US:This jacket is made of synthetic fiber.}}
【用法說明】synthetic 指人工製成
【翻譯】這件外套是用人造纖維做的。

{{tts en_US:syrup}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】糖漿
【搭配詞】maple syrup / cough syrup / chocolate syrup
【例句】She poured syrup over the pancakes.
{{tts en_US:She poured syrup over the pancakes.}}
【用法說明】syrup 指濃稠糖漿或藥水
【翻譯】她把糖漿淋在鬆餅上。

{{tts en_US:system}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】系統；制度
【搭配詞】computer system / education system / nervous system
【例句】The new system works well.
{{tts en_US:The new system works well.}}
【用法說明】system 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】這套新系統運作得很好。

{{tts en_US:systematic}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】有系統的；有條理的
【搭配詞】systematic approach / systematic review / be systematic
【例句】We need a more systematic plan.
{{tts en_US:We need a more systematic plan.}}
【用法說明】systematic 指依照清楚步驟進行
【翻譯】我們需要更有系統的計畫。

{{tts en_US:table}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】桌子；表格
【搭配詞】dining table / table of contents / table a motion
【例句】The books are on the table.
{{tts en_US:The books are on the table.}}
【用法說明】table 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】那些書在桌上。

{{tts en_US:tablet}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】平板；藥片；碑版
【搭配詞】tablet computer / take a tablet / stone tablet
【例句】He uses a tablet for reading.
{{tts en_US:He uses a tablet for reading.}}
【用法說明】tablet 常見於平板電腦或藥錠
【翻譯】他用平板閱讀。

{{tts en_US:tackle}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】處理； tackle；攔截
【搭配詞】tackle a problem / tackle box / football tackle
【例句】We need to tackle this issue now.
{{tts en_US:We need to tackle this issue now.}}
【用法說明】tackle 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們現在得處理這個問題。

{{tts en_US:tactic}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】策略；手法
【搭配詞】marketing tactic / negotiation tactic / effective tactic
【例句】That was a clever tactic.
{{tts en_US:That was a clever tactic.}}
【用法說明】tactic 指具體策略手法
【翻譯】那是一個聰明的策略。

{{tts en_US:tactics}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】策略；戰術
【搭配詞】business tactics / military tactics / use tactics
【例句】The coach changed the team's tactics.
{{tts en_US:The coach changed the team's tactics.}}
【用法說明】tactics 常用複數
【翻譯】教練改變了球隊的戰術。

{{tts en_US:tag}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】標籤；加標記
【搭配詞】price tag / tag your friend / luggage tag
【例句】Don't forget to tag your bag.
{{tts en_US:Don't forget to tag your bag.}}
【用法說明】tag 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】別忘了替你的包包掛上標籤。

{{tts en_US:tail}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】尾巴；尾端
【搭配詞】cat tail / tail light / the tail of the line
【例句】The dog wagged its tail.
{{tts en_US:The dog wagged its tail.}}
【用法說明】tail 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】那隻狗搖了搖尾巴。

{{tts en_US:tailor}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】裁縫師；量身訂做
【搭配詞】skilled tailor / tailor a suit / tailor the plan
【例句】The tailor adjusted the jacket.
{{tts en_US:The tailor adjusted the jacket.}}
【用法說明】tailor 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】裁縫師修改了那件外套。

{{tts en_US:take}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】拿；帶；花費；搭乘
【搭配詞】take a photo / take your time / take a bus
【例句】Please take your umbrella.
{{tts en_US:Please take your umbrella.}}
【用法說明】take 是超高頻動詞
【翻譯】請帶上你的傘。

{{tts en_US:tale}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】故事；傳說
【搭配詞】fairy tale / old tale / tale of adventure
【例句】My grandma told me a tale before bed.
{{tts en_US:My grandma told me a tale before bed.}}

【翻譯】我奶奶睡前會講故事給我聽。

{{tts en_US:talent}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】才能；天賦
【搭配詞】musical talent / show your talent / natural talent
【例句】She has a talent for music.
{{tts en_US:She has a talent for music.}}
【用法說明】talent 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】她很有音樂天分。

{{tts en_US:talk}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】說話；談話；演講
【搭配詞】talk to me / give a talk / small talk
【例句】Can we talk later?
{{tts en_US:Can we talk later?}}
【用法說明】talk 是超高頻動詞與名詞
【翻譯】我們晚點可以聊嗎？

{{tts en_US:talkative}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】愛說話的；健談的
【搭配詞】talkative child / very talkative / become talkative
【例句】She's usually quiet, but today she's talkative.
{{tts en_US:She's usually quiet, but today she's talkative.}}
【用法說明】talkative 指很愛講話
【翻譯】她平常很安靜，但今天特別健談。

{{tts en_US:tall}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】高的
【搭配詞】tall building / tall tree / very tall
【例句】He's very tall for his age.
{{tts en_US:He's very tall for his age.}}
【用法說明】tall 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】以他的年紀來說，他很高。

{{tts en_US:tame}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】馴服的；使馴服
【搭配詞】tame animal / tame horse / tame your hair
【例句】The rabbit is gentle and tame.
{{tts en_US:The rabbit is gentle and tame.}}
【用法說明】tame 可作形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】那隻兔子溫馴又乖。

{{tts en_US:tan}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】曬黑；棕褐色
【搭配詞】get a tan / tan skin / tan leather
【例句】She got a tan at the beach.
{{tts en_US:She got a tan at the beach.}}
【用法說明】tan 可作名詞、動詞或形容詞
【翻譯】她在海邊曬黑了。

{{tts en_US:tangerine}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】橘子；柑橘
【搭配詞】sweet tangerine / tangerine peel / box of tangerines
【例句】He peeled a tangerine for his son.
{{tts en_US:He peeled a tangerine for his son.}}
【用法說明】tangerine 指較小的橘類水果
【翻譯】他幫兒子剝了一顆橘子。

{{tts en_US:tangle}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】纏結；混亂
【搭配詞】tangle of wires / tangle with / hair got tangled
【例句】My necklace got tangled.
{{tts en_US:My necklace got tangled.}}
【用法說明】tangle 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我的項鍊打結了。

{{tts en_US:tank}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】水箱；坦克；槽
【搭配詞】water tank / fish tank / army tank
【例句】The fish are swimming in the tank.
{{tts en_US:The fish are swimming in the tank.}}
【用法說明】tank 用法很多，常見是水箱或魚缸
【翻譯】魚正在水箱裡游。

{{tts en_US:tap}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】水龍頭；輕敲；輕拍
【搭配詞】turn on the tap / tap on the door / tap your shoulder
【例句】Can you turn off the tap?
{{tts en_US:Can you turn off the tap?}}
【用法說明】tap 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】你可以把水龍頭關掉嗎？

{{tts en_US:tape}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】膠帶；錄音帶；貼住
【搭配詞】sticky tape / tape recorder / tape the box
【例句】Use tape to seal the package.
{{tts en_US:Use tape to seal the package.}}
【用法說明】tape 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】用膠帶把包裹封起來。

{{tts en_US:target}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】目標；對象；瞄準
【搭配詞】sales target / target audience / target the market
【例句】We finally reached our target.
{{tts en_US:We finally reached our target.}}
【用法說明】target 是高頻名詞與動詞
【翻譯】我們終於達成目標了。

{{tts en_US:task}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】任務；工作
【搭配詞】daily task / complete a task / difficult task
【例句】This task will take about an hour.
{{tts en_US:This task will take about an hour.}}
【用法說明】task 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】這個任務大概要花一小時。

{{tts en_US:taste}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】味道；品味；品嚐
【搭配詞】sweet taste / good taste / taste the soup
【例句】This soup tastes great.
{{tts en_US:This soup tastes great.}}
【用法說明】taste 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】這碗湯味道很棒。

{{tts en_US:tasty}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】好吃的
【搭配詞】tasty meal / tasty snack / really tasty
【例句】The noodles were simple but tasty.
{{tts en_US:The noodles were simple but tasty.}}
【用法說明】tasty 指味道不錯
【翻譯】那碗麵很簡單但很好吃。

{{tts en_US:tax}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】稅；課稅
【搭配詞】income tax / tax return / tax the rich
【例句】We have to pay tax on this income.
{{tts en_US:We have to pay tax on this income.}}
【用法說明】tax 是高頻名詞與動詞
【翻譯】這筆收入要繳稅。

{{tts en_US:taxicab/taxi/cab}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】計程車
【搭配詞】take a taxi / call a cab / taxi driver
【例句】We took a taxi to the station.
{{tts en_US:We took a taxi to the station.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 taxicab、taxi、cab 放在一起
【翻譯】我們搭計程車去車站。

{{tts en_US:tea}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】茶
【搭配詞】cup of tea / green tea / tea shop
【例句】Would you like some tea?
{{tts en_US:Would you like some tea?}}
【用法說明】tea 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】你要喝點茶嗎？

{{tts en_US:teach}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】教；教授
【搭配詞】teach English / teach someone to / teach at a school
【例句】She teaches math at a high school.
{{tts en_US:She teaches math at a high school.}}
【用法說明】teach 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】她在高中教數學。

{{tts en_US:teacher}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】老師
【搭配詞】English teacher / homeroom teacher / kind teacher
【例句】My teacher explained it clearly.
{{tts en_US:My teacher explained it clearly.}}
【用法說明】teacher 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】老師講得很清楚。

{{tts en_US:team}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】團隊；隊伍
【搭配詞】work as a team / soccer team / team leader
【例句】Our team won the game.
{{tts en_US:Our team won the game.}}
【用法說明】team 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我們隊贏了比賽。

{{tts en_US:teapot}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】茶壺
【搭配詞】ceramic teapot / small teapot / pour from the teapot
【例句】The teapot is still warm.
{{tts en_US:The teapot is still warm.}}
【用法說明】teapot 指茶壺
【翻譯】茶壺還是溫的。

{{tts en_US:tear}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】眼淚；撕裂
【搭配詞】tear in her eye / tear the paper / burst into tears
【例句】A tear rolled down her cheek.
{{tts en_US:A tear rolled down her cheek.}}
【用法說明】tear 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】一滴眼淚滑過她的臉頰。

{{tts en_US:tease}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】取笑；逗弄
【搭配詞】tease a friend / tease your hair / just teasing
【例句】Don't tease your little brother.
{{tts en_US:Don't tease your little brother.}}
【用法說明】tease 可指開玩笑逗人，也可指取笑
【翻譯】不要欺負鬧你弟弟。

{{tts en_US:technical}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】技術的；專業的
【搭配詞】technical problem / technical skill / technical support
【例句】We had a technical issue during the meeting.
{{tts en_US:We had a technical issue during the meeting.}}
【用法說明】technical 指和技術細節有關
【翻譯】我們開會時遇到技術問題。

{{tts en_US:technician}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】技術員
【搭配詞】lab technician / repair technician / computer technician
【例句】A technician came to fix the internet.
{{tts en_US:A technician came to fix the internet.}}
【用法說明】technician 指技術維修或操作人員
【翻譯】有位技術員來修網路。

{{tts en_US:technique}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】技巧；技法
【搭配詞】painting technique / breathing technique / learning technique
【例句】She has good interview technique.
{{tts en_US:She has good interview technique.}}
【用法說明】technique 指做事的方法與技巧
【翻譯】她的面試技巧很好。

{{tts en_US:technological}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】科技的；技術上的
【搭配詞】technological change / technological development / technological progress
【例句】The company invests in technological innovation.
{{tts en_US:The company invests in technological innovation.}}
【用法說明】technological 指與科技發展有關
【翻譯】那家公司投資科技創新。

{{tts en_US:technology}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】科技；技術
【搭配詞】modern technology / use technology / technology company
【例句】Technology changes quickly.
{{tts en_US:Technology changes quickly.}}
【用法說明】technology 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】科技變化很快。

{{tts en_US:tedious}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】乏味的；冗長的
【搭配詞】tedious task / tedious work / long and tedious
【例句】Filing the documents was tedious.
{{tts en_US:Filing the documents was tedious.}}
【用法說明】tedious 指做起來很無聊很耗人
【翻譯】整理那些文件很乏味。

{{tts en_US:teenage}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】青少年的
【搭配詞】teenage years / teenage girl / teenage life
【例句】He's in his teenage years now.
{{tts en_US:He's in his teenage years now.}}
【用法說明】teenage 指十幾歲階段
【翻譯】他現在正處於青少年時期。

{{tts en_US:teenager}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】青少年
【搭配詞】young teenager / teenage boy / group of teenagers
【例句】The park was full of teenagers.
{{tts en_US:The park was full of teenagers.}}
【用法說明】teenager 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】公園裡滿是青少年。

{{tts en_US:teens}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】十幾歲時期；青少年們
【搭配詞】in your teens / late teens / teens today
【例句】She learned to drive in her teens.
{{tts en_US:She learned to drive in her teens.}}
【用法說明】teens 可指十三到十九歲
【翻譯】她在十幾歲時學會開車。

{{tts en_US:telecommunications}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】電信；電訊
【搭配詞】telecommunications industry / telecommunications system / modern telecommunications
【例句】He works in telecommunications.
{{tts en_US:He works in telecommunications.}}
【用法說明】telecommunications 指通訊相關產業
【翻譯】他在電信業工作。

{{tts en_US:telegraph}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】電報；電報機；打電報
【搭配詞】send a telegraph / old telegraph / telegraph office
【例句】People once used the telegraph to send messages.
{{tts en_US:People once used the telegraph to send messages.}}
【用法說明】telegraph 指較早期的通訊方式
【翻譯】人們以前用電報傳遞訊息。

{{tts en_US:telephone/phone}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】電話
【搭配詞】answer the phone / phone call / telephone number
【例句】I'll call you on the phone later.
{{tts en_US:I'll call you on the phone later.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 telephone 和 phone 放在一起
【翻譯】我晚點打電話給你。

{{tts en_US:telescope}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】望遠鏡
【搭配詞】use a telescope / space telescope / look through a telescope
【例句】We used a telescope to see the moon.
{{tts en_US:We used a telescope to see the moon.}}
【用法說明】telescope 指望遠鏡
【翻譯】我們用望遠鏡看月亮。

{{tts en_US:television/TV}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】電視
【搭配詞】watch TV / television show / turn on the TV
【例句】We watched TV after dinner.
{{tts en_US:We watched TV after dinner.}}
【用法說明】這筆詞條把 television 和 TV 放在一起
【翻譯】我們晚餐後看了電視。

{{tts en_US:tell}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】告訴；分辨；說
【搭配詞】tell the truth / tell someone about / can tell
【例句】Please tell me what happened.
{{tts en_US:Please tell me what happened.}}
【用法說明】tell 是超高頻動詞
【翻譯】請告訴我發生了什麼事。

{{tts en_US:teller}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】櫃員；講述者
【搭配詞】bank teller / teller window / story teller
【例句】The bank teller helped me deposit cash.
{{tts en_US:The bank teller helped me deposit cash.}}
【用法說明】teller 最常指銀行櫃員
【翻譯】銀行櫃員幫我存了現金。

{{tts en_US:temper}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】脾氣；怒氣；調和
【搭配詞】lose your temper / bad temper / quick temper
【例句】He lost his temper during the argument.
{{tts en_US:He lost his temper during the argument.}}
【用法說明】temper 常見於 lose your temper
【翻譯】他在爭吵時發了脾氣。

{{tts en_US:temperature}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】溫度；體溫
【搭配詞】room temperature / body temperature / high temperature
【例句】The temperature dropped at night.
{{tts en_US:The temperature dropped at night.}}
【用法說明】temperature 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】晚上溫度下降了。

{{tts en_US:temple}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】寺廟；太陽穴
【搭配詞】visit a temple / ancient temple / tap your temple
【例句】We visited an old temple.
{{tts en_US:We visited an old temple.}}
【用法說明】temple 最常指寺廟
【翻譯】我們去了一座古老的寺廟。

{{tts en_US:tempo}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】速度；節奏
【搭配詞】fast tempo / slow tempo / change the tempo
【例句】The song has a quick tempo.
{{tts en_US:The song has a quick tempo.}}
【用法說明】tempo 指音樂或動作節奏
【翻譯】這首歌節奏很快。

{{tts en_US:temporary}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】暫時的
【搭配詞】temporary job / temporary solution / temporarily closed
【例句】This is only a temporary fix.
{{tts en_US:This is only a temporary fix.}}
【用法說明】temporary 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】這只是暫時的修補。

{{tts en_US:tempt}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】引誘；誘惑
【搭配詞】tempt someone / tempt fate / be tempted by
【例句】The dessert tempted me.
{{tts en_US:The dessert tempted me.}}
【用法說明】tempt 指讓人想去做某事
【翻譯】那份甜點讓我很想吃。

{{tts en_US:temptation}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】誘惑
【搭配詞】give in to temptation / strong temptation / resist temptation
【例句】Chocolate is always a temptation.
{{tts en_US:Chocolate is always a temptation.}}
【用法說明】temptation 指很難抗拒的誘惑
【翻譯】巧克力總是一種誘惑。

{{tts en_US:tenant}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】房客；租戶
【搭配詞】apartment tenant / new tenant / tenant agreement
【例句】The tenant pays rent on time.
{{tts en_US:The tenant pays rent on time.}}
【用法說明】tenant 指租房或租用空間的人
【翻譯】那位房客都準時繳房租。

{{tts en_US:tend}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】傾向；照顧；往往會
【搭配詞】tend to / tend a garden / tend the sick
【例句】I tend to wake up early.
{{tts en_US:I tend to wake up early.}}

【翻譯】我通常會早起。

{{tts en_US:tendency}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】傾向；趨勢
【搭配詞】natural tendency / tendency to / growing tendency
【例句】He has a tendency to worry too much.
{{tts en_US:He has a tendency to worry too much.}}
【用法說明】tendency 指容易往某方向發展
【翻譯】他有太容易擔心的傾向。

{{tts en_US:tender}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】溫柔的；嫩的；標書
【搭配詞】tender voice / tender meat / tender feelings
【例句】The chicken is tender and juicy.
{{tts en_US:The chicken is tender and juicy.}}
【用法說明】tender 可指口感嫩，也可指態度溫柔
【翻譯】這雞肉很嫩又多汁。

{{tts en_US:tennis}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】網球
【搭配詞】play tennis / tennis court / tennis ball
【例句】We play tennis on Sundays.
{{tts en_US:We play tennis on Sundays.}}
【用法說明】tennis 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我們星期天打網球。

{{tts en_US:tense}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】緊張的；時態
【搭配詞】feel tense / tense atmosphere / past tense
【例句】I felt tense before the exam.
{{tts en_US:I felt tense before the exam.}}
【用法說明】tense 可指情緒緊繃，也可指文法時態
【翻譯】考試前我很緊張。

{{tts en_US:tension}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】緊張；張力
【搭配詞】political tension / muscle tension / reduce tension
【例句】There was tension in the room.
{{tts en_US:There was tension in the room.}}
【用法說明】tension 指氣氛或身體上的緊繃
【翻譯】房間裡充滿緊張氣氛。

{{tts en_US:tent}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】帳篷
【搭配詞】put up a tent / camping tent / sleep in a tent
【例句】We slept in a tent by the lake.
{{tts en_US:We slept in a tent by the lake.}}
【用法說明】tent 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我們睡在湖邊的帳篷裡。

{{tts en_US:tentative}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】暫定的；試探性的
【搭配詞】tentative plan / tentative date / tentative agreement
【例句】We set a tentative meeting date.
{{tts en_US:We set a tentative meeting date.}}
【用法說明】tentative 指還可能變動
【翻譯】我們先定了一個暫時的會議日期。

{{tts en_US:term}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】學期；術語；期限
【搭配詞】school term / legal term / short-term plan
【例句】This term has been very busy.
{{tts en_US:This term has been very busy.}}
【用法說明】term 用法很多，常見是學期
【翻譯】這學期非常忙。

{{tts en_US:terminal}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】終點站；航廈；末期的
【搭配詞】bus terminal / airport terminal / terminal illness
【例句】Meet me at Terminal 1.
{{tts en_US:Meet me at Terminal 1.}}
【用法說明】terminal 用法很多，常見是航廈或終點站
【翻譯】在第一航廈跟我碰面。

{{tts en_US:thousand}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】一千；數千
【搭配詞】a thousand times / several thousand / thousand dollars
【例句】The hall can hold a thousand people.
{{tts en_US:The hall can hold a thousand people.}}
【用法說明】thousand 是高頻數字詞
【翻譯】那個大廳可以容納一千人。

{{tts en_US:thread}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】線；線索；討論串
【搭配詞】needle and thread / thread a needle / message thread
【例句】She used a needle and thread to fix the shirt.
{{tts en_US:She used a needle and thread to fix the shirt.}}
【用法說明】thread 可指縫線，也可指訊息串
【翻譯】她用針線把襯衫補好了。

{{tts en_US:threat}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】威脅
【搭配詞】serious threat / threat to safety / receive a threat
【例句】Climate change is a major threat.
{{tts en_US:Climate change is a major threat.}}
【用法說明】threat 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】氣候變遷是一大威脅。

{{tts en_US:threaten}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】威脅；可能造成危害
【搭配詞】threaten someone / threaten to leave / threaten wildlife
【例句】Dark clouds threatened rain.
{{tts en_US:Dark clouds threatened rain.}}
【用法說明】threaten 可指人為威脅，也可指可能發生不好的事
【翻譯】烏雲預示著要下雨了。

{{tts en_US:threshold}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】門檻；起點
【搭配詞】pain threshold / income threshold / cross the threshold
【例句】The project passed an important threshold.
{{tts en_US:The project passed an important threshold.}}
【用法說明】threshold 可指實際門檻或抽象臨界點
【翻譯】這個專案跨過了一個重要門檻。

{{tts en_US:thrill}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】興奮；刺激；使興奮
【搭配詞】sense of thrill / thrill someone / thrill ride
【例句】The roller coaster gave me a thrill.
{{tts en_US:The roller coaster gave me a thrill.}}
【用法說明】thrill 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】雲霄飛車讓我超刺激。

{{tts en_US:thriller}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】驚悚片；懸疑小說
【搭配詞】crime thriller / thriller movie / psychological thriller
【例句】We watched a thriller last night.
{{tts en_US:We watched a thriller last night.}}
【用法說明】thriller 指緊張刺激類型作品
【翻譯】我們昨晚看了一部驚悚片。

{{tts en_US:thrive}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】茁壯；蓬勃發展
【搭配詞】thrive in / plants thrive / thrive on challenges
【例句】These flowers thrive in sunlight.
{{tts en_US:These flowers thrive in sunlight.}}
【用法說明】thrive 指長得很好或發展得很好
【翻譯】這些花在陽光下長得很好。

{{tts en_US:throat}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】喉嚨
【搭配詞】sore throat / clear your throat / throat infection
【例句】I have a sore throat.
{{tts en_US:I have a sore throat.}}
【用法說明】throat 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我喉嚨痛。

{{tts en_US:throne}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】王位；寶座
【搭配詞】sit on the throne / royal throne / claim the throne
【例句】The king sat on the throne.
{{tts en_US:The king sat on the throne.}}
【用法說明】throne 指君主的寶座
【翻譯】國王坐在王位上。

{{tts en_US:through}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】穿過；透過；從頭到尾
【搭配詞】walk through / through the window / through the night
【例句】We walked through the park.
{{tts en_US:We walked through the park.}}
【用法說明】through 是高頻介系詞
【翻譯】我們走過了公園。

{{tts en_US:throughout}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】遍及；自始至終
【搭配詞】throughout the day / throughout the country / throughout history
【例句】It rained throughout the afternoon.
{{tts en_US:It rained throughout the afternoon.}}
【用法說明】throughout 指整段時間或整個範圍
【翻譯】整個下午都在下雨。

{{tts en_US:throw}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】丟；投；拋
【搭配詞】throw a ball / throw away / throw a party
【例句】He threw the ball to me.
{{tts en_US:He threw the ball to me.}}
【用法說明】throw 是高頻動詞
【翻譯】他把球丟給我。

{{tts en_US:thrust}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】推；刺；插入；推力
【搭配詞】thrust forward / thrust a knife / rocket thrust
【例句】She thrust the door open.
{{tts en_US:She thrust the door open.}}
【用法說明】thrust 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她猛地把門推開。

{{tts en_US:thumb}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】拇指
【搭配詞】thumbs up / hurt your thumb / rule of thumb
【例句】I cut my thumb while cooking.
{{tts en_US:I cut my thumb while cooking.}}
【用法說明】thumb 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我煮飯時割到拇指。

{{tts en_US:thunder}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】雷；打雷般轟響
【搭配詞】loud thunder / thunderstorm / thunder across the sky
【例句】We heard thunder in the distance.
{{tts en_US:We heard thunder in the distance.}}
【用法說明】thunder 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我們聽見遠方的雷聲。

{{tts en_US:thus}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】因此；如此
【搭配詞】thus far / and thus / thus making
【例句】The road was closed, thus we took another route.
{{tts en_US:The road was closed, thus we took another route.}}
【用法說明】thus 是較正式的『因此』
【翻譯】那條路封了，因此我們改走別條路。

{{tts en_US:tick}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】滴答聲；勾選；蜱蟲
【搭配詞】clock tick / tick the box / dog tick
【例句】Please tick the correct answer.
{{tts en_US:Please tick the correct answer.}}
【用法說明】tick 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】請勾選正確答案。

{{tts en_US:ticket}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】票；罰單
【搭配詞】train ticket / movie ticket / parking ticket
【例句】I bought two movie tickets.
{{tts en_US:I bought two movie tickets.}}
【用法說明】ticket 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我買了兩張電影票。

{{tts en_US:tickle}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】搔癢；使發癢
【搭配詞】tickle your feet / tickle someone / feel a tickle
【例句】The feather tickled my nose.
{{tts en_US:The feather tickled my nose.}}
【用法說明】tickle 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那根羽毛弄得我鼻子癢癢的。

{{tts en_US:tide}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】潮汐；潮流
【搭配詞】high tide / low tide / tide of change
【例句】The tide is coming in.
{{tts en_US:The tide is coming in.}}
【用法說明】tide 指海水漲退潮
【翻譯】漲潮了。

{{tts en_US:tidy}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】整齊的；整理
【搭配詞】tidy room / tidy up / keep tidy
【例句】Please keep your desk tidy.
{{tts en_US:Please keep your desk tidy.}}
【用法說明】tidy 可作形容詞或動詞
【翻譯】請把你的桌面保持整齊。

{{tts en_US:tie}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】綁；領帶；平手
【搭配詞】tie your shoes / wear a tie / end in a tie
【例句】He tied the rope tightly.
{{tts en_US:He tied the rope tightly.}}
【用法說明】tie 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他把繩子綁得很緊。

{{tts en_US:tiger}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】老虎
【搭配詞】wild tiger / baby tiger / tiger stripe
【例句】We saw a tiger at the zoo.
{{tts en_US:We saw a tiger at the zoo.}}
【用法說明】tiger 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我們在動物園看到了老虎。

{{tts en_US:tight}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】緊的；密切的；緊張的
【搭配詞】tight shoes / tight schedule / hold tight
【例句】These shoes feel too tight.
{{tts en_US:These shoes feel too tight.}}
【用法說明】tight 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】這雙鞋感覺太緊了。

{{tts en_US:tighten}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】拉緊；收緊；變嚴格
【搭配詞】tighten a screw / tighten security / tighten your belt
【例句】Please tighten the lid.
{{tts en_US:Please tighten the lid.}}
【用法說明】tighten 指讓東西更緊
【翻譯】請把蓋子轉緊。

{{tts en_US:tile}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】瓷磚；瓦片
【搭配詞】floor tile / bathroom tile / broken tile
【例句】The bathroom floor is covered with white tiles.
{{tts en_US:The bathroom floor is covered with white tiles.}}
【用法說明】tile 指磁磚或瓦片
【翻譯】浴室地板鋪滿了白色瓷磚。

{{tts en_US:till}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】直到；收銀機
【搭配詞】till tomorrow / cash till / until then
【例句】Wait here till I come back.
{{tts en_US:Wait here till I come back.}}
【用法說明】till 常等於 until
【翻譯】你在這裡等到我回來。

{{tts en_US:tilt}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】傾斜；斜度
【搭配詞】tilt your head / camera tilt / slight tilt
【例句】She tilted her head and smiled.
{{tts en_US:She tilted her head and smiled.}}
【用法說明】tilt 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她歪著頭笑了。

{{tts en_US:timber}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】木材；林木；伐木聲
【搭配詞】cut timber / timber industry / wooden timber
【例句】The house was built with timber.
{{tts en_US:The house was built with timber.}}
【用法說明】timber 指建築用木材
【翻譯】那棟房子是用木材蓋的。

{{tts en_US:time}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】時間；次數；時代
【搭配詞】what time / spend time / next time
【例句】I don't have much time today.
{{tts en_US:I don't have much time today.}}
【用法說明】time 是超高頻名詞
【翻譯】我今天沒有太多時間。

{{tts en_US:timetable}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】時間表；課表
【搭配詞】school timetable / train timetable / daily timetable
【例句】Check the timetable before you leave.
{{tts en_US:Check the timetable before you leave.}}
【用法說明】timetable 指課表或班次表
【翻譯】出發前先看一下時刻表。

{{tts en_US:timid}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】膽小的；羞怯的
【搭配詞】timid child / feel timid / timid smile
【例句】The puppy is shy and timid.
{{tts en_US:The puppy is shy and timid.}}
【用法說明】timid 指缺乏自信、怯怯的
【翻譯】那隻小狗既害羞又膽小。

{{tts en_US:tin}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】錫；罐頭；金屬盒
【搭配詞】tin can / cookie tin / made of tin
【例句】He opened a tin of soup.
{{tts en_US:He opened a tin of soup.}}
【用法說明】tin 可指金屬材質或罐頭容器
【翻譯】他打開了一罐湯。

{{tts en_US:tiny}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】極小的
【搭配詞】tiny room / tiny baby / tiny detail
【例句】The puppy was tiny and cute.
{{tts en_US:The puppy was tiny and cute.}}
【用法說明】tiny 指非常非常小
【翻譯】那隻小狗小小的，很可愛。

{{tts en_US:tip}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】尖端；小費；建議
【搭配詞】leave a tip / useful tip / tip of the pencil
【例句】Here's a tip for staying focused.
{{tts en_US:Here's a tip for staying focused.}}
【用法說明】tip 用法很多，常見是建議或小費
【翻譯】這裡有一個讓自己保持專注的小建議。

{{tts en_US:tiptoe}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】踮腳走；踮起腳尖
【搭配詞】walk on tiptoe / stand on tiptoe / tiptoe quietly
【例句】She tiptoed into the room.
{{tts en_US:She tiptoed into the room.}}
【用法說明】tiptoe 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】她踮著腳走進房間。

{{tts en_US:tire}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】輪胎；使疲倦
【搭配詞】flat tire / change a tire / tire someone out
【例句】The long walk tired me out.
{{tts en_US:The long walk tired me out.}}
【用法說明】tire 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】那段長路把我累壞了。

{{tts en_US:tired}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】累的；疲倦的
【搭配詞】feel tired / get tired of / look tired
【例句】I'm too tired to cook tonight.
{{tts en_US:I'm too tired to cook tonight.}}
【用法說明】tired 是高頻形容詞
【翻譯】我今晚累到不想煮飯。

{{tts en_US:tiresome}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】令人厭煩的；累人的
【搭配詞】tiresome task / tiresome delay / get tiresome
【例句】The repeated questions became tiresome.
{{tts en_US:The repeated questions became tiresome.}}
【用法說明】tiresome 指讓人覺得煩
【翻譯】那些重複的問題變得很煩人。

{{tts en_US:tissue}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】紙巾；組織
【搭配詞】paper tissue / tissue box / body tissue
【例句】Do you have a tissue?
{{tts en_US:Do you have a tissue?}}
【用法說明】tissue 最常指紙巾
【翻譯】你有紙巾嗎？

{{tts en_US:title}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】標題；頭銜；稱號
【搭配詞】book title / job title / title page
【例句】I forgot the title of the movie.
{{tts en_US:I forgot the title of the movie.}}
【用法說明】title 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我忘了那部電影的片名。

{{tts en_US:to}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】到；向；給；不定詞符號
【搭配詞】go to school / talk to me / want to go
【例句】I'm going to the store.
{{tts en_US:I'm going to the store.}}
【用法說明】to 是超高頻介系詞
【翻譯】我要去商店。

{{tts en_US:toast}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】吐司；烤；敬酒
【搭配詞】piece of toast / make a toast / burnt toast
【例句】I made toast for breakfast.
{{tts en_US:I made toast for breakfast.}}
【用法說明】toast 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】我早餐做了吐司。

{{tts en_US:tobacco}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】菸草
【搭配詞】tobacco industry / tobacco smoke / grow tobacco
【例句】Tobacco use is harmful to health.
{{tts en_US:Tobacco use is harmful to health.}}
【用法說明】tobacco 指製作香菸的植物與材料
【翻譯】使用菸草有害健康。

{{tts en_US:today}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】今天；如今
【搭配詞】later today / today is / in today's world
【例句】What are you doing today?
{{tts en_US:What are you doing today?}}
【用法說明】today 是超高頻副詞與名詞
【翻譯】你今天要做什麼？

{{tts en_US:toe}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】腳趾
【搭配詞】big toe / stub your toe / toe nail
【例句】I hit my toe on the chair.
{{tts en_US:I hit my toe on the chair.}}
【用法說明】toe 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我的腳趾撞到椅子了。

{{tts en_US:tofu}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】豆腐
【搭配詞】fried tofu / tofu soup / soft tofu
【例句】We had tofu and rice for lunch.
{{tts en_US:We had tofu and rice for lunch.}}
【用法說明】tofu 指豆腐
【翻譯】我們午餐吃了豆腐和飯。

{{tts en_US:together}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】一起；共同
【搭配詞】work together / stay together / put together
【例句】Let's walk home together.
{{tts en_US:Let's walk home together.}}
【用法說明】together 是高頻副詞
【翻譯】我們一起走回家吧。

{{tts en_US:toilet}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】馬桶；廁所
【搭配詞】clean the toilet / public toilet / toilet paper
【例句】Excuse me, where's the toilet?

【翻譯】麻煩；問題；使困擾
【搭配詞】in trouble / have trouble / trouble someone

【翻譯】不好意思麻煩你了。

{{tts en_US:troublesome}}

【翻譯】這個 bug 特別麻煩。

{{tts en_US:trout}}

【翻譯】鱒魚
【搭配詞】grilled trout / rainbow trout / catch trout
【例句】He caught a trout in the stream.
{{tts en_US:He caught a trout in the stream.}}
【用法說明】trout 指鱒魚
【翻譯】他在溪裡釣到一條鱒魚。

{{tts en_US:truck}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】卡車
【搭配詞】delivery truck / truck driver / drive a truck
【例句】A truck was parked outside.
{{tts en_US:A truck was parked outside.}}
【用法說明】truck 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】外面停著一台卡車。

{{tts en_US:true}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】真的；真實的；正確的
【搭配詞】come true / true story / that's true

【翻譯】你真的搬家了嗎？

{{tts en_US:trumpet}}

【翻譯】小號；喇叭
【搭配詞】play the trumpet / trumpet sound / brass trumpet
【例句】He has been learning the trumpet for two years.

【翻譯】他學小號已經兩年了。

{{tts en_US:trunk}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】樹幹；後車廂；象鼻
【搭配詞】tree trunk / car trunk / elephant trunk
【例句】I put the bags in the trunk.
{{tts en_US:I put the bags in the trunk.}}

【翻譯】我把包包放進後車廂。

{{tts en_US:trust}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】信任；相信；委託
【搭配詞】trust someone / build trust / in trust
【例句】You can trust me.
{{tts en_US:You can trust me.}}

【翻譯】你可以相信我。

{{tts en_US:trustee}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】受託人；董事
【搭配詞】board trustee / trustee meeting / appointed trustee
【例句】The trustee signed the document.
{{tts en_US:The trustee signed the document.}}
【用法說明】trustee 指受託管理的人
【翻譯】那位受託人簽了文件。

{{tts en_US:truth}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】真相；事實
【搭配詞】tell the truth / face the truth / hidden truth
【例句】I just want to know the truth.
{{tts en_US:I just want to know the truth.}}
【用法說明】truth 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我只是想知道真相。

{{tts en_US:truthful}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】誠實的；真實的
【搭配詞】truthful answer / be truthful / truthful report
【例句】Please be truthful with me.
{{tts en_US:Please be truthful with me.}}
【用法說明】truthful 指說真話的
【翻譯】請誠實地告訴我。

{{tts en_US:try}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】嘗試；試圖
【搭配詞】try again / try to / try your best
【例句】I'll try to finish it today.
{{tts en_US:I'll try to finish it today.}}
【用法說明】try 是超高頻動詞
【翻譯】我會試著今天把它做完。

{{tts en_US:T-shirt}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】T 恤
【搭配詞】white T-shirt / wear a T-shirt / cotton T-shirt
【例句】He wore a black T-shirt.
{{tts en_US:He wore a black T-shirt.}}
【用法說明】T-shirt 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】他穿著一件黑色 T 恤。

{{tts en_US:tub}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】盆；桶；浴盆
【搭配詞】ice cream tub / bathtub / plastic tub
【例句】She filled the tub with water.
{{tts en_US:She filled the tub with water.}}
【用法說明】tub 指大盆或浴盆
【翻譯】她把盆裡裝滿了水。

{{tts en_US:tube}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】管子；地鐵；試管
【搭配詞】tube of toothpaste / test tube / take the Tube
【例句】He squeezed the last bit from the tube.
{{tts en_US:He squeezed the last bit from the tube.}}
【用法說明】tube 用法很多，常見是軟管
【翻譯】他把軟管裡最後一點擠了出來。

{{tts en_US:tuck}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】塞進；把…摺好掖好
【搭配詞】tuck in your shirt / tuck into bed / tuck away
【例句】She tucked the blanket around the baby.
{{tts en_US:She tucked the blanket around the baby.}}
【用法說明】tuck 指把邊角塞好
【翻譯】她把毯子好好掖在寶寶身邊。

{{tts en_US:tug}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】用力拉；猛拉
【搭配詞】tug at / give a tug / tug the rope
【例句】The child tugged at my sleeve.
{{tts en_US:The child tugged at my sleeve.}}
【用法說明】tug 指短暫用力拉
【翻譯】那個孩子拉了拉我的袖子。

{{tts en_US:tuition}}

【翻譯】學費；授課
【搭配詞】pay tuition / tuition fee / private tuition
【例句】College tuition is expensive.
{{tts en_US:College tuition is expensive.}}
【用法說明】tuition 常指學費
【翻譯】大學學費很貴。

{{tts en_US:tumble}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】跌倒；翻滾；暴跌
【搭配詞】tumble down / prices tumble / tumble in the dryer
【例句】He tumbled down the hill.
{{tts en_US:He tumbled down the hill.}}
【用法說明】tumble 可作名詞或動詞
【翻譯】他從山坡上滾了下去。

{{tts en_US:tumor}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】腫瘤
【搭配詞】brain tumor / remove a tumor / benign tumor
【例句】The scan showed a small tumor.
{{tts en_US:The scan showed a small tumor.}}
【用法說明】tumor 指腫瘤
【翻譯】掃描顯示有一個小腫瘤。

{{tts en_US:tuna}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】鮪魚
【搭配詞】tuna sandwich / canned tuna / tuna salad
【例句】I made a tuna sandwich for lunch.
{{tts en_US:I made a tuna sandwich for lunch.}}
【用法說明】tuna 指鮪魚
【翻譯】我午餐做了鮪魚三明治。

{{tts en_US:tune}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】曲調；調音；調整
【搭配詞】catchy tune / tune a guitar / stay tuned
【例句】She hummed a cheerful tune.
{{tts en_US:She hummed a cheerful tune.}}

【翻譯】她哼著一段輕快的旋律。

{{tts en_US:tunnel}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】隧道
【搭配詞】road tunnel / tunnel entrance / go through a tunnel
【例句】The train entered the tunnel.
{{tts en_US:The train entered the tunnel.}}
【用法說明】tunnel 指隧道
【翻譯】火車進入了隧道。

{{tts en_US:turmoil}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】混亂；動盪
【搭配詞】political turmoil / emotional turmoil / in turmoil
【例句】The country was in turmoil.
{{tts en_US:The country was in turmoil.}}
【用法說明】turmoil 指混亂不安的狀態

{{tts en_US:turn}}

【翻譯】轉彎；輪流；變成
【搭配詞】turn left / your turn / turn red
【例句】Turn right at the next corner.
{{tts en_US:Turn right at the next corner.}}

{{tts en_US:turtle}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】烏龜；海龜
【搭配詞】sea turtle / pet turtle / turtle shell
【例句】A turtle crossed the road slowly.
{{tts en_US:A turtle crossed the road slowly.}}

【翻譯】一隻烏龜慢慢穿過馬路。

{{tts en_US:tutor}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】家教；指導老師
【搭配詞】math tutor / private tutor / tutor someone
【例句】She works as a part-time tutor.
{{tts en_US:She works as a part-time tutor.}}

【翻譯】她兼職當家教。

{{tts en_US:twice}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】兩次；兩倍
【搭配詞】think twice / twice a week / twice as much

{{tts en_US:I go to the gym twice a week.}}

{{tts en_US:twig}}
【等級】Level 4
【翻譯】細枝；嫩枝
【搭配詞】small twig / broken twig / twig snap
【例句】A bird landed on a thin twig.
{{tts en_US:A bird landed on a thin twig.}}

{{tts en_US:twilight}}

【翻譯】黃昏；暮光
【搭配詞】at twilight / twilight sky / evening twilight

{{tts en_US:twin}}
【等級】Level 3
【翻譯】雙胞胎之一；成雙的
【搭配詞】twin sister / twin beds / identical twins
【例句】She has a twin brother.
{{tts en_US:She has a twin brother.}}

{{tts en_US:twinkle}}

【翻譯】閃爍；眨眼般發亮
【搭配詞】stars twinkle / twinkle in your eyes / twinkling lights

{{tts en_US:twist}}

【翻譯】扭轉；扭曲；轉折
【搭配詞】twist the cap / plot twist / twist your ankle
【例句】Twist the lid to open the bottle.
{{tts en_US:Twist the lid to open the bottle.}}

【翻譯】把蓋子轉開就能打開瓶子。

{{tts en_US:type}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】類型；打字；字體
【搭配詞】blood type / type a message / this type of

{{tts en_US:What type of music do you like?}}

{{tts en_US:typhoon}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】颱風
【搭配詞】strong typhoon / typhoon warning / typhoon season
【例句】A typhoon is expected this weekend.

【翻譯】這個週末預計會有颱風。

{{tts en_US:typical}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】典型的；平常的
【搭配詞】typical day / typical example / that's typical
【例句】This is a typical summer day.
{{tts en_US:This is a typical summer day.}}
【用法說明】typical 指很有代表性的
【翻譯】這是很典型的夏日。

{{tts en_US:ugly}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】醜的；難看的
【搭配詞】ugly building / ugly color / look ugly
【例句】That shirt is kind of ugly.

【翻譯】那件襯衫有點醜。

{{tts en_US:ultimate}}

【翻譯】最終的；終極的
【搭配詞】ultimate goal / ultimate decision / ultimate test
【例句】Our ultimate goal is to help people.
{{tts en_US:Our ultimate goal is to help people.}}

【翻譯】我們的最終目標是幫助人。

{{tts en_US:umbrella}}
【等級】Level 2
【翻譯】雨傘；保護傘
【搭配詞】carry an umbrella / umbrella stand / under the umbrella
【例句】Don't forget your umbrella.
{{tts en_US:Don't forget your umbrella.}}
【用法說明】umbrella 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】別忘了帶雨傘。

{{tts en_US:unanimous}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】一致同意的；全體一致的
【搭配詞】unanimous decision / unanimous vote / be unanimous
【例句】The committee reached a unanimous decision.
{{tts en_US:The committee reached a unanimous decision.}}
【用法說明】unanimous 指所有人意見一致
【翻譯】委員會做出了一致通過的決定。

{{tts en_US:uncle}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】叔叔；舅舅；伯伯
【搭配詞】my uncle / favorite uncle / uncle and aunt
【例句】My uncle lives in Tainan.
{{tts en_US:My uncle lives in Tainan.}}
【用法說明】uncle 是高頻名詞
【翻譯】我叔叔住在台南。

{{tts en_US:unconditional}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】無條件的
【搭配詞】unconditional love / unconditional support / unconditional surrender
【例句】Parents often offer unconditional love.
{{tts en_US:Parents often offer unconditional love.}}
【用法說明】unconditional 指不附帶條件
【翻譯】父母常常給出無條件的愛。

{{tts en_US:uncover}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】揭開；發現
【搭配詞】uncover the truth / uncover a secret / uncover the dish
【例句】The report uncovered serious problems.
{{tts en_US:The report uncovered serious problems.}}
【用法說明】uncover 指掀開或揭露出來
【翻譯】那份報告揭露了嚴重問題。

{{tts en_US:under}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】在…下面；少於；在控制下
【搭配詞】under the table / under pressure / under ten
【例句】The cat is hiding under the bed.
{{tts en_US:The cat is hiding under the bed.}}
【用法說明】under 是超高頻介系詞
【翻譯】那隻貓躲在床底下。

{{tts en_US:underestimate}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】低估；看輕
【搭配詞】underestimate the risk / underestimate someone / seriously underestimate
【例句】Don't underestimate how hard this is.
{{tts en_US:Don't underestimate how hard this is.}}
【用法說明】underestimate 指把程度看得太低
【翻譯】別低估這件事有多難。

{{tts en_US:undergo}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】經歷；接受
【搭配詞】undergo surgery / undergo change / undergo training
【例句】She will undergo surgery tomorrow.
{{tts en_US:She will undergo surgery tomorrow.}}
【用法說明】undergo 常見於經歷重大變化或手術
【翻譯】她明天要接受手術。

{{tts en_US:undergraduate}}

【翻譯】大學生；大學部的
【搭配詞】undergraduate student / undergraduate degree / as an undergraduate
【例句】He is an undergraduate at NTU.
{{tts en_US:He is an undergraduate at NTU.}}
【用法說明】undergraduate 可作名詞或形容詞
【翻譯】他是台大的大學生。

{{tts en_US:underline}}
【等級】Level 5
【翻譯】在…下劃線；強調
【搭配詞】underline the sentence / underline the importance / red underline

{{tts en_US:Please underline the key words.}}

【翻譯】請把關鍵字畫底線。

{{tts en_US:underlying}}

【翻譯】潛在的；根本的
【搭配詞】underlying cause / underlying problem / underlying idea

{{tts en_US:undermine}}

【翻譯】削弱；破壞
【搭配詞】undermine confidence / undermine trust / undermine the system

{{tts en_US:underpass}}
【等級】Level 6
【翻譯】地下道
【搭配詞】pedestrian underpass / road underpass / walk through the underpass
【例句】We crossed the road through the underpass.
{{tts en_US:We crossed the road through the underpass.}}
【用法說明】underpass 指地下通道
【翻譯】我們走地下道過馬路。

{{tts en_US:understand}}
【等級】Level 1
【翻譯】理解；明白
【搭配詞】understand clearly / understand the problem / I understand
【例句】I understand what you mean.
{{tts en_US:I understand what you mean.}}

【翻譯】我懂你的意思。

{{tts en_US:undertake}}

【翻譯】承擔；著手進行
【搭配詞】undertake a project / undertake responsibility / undertake research
【例句】The team undertook a difficult task.

{{tts en_US:underway}}

【翻譯】在進行中
【搭配詞】project underway / get underway / already underway
【例句】The repairs are now underway.
{{tts en_US:The repairs are now underway.}}
